273|81f0bc|                    at: url,

275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }

298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }

134|69d728|@MainActor
135|fe2d1c|class GitManager: ObservableObject {
136|3ee011|    static let shared = GitManager()
137|b4687f|    
138|a6df6f|    // MARK: - Published State
139|b4687f|    
140|f8b7f2|    @Published var isRepository: Bool = false
141|143b6b|    @Published var currentBranch: String = "main"
142|4f0eb3|    @Published var branches: [GitBranch] = []
143|254438|    @Published var remoteBranches: [GitBranch] = []
144|087468|    @Published var stagedChanges: [GitFileChange] = []
145|2f344d|    @Published var unstagedChanges: [GitFileChange] = []
146|6d948f|    @Published var untrackedFiles: [GitFileChange] = []
147|79fc52|    @Published var recentCommits: [GitCommit] = []
148|ac5590|    @Published var stashes: [GitStashEntry] = []
149|e588e6|    @Published var isLoading: Bool = false
150|ced50d|    @Published var lastError: String?
151|2c2fe3|    @Published var aheadCount: Int = 0
152|470fd2|    @Published var behindCount: Int = 0
153|b4687f|    
154|e28cad|    private var workingDirectory: URL?
155|28e1f5|    private var nativeReader: NativeGitReader?
156|924ed0|    private var nativeWriter: NativeGitWriter?
157|b4687f|    
158|54113e|    private init() {}
159|b4687f|    
160|43f74b|    // MARK: - Repository Setup
161|b4687f|    
162|754bc0|    func setWorkingDirectory(_ url: URL?) {
163|795ec8|        self.workingDirectory = url
164|d6ed84|        
165|e43f58|        if let url {
166|0d8835|            self.nativeReader = NativeGitReader(repositoryURL: url)
167|d5f9ae|            self.nativeWriter = NativeGitWriter(repositoryURL: url)
168|71286a|            self.isRepository = (self.nativeReader != nil)
169|b31999|        } else {
170|13238f|            self.nativeReader = nil
171|afe6f4|            self.nativeWriter = nil
172|6bc6df|            self.isRepository = false
173|5f3077|        }
174|d6ed84|        
175|f4140b|        if isRepository {
176|2bb1e0|            Task { await refresh() }
177|b31999|        } else {
178|e4ade3|            clearRepository()
179|5f3077|        }
180|27e597|    }
181|b4687f|    
182|46db57|    func clearRepository() {
183|78dc66|        isRepository = false
184|d7f3a5|        currentBranch = "main"
185|b42be3|        branches = []
186|98fabb|        remoteBranches = []
187|9501c8|        stagedChanges = []
188|f62fa3|        unstagedChanges = []
189|a42b5b|        untrackedFiles = []
190|082a68|        recentCommits = []
191|7604df|        stashes = []
192|f0416e|        lastError = nil
193|27e597|    }
194|b4687f|    
195|24d09e|    // MARK: - Git Operations
196|b4687f|    
197|698888|    func refresh() async {
198|d52924|        isLoading = true
199|9c61fa|        defer { isLoading = false }
200|f0416e|        lastError = nil
201|d6ed84|        
202|b444e2|        guard let reader = nativeReader else {
203|8b820e|            lastError = "No git repository found"
204|bef5d6|            return
205|5f3077|        }
206|d6ed84|        
207|804616|        // Current branch
208|a2eb60|        currentBranch = reader.currentBranch() ?? "HEAD"
209|d6ed84|        
210|51e308|        // Branches
211|45f1be|        let localBranchNames = reader.localBranches()
212|caf998|        branches = localBranchNames.map { name in
213|53c644|            GitBranch(name: name, isRemote: false, isCurrent: name == currentBranch)
214|5f3077|        }
215|d6ed84|        
216|95ddd9|        let remoteBranchPairs = reader.remoteBranches()
217|8c6249|        remoteBranches = remoteBranchPairs.map { (remote, branch) in
218|6f1cd3|            GitBranch(name: "\(remote)/\(branch)", isRemote: true, isCurrent: false)
219|5f3077|        }
220|d6ed84|        
221|0a3885|        // Status
222|92252a|        let fileStatuses = reader.status()
223|d6ed84|        
224|4f9ab0|        stagedChanges = fileStatuses.compactMap { status -> GitFileChange? in
225|99c683|            guard let staged = status.staged else { return nil }
226|5ac02f|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: mapStatusType(staged), staged: true)
227|5f3077|        }
228|d6ed84|        
229|a813d6|        unstagedChanges = fileStatuses.compactMap { status -> GitFileChange? in
230|3d5fa5|            guard let working = status.working else { return nil }
231|c3fce9|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: mapStatusType(working), staged: false)
232|5f3077|        }
233|d6ed84|        
234|251543|        untrackedFiles = fileStatuses.compactMap { status -> GitFileChange? in
235|c3b94d|            guard status.working == .untracked else { return nil }
236|80a4a3|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: .untracked, staged: false)
237|5f3077|        }
238|d6ed84|        
239|e17e18|        // Recent commits
240|1f2245|        let commits = reader.recentCommits(count: 20)
241|ae143e|        recentCommits = commits.map { commit in
242|a4114d|            GitCommit(id: commit.sha, message: commit.message, author: commit.author, date: commit.authorDate)
243|5f3077|        }
244|27e597|    }
245|b4687f|    
246|cd06a1|    private func mapStatusType(_ status: GitStatusType) -> GitChangeKind {
247|845f72|        switch status {
248|710db6|        case .modified: return .modified
249|899ede|        case .added: return .added
250|4e70e5|        case .deleted: return .deleted
251|b204a9|        case .renamed: return .renamed
252|997535|        case .copied: return .copied
253|fa020b|        case .untracked: return .untracked
254|6f806d|        case .ignored: return .ignored
255|5f3077|        }
256|27e597|    }
257|b4687f|    
258|7a1b57|    /// Build a real diff for a working-copy file against HEAD (offline, using NativeGitReader).
259|422db6|    func diffWorkingCopyToHEAD(path: String, kind: GitChangeKind) async -> DiffFile? {
260|a40fde|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { return nil }
261|d6ed84|        
262|0dc171|        return await Task.detached {
263|3519ac|            guard let reader = NativeGitReader(repositoryURL: repoURL) else { return nil }
264|3070d1|            
265|83a740|            let headSha = reader.headSHA()
266|85bb51|            let oldText = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: path, commitSHA: headSha) ?? ""
267|3070d1|            
268|b35691|            let workingURL = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(path)
269|567024|            let newText = (try? String(contentsOf: workingURL, encoding: .utf8)) ?? ""
270|3070d1|            
271|848698|            return DiffBuilder.build(
272|d02bb2|                fileName: path,
273|7e8d9b|                status: kind.rawValue,
274|7f9b45|                old: oldText,
275|87834e|                new: newText
276|43d041|            )
277|2ecb78|        }.value
278|27e597|    }
279|b4687f|    
280|707ea2|    func stage(file: String) async throws {
281|e1bfbb|        guard let writer = nativeWriter else {
282|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
283|5f3077|        }
284|bd709d|        try writer.stageFile(path: file)
285|61ed9d|        await refresh()
286|27e597|    }
287|b4687f|    
288|6b4fc1|    func stageAll() async throws {
289|e1bfbb|        guard let writer = nativeWriter else {

295|b4687f|

299|5f3077|        }
300|e95e41|        try writer.unstageFile(path: file)
301|61ed9d|        await refresh()
302|27e597|    }
303|b4687f|    
304|0163dc|    func commit(message: String) async throws {
305|d9ce95|        guard let dir = workingDirectory else {
306|bfc324|            throw GitManagerError.noRepository
307|5f3077|        }
308|e1bfbb|        guard let writer = nativeWriter else {
309|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
310|5f3077|        }
311|d66412|        let sha = try writer.commit(message: message)
312|61ed9d|        await refresh()

314|b4687f|    
315|8bd662|    func checkout(branch: String) async throws {
316|bc04c9|        // Local branch checkout via ref file manipulation
317|56aa58|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else {
318|bfc324|            throw GitManagerError.noRepository
319|5f3077|        }
320|d6ed84|        
321|9b2e3a|        let refPath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(".git/refs/heads/\(branch)")
322|4b52aa|        guard FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: refPath.path) else {
323|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
324|5f3077|        }
325|d6ed84|        
326|e1fb71|        // Update HEAD to point to the branch
327|12c7b8|        let headPath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(".git/HEAD")
328|d578f4|        try "ref: refs/heads/\(branch)\n".write(to: headPath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
329|d6ed84|        
330|5bbb8c|        currentBranch = branch
331|61ed9d|        await refresh()
332|27e597|    }
333|b4687f|    
334|7440d7|    func createBranch(name: String) async throws {
335|7ac4a0|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory,
336|cb37c3|              let reader = nativeReader,
337|9ea91d|              let headSHA = reader.headSHA() else {
338|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
339|5f3077|        }
340|d6ed84|        
341|0a7a99|        // Create branch ref file
342|91e869|        let refPath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(".git/refs/heads/\(name)")
343|e1760b|        try headSHA.write(to: refPath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
344|d6ed84|        
345|61ed9d|        await refresh()
346|27e597|    }
347|b4687f|    
348|7ecbb9|    func deleteBranch(name: String) async throws {
349|56aa58|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else {
350|bfc324|            throw GitManagerError.noRepository
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|f93625|        // Can't delete current branch
354|73bf3f|        guard name != currentBranch else {
355|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
356|5f3077|        }
357|d6ed84|        
358|91e869|        let refPath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(".git/refs/heads/\(name)")
359|78eda2|        try FileManager.default.removeItem(at: refPath)
360|d6ed84|        
361|61ed9d|        await refresh()
362|27e597|    }

398|3b3ea2|    func discard(file: String) async throws {
399|ad5dbf|        // Discard changes by restoring from HEAD
400|7ac4a0|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory,
401|4ba5ca|              let reader = nativeReader else {
402|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
403|5f3077|        }
404|d6ed84|        
405|c615d4|        // Get file content from HEAD
406|e2e112|        if let headSHA = reader.headSHA(),
407|5eb0d8|           let content = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: file, commitSHA: headSHA) {
408|e883ab|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file)
409|144328|            try content.write(to: filePath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
410|b31999|        } else {
411|37d681|            // File doesn't exist in HEAD - delete it
412|e883ab|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file)
413|7528cd|            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: filePath)
414|5f3077|        }
415|d6ed84|        
416|61ed9d|        await refresh()
417|27e597|    }
418|b4687f|    
419|a51d62|    func discardAll() async throws {
420|f978f9|        // Discard all changes by restoring each file from HEAD
421|d11253|        for change in unstagedChanges {
422|025908|            try await discard(file: change.path)
423|5f3077|        }
424|9f2c52|        for file in untrackedFiles {
425|6e5080|            guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { continue }
426|079d80|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file.path)
427|7528cd|            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: filePath)
428|5f3077|        }
429|61ed9d|        await refresh()
430|27e597|    }
431|b4687f|    
432|83db62|    func discardChanges(file: String) async throws {
433|ec122b|        try await discard(file: file)
434|27e597|    }

162|2aa4ad|    init(hex: String) {
163|a6780c|        let hex = hex.trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet.alphanumerics.inverted)
164|2abdc7|        var int: UInt64 = 0
165|bc542d|        Scanner(string: hex).scanHexInt64(&int)
166|d580d5|        let a, r, g, b: UInt64
167|3c6530|        switch hex.count {
168|99c972|        case 3: // RGB (12-bit)
169|3dddf7|            (a, r, g, b) = (255, (int >> 8) * 17, (int >> 4 & 0xF) * 17, (int & 0xF) * 17)
170|68f5fc|        case 6: // RGB (24-bit)
171|887140|            (a, r, g, b) = (255, int >> 16, int >> 8 & 0xFF, int & 0xFF)
172|f9a927|        case 8: // ARGB (32-bit)
173|f3f01d|            (a, r, g, b) = (int >> 24, int >> 16 & 0xFF, int >> 8 & 0xFF, int & 0xFF)
174|520b7d|        default:
175|30aca1|            (a, r, g, b) = (1, 1, 1, 0)
176|5f3077|        }
177|12bb4e|        self.init(
178|505cc1|            .sRGB,
179|23ff46|            red: Double(r) / 255,
180|86e915|            green: Double(g) / 255,
181|cd3d7a|            blue: Double(b) / 255,
182|6a9c25|            opacity: Double(a) / 255
183|3143a4|        )
184|27e597|    }

5|6486b8|// MARK: - CodeExecutionService
6|adc83b|
7|260b9d|/// Service that handles code execution requests from the Run menu.
8|f40e11|/// Routes execution to appropriate runners based on file type and outputs results to the Output panel.
9|69d728|@MainActor
10|a43a38|final class CodeExecutionService {
11|6dc112|    static let shared = CodeExecutionService()
12|b4687f|    
13|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
14|b4687f|    
15|37bd08|    private var jsRunner: JSRunner?
16|33c15c|    private let outputManager = OutputPanelManager.shared
17|b4687f|    
18|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
19|b4687f|    
20|54113e|    private init() {}
21|b4687f|    
22|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
23|b4687f|    
24|d148d5|    /// Execute the currently active file
25|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
26|4cfe18|    ///   - fileName: Name of the file to execute
27|13e212|    ///   - content: Content/code of the file
28|97d12a|    func executeCurrentFile(fileName: String, content: String) {
29|cc9311|        let fileExtension = (fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
30|d6ed84|        
31|2eea91|        switch fileExtension {
32|ff039a|        case "js", "mjs":
33|760a4e|            executeJavaScript(fileName: fileName, code: content)
34|048ca0|        case "ts", "tsx":
35|b896b9|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] TypeScript execution requires transpilation. Coming soon!", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
36|de8aa1|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
37|e1d221|        case "py":
38|9e2a3c|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] Python execution not yet available on-device.", to: OutputChannel.python, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
39|25499b|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.python
40|520b7d|        default:
41|cc7290|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] No runner available for .\(fileExtension) files", to: OutputChannel.output, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
42|c75b79|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.output
43|5f3077|        }
44|27e597|    }
45|b4687f|    
46|9b6f68|    // MARK: - JavaScript Execution
47|b4687f|    
48|d76b7d|    private func executeJavaScript(fileName: String, code: String) {
49|0dec37|        // Switch to JavaScript output channel
50|e39e9c|        outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
51|d6ed84|        
52|a728d5|        // Clear previous output and show execution header
53|1511a8|        outputManager.clear(OutputChannel.javascript)
54|6cfb10|        outputManager.append("▶ Running: \(fileName)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
55|89174a|        outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
56|d6ed84|        
57|a3f62b|        // Create a fresh JSRunner instance
58|462f68|        jsRunner = JSRunner()
59|d6ed84|        
60|e61664|        // Set up console handler to capture output
61|305ad3|        jsRunner?.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
62|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
63|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
64|216278|                
65|b169c6|                // Determine stream type based on message prefix
66|27b18b|                let streamType: StreamType = message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") || message.hasPrefix("[EXCEPTION]") ? StreamType.stderr : StreamType.stdout
67|216278|                
68|4b39b7|                // Remove the prefix for cleaner output display
69|62636a|                var cleanMessage = message
70|121995|                for prefix in ["[LOG] ", "[INFO] ", "[WARN] ", "[ERROR] ", "[EXCEPTION] "] {
71|1df682|                    if message.hasPrefix(prefix) {
72|11af1f|                        cleanMessage = String(message.dropFirst(prefix.count))
73|28a64b|                        break
74|c9717a|                    }
75|4e2d32|                }
76|216278|                
77|6a3616|                self.outputManager.append(cleanMessage, to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: streamType)
78|a7dc16|            }
79|5f3077|        }
80|d6ed84|        
81|5a9195|        // Execute the code asynchronously
82|0f1953|        Task {
83|073be0|            let startTime = Date()
84|3070d1|            
85|71cc09|            do {
86|f3a1fd|                let result = try await jsRunner?.execute(code: code)
87|1ee120|                let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
88|216278|                
89|73b1fb|                // Show result if it's not undefined
90|f23508|                if let result = result, !result.isUndefined {
91|8a7075|                    let resultString = formatJSValue(result)
92|174733|                    outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
93|1c40a4|                    outputManager.append("⮐ Result: \(resultString)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
94|4e2d32|                }
95|216278|                
96|b2c6e7|                // Show completion message
97|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
98|2c8c65|                outputManager.append("✓ Completed in \(String(format: "%.2f", duration * 1000))ms", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
99|216278|                
100|77a0dc|            } catch let error as JSRunnerError {
101|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
102|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
103|216278|                
104|91b9a2|            } catch {
105|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
106|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
107|a7dc16|            }
108|3070d1|

65|5507e2|    func font(forFamily family: String, size: CGFloat) -> UIFont {
66|36809c|        // Try common iOS font PostScript names first.
67|8eed34|        let candidates: [String]
68|b37ed2|        switch family {
69|776aba|        case "Menlo":
70|bfb914|            candidates = ["Menlo-Regular", "Menlo"]
71|08b76c|        case "Courier New":
72|fb8c13|            candidates = ["CourierNewPSMT", "Courier New"]
73|0cfb7f|        case "SF Mono":
74|0617dd|            candidates = ["SFMono-Regular", "SF Mono", ".SFMono-Regular"]
75|0298e7|        case "Fira Code":
76|dc7760|            candidates = ["FiraCode-Regular", "Fira Code"]
77|30da51|        case "JetBrains Mono":
78|29ba7c|            candidates = ["JetBrainsMono-Regular", "JetBrains Mono"]
79|520b7d|        default:
80|d7ec8a|            candidates = [family]
81|5f3077|        }
82|adc83b|
83|ef3c25|        for name in candidates {
84|b0cf4a|            if let font = UIFont(name: name, size: size) {
85|404673|                // Ensure monospaced feel if available; otherwise return as-is.
86|6dcd7e|                return font
87|a7dc16|            }
88|5f3077|        }
89|adc83b|
90|c377bd|        // Fallback
91|0966c5|        return UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: size, weight: .regular)
92|27e597|    }

9|69d728|@MainActor
10|a43a38|final class CodeExecutionService {
11|6dc112|    static let shared = CodeExecutionService()
12|b4687f|    
13|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
14|b4687f|    
15|37bd08|    private var jsRunner: JSRunner?
16|33c15c|    private let outputManager = OutputPanelManager.shared
17|b4687f|

19|b4687f|    
20|54113e|    private init() {}
21|b4687f|    
22|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
23|b4687f|    
24|d148d5|    /// Execute the currently active file
25|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
26|4cfe18|    ///   - fileName: Name of the file to execute
27|13e212|    ///   - content: Content/code of the file
28|97d12a|    func executeCurrentFile(fileName: String, content: String) {
29|cc9311|        let fileExtension = (fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
30|d6ed84|        
31|2eea91|        switch fileExtension {
32|ff039a|        case "js", "mjs":
33|760a4e|            executeJavaScript(fileName: fileName, code: content)
34|048ca0|        case "ts", "tsx":
35|b896b9|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] TypeScript execution requires transpilation. Coming soon!", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
36|de8aa1|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
37|e1d221|        case "py":
38|9e2a3c|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] Python execution not yet available on-device.", to: OutputChannel.python, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
39|25499b|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.python
40|520b7d|        default:
41|cc7290|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] No runner available for .\(fileExtension) files", to: OutputChannel.output, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
42|c75b79|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.output
43|5f3077|        }
44|27e597|    }
45|b4687f|    
46|9b6f68|    // MARK: - JavaScript Execution
47|b4687f|    
48|d76b7d|    private func executeJavaScript(fileName: String, code: String) {
49|0dec37|        // Switch to JavaScript output channel
50|e39e9c|        outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
51|d6ed84|        
52|a728d5|        // Clear previous output and show execution header
53|1511a8|        outputManager.clear(OutputChannel.javascript)
54|6cfb10|        outputManager.append("▶ Running: \(fileName)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
55|89174a|        outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
56|d6ed84|        
57|a3f62b|        // Create a fresh JSRunner instance
58|462f68|        jsRunner = JSRunner()
59|d6ed84|        
60|e61664|        // Set up console handler to capture output
61|305ad3|        jsRunner?.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
62|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
63|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
64|216278|                
65|b169c6|                // Determine stream type based on message prefix
66|27b18b|                let streamType: StreamType = message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") || message.hasPrefix("[EXCEPTION]") ? StreamType.stderr : StreamType.stdout
67|216278|                
68|4b39b7|                // Remove the prefix for cleaner output display
69|62636a|                var cleanMessage = message
70|121995|                for prefix in ["[LOG] ", "[INFO] ", "[WARN] ", "[ERROR] ", "[EXCEPTION] "] {
71|1df682|                    if message.hasPrefix(prefix) {
72|11af1f|                        cleanMessage = String(message.dropFirst(prefix.count))
73|28a64b|                        break
74|c9717a|                    }
75|4e2d32|                }
76|216278|                
77|6a3616|                self.outputManager.append(cleanMessage, to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: streamType)
78|a7dc16|            }
79|5f3077|        }
80|d6ed84|        
81|5a9195|        // Execute the code asynchronously
82|0f1953|        Task {
83|073be0|            let startTime = Date()
84|3070d1|            
85|71cc09|            do {
86|f3a1fd|                let result = try await jsRunner?.execute(code: code)
87|1ee120|                let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
88|216278|                
89|73b1fb|                // Show result if it's not undefined
90|f23508|                if let result = result, !result.isUndefined {
91|8a7075|                    let resultString = formatJSValue(result)
92|174733|                    outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
93|1c40a4|                    outputManager.append("⮐ Result: \(resultString)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
94|4e2d32|                }
95|216278|                
96|b2c6e7|                // Show completion message
97|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
98|2c8c65|                outputManager.append("✓ Completed in \(String(format: "%.2f", duration * 1000))ms", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
99|216278|                
100|77a0dc|            } catch let error as JSRunnerError {
101|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
102|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
103|216278|                
104|91b9a2|            } catch {
105|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
106|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
107|a7dc16|            }
108|3070d1|            
109|eb797f|            // Clean up runner
110|e9e019|            jsRunner = nil
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }

151|bdac63|        let trimmed = query.text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|0eedd3|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return }
153|adc83b|

156|adc83b|

161|5f3077|        }

192|2ff1e8|    public func clearResults() {
193|8ff3fb|        results = []
194|f0416e|        lastError = nil
195|27e597|    }
196|b4687f|    
197|4bb2af|    /// Clears the last error
198|98ef10|    public func clearError() {
199|f0416e|        lastError = nil
200|27e597|    }
201|adc83b|
202|3d4464|    /// Search files under `rootURL`.
203|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
204|c4c6a9|    ///   - rootURL: Directory to search.
205|61164b|    ///   - query: Query and options.
206|8cb1e7|    ///   - fileURLs: Optional pre-resolved file list. If provided, include/exclude filtering is still applied.
207|0fd45c|    @MainActor
208|7e9816|    public func search(in rootURL: URL,
209|058f9b|                       query: SearchQuery,
210|9bea17|                       fileURLs: [URL]? = nil) {
211|f0416e|        lastError = nil
212|8ff3fb|        results = []
213|ba9370|        progress = 0
214|adc83b|
215|bdac63|        let trimmed = query.text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
216|658bd9|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else {
217|18af28|            lastError = SearchError.emptyQuery.localizedDescription
218|bef5d6|            return
219|5f3077|        }
220|adc83b|
221|ebf179|        // update history immediately
222|4dd67e|        addToHistory(query)
223|adc83b|
224|7657bd|        cancelSearch()
225|b31e9e|        isSearching = true
226|adc83b|
227|2a4395|        let q = SearchQuery(text: trimmed,
228|827ce5|                            options: query.options,
229|407261|                            includeGlobs: query.includeGlobs,
230|9388a1|                            excludeGlobs: query.excludeGlobs)
231|adc83b|
232|9880df|        searchTask = Task.detached(priority: .userInitiated) { [weak self] in
233|bd7394|            guard let self else { return }
234|71cc09|            do {
235|030fd6|                let resolvedFiles = try self.resolveFiles(rootURL: rootURL, provided: fileURLs, query: q)
236|58e6ab|                let total = max(resolvedFiles.count, 1)
237|adc83b|
238|5b0c43|                var aggregated: [FileMatch] = []
239|5780de|                for (idx, url) in resolvedFiles.enumerated() {
240|257e20|                    try Task.checkCancellation()
241|bba096|                    if let match = try self.searchFile(url: url, rootURL: rootURL, query: q), !match.matches.isEmpty {
242|3c1aaf|                        aggregated.append(match)
243|c9717a|                    }
244|8080d2|                    let p = Double(idx + 1) / Double(total)
245|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
246|a74df1|                        self.progress = p
247|c9717a|                    }
248|4e2d32|                }
249|adc83b|
250|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
251|3dcd82|                    self.results = aggregated
252|5abc40|                    self.isSearching = false
253|1050b1|                    self.progress = 1
254|4e2d32|                }
255|57e5c6|            } catch is CancellationError {
256|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
257|5abc40|                    self.isSearching = false
258|4e2d32|                }
259|91b9a2|            } catch {
260|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
261|f47429|                    self.lastError = error.localizedDescription
262|5abc40|                    self.isSearching = false
263|4e2d32|                }
264|a7dc16|            }
265|5f3077|        }
266|27e597|    }
267|adc83b|
268|6a4efe|    // MARK: - Replace in files
269|adc83b|
270|53a2b3|    /// Replace occurrences for `query` with `replacement` under `rootURL`.
271|81d5d9|    /// Returns counts per file.
272|c8dd7c|    public func replace(in rootURL: URL,
273|bfd124|                        query: SearchQuery,
274|a58963|                        replacement: String,
275|bba210|                        fileURLs: [URL]? = nil) async throws -> ReplaceResult {
276|bdac63|        let trimmed = query.text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
277|6acc1c|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { throw SearchError.emptyQuery }
278|adc83b|
279|2a4395|        let q = SearchQuery(text: trimmed,
280|827ce5|                            options: query.options,
281|407261|                            includeGlobs: query.includeGlobs,
282|9388a1|                            excludeGlobs: query.excludeGlobs)
283|adc83b|
284|071e09|        // Pre-compile pattern.
285|08cce0|        let compiled = try compilePattern(for: q)
286|adc83b|
287|53fc4b|        let resolvedFiles = try resolveFiles(rootURL: rootURL, provided: fileURLs, query: q)
288|94cda5|        var perFile: [ReplaceResult.PerFile] = []
289|43c9e8|        perFile.reserveCapacity(resolvedFiles.count)
290|adc83b|
291|0241e1|        var totalReplacements = 0
292|4bd1b6|        var filesTouched = 0
293|adc83b|
294|9a2d93|        for url in resolvedFiles {
295|8c8e63|            try Task.checkCancellation()
296|28fec5|            let (changed, reps) = try replaceInFile(url: url, compiled: compiled, replacement: replacement)
297|cd8fb1|            if changed {
298|4f3e48|                filesTouched += 1
299|7541a4|                totalReplacements += reps
300|f98c81|                perFile.append(.init(filePath: url.path, replacements: reps))
301|a7dc16|            }
302|5f3077|        }
303|adc83b|
304|9d1002|        return ReplaceResult(filesTouched: filesTouched,
305|e59e21|                             replacements: totalReplacements,
306|dcee4f|                             fileResults: perFile)
307|27e597|    }
308|adc83b|
309|7de015|    // MARK: - File enumeration + filtering
310|adc83b|
311|e3e05b|    private func resolveFiles(rootURL: URL, provided: [URL]?, query: SearchQuery) throws -> [URL] {
312|657d5a|        let all: [URL]
313|070c1c|        if let provided {
314|cc4ad8|            all = provided
315|b31999|        } else {
316|eb4c22|            all = try enumerateFiles(rootURL: rootURL)
317|5f3077|        }
318|97b3ce|        return all.filter { url in
319|f40362|            guard url.isFileURL else { return false }
320|b4ebdb|            let path = url.path
321|bfd9c6|            if matchesAnyGlob(path: path, globs: query.excludeGlobs) { return false }
322|1d0527|            if query.includeGlobs.isEmpty { return true }
323|994605|            return matchesAnyGlob(path: path, globs: query.includeGlobs)
324|5f3077|        }
325|27e597|    }
326|adc83b|
327|23fd14|    private func enumerateFiles(rootURL: URL) throws -> [URL] {
328|460d36|        let fm = FileManager.default
329|613364|        guard let enumerator = fm.enumerator(at: rootURL,
330|9e7a04|                                            includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isRegularFileKey, .isDirectoryKey],
331|03774c|                                            options: [.skipsHiddenFiles],
332|5fc71e|                                            errorHandler: { _, _ in true }) else {
333|b0f460|            return []
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|f2b1f2|        var urls: [URL] = []
337|3377e0|        for case let url as URL in enumerator {
338|0491f5|            let values = try? url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isRegularFileKey, .isDirectoryKey])
339|2a536d|            if values?.isDirectory == true { continue }
340|1ba475|            if values?.isRegularFile == true {
341|d82ffc|                urls.append(url)
342|a7dc16|            }
343|5f3077|        }
344|a10f36|        return urls
345|27e597|    }
346|adc83b|
347|3e8d6c|    // MARK: - Actual searching
348|adc83b|
349|73077d|    private struct CompiledPattern {
350|2ac01d|        enum Kind {
351|d75daa|            case regex(NSRegularExpression)
352|1637f8|            case literal(needle: String, compareLowercased: Bool, wholeWord: Bool)
353|5f3077|        }
354|895ca2|        let kind: Kind
355|27e597|    }
356|adc83b|
357|065357|    private func compilePattern(for query: SearchQuery) throws -> CompiledPattern {
358|4ff7ae|        if query.options.isRegex {
359|21ffa4|            let opts: NSRegularExpression.Options = query.options.isCaseSensitive ? [] : [.caseInsensitive]
360|71cc09|            do {
361|16d5c5|                let re = try NSRegularExpression(pattern: query.text, options: opts)
362|1452df|                return CompiledPattern(kind: .regex(re))
363|91b9a2|            } catch {
364|7ac396|                throw SearchError.invalidRegex(query.text)
365|a7dc16|            }
366|b31999|        } else {
367|051718|            // Literal search.
368|b0381b|            let compareLowercased = !query.options.isCaseSensitive
369|1b6fc1|            return CompiledPattern(kind: .literal(needle: query.text,
370|7705be|                                                 compareLowercased: compareLowercased,
371|7ec981|                                                 wholeWord: query.options.isWholeWord))
372|5f3077|        }
373|27e597|    }
374|adc83b|
375|b67a78|    private func searchFile(url: URL, rootURL: URL, query: SearchQuery) throws -> FileMatch? {
376|a21236|        let compiled = try compilePattern(for: query)
377|68eff0|        let data: Data
378|4da690|        do {
379|f9a970|            data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
380|853889|        } catch {
381|d40604|            // ignore unreadable files
382|1c8557|            return nil
383|5f3077|        }
384|1b20e1|        // Try UTF-8 first. If it fails, ignore file (keeps implementation safe).
385|52a873|        guard let text = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else { return nil }
386|adc83b|
387|1e56b5|        let relPath: String
388|e5c652|        if url.path.hasPrefix(rootURL.path) {
389|8f96cb|            relPath = String(url.path.dropFirst(rootURL.path.count)).trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet(charactersIn: "/"))
390|b31999|        } else {
391|1b9df7|            relPath = url.path
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|2c8472|        let matches = findMatches(in: text, compiled: compiled)
395|faae37|        if matches.isEmpty { return nil }
396|adc83b|
397|70220a|        return FileMatch(filePath: relPath, matches: matches)
398|27e597|    }
399|adc83b|
400|a3f3a0|    private func findMatches(in text: String, compiled: CompiledPattern) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
401|53729f|        switch compiled.kind {
402|462837|        case .regex(let re):
403|abfc29|            return regexMatches(in: text, re: re)
404|8554ef|        case .literal(let needle, let compareLowercased, let wholeWord):
405|5903fb|            return literalMatches(in: text, needle: needle, compareLowercased: compareLowercased, wholeWord: wholeWord)
406|5f3077|        }
407|27e597|    }
408|adc83b|
409|737c2a|    private func regexMatches(in text: String, re: NSRegularExpression) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
410|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
411|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
412|64c443|        let matches = re.matches(in: text, options: [], range: range)
413|27c73d|        if matches.isEmpty { return [] }
414|adc83b|
415|29f7c0|        // Precompute line starts for fast conversion.
416|6dffc4|        let lineIndex = LineIndex(text)
417|adc83b|
418|2e97c7|        return matches.compactMap { m in
419|bc719f|            guard m.range.location != NSNotFound, m.range.length > 0 else { return nil }
420|e3d5c9|            let (line, col) = lineIndex.lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: m.range.location)
421|1119bd|            let preview = lineIndex.lineText(line: line)
422|3d0a04|            return .init(location: .init(line: line, column: col, length: m.range.length), preview: preview)
423|5f3077|        }
424|27e597|    }
425|adc83b|
426|045702|    private func literalMatches(in text: String,
427|6e8b53|                               needle: String,
428|b73c28|                               compareLowercased: Bool,
429|cb607c|                               wholeWord: Bool) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
430|865c1f|        guard !needle.isEmpty else { return [] }
431|adc83b|
432|9c36ac|        let haystack = compareLowercased ? text.lowercased() : text
433|2f6ee4|        let n = compareLowercased ? needle.lowercased() : needle
434|adc83b|
435|9ba542|        // Use NSString for UTF16 indexing.
436|384be5|        let nsHay = haystack as NSString
437|643b7b|        let nsOrig = text as NSString
438|adc83b|
439|6dffc4|        let lineIndex = LineIndex(text)
440|adc83b|
441|6b1517|        var results: [FileMatch.Match] = []
442|f134a9|        var searchRange = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsHay.length)
443|adc83b|
444|722ae9|        while true {
445|9bb985|            let found = nsHay.range(of: n, options: [], range: searchRange)
446|1815e9|            if found.location == NSNotFound { break }
447|adc83b|
448|e31f22|            if wholeWord {
449|ae0edf|                if !isWholeWordMatch(in: nsHay, range: found) {
450|10e352|                    let nextLoc = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
451|8c9165|                    if nextLoc >= nsHay.length { break }
452|a45a51|                    searchRange = NSRange(location: nextLoc, length: nsHay.length - nextLoc)
453|f41bef|                    continue
454|4e2d32|                }
455|a7dc16|            }
456|adc83b|
457|cdba18|            let (line, col) = lineIndex.lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: found.location)
458|1119bd|            let preview = lineIndex.lineText(line: line)
459|adc83b|
460|868369|            // Use original needle length in UTF16 for accurate highlighting.
461|d60ad7|            let origLen = (needle as NSString).length
462|6c2b48|            results.append(.init(location: .init(line: line, column: col, length: origLen), preview: preview))
463|adc83b|
464|7d1039|            let nextLoc = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
465|44b268|            if nextLoc >= nsHay.length { break }
466|49bf1c|            searchRange = NSRange(location: nextLoc, length: nsHay.length - nextLoc)
467|5f3077|        }
468|adc83b|
469|32b4af|        return results
470|27e597|    }
471|adc83b|
472|aac90d|    private func isWholeWordMatch(in nsText: NSString, range: NSRange) -> Bool {
473|7a86e9|        // Word boundary definition: letters, numbers, underscore.
474|f103a7|        func isWordChar(_ u: unichar) -> Bool {
475|4a1e5c|            if u == 95 { return true } // '_'
476|0b793e|            // ASCII letters/digits
477|cd26fb|            if (u >= 48 && u <= 57) || (u >= 65 && u <= 90) || (u >= 97 && u <= 122) { return true }
478|e2e187|            return false
479|5f3077|        }
480|adc83b|
481|132159|        if range.location > 0 {
482|c016ec|            let prev = nsText.character(at: range.location - 1)
483|a49431|            if isWordChar(prev) { return false }
484|5f3077|        }
485|f8cd54|        let end = range.location + range.length
486|cee764|        if end < nsText.length {
487|468111|            let next = nsText.character(at: end)
488|594cf5|            if isWordChar(next) { return false }
489|5f3077|        }
490|4add8d|        return true
491|27e597|    }
492|adc83b|
493|2b0ba3|    // MARK: - Replace implementation
494|adc83b|
495|594372|    private func replaceInFile(url: URL,
496|710b1e|                               compiled: CompiledPattern,
497|ed9f89|                               replacement: String) throws -> (changed: Bool, replacements: Int) {
498|68eff0|        let data: Data
499|4da690|        do {
500|f9a970|            data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
501|853889|        } catch {
502|18ad8c|            return (false, 0)
503|5f3077|        }
504|8c8e01|        guard let text = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else { return (false, 0) }
505|adc83b|
506|0a048a|        let (newText, reps) = replaceAll(in: text, compiled: compiled, replacement: replacement)
507|92a836|        guard reps > 0 else { return (false, 0) }
508|adc83b|
509|4da690|        do {
510|ea2ea9|            // Atomic write.
511|5c5c3b|            try newText.data(using: .utf8)?.write(to: url, options: [.atomic])
512|853889|        } catch {
513|20715e|            throw SearchError.ioError("Failed to write file: \(url.path)")
514|5f3077|        }
515|876315|        return (true, reps)
516|27e597|    }
517|adc83b|
518|f7d19f|    private func replaceAll(in text: String,
519|9c700d|                            compiled: CompiledPattern,
520|26009e|                            replacement: String) -> (String, Int) {
521|53729f|        switch compiled.kind {
522|462837|        case .regex(let re):
523|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
524|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
525|39e029|            let matches = re.matches(in: text, options: [], range: range)
526|1cc29d|            if matches.isEmpty { return (text, 0) }
527|4d6888|            let out = re.stringByReplacingMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range, withTemplate: replacement)
528|2f64d1|            return (out, matches.count)
529|adc83b|
530|8554ef|        case .literal(let needle, let compareLowercased, let wholeWord):
531|c0f6dc|            if needle.isEmpty { return (text, 0) }
532|f2f430|            // For literal, we re-scan and build output to support whole-word.
533|818f83|            let haystack = compareLowercased ? text.lowercased() : text
534|7d22d9|            let n = compareLowercased ? needle.lowercased() : needle
535|adc83b|
536|e09c62|            let nsHay = haystack as NSString
537|d5b67f|            let nsOrig = text as NSString
538|fc8e73|            let nsNeedle = n as NSString
539|adc83b|
540|06c839|            var out = ""
541|8e842a|            out.reserveCapacity(text.count)
542|adc83b|
543|e70d5f|            var cursor = 0
544|39cefb|            var reps = 0
545|adc83b|
546|0cd27d|            while cursor < nsHay.length {
547|2c9083|                let searchRange = NSRange(location: cursor, length: nsHay.length - cursor)
548|ae1ea7|                let found = nsHay.range(of: n, options: [], range: searchRange)
549|4df494|                if found.location == NSNotFound {
550|8d5f82|                    out += nsOrig.substring(with: NSRange(location: cursor, length: nsOrig.length - cursor))
551|8dcb2c|                    break
552|4e2d32|                }
553|adc83b|
554|1bfe27|                // append leading segment
555|2f703d|                out += nsOrig.substring(with: NSRange(location: cursor, length: found.location - cursor))
556|adc83b|
557|9cbeba|                if wholeWord && !isWholeWordMatch(in: nsHay, range: found) {
558|efda73|                    // not a whole-word match; append original matched text and continue
559|c0aa04|                    out += nsOrig.substring(with: found)
560|eb07b6|                    cursor = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
561|f41bef|                    continue
562|4e2d32|                }
563|adc83b|
564|80b507|                out += replacement
565|4d34ce|                reps += 1
566|adc83b|
567|61d066|                cursor = found.location + max(nsNeedle.length, 1)
568|a7dc16|            }
569|adc83b|
570|b4440a|            return (out, reps)
571|5f3077|        }
572|27e597|    }
573|adc83b|
574|016baf|    // MARK: - Glob matching
575|adc83b|
576|76a6f8|    /// Very small glob matcher supporting '*', '**', and '?'.
577|97859c|    /// Matching is path-based (uses '/' as separator). Globs are compared against the full path.
578|b70596|    private func matchesAnyGlob(path: String, globs: [String]) -> Bool {
579|d4643f|        guard !globs.isEmpty else { return false }
580|c5ecd3|        for g in globs {
581|090ad0|            if globMatch(path: path, pattern: g) { return true }
582|5f3077|        }
583|dc1500|        return false
584|27e597|    }
585|adc83b|
586|028fc6|    private func globMatch(path: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
587|2d6c82|        // Convert glob to regex.
588|6bde96|        // - '**' => '.*'
589|efea0d|        // - '*' => '[^/]*'
590|6eb809|        // - '?' => '[^/]'
591|079dc7|        var regex = "^"
592|c72f2a|        var i = pattern.startIndex
593|10492c|        while i < pattern.endIndex {
594|ebcb12|            let ch = pattern[i]
595|8b01b3|            if ch == "*" {
596|324652|                let next = pattern.index(after: i)
597|1327fc|                if next < pattern.endIndex && pattern[next] == "*" {
598|dad527|                    regex += ".*"
599|3f2179|                    i = pattern.index(after: next)
600|fdd0e2|                } else {
601|fde091|                    regex += "[^/]*"
602|74f6aa|                    i = next
603|4e2d32|                }
604|735319|            } else if ch == "?" {
605|164012|                regex += "[^/]"
606|8a996a|                i = pattern.index(after: i)
607|f5a6eb|            } else {
608|a51d15|                // escape regex metacharacters
609|cf009b|                if "\\.^$|()[]{}+".contains(ch) {
610|b0575b|                    // Single backslash to escape the character in regex
611|366984|                    // e.g., "." becomes "\." which matches literal dot
612|504778|                    regex += "\\\(ch)"
613|fdd0e2|                } else {
614|a46a47|                    regex.append(ch)
615|4e2d32|                }
616|8a996a|                i = pattern.index(after: i)
617|a7dc16|            }
618|5f3077|        }
619|3a8c74|        regex += "$"
620|adc83b|
621|8e440e|        let opts: NSRegularExpression.Options = []
622|cda732|        guard let re = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: regex, options: opts) else { return false }
623|ef92c3|        let ns = path as NSString
624|5f54b4|        let r = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
625|68f6b6|        return re.firstMatch(in: path, options: [], range: r) != nil
626|27e597|    }
627|adc83b|
628|a2fe2d|    // MARK: - Glob Pattern Testing
629|adc83b|
630|abaafb|    /// Runs all glob pattern tests and returns results for verification
631|8dabfe|    /// - Returns: Tuple containing (passedCount, failedCount, [failureDetails])
632|fcd371|    public func runGlobTests() -> (passed: Int, failed: Int, failures: [String]) {
633|519438|        var passed = 0
634|05dd4a|        var failed = 0
635|82aab2|        var failures: [String] = []
636|adc83b|
637|c53e2a|        func assert(_ condition: Bool, _ message: String) {
638|0580b1|            if condition {
639|023fd0|                passed += 1
640|f5a6eb|            } else {
641|731d09|                failed += 1
642|2ddcdc|                failures.append(message)
643|a7dc16|            }
644|5f3077|        }
645|adc83b|
646|31804a|        // MARK: 1. testGlobStar - single * matches any chars except /
647|d6ed84|        
648|f9337d|        // Single * should match any characters except path separator /
649|828aef|        assert(globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match file.swift")
650|c77ed4|        assert(globMatch(path: "main.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match main.swift")
651|0ade40|        assert(globMatch(path: "ViewController.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match ViewController.swift")

831|909c8a|// MARK: - Line indexing helper
832|adc83b|
833|01ee41|/// LineIndex is internal to allow testing while being encapsulated within SearchManager
834|d09a50|internal struct LineIndex {
835|f4be4a|    private let text: String
836|c348f4|    private let nsText: NSString
837|b41b69|    // line start offsets in UTF16
838|f3984c|    private var lineStarts: [Int] = [0]
839|b24272|    private var lines: [String] = []
840|adc83b|
841|23e59f|    init(_ text: String) {
842|226b10|        self.text = text
843|52183e|        self.nsText = text as NSString
844|adc83b|
845|2f4cf6|        // Build lineStarts and cache line strings.
846|c5b554|        // Use NSString lineRange(for:) to be safe with various newline types.
847|6ee764|        var idx = 0
848|17cda2|        var currentLine = 1
849|13db51|        while idx < nsText.length {
850|2c0444|            let r = nsText.lineRange(for: NSRange(location: idx, length: 0))
851|471553|            let lineStr = nsText.substring(with: r).trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet.newlines)
852|9855fd|            if lines.count < currentLine { lines.append(lineStr) } else { lines[currentLine - 1] = lineStr }
853|adc83b|
854|ae4d58|            idx = NSMaxRange(r)
855|1af0df|            if idx < nsText.length {
856|053f6f|                lineStarts.append(idx)
857|12fb7d|                currentLine += 1
858|a7dc16|            }
859|5f3077|        }
860|d679f2|        if nsText.length == 0 {
861|7cc276|            lines = [""]
862|3822a8|            lineStarts = [0]
863|706df5|        } else if lines.isEmpty {
864|5813e2|            // single line without newline
865|a3f790|            lines = [text]
866|3822a8|            lineStarts = [0]
867|5f3077|        }
868|27e597|    }
869|adc83b|
870|fb0e0a|    func lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: Int) -> (line: Int, column: Int) {
871|4aeba9|        // Binary search lineStarts to find last start <= offset.
872|32f4a9|        var lo = 0
873|c12820|        var hi = lineStarts.count - 1
874|7d7bcb|        while lo <= hi {
875|c1ca4d|            let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
876|e6933d|            let v = lineStarts[mid]
877|ef7066|            if v == utf16Offset {
878|52d775|                return (mid + 1, 1)
879|f31785|            } else if v < utf16Offset {
880|0a83f3|                lo = mid + 1
881|f5a6eb|            } else {
882|7320e6|                hi = mid - 1
883|a7dc16|            }
884|5f3077|        }
885|06fcf8|        let lineIndex = max(hi, 0)
886|acc313|        let lineStart = lineStarts[lineIndex]
887|ce9896|        let col = max(utf16Offset - lineStart, 0) + 1
888|fc379c|        return (lineIndex + 1, col)
889|27e597|    }
890|adc83b|
891|2fb6bf|    func lineText(line: Int) -> String {
892|329128|        let i = max(1, line) - 1
893|14d9cb|        if i >= 0 && i < lines.count { return lines[i] }
894|2ca6c1|        return ""
895|27e597|    }
896|b4687f|    
897|073a12|    /// Internal accessor for testing binary search behavior
898|11be92|    internal var lineStartOffsets: [Int] { lineStarts }
899|8b9d56|    internal var lineCount: Int { lines.count }
900|bc5c81|    internal var allLines: [String] { lines }
901|b31277|}
902|adc83b|

59|2553d0|    let file: String
60|390384|    let line: Int
61|02a6c7|    let content: String
62|bbcf1b|    let sourceLine: Int // The line where peek was triggered
63|b31277|}
64|adc83b|
65|320daa|// MARK: - Editor Core (Central State Manager)
66|312682|class EditorCore: ObservableObject {
67|1ee7ef|    @Published var peekState: PeekState?
68|a6d994|    @Published var tabs: [Tab] = []
69|e129c3|    @Published var activeTabId: UUID?
70|29899f|    @Published var showSidebar = true
71|4d5c2a|    @Published var sidebarWidth: CGFloat = 250
72|dfe044|    @Published var showFilePicker = false
73|0818a1|    @Published var searchText = ""
74|84d537|    @Published var showSearch = false
75|f84db8|    @Published var showCommandPalette = false
76|fbcbe4|    @Published var showQuickOpen = false
77|f2f493|    @Published var showAIAssistant = false
78|7c3010|    @Published var showGoToLine = false
79|13859f|    @Published var showGoToSymbol = false
80|8e3356|    @Published var editorFontSize: CGFloat = {
81|3e7300|        let stored = UserDefaults.standard.double(forKey: "fontSize")
82|9f1e84|        return stored > 0 ? CGFloat(stored) : 14.0
83|f96eeb|    }() {
84|fd81d8|        didSet {
85|b56e25|            UserDefaults.standard.set(editorFontSize, forKey: "fontSize")
86|5f3077|        }
87|27e597|    }
88|4d1df9|    private var fontSizeObserver: NSObjectProtocol?
89|2e5f14|    @Published var isZenMode = false
90|fa580f|    @Published var isFocusMode = false
91|adc83b|
92|fca5a3|    // Snippet picker support
93|15f11e|    @Published var showSnippetPicker = false
94|941161|    @Published var pendingSnippetInsertion: Snippet?
95|949c0a|    @Published var showSaveAsDialog = false
96|cabad2|    var saveAsContent: String = ""
97|adc83b|
98|27e392|    // Cursor tracking
99|a020ef|    @Published var cursorPosition = CursorPosition()
100|adc83b|
101|5442e5|    // Multi-cursor support
102|a9b9d0|    @Published var multiCursorState = MultiCursorState()
103|ba0b96|    @Published var currentSelection: String = ""
104|1a3f89|    @Published var currentSelectionRange: NSRange?
105|adc83b|
106|82e321|    // Selection request for find/replace navigation
107|bc0892|    @Published var requestedSelection: NSRange?
108|adc83b|
109|f1b77b|    // UI Panel state
110|5d1a58|    @Published var showPanel = false
111|dfc392|    @Published var showRenameSymbol = false
112|1f093c|    @Published var focusedSidebarTab = 0
113|adc83b|
114|d51ea1|    // Terminal state
115|81609c|    @Published var terminalSessions: [TerminalSession] = []
116|505e94|    @Published var activeTerminalId: UUID?
117|f12907|    @Published var isTerminalMaximized: Bool = false
118|eb5ca9|    @Published var terminalPanelHeight: CGFloat = 200
119|adc83b|
120|9f19f0|    // Debug state
121|cbb347|    @Published var isDebugging: Bool = false
122|6b6ac5|    @Published var isRunning: Bool = false
123|e75e60|    @Published var canStartDebugging: Bool = true
124|019801|    @Published var showAddConfiguration: Bool = false
125|bfe134|    @Published var debugSessionState: DebugSessionState?
126|79abaa|    @Published var breakpoints: [DebugBreakpoint] = []
127|adc83b|
128|cd5080|    // Focused sidebar panel
129|15b1c0|    @Published var focusedView: SidebarPanel = .explorer
130|adc83b|
131|fda16b|    // Reference to file navigator for workspace search
132|e4df05|    weak var fileNavigator: FileSystemNavigator?
133|adc83b|
134|9ec84f|    // Navigation history
135|6a3111|    private var navigationHistory: [NavigationLocation] = []
136|4d0d46|    private var navigationIndex = -1
137|adc83b|
138|7b8f21|    /// Track active security-scoped URL access while files are open in tabs.
139|b24c0d|    /// This avoids losing access after opening a document (common on iPadOS).
140|e6fd81|    private var securityScopedAccessCounts: [URL: Int] = [:]
141|adc83b|
142|b8bdf3|    var activeTab: Tab? {
143|59ee7e|        tabs.first { $0.id == activeTabId }
144|27e597|    }
145|adc83b|
146|75cc04|    var activeTabIndex: Int? {
147|de4487|        tabs.firstIndex { $0.id == activeTabId }
148|27e597|    }
149|adc83b|
150|359b1b|    init() {
151|62fd7f|        // Create example tabs for all supported languages
152|0ba339|        let exampleTabs = Self.createExampleTabs()
153|8780f1|        tabs.append(contentsOf: exampleTabs)
154|4f6451|        activeTabId = exampleTabs.first?.id ?? UUID()
155|adc83b|
156|f0086d|        // Observe UserDefaults changes from Settings slider
157|f1f68f|        fontSizeObserver = NotificationCenter.default.addObserver(
158|70f406|            forName: UserDefaults.didChangeNotification,
159|33f159|            object: nil,
160|7c2cc3|            queue: .main
161|bf17df|        ) { [weak self] _ in
162|bd7394|            guard let self else { return }
163|224392|            let stored = UserDefaults.standard.double(forKey: "fontSize")
164|3ad977|            if stored > 0, CGFloat(stored) != self.editorFontSize {
165|dccfac|                self.editorFontSize = CGFloat(stored)
166|a7dc16|            }
167|5f3077|        }
168|27e597|    }
169|adc83b|
170|e57f77|    deinit {
171|e11618|        if let fontSizeObserver {
172|443da4|            NotificationCenter.default.removeObserver(fontSizeObserver)
173|5f3077|        }
174|27e597|    }
175|b4687f|    
176|78f12b|    /// Creates example tabs demonstrating syntax highlighting for all supported languages
177|a830d6|    private static func createExampleTabs() -> [Tab] {
178|8cfd49|        var examples: [Tab] = []
179|d6ed84|        
180|a13ba8|        // Swift example
181|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
182|0bc9a8|            fileName: "Welcome.swift",
183|7a029b|            content: """
184|cf53a7|// Welcome to VS Code for iPadOS! 🎉
185|8d0643|//
186|f205ed|// Features:
187|8cef3f|// • Syntax highlighting for Swift, JS, Python, and more
188|9a4015|// • Multiple tabs with drag reordering
189|ca1f11|// • File explorer sidebar
190|463668|// • Command palette (⌘+Shift+P)
191|9a7f61|// • Quick open (⌘+P)
192|73eab0|// • Find & Replace (⌘+F)
193|c04970|// • AI Assistant
194|cb07e6|// • Minimap navigation
195|7db993|// • Code folding
196|8f1f2b|// • Go to line (⌘+G)
197|8d0643|//
198|3349e5|// Start editing or open a file!
199|adc83b|
200|d755ba|import SwiftUI
201|adc83b|
202|4a07a6|struct ContentView: View {
203|bfb6e5|    @State private var counter = 0
204|b4687f|

208|1b4a82|                .font(.largeTitle)
209|f7ad69|                .foregroundColor(.blue)
210|3070d1|

214|a68f66|            .buttonStyle(.borderedProminent)

228|5bfc87|        // JavaScript example
229|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
230|75279c|            fileName: "example.js",
231|7a029b|            content: """
232|08e83e|// JavaScript Example - ES6+ Features
233|adc83b|
234|d9b09f|import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
235|adc83b|
236|4bb664|const API_URL = 'https://api.example.com';
237|adc83b|
238|4e581e|// Async function with error handling
239|5a86c3|async function fetchData(endpoint) {
240|3c751d|    try {
241|8e9b1e|        const response = await fetch(`${API_URL}/${endpoint}`);
242|c52d1e|        if (!response.ok) {
243|4e9ea1|            throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`);
244|5f3077|        }
245|1f4f06|        return await response.json();
246|6e1365|    } catch (error) {
247|da4c02|        console.error('Fetch failed:', error);
248|0a5fa4|        return null;
249|27e597|    }
250|b31277|}
251|adc83b|
252|0b2611|// React Component
253|c85565|function UserProfile({ userId }) {
254|21b1ca|    const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
255|9d5052|    const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
256|b4687f|    
257|b7837a|    useEffect(() => {
258|fd3d47|        fetchData(`users/${userId}`)
259|4a85c4|            .then(data => {
260|cd836c|                setUser(data);
261|b2d927|                setLoading(false);
262|892e8b|            });
263|349367|    }, [userId]);
264|b4687f|    
265|32b313|    if (loading) return <div>Loading...</div>;
266|b4687f|    
267|d09267|    return (
268|b5ce1f|        <div className="profile">
269|3b6efe|            <h1>{user?.name ?? 'Unknown'}</h1>
270|81326b|            <p>Email: {user?.email}</p>
271|2d89f1|        </div>
272|209670|    );
273|b31277|}
274|adc83b|
275|e498aa|// Array methods & destructuring
276|5c73a8|const numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];
277|128f8a|const doubled = numbers.map(n => n * 2);
278|251ac8|const [first, second, ...rest] = doubled;
279|adc83b|
280|b32033|export { fetchData, UserProfile };
281|b7ce6e|""",
282|2f9d42|            language: "javascript"
283|813e75|        ))
284|d6ed84|        
285|8af368|        // Python example
286|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
287|d04e33|            fileName: "example.py",
288|7a029b|            content: """
289|e05c05|#!/usr/bin/env python3
290|5aac47|\"\"\"
291|a39a14|Python Example - Modern Python Features
292|d6a5ac|Demonstrates type hints, dataclasses, async, and more.
293|5aac47|\"\"\"
294|adc83b|
295|e13070|import asyncio
296|57a161|from dataclasses import dataclass, field
297|3e7c83|from typing import Optional, List
298|acc0ed|from enum import Enum
299|adc83b|
300|054df8|class Status(Enum):
301|5c9625|    PENDING = "pending"
302|132770|    ACTIVE = "active"
303|bacb8e|    COMPLETED = "completed"
304|adc83b|
305|4cd340|@dataclass
306|603d0e|class Task:
307|e89e79|    \"\"\"Represents a task with metadata.\"\"\"
308|45c89b|    id: int
309|c662c5|    title: str
310|4b5b96|    status: Status = Status.PENDING
311|d39601|    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
312|c4d782|    description: Optional[str] = None
313|b4687f|    
314|291a22|    def mark_complete(self) -> None:
315|b93a57|        self.status = Status.COMPLETED
316|b90567|        print(f"Task '{self.title}' completed!")
317|adc83b|
318|d9ba4a|class TaskManager:
319|8fa5a7|    def __init__(self):
320|2e7c6d|        self._tasks: dict[int, Task] = {}
321|1ced01|        self._next_id = 1
322|b4687f|    
323|1a3e8a|    def add_task(self, title: str, **kwargs) -> Task:
324|c350a2|        task = Task(id=self._next_id, title=title, **kwargs)
325|8f87cb|        self._tasks[task.id] = task
326|48db70|        self._next_id += 1
327|46b7e5|        return task
328|b4687f|    
329|ffb550|    async def process_tasks(self) -> None:
330|1f6997|        for task in self._tasks.values():
331|960af6|            await asyncio.sleep(0.1)  # Simulate work
332|741a3c|            task.mark_complete()
333|adc83b|
334|8efbd4|# Main execution
335|fe03be|async def main():
336|a47a74|    manager = TaskManager()
337|b84b88|    manager.add_task("Learn Python", tags=["programming", "learning"])
338|081e24|    manager.add_task("Build app", description="Create VSCode for iPad")
339|b4687f|    
340|bef3bc|    await manager.process_tasks()
341|adc83b|
342|cfba8f|if __name__ == "__main__":
343|33c963|    asyncio.run(main())
344|b7ce6e|""",
345|cdea1f|            language: "python"
346|813e75|        ))
347|d6ed84|

446|889224|            fileName: "styles.css",
447|7a029b|            content: """
448|4fbc3e|/* VS Code iPadOS - Stylesheet */
449|8f459f|/* Modern CSS with variables, grid, and animations */
450|adc83b|
451|80477a|:root {
452|08021a|    --primary-color: #007acc;
453|f3d2d1|    --secondary-color: #3c3c3c;
454|b8e284|    --background-dark: #1e1e1e;
455|49fc5d|    --text-light: #d4d4d4;
456|e07b10|    --accent-green: #4ec9b0;
457|ba90a3|    --font-mono: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace;
458|0ca247|    --shadow-lg: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
459|b31277|}
460|adc83b|
461|528114|* {
462|0d96ba|    margin: 0;
463|20ce36|    padding: 0;
464|59004d|    box-sizing: border-box;
465|b31277|}
466|adc83b|
467|3e84a3|body {
468|b2d922|    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
469|e33751|    background-color: var(--background-dark);
470|a7026f|    color: var(--text-light);
471|508c34|    line-height: 1.6;
472|b31277|}
473|adc83b|
474|bca70d|.navbar {
475|701f74|    position: sticky;
476|978aba|    top: 0;
477|b44137|    background: rgba(30, 30, 30, 0.95);
478|2859c9|    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
479|420323|    padding: 1rem 2rem;
480|35c4be|    z-index: 1000;
481|b31277|}
482|adc83b|
483|40cda2|.hero-section {
484|9dd02d|    min-height: 100vh;
485|8928a5|    display: grid;
486|d1ff91|    place-items: center;
487|2d6734|    text-align: center;
488|4173b0|    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--background-dark), #2d2d30);
489|b31277|}
490|adc83b|
491|de992a|.btn.primary {
492|1af0b4|    background: var(--primary-color);
493|3b4c82|    color: white;
494|4bafa9|    padding: 12px 24px;
495|84f6c0|    border: none;
496|7265d9|    border-radius: 6px;
497|0235f4|    font-size: 1rem;
498|ad2c58|    cursor: pointer;
499|6f67b9|    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
500|b31277|}
501|adc83b|
502|9ad7b2|.btn.primary:hover {
503|9a2e0f|    transform: translateY(-2px);
504|c6f6d6|    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
505|b31277|}
506|adc83b|
507|2dae44|.feature-grid {
508|8928a5|    display: grid;
509|4a5fbb|    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
510|2a5a6f|    gap: 2rem;
511|54ce2f|    padding: 2rem;
512|b31277|}
513|adc83b|
514|0202ba|@keyframes fadeIn {
515|77cf08|    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
516|4358d6|    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
517|b31277|}
518|adc83b|
519|a0a323|.feature-card {
520|f63ff0|    animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease-out forwards;
521|b31277|}
522|adc83b|
523|09eb02|@media (max-width: 768px) {
524|fc0953|    .nav-links { display: none; }
525|36bb36|    .hero-section { padding: 2rem; }
526|b31277|}
527|b7ce6e|""",

529|813e75|        ))

531|70854a|        // Go example
532|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
533|173417|            fileName: "main.go",
534|7a029b|            content: """
535|dd18bb|// Go Example - HTTP Server with Goroutines
536|af96a5|package main
537|adc83b|
538|f7ab87|import (
539|f48f0e|\t"context"
540|567e13|\t"encoding/json"
541|b1db2d|\t"fmt"
542|7293d7|\t"log"
543|dbc36b|\t"net/http"
544|5284c6|\t"sync"
545|5f54ea|\t"time"
546|a35077|)
547|adc83b|
548|39ac9c|// User represents a user in the system
549|00db38|type User struct {
550|c77d6f|\tID        int       `json:"id"`
551|4698d5|\tName      string    `json:"name"`
552|b65b1b|\tEmail     string    `json:"email"`
553|2ed51e|\tCreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"`
554|b31277|}
555|adc83b|
556|e578a6|// UserStore handles user data with thread-safe access
557|c88728|type UserStore struct {
558|c3fdfb|\tmu    sync.RWMutex
559|051305|\tusers map[int]*User
560|d54867|\tnextID int
561|b31277|}
562|adc83b|
563|cc854c|func NewUserStore() *UserStore {
564|ed9ea3|\treturn &UserStore{
565|020c9f|\t\tusers:  make(map[int]*User),
566|5bfe05|\t\tnextID: 1,
567|bceb9c|\t}
568|b31277|}
569|adc83b|
570|e1b92c|func (s *UserStore) Create(name, email string) *User {
571|1db638|\ts.mu.Lock()
572|7d9ed0|\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()
573|80050b|\t
574|d8abf6|\tuser := &User{
575|e00997|\t\tID:        s.nextID,
576|6a68d6|\t\tName:      name,
577|9c5c36|\t\tEmail:     email,
578|97639d|\t\tCreatedAt: time.Now(),
579|bceb9c|\t}
580|72a210|\ts.users[user.ID] = user
581|1e16b2|\ts.nextID++
582|53ef3f|\treturn user
583|b31277|}
584|adc83b|
585|366ce6|func (s *UserStore) Get(id int) (*User, bool) {
586|4ddb51|\ts.mu.RLock()
587|bced95|\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()
588|4eba9b|\tuser, ok := s.users[id]
589|00df77|\treturn user, ok
590|b31277|}
591|adc83b|
592|ff8f91|func handleUsers(store *UserStore) http.HandlerFunc {
593|339c11|\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
594|53b88a|\t\tswitch r.Method {
595|9d2118|\t\tcase http.MethodGet:
596|394019|\t\t\t// Return all users
597|9e9af3|\t\t\tw.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
598|43bf24|\t\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(store.users)
599|59888b|\t\tcase http.MethodPost:
600|0965d8|\t\t\t// Create new user
601|e913f0|\t\t\tvar req struct {
602|2f0bda|\t\t\t\tName  string `json:"name"`
603|0c4cc3|\t\t\t\tEmail string `json:"email"`
604|1f4a90|\t\t\t}
605|2b3653|\t\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
606|447a17|\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
607|1b1356|\t\t\t\treturn
608|1f4a90|\t\t\t}
609|b82a43|\t\t\tuser := store.Create(req.Name, req.Email)
610|d73497|\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
611|17b111|\t\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(user)
612|04883b|\t\tdefault:
613|2ea09d|\t\t\thttp.Error(w, "Method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
614|53a2fc|\t\t}
615|bceb9c|\t}
616|b31277|}
617|adc83b|
618|a4072f|func main() {
619|ca7100|\tstore := NewUserStore()
620|80050b|\t
621|1b6d3b|\t// Seed some data
622|6ea9c7|\tstore.Create("Alice", "alice@example.com")
623|2c81f1|\tstore.Create("Bob", "bob@example.com")
624|80050b|\t
625|45645c|\tmux := http.NewServeMux()
626|b3170f|\tmux.HandleFunc("/api/users", handleUsers(store))
627|80050b|\t
628|a3c17c|\tserver := &http.Server{
629|879a10|\t\tAddr:         ":8080",
630|876c57|\t\tHandler:      mux,
631|a8bd2e|\t\tReadTimeout:  10 * time.Second,
632|aa51e5|\t\tWriteTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
633|bceb9c|\t}
634|80050b|\t
635|8d2b91|\tfmt.Println("Server starting on :8080")
636|fd5ced|\tlog.Fatal(server.ListenAndServe())

638|b7ce6e|""",
639|9eaac4|            language: "go"
640|813e75|        ))
641|d6ed84|        
642|6fa96a|        // Rust example
643|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
644|f13142|            fileName: "main.rs",
645|7a029b|            content: """
646|0e41ca|//! Rust Example - Async Web Server
647|fa16f5|//! Demonstrates ownership, traits, async/await, and error handling
648|adc83b|
649|9acfeb|use std::collections::HashMap;
650|b948b2|use std::sync::Arc;
651|859d9d|use tokio::sync::RwLock;
652|adc83b|
653|5f279c|/// Represents a task in our system
654|fc0948|#[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
655|9fa61b|pub struct Task {
656|eb40d9|    pub id: u64,
657|b30539|    pub title: String,
658|968947|    pub completed: bool,
659|3f7fee|    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
660|eb696e|    pub description: Option<String>,
661|b31277|}
662|adc83b|
663|c65acf|/// Task store with thread-safe access
664|aa97ce|pub struct TaskStore {
665|f700f3|    tasks: RwLock<HashMap<u64, Task>>,
666|4ca795|    next_id: RwLock<u64>,
667|b31277|}
668|adc83b|
669|302a3c|impl TaskStore {
670|8ad9f1|    pub fn new() -> Self {
671|3f21ea|        Self {
672|c4b209|            tasks: RwLock::new(HashMap::new()),
673|a066e2|            next_id: RwLock::new(1),
674|5f3077|        }
675|27e597|    }
676|b4687f|    
677|5b894d|    pub async fn create(&self, title: String, description: Option<String>) -> Task {
678|c96765|        let mut next_id = self.next_id.write().await;
679|582717|        let id = *next_id;
680|35ab64|        *next_id += 1;
681|d6ed84|        
682|8ffd70|        let task = Task {
683|c48bb6|            id,
684|9643f5|            title,
685|49769d|            completed: false,
686|d6d80b|            description,
687|105ee3|        };
688|d6ed84|        
689|c79c9c|        self.tasks.write().await.insert(id, task.clone());
690|9cec82|        task
691|27e597|    }
692|b4687f|    
693|d18a8f|    pub async fn get(&self, id: u64) -> Option<Task> {
694|ee96f9|        self.tasks.read().await.get(&id).cloned()
695|27e597|    }
696|b4687f|    
697|c542c4|    pub async fn list(&self) -> Vec<Task> {
698|26bc2e|        self.tasks.read().await.values().cloned().collect()
699|27e597|    }
700|b4687f|    
701|1e6608|    pub async fn complete(&self, id: u64) -> Result<Task, &'static str> {
702|8b2ab5|        let mut tasks = self.tasks.write().await;
703|1e8e13|        match tasks.get_mut(&id) {
704|7711a1|            Some(task) => {
705|9cb7d9|                task.completed = true;
706|b1925e|                Ok(task.clone())
707|a7dc16|            }
708|ba0906|            None => Err("Task not found"),
709|5f3077|        }
710|27e597|    }
711|b31277|}
712|adc83b|
713|167169|/// Error type for our application
714|351e30|#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
715|f57677|pub enum AppError {
716|552bc0|    #[error("Task not found: {0}")]
717|953fad|    NotFound(u64),
718|50ef8b|    #[error("Invalid input: {0}")]
719|e8e806|    InvalidInput(String),
720|b31277|}
721|adc83b|
722|50ce0f|#[tokio::main]
723|c703d0|async fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
724|0ea21b|    let store = Arc::new(TaskStore::new());
725|b4687f|    
726|d1b2bd|    // Create some tasks
727|2a3a42|    let task1 = store.create("Learn Rust".into(), Some("Study ownership".into())).await;
728|edbb66|    let task2 = store.create("Build app".into(), None).await;
729|b4687f|    
730|aafcec|    println!("Created tasks:");
731|9c5f1e|    for task in store.list().await {
732|2d361b|        println!("  - {} ({})", task.title, if task.completed { "✓" } else { "○" });
733|27e597|    }
734|b4687f|    
735|c1ed84|    // Complete a task
736|2d32bb|    store.complete(task1.id).await?;
737|3db4e3|    println!("\\nCompleted task: {}", task1.title);
738|b4687f|    
739|b54f61|    Ok(())
740|b31277|}
741|adc83b|
742|9a36b8|#[cfg(test)]
743|0a8608|mod tests {
744|2b9eed|    use super::*;
745|b4687f|    
746|fe8662|    #[tokio::test]
747|c05d04|    async fn test_create_task() {
748|c8da74|        let store = TaskStore::new();
749|286898|        let task = store.create("Test".into(), None).await;
750|75629b|        assert_eq!(task.title, "Test");
751|f10fec|        assert!(!task.completed);
752|27e597|    }
753|b31277|}
754|b7ce6e|""",
755|fb2489|            language: "rust"
756|813e75|        ))

759|27e597|    }
760|adc83b|
761|4dde5e|    // MARK: - Tab Management
762|adc83b|
763|76ae59|    func addTab(fileName: String = "Untitled.swift", content: String = "", url: URL? = nil) {
764|741280|        // Check if file is already open by URL
765|0ac880|        if let url = url, let existingTab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url == url }) {
766|552ca0|            activeTabId = existingTab.id
767|bef5d6|            return
768|5f3077|        }
769|d6ed84|        
770|95bffd|        // For tabs without URLs (demo/untitled), check by fileName to avoid duplicates
771|c31f65|        if url == nil, let existingTab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url == nil && $0.fileName == fileName }) {
772|552ca0|            activeTabId = existingTab.id
773|bef5d6|            return
774|5f3077|        }
775|adc83b|
776|813121|        let newTab = Tab(fileName: fileName, content: content, url: url)
777|c48936|        tabs.append(newTab)
778|731705|        activeTabId = newTab.id
779|27e597|    }
780|adc83b|
781|32d0a2|    func closeTab(id: UUID) {
782|b4daef|        guard let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
783|adc83b|
784|91aee8|        // Release security-scoped access if this tab was holding it.
785|f9902f|        if let url = tabs[index].url {
786|c0ad41|            releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
787|5f3077|        }
788|adc83b|
789|f8d587|        tabs.remove(at: index)
790|adc83b|
791|75e35f|        // Update active tab if we closed the active one
792|7a2997|        if activeTabId == id {
793|420e70|            if tabs.isEmpty {
794|562329|                activeTabId = nil
795|9f1ca7|            } else if index >= tabs.count {
796|fe0d6f|                activeTabId = tabs[tabs.count - 1].id
797|f5a6eb|            } else {
798|fea167|                activeTabId = tabs[index].id
799|a7dc16|            }
800|5f3077|        }
801|27e597|    }
802|adc83b|
803|da8c92|    func closeAllTabs() {
804|480aa6|        // Release security-scoped access held by any open tabs.
805|f898d5|        for tab in tabs {
806|e59f65|            if let url = tab.url {
807|4f4725|                releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
808|a7dc16|            }
809|5f3077|        }
810|adc83b|
811|11c622|        tabs.removeAll()
812|73f75a|        activeTabId = nil
813|27e597|    }
814|adc83b|
815|637501|    func closeOtherTabs(except id: UUID) {
816|7cae19|        // Release security-scoped access for tabs being closed.
817|cd7359|        for tab in tabs where tab.id != id {
818|e59f65|            if let url = tab.url {
819|4f4725|                releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
820|a7dc16|            }
821|5f3077|        }
822|adc83b|
823|9e38c3|        tabs.removeAll { $0.id != id }
824|124072|        activeTabId = id
825|27e597|    }
826|adc83b|
827|01b632|    func selectTab(id: UUID) {
828|124072|        activeTabId = id
829|27e597|    }
830|adc83b|
831|4d82c6|    func nextTab() {
832|0b2bdb|        guard let currentIndex = activeTabIndex, tabs.count > 1 else { return }
833|713593|        let nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % tabs.count
834|40ccb0|        activeTabId = tabs[nextIndex].id
835|27e597|    }
836|adc83b|
837|50e532|    func previousTab() {
838|0b2bdb|        guard let currentIndex = activeTabIndex, tabs.count > 1 else { return }
839|6fd10d|        let prevIndex = currentIndex == 0 ? tabs.count - 1 : currentIndex - 1
840|3edfe7|        activeTabId = tabs[prevIndex].id
841|27e597|    }
842|adc83b|
843|f5367a|    func moveTab(from source: IndexSet, to destination: Int) {
844|d4de4a|        tabs.move(fromOffsets: source, toOffset: destination)
845|27e597|    }
