847|7e7abf|    // MARK: - Content Management
848|adc83b|
849|eb64ec|    func updateActiveTabContent(_ content: String) {
850|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
851|adc83b|
852|c5cef8|        // Avoid marking a tab dirty when we're just syncing state (e.g., initial onAppear assignment).
853|206567|        guard tabs[index].content != content else { return }
854|adc83b|
855|a364aa|        tabs[index].content = content
856|adc83b|
857|d56c61|        // Mark dirty for both saved and unsaved-new files.
858|6625d3|        tabs[index].isUnsaved = true
859|27e597|    }
860|adc83b|
861|d01c74|    func saveActiveTab() {
862|0a66d5|        guard let index = activeTabIndex,
863|b955cb|              let url = tabs[index].url else { return }
864|adc83b|
865|4da690|        do {
866|8eaea8|            if let fileNavigator {
867|30e940|                try fileNavigator.writeFile(at: url, content: tabs[index].content)
868|f5a6eb|            } else {
869|120ff8|                // Fallback: Ensure we have access when writing, even if this URL wasn't opened via openFile().
870|498601|                let didStart = (securityScopedAccessCounts[url] == nil) ? url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
871|b9e991|                defer { if didStart { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() } }
872|6f7d16|                try tabs[index].content.write(to: url, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
873|a7dc16|            }
874|adc83b|
875|6adfeb|            tabs[index].isUnsaved = false
876|853889|        } catch {
877|8217f6|            print("Error saving file: \(error)")
878|5f3077|        }
879|27e597|    }
880|adc83b|
881|733624|    func saveAllTabs() {
882|be31b4|        for index in tabs.indices {
883|2205f5|            guard let url = tabs[index].url, tabs[index].isUnsaved else { continue }
884|adc83b|
885|71cc09|            do {
886|d06464|                if let fileNavigator {
887|882974|                    try fileNavigator.writeFile(at: url, content: tabs[index].content)
888|fdd0e2|                } else {
889|fa1070|                    // Fallback: Ensure we have access when writing, even if this URL wasn't opened via openFile().
890|a62986|                    let didStart = (securityScopedAccessCounts[url] == nil) ? url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
891|981337|                    defer { if didStart { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() } }
892|5eb718|                    try tabs[index].content.write(to: url, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
893|4e2d32|                }
894|adc83b|
895|c47dbe|                tabs[index].isUnsaved = false
896|91b9a2|            } catch {
897|a5c86a|                print("Error saving file: \(error)")
898|a7dc16|            }
899|5f3077|        }
900|27e597|    }
901|adc83b|
902|7fcf6b|    // MARK: - File Operations
903|adc83b|
904|c94d4f|    /// Retain security scoped access for as long as a tab referencing the URL is open.
905|80f870|    /// - Returns: `true` if access was retained (either already retained or started successfully).
906|144775|    @discardableResult
907|047478|    private func retainSecurityScopedAccess(to url: URL) -> Bool {
908|3361e8|        if let count = securityScopedAccessCounts[url] {
909|74a992|            securityScopedAccessCounts[url] = count + 1
910|40cfc4|            return true
911|5f3077|        }
912|adc83b|
913|6bae9a|        let started = url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
914|eab9dd|        if started {
915|f70ee6|            securityScopedAccessCounts[url] = 1
916|40cfc4|            return true
917|5f3077|        }
918|adc83b|
919|e24e9c|        // Not all URLs are security-scoped; startAccessing may legitimately return false.
920|dc1500|        return false
921|27e597|    }
922|adc83b|
923|bb512f|    private func releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to url: URL) {
924|e6f2d9|        guard let count = securityScopedAccessCounts[url] else { return }
925|d1b9b6|        if count <= 1 {
926|a8ee0e|            securityScopedAccessCounts.removeValue(forKey: url)
927|1a1387|            url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
928|b31999|        } else {
929|385b72|            securityScopedAccessCounts[url] = count - 1
930|5f3077|        }
931|27e597|    }
932|adc83b|
933|cf78ab|    func openFile(from url: URL) {
934|588853|        // If already open, just activate it (and avoid re-reading / re-requesting access).
935|b525f3|        if let existingTab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url == url }) {
936|552ca0|            activeTabId = existingTab.id
937|bef5d6|            return
938|5f3077|        }
939|adc83b|
940|932f65|        // IMPORTANT (BUG-005):
941|473a90|        // Do not early-return if startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() fails.
942|9fa2d8|        // For many URLs (non-security-scoped, or when parent scope is active), this may return false,
943|66c5ff|        // but the file is still readable. We retain access if available.
944|b64f72|        let retained = retainSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
945|adc83b|
946|4da690|        do {
947|71b351|            let content = try String(contentsOf: url, encoding: .utf8)
948|b7a845|            addTab(fileName: url.lastPathComponent, content: content, url: url)
949|adc83b|
950|029423|            // Index the file in Spotlight for search
951|89eebb|            SpotlightManager.shared.indexFile(url: url, content: content, fileName: url.lastPathComponent)
952|853889|        } catch {
953|6234c2|            print("Error opening file: \(error)")
954|b8e2ff|            if retained {
955|3785d1|                // We retained access but failed to open; release our retain.
956|4f4725|                releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
957|a7dc16|            }
958|5f3077|        }
959|27e597|    }
960|adc83b|
961|ecab4a|    func openFile(_ fileItem: FileItem) {
962|5644a7|        guard let url = fileItem.url else {
963|5428ce|            // Try path
964|cc691d|            if !fileItem.path.isEmpty {
965|0d25db|                let fileURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: fileItem.path)
966|04ee6d|                openFile(from: fileURL)
967|a7dc16|            }
968|bef5d6|            return
969|5f3077|        }
970|aa85ed|        openFile(from: url)
971|27e597|    }

973|a458b1|    // MARK: - File System Event Handlers
974|adc83b|
975|9aaca8|    /// Called when a file or folder is moved/renamed in the file system.
976|fa3810|    /// Updates any open tabs that reference the old URL.
977|1aeb4b|    func handleFileSystemItemMoved(from oldURL: URL, to newURL: URL) {
978|be31b4|        for index in tabs.indices {
979|73b1a5|            guard let tabURL = tabs[index].url else { continue }
980|adc83b|
981|d91d40|            // Check if tab URL matches the moved item or is inside it (for folders)
982|6c0d3c|            let oldPath = oldURL.standardizedFileURL.path
983|354993|            let tabPath = tabURL.standardizedFileURL.path
984|adc83b|
985|ca2206|            if tabPath == oldPath {
986|5a4762|                // Direct match - update URL
987|93dccc|                tabs[index].url = newURL
988|f8a1b8|                tabs[index].fileName = newURL.lastPathComponent
989|d38dd0|            } else if tabPath.hasPrefix(oldPath + "/") {
990|cbbd97|                // Tab is inside a moved folder - update the path prefix
991|14ba8e|                let relativePath = String(tabPath.dropFirst(oldPath.count))
992|a19b0f|                let newTabURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: newURL.path + relativePath)
993|cf0bad|                tabs[index].url = newTabURL
994|a7dc16|            }
995|5f3077|        }
996|27e597|    }
997|adc83b|
998|8e6575|    /// Called when a file or folder is deleted from the file system.
999|cc8758|    /// Closes any open tabs that reference the deleted item.
1000|c5a4eb|    func handleFileSystemItemDeleted(at url: URL) {
1001|2e29c5|        let deletedPath = url.standardizedFileURL.path
1002|adc83b|
1003|1f90b1|        // Find all tabs that should be closed
1004|e5b209|        let tabsToClose = tabs.filter { tab in
1005|2a4205|            guard let tabURL = tab.url else { return false }
1006|354993|            let tabPath = tabURL.standardizedFileURL.path
1007|5f7d97|            // Close if exact match or if tab is inside deleted folder
1008|5ea75a|            return tabPath == deletedPath || tabPath.hasPrefix(deletedPath + "/")
1009|5f3077|        }
1010|adc83b|
1011|a7d718|        // Close the tabs (release security access)
1012|97cba5|        for tab in tabsToClose {
1013|cf059e|            closeTab(id: tab.id)
1014|5f3077|        }
1015|27e597|    }
1016|adc83b|

1116|44d2df|    /// Add cursor on the line above (Cmd+Option+Up)
1117|2c94f4|    func addCursorAbove() {
1118|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
1119|760df9|        let content = tabs[index].content
1120|d6ed84|        
1121|c36153|        guard let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor else { return }
1122|d6ed84|        
1123|97e112|        // Find current line and column
1124|cae86c|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: "\n")
1125|4c16f5|        var currentLine = 0
1126|788b38|        var charCount = 0
1127|efbb41|        var columnInLine = 0
1128|d6ed84|        
1129|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
1130|28f01c|            let lineLength = line.count + 1 // +1 for newline
1131|855639|            if charCount + lineLength > primary.position {
1132|1f2410|                currentLine = lineIndex
1133|e165bc|                columnInLine = primary.position - charCount
1134|74cfd8|                break
1135|a7dc16|            }
1136|8f266f|            charCount += lineLength
1137|5f3077|        }
1138|d6ed84|        
1139|4ff883|        // Can't add cursor above line 0
1140|b7a259|        guard currentLine > 0 else { return }
1141|d6ed84|        
1142|ce6291|        // Calculate position on line above
1143|899b8a|        let targetLine = currentLine - 1
1144|e8b652|        var targetPosition = 0
1145|4dc12b|        for i in 0..<targetLine {
1146|8e5904|            targetPosition += lines[i].count + 1
1147|5f3077|        }
1148|90bb82|        targetPosition += min(columnInLine, lines[targetLine].count)
1149|d6ed84|        
1150|22be0f|        multiCursorState.addCursor(at: targetPosition)
1151|27e597|    }
1152|adc83b|

1190|77aabc|    /// Add next occurrence of current selection (Cmd+D)
1191|e6ce2e|    func addNextOccurrence() {
1192|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
1193|760df9|        let content = tabs[index].content
1194|adc83b|
1195|5425d2|        // Get the word/selection to search for
1196|14ac96|        let searchText: String
1197|b70289|        let startPosition: Int
1198|adc83b|
1199|cfba87|        if let range = currentSelectionRange, range.length > 0,
1200|0939c5|           let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1201|451be1|            searchText = String(content[swiftRange])
1202|0b5fe8|            startPosition = range.location + range.length
1203|f70aa5|        } else if let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor {
1204|aed341|            // No selection - select the word under cursor
1205|1688ec|            let wordRange = findWordAtPosition(primary.position, in: content)
1206|8dbaff|            if let range = wordRange, range.length > 0,
1207|6998ee|               let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1208|f4b9bc|                searchText = String(content[swiftRange])
1209|d7f1fc|                startPosition = range.location + range.length
1210|adc83b|
1211|8bf0a9|                // First Cmd+D selects the word under cursor
1212|0cebd2|                multiCursorState.cursors = [Cursor(position: range.location + range.length, anchor: range.location, isPrimary: true)]
1213|70c25c|                currentSelectionRange = range
1214|311604|                currentSelection = searchText
1215|53ab34|                return
1216|f5a6eb|            } else {
1217|53ab34|                return
1218|a7dc16|            }
1219|b31999|        } else {
1220|bef5d6|            return
1221|5f3077|        }
1222|adc83b|
1223|2e0155|        // Find next occurrence
1224|c59f65|        if let nextRange = content.findNextOccurrence(of: searchText, after: startPosition) {
1225|372de1|            // Check if this occurrence is already selected
1226|222428|            let alreadySelected = multiCursorState.cursors.contains { cursor in
1227|d4114c|                if let selRange = cursor.selectionRange {
1228|173534|                    return selRange.location == nextRange.location
1229|4e2d32|                }
1230|473d08|                return false
1231|a7dc16|            }
1232|adc83b|
1233|068570|            if !alreadySelected {
1234|11d39c|                multiCursorState.addCursorWithSelection(
1235|b8d907|                    position: nextRange.location + nextRange.length,
1236|4db973|                    anchor: nextRange.location
1237|6f642e|                )
1238|a7dc16|            }
1239|5f3077|        }
1240|27e597|    }
1241|adc83b|
1242|455218|    /// Select all occurrences of current selection (Cmd+Shift+L)
1243|db732c|    func selectAllOccurrences() {
1244|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
1245|760df9|        let content = tabs[index].content
1246|adc83b|
1247|5425d2|        // Get the word/selection to search for
1248|14ac96|        let searchText: String
1249|adc83b|
1250|cfba87|        if let range = currentSelectionRange, range.length > 0,
1251|0939c5|           let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1252|451be1|            searchText = String(content[swiftRange])
1253|f70aa5|        } else if let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor {
1254|da9f76|            // No selection - use word under cursor
1255|1688ec|            let wordRange = findWordAtPosition(primary.position, in: content)
1256|8dbaff|            if let range = wordRange, range.length > 0,
1257|6998ee|               let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1258|f4b9bc|                searchText = String(content[swiftRange])
1259|f5a6eb|            } else {
1260|53ab34|                return
1261|a7dc16|            }
1262|b31999|        } else {
1263|bef5d6|            return
1264|5f3077|        }
1265|adc83b|
1266|5b5fb8|        // Find all occurrences
1267|d3dc0b|        let allRanges = content.findAllOccurrences(of: searchText)
1268|adc83b|
1269|64295a|        guard !allRanges.isEmpty else { return }
1270|adc83b|
1271|91a2a1|        // Create cursors for all occurrences
1272|897764|        multiCursorState.cursors = allRanges.enumerated().map { index, range in
1273|ea4ddb|            Cursor(
1274|4a52a3|                position: range.location + range.length,
1275|a68855|                anchor: range.location,
1276|501395|                isPrimary: index == 0
1277|43d041|            )
1278|5f3077|        }
1279|adc83b|
1280|f352f6|        currentSelection = searchText
1281|27e597|    }

1292|69c3ac|        currentSelectionRange = range
1293|a147d3|        if let range = range, range.length > 0,
1294|4c0c23|           let index = activeTabIndex {
1295|527d1a|            let content = tabs[index].content
1296|69d76b|            if let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1297|6e1e02|                currentSelection = String(content[swiftRange])
1298|a7dc16|            }
1299|b31999|        } else {
1300|1e5b1e|            currentSelection = ""
1301|5f3077|        }
1302|27e597|    }

1304|8984f8|    /// Find word boundaries at a given position
1305|10f43e|    func findWordAtPosition(_ position: Int, in text: String) -> NSRange? {
1306|37ae73|        guard position >= 0 && position <= text.count else { return nil }
1307|adc83b|
1308|599630|        let nsText = text as NSString
1309|026ed8|        let wordCharacters = CharacterSet.alphanumerics.union(CharacterSet(charactersIn: "_"))
1310|adc83b|
1311|b5bfb0|        // Find start of word
1312|def66a|        var start = position
1313|aaa57c|        while start > 0 {
1314|148e5a|            let char = nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: start - 1, length: 1))
1315|70b198|            if char.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy({ wordCharacters.contains($0) }) {
1316|0c6efe|                start -= 1
1317|f5a6eb|            } else {
1318|74cfd8|                break
1319|a7dc16|            }
1320|5f3077|        }
1321|adc83b|
1322|3d8df8|        // Find end of word
1323|f5c145|        var end = position
1324|b8851f|        while end < nsText.length {
1325|244ed1|            let char = nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: end, length: 1))
1326|70b198|            if char.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy({ wordCharacters.contains($0) }) {
1327|fddf9a|                end += 1
1328|f5a6eb|            } else {
1329|74cfd8|                break
1330|a7dc16|            }
1331|5f3077|        }
1332|adc83b|
1333|77048a|        if start == end {
1334|1c8557|            return nil
1335|5f3077|        }
1336|adc83b|
1337|469001|        return NSRange(location: start, length: end - start)
1338|27e597|    }
1339|adc83b|

1341|2874f6|    func escapeMultiCursor() {
1342|09e325|        if multiCursorState.isMultiCursor {
1343|30a482|            if let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor {
1344|a206bf|                resetToSingleCursor(at: primary.position)
1345|a7dc16|            }
1346|5f3077|        }
1347|27e597|    }

195|e6d260|class AIManager: ObservableObject {
196|9a4557|    // API Keys stored in UserDefaults (consider Keychain for production)
197|51e181|    @AppStorage("openai_api_key") var openAIKey: String = ""
198|feba64|    @AppStorage("anthropic_api_key") var anthropicKey: String = ""
199|8eac3c|    @AppStorage("google_api_key") var googleKey: String = ""
200|7011c5|    @AppStorage("kimi_api_key") var kimiKey: String = ""
201|2a856e|    @AppStorage("glm_api_key") var glmKey: String = ""
202|719111|    @AppStorage("groq_api_key") var groqKey: String = ""
203|a1c0fd|    @AppStorage("deepseek_api_key") var deepseekKey: String = ""
204|66e37b|    @AppStorage("mistral_api_key") var mistralKey: String = ""
205|0ca61a|    @AppStorage("ollama_host") var ollamaHost: String = "http://localhost:11434"
206|b4687f|    
207|018888|    @AppStorage("selected_provider") private var selectedProviderRaw: String = AIProvider.openai.rawValue
208|e31d85|    @AppStorage("selected_model_id") private var selectedModelId: String = "gpt-4o"
209|b4687f|    
210|73f80f|    @Published var currentSession: ChatSession = ChatSession()
211|4e22ed|    @Published var sessions: [ChatSession] = []
212|2a51f8|    @Published var isLoading = false
213|f5a541|    @Published var error: String?
214|7da9ba|    @Published var streamingResponse = ""
215|b4687f|

219|27e597|    }
220|b4687f|    
221|436d4f|    var selectedModel: AIModel {

223|bcf6de|            selectedProvider.models.first { $0.id == selectedModelId } ?? selectedProvider.models[0]
224|5f3077|        }
225|70bd55|        set { selectedModelId = newValue.id }
226|27e597|    }
227|b4687f|    
228|359b1b|    init() {
229|9ec2c3|        loadSessions()

234|5f3077|        }
235|27e597|    }

237|d4b4d7|    // MARK: - Session Management
238|b4687f|    
239|026706|    func createNewSession() {
240|8b68ee|        let session = ChatSession()

242|0a41be|        currentSession = session
243|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
244|27e597|    }
245|b4687f|    
246|e33e11|    func selectSession(_ session: ChatSession) {

248|27e597|    }
249|b4687f|    
250|a2e6f9|    func deleteSession(_ session: ChatSession) {
251|d6c3da|        sessions.removeAll { $0.id == session.id }
252|0290aa|        if currentSession.id == session.id {
253|132ab3|            currentSession = sessions.first ?? ChatSession()
254|a1938c|            if sessions.isEmpty {
255|187c87|                sessions.append(currentSession)
256|a7dc16|            }
257|5f3077|        }
258|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
259|27e597|    }
260|b4687f|    
261|338502|    func clearCurrentSession() {
262|bf5063|        currentSession.messages.removeAll()
263|aa2963|        updateSession()

265|b4687f|    
266|8c2b8c|    private func updateSession() {

269|6fcbfa|            sessions[index] = currentSession
270|5f3077|        }
271|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
272|27e597|    }

279|5f3077|        }
280|27e597|    }
281|b4687f|

284|4a226f|           let decoded = try? JSONDecoder().decode([ChatSession].self, from: data) {

291|ca1870|    func hasValidAPIKey() -> Bool {

293|9ecaf9|        case .openai: return !openAIKey.isEmpty
294|9e889d|        case .anthropic: return !anthropicKey.isEmpty
295|913761|        case .google: return !googleKey.isEmpty
296|2d4ef2|        case .kimi: return !kimiKey.isEmpty
297|bc2b9b|        case .glm: return !glmKey.isEmpty
298|47ba54|        case .groq: return !groqKey.isEmpty
299|d902be|        case .deepseek: return !deepseekKey.isEmpty
300|c5192a|        case .mistral: return !mistralKey.isEmpty
301|06a0e1|        case .ollama: return true // Ollama doesn't require API key
302|6c4184|        case .localMLX: return true // Local model, no API key needed
303|5f3077|        }
304|27e597|    }
305|b4687f|    
306|9839dd|    func getAPIKey() -> String {
307|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
308|93ff72|        case .openai: return openAIKey
309|7ce3eb|        case .anthropic: return anthropicKey
310|ca0d01|        case .google: return googleKey
311|30539a|        case .kimi: return kimiKey
312|d32dc6|        case .glm: return glmKey
313|40a8a4|        case .groq: return groqKey
314|5109f7|        case .deepseek: return deepseekKey
315|2ffd6d|        case .mistral: return mistralKey
316|c37216|        case .ollama: return ""

321|caea46|    // MARK: - Send Message
322|b4687f|    
323|0fd45c|    @MainActor
324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {
325|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
326|06856b|            error = "Please set your API key in settings"
327|bef5d6|            return
328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|e352e6|        let userMessage = ChatMessage(role: .user, content: content)
331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|        
334|8495c1|        // Update title if first message
335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {
336|066ce6|            currentSession.title = String(content.prefix(50))
337|e749a7|            updateSession()
338|5f3077|        }
339|d6ed84|        
340|d52924|        isLoading = true
341|0406ba|        error = nil
342|dc34fb|        streamingResponse = ""
343|d6ed84|        
344|4da690|        do {
345|ce5098|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: currentSession.messages, context: context)
346|70672e|            let assistantMessage = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response, codeBlocks: extractCodeBlocks(from: response))
347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {
350|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false
354|27e597|    }
355|b4687f|    
356|7e38b7|    // MARK: - Code Actions
357|b4687f|    
358|0fd45c|    @MainActor
359|70008d|    func explainCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
360|337b30|        let prompt = "Explain the following \(language) code in detail. What does it do, and how does it work?\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
361|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
362|27e597|    }
363|b4687f|    
364|0fd45c|    @MainActor
365|a1609b|    func fixCode(_ code: String, language: String, errorMessage: String? = nil) async -> String {
366|7b5f15|        var prompt = "Fix any issues in the following \(language) code and explain what was wrong:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
367|bf3125|        if let error = errorMessage {
368|5ee495|            prompt += "\n\nError message: \(error)"
369|5f3077|        }
370|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
371|27e597|    }
372|b4687f|    
373|0fd45c|    @MainActor
374|61e13d|    func generateTests(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
375|a6412a|        let prompt = "Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following \(language) code. Include edge cases and typical usage:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
376|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
377|27e597|    }
378|b4687f|    
379|0fd45c|    @MainActor
380|83d5b9|    func refactorCode(_ code: String, language: String, instruction: String) async -> String {
381|eefc66|        let prompt = "Refactor the following \(language) code according to this instruction: \(instruction)\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
382|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
383|27e597|    }
384|b4687f|    
385|0fd45c|    @MainActor
386|e7b4e9|    func documentCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
387|02ed0f|        let prompt = "Add comprehensive documentation/comments to the following \(language) code:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
388|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
389|27e597|    }
390|b4687f|    
391|0fd45c|    @MainActor
392|90c566|    private func sendAndGetResponse(_ prompt: String) async -> String {
393|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
394|1b72a2|            return "Error: Please set your API key in settings"
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|d52924|        isLoading = true
398|0406ba|        error = nil
399|d6ed84|        
400|4da690|        do {
401|3b5c4f|            let messages = [ChatMessage(role: .user, content: prompt)]
402|153d92|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: messages, context: nil)
403|612c3f|            isLoading = false
404|d392d0|            return response
405|853889|        } catch {
406|612c3f|            isLoading = false
407|0cacff|            return "Error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
408|5f3077|        }
409|27e597|    }
410|b4687f|    
411|579307|    // MARK: - API Request
412|b4687f|    
413|0a6144|    private func makeAPIRequest(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
414|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
415|6ca85d|        case .openai:
416|d9a528|            return try await callOpenAI(messages: messages, context: context)
417|2b5eb0|        case .anthropic:
418|afe61a|            return try await callAnthropic(messages: messages, context: context)
419|51e5bc|        case .google:
420|688f02|            return try await callGoogle(messages: messages, context: context)
421|a90b5c|        case .kimi:
422|467f79|            return try await callKimi(messages: messages, context: context)
423|448974|        case .glm:
424|d03556|            return try await callGLM(messages: messages, context: context)
425|6a2402|        case .groq:
426|2fdc7f|            return try await callGroq(messages: messages, context: context)
427|586fca|        case .deepseek:
428|b7290a|            return try await callDeepSeek(messages: messages, context: context)
429|0935ee|        case .mistral:
430|048202|            return try await callMistral(messages: messages, context: context)
431|7b8ebd|        case .ollama:
432|20a226|            return try await callOllama(messages: messages, context: context)
433|5135a3|        case .localMLX:
434|258af5|            return try await callLocalMLX(messages: messages, context: context)
435|5f3077|        }
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|b90399|    // MARK: - OpenAI API
439|b4687f|    
440|c4fdfa|    private func callOpenAI(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
441|bc2d67|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.openai.baseURL)/chat/completions")!
442|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
443|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
444|7fd512|        request.setValue("Bearer \(openAIKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
445|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
446|d6ed84|        
447|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
448|d6ed84|        
449|5740dd|        // Add system message with context
450|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
451|55709b|        apiMessages.append(["role": "system", "content": systemPrompt])
452|d6ed84|        
453|c5ae63|        // Add conversation messages
454|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
455|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
456|5f3077|        }
457|d6ed84|        
458|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
459|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
460|b5548e|            "messages": apiMessages,
461|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
462|f1c54d|            "temperature": 0.7
463|220505|        ]
464|d6ed84|        
465|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
466|d6ed84|        
467|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
468|d6ed84|        
469|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
470|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
471|5f3077|        }
472|d6ed84|        
473|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
474|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
475|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
476|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
477|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
478|a7dc16|            }
479|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
480|5f3077|        }
481|d6ed84|        
482|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
483|95fe6c|        guard let choices = json?["choices"] as? [[String: Any]],
484|6c7545|              let firstChoice = choices.first,
485|9e7d93|              let message = firstChoice["message"] as? [String: Any],
486|870b1f|              let content = message["content"] as? String else {
487|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
488|5f3077|        }
489|d6ed84|        
490|9be7b6|        return content
491|27e597|    }
492|b4687f|    
493|29e6f6|    // MARK: - Anthropic API
494|b4687f|    
495|f1fc2e|    private func callAnthropic(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
496|3b388d|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.anthropic.baseURL)/messages")!
497|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
498|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
499|ede6ed|        request.setValue(anthropicKey, forHTTPHeaderField: "x-api-key")
500|6b8824|        request.setValue("2023-06-01", forHTTPHeaderField: "anthropic-version")
501|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
502|d6ed84|        
503|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
504|d6ed84|        
505|113613|        for msg in messages where msg.role != .system {
506|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
507|5f3077|        }
508|d6ed84|        
509|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
510|d6ed84|        
511|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
512|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
513|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
514|f06de6|            "system": systemPrompt,
515|60c92e|            "messages": apiMessages
516|220505|        ]
517|d6ed84|        
518|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
519|d6ed84|        
520|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
521|d6ed84|        
522|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
523|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
524|5f3077|        }
525|d6ed84|        
526|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
527|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
528|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
529|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
530|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
531|a7dc16|            }
532|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
533|5f3077|        }
534|d6ed84|        
535|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
536|918dea|        guard let content = json?["content"] as? [[String: Any]],
537|fda5e9|              let firstContent = content.first,
538|31d41c|              let text = firstContent["text"] as? String else {
539|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
540|5f3077|        }
541|d6ed84|        
542|ec263c|        return text
543|27e597|    }
544|b4687f|    
545|87a420|    // MARK: - Google API
546|b4687f|    
547|190d00|    private func callGoogle(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
548|dd3258|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.google.baseURL)/models/\(selectedModel.id):generateContent?key=\(googleKey)")!
549|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
550|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
551|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
552|d6ed84|        
553|2ae98d|        var parts: [[String: Any]] = []
554|d6ed84|        
555|288895|        // Add system context
556|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
557|e08e07|        parts.append(["text": "System: \(systemPrompt)"])
558|d6ed84|        
559|c1c8d4|        // Add messages
560|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
561|989b77|            let role = msg.role == .assistant ? "Model" : "User"
562|35f120|            parts.append(["text": "\(role): \(msg.content)"])
563|5f3077|        }
564|d6ed84|        
565|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
566|6251fc|            "contents": [
567|f76f20|                ["parts": parts]
568|97e7d5|            ],
569|0eaa6f|            "generationConfig": [
570|80d7f4|                "maxOutputTokens": 4096,
571|e772de|                "temperature": 0.7
572|324820|            ]
573|220505|        ]
574|d6ed84|        
575|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
576|d6ed84|        
577|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
578|d6ed84|        
579|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
580|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
581|5f3077|        }
582|d6ed84|        
583|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
584|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
585|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
586|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
587|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
588|a7dc16|            }
589|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
590|5f3077|        }
591|d6ed84|        
592|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
593|12af8b|        guard let candidates = json?["candidates"] as? [[String: Any]],
594|977b10|              let firstCandidate = candidates.first,
595|0ff2f5|              let content = firstCandidate["content"] as? [String: Any],
596|9ddaf9|              let parts = content["parts"] as? [[String: Any]],
597|61737e|              let firstPart = parts.first,
598|a6eafc|              let text = firstPart["text"] as? String else {
599|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
600|5f3077|        }
601|d6ed84|        
602|ec263c|        return text
603|27e597|    }

926|158069|    // MARK: - Local MLX (On-Device)
927|b4687f|    
928|0fd45c|    @MainActor
929|8b65f7|    private func callLocalMLX(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
930|cdacf1|        let localLLM = LocalLLMService.shared
931|d6ed84|        
932|7f5962|        // Auto-load model if not loaded
933|8532e3|        if !localLLM.isModelLoaded {
934|b1c14b|            await localLLM.loadModel()
935|5f3077|        }
936|d6ed84|        
937|19b14f|        guard localLLM.isModelLoaded else {
938|c8173d|            throw AIError.apiError("Failed to load local model")
939|5f3077|        }
940|d6ed84|        
941|05abd5|        // Convert messages to the format LocalLLMService expects
942|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
943|20ec53|        var chatMessages: [(role: String, content: String)] = []
944|d6ed84|        
945|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
946|8df8ce|            chatMessages.append((role: msg.role.rawValue, content: msg.content))
947|5f3077|        }
948|d6ed84|        
949|b4ee8b|        let response = try await localLLM.chat(messages: chatMessages, systemPrompt: systemPrompt)
950|090c3f|        return response
951|27e597|    }
952|b4687f|    
953|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
954|b4687f|    
955|a96bea|    private func buildSystemPrompt(context: String?) -> String {
956|a60aaf|        var prompt = """
957|de15a3|You are an expert coding assistant integrated into a code editor on iPadOS. You help developers write, debug, explain, and improve their code. Always respond in English.
958|adc83b|
959|3584f0|Guidelines:
960|9e10fd|- Provide clear, concise explanations
961|d9814a|- Use code blocks with proper language tags for code snippets
962|fab31f|- Suggest best practices and optimizations
963|17f65d|- Be helpful with debugging and error resolution
964|a2707f|- When generating code, ensure it's complete and runnable
965|ea2d25|- ALWAYS respond in English regardless of input language
966|d72f9a|- Never output raw XML tags like <think> or </think>
967|e4615a|"""
968|d6ed84|        
969|54cd50|        if let context = context, !context.isEmpty {
970|b91f6a|            prompt += "\n\nCurrent file context:\n```\n\(context)\n```"
971|5f3077|        }
972|d6ed84|        
973|dd02e7|        return prompt
974|27e597|    }
975|b4687f|    
976|c53a51|    private func extractCodeBlocks(from text: String) -> [CodeBlock] {
977|791eb5|        var blocks: [CodeBlock] = []
978|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
979|d6ed84|        
980|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
981|f7ed63|            return blocks
982|5f3077|        }
983|d6ed84|        
984|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
985|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
986|d6ed84|        
987|847e6d|        for match in matches {
988|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
989|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
990|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
991|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
992|9e5c94|                blocks.append(CodeBlock(language: language.isEmpty ? "text" : language, code: code))
993|a7dc16|            }
994|5f3077|        }
995|d6ed84|        
996|db7106|        return blocks
997|27e597|    }
998|b31277|}
999|adc83b|
1000|e2fa47|// MARK: - AI Errors
1001|adc83b|
1002|c16cee|enum AIError: LocalizedError {
1003|06d89d|    case invalidResponse
1004|dbebbc|    case httpError(Int)
1005|24e92a|    case apiError(String)
1006|b833b2|    case noAPIKey
1007|b4687f|    
1008|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
1009|2e6d08|        switch self {
1010|9a7b43|        case .invalidResponse: return "Invalid response from AI service"
1011|385ec1|        case .httpError(let code): return "HTTP Error: \(code)"
1012|1b0277|        case .apiError(let message): return message

158|adc83b|

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String
226|b4787e|        let replacementRange: Range<String.Index>
227|56198f|        let isMemberCompletion: Bool
228|79772b|        let memberBase: String?
229|27e597|    }
230|adc83b|
231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }
348|b31277|}
349|adc83b|
350|c6407f|// MARK: - Safe Array Access
351|adc83b|
352|d72239|private extension Array {
353|686e51|    subscript(safe index: Int) -> Element? {
354|0b415a|        indices.contains(index) ? self[index] : nil
355|27e597|    }
356|b31277|}

194|adc83b|
195|e6d260|class AIManager: ObservableObject {
196|9a4557|    // API Keys stored in UserDefaults (consider Keychain for production)
197|51e181|    @AppStorage("openai_api_key") var openAIKey: String = ""
198|feba64|    @AppStorage("anthropic_api_key") var anthropicKey: String = ""
199|8eac3c|    @AppStorage("google_api_key") var googleKey: String = ""
200|7011c5|    @AppStorage("kimi_api_key") var kimiKey: String = ""
201|2a856e|    @AppStorage("glm_api_key") var glmKey: String = ""
202|719111|    @AppStorage("groq_api_key") var groqKey: String = ""
203|a1c0fd|    @AppStorage("deepseek_api_key") var deepseekKey: String = ""
204|66e37b|    @AppStorage("mistral_api_key") var mistralKey: String = ""
205|0ca61a|    @AppStorage("ollama_host") var ollamaHost: String = "http://localhost:11434"
206|b4687f|    
207|018888|    @AppStorage("selected_provider") private var selectedProviderRaw: String = AIProvider.openai.rawValue
208|e31d85|    @AppStorage("selected_model_id") private var selectedModelId: String = "gpt-4o"
209|b4687f|    
210|73f80f|    @Published var currentSession: ChatSession = ChatSession()
211|4e22ed|    @Published var sessions: [ChatSession] = []
212|2a51f8|    @Published var isLoading = false
213|f5a541|    @Published var error: String?
214|7da9ba|    @Published var streamingResponse = ""
215|b4687f|    
216|1cd389|    var selectedProvider: AIProvider {
217|7c273a|        get { AIProvider(rawValue: selectedProviderRaw) ?? .openai }
218|1d48ce|        set { selectedProviderRaw = newValue.rawValue }
219|27e597|    }
220|b4687f|    
221|436d4f|    var selectedModel: AIModel {
222|41ddcc|        get {
223|bcf6de|            selectedProvider.models.first { $0.id == selectedModelId } ?? selectedProvider.models[0]
224|5f3077|        }
225|70bd55|        set { selectedModelId = newValue.id }
226|27e597|    }
227|b4687f|    
228|359b1b|    init() {
229|9ec2c3|        loadSessions()
230|d760e7|        if sessions.isEmpty {
231|84aa73|            createNewSession()
232|b31999|        } else {
233|28bc19|            currentSession = sessions[0]
234|5f3077|        }
235|27e597|    }
236|b4687f|    
237|d4b4d7|    // MARK: - Session Management
238|b4687f|    
239|026706|    func createNewSession() {
240|8b68ee|        let session = ChatSession()
241|27939c|        sessions.insert(session, at: 0)
242|0a41be|        currentSession = session
243|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
244|27e597|    }
245|b4687f|    
246|e33e11|    func selectSession(_ session: ChatSession) {
247|0a41be|        currentSession = session
248|27e597|    }
249|b4687f|    
250|a2e6f9|    func deleteSession(_ session: ChatSession) {
251|d6c3da|        sessions.removeAll { $0.id == session.id }
252|0290aa|        if currentSession.id == session.id {
253|132ab3|            currentSession = sessions.first ?? ChatSession()
254|a1938c|            if sessions.isEmpty {
255|187c87|                sessions.append(currentSession)
256|a7dc16|            }
257|5f3077|        }
258|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
259|27e597|    }
260|b4687f|    
261|338502|    func clearCurrentSession() {
262|bf5063|        currentSession.messages.removeAll()
263|aa2963|        updateSession()
264|27e597|    }
265|b4687f|    
266|8c2b8c|    private func updateSession() {
267|2ecb1b|        currentSession.updatedAt = Date()
268|3817b6|        if let index = sessions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == currentSession.id }) {
269|6fcbfa|            sessions[index] = currentSession
270|5f3077|        }
271|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
272|27e597|    }
273|b4687f|    
274|89259d|    // MARK: - Persistence
275|b4687f|    
276|8542d4|    private func saveSessions() {
277|29004a|        if let encoded = try? JSONEncoder().encode(sessions) {
278|c1502a|            UserDefaults.standard.set(encoded, forKey: "ai_chat_sessions")
279|5f3077|        }
280|27e597|    }
281|b4687f|    
282|429d69|    private func loadSessions() {
283|b75853|        if let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: "ai_chat_sessions"),
284|4a226f|           let decoded = try? JSONDecoder().decode([ChatSession].self, from: data) {
285|e0ba43|            sessions = decoded
286|5f3077|        }
287|27e597|    }

289|0ea925|    // MARK: - API Key Validation
290|b4687f|    
291|ca1870|    func hasValidAPIKey() -> Bool {
292|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
293|9ecaf9|        case .openai: return !openAIKey.isEmpty
294|9e889d|        case .anthropic: return !anthropicKey.isEmpty
295|913761|        case .google: return !googleKey.isEmpty
296|2d4ef2|        case .kimi: return !kimiKey.isEmpty
297|bc2b9b|        case .glm: return !glmKey.isEmpty
298|47ba54|        case .groq: return !groqKey.isEmpty
299|d902be|        case .deepseek: return !deepseekKey.isEmpty
300|c5192a|        case .mistral: return !mistralKey.isEmpty
301|06a0e1|        case .ollama: return true // Ollama doesn't require API key
302|6c4184|        case .localMLX: return true // Local model, no API key needed
303|5f3077|        }
304|27e597|    }
305|b4687f|    
306|9839dd|    func getAPIKey() -> String {
307|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
308|93ff72|        case .openai: return openAIKey
309|7ce3eb|        case .anthropic: return anthropicKey
310|ca0d01|        case .google: return googleKey
311|30539a|        case .kimi: return kimiKey
312|d32dc6|        case .glm: return glmKey
313|40a8a4|        case .groq: return groqKey
314|5109f7|        case .deepseek: return deepseekKey
315|2ffd6d|        case .mistral: return mistralKey
316|c37216|        case .ollama: return ""
317|443135|        case .localMLX: return ""
318|5f3077|        }
319|27e597|    }

321|caea46|    // MARK: - Send Message
322|b4687f|    
323|0fd45c|    @MainActor
324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {
325|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
326|06856b|            error = "Please set your API key in settings"
327|bef5d6|            return
328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|e352e6|        let userMessage = ChatMessage(role: .user, content: content)
331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|        
334|8495c1|        // Update title if first message
335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {
336|066ce6|            currentSession.title = String(content.prefix(50))
337|e749a7|            updateSession()
338|5f3077|        }
339|d6ed84|        
340|d52924|        isLoading = true
341|0406ba|        error = nil
342|dc34fb|        streamingResponse = ""
343|d6ed84|        
344|4da690|        do {
345|ce5098|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: currentSession.messages, context: context)
346|70672e|            let assistantMessage = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response, codeBlocks: extractCodeBlocks(from: response))
347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {
350|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false
354|27e597|    }
355|b4687f|    
356|7e38b7|    // MARK: - Code Actions
357|b4687f|    
358|0fd45c|    @MainActor
359|70008d|    func explainCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
360|337b30|        let prompt = "Explain the following \(language) code in detail. What does it do, and how does it work?\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
361|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
362|27e597|    }
363|b4687f|    
364|0fd45c|    @MainActor
365|a1609b|    func fixCode(_ code: String, language: String, errorMessage: String? = nil) async -> String {
366|7b5f15|        var prompt = "Fix any issues in the following \(language) code and explain what was wrong:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
367|bf3125|        if let error = errorMessage {
368|5ee495|            prompt += "\n\nError message: \(error)"
369|5f3077|        }
370|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
371|27e597|    }
372|b4687f|    
373|0fd45c|    @MainActor
374|61e13d|    func generateTests(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
375|a6412a|        let prompt = "Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following \(language) code. Include edge cases and typical usage:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
376|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
377|27e597|    }
378|b4687f|    
379|0fd45c|    @MainActor
380|83d5b9|    func refactorCode(_ code: String, language: String, instruction: String) async -> String {
381|eefc66|        let prompt = "Refactor the following \(language) code according to this instruction: \(instruction)\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
382|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
383|27e597|    }
384|b4687f|    
385|0fd45c|    @MainActor
386|e7b4e9|    func documentCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
387|02ed0f|        let prompt = "Add comprehensive documentation/comments to the following \(language) code:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
388|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
389|27e597|    }
390|b4687f|    
391|0fd45c|    @MainActor
392|90c566|    private func sendAndGetResponse(_ prompt: String) async -> String {
393|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
394|1b72a2|            return "Error: Please set your API key in settings"
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|d52924|        isLoading = true
398|0406ba|        error = nil
399|d6ed84|        
400|4da690|        do {
401|3b5c4f|            let messages = [ChatMessage(role: .user, content: prompt)]
402|153d92|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: messages, context: nil)
403|612c3f|            isLoading = false
404|d392d0|            return response
405|853889|        } catch {
406|612c3f|            isLoading = false
407|0cacff|            return "Error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
408|5f3077|        }
409|27e597|    }
410|b4687f|    
411|579307|    // MARK: - API Request
412|b4687f|    
413|0a6144|    private func makeAPIRequest(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
414|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
415|6ca85d|        case .openai:
416|d9a528|            return try await callOpenAI(messages: messages, context: context)
417|2b5eb0|        case .anthropic:
418|afe61a|            return try await callAnthropic(messages: messages, context: context)
419|51e5bc|        case .google:
420|688f02|            return try await callGoogle(messages: messages, context: context)
421|a90b5c|        case .kimi:
422|467f79|            return try await callKimi(messages: messages, context: context)
423|448974|        case .glm:
424|d03556|            return try await callGLM(messages: messages, context: context)
425|6a2402|        case .groq:
426|2fdc7f|            return try await callGroq(messages: messages, context: context)
427|586fca|        case .deepseek:
428|b7290a|            return try await callDeepSeek(messages: messages, context: context)
429|0935ee|        case .mistral:
430|048202|            return try await callMistral(messages: messages, context: context)
431|7b8ebd|        case .ollama:
432|20a226|            return try await callOllama(messages: messages, context: context)
433|5135a3|        case .localMLX:
434|258af5|            return try await callLocalMLX(messages: messages, context: context)
435|5f3077|        }
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|b90399|    // MARK: - OpenAI API
439|b4687f|    
440|c4fdfa|    private func callOpenAI(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
441|bc2d67|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.openai.baseURL)/chat/completions")!
442|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
443|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
444|7fd512|        request.setValue("Bearer \(openAIKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
445|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
446|d6ed84|        
447|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
448|d6ed84|        
449|5740dd|        // Add system message with context
450|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
451|55709b|        apiMessages.append(["role": "system", "content": systemPrompt])
452|d6ed84|        
453|c5ae63|        // Add conversation messages
454|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
455|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
456|5f3077|        }
457|d6ed84|        
458|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
459|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
460|b5548e|            "messages": apiMessages,
461|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
462|f1c54d|            "temperature": 0.7
463|220505|        ]
464|d6ed84|        
465|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
466|d6ed84|        
467|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
468|d6ed84|        
469|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
470|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
471|5f3077|        }
472|d6ed84|        
473|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
474|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
475|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
476|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
477|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
478|a7dc16|            }
479|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
480|5f3077|        }
481|d6ed84|        
482|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
483|95fe6c|        guard let choices = json?["choices"] as? [[String: Any]],
484|6c7545|              let firstChoice = choices.first,
485|9e7d93|              let message = firstChoice["message"] as? [String: Any],
486|870b1f|              let content = message["content"] as? String else {
487|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
488|5f3077|        }
489|d6ed84|        
490|9be7b6|        return content
491|27e597|    }
492|b4687f|    
493|29e6f6|    // MARK: - Anthropic API
494|b4687f|    
495|f1fc2e|    private func callAnthropic(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
496|3b388d|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.anthropic.baseURL)/messages")!
497|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
498|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
499|ede6ed|        request.setValue(anthropicKey, forHTTPHeaderField: "x-api-key")
500|6b8824|        request.setValue("2023-06-01", forHTTPHeaderField: "anthropic-version")
501|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
502|d6ed84|

545|87a420|    // MARK: - Google API
546|b4687f|    
547|190d00|    private func callGoogle(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
548|dd3258|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.google.baseURL)/models/\(selectedModel.id):generateContent?key=\(googleKey)")!
549|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
550|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
551|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
552|d6ed84|        
553|2ae98d|        var parts: [[String: Any]] = []
554|d6ed84|        
555|288895|        // Add system context
556|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
557|e08e07|        parts.append(["text": "System: \(systemPrompt)"])
558|d6ed84|        
559|c1c8d4|        // Add messages
560|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
561|989b77|            let role = msg.role == .assistant ? "Model" : "User"
562|35f120|            parts.append(["text": "\(role): \(msg.content)"])
563|5f3077|        }
564|d6ed84|        
565|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
566|6251fc|            "contents": [
567|f76f20|                ["parts": parts]
568|97e7d5|            ],
569|0eaa6f|            "generationConfig": [
570|80d7f4|                "maxOutputTokens": 4096,
571|e772de|                "temperature": 0.7
572|324820|            ]
573|220505|        ]
574|d6ed84|        
575|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
576|d6ed84|        
577|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
578|d6ed84|        
579|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
580|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
581|5f3077|        }
582|d6ed84|        
583|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
584|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
585|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
586|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
587|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
588|a7dc16|            }
589|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
590|5f3077|        }
591|d6ed84|        
592|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
593|12af8b|        guard let candidates = json?["candidates"] as? [[String: Any]],
594|977b10|              let firstCandidate = candidates.first,
595|0ff2f5|              let content = firstCandidate["content"] as? [String: Any],
596|9ddaf9|              let parts = content["parts"] as? [[String: Any]],
597|61737e|              let firstPart = parts.first,
598|a6eafc|              let text = firstPart["text"] as? String else {
599|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
600|5f3077|        }
601|d6ed84|        
602|ec263c|        return text
603|27e597|    }

926|158069|    // MARK: - Local MLX (On-Device)
927|b4687f|    
928|0fd45c|    @MainActor
929|8b65f7|    private func callLocalMLX(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
930|cdacf1|        let localLLM = LocalLLMService.shared
931|d6ed84|        
932|7f5962|        // Auto-load model if not loaded
933|8532e3|        if !localLLM.isModelLoaded {
934|b1c14b|            await localLLM.loadModel()
935|5f3077|        }
936|d6ed84|        
937|19b14f|        guard localLLM.isModelLoaded else {
938|c8173d|            throw AIError.apiError("Failed to load local model")
939|5f3077|        }
940|d6ed84|        
941|05abd5|        // Convert messages to the format LocalLLMService expects
942|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
943|20ec53|        var chatMessages: [(role: String, content: String)] = []
944|d6ed84|        
945|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
946|8df8ce|            chatMessages.append((role: msg.role.rawValue, content: msg.content))
947|5f3077|        }
948|d6ed84|        
949|b4ee8b|        let response = try await localLLM.chat(messages: chatMessages, systemPrompt: systemPrompt)
950|090c3f|        return response
951|27e597|    }

954|b4687f|    
955|a96bea|    private func buildSystemPrompt(context: String?) -> String {
956|a60aaf|        var prompt = """
957|de15a3|You are an expert coding assistant integrated into a code editor on iPadOS. You help developers write, debug, explain, and improve their code. Always respond in English.
958|adc83b|
959|3584f0|Guidelines:
960|9e10fd|- Provide clear, concise explanations
961|d9814a|- Use code blocks with proper language tags for code snippets
962|fab31f|- Suggest best practices and optimizations
963|17f65d|- Be helpful with debugging and error resolution
964|a2707f|- When generating code, ensure it's complete and runnable
965|ea2d25|- ALWAYS respond in English regardless of input language
966|d72f9a|- Never output raw XML tags like <think> or </think>
967|e4615a|"""
968|d6ed84|        
969|54cd50|        if let context = context, !context.isEmpty {
970|b91f6a|            prompt += "\n\nCurrent file context:\n```\n\(context)\n```"
971|5f3077|        }
972|d6ed84|        
973|dd02e7|        return prompt
974|27e597|    }
975|b4687f|    
976|c53a51|    private func extractCodeBlocks(from text: String) -> [CodeBlock] {
977|791eb5|        var blocks: [CodeBlock] = []
978|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
979|d6ed84|        
980|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
981|f7ed63|            return blocks
982|5f3077|        }
983|d6ed84|        
984|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
985|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
986|d6ed84|        
987|847e6d|        for match in matches {
988|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
989|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
990|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
991|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
992|9e5c94|                blocks.append(CodeBlock(language: language.isEmpty ? "text" : language, code: code))
993|a7dc16|            }
994|5f3077|        }
995|d6ed84|        
996|db7106|        return blocks
997|27e597|    }
998|b31277|}

1002|c16cee|enum AIError: LocalizedError {
1003|06d89d|    case invalidResponse
1004|dbebbc|    case httpError(Int)
1005|24e92a|    case apiError(String)
1006|b833b2|    case noAPIKey
1007|b4687f|    
1008|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
1009|2e6d08|        switch self {
1010|9a7b43|        case .invalidResponse: return "Invalid response from AI service"
1011|385ec1|        case .httpError(let code): return "HTTP Error: \(code)"
1012|1b0277|        case .apiError(let message): return message
1013|e8a23b|        case .noAPIKey: return "No API key configured"
1014|5f3077|        }
1015|27e597|    }

197|b31999|        } else {

345|8e47e1|    /// Start a real JavaScript debug session
346|2b9817|    func startDebugging(code: String, fileName: String, fileId: String) {

348|96e590|        consoleEntries.removeAll()
349|f75c5d|        callStack.removeAll()

352|c0f638|        // Add system message

355|27afb6|            kind: .system

357|d6ed84|        
358|ed1770|        // Set up initial call stack
359|ee221a|        callStack = [
360|db8273|            StackFrame(function: "<module>", file: fileName, line: 1)
361|220505|        ]
362|b51589|        selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
363|481302|        state = .running
364|d6ed84|        
365|fabbcb|        // Run JavaScript with JSRunner
366|0f1953|        Task {
367|78f5a7|            let runner = JSRunner()
368|3070d1|            
369|80530a|            // Capture console output
370|2bcb08|            runner.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
371|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
372|9e6003|                    guard let self = self else { return }
373|1b9d24|                    let kind: ConsoleEntry.Kind
374|571cf3|                    if message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") {
375|19d4ff|                        kind = .error
376|6ba763|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[WARN]") {
377|bd649a|                        kind = .warning
378|e9bff4|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[INFO]") {
379|cb1c58|                        kind = .info
380|540066|                    } else {
381|bc6733|                        kind = .output
382|c9717a|                    }
383|56aa6d|                    // Strip prefix for cleaner output
384|63772a|                    let cleanMessage = message
385|ba5a18|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[LOG] ", with: "")
386|dbc777|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[ERROR] ", with: "")
387|be10bc|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[WARN] ", with: "")
388|1f973e|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[INFO] ", with: "")
389|ffc155|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(message: cleanMessage, kind: kind))
390|4e2d32|                }
391|a7dc16|            }
392|3070d1|            
393|71cc09|            do {
394|8a3016|                let result = try await runner.execute(code: code, timeout: 30.0)
395|dbac47|                let resultString = result.toString() ?? ""
396|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
397|2160a3|                    if !resultString.isEmpty && resultString != "undefined" {
398|cfc3f8|                        self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
399|23cb42|                            message: "→ \(resultString)",
400|07ef2b|                            kind: .output
401|78dc58|                        ))
402|c9717a|                    }
403|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
404|7997c0|                        message: "Debug session ended.",
405|32eda6|                        kind: .system
406|c89922|                    ))
407|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
408|27adbc|                    self.callStack.removeAll()
409|4e2d32|                }
410|91b9a2|            } catch {
411|41f488|                await MainActor.run {

414|bddd8e|                        kind: .error
415|c89922|                    ))
416|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
417|4ae511|                        message: "Debug session ended with error.",
418|32eda6|                        kind: .system
419|c89922|                    ))
420|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
421|4e2d32|                }

438|2ca9c8|    func stepInto() {
439|ce02c3|        guard state.canStep else { return }
440|f0b58f|        advanceTopFrameLine(by: 1)
441|23d0ec|        // Pretend we stepped into a function.
442|982289|        if let top = callStack.first {
443|8c256c|            var cs = callStack
444|27877d|            cs.insert(StackFrame(function: "helper()", file: top.file, line: top.line), at: 0)
445|b80726|            callStack = cs
446|1e5c04|            selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
447|5f3077|        }
448|27e597|    }
449|adc83b|
450|d1c987|    private func advanceTopFrameLine(by delta: Int) {
451|1735de|        guard !callStack.isEmpty else { return }
452|adc83b|
453|5c5f53|        // IMPORTANT: mutate via a copy so @Published emits reliably for collection changes.
454|e6cfa2|        var cs = callStack
455|dc199c|        cs[0].line += delta
456|917f8a|        callStack = cs
457|adc83b|
458|390c0e|        // Make the demo watch expression change a bit.
459|592404|        if let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.expression == "counter" }) {
460|95bd8c|            var watches = watchExpressions
461|2ed9b0|            let n = Int(watches[idx].value) ?? 0
462|5b5bc8|            watches[idx].value = "\(n + delta)"
463|6dcd0c|            watchExpressions = watches
464|5f3077|        }
465|adc83b|
466|c6c3e0|        if let varIdx = variables.firstIndex(where: { $0.name == "counter" }) {
467|c2619d|            var vars = variables
468|1520a4|            let n = Int(vars[varIdx].value) ?? 0
469|5da7be|            vars[varIdx].value = "\(n + delta)"
470|dac60a|            variables = vars
471|5f3077|        }
472|27e597|    }

324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {

326|06856b|            error = "Please set your API key in settings"

328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|e352e6|        let userMessage = ChatMessage(role: .user, content: content)
331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|

335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {

339|d6ed84|

344|4da690|        do {

347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {

351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false

380|83d5b9|    func refactorCode(_ code: String, language: String, instruction: String) async -> String {
