194|adc83b|
195|e6d260|class AIManager: ObservableObject {
196|9a4557|    // API Keys stored in UserDefaults (consider Keychain for production)
197|51e181|    @AppStorage("openai_api_key") var openAIKey: String = ""
198|feba64|    @AppStorage("anthropic_api_key") var anthropicKey: String = ""
199|8eac3c|    @AppStorage("google_api_key") var googleKey: String = ""
200|7011c5|    @AppStorage("kimi_api_key") var kimiKey: String = ""
201|2a856e|    @AppStorage("glm_api_key") var glmKey: String = ""
202|719111|    @AppStorage("groq_api_key") var groqKey: String = ""
203|a1c0fd|    @AppStorage("deepseek_api_key") var deepseekKey: String = ""
204|66e37b|    @AppStorage("mistral_api_key") var mistralKey: String = ""
205|0ca61a|    @AppStorage("ollama_host") var ollamaHost: String = "http://localhost:11434"
206|b4687f|    
207|018888|    @AppStorage("selected_provider") private var selectedProviderRaw: String = AIProvider.openai.rawValue
208|e31d85|    @AppStorage("selected_model_id") private var selectedModelId: String = "gpt-4o"
209|b4687f|    
210|73f80f|    @Published var currentSession: ChatSession = ChatSession()
211|4e22ed|    @Published var sessions: [ChatSession] = []
212|2a51f8|    @Published var isLoading = false
213|f5a541|    @Published var error: String?
214|7da9ba|    @Published var streamingResponse = ""
215|b4687f|    
216|1cd389|    var selectedProvider: AIProvider {
217|7c273a|        get { AIProvider(rawValue: selectedProviderRaw) ?? .openai }
218|1d48ce|        set { selectedProviderRaw = newValue.rawValue }
219|27e597|    }
220|b4687f|    
221|436d4f|    var selectedModel: AIModel {
222|41ddcc|        get {
223|bcf6de|            selectedProvider.models.first { $0.id == selectedModelId } ?? selectedProvider.models[0]
224|5f3077|        }
225|70bd55|        set { selectedModelId = newValue.id }
226|27e597|    }
227|b4687f|    
228|359b1b|    init() {
229|9ec2c3|        loadSessions()
230|d760e7|        if sessions.isEmpty {
231|84aa73|            createNewSession()
232|b31999|        } else {
233|28bc19|            currentSession = sessions[0]
234|5f3077|        }
235|27e597|    }
236|b4687f|    
237|d4b4d7|    // MARK: - Session Management
238|b4687f|    
239|026706|    func createNewSession() {
240|8b68ee|        let session = ChatSession()
241|27939c|        sessions.insert(session, at: 0)
242|0a41be|        currentSession = session
243|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
244|27e597|    }
245|b4687f|    
246|e33e11|    func selectSession(_ session: ChatSession) {
247|0a41be|        currentSession = session
248|27e597|    }
249|b4687f|    
250|a2e6f9|    func deleteSession(_ session: ChatSession) {
251|d6c3da|        sessions.removeAll { $0.id == session.id }
252|0290aa|        if currentSession.id == session.id {
253|132ab3|            currentSession = sessions.first ?? ChatSession()
254|a1938c|            if sessions.isEmpty {
255|187c87|                sessions.append(currentSession)
256|a7dc16|            }
257|5f3077|        }
258|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
259|27e597|    }
260|b4687f|    
261|338502|    func clearCurrentSession() {
262|bf5063|        currentSession.messages.removeAll()
263|aa2963|        updateSession()
264|27e597|    }
265|b4687f|    
266|8c2b8c|    private func updateSession() {
267|2ecb1b|        currentSession.updatedAt = Date()
268|3817b6|        if let index = sessions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == currentSession.id }) {
269|6fcbfa|            sessions[index] = currentSession
270|5f3077|        }
271|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
272|27e597|    }
273|b4687f|    
274|89259d|    // MARK: - Persistence
275|b4687f|    
276|8542d4|    private func saveSessions() {
277|29004a|        if let encoded = try? JSONEncoder().encode(sessions) {
278|c1502a|            UserDefaults.standard.set(encoded, forKey: "ai_chat_sessions")
279|5f3077|        }
280|27e597|    }
281|b4687f|    
282|429d69|    private func loadSessions() {
283|b75853|        if let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: "ai_chat_sessions"),
284|4a226f|           let decoded = try? JSONDecoder().decode([ChatSession].self, from: data) {
285|e0ba43|            sessions = decoded
286|5f3077|        }
287|27e597|    }
288|b4687f|    
289|0ea925|    // MARK: - API Key Validation
290|b4687f|    
291|ca1870|    func hasValidAPIKey() -> Bool {
292|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
293|9ecaf9|        case .openai: return !openAIKey.isEmpty
294|9e889d|        case .anthropic: return !anthropicKey.isEmpty
295|913761|        case .google: return !googleKey.isEmpty
296|2d4ef2|        case .kimi: return !kimiKey.isEmpty
297|bc2b9b|        case .glm: return !glmKey.isEmpty
298|47ba54|        case .groq: return !groqKey.isEmpty
299|d902be|        case .deepseek: return !deepseekKey.isEmpty
300|c5192a|        case .mistral: return !mistralKey.isEmpty
301|06a0e1|        case .ollama: return true // Ollama doesn't require API key
302|6c4184|        case .localMLX: return true // Local model, no API key needed
303|5f3077|        }
304|27e597|    }
305|b4687f|    
306|9839dd|    func getAPIKey() -> String {
307|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
308|93ff72|        case .openai: return openAIKey
309|7ce3eb|        case .anthropic: return anthropicKey
310|ca0d01|        case .google: return googleKey
311|30539a|        case .kimi: return kimiKey
312|d32dc6|        case .glm: return glmKey
313|40a8a4|        case .groq: return groqKey
314|5109f7|        case .deepseek: return deepseekKey
315|2ffd6d|        case .mistral: return mistralKey
316|c37216|        case .ollama: return ""
317|443135|        case .localMLX: return ""
318|5f3077|        }
319|27e597|    }
320|b4687f|    
321|caea46|    // MARK: - Send Message
322|b4687f|    
323|0fd45c|    @MainActor
324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {
325|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
326|06856b|            error = "Please set your API key in settings"
327|bef5d6|            return
328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|e352e6|        let userMessage = ChatMessage(role: .user, content: content)
331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|        
334|8495c1|        // Update title if first message
335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {
336|066ce6|            currentSession.title = String(content.prefix(50))
337|e749a7|            updateSession()
338|5f3077|        }
339|d6ed84|        
340|d52924|        isLoading = true
341|0406ba|        error = nil
342|dc34fb|        streamingResponse = ""
343|d6ed84|        
344|4da690|        do {
345|ce5098|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: currentSession.messages, context: context)
346|70672e|            let assistantMessage = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response, codeBlocks: extractCodeBlocks(from: response))
347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {
350|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false
354|27e597|    }
355|b4687f|    
356|7e38b7|    // MARK: - Code Actions
357|b4687f|    
358|0fd45c|    @MainActor
359|70008d|    func explainCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
360|337b30|        let prompt = "Explain the following \(language) code in detail. What does it do, and how does it work?\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
361|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
362|27e597|    }
363|b4687f|    
364|0fd45c|    @MainActor
365|a1609b|    func fixCode(_ code: String, language: String, errorMessage: String? = nil) async -> String {
366|7b5f15|        var prompt = "Fix any issues in the following \(language) code and explain what was wrong:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
367|bf3125|        if let error = errorMessage {
368|5ee495|            prompt += "\n\nError message: \(error)"
369|5f3077|        }
370|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
371|27e597|    }
372|b4687f|    
373|0fd45c|    @MainActor
374|61e13d|    func generateTests(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
375|a6412a|        let prompt = "Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following \(language) code. Include edge cases and typical usage:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
376|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
377|27e597|    }
378|b4687f|    
379|0fd45c|    @MainActor
380|83d5b9|    func refactorCode(_ code: String, language: String, instruction: String) async -> String {
381|eefc66|        let prompt = "Refactor the following \(language) code according to this instruction: \(instruction)\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
382|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
383|27e597|    }
384|b4687f|    
385|0fd45c|    @MainActor
386|e7b4e9|    func documentCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
387|02ed0f|        let prompt = "Add comprehensive documentation/comments to the following \(language) code:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
388|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
389|27e597|    }
390|b4687f|    
391|0fd45c|    @MainActor
392|90c566|    private func sendAndGetResponse(_ prompt: String) async -> String {
393|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
394|1b72a2|            return "Error: Please set your API key in settings"
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|d52924|        isLoading = true
398|0406ba|        error = nil
399|d6ed84|        
400|4da690|        do {
401|3b5c4f|            let messages = [ChatMessage(role: .user, content: prompt)]
402|153d92|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: messages, context: nil)
403|612c3f|            isLoading = false
404|d392d0|            return response
405|853889|        } catch {
406|612c3f|            isLoading = false
407|0cacff|            return "Error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
408|5f3077|        }
409|27e597|    }
410|b4687f|    
411|579307|    // MARK: - API Request
412|b4687f|    
413|0a6144|    private func makeAPIRequest(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
414|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
415|6ca85d|        case .openai:
416|d9a528|            return try await callOpenAI(messages: messages, context: context)
417|2b5eb0|        case .anthropic:
418|afe61a|            return try await callAnthropic(messages: messages, context: context)
419|51e5bc|        case .google:
420|688f02|            return try await callGoogle(messages: messages, context: context)
421|a90b5c|        case .kimi:
422|467f79|            return try await callKimi(messages: messages, context: context)
423|448974|        case .glm:
424|d03556|            return try await callGLM(messages: messages, context: context)
425|6a2402|        case .groq:
426|2fdc7f|            return try await callGroq(messages: messages, context: context)
427|586fca|        case .deepseek:
428|b7290a|            return try await callDeepSeek(messages: messages, context: context)
429|0935ee|        case .mistral:
430|048202|            return try await callMistral(messages: messages, context: context)
431|7b8ebd|        case .ollama:
432|20a226|            return try await callOllama(messages: messages, context: context)
433|5135a3|        case .localMLX:

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String

230|adc83b|
231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }

353|686e51|    subscript(safe index: Int) -> Element? {
354|0b415a|        indices.contains(index) ? self[index] : nil
355|27e597|    }

4|910fc8|/// Manages inline code suggestions with debouncing, throttling, and cancellation support.
5|a3a85a|/// Uses Combine operators to prevent excessive API calls while maintaining responsive UX.
6|e0ad8a|/// 
7|eafd18|/// Request Flow:
8|59449b|/// 1. User types → typingSubject receives event
9|4129a0|/// 2. Cancel any pending request immediately (prevent stale results)
10|60cc0a|/// 3. Debounce: Wait 300ms after user stops typing
11|d7895c|/// 4. Throttle: Max 1 request per 2 seconds (drop events if under throttle window)
12|170e3f|/// 5. Filter: Remove duplicates and empty contexts
13|b648e9|/// 6. Fetch: Execute API request with cancellation support
14|2798da|/// 7. Update: Publish result to currentSuggestion
15|69d728|@MainActor
16|b4b6d6|final class InlineSuggestionManager: ObservableObject {
17|b4687f|    
18|36e733|    // MARK: - Published Properties
19|b4687f|    
20|2d54c7|    /// The current inline suggestion text to display, if any.
21|508f65|    @Published var currentSuggestion: String?
22|b4687f|    
23|e9359c|    /// The current cursor position in the document.
24|059686|    @Published var cursorPosition: CursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: 0, column: 0)
25|b4687f|    
26|8bc45f|    /// Whether a suggestion request is currently in progress.
27|e588e6|    @Published var isLoading: Bool = false
28|b4687f|    
29|5accbc|    /// The last error that occurred during suggestion fetching.
30|020420|    @Published var lastError: Error?
31|b4687f|    
32|f5c08e|    // MARK: - Configuration
33|b4687f|    
34|d29118|    /// Debounce interval after user stops typing (300ms).
35|8aea18|    /// This prevents firing requests while user is actively typing.
36|d21a74|    private let debounceInterval: TimeInterval = 0.3
37|b4687f|    
38|857e9e|    /// Throttle interval for maximum request rate (2 seconds).
39|e5cbc1|    /// This ensures max 1 request per 2 seconds, preventing API abuse.
40|f1edb6|    private let throttleInterval: TimeInterval = 2.0
41|b4687f|    
42|7d6c39|    // MARK: - Combine Pipeline
43|b4687f|    
44|840b2a|    /// Subject for user typing events.
45|5f700b|    /// Uses unlimited buffer to ensure no events are dropped.
46|feca53|    private let typingSubject = PassthroughSubject<TextChangeEvent, Never>()
47|b4687f|    
48|9e0911|    /// The Combine pipeline subscription.
49|7a6440|    private var pipelineCancellable: AnyCancellable?
50|b4687f|    
51|e685a4|    /// Set to store all subscriptions.
52|c209d8|    private var cancellables = Set<AnyCancellable>()
53|b4687f|    
54|2b582a|    /// Current async task handle for fetching suggestions.
55|dcdd34|    /// Used to cancel in-flight requests.
56|3e50fc|    private var fetchTask: Task<String?, Never>?
57|b4687f|    
58|d882ba|    // MARK: - Partial Accept State
59|b4687f|    
60|521649|    /// Tracks the current position within a partially accepted suggestion.
61|edb2e7|    /// This is the offset into `currentSuggestion` that has already been accepted.
62|66558c|    @Published var partialAcceptPosition: Int = 0
63|b4687f|    
64|252bbe|    /// The text that has been partially accepted so far.
65|23c0b7|    var acceptedText: String {
66|34727b|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion,
67|99f0e4|              partialAcceptPosition > 0,
68|6f186d|              partialAcceptPosition <= suggestion.count else {
69|273b25|            return ""
70|5f3077|        }
71|c58169|        let endIndex = suggestion.index(suggestion.startIndex, offsetBy: partialAcceptPosition)
72|a6d7a3|        return String(suggestion[..<endIndex])
73|27e597|    }
74|b4687f|    
75|623cce|    /// The remaining unaccepted portion of the suggestion.
76|36f580|    var remainingSuggestionText: String {
77|34727b|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion,
78|c20245|              partialAcceptPosition < suggestion.count else {
79|273b25|            return ""
80|5f3077|        }
81|1c274a|        let startIndex = suggestion.index(suggestion.startIndex, offsetBy: partialAcceptPosition)
82|ccf36e|        return String(suggestion[startIndex...])
83|27e597|    }
84|b4687f|    
85|c21cd1|    // MARK: - Types
86|b4687f|    
87|17e491|    /// Represents a cursor position in the editor.
88|917bb6|    struct CursorPosition: Equatable, Hashable {
89|c0eddc|        let line: Int
90|1b9532|        let column: Int
91|d6ed84|

93|81130d|            return line >= 0 && column >= 0
94|5f3077|        }
95|27e597|    }
96|b4687f|

99|b93cbb|        let content: String
100|f8e1d1|        let position: CursorPosition
101|5c32fb|        let timestamp: Date
102|d6ed84|        
103|0ac630|        static func == (lhs: TextChangeEvent, rhs: TextChangeEvent) -> Bool {
104|d5e1e4|            lhs.content == rhs.content &&
105|9312b1|            lhs.position == rhs.position
106|5f3077|        }
107|27e597|    }
108|b4687f|    
109|ff7267|    /// Extracted context for suggestion requests.
110|dfae94|    struct SuggestionContext: Equatable {
111|32465c|        let currentLine: String
112|e144be|        let precedingCode: String

117|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
118|b4687f|    
119|359b1b|    init() {
120|272263|        setupSuggestionPipeline()

122|b4687f|    
123|e57f77|    deinit {
124|64e2e1|        pipelineCancellable?.cancel()
125|f12123|        fetchTask?.cancel()
126|358450|        cancellables.forEach { $0.cancel() }
127|27e597|    }
128|b4687f|    
129|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
130|b4687f|    
131|7f6935|    /// Requests a suggestion for the given content at the current cursor position.
132|7cfeb1|    /// 
133|287474|    /// This method:
134|78e1e3|    /// 1. Immediately cancels any pending request (keystroke takes priority)
135|f889c3|    /// 2. Updates the cursor position
136|b5e254|    /// 3. Sends event through the Combine pipeline (debounce + throttle)
137|2cbc84|    ///
138|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
139|bd00e9|    ///   - content: The full text content of the document.
140|0fcb11|    ///   - position: The current cursor position.
141|54e85a|    func requestSuggestion(for content: String, at position: CursorPosition) {
142|401d59|        // CRITICAL: Cancel any in-flight request immediately on new keystroke
143|1d1cad|        // This prevents stale suggestions from appearing when user types quickly
144|4457ec|        cancelPendingRequest()
145|d6ed84|        
146|5adefc|        // Update cursor position
147|c3ed42|        self.cursorPosition = position
148|d6ed84|        
149|7daa90|        // Create text change event
150|ad3099|        let event = TextChangeEvent(
151|e6ca21|            content: content,
152|f4cdd2|            position: position,
153|2319c3|            timestamp: Date()
154|3143a4|        )
155|d6ed84|        
156|8fce95|        // Send through Combine pipeline (debounce + throttle will be applied)
157|58ab86|        typingSubject.send(event)
158|27e597|    }
159|b4687f|    
160|73bb6e|    /// Cancels any pending suggestion request and clears loading state.
161|3454b1|    func cancelPendingRequest() {
162|f12123|        fetchTask?.cancel()
163|cfb6df|        fetchTask = nil
164|295f36|        isLoading = false
165|27e597|    }
166|b4687f|    
167|40da37|    /// Clears the current suggestion.
168|ca0623|    func clearSuggestion() {
169|dc082b|        currentSuggestion = nil
170|6683cd|        partialAcceptPosition = 0
171|f0416e|        lastError = nil
172|27e597|    }
173|b4687f|    
174|a87e8a|    /// Accepts the next word of the current inline suggestion.
175|27e25b|    /// - Returns: The text that was accepted in this call, or nil if no suggestion is active
176|144775|    @discardableResult
177|d82f01|    func partialAccept() -> String? {
178|cc51cf|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion else {
179|1c8557|            return nil
180|5f3077|        }
181|d6ed84|        
182|35c2c0|        // Check if we've already fully accepted the suggestion
183|11df65|        guard partialAcceptPosition < suggestion.count else {
184|8a7c5e|            clearSuggestion()
185|1c8557|            return nil
186|5f3077|        }
187|d6ed84|        
188|85ec0e|        // Find the next word boundary from current position
189|4fcb47|        let remainingText = remainingSuggestionText
190|f918e6|        let charsToAccept = findNextWordEnd(in: remainingText)
191|d6ed84|        
192|b04df9|        // Get the text to accept
193|1c274a|        let startIndex = suggestion.index(suggestion.startIndex, offsetBy: partialAcceptPosition)
194|df48c9|        let endIndex = suggestion.index(startIndex, offsetBy: charsToAccept)
195|c90a59|        let textToAccept = String(suggestion[startIndex..<endIndex])
196|d6ed84|        
197|ff36dc|        // Update the partial accept position
198|ab09a0|        partialAcceptPosition += charsToAccept
199|d6ed84|        
200|a847b3|        return textToAccept
201|27e597|    }
202|b4687f|    
203|5ed567|    /// Resets the partial accept state to start from the beginning.
204|cdb2fa|    func resetPartialAcceptState() {
205|6683cd|        partialAcceptPosition = 0
206|27e597|    }
207|b4687f|    
208|bc645c|    /// Checks if the suggestion has been fully accepted.
209|65f031|    var isSuggestionFullyAccepted: Bool {
210|d2249d|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion else { return false }
211|8ad5d9|        return partialAcceptPosition >= suggestion.count
212|27e597|    }
213|b4687f|    
214|afabb4|    /// Returns the ghost text to display (remaining unaccepted portion).
215|ab34aa|    var ghostText: String {
216|7b2152|        return remainingSuggestionText
217|27e597|    }
218|b4687f|    
219|3e5efc|    /// Updates the cursor position without triggering a suggestion request.
220|6beca1|    func updateCursorPosition(_ position: CursorPosition) {
221|c3ed42|        self.cursorPosition = position
222|27e597|    }
223|b4687f|    
224|049941|    // MARK: - Private Methods
225|b4687f|    
226|886d26|    /// Sets up the Combine pipeline with debounce and throttle operators.
227|7cfeb1|    /// 
228|2302ea|    /// Pipeline flow:
229|fcd00b|    /// 1. typingSubject receives events
230|a7ce76|    /// 2. debounce(0.3s): Wait 300ms after user stops typing
231|a5971a|    /// 3. throttle(2.0s): Max 1 event per 2 seconds (latest=true for responsive updates)
232|c17292|    /// 4. removeDuplicates: Filter identical events
233|627455|    /// 5. filter: Remove empty/unworthy contexts
234|6f85e6|    /// 6. flatMap: Execute async fetch with cancellation support
235|2181d5|    private func setupSuggestionPipeline() {
236|ca13c2|        pipelineCancellable = typingSubject
237|0245e4|            // STEP 1: DEBOUNCE (300ms)
238|70cff9|            // Wait 300ms after user stops typing before processing
239|d9fce5|            // This prevents firing requests while user is actively typing
240|84dd17|            .debounce(for: .seconds(debounceInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main)
241|3070d1|            
242|89fc5a|            // STEP 2: THROTTLE (2 seconds)
243|dbb01b|            // Maximum 1 request per 2 seconds
244|bce2c6|            // latest=true ensures we get the most recent event if multiple occur within throttle window
245|ecc467|            .throttle(for: .seconds(throttleInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main, latest: true)
246|3070d1|            
247|844254|            // STEP 3: REMOVE DUPLICATES
248|413909|            // Filter out events with identical content and position
249|0a99da|            // This prevents duplicate API calls for the same context
250|cf49b3|            .removeDuplicates()
251|3070d1|            
252|202ed6|            // STEP 4: FILTER WORTHY CONTEXTS
253|a23af6|            // Only proceed if we have meaningful content to get suggestions for
254|845b1e|            .filter { [weak self] event in
255|06905f|                guard let self = self else { return false }
256|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
257|cc659b|                return self.shouldRequestSuggestion(context: context)
258|a7dc16|            }
259|3070d1|            
260|339920|            // STEP 5: FLATMAP TO ASYNC FETCH
261|2bc815|            // Transform each event into a publisher that fetches suggestions
262|dbc22b|            // This creates a new async context that can be cancelled
263|11fcbf|            .flatMap { [weak self] event -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> in
264|ec615d|                guard let self = self else {
265|6156c3|                    return Just(nil).eraseToAnyPublisher()
266|4e2d32|                }
267|216278|                
268|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
269|6830af|                return self.createFetchPublisher(for: context)
270|a7dc16|            }
271|4de6c5|            // Ensure we receive on main thread for UI updates
272|a8597a|            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
273|1051e2|            .sink { [weak self] suggestion in
274|518c9e|                self?.currentSuggestion = suggestion
275|02c979|                self?.isLoading = false
276|a7dc16|            }
277|27e597|    }
278|b4687f|    
279|984754|    /// Creates a Combine publisher that performs the async suggestion fetch.
280|f2b66e|    /// This allows the fetch to be cancelled when new events arrive.
281|4c0331|    private func createFetchPublisher(for context: SuggestionContext) -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> {
282|c401a0|        // Cancel any existing fetch task
283|f12123|        fetchTask?.cancel()
284|d6ed84|        
285|1c5d21|        // Create new async task for fetching
286|6b1f07|        let task = Task { [weak self] () -> String? in
287|8c11f0|            guard let self = self else { return nil }
288|3070d1|            
289|a6a73d|            await MainActor.run {
290|7494b5|                self.isLoading = true
291|db594a|                self.lastError = nil
292|a7dc16|            }
293|3070d1|            
294|71cc09|            do {
295|88792d|                // Perform the actual fetch
296|5f8cb1|                let suggestion = try await self.fetchSuggestion(for: context)
297|216278|                
298|056141|                // Check if cancelled before updating UI
299|ac578d|                try Task.checkCancellation()
300|d0b7e3|                return suggestion
301|57e5c6|            } catch is CancellationError {
302|9f1433|                // Task was cancelled - return nil silently
303|15034a|                return nil
304|91b9a2|            } catch {
305|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
306|98968a|                    self.lastError = error
307|4e2d32|                }
308|15034a|                return nil
309|a7dc16|            }
310|5f3077|        }
311|d6ed84|        
312|5854c9|        fetchTask = task
313|d6ed84|        
314|544041|        // Convert the async task to a publisher
315|5c40d7|        return Future<String?, Never> { promise in
316|47ed67|            Task {
317|458ee4|                let result = await task.value
318|67db9f|                promise(.success(result))
319|a7dc16|            }
320|5f3077|        }
321|3dc442|        .eraseToAnyPublisher()
322|27e597|    }
323|b4687f|

332|47167e|        // Placeholder: Return nil or mock suggestion based on context
333|7f89a9|        // This should be replaced with actual LLM or completion service integration
334|c2ae65|        return nil

340|69a1e9|        // Simulate network delay - replace with actual API call
341|7caa27|        try await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 100_000_000) // 0.1 seconds
342|d6ed84|        
343|c28476|        // Check for cancellation
344|495744|        try Task.checkCancellation()
345|d6ed84|        
346|47167e|        // Placeholder: Return nil or mock suggestion based on context
347|7f89a9|        // This should be replaced with actual LLM or completion service integration
348|c2ae65|        return nil

350|b4687f|    
351|ec5f51|    /// Extracts context information from the content at the given position.
352|9fc150|    private func extractContext(from content: String, at position: CursorPosition) -> SuggestionContext {
353|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
354|d6ed84|        
355|781fff|        // Get current line
356|f4fd53|        let currentLineIndex = min(position.line, max(0, lines.count - 1))
357|35c41a|        let currentLine = lines.indices.contains(currentLineIndex) ? lines[currentLineIndex] : ""
358|d6ed84|        
359|2e5ac5|        // Get preceding code (all lines before current)
360|93d93c|        let precedingLines = lines.prefix(currentLineIndex)
361|ba8451|        let precedingCode = precedingLines.joined(separator: "\n")
362|d6ed84|        
363|d09899|        // Detect language from file extension or content (placeholder)
364|d3169b|        let language = detectLanguage(from: content)
365|d6ed84|        
366|a185cb|        return SuggestionContext(
367|d52293|            currentLine: currentLine,
368|5ee51b|            precedingCode: precedingCode,
369|567a23|            cursorPosition: position,
370|82f146|            language: language
371|3143a4|        )
372|27e597|    }
373|b4687f|    
374|b850a0|    /// Detects the programming language from content.
375|4ca7ae|    /// This is a simple placeholder implementation.
376|bd0232|    private func detectLanguage(from content: String) -> String? {
377|a8e760|        // Basic heuristics for language detection
378|6adfea|        // In a real implementation, this would use file extension or more sophisticated detection
379|d6ed84|        
380|0f82fd|        if content.contains("import Swift") || content.contains("func ") && content.contains("->") {
381|99935c|            return "swift"
382|6fd626|        } else if content.contains("function") || content.contains("const ") || content.contains("let ") {
383|fbfb5d|            return "javascript"
384|ba13c3|        } else if content.contains("def ") || content.contains("import ") && content.contains("print(") {
385|aa2434|            return "python"
386|5f3077|        }
387|d6ed84|        
388|c2ae65|        return nil
389|27e597|    }
390|b4687f|    
391|36b8b2|    /// Determines if a suggestion should be requested based on context.
392|09fa9b|    /// This can be used to avoid requesting suggestions in inappropriate contexts.
393|df8f21|    private func shouldRequestSuggestion(context: SuggestionContext) -> Bool {
394|7b378b|        // Don't suggest on empty lines unless there's preceding context
395|8778db|        if context.currentLine.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).isEmpty {
396|84cc0e|            return !context.precedingCode.isEmpty
397|5f3077|        }
398|d6ed84|        
399|e8fcd4|        // Minimum content length to trigger suggestions
400|040d23|        let minContextLength = 10
401|3e1d44|        let totalContextLength = context.precedingCode.count + context.currentLine.count
402|d6ed84|        
403|390255|        return totalContextLength >= minContextLength
404|27e597|    }
405|b4687f|    
406|691d16|    // MARK: - Word Boundary Helpers for Partial Accept
407|b4687f|    
408|a4030c|    /// Finds the end position of the next word in the given text.
409|11fe08|    /// A word is defined as a sequence of characters up to and including:
410|bb7830|    /// - The next whitespace character (space, tab, newline)
411|0c3e7d|    /// - The end of the punctuation after a word
412|72b3cd|    /// - The next punctuation boundary
413|7924b5|    private func findNextWordEnd(in text: String) -> Int {
414|97b6e3|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 0 }
415|d6ed84|        
416|e21158|        let characters = Array(text)
417|ef04de|        var position = 0
418|d6ed84|        
419|12514b|        // Skip leading whitespace (accept it as part of the word if present)
420|3aa0c3|        var leadingWhitespaceCount = 0
421|d475df|        while position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
422|f0583e|            position += 1
423|7de75f|            leadingWhitespaceCount += 1
424|5f3077|        }
425|d6ed84|        
426|a4acf3|        // If we only had whitespace, return that
427|71ca00|        if position >= characters.count {
428|b99609|            return position
429|5f3077|        }
430|d6ed84|        
431|c2a7bd|        // Get the current character type
432|39bbe7|        let firstChar = characters[position]
433|d6ed84|        
434|8f8367|        if firstChar.isLetter || firstChar.isNumber {
435|b722f9|            // Word character: consume all word characters
436|02eced|            while position < characters.count && (characters[position].isLetter || characters[position].isNumber) {
437|de2813|                position += 1
438|a7dc16|            }
439|3070d1|            
440|d4a201|            // Also consume any trailing punctuation attached to the word (like "word.")
441|4f05d1|            while position < characters.count && isWordPunctuation(characters[position]) {
442|de2813|                position += 1
443|a7dc16|            }
444|3070d1|            
445|0c75aa|            // Include trailing whitespace after the word (just one space)
446|5b0346|            if position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
447|de2813|                position += 1
448|a7dc16|            }
449|7a1786|        } else if isPunctuation(firstChar) {
450|1a436e|            // Punctuation: consume all consecutive punctuation
451|d5ff38|            while position < characters.count && isPunctuation(characters[position]) {
452|de2813|                position += 1
453|a7dc16|            }
454|3070d1|            
455|c673d1|            // Include trailing whitespace (just one space)
456|5b0346|            if position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
457|de2813|                position += 1
458|a7dc16|            }
459|5c9934|        } else if firstChar.isWhitespace {
460|9874c8|            // Multiple whitespace: accept all consecutive whitespace
461|b51034|            while position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
462|de2813|                position += 1
463|a7dc16|            }
464|b31999|        } else {
465|1cc2f4|            // Other characters: just consume one character
466|f0583e|            position += 1
467|5f3077|        }
468|d6ed84|        
469|9a857a|        // Ensure we always accept at least one non-whitespace character
470|792181|        // or all leading whitespace if that's all there is
471|01985b|        return max(position, leadingWhitespaceCount > 0 ? leadingWhitespaceCount : 1)
472|27e597|    }
473|b4687f|    
474|fdb5d7|    /// Checks if a character is punctuation that can be part of a word (like period, comma, etc.)
475|afa9e9|    private func isWordPunctuation(_ char: Character) -> Bool {
476|f80730|        let wordPunctuation = CharacterSet(charactersIn: ".,;:!?-_'")
477|732148|        guard let scalar = char.unicodeScalars.first else { return false }
478|725015|        return wordPunctuation.contains(scalar)
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|6c65dc|    /// Checks if a character is general punctuation or symbol
482|3dbf46|    private func isPunctuation(_ char: Character) -> Bool {
483|00b935|        return char.isPunctuation || char.isSymbol
484|27e597|    }
485|b31277|}
486|adc83b|
487|9f0d64|// MARK: - Error Types
488|adc83b|
489|19dffe|enum InlineSuggestionError: Error {

498|204354|/// Extension to provide keyboard shortcut bindings for partial accept functionality.

501|b4687f|    
502|06ecd9|    /// Registers keyboard commands for inline suggestions partial accept.
503|6a3cce|    /// Call this from your editor view controller to enable Ctrl+Right and Option+Right shortcuts.
504|05bcd9|    static func registerInlineSuggestionKeyCommands() -> [UIKeyCommand] {
505|d0ba57|        // Ctrl+Right Arrow for partial accept
506|4e4369|        let ctrlRightCommand = UIKeyCommand(
507|810d7f|            input: UIKeyCommand.inputRightArrow,
508|d08628|            modifierFlags: .control,
509|0e3f78|            action: #selector(performPartialAccept(_:))
510|3143a4|        )
511|b4eef5|        ctrlRightCommand.wantsPriorityOverSystemBehavior = true
512|d6ed84|        
513|6c4e41|        // Option+Right Arrow for partial accept (alternative binding)
514|c44b96|        let optRightCommand = UIKeyCommand(
515|810d7f|            input: UIKeyCommand.inputRightArrow,
516|722957|            modifierFlags: .alternate,
517|0e3f78|            action: #selector(performPartialAccept(_:))
518|3143a4|        )
519|67b4a4|        optRightCommand.wantsPriorityOverSystemBehavior = true
520|d6ed84|        
521|44f52a|        return [ctrlRightCommand, optRightCommand]
522|27e597|    }
523|b4687f|    
524|a9a88b|    @objc private func performPartialAccept(_ sender: UIKeyCommand) {
525|a96529|        // Access the shared manager and perform partial accept
526|5e69c5|        // This requires the editor to insert the accepted text at cursor position
527|63edcc|        NotificationCenter.default.post(
528|ca72b7|            name: .inlineSuggestionPartialAccept,
529|b4da80|            object: nil
530|3143a4|        )
531|27e597|    }
532|b31277|}
533|adc83b|
534|bee8bf|// MARK: - Notification Names
535|adc83b|
536|c090b9|extension Notification.Name {

24|20c960|            switch self {

30|d6ed84|

40|684645|            for type in BracketType.allCases {
41|ae5609|                if char == type.open { return (type, true) }
42|fc9913|                if char == type.close { return (type, false) }

50|6d9f0a|    /// Finds the matching bracket for the bracket at or near the given cursor position.
51|46e14e|    /// Returns nil if no bracket is found at the cursor position.
52|a86427|    func findMatchingBracket(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> BracketPair? {
53|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
54|d6ed84|        
55|9df2e8|        let chars = Array(text)
56|7169cc|        let count = chars.count
57|d6ed84|        
58|eb0050|        // Clamp cursor position
59|112372|        let pos = max(0, min(cursorPosition, count))
60|d6ed84|        
61|404d74|        // Check character at cursor and before cursor
62|58bc54|        let positionsToCheck = [pos, pos - 1].filter { $0 >= 0 && $0 < count }
63|d6ed84|        
64|fd29be|        for checkPos in positionsToCheck {
65|a27369|            let char = chars[checkPos]
66|3070d1|            
67|e89ec3|            if let (bracketType, isOpen) = BracketType.from(char: char) {
68|3a7bbf|                if isOpen {
69|265e1e|                    // Search forward for closing bracket
70|817469|                    if let closeIndex = findClosingBracket(in: chars, from: checkPos, type: bracketType) {
71|0deeaf|                        return BracketPair(openIndex: checkPos, closeIndex: closeIndex, type: bracketType)
72|c9717a|                    }
73|fdd0e2|                } else {
74|e9cd75|                    // Search backward for opening bracket
75|b6a492|                    if let openIndex = findOpeningBracket(in: chars, from: checkPos, type: bracketType) {
76|7b17bb|                        return BracketPair(openIndex: openIndex, closeIndex: checkPos, type: bracketType)
77|c9717a|                    }
78|4e2d32|                }
79|a7dc16|            }
80|5f3077|        }
81|d6ed84|        
82|c2ae65|        return nil
83|27e597|    }

87|ff38bb|    func findAllBracketPairs(in text: String) -> [BracketPair] {

89|3e3195|        var stacks: [BracketType: [Int]] = [:]
90|d6ed84|        
91|f022b0|        for type in BracketType.allCases {
92|54a3ff|            stacks[type] = []
93|5f3077|        }
94|d6ed84|        
95|9df2e8|        let chars = Array(text)
96|e79b86|        var inString = false
97|11024e|        var stringChar: Character = "\""
98|e550d2|        var escapeNext = false
99|d6ed84|        
100|f0ad7e|        for (index, char) in chars.enumerated() {
101|11cf75|            // Handle escape sequences
102|5c254a|            if escapeNext {
103|b7c801|                escapeNext = false
104|1df510|                continue
105|a7dc16|            }
106|3070d1|            
107|b316c9|            if char == "\\" {
108|78ee7a|                escapeNext = true
109|1df510|                continue
110|a7dc16|            }
111|3070d1|            
112|209ff5|            // Handle string literals
113|631cb5|            if char == "\"" || char == "'" {
114|9f8dba|                if !inString {
115|cce9f8|                    inString = true
116|fd9c87|                    stringChar = char
117|d26b9a|                } else if char == stringChar {
118|dffb64|                    inString = false
119|4e2d32|                }
120|1df510|                continue
121|a7dc16|            }
122|3070d1|            
123|801179|            // Skip brackets inside strings
124|28e059|            if inString { continue }
125|3070d1|            
126|ae2237|            // Check for brackets
127|e89ec3|            if let (bracketType, isOpen) = BracketType.from(char: char) {
128|3a7bbf|                if isOpen {
129|059a6a|                    stacks[bracketType]?.append(index)
130|fdd0e2|                } else {
131|a4ab35|                    if let openIndex = stacks[bracketType]?.popLast() {
132|25a92d|                        pairs.append(BracketPair(openIndex: openIndex, closeIndex: index, type: bracketType))
133|c9717a|                    }
134|4e2d32|                }
135|a7dc16|            }
136|5f3077|        }
137|d6ed84|        
138|4ca1cd|        return pairs.sorted { $0.openIndex < $1.openIndex }
139|27e597|    }

142|a4a973|    func nestingDepth(at position: Int, in text: String, type: BracketType? = nil) -> Int {
143|9df2e8|        let chars = Array(text)

187|29e83a|        var depth = 1

190|e550d2|        var escapeNext = false
191|d6ed84|        
192|a7f4a5|        for i in (startIndex + 1)..<chars.count {
193|8672ad|            let char = chars[i]
194|3070d1|            
195|5c254a|            if escapeNext {
196|b7c801|                escapeNext = false
197|1df510|                continue
198|a7dc16|            }
199|3070d1|

215|28e059|            if inString { continue }

230|d81681|    private func findOpeningBracket(in chars: [Character], from startIndex: Int, type: BracketType) -> Int? {
231|29e83a|        var depth = 1
232|e79b86|        var inString = false
233|11024e|        var stringChar: Character = "\""
234|d6ed84|        
235|f6da67|        // For backward search, we need a simpler approach since escape sequences are tricky
236|fe2046|        // We'll do a basic scan that handles most common cases
237|267cd6|        for i in stride(from: startIndex - 1, through: 0, by: -1) {
238|8672ad|            let char = chars[i]
239|3070d1|

241|631cb5|            if char == "\"" || char == "'" {
242|9df61c|                // Check if escaped

244|f41bef|                    continue
245|4e2d32|                }
246|399b31|                inString = !inString

248|1df510|                continue

251|28e059|            if inString { continue }
252|3070d1|            
253|b67e2d|            if char == type.close {
254|4994cd|                depth += 1

259|4e2d32|                }
260|a7dc16|            }
261|5f3077|        }
262|d6ed84|

4|adc83b|
5|6486b8|// MARK: - CodeExecutionService
6|adc83b|
7|260b9d|/// Service that handles code execution requests from the Run menu.
8|f40e11|/// Routes execution to appropriate runners based on file type and outputs results to the Output panel.
9|69d728|@MainActor
10|a43a38|final class CodeExecutionService {
11|6dc112|    static let shared = CodeExecutionService()
12|b4687f|    
13|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
14|b4687f|    
15|37bd08|    private var jsRunner: JSRunner?
16|33c15c|    private let outputManager = OutputPanelManager.shared
17|b4687f|    
18|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
19|b4687f|    
20|54113e|    private init() {}
21|b4687f|    
22|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
23|b4687f|    
24|d148d5|    /// Execute the currently active file
25|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
26|4cfe18|    ///   - fileName: Name of the file to execute
27|13e212|    ///   - content: Content/code of the file
28|97d12a|    func executeCurrentFile(fileName: String, content: String) {
29|cc9311|        let fileExtension = (fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
30|d6ed84|        
31|2eea91|        switch fileExtension {
32|ff039a|        case "js", "mjs":
33|760a4e|            executeJavaScript(fileName: fileName, code: content)
34|048ca0|        case "ts", "tsx":
35|b896b9|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] TypeScript execution requires transpilation. Coming soon!", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
36|de8aa1|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
37|e1d221|        case "py":
38|9e2a3c|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] Python execution not yet available on-device.", to: OutputChannel.python, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
39|25499b|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.python
40|520b7d|        default:
41|cc7290|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] No runner available for .\(fileExtension) files", to: OutputChannel.output, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
42|c75b79|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.output
43|5f3077|        }
44|27e597|    }
45|b4687f|    
46|9b6f68|    // MARK: - JavaScript Execution
47|b4687f|    
48|d76b7d|    private func executeJavaScript(fileName: String, code: String) {
49|0dec37|        // Switch to JavaScript output channel
50|e39e9c|        outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
51|d6ed84|        
52|a728d5|        // Clear previous output and show execution header
53|1511a8|        outputManager.clear(OutputChannel.javascript)
54|6cfb10|        outputManager.append("▶ Running: \(fileName)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
55|89174a|        outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
56|d6ed84|        
57|a3f62b|        // Create a fresh JSRunner instance
58|462f68|        jsRunner = JSRunner()
59|d6ed84|        
60|e61664|        // Set up console handler to capture output
61|305ad3|        jsRunner?.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
62|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
63|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
64|216278|                
65|b169c6|                // Determine stream type based on message prefix
66|27b18b|                let streamType: StreamType = message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") || message.hasPrefix("[EXCEPTION]") ? StreamType.stderr : StreamType.stdout
67|216278|                
68|4b39b7|                // Remove the prefix for cleaner output display
69|62636a|                var cleanMessage = message
70|121995|                for prefix in ["[LOG] ", "[INFO] ", "[WARN] ", "[ERROR] ", "[EXCEPTION] "] {
71|1df682|                    if message.hasPrefix(prefix) {
72|11af1f|                        cleanMessage = String(message.dropFirst(prefix.count))
73|28a64b|                        break
74|c9717a|                    }
75|4e2d32|                }
76|216278|                
77|6a3616|                self.outputManager.append(cleanMessage, to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: streamType)
78|a7dc16|            }
79|5f3077|        }
80|d6ed84|        
81|5a9195|        // Execute the code asynchronously
82|0f1953|        Task {
83|073be0|            let startTime = Date()
84|3070d1|            
85|71cc09|            do {
86|f3a1fd|                let result = try await jsRunner?.execute(code: code)
87|1ee120|                let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
88|216278|                
89|73b1fb|                // Show result if it's not undefined
90|f23508|                if let result = result, !result.isUndefined {
91|8a7075|                    let resultString = formatJSValue(result)
92|174733|                    outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
93|1c40a4|                    outputManager.append("⮐ Result: \(resultString)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
94|4e2d32|                }
95|216278|                
96|b2c6e7|                // Show completion message
97|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
98|2c8c65|                outputManager.append("✓ Completed in \(String(format: "%.2f", duration * 1000))ms", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
99|216278|                
100|77a0dc|            } catch let error as JSRunnerError {
101|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
102|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
103|216278|                
104|91b9a2|            } catch {
105|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
106|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
107|a7dc16|            }
108|3070d1|            
109|eb797f|            // Clean up runner
110|e9e019|            jsRunner = nil
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }

116|7aa5bd|    /// Format a JSValue for display
117|e68bfd|    private func formatJSValue(_ value: JSValue) -> String {
118|c903ed|        if value.isNull {
119|c04d4d|            return "null"
120|35d02e|        } else if value.isUndefined {
121|b32932|            return "undefined"
122|edfa6b|        } else if value.isBoolean {
123|1a76ee|            return value.toBool() ? "true" : "false"
124|4e414f|        } else if value.isNumber {
125|9abc83|            let num = value.toNumber()
126|d3fc6f|            // Check if it's an integer
127|a09f20|            if let n = num, n.doubleValue == Double(n.intValue) {
128|ee9ad8|                return "\(n.intValue)"
129|a7dc16|            }
130|64a140|            return "\(num?.doubleValue ?? 0)"
131|419991|        } else if value.isString {
132|7c8a45|            return "\"\(value.toString() ?? "")\""
133|a72377|        } else if value.isArray {
134|d7f252|            if let array = value.toArray() {
135|c35363|                return "[\(array.map { "\($0)" }.joined(separator: ", "))]"
136|a7dc16|            }
137|976c47|            return "[]"
138|bb3c98|        } else if value.isObject {
139|b4fae0|            if let dict = value.toDictionary() {
140|ee1ab7|                let json = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
141|a9b0f4|                if let json = json, let str = String(data: json, encoding: .utf8) {

2|adc83b|
3|6505f2|/// A lightweight inlay-hints engine used to show inline type annotations.
4|63c993|///
5|18e543|/// Scope (FEAT-133):
6|1f06c1|/// - Detect simple Swift variable declarations without explicit types.
7|6b0114|/// - Infer basic types from the initializer expression.
8|b1b02e|/// - Return hint objects with line/column + a display string (e.g. ": Int").
9|4f8cca|final class InlayHintsManager {
10|5960e0|    static let shared = InlayHintsManager()
11|54113e|    private init() {}
12|adc83b|
13|d9f5b5|    // MARK: - Models
14|adc83b|
15|14e2da|    struct InlayHint: Identifiable, Equatable {
16|d16339|        let id = UUID()
17|adc83b|
18|7a2975|        /// 0-based line index.
19|c0eddc|        let line: Int
20|adc83b|
21|efa22a|        /// 0-based UTF16 column index within the line.
22|1b9532|        let column: Int
23|adc83b|
24|c52f44|        /// Render-ready hint text (e.g. ": Int").
25|aa57fc|        let text: String
26|27e597|    }
27|adc83b|
28|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
29|adc83b|
30|2ce197|    func hints(for code: String, language: CodeLanguage) -> [InlayHint] {
31|b95802|        guard language == .swift else { return [] }
32|bb2b0b|        return swiftTypeHints(for: code)
33|27e597|    }
34|adc83b|
35|52c601|    // MARK: - Swift parsing
36|adc83b|
37|16c9d6|    private func swiftTypeHints(for code: String) -> [InlayHint] {
38|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
39|46c824|        var result: [InlayHint] = []
40|adc83b|
41|225f78|        // Matches:
42|e2c046|        //   let x = 5
43|2cac4f|        //   var name = "abc"
44|21217b|        // Avoids explicit type annotations because the pattern does not accept `:` before `=`.
45|49e410|        let pattern = "^\\s*(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.+)$"
46|72432c|        let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [])
47|adc83b|
48|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
49|cbe876|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
50|9b2e7c|            guard !trimmed.hasPrefix("//"), !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
51|adc83b|
52|18a8aa|            let nsLine = line as NSString
53|89c109|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsLine.length)
54|c471d9|            guard let match = regex?.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: range) else { continue }
55|ad3867|            guard match.numberOfRanges >= 3 else { continue }
56|adc83b|
57|423174|            let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
58|3c5579|            let rhsRange = match.range(at: 2)
59|7a7150|            if nameRange.location == NSNotFound || rhsRange.location == NSNotFound { continue }
60|adc83b|
61|165da4|            // Basic sanity checks: ignore tuple bindings like `let (a, b) = ...`
62|679645|            let name = nsLine.substring(with: nameRange)
63|5c9927|            guard !name.isEmpty else { continue }
64|adc83b|
65|666b05|            // RHS, stripped of trailing `//` comments (naive but practical).
66|53413c|            var rhs = nsLine.substring(with: rhsRange)
67|8beea4|            if let commentRange = rhs.range(of: "//") {
68|a56309|                rhs = String(rhs[..<commentRange.lowerBound])
69|a7dc16|            }
70|107569|            rhs = rhs.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
71|adc83b|
72|8f6e07|            // Infer a type. If we can’t infer, don’t create a hint.
73|992808|            guard let inferred = inferSwiftType(from: rhs) else { continue }
74|adc83b|
75|ed8c63|            // Column for hint placement = end of identifier.
76|f4b52b|            let hintColumn = nameRange.location + nameRange.length
77|32af9e|            result.append(InlayHint(line: lineIndex, column: hintColumn, text: ": \(inferred)"))
78|5f3077|        }
79|adc83b|
80|67ed82|        return result
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|014518|    // MARK: - Swift type inference (basic)
84|adc83b|
85|e4ea7a|    private func inferSwiftType(from rawExpression: String) -> String? {
86|3784b4|        let expr = rawExpression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
87|a14679|        guard !expr.isEmpty else { return nil }
88|adc83b|
89|ea35f3|        // Bool
90|62989c|        if expr == "true" || expr == "false" { return "Bool" }
91|adc83b|
92|5f3b7c|        // String literal (simple)
93|553d7e|        if expr.hasPrefix("\"") { return "String" }
94|adc83b|
95|f70754|        // Numeric: Int
96|b5aa27|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+$") { return "Int" }
97|f87d78|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+$") { return "Int" }
98|212646|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0b[01]+$") { return "Int" }
99|d18d43|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0o[0-7]+$") { return "Int" }
100|adc83b|
101|e6218e|        // Numeric: Double (Swift defaults floating-point literals to Double)
102|53b861|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+\\.\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)?$") { return "Double" }
103|71e012|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)$") { return "Double" }
104|adc83b|
105|69d592|        // Array / Dictionary literals
106|20ec44|        if expr.hasPrefix("[") {
107|ce2ebb|            if let dictType = inferDictionaryType(from: expr) { return dictType }
108|f27fb4|            if let arrayType = inferArrayType(from: expr) { return arrayType }
109|5f3077|        }
110|adc83b|
111|c1c62e|        // Constructor-looking calls: `TypeName(...)` (biased toward UpperCamelCase types)
112|c8a287|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(") {
113|7cdb04|            return typeName
114|5f3077|        }
115|adc83b|
116|9ff15e|        // Enum/static member: `TypeName.member`
117|7c8b37|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\.[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") {
118|7cdb04|            return typeName
119|5f3077|        }
120|adc83b|
121|c2ae65|        return nil
122|27e597|    }
123|adc83b|
124|ebc532|    private func inferArrayType(from expr: String) -> String? {
125|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
126|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
127|adc83b|
128|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
129|4d16d8|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[Any]" }
130|adc83b|
131|bdbc65|        // Take the first top-level element (naive: split by comma).
132|51ddab|        let firstPart = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first
133|3197f4|        guard let first = firstPart.map(String.init)?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines), !first.isEmpty else {
134|88e905|            return "[Any]"
135|5f3077|        }
136|adc83b|
137|e844da|        if let elementType = inferSwiftType(from: first) {
138|655e59|            return "[\(elementType)]"
139|5f3077|        }
140|adc83b|
141|77d208|        return "[Any]"
142|27e597|    }
143|adc83b|
144|f7b9b1|    private func inferDictionaryType(from expr: String) -> String? {
145|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
146|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
147|adc83b|
148|85eff8|        // Fast check: dictionary literals must contain `:` somewhere.
149|8a247d|        guard trimmed.contains(":") else { return nil }
150|adc83b|
151|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|be74cb|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[AnyHashable: Any]" }
153|adc83b|
154|141281|        // Grab the first `key: value` pair (naive: up to first comma).
155|53580e|        let firstPair = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first.map(String.init) ?? ""
156|2ae14f|        guard let colonIndex = firstPair.firstIndex(of: ":") else { return nil }
157|adc83b|
158|90fe28|        let keyExpr = String(firstPair[..<colonIndex]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
159|c8c196|        let valueExpr = String(firstPair[firstPair.index(after: colonIndex)...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
160|adc83b|
161|28ea5b|        let keyType = inferSwiftType(from: keyExpr) ?? "AnyHashable"
162|eb3fdd|        let valueType = inferSwiftType(from: valueExpr) ?? "Any"
163|31573c|        return "[\(keyType): \(valueType)]"
164|27e597|    }
165|adc83b|
166|e21b8f|    // MARK: - Regex helpers
167|adc83b|
168|3efaff|    private func matches(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
169|695372|        (try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []))?.firstMatch(
170|7697e1|            in: text,
171|11ba8c|            options: [],
172|264c2c|            range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (text as NSString).length)
173|d36f78|        ) != nil
174|27e597|    }
175|adc83b|
176|133a2e|    private func firstRegexGroup(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> String? {
177|473ca5|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
178|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
179|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
180|090ffd|        guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: text, options: [], range: range), match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return nil }
181|5ad252|        let r = match.range(at: 1)
182|8bd644|        guard r.location != NSNotFound else { return nil }
183|2550a5|        return ns.substring(with: r)
184|27e597|    }
185|b31277|}
186|adc83b|

284|b4687f|    
285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"
290|5f3077|        }
291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }
312|b4687f|    
313|c62450|    private func detectRegionEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {

317|27e597|    }

327|766920|    private func findConsecutiveImports(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {

332|d549e2|                endIndex = i

334|74cfd8|                break

336|5f3077|        }
337|7678e6|        return endIndex

353|763883|    private func detectDeclaration(_ line: String) -> (type: FoldRegion.FoldType, label: String)? {
354|3ccee6|        func matchName(pattern: String) -> String? {
355|6cc0c4|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
356|f2f390|            guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
357|ebf922|                  match.numberOfRanges >= 2,
358|762e94|                  let r = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
359|f5f042|            else { return nil }
360|480e4a|            return String(line[r])
361|5f3077|        }
362|adc83b|
363|f67078|        // Allow leading attributes like "@MainActor", "@available(...)"
364|0c5ed8|        // Allow common modifiers in any order (best-effort).
365|ca2c54|        let prefix = #"^(?:\s*@\w+(?:\([^\)]*\))?\s+)*(?:\s*(?:public|private|internal|fileprivate|open|final|indirect|lazy|static|override|mutating|nonmutating)\s+)*"#
366|adc83b|
367|cf49c1|        // IMPORTANT: avoid treating "class func"/"class var" as a type declaration.
368|e1fc33|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"class\s+(?!func\b|var\b|let\b)([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
369|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
370|5f3077|        }
371|adc83b|
372|8d6e9b|        // Actor (Swift concurrency) – fold like a class/struct
373|8d98f9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"actor\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
374|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
375|5f3077|        }
376|adc83b|
377|c629a9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"struct\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
378|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
379|5f3077|        }
380|adc83b|
381|75283c|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"enum\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
382|0f57db|            return (.enumDeclaration, name)
383|5f3077|        }
384|adc83b|
385|bb35e5|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"protocol\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
386|982dbc|            return (.protocolDeclaration, name)
387|5f3077|        }
388|adc83b|
389|940527|        // Extensions can include dotted names (Foo.Bar)
390|b2a8c3|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"extension\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.]*)"#) {
391|fbf8d2|            return (.extension, name)
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|c2ae65|        return nil
395|27e597|    }
396|b4687f|    
397|a1a6f6|    private func detectFunction(_ line: String) -> String? {
398|d7dbc1|        // Function detection with visibility modifiers
399|2861c1|        let visibilityKeywords = ["public", "private", "internal", "fileprivate", "static", "class", "override", "final", "mutating", "convenience"]
400|d6ed84|        
401|981adf|        // Check for 'func' keyword
402|db4a2c|        if line.contains("func ") {
403|25ca5f|            // Extract function name
404|270a0d|            let funcPattern = "func\\s+(\\w+)"
405|b5e31c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: funcPattern),
406|d7fb50|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
407|9e61c1|               let nameRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
408|456ee3|                let functionName = String(line[nameRange])
409|185b9c|                // Check for parameters to create label
410|bbf605|                if let parenStart = line.firstIndex(of: "("), let parenEnd = line.firstIndex(of: ")") {
411|2d3254|                    let params = String(line[parenStart...parenEnd])
412|929aa2|                    return "\(functionName)\(params)"
413|4e2d32|                }
414|8aa06e|                return functionName
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|4d99b7|        // Init detection
419|a1d502|        if let initName = extractName(from: line, prefix: "init", visibility: visibilityKeywords) {
420|3d8f8b|            return "\(initName)"
421|5f3077|        }
422|d6ed84|        
423|2a2371|        // Deinit detection
424|70e552|        if line.contains("deinit") {
425|9db7b1|            return "deinit"
426|5f3077|        }
427|d6ed84|        
428|307e69|        // Computed property with get/set
429|f3cc39|        if line.hasPrefix("var ") && (line.contains("{") || line.contains("get")) {
430|950394|            if let varName = extractVariableName(from: line) {
431|99146d|                return varName
432|a7dc16|            }
433|5f3077|        }
434|d6ed84|        
435|c2ae65|        return nil
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|1ec945|    private func detectControlFlow(_ line: String) -> String? {
439|bad9a4|        let controlFlowPatterns = [
440|0bf98c|            ("if ", "if"),
441|9fe51e|            ("guard ", "guard"),
442|62af45|            ("else if", "else if"),
443|7da324|            ("else", "else"),
444|99fc8d|            ("for ", "for"),
445|37f5a4|            ("while ", "while"),
446|402c75|            ("repeat", "repeat"),
447|f81318|            ("switch ", "switch"),
448|ff609c|            ("case ", "case"),
449|d493af|            ("default:", "default"),
450|0ca7b9|            ("do ", "do"),
451|30a630|            ("catch", "catch")
452|220505|        ]
453|d6ed84|        
454|186e39|        for (pattern, label) in controlFlowPatterns {
455|3cfde0|            if line.contains(pattern) {
456|6ef273|                return label
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|c2ae65|        return nil
460|27e597|    }
461|b4687f|    
462|143320|    private func extractName(from line: String, prefix: String, visibility: [String]) -> String? {
463|47867c|        var components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
464|d6ed84|        
465|b4fd50|        // Remove visibility modifiers
466|6bbc02|        components = components.filter { !visibility.contains($0) }
467|d6ed84|        
468|ad7b7d|        // Find prefix index
469|524a3a|        if let prefixIndex = components.firstIndex(where: { $0 == prefix }),
470|22dab3|           prefixIndex + 1 < components.count {
471|5c4751|            var name = components[prefixIndex + 1]
472|43f61d|            // Remove colons and other trailing characters
473|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
474|3f8c05|            name = name.components(separatedBy: "<").first ?? name
475|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
476|470adb|            return name
477|5f3077|        }
478|c2ae65|        return nil
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|c68b6f|    private func extractVariableName(from line: String) -> String? {
482|6e7aec|        let components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
483|a2b557|        if components.count >= 2, components[0] == "var" {
484|696097|            var varName = components[1]
485|cdb291|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? varName
486|0300ee|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: "=").first ?? varName
487|c7c291|            return varName
488|5f3077|        }
489|c2ae65|        return nil
490|27e597|    }
491|b4687f|    
492|9d571e|    private func findOpeningBrace(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int? {
493|1ccc79|        for i in startIndex..<min(startIndex + 5, lines.count) {
494|539363|            if lines[i].contains("{") {
495|883981|                return i
496|a7dc16|            }
497|5f3077|        }
498|c2ae65|        return nil
499|27e597|    }
500|b4687f|    
501|a3e3d4|    private func isDeclarationLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
502|3d6d16|        let keywords = ["class", "struct", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "init", "func"]
503|ce9d51|        return keywords.contains { line.contains("\($0) ") }
504|27e597|    }
505|b4687f|    
506|785057|    private func isFunctionLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
507|00501b|        return line.contains("func ") || line.contains("init ")
508|27e597|    }
509|b4687f|    
510|70bda3|    private func detectBlockEnd(_ line: String, leadingWhitespace: Int) -> Bool {
511|ae2f5c|        return (line.hasPrefix("}") || line.starts(with: "}")) && 
512|9c322d|               (line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) == "}" || 
513|65b3d9|                line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).hasPrefix("}"))
514|27e597|    }

516|94cc0f|    // MARK: - Fold State Persistence
517|b4687f|    
518|786ea9|    /// Saves the current fold state to UserDefaults
519|1043ae|    func saveFoldState(for filePath: String) {
520|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
521|d6ed84|        
522|1c2856|        // Use regions from the dictionary if available
523|19f890|        let regionsToSave: [FoldRegion]
524|021ffe|        if let fileId = currentFileId, let storedRegions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] {
525|b1db84|            regionsToSave = storedRegions
526|b31999|        } else {
527|210675|            regionsToSave = foldRegions
528|5f3077|        }
529|d6ed84|        
530|c424a6|        // Create a simplified representation for storage
531|40fb34|        let foldState = regionsToSave.map { FoldStateEntry(startLine: $0.startLine, isFolded: $0.isFolded) }
532|d6ed84|        
533|284b9a|        if let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(foldState) {
534|d8ca2f|            UserDefaults.standard.set(data, forKey: key)
535|5f3077|        }
536|27e597|    }
537|b4687f|    
538|171d6b|    /// Restores fold state from UserDefaults
539|710040|    private func restoreFoldState(for filePath: String) {
540|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
541|d6ed84|        
542|d7f816|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: key),
543|9cfa7e|              let foldState = try? JSONDecoder().decode([FoldStateEntry].self, from: data) else {
544|bef5d6|            return
545|5f3077|        }
546|d6ed84|        
547|f0448e|        // Apply saved state to current regions
548|9663b0|        for savedState in foldState {
549|65fcdc|            if let index = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == savedState.startLine }) {
550|7dfd32|                foldRegions[index].isFolded = savedState.isFolded
551|a7dc16|            }
552|5f3077|        }
553|27e597|    }
554|b4687f|    
555|1981e4|    /// Helper struct for persisting fold state
556|2b3d97|    private struct FoldStateEntry: Codable {
557|eef71e|        let startLine: Int
558|8ba562|        let isFolded: Bool
559|27e597|    }
560|b4687f|    
561|e874ec|    /// Clears fold state for a specific file
562|00eab3|    func clearFoldState(for filePath: String) {
563|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
564|f413e9|        UserDefaults.standard.removeObject(forKey: key)
565|27e597|    }
566|b4687f|    
567|61f95b|    /// Clears all fold states
568|e8e04b|    func clearAllFoldStates() {
569|2f577c|        let defaults = UserDefaults.standard
570|a64386|        let keys = defaults.dictionaryRepresentation().keys.filter { $0.hasPrefix(UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix) }
571|35aefd|        for key in keys {
572|984243|            defaults.removeObject(forKey: key)
573|5f3077|        }
574|27e597|    }
