576|8aaef2|    // MARK: - Fold Operations
577|b4687f|    
578|37bb1e|    /// Toggles the fold state at a specific line
579|e2ee32|    func toggleFold(at line: Int) {
580|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
581|c49ebc|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded.toggle()
582|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
583|3070d1|            
584|05b9d6|            // Save state after toggling
585|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
586|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
587|a7dc16|            }
588|5f3077|        }
589|27e597|    }
590|b4687f|    
591|96748f|    /// Expands a folded region
592|d06486|    func expandRegion(at line: Int) {
593|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
594|916cf7|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded = false
595|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
596|3070d1|            
597|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
598|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
599|a7dc16|            }
600|5f3077|        }
601|27e597|    }
602|b4687f|    
603|4383f2|    /// Collapses a region
604|f7a196|    func collapseRegion(at line: Int) {
605|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
606|20e273|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded = true
607|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
608|3070d1|            
609|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
610|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
611|a7dc16|            }
612|5f3077|        }
613|27e597|    }
614|b4687f|    
615|98aa18|    /// Expands all folded regions
616|60d5e4|    func expandAll() {
617|8f6c3b|        for index in foldRegions.indices {
618|24f435|            foldRegions[index].isFolded = false
619|5f3077|        }
620|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()
621|d6ed84|        
622|8b7173|        if let filePath = currentFilePath {
623|4212f0|            saveFoldState(for: filePath)
624|5f3077|        }
625|27e597|    }
626|b4687f|    
627|3693ad|    /// Folds the region containing the given cursor line
628|d8038c|    func foldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
629|03814c|        // Find the innermost region containing this line
630|2e3469|        if let region = foldRegions.filter({ 
631|fd455c|            cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine && !$0.isFolded
632|0a42c8|        }).min(by: { ($0.endLine - $0.startLine) < ($1.endLine - $1.startLine) }) {
633|acad0e|            collapseRegion(at: region.startLine)
634|5f3077|        }
635|27e597|    }
636|b4687f|    
637|97b9ff|    /// Unfolds the region containing the given cursor line
638|97b77c|    func unfoldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
639|f02da6|        // Find any folded region that starts at or contains this line
640|add066|        if let region = foldRegions.first(where: { 
641|89c4dd|            $0.isFolded && ($0.startLine == cursorLine || (cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine))
642|294d4c|        }) {
643|2e10a5|            expandRegion(at: region.startLine)
644|5f3077|        }
645|27e597|    }
646|b4687f|    
647|8dc40d|    /// Toggle fold at cursor line - convenience method
648|d4ed4a|    func toggleFoldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
649|3df676|        // First check if we're on a fold start line
650|1c9044|        if let region = foldRegions.first(where: { $0.startLine == cursorLine }) {
651|d4146c|            toggleFold(at: region.startLine)
652|bef5d6|            return
653|5f3077|        }
654|d6ed84|        
655|f75a08|        // Otherwise find the innermost region containing this line
656|2e3469|        if let region = foldRegions.filter({ 
657|00876f|            cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine
658|0a42c8|        }).min(by: { ($0.endLine - $0.startLine) < ($1.endLine - $1.startLine) }) {
659|d4146c|            toggleFold(at: region.startLine)
660|5f3077|        }
661|27e597|    }

663|bdea74|    // MARK: - Legacy/Convenience Methods (for keyboard shortcuts)
664|b4687f|    
665|213a7f|    /// Folds at the current line (uses line 0 as fallback - caller should use foldAtLine(_:) with actual cursor)
666|264636|    func foldCurrentLine() {
667|7d9505|        // This is called from keyboard shortcuts - fold at line 0 or first available region
668|54eb96|        if let firstUnfolded = foldRegions.first(where: { !$0.isFolded }) {
669|ff8e32|            collapseRegion(at: firstUnfolded.startLine)
670|5f3077|        }
671|27e597|    }
672|b4687f|    
673|b7b7ac|    /// Unfolds at the current line (uses line 0 as fallback - caller should use unfoldAtLine(_:) with actual cursor)
674|37bd49|    func unfoldCurrentLine() {
675|338630|        // This is called from keyboard shortcuts - unfold first folded region
676|677536|        if let firstFolded = foldRegions.first(where: { $0.isFolded }) {
677|e50666|            expandRegion(at: firstFolded.startLine)
678|5f3077|        }
679|27e597|    }
680|b4687f|    
681|b45fba|    /// Collapses all foldable regions
682|4fed9e|    func collapseAll() {

706|b4687f|    
707|291c9c|    /// Expands all regions of a specific type

721|6d5d96|    // MARK: - Query Methods
722|b4687f|    
723|3e779e|    /// Checks if a line is foldable
724|ca045d|    func isFoldable(line: Int) -> Bool {
725|50345e|        return foldRegions.contains { $0.startLine == line }
726|27e597|    }
727|b4687f|    
728|492204|    /// Checks if a line is currently folded (for the currently active file in `foldRegions`)

730|47ec26|        return collapsedLines.contains(line)
731|27e597|    }
732|adc83b|
733|37b988|    /// Checks if a line should be hidden for a specific file (does not rely on `collapsedLines`)

735|dc0777|        guard let regions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] else { return false }
736|d5cc2e|        for region in regions where region.isFolded {
737|6f97d6|            if line > region.startLine && line <= region.endLine {
738|50bdea|                return true
739|a7dc16|            }
740|5f3077|        }
741|dc1500|        return false
742|27e597|    }
743|b4687f|    
744|02b40f|    /// Checks if a region at a given line is folded
745|67e68c|    func isRegionFolded(at line: Int) -> Bool {

747|27e597|    }
748|b4687f|    
749|85a80b|    /// Gets the fold region at a specific line
750|74f4c4|    func getRegion(at line: Int) -> FoldRegion? {

752|27e597|    }
753|b4687f|    
754|39b756|    /// Gets all fold regions of a specific type

756|42e97b|        return foldRegions.filter { $0.type == type }
757|27e597|    }

759|c6b72e|    // MARK: - File-Aware Methods
760|b4687f|    
761|395247|    /// Checks if a line is foldable for a specific file
762|1a4f2d|    func isFoldable(fileId: String, line: Int) -> Bool {
763|dc0777|        guard let regions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] else { return false }
764|3e9014|        return regions.contains { $0.startLine == line }
765|27e597|    }
766|b4687f|    
767|bb1f3c|    /// Checks if a region at a given line is folded for a specific file
768|4b6083|    func isFolded(fileId: String, line: Int) -> Bool {
769|dc0777|        guard let regions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] else { return false }
770|c82198|        return regions.first { $0.startLine == line }?.isFolded ?? false
771|27e597|    }
772|b4687f|    
773|f5af03|    /// Toggles the fold state at a specific line for a specific file
774|8ed749|    func toggleFold(fileId: String, line: Int) {
775|b6ac8b|        guard var regions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] else { return }
776|d6ed84|        
777|e771aa|        if let regionIndex = regions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
778|f9b93a|            regions[regionIndex].isFolded.toggle()
779|823f0a|            foldRegionsByFile[fileId] = regions
780|3070d1|            
781|0c461f|            // Update current file regions if this is the active file
782|b261ef|            if fileId == currentFileId {
783|e474f1|                self.foldRegions = regions
784|9602e4|                updateCollapsedLines()
785|f5a6eb|            } else {
786|997252|                // Ensure SwiftUI updates for gutters rendering using file-aware queries.
787|ccad84|                objectWillChange.send()
788|a7dc16|            }
789|3070d1|            
790|05b9d6|            // Save state after toggling
791|a241cb|            saveFoldState(for: fileId)
792|5f3077|        }
793|27e597|    }
794|b4687f|    
795|d3fcc7|    /// Gets fold regions for a specific file
796|d41bc5|    func getFoldRegions(for fileId: String) -> [FoldRegion] {

798|27e597|    }
799|b4687f|    
800|c0bcaf|    /// Clears fold regions for a specific file from memory

803|27e597|    }
804|b4687f|    
805|6c372c|    /// Clears all fold regions from memory

808|27e597|    }
809|b4687f|    
810|f4a6da|    /// Gets folded line ranges for text hiding
811|ef545f|    /// Returns an array of closed ranges representing the line numbers that should be hidden
812|75472c|    func getFoldedLineRanges() -> [ClosedRange<Int>] {
813|c3280d|        var ranges: [ClosedRange<Int>] = []
814|d6ed84|        
815|40e9a9|        // Sort regions by start line to ensure proper ordering
816|cfa917|        let sortedRegions = foldRegions.sorted { $0.startLine < $1.startLine }
817|d6ed84|        
818|ec4ee6|        for region in sortedRegions where region.isFolded {
819|81a008|            ranges.append((region.startLine + 1)...region.endLine)
820|5f3077|        }
821|d6ed84|        
822|56ed1a|        return ranges
823|27e597|    }
824|b4687f|    
825|cefce4|    /// Gets the total count of folded lines
826|4c2bcc|    func getFoldedLineCount() -> Int {
827|58970c|        return collapsedLines.count
828|27e597|    }
829|b4687f|    
830|d6f051|    /// Gets a summary of fold statistics
831|0f46cc|    func getFoldStatistics() -> FoldStatistics {
832|590e8f|        let totalCount = foldRegions.count
833|b5a3cd|        let foldedCount = foldRegions.filter { $0.isFolded }.count
834|d6ed84|        
835|be54ca|        var typeBreakdown: [FoldRegion.FoldType: Int] = [:]
836|812a24|        for region in foldRegions {
837|6b9f03|            typeBreakdown[region.type, default: 0] += 1
838|5f3077|        }
839|d6ed84|        
840|1fae88|        return FoldStatistics(
841|8971d3|            totalRegions: totalCount,
842|b1ec0c|            foldedRegions: foldedCount,
843|247fa6|            typeBreakdown: typeBreakdown

188|7aea86|    /// Patch tokenizer_config.json to fix known issues with MLX community models.
189|2cbc84|    ///
190|0b5bd8|    /// ## Nanbeige 4.1 Chat Template Fix
191|2cbc84|    ///
192|a45827|    /// **Problem:** `mlx-community/Nanbeige4.1-3B-heretic-4bit` is missing the `chat_template`
193|a8d0ea|    /// field entirely in its `tokenizer_config.json`. The official `Nanbeige/Nanbeige4.1-3B` has
194|abe787|    /// the template, but the MLX community quantization stripped it out. Without a chat template,
195|473ad3|    /// the model receives raw unformatted text instead of properly delimited messages, causing
196|d68212|    /// broken/looping output.
197|2cbc84|    ///
198|e24a63|    /// **Root Cause:** Nanbeige uses non-standard STX/ETX control characters (U+0002/U+0003)
199|4933b8|    /// as message delimiters instead of ChatML's `<|im_start|>/<|im_end|>` tokens. Format:
200|5ac9b4|    /// ```
201|aa8a94|    /// ␂system\n{system_prompt}␃\n
202|499cc3|    /// ␂user\n{user_message}␃\n
203|b4a140|    /// ␂assistant\n{response}␃\n
204|5ac9b4|    /// ```
205|dfda8b|    /// The official template also defaults to Chinese system prompts ("你是南北阁...").
206|2cbc84|    ///
207|ed7654|    /// **Fix:** Two cases:
208|5a42c5|    /// 1. MLX version (no template): Inject full Jinja template with STX/ETX tokens + English defaults
209|05cc99|    /// 2. Official version (Chinese defaults): String-replace Chinese prompts with English equivalents
210|2cbc84|    ///
211|7d8d3c|    /// ## TokenizerClass Fix
212|2cbc84|    ///
213|f8be54|    /// The MLX version also uses `"TokenizersBackend"` as `tokenizer_class`, which
214|12ef07|    /// `swift-transformers` doesn't recognize. We patch it to `"PreTrainedTokenizerFast"`.
215|2cbc84|    ///
216|458bb8|    /// - Parameter url: Path to the downloaded `tokenizer_config.json`
217|bbb846|    private func patchTokenizerConfig(at url: URL) throws {
218|7dcb26|        let data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
219|9f35b7|        guard var json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any] else { return }
220|d6ed84|        
221|5d331a|        var needsWrite = false
222|65d968|        let tokenizerClass = json["tokenizer_class"] as? String ?? ""
223|d6ed84|        
224|e4affc|        // Fix non-standard tokenizer classes that swift-transformers doesn't recognize
225|697e82|        if tokenizerClass == "TokenizersBackend" {
226|9c6f93|            json["tokenizer_class"] = "PreTrainedTokenizerFast"
227|fdd298|            print("[LocalLLM] Patched tokenizer_class: \(tokenizerClass) -> PreTrainedTokenizerFast")
228|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
229|5f3077|        }
230|d6ed84|        
231|a3249e|        // Nanbeige MLX version is MISSING chat_template entirely - must add full template
232|c727fd|        let existingTemplate = json["chat_template"] as? String
233|0b19c4|        let isNanbeige = url.path.lowercased().contains("nanbeige")
234|d6ed84|        
235|7c1a07|        if isNanbeige && (existingTemplate == nil || existingTemplate?.isEmpty == true) {
236|106acd|            // Full Nanbeige template with English defaults (from official repo)
237|3dce45|            // Uses special tokens: ␂system, ␃, ␂user, ␂assistant, etc.
238|51b788|            let nanbeigeTemplate = """
239|574591|{%- if messages[0]['role'] == 'system' -%}
240|799d9d|{{- '\u{0002}system\n' + messages[0]['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
241|a01acf|{%- else -%}
242|15ae22|{{- '\u{0002}system\nYou are a helpful coding assistant. Always respond in English.\u{0003}\n' -}}
243|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
244|f60180|{%- for message in messages -%}
245|7bf0d8|{%- if message['role'] == 'user' -%}
246|9eb39a|{{- '\u{0002}user\n' + message['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
247|b7e345|{%- elif message['role'] == 'assistant' -%}
248|3ef1d3|{{- '\u{0002}assistant\n' + message['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
249|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
250|617545|{%- endfor -%}
251|9361ae|{%- if add_generation_prompt -%}
252|0c97c4|{{- '\u{0002}assistant\n' -}}
253|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
254|e4615a|"""
255|de0b01|            json["chat_template"] = nanbeigeTemplate
256|f8c633|            print("[LocalLLM] Added Nanbeige chat_template (was missing in MLX version)")
257|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
258|c7757d|        } else if let template = existingTemplate, template.contains("你是南北阁") {
259|83aa9f|            // Official version has template but with Chinese - replace with English
260|4f1c0a|            var patched = template
261|265ecc|            patched = patched.replacingOccurrences(
262|9b5091|                of: "你是南北阁，一款由BOSS直聘自主研发并训练的专业大语言模型。",
263|56d38a|                with: "You are a helpful coding assistant. Always respond in English."
264|43d041|            )
265|265ecc|            patched = patched.replacingOccurrences(
266|887387|                of: "你是一位工具函数调用专家，你会得到一个问题和一组可能的工具函数。根据问题，你需要进行一个或多个函数/工具调用以实现目的，请尽量尝试探索通过工具解决问题。\n如果没有一个函数可以使用，请直接使用自然语言回复用户。\n如果给定的问题缺少函数所需的参数，请使用自然语言进行提问，向用户询问必要信息。\n如果调用结果已经足够回答用户问题，请对历史结果进行总结，使用自然语言回复用户。",
267|e3e136|                with: "You are a tool function expert. Based on the question, make function calls to achieve the goal. Always respond in English."
268|43d041|            )
269|b13f0a|            json["chat_template"] = patched
270|519888|            print("[LocalLLM] Patched Nanbeige: replaced Chinese defaults with English")
271|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
272|5f3077|        }
273|d6ed84|        
274|9bb1a4|        if needsWrite {
275|087460|            let patched = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: json, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
276|a03c25|            try patched.write(to: url)
277|5f3077|        }
278|27e597|    }

314|72eb88|    // MARK: - Chat Interface (non-streaming)
315|b4687f|    
316|07dae2|    func chat(messages: [(role: String, content: String)], systemPrompt: String? = nil) async throws -> String {
317|ec510f|        guard isModelLoaded, let container = modelContainer else {
318|57ecf6|            throw LocalLLMError.modelNotLoaded
319|5f3077|        }
320|d6ed84|        
321|4e596a|        guard !isGenerating else {
322|9094d3|            throw LocalLLMError.alreadyGenerating
323|5f3077|        }
324|d6ed84|        
325|446c05|        isGenerating = true
326|8830ac|        defer { isGenerating = false }
327|d6ed84|        
328|f32e1d|        let system = systemPrompt ?? defaultSystemPrompt
329|85fbf7|        let session = MLXChatSession(container, instructions: system, generateParameters: generateParams)
330|d6ed84|        
331|f7e1c3|        // Get last user message only
332|308cc9|        let lastUserMessage = messages.last(where: { $0.role == "user" })?.content ?? ""
333|d6ed84|        
334|3ff51d|        let response = try await session.respond(to: lastUserMessage)
335|d6ed84|        
336|04d412|        // Strip thinking tags
337|198207|        let cleaned = stripThinkingTags(response)
338|d35461|        return cleaned.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
339|27e597|    }
340|b4687f|    
341|47ed15|    // MARK: - Streaming Chat (for UI)
342|b4687f|    
343|6476ec|    func chatStream(messages: [(role: String, content: String)], systemPrompt: String? = nil) -> AsyncThrowingStream<String, Error> {
344|731cf1|        AsyncThrowingStream { continuation in
345|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in

362|dd2193|

398|0f23ba|    // MARK: - Think Tag Filtering
399|b4687f|    
400|ab0000|    /// Strip <think>...</think> blocks from model output
401|0a2ec3|    /// These are chain-of-thought tags used by reasoning models (DeepSeek, Qwen thinking, etc.)
402|5c7352|    private func stripThinkingTags(_ text: String) -> String {
403|f89754|        var result = text
404|d6ed84|        
405|9c7200|        // Remove complete <think>...</think> blocks (including multiline)
406|42757a|        let thinkPattern = #"<think>[\s\S]*?</think>"#
407|2fe825|        if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: thinkPattern, options: []) {
408|852aad|            result = regex.stringByReplacingMatches(
409|1532fe|                in: result,
410|8a934d|                range: NSRange(result.startIndex..., in: result),
411|57eb34|                withTemplate: ""
412|43d041|            )
413|5f3077|        }
414|d6ed84|        
415|1852a1|        // Remove incomplete opening <think> tag at end (partial streaming)
416|a66ec3|        if let range = result.range(of: "<think>") {
417|e6c93a|            if !result[range.upperBound...].contains("</think>") {
418|1542dd|                result = String(result[..<range.lowerBound])
419|a7dc16|            }
420|5f3077|        }
421|d6ed84|        
422|f1a415|        // Remove stray </think> tags
423|b10ad5|        result = result.replacingOccurrences(of: "</think>", with: "")
424|d6ed84|        
425|ae4b06|        return result.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
426|27e597|    }

428|8843e0|    // MARK: - Message Conversion
429|b4687f|    
430|7356fa|    /// Convert tuple messages to Chat.Message history for ChatSession
431|b91bc9|    private func convertToHistory(messages: [(role: String, content: String)]) -> [Chat.Message] {
432|97c167|        var history: [Chat.Message] = []
433|d6ed84|        
434|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
435|2398bd|            switch msg.role.lowercased() {
436|bab5dd|            case "user":
437|db3088|                history.append(.user(msg.content))
438|d5fa87|            case "assistant":
439|898b14|                history.append(.assistant(msg.content))
440|df5e21|            case "system":
441|c2d406|                // System is handled via instructions parameter, skip here
442|1df510|                continue
443|ea3438|            default:
444|2ebd25|                // Treat unknown roles as user
445|db3088|                history.append(.user(msg.content))
446|a7dc16|            }
447|5f3077|        }
448|d6ed84|        
449|fb4ac8|        return history
450|27e597|    }

319|bd227b|    /// Run a code selection on the remote server
320|9e91d6|    func runSelection(code: String, language: String, via sshManager: SSHManager) async throws {
321|ee913b|        guard sshManager.isConnected else {
322|a2276b|            throw SSHClientError.notConnected
323|5f3077|        }
324|d6ed84|        
325|a93b5e|        // Create a temporary file with the code
326|2f2c6c|        let tempFileName = "vscode_ipad_\(UUID().uuidString)\(fileExtension(for: language))"
327|a10ef3|        let tempPath = "/tmp/\(tempFileName)"
328|d6ed84|        
329|671dbc|        // Escape the code for shell
330|60d21e|        let escapedCode = code
331|f01928|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "\\", with: "\\\\")
332|c811b2|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "'", with: "'\"'\"'")
333|81c43c|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "\n", with: "\\n")
334|d6ed84|        
335|1a086b|        // Build command to create temp file and execute
336|1c1bfd|        let interpreter = RemoteSupportedLanguage(rawValue: language)?.interpreter ?? language
337|90cb1c|        let runCommand: String
338|d6ed84|        
339|f3155b|        switch language {
340|1c8542|        case "swift":
341|13f1c7|            // For Swift, we need to write to file then run
342|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
343|d3d354|            let runCmd = "swift \(tempPath)"
344|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
345|3070d1|            
346|bbd027|        case "python", "python3":
347|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
348|e84d7b|            let runCmd = "python3 \(tempPath)"
349|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
350|3070d1|            
351|0db04c|        case "node":
352|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
353|0f6b2e|            let runCmd = "node \(tempPath)"
354|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
355|3070d1|            
356|9f8131|        case "bash", "sh":
357|feb049|            // For bash, we can use heredoc or direct execution
358|ef4846|            runCommand = "bash -c '\(escapedCode)'"
359|3070d1|            
360|f6a68d|        case "ruby":

446|3070d1|

515|a7dc16|            }
516|3070d1|            
517|6291fe|            self.activeContinuation = continuation
518|3070d1|            
519|2a8932|            // Use SSHManager's async execution
520|004366|            let stream = sshManager.executeCommandAsync(
521|6c40a1|                command: command,

523|578bd5|                environment: environment,
524|f7c74e|                timeout: timeout
525|43d041|            )
526|3070d1|            
527|47ed67|            Task {
528|a9ed45|                do {
529|5a65b2|                    for try await event in stream {
530|f4bfbf|                        continuation.yield(event)
531|956cfe|                        
532|ef8b2c|                        // Store reference to channel for kill functionality
533|eb3659|                        if case .stdout = event, let channel = self.activeChannel {
534|e450d9|                            // Channel is tracked
535|392b35|                        }
536|c9717a|                    }
537|c65a9a|                    continuation.finish()
538|6bf1ca|                } catch {
539|bf16bb|                    continuation.yield(.error(error))
540|c65a9a|                    continuation.finish()
541|4e2d32|                }
542|a7dc16|            }
543|3070d1|            
544|302ed0|            // Handle cancellation
545|bba5ce|            continuation.onTermination = { _ in
546|434c92|                self.activeContinuation = nil
547|a7dc16|            }
548|5f3077|        }
549|27e597|    }

552|902381|// MARK: - Extension to add executeCommandAsync to SSHManager if not present
553|adc83b|
554|1b07de|extension SSHManager {
555|85e374|    /// Execute a command with real-time output streaming via AsyncStream
556|61a266|    func executeCommandAsync(
557|f87c55|        command: String,
558|5dd7f1|        workingDirectory: String? = nil,
559|bf3905|        environment: [String: String]? = nil,
560|96a3cf|        timeout: TimeInterval = 60
561|4f800a|    ) -> AsyncStream<SSHCommandOutput> {
562|50fdb2|        return AsyncStream { [weak self] continuation in
563|b3f256|            guard let self = self, self.isConnected, let channel = self.channel, let sshHandler = self.sshHandler else {
564|01d206|                continuation.yield(.error(SSHClientError.notConnected))
565|dc0580|                continuation.finish()
566|53ab34|                return
567|a7dc16|            }
568|3070d1|            
569|7b1e91|            let channelPromise = channel.eventLoop.makePromise(of: Channel.self)
570|f5b3ab|            var timeoutTask: DispatchWorkItem?
571|99e366|            var isFinished = false
572|3070d1|            
573|15ece8|            func finishStream() {
574|557e7a|                guard !isFinished else { return }
575|67a1d9|                isFinished = true
576|d8d7bd|                timeoutTask?.cancel()
577|dc0580|                continuation.finish()
578|a7dc16|            }
579|3070d1|            
580|b019cd|            // Create the exec channel with real-time output handler
581|e97e9d|            sshHandler.createChannel(channelPromise) { childChannel, channelType in
582|ec4593|                guard channelType == .session else {
583|98cd51|                    return childChannel.eventLoop.makeFailedFuture(SSHClientError.invalidChannelType)
584|4e2d32|                }
585|216278|                
586|81476c|                let handler = RemoteExecChannelHandler(
587|e29847|                    outputHandler: { output in
588|a04d14|                        DispatchQueue.main.async {
589|4adc5c|                            guard !isFinished else { return }
590|58f8c2|                            continuation.yield(output)
591|e4abf2|                            
592|afbe0c|                            if case .exit = output {
593|3b6701|                                finishStream()
594|89d40a|                            }
595|392b35|                        }
596|12b5e6|                    },
597|75a38c|                    completionHandler: { result in
598|a04d14|                        DispatchQueue.main.async {
599|4adc5c|                            guard !isFinished else { return }
600|e4abf2|                            
601|2f41be|                            if result.isTimedOut {
602|4d7bcd|                                continuation.yield(.timeout)
603|240f50|                            } else {
604|47f090|                                continuation.yield(.exit(Int32(result.exitCode)))
605|89d40a|                            }
606|88c9f2|                            finishStream()
607|392b35|                        }
608|c9717a|                    }
609|6f642e|                )
610|216278|                
611|825638|                let execRequest = SSHChannelRequestEvent.ExecRequest(
612|618145|                    command: workingDirectory != nil ? "cd '\(workingDirectory!)' && \(command)" : command,
613|3d0428|                    wantReply: true
614|6f642e|                )
615|216278|                
616|bd2732|                return childChannel.pipeline.addHandler(handler).flatMap {
617|ef581e|                    childChannel.triggerUserOutboundEvent(execRequest, promise: nil)
618|0f70a9|                    return childChannel.setOption(ChannelOptions.allowRemoteHalfClosure, value: true)
619|4e2d32|                }
620|a7dc16|            }
621|3070d1|            
622|7a94f6|            // Handle errors
623|8fc388|            channelPromise.futureResult.whenFailure { error in
624|f143b8|                DispatchQueue.main.async {
625|206f0a|                    guard !isFinished else { return }
626|bf16bb|                    continuation.yield(.error(error))
627|a34e10|                    finishStream()
628|4e2d32|                }
629|a7dc16|            }
630|3070d1|            
631|577c5f|            // Set up timeout
632|8f4749|            timeoutTask = DispatchWorkItem {
633|f143b8|                DispatchQueue.main.async {
634|206f0a|                    guard !isFinished else { return }
635|0acb74|                    continuation.yield(.timeout)
636|a34e10|                    finishStream()
637|4e2d32|                }
638|a7dc16|            }
639|e7ec4b|            DispatchQueue.global().asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + timeout, execute: timeoutTask!)
640|3070d1|            
641|302ed0|            // Handle cancellation
642|bba5ce|            continuation.onTermination = { _ in
643|d8d7bd|                timeoutTask?.cancel()
644|ef3fc0|                channelPromise.futureResult.whenSuccess { channel in
645|a3f0ae|                    channel.close(promise: nil)
646|4e2d32|                }
647|a7dc16|            }
648|5f3077|        }
649|27e597|    }
650|b31277|}

652|c466a9|// MARK: - Remote Exec Channel Handler
653|adc83b|
654|fd4b43|private class RemoteExecChannelHandler: ChannelDuplexHandler {
655|818f81|    typealias InboundIn = SSHChannelData
656|aac853|    typealias InboundOut = ByteBuffer
657|bd586f|    typealias OutboundIn = ByteBuffer
658|638ff5|    typealias OutboundOut = SSHChannelData
659|b4687f|    
660|1af299|    private var stdoutBuffer = ByteBufferAllocator().buffer(capacity: 4096)
661|c04dfa|    private var stderrBuffer = ByteBufferAllocator().buffer(capacity: 4096)
662|cf9c45|    private var exitCode: Int?
663|65b487|    private var outputHandler: ((SSHCommandOutput) -> Void)?
664|aa5b99|    private var completionHandler: ((SSHCommandResult) -> Void)?
665|b4687f|    
666|62e028|    init(
667|6d5297|        outputHandler: ((SSHCommandOutput) -> Void)? = nil,
668|2a76d6|        completionHandler: ((SSHCommandResult) -> Void)? = nil
669|981e04|    ) {
670|2a7d83|        self.outputHandler = outputHandler
671|1d72bc|        self.completionHandler = completionHandler
672|27e597|    }
673|b4687f|    
674|d46995|    func channelRead(context: ChannelHandlerContext, data: NIOAny) {
675|da8887|        let channelData = unwrapInboundIn(data)
676|d6ed84|        
677|1ddac8|        switch channelData.type {
678|6a22d1|        case .channel:
679|7107a8|            guard case .byteBuffer(let buffer) = channelData.data else { return }
680|3070d1|            
681|16e0bf|            // Accumulate stdout
682|6285a3|            var mutableBuffer = buffer
683|0cd634|            stdoutBuffer.writeBuffer(&mutableBuffer)
684|3070d1|            
685|5dd2f6|            // Notify real-time handler
686|ebff58|            if let text = buffer.getString(at: 0, length: buffer.readableBytes) {
687|352552|                outputHandler?(.stdout(text))
688|a7dc16|            }
689|3070d1|            
690|f290c8|        case .stdErr:
691|7107a8|            guard case .byteBuffer(let buffer) = channelData.data else { return }
692|3070d1|            
693|e8be37|            // Accumulate stderr
694|6285a3|            var mutableBuffer = buffer
695|e6c7c0|            stderrBuffer.writeBuffer(&mutableBuffer)
696|3070d1|            
697|5dd2f6|            // Notify real-time handler
698|ebff58|            if let text = buffer.getString(at: 0, length: buffer.readableBytes) {
699|a633fe|                outputHandler?(.stderr(text))
700|a7dc16|            }
701|3070d1|            
702|520b7d|        default:
703|4c03e4|            break
704|5f3077|        }
705|27e597|    }
706|b4687f|    
707|734243|    func userInboundEventTriggered(context: ChannelHandlerContext, event: Any) {
708|2f42d4|        if let exitStatus = event as? SSHChannelRequestEvent.ExitStatus {
709|33bbd7|            exitCode = Int(exitStatus.exitStatus)
710|c1eae8|            outputHandler?(.exit(exitStatus.exitStatus))
711|5f3077|        }
712|27e597|    }
713|b4687f|    
714|4a71fc|    func channelInactive(context: ChannelHandlerContext) {
715|02fc3f|        let stdout = stdoutBuffer.getString(at: 0, length: stdoutBuffer.readableBytes) ?? ""
716|bab9da|        let stderr = stderrBuffer.getString(at: 0, length: stderrBuffer.readableBytes) ?? ""
717|aa1cf0|        let result = SSHCommandResult(
718|86c8cc|            stdout: stdout,
719|1dc099|            stderr: stderr,
720|626e57|            exitCode: exitCode ?? -1,
721|41dcab|            isTimedOut: false
722|3143a4|        )
723|a45864|        completionHandler?(result)
724|27e597|    }
725|b4687f|    
726|68ecb6|    func errorCaught(context: ChannelHandlerContext, error: Error) {
727|284950|        outputHandler?(.error(error))
728|3c2d3e|        context.close(promise: nil)
729|27e597|    }

236|bd739f|    private var outputBuffer: String = ""

254|2f01d7|    // MARK: - Connection
255|b4687f|    
256|0fbfe3|    /// Connect to remote debugger via SSH
257|d326c6|    func connect(config: RemoteDebuggerConfig, sshConfig: SSHConnectionConfig) async throws {
258|0c76b9|        self.config = config
259|58134f|        self.debuggerType = config.debuggerType
260|d6ed84|        
261|5673e6|        state = .connecting
262|bc7fbc|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.connecting))
263|d6ed84|        
264|0bf4a9|        // Create and configure SSH manager
265|fbb1dc|        let ssh = SSHManager()
266|26c4e6|        self.sshManager = ssh
267|d6ed84|        
268|94f4d1|        // Set up SSH delegate to receive output
269|51d252|        let outputHandler = SSHOutputHandler(debugger: self)
270|831741|        ssh.delegate = outputHandler
271|d6ed84|        
272|813ed1|        // Connect via SSH
273|7ba7c7|        try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { (continuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Error>) in
274|af5471|            ssh.connect(config: sshConfig) { result in
275|7a4073|                switch result {
276|2cfe35|                case .success:
277|7115ac|                    continuation.resume()
278|6b00fe|                case .failure(let error):
279|773145|                    continuation.resume(throwing: error)
280|4e2d32|                }
281|a7dc16|            }
282|5f3077|        }
283|d6ed84|        
284|87d109|        state = .connected
285|419741|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.connected))
286|d6ed84|        
287|1a1d4e|        // Start the debugger
288|a3253f|        try await startDebugger()
289|27e597|    }
290|b4687f|    
291|0360f8|    /// Disconnect from remote debugger
292|2aa8fc|    func disconnect() async {
293|89effd|        // Send quit command if connected
294|b430f9|        if state.isActive {
295|81fb5f|            let quitCmd = debuggerType == .lldb ? "quit" : "quit"
296|f97166|            try? await sendCommand(quitCmd)
297|5f3077|        }
298|d6ed84|        
299|9da246|        sshManager?.disconnect()
300|e2702b|        sshManager = nil
301|d6ed84|        
302|96470c|        state = .disconnected
303|a6f291|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.disconnected))
304|d6ed84|        
305|a409bb|        // Clear state
306|9cb87a|        breakpoints.removeAll()
307|f75c5d|        callStack.removeAll()
308|59f686|        localVariables.removeAll()
309|185522|        consoleOutput.removeAll()
310|27e597|    }
311|b4687f|    
312|ffa6b3|    // MARK: - Debugger Lifecycle
313|b4687f|    
314|9d26e9|    private func startDebugger() async throws {
315|a80ce1|        guard let config = config else {
316|eb8613|            throw RemoteDebuggerError.notConfigured
317|5f3077|        }
318|d6ed84|        
319|50fe5f|        state = .launching
320|9400dc|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.launching))
321|d6ed84|        
322|520e08|        // Build debugger launch command
323|4c21b2|        let debuggerPath = config.debuggerPath ?? config.debuggerType.executableName
324|58df43|        var launchCommand = debuggerPath
325|d6ed84|        
326|6d707f|        // Add program to debug
327|df47a9|        if config.attachToPID == nil && config.remoteTarget == nil {
328|2d7f58|            launchCommand += " \"\(config.programPath)\""
329|5f3077|        }
330|d6ed84|        
331|b84119|        // Send command to start debugger
332|0d05c4|        sshManager?.send(command: launchCommand)
333|d6ed84|        
334|c85885|        // Wait for debugger prompt
335|496f11|        try await waitForPrompt(timeout: 10)
336|d6ed84|        
337|4411be|        // Configure debugger settings
338|3648c2|        try await configureDebugger()
339|d6ed84|        
340|372127|        // Handle attach or remote target if specified
341|b3cb7b|        if let pid = config.attachToPID {
342|32e793|            try await attach(toPID: pid)
343|8144bc|        } else if let target = config.remoteTarget {
344|a72cdb|            try await connectToRemoteTarget(target)
345|b31999|        } else {
346|d225c3|            // Set program arguments if any
347|9d2d3c|            if !config.programArguments.isEmpty {
348|7164d1|                try await setProgramArguments(config.programArguments)
349|a7dc16|            }
350|3070d1|            
351|b56645|            // Set environment variables
352|4c3a6a|            for (key, value) in config.environmentVariables {
353|ace688|                try await setEnvironmentVariable(key: key, value: value)
354|a7dc16|            }
355|3070d1|            
356|73bacc|            // Set working directory
357|0dc4ad|            if let workDir = config.workingDirectory {
358|c90d94|                try await setWorkingDirectory(workDir)
359|a7dc16|            }
360|5f3077|        }
361|d6ed84|        
362|017ddc|        state = .stopped(reason: .unknown)
363|261975|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.stopped(reason: .unknown)))
364|27e597|    }
365|b4687f|    
366|6df3f2|    private func configureDebugger() async throws {
367|6df6f4|        if debuggerType == .lldb {
368|f159e2|            // LLDB configuration
369|5d0a63|            _ = try await sendCommand("settings set stop-line-count-after 0")
370|b31f0d|            _ = try await sendCommand("settings set stop-line-count-before 0")
371|f924b8|            _ = try await sendCommand("settings set frame-format \"frame #${frame.index}: ${frame.pc}{ ${module.file.basename}{`${function.name-with-args}{${frame.no-debug}${function.pc-offset}}}}{ at ${line.file.basename}:${line.number}}\\n\"")
372|b31999|        } else {
373|6a6fb3|            // GDB configuration
374|63f6a5|            _ = try await sendCommand("set pagination off")
375|5384f5|            _ = try await sendCommand("set print pretty on")
376|ff9bf0|            _ = try await sendCommand("set print array on")
377|5f3077|        }
378|27e597|    }
379|b4687f|    
380|0b1a66|    // MARK: - Breakpoint Management
381|b4687f|    
382|c67684|    /// Set a breakpoint at file:line
383|144775|    @discardableResult
384|b6c09a|    func setBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int, condition: String? = nil) async throws -> RemoteBreakpoint {
385|49e4a0|        let command: String
386|6df6f4|        if debuggerType == .lldb {
387|17807d|            command = "breakpoint set --file \"\(file)\" --line \(line)"
388|b31999|        } else {
389|962e65|            command = "break \(file):\(line)"
390|5f3077|        }
391|d6ed84|        
392|1867e2|        let response = try await sendCommand(command)
393|d6ed84|        
394|733c9d|        // Parse breakpoint ID from response
395|fe4f0b|        let breakpointId = parseBreakpointId(from: response)
396|d6ed84|        
397|e69cfc|        var breakpoint = RemoteBreakpoint(
398|798b4b|            id: breakpointId,
399|5bb816|            file: file,
400|13903b|            line: line,
401|c9dd71|            condition: condition
402|3143a4|        )
403|d6ed84|        
404|7f6722|        // Set condition if provided
405|f55554|        if let condition = condition {
406|3e5145|            try await setBreakpointCondition(id: breakpointId, condition: condition)
407|b4ce25|            breakpoint.condition = condition
408|5f3077|        }
409|d6ed84|        
410|acfd56|        breakpoint.isPending = false
411|23f383|        breakpoints[breakpointId] = breakpoint
412|d6ed84|        
413|a08691|        emitEvent(.breakpointAdded(breakpoint))
414|dc2674|        return breakpoint
415|27e597|    }

568|980e6e|        handleStopResponse(response)
569|27e597|    }

651|7e9d36|    /// Pause/interrupt the running program
652|15cdff|    func pause() async throws {

654|801b8a|            throw RemoteDebuggerError.invalidState
655|5f3077|        }
656|d6ed84|

665|d6ed84|

669|f54d83|    /// Stop/kill the debugged program

681|854069|    /// Attach to a running process by PID
682|72f818|    func attach(toPID pid: Int) async throws {

691|206cd9|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.running))

693|1867e2|        let response = try await sendCommand(command)
694|d6ed84|

696|f4eae6|            throw RemoteDebuggerError.attachFailed(response)

698|d6ed84|        
699|017ddc|        state = .stopped(reason: .unknown)
700|261975|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.stopped(reason: .unknown)))
701|d6ed84|        
702|4f4378|        try await refreshState()
703|27e597|    }

1022|1561ec|    // MARK: - Command Execution
1023|b4687f|    
1024|759f75|    private func sendCommand(_ command: String) async throws -> String {
1025|3d0b9a|        return try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { continuation in
1026|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
1027|465a43|                commandQueue.append((command: command, continuation: continuation))
1028|10518a|                processNextCommand()
1029|a7dc16|            }
1030|5f3077|        }
1031|27e597|    }
1032|b4687f|    
1033|4368a3|    private func sendCommandAsync(_ command: String) async throws -> String {
1034|ad5968|        // For commands that may take a long time (run, continue)
1035|448ca6|        return try await sendCommand(command)
1036|27e597|    }
1037|b4687f|    
1038|50b4f0|    private func processNextCommand() {
1039|6bd30e|        guard !isExecutingCommand, !commandQueue.isEmpty else { return }
1040|d6ed84|        
1041|27bd37|        isExecutingCommand = true
1042|f1ab86|        let (command, continuation) = commandQueue.removeFirst()
1043|d6ed84|        
1044|105625|        outputBuffer = ""
1045|dab9bf|        sshManager?.send(command: command)
1046|d6ed84|        
1047|d03769|        // Set up timeout and response handling
1048|0f1953|        Task {
1049|71cc09|            do {
1050|d28bee|                let response = try await waitForResponse(timeout: 30)
1051|2300fa|                continuation.resume(returning: response)
1052|91b9a2|            } catch {
1053|a814ec|                continuation.resume(throwing: error)
1054|a7dc16|            }
1055|3070d1|            
1056|a6a73d|            await MainActor.run {
1057|7d264d|                isExecutingCommand = false
1058|10518a|                processNextCommand()
1059|a7dc16|            }
1060|5f3077|        }
1061|27e597|    }
1062|b4687f|    
1063|9520a9|    private func waitForResponse(timeout: TimeInterval) async throws -> String {
1064|69a69f|        let startTime = Date()
1065|d6ed84|        
1066|4f641f|        while Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime) < timeout {
1067|1b73fc|            try await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 50_000_000) // 50ms
1068|3070d1|            
1069|6cf9bd|            if outputBuffer.contains(currentPrompt) {
1070|e9deb9|                // Remove the prompt from the output
1071|146a39|                var response = outputBuffer
1072|c2578b|                if let promptRange = response.range(of: currentPrompt, options: .backwards) {
1073|15faaf|                    response = String(response[..<promptRange.lowerBound])
1074|4e2d32|                }
1075|732f8c|                return response.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
1076|a7dc16|            }
1077|5f3077|        }
1078|d6ed84|        
1079|8f404a|        throw RemoteDebuggerError.timeout
1080|27e597|    }
1081|b4687f|    
1082|c9d392|    private func waitForPrompt(timeout: TimeInterval) async throws {
1083|d727cc|        _ = try await waitForResponse(timeout: timeout)
1084|27e597|    }

1090|ce2792|            outputBuffer += text

1092|976414|            emitEvent(.output(text, .debugger))

1095|b4687f|    
1096|e9ea60|    private func appendConsoleOutput(_ text: String) {
1097|f198c0|        let lines = text.split(separator: "\n", omittingEmptySubsequences: false)
1098|08a605|        for line in lines {
1099|5c0bc8|            consoleOutput.append(String(line))
1100|5f3077|        }
1101|4d2d8d|        // Keep console output manageable
1102|76a754|        if consoleOutput.count > 10000 {
1103|b4ef3b|            consoleOutput.removeFirst(consoleOutput.count - 10000)
1104|5f3077|        }
1105|27e597|    }
1106|b4687f|    
1107|7c32b7|    // MARK: - Response Parsing
1108|b4687f|    
1109|25f0fa|    private func parseBreakpointId(from response: String) -> Int {
1110|7ee0c0|        // LLDB: "Breakpoint 1: where = ..."
1111|d42168|        // GDB: "Breakpoint 1 at 0x..."
1112|d6ed84|        
1113|48f8d1|        let patterns = [
1114|7743da|            "Breakpoint (\\d+)",
1115|3519dd|            "breakpoint (\\d+)"
1116|220505|        ]
1117|d6ed84|        
1118|9ac756|        for pattern in patterns {
1119|cb0246|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: .caseInsensitive),
1120|38b6db|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: response, options: [], range: NSRange(response.startIndex..., in: response)),
1121|ae6983|               let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: response) {
1122|189da7|                if let id = Int(response[range]) {
1123|1c079c|                    return id
1124|4e2d32|                }
1125|a7dc16|            }
1126|5f3077|        }
1127|d6ed84|        
1128|65aa41|        // Fallback: assign next ID
1129|9bf732|        let id = nextBreakpointId
1130|de9b30|        nextBreakpointId += 1
1131|ed29b0|        return id
1132|27e597|    }
1133|b4687f|    
1134|3f7268|    private func parseBreakpointList(from response: String) -> [RemoteBreakpoint] {
1135|0a8120|        var breakpoints: [RemoteBreakpoint] = []
1136|133cec|        let lines = response.split(separator: "\n")
1137|d6ed84|        
1138|08a605|        for line in lines {
1139|b9eff3|            // Parse LLDB format: "1: file = 'path', line = 123, ..."
1140|e80223|            // Parse GDB format: "Num Type Disp Enb Address What"
1141|3070d1|            
1142|b1bb82|            if let bp = parseBreakpointLine(String(line)) {
1143|06602b|                breakpoints.append(bp)
1144|a7dc16|            }
1145|5f3077|        }
1146|d6ed84|        
1147|876b40|        return breakpoints
1148|27e597|    }
1149|b4687f|    
1150|9b1c7c|    private func parseBreakpointLine(_ line: String) -> RemoteBreakpoint? {
1151|9df93d|        // LLDB format parsing
1152|b0e524|        if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: "^(\\d+):", options: []),
1153|9353ee|           let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
1154|4e129f|           let idRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
1155|76b673|           let id = Int(line[idRange]) {
1156|3070d1|            
1157|230b05|            var file = ""
1158|5321da|            var lineNum = 0
1159|3070d1|            
1160|0573a1|            // Extract file
1161|a7cfd7|            if let fileRegex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: "file = '([^']+)'", options: []),
1162|e41a54|               let fileMatch = fileRegex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),

1192|b4687f|    
1193|f71024|    private func parseStackFrameLine(_ line: String) -> RemoteStackFrame? {
1194|9f5bff|        // LLDB format: "frame #0: 0x00001234 module`function at file.c:123"
1195|451db9|        // GDB format: "#0  function (args) at file.c:123"
1196|d6ed84|        
1197|92fe98|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, groups: (frame: Int, addr: Int, func: Int, file: Int, line: Int))] = [
1198|66d2a7|            // LLDB
1199|8bae2a|            ("frame #(\\d+): (0x[0-9a-fA-F]+) .*`(.+?) at (.+):(\\d+)", (1, 2, 3, 4, 5)),
1200|ee43c8|            ("frame #(\\d+): (0x[0-9a-fA-F]+) .*`(.+?)$", (1, 2, 3, -1, -1)),
1201|370aaa|            // GDB
1202|399573|            ("#(\\d+)\\s+(.+?) \\(.*\\) at (.+):(\\d+)", (1, -1, 2, 3, 4)),
1203|b83da2|            ("#(\\d+)\\s+(0x[0-9a-fA-F]+) in (.+?) \\(", (1, 2, 3, -1, -1))
1204|220505|        ]
1205|d6ed84|        
1206|f934db|        for (pattern, groups) in patterns {
1207|722270|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
1208|15fdf6|                  let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)) else {
1209|1df510|                continue
1210|a7dc16|            }
1211|3070d1|            
1212|bcc2e4|            func extractGroup(_ index: Int) -> String? {
1213|add2c3|                guard index > 0 && index < match.numberOfRanges,
1214|c65e59|                      let range = Range(match.range(at: index), in: line) else {
1215|024b84|                    return nil
1216|4e2d32|                }
1217|3028ad|                return String(line[range])
1218|a7dc16|            }
1219|3070d1|            
1220|49e101|            guard let frameIndexStr = extractGroup(groups.frame),
1221|64ea33|                  let frameIndex = Int(frameIndexStr) else {
1222|1df510|                continue
1223|a7dc16|            }
1224|3070d1|            
1225|2a8566|            let address = extractGroup(groups.addr) ?? "0x0"
1226|988837|            let function = extractGroup(groups.func) ?? "<unknown>"
1227|d71232|            let file = extractGroup(groups.file)
1228|7d31f8|            let lineNum = extractGroup(groups.line).flatMap { Int($0) }
1229|3070d1|            
1230|9eb0cc|            return RemoteStackFrame(
1231|1ac312|                id: frameIndex,
1232|8c6436|                function: function,
1233|18a4fa|                file: file,
1234|de1548|                line: lineNum,
1235|6e4d0b|                address: address,
1236|e5e365|                module: nil,
1237|dba1a8|                arguments: []
1238|43d041|            )
1239|5f3077|        }
1240|d6ed84|        
1241|c2ae65|        return nil
1242|27e597|    }

1260|d6ed84|

21|fe2801|/// Thread-safe LRU cache for inline code suggestions with TTL expiration
22|e5ec5c|/// Maximum 100 entries, 5 minute expiration
23|4db88e|final class SuggestionCache {
24|f620b3|    // MARK: - Constants
25|b4687f|    
26|21ee5c|    static let maxEntries = 100
27|d2414b|    static let expirationInterval: TimeInterval = 300 // 5 minutes
28|b4687f|    
29|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
30|b4687f|    
31|34e47f|    private var cache: [String: CacheEntry] = [:]
32|48d9ba|    /// Ordered list to track LRU access order (least recently used at the beginning)
33|830760|    private var lruOrder: [String] = []
34|b4687f|    
35|dd918f|    /// Thread-safe queue for cache operations using concurrent queue with barriers
36|a3a1ae|    private let cacheQueue = DispatchQueue(label: "com.vscodeipados.suggestioncache", attributes: .concurrent)
37|b4687f|    
38|db9bbb|    // MARK: - Singleton

44|fb9d4d|    // MARK: - Key Generation
45|b4687f|    
46|938b88|    /// Generates a SHA256 hash from the code context string
47|62811f|    /// - Parameter context: The code context to hash
48|d02457|    /// - Returns: A hex-encoded SHA256 hash string
49|233ae6|    private func hashContext(_ context: String) -> String {
50|ab8594|        let data = Data(context.utf8)
51|97a5e1|        var hash = [UInt8](repeating: 0, count: Int(CC_SHA256_DIGEST_LENGTH))
52|3e64b0|        _ = data.withUnsafeBytes { bytes in
53|3e6f69|            CC_SHA256(bytes.baseAddress, CC_LONG(data.count), &hash)
54|5f3077|        }
55|f6441a|        return hash.map { String(format: "%02hhx", $0) }.joined()
56|27e597|    }
57|b4687f|    
58|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
59|b4687f|    
60|033bf4|    /// Retrieves a cached suggestion for the given code context if it exists and hasn't expired.
61|c435d3|    /// Updates LRU order on successful retrieval.
62|112b9c|    /// - Parameter context: The code context string to look up
63|6d9dea|    /// - Returns: The cached suggestion string, or nil if not found or expired
64|5ba297|    func get(context: String) -> String? {
65|a9c444|        let key = hashContext(context)
66|d6ed84|        
67|98f033|        return cacheQueue.sync {
68|9d266a|            guard let entry = cache[key] else {
69|15034a|                return nil
70|a7dc16|            }
71|3070d1|            
72|2f14e2|            // Check if entry has expired
73|e16ac4|            if entry.isExpired {
74|89aad4|                // Remove expired entry
75|185e7a|                cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
76|8d693c|                removeFromLRU(key)
77|15034a|                return nil
78|a7dc16|            }
79|3070d1|            
80|bff744|            // Update LRU order - move to end (most recently used)
81|960881|            updateLRUOrder(key)
82|3070d1|            
83|c5897e|            return entry.suggestion
84|5f3077|        }
85|27e597|    }
86|b4687f|    
87|c07d11|    /// Stores a suggestion for the given code context in the cache.
88|94f7ba|    /// Evicts oldest entry if cache is at max capacity.
89|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
90|3b7936|    ///   - context: The code context string (used as cache key via SHA256 hash)
91|0e56d7|    ///   - suggestion: The AI suggestion to cache
92|682096|    func set(context: String, suggestion: String) {
93|a9c444|        let key = hashContext(context)
94|d6ed84|        
95|2eb06b|        cacheQueue.async(flags: .barrier) { [weak self] in
96|2baf81|            guard let self = self else { return }
97|3070d1|            
98|48bad1|            // Create new entry with TTL
99|464f63|            let entry = CacheEntry(
100|47deb4|                suggestion: suggestion,
101|95552d|                contextHash: key,
102|3a2d94|                ttl: Self.expirationInterval
103|43d041|            )
104|3070d1|            
105|9c2fb2|            // Check if this is an update to existing entry
106|1b247c|            if self.cache[key] != nil {
107|b09099|                // Update existing entry
108|04cd95|                self.cache[key] = entry
109|664568|                self.updateLRUOrder(key)
110|f5a6eb|            } else {
111|a4567b|                // Check if we need to evict oldest entry
112|20b4bf|                if self.cache.count >= Self.maxEntries {
113|f4766d|                    self.evictLRUEntry()
114|4e2d32|                }
115|216278|                
116|e926f1|                // Add new entry
117|04cd95|                self.cache[key] = entry
118|d4d7a7|                self.lruOrder.append(key)
119|a7dc16|            }
120|5f3077|        }
121|27e597|    }
122|b4687f|    
123|06e36f|    /// Clears all entries from the cache.
124|5416f6|    func clear() {
125|2eb06b|        cacheQueue.async(flags: .barrier) { [weak self] in
126|1e7e79|            self?.cache.removeAll()
127|a434d2|            self?.lruOrder.removeAll()
128|5f3077|        }
129|27e597|    }
130|b4687f|    
131|81a958|    // MARK: - Private Helpers
132|b4687f|    
133|e268ba|    /// Removes a key from the LRU order tracking
134|9850b8|    private func removeFromLRU(_ key: String) {
135|acf9f5|        lruOrder.removeAll { $0 == key }
136|27e597|    }
137|b4687f|    
138|4e5908|    /// Updates LRU order by moving the accessed key to the end (most recently used)
139|e5b0f9|    private func updateLRUOrder(_ key: String) {
140|33983e|        removeFromLRU(key)
141|b3c36a|        lruOrder.append(key)
142|27e597|    }
143|b4687f|    
144|1d8cd3|    /// Evicts the least recently used entry from the cache
145|9bba21|    private func evictLRUEntry() {
146|1374a3|        guard !lruOrder.isEmpty else { return }
147|d6ed84|

162|8d693c|                removeFromLRU(key)
163|a7dc16|            }
164|27c5f5|            return cache.count
165|5f3077|        }
166|27e597|    }

2|adc83b|
3|6505f2|/// A lightweight inlay-hints engine used to show inline type annotations.
4|63c993|///
5|18e543|/// Scope (FEAT-133):
6|1f06c1|/// - Detect simple Swift variable declarations without explicit types.
7|6b0114|/// - Infer basic types from the initializer expression.
8|b1b02e|/// - Return hint objects with line/column + a display string (e.g. ": Int").
9|4f8cca|final class InlayHintsManager {
10|5960e0|    static let shared = InlayHintsManager()
11|54113e|    private init() {}
12|adc83b|
13|d9f5b5|    // MARK: - Models
14|adc83b|
15|14e2da|    struct InlayHint: Identifiable, Equatable {
16|d16339|        let id = UUID()
17|adc83b|
18|7a2975|        /// 0-based line index.
19|c0eddc|        let line: Int
20|adc83b|
21|efa22a|        /// 0-based UTF16 column index within the line.
22|1b9532|        let column: Int
23|adc83b|
24|c52f44|        /// Render-ready hint text (e.g. ": Int").
25|aa57fc|        let text: String
26|27e597|    }
27|adc83b|
28|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
29|adc83b|
30|2ce197|    func hints(for code: String, language: CodeLanguage) -> [InlayHint] {
31|b95802|        guard language == .swift else { return [] }
32|bb2b0b|        return swiftTypeHints(for: code)
33|27e597|    }
34|adc83b|
35|52c601|    // MARK: - Swift parsing
36|adc83b|
37|16c9d6|    private func swiftTypeHints(for code: String) -> [InlayHint] {
38|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
39|46c824|        var result: [InlayHint] = []
40|adc83b|
41|225f78|        // Matches:
42|e2c046|        //   let x = 5
43|2cac4f|        //   var name = "abc"
44|21217b|        // Avoids explicit type annotations because the pattern does not accept `:` before `=`.
45|49e410|        let pattern = "^\\s*(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.+)$"
46|72432c|        let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [])
47|adc83b|
48|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
49|cbe876|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
50|9b2e7c|            guard !trimmed.hasPrefix("//"), !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
51|adc83b|
52|18a8aa|            let nsLine = line as NSString
53|89c109|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsLine.length)
54|c471d9|            guard let match = regex?.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: range) else { continue }
55|ad3867|            guard match.numberOfRanges >= 3 else { continue }
56|adc83b|
57|423174|            let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
58|3c5579|            let rhsRange = match.range(at: 2)
59|7a7150|            if nameRange.location == NSNotFound || rhsRange.location == NSNotFound { continue }
60|adc83b|
61|165da4|            // Basic sanity checks: ignore tuple bindings like `let (a, b) = ...`
62|679645|            let name = nsLine.substring(with: nameRange)
63|5c9927|            guard !name.isEmpty else { continue }
64|adc83b|
65|666b05|            // RHS, stripped of trailing `//` comments (naive but practical).
66|53413c|            var rhs = nsLine.substring(with: rhsRange)
67|8beea4|            if let commentRange = rhs.range(of: "//") {
68|a56309|                rhs = String(rhs[..<commentRange.lowerBound])
69|a7dc16|            }
70|107569|            rhs = rhs.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
71|adc83b|
72|8f6e07|            // Infer a type. If we can’t infer, don’t create a hint.
73|992808|            guard let inferred = inferSwiftType(from: rhs) else { continue }
74|adc83b|
75|ed8c63|            // Column for hint placement = end of identifier.
76|f4b52b|            let hintColumn = nameRange.location + nameRange.length
77|32af9e|            result.append(InlayHint(line: lineIndex, column: hintColumn, text: ": \(inferred)"))
78|5f3077|        }
79|adc83b|
80|67ed82|        return result
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|014518|    // MARK: - Swift type inference (basic)
84|adc83b|
85|e4ea7a|    private func inferSwiftType(from rawExpression: String) -> String? {
86|3784b4|        let expr = rawExpression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
87|a14679|        guard !expr.isEmpty else { return nil }
88|adc83b|
89|ea35f3|        // Bool
90|62989c|        if expr == "true" || expr == "false" { return "Bool" }
91|adc83b|
92|5f3b7c|        // String literal (simple)
93|553d7e|        if expr.hasPrefix("\"") { return "String" }
94|adc83b|
95|f70754|        // Numeric: Int
96|b5aa27|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+$") { return "Int" }
97|f87d78|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+$") { return "Int" }
98|212646|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0b[01]+$") { return "Int" }
99|d18d43|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0o[0-7]+$") { return "Int" }
100|adc83b|
101|e6218e|        // Numeric: Double (Swift defaults floating-point literals to Double)
102|53b861|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+\\.\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)?$") { return "Double" }
103|71e012|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)$") { return "Double" }
104|adc83b|
105|69d592|        // Array / Dictionary literals
106|20ec44|        if expr.hasPrefix("[") {
107|ce2ebb|            if let dictType = inferDictionaryType(from: expr) { return dictType }
108|f27fb4|            if let arrayType = inferArrayType(from: expr) { return arrayType }
109|5f3077|        }
110|adc83b|
111|c1c62e|        // Constructor-looking calls: `TypeName(...)` (biased toward UpperCamelCase types)
112|c8a287|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(") {
113|7cdb04|            return typeName
114|5f3077|        }
115|adc83b|
116|9ff15e|        // Enum/static member: `TypeName.member`
117|7c8b37|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\.[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") {
118|7cdb04|            return typeName
119|5f3077|        }
120|adc83b|
121|c2ae65|        return nil
122|27e597|    }
123|adc83b|
124|ebc532|    private func inferArrayType(from expr: String) -> String? {
125|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
126|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
127|adc83b|
128|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
129|4d16d8|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[Any]" }
130|adc83b|
131|bdbc65|        // Take the first top-level element (naive: split by comma).
132|51ddab|        let firstPart = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first
133|3197f4|        guard let first = firstPart.map(String.init)?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines), !first.isEmpty else {
134|88e905|            return "[Any]"
135|5f3077|        }
136|adc83b|
137|e844da|        if let elementType = inferSwiftType(from: first) {
138|655e59|            return "[\(elementType)]"
139|5f3077|        }
140|adc83b|
141|77d208|        return "[Any]"
142|27e597|    }
143|adc83b|
144|f7b9b1|    private func inferDictionaryType(from expr: String) -> String? {
145|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
146|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
147|adc83b|
148|85eff8|        // Fast check: dictionary literals must contain `:` somewhere.
149|8a247d|        guard trimmed.contains(":") else { return nil }
150|adc83b|
151|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|be74cb|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[AnyHashable: Any]" }
153|adc83b|
154|141281|        // Grab the first `key: value` pair (naive: up to first comma).
155|53580e|        let firstPair = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first.map(String.init) ?? ""
156|2ae14f|        guard let colonIndex = firstPair.firstIndex(of: ":") else { return nil }
157|adc83b|
158|90fe28|        let keyExpr = String(firstPair[..<colonIndex]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
159|c8c196|        let valueExpr = String(firstPair[firstPair.index(after: colonIndex)...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
160|adc83b|
161|28ea5b|        let keyType = inferSwiftType(from: keyExpr) ?? "AnyHashable"
162|eb3fdd|        let valueType = inferSwiftType(from: valueExpr) ?? "Any"
163|31573c|        return "[\(keyType): \(valueType)]"
164|27e597|    }

167|adc83b|
168|3efaff|    private func matches(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
169|695372|        (try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []))?.firstMatch(
170|7697e1|            in: text,
171|11ba8c|            options: [],
172|264c2c|            range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (text as NSString).length)
173|d36f78|        ) != nil
174|27e597|    }
175|adc83b|
176|133a2e|    private func firstRegexGroup(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> String? {
177|473ca5|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
178|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
179|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
180|090ffd|        guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: text, options: [], range: range), match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return nil }
181|5ad252|        let r = match.range(at: 1)
182|8bd644|        guard r.location != NSNotFound else { return nil }
183|2550a5|        return ns.substring(with: r)
184|27e597|    }

1354|15b17b|    private func parseThreadList(from response: String) -> [(id: Int, name: String, isCurrent: Bool)] {
1355|1868da|        var threads: [(id: Int, name: String, isCurrent: Bool)] = []
1356|133cec|        let lines = response.split(separator: "\n")
1357|d6ed84|        
1358|08a605|        for line in lines {
1359|5f4930|            let lineStr = String(line)
1360|a02438|            let isCurrent = lineStr.contains("*")
1361|3070d1|            
1362|0e49a9|            // LLDB: "* thread #1, name = 'main', ..."
1363|a84f9f|            // GDB: "* 1 Thread 0x... \"name\""
1364|3070d1|            
1365|0588bd|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: "thread #?(\\d+)", options: .caseInsensitive),
1366|fed722|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: lineStr, options: [], range: NSRange(lineStr.startIndex..., in: lineStr)),
1367|ace77c|               let idRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: lineStr),
1368|c609fe|               let id = Int(lineStr[idRange]) {
1369|216278|                
1370|4bea88|                var name = "Thread \(id)"
1371|359287|                if let nameRegex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: "name\\s*=\\s*'([^']+)'", options: []),
1372|bb0917|                   let nameMatch = nameRegex.firstMatch(in: lineStr, options: [], range: NSRange(lineStr.startIndex..., in: lineStr)),
1373|ce3ea7|                   let nameRange = Range(nameMatch.range(at: 1), in: lineStr) {
1374|45cfe7|                    name = String(lineStr[nameRange])
1375|4e2d32|                }
1376|216278|                
1377|33f305|                threads.append((id: id, name: name, isCurrent: isCurrent))
1378|a7dc16|            }
1379|5f3077|        }
1380|d6ed84|        
1381|6ef012|        return threads
1382|27e597|    }

1384|b628e4|    private func handleStopResponse(_ response: String) {
1385|f44c79|        // Determine stop reason from response
1386|845fd9|        var reason: RemoteDebuggerState.StopReason = .unknown
1387|d6ed84|        
1388|155ca1|        if response.contains("breakpoint") {
1389|224498|            // Extract breakpoint ID
1390|cc2b0e|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: "breakpoint (\\d+)", options: .caseInsensitive),
1391|38b6db|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: response, options: [], range: NSRange(response.startIndex..., in: response)),
1392|771146|               let idRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: response),
1393|439629|               let id = Int(response[idRange]) {
1394|39632b|                reason = .breakpoint(id: id)
1395|a7dc16|            }
1396|394c60|        } else if response.contains("signal") || response.contains("SIGINT") || response.contains("SIGSEGV") {
1397|b5fed7|            let signalPattern = "SIG[A-Z]+"
1398|95fd0c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: signalPattern, options: []),

1400|56c0a8|               let signalRange = Range(match.range, in: response) {
1401|b71be9|                reason = .signal(name: String(response[signalRange]))
1402|a7dc16|            }
1403|b56329|        } else if response.contains("step") {
1404|f1f4b9|            reason = .step
1405|57a4bc|        } else if response.contains("watchpoint") {
1406|77b9ca|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: "watchpoint (\\d+)", options: .caseInsensitive),
1407|38b6db|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: response, options: [], range: NSRange(response.startIndex..., in: response)),
1408|771146|               let idRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: response),
1409|439629|               let id = Int(response[idRange]) {
1410|1f64de|                reason = .watchpoint(id: id)
1411|a7dc16|            }
1412|9955eb|        } else if response.contains("exited") || response.contains("terminated") {
1413|3938f1|            state = .terminated
1414|c51fa7|            emitEvent(.stateChanged(.terminated))
1415|bef5d6|            return
1416|5f3077|        }
1417|d6ed84|        
1418|5d9fad|        state = .stopped(reason: reason)
1419|10e327|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.stopped(reason: reason)))
1420|27e597|    }

4|910fc8|/// Manages inline code suggestions with debouncing, throttling, and cancellation support.
5|a3a85a|/// Uses Combine operators to prevent excessive API calls while maintaining responsive UX.
6|e0ad8a|///

8|59449b|/// 1. User types → typingSubject receives event
9|4129a0|/// 2. Cancel any pending request immediately (prevent stale results)

13|b648e9|/// 6. Fetch: Execute API request with cancellation support

135|f889c3|    /// 2. Updates the cursor position

176|144775|    @discardableResult

194|df48c9|        let endIndex = suggestion.index(startIndex, offsetBy: charsToAccept)

224|049941|    // MARK: - Private Methods
225|b4687f|    
226|886d26|    /// Sets up the Combine pipeline with debounce and throttle operators.
227|7cfeb1|    /// 
228|2302ea|    /// Pipeline flow:
229|fcd00b|    /// 1. typingSubject receives events
230|a7ce76|    /// 2. debounce(0.3s): Wait 300ms after user stops typing
231|a5971a|    /// 3. throttle(2.0s): Max 1 event per 2 seconds (latest=true for responsive updates)
232|c17292|    /// 4. removeDuplicates: Filter identical events
233|627455|    /// 5. filter: Remove empty/unworthy contexts
234|6f85e6|    /// 6. flatMap: Execute async fetch with cancellation support
235|2181d5|    private func setupSuggestionPipeline() {
236|ca13c2|        pipelineCancellable = typingSubject
237|0245e4|            // STEP 1: DEBOUNCE (300ms)
238|70cff9|            // Wait 300ms after user stops typing before processing
239|d9fce5|            // This prevents firing requests while user is actively typing
240|84dd17|            .debounce(for: .seconds(debounceInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main)
241|3070d1|            
242|89fc5a|            // STEP 2: THROTTLE (2 seconds)
243|dbb01b|            // Maximum 1 request per 2 seconds
244|bce2c6|            // latest=true ensures we get the most recent event if multiple occur within throttle window
245|ecc467|            .throttle(for: .seconds(throttleInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main, latest: true)
246|3070d1|            
247|844254|            // STEP 3: REMOVE DUPLICATES
248|413909|            // Filter out events with identical content and position
249|0a99da|            // This prevents duplicate API calls for the same context
250|cf49b3|            .removeDuplicates()
251|3070d1|            
252|202ed6|            // STEP 4: FILTER WORTHY CONTEXTS
253|a23af6|            // Only proceed if we have meaningful content to get suggestions for
254|845b1e|            .filter { [weak self] event in
255|06905f|                guard let self = self else { return false }
256|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
257|cc659b|                return self.shouldRequestSuggestion(context: context)
258|a7dc16|            }
259|3070d1|            
260|339920|            // STEP 5: FLATMAP TO ASYNC FETCH
261|2bc815|            // Transform each event into a publisher that fetches suggestions
262|dbc22b|            // This creates a new async context that can be cancelled
263|11fcbf|            .flatMap { [weak self] event -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> in
264|ec615d|                guard let self = self else {
265|6156c3|                    return Just(nil).eraseToAnyPublisher()
266|4e2d32|                }
267|216278|                
268|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
269|6830af|                return self.createFetchPublisher(for: context)
270|a7dc16|            }
271|4de6c5|            // Ensure we receive on main thread for UI updates
272|a8597a|            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
273|1051e2|            .sink { [weak self] suggestion in
274|518c9e|                self?.currentSuggestion = suggestion
275|02c979|                self?.isLoading = false
276|a7dc16|            }
277|27e597|    }
278|b4687f|    
279|984754|    /// Creates a Combine publisher that performs the async suggestion fetch.
280|f2b66e|    /// This allows the fetch to be cancelled when new events arrive.
281|4c0331|    private func createFetchPublisher(for context: SuggestionContext) -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> {
282|c401a0|        // Cancel any existing fetch task
283|f12123|        fetchTask?.cancel()
284|d6ed84|        
285|1c5d21|        // Create new async task for fetching
286|6b1f07|        let task = Task { [weak self] () -> String? in
287|8c11f0|            guard let self = self else { return nil }
288|3070d1|            
289|a6a73d|            await MainActor.run {
290|7494b5|                self.isLoading = true
291|db594a|                self.lastError = nil
292|a7dc16|            }
293|3070d1|            
294|71cc09|            do {
295|88792d|                // Perform the actual fetch
296|5f8cb1|                let suggestion = try await self.fetchSuggestion(for: context)
297|216278|                
298|056141|                // Check if cancelled before updating UI
299|ac578d|                try Task.checkCancellation()
300|d0b7e3|                return suggestion
301|57e5c6|            } catch is CancellationError {
302|9f1433|                // Task was cancelled - return nil silently
303|15034a|                return nil
304|91b9a2|            } catch {
305|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
306|98968a|                    self.lastError = error
307|4e2d32|                }
308|15034a|                return nil
309|a7dc16|            }
310|5f3077|        }
311|d6ed84|        
312|5854c9|        fetchTask = task
313|d6ed84|        
314|544041|        // Convert the async task to a publisher
315|5c40d7|        return Future<String?, Never> { promise in
316|47ed67|            Task {
317|458ee4|                let result = await task.value
318|67db9f|                promise(.success(result))
319|a7dc16|            }
320|5f3077|        }

353|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
354|d6ed84|        
355|781fff|        // Get current line
356|f4fd53|        let currentLineIndex = min(position.line, max(0, lines.count - 1))
357|35c41a|        let currentLine = lines.indices.contains(currentLineIndex) ? lines[currentLineIndex] : ""
358|d6ed84|        
359|2e5ac5|        // Get preceding code (all lines before current)
360|93d93c|        let precedingLines = lines.prefix(currentLineIndex)
361|ba8451|        let precedingCode = precedingLines.joined(separator: "\n")
362|d6ed84|        
363|d09899|        // Detect language from file extension or content (placeholder)
364|d3169b|        let language = detectLanguage(from: content)
365|d6ed84|        
366|a185cb|        return SuggestionContext(
367|d52293|            currentLine: currentLine,
368|5ee51b|            precedingCode: precedingCode,
369|567a23|            cursorPosition: position,
370|82f146|            language: language
371|3143a4|        )

379|d6ed84|        
380|0f82fd|        if content.contains("import Swift") || content.contains("func ") && content.contains("->") {
381|99935c|            return "swift"

393|df8f21|    private func shouldRequestSuggestion(context: SuggestionContext) -> Bool {
394|7b378b|        // Don't suggest on empty lines unless there's preceding context
395|8778db|        if context.currentLine.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).isEmpty {
396|84cc0e|            return !context.precedingCode.isEmpty
397|5f3077|        }
398|d6ed84|

400|040d23|        let minContextLength = 10
401|3e1d44|        let totalContextLength = context.precedingCode.count + context.currentLine.count
402|d6ed84|        
403|390255|        return totalContextLength >= minContextLength
404|27e597|    }
