406|691d16|    // MARK: - Word Boundary Helpers for Partial Accept
407|b4687f|    
408|a4030c|    /// Finds the end position of the next word in the given text.
409|11fe08|    /// A word is defined as a sequence of characters up to and including:
410|bb7830|    /// - The next whitespace character (space, tab, newline)
411|0c3e7d|    /// - The end of the punctuation after a word
412|72b3cd|    /// - The next punctuation boundary
413|7924b5|    private func findNextWordEnd(in text: String) -> Int {
414|97b6e3|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 0 }
415|d6ed84|        
416|e21158|        let characters = Array(text)
417|ef04de|        var position = 0
418|d6ed84|        
419|12514b|        // Skip leading whitespace (accept it as part of the word if present)
420|3aa0c3|        var leadingWhitespaceCount = 0
421|d475df|        while position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
422|f0583e|            position += 1
423|7de75f|            leadingWhitespaceCount += 1
424|5f3077|        }
425|d6ed84|        
426|a4acf3|        // If we only had whitespace, return that
427|71ca00|        if position >= characters.count {
428|b99609|            return position
429|5f3077|        }
430|d6ed84|        
431|c2a7bd|        // Get the current character type
432|39bbe7|        let firstChar = characters[position]
433|d6ed84|        
434|8f8367|        if firstChar.isLetter || firstChar.isNumber {
435|b722f9|            // Word character: consume all word characters
436|02eced|            while position < characters.count && (characters[position].isLetter || characters[position].isNumber) {
437|de2813|                position += 1
438|a7dc16|            }
439|3070d1|            
440|d4a201|            // Also consume any trailing punctuation attached to the word (like "word.")
441|4f05d1|            while position < characters.count && isWordPunctuation(characters[position]) {
442|de2813|                position += 1
443|a7dc16|            }
444|3070d1|            
445|0c75aa|            // Include trailing whitespace after the word (just one space)
446|5b0346|            if position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
447|de2813|                position += 1
448|a7dc16|            }
449|7a1786|        } else if isPunctuation(firstChar) {
450|1a436e|            // Punctuation: consume all consecutive punctuation
451|d5ff38|            while position < characters.count && isPunctuation(characters[position]) {
452|de2813|                position += 1
453|a7dc16|            }
454|3070d1|            
455|c673d1|            // Include trailing whitespace (just one space)
456|5b0346|            if position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
457|de2813|                position += 1
458|a7dc16|            }
459|5c9934|        } else if firstChar.isWhitespace {
460|9874c8|            // Multiple whitespace: accept all consecutive whitespace
461|b51034|            while position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
462|de2813|                position += 1
463|a7dc16|            }
464|b31999|        } else {
465|1cc2f4|            // Other characters: just consume one character
466|f0583e|            position += 1
467|5f3077|        }
468|d6ed84|        
469|9a857a|        // Ensure we always accept at least one non-whitespace character
470|792181|        // or all leading whitespace if that's all there is
471|01985b|        return max(position, leadingWhitespaceCount > 0 ? leadingWhitespaceCount : 1)
472|27e597|    }
473|b4687f|    
474|fdb5d7|    /// Checks if a character is punctuation that can be part of a word (like period, comma, etc.)
475|afa9e9|    private func isWordPunctuation(_ char: Character) -> Bool {
476|f80730|        let wordPunctuation = CharacterSet(charactersIn: ".,;:!?-_'")
477|732148|        guard let scalar = char.unicodeScalars.first else { return false }
478|725015|        return wordPunctuation.contains(scalar)

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String

227|56198f|        let isMemberCompletion: Bool
228|79772b|        let memberBase: String?

230|adc83b|
231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }
348|b31277|}
349|adc83b|
350|c6407f|// MARK: - Safe Array Access
351|adc83b|
352|d72239|private extension Array {
353|686e51|    subscript(safe index: Int) -> Element? {
354|0b415a|        indices.contains(index) ? self[index] : nil
355|27e597|    }

285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions

296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {

305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil

353|763883|    private func detectDeclaration(_ line: String) -> (type: FoldRegion.FoldType, label: String)? {
354|3ccee6|        func matchName(pattern: String) -> String? {
355|6cc0c4|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
356|f2f390|            guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
357|ebf922|                  match.numberOfRanges >= 2,
358|762e94|                  let r = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
359|f5f042|            else { return nil }
360|480e4a|            return String(line[r])
361|5f3077|        }
362|adc83b|
363|f67078|        // Allow leading attributes like "@MainActor", "@available(...)"
364|0c5ed8|        // Allow common modifiers in any order (best-effort).
365|ca2c54|        let prefix = #"^(?:\s*@\w+(?:\([^\)]*\))?\s+)*(?:\s*(?:public|private|internal|fileprivate|open|final|indirect|lazy|static|override|mutating|nonmutating)\s+)*"#
366|adc83b|
367|cf49c1|        // IMPORTANT: avoid treating "class func"/"class var" as a type declaration.
368|e1fc33|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"class\s+(?!func\b|var\b|let\b)([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
369|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
370|5f3077|        }
371|adc83b|
372|8d6e9b|        // Actor (Swift concurrency) – fold like a class/struct
373|8d98f9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"actor\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
374|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
375|5f3077|        }
376|adc83b|
377|c629a9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"struct\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
378|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
379|5f3077|        }
380|adc83b|
381|75283c|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"enum\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
382|0f57db|            return (.enumDeclaration, name)
383|5f3077|        }
384|adc83b|
385|bb35e5|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"protocol\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
386|982dbc|            return (.protocolDeclaration, name)
387|5f3077|        }
388|adc83b|
389|940527|        // Extensions can include dotted names (Foo.Bar)
390|b2a8c3|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"extension\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.]*)"#) {
391|fbf8d2|            return (.extension, name)

393|adc83b|
394|c2ae65|        return nil

397|a1a6f6|    private func detectFunction(_ line: String) -> String? {
398|d7dbc1|        // Function detection with visibility modifiers

407|9e61c1|               let nameRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {

411|2d3254|                    let params = String(line[parenStart...parenEnd])

413|4e2d32|                }
414|8aa06e|                return functionName
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|

419|a1d502|        if let initName = extractName(from: line, prefix: "init", visibility: visibilityKeywords) {
420|3d8f8b|            return "\(initName)"

5|6486b8|// MARK: - CodeExecutionService
6|adc83b|
7|260b9d|/// Service that handles code execution requests from the Run menu.
8|f40e11|/// Routes execution to appropriate runners based on file type and outputs results to the Output panel.
9|69d728|@MainActor
10|a43a38|final class CodeExecutionService {
11|6dc112|    static let shared = CodeExecutionService()
12|b4687f|    
13|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
14|b4687f|    
15|37bd08|    private var jsRunner: JSRunner?
16|33c15c|    private let outputManager = OutputPanelManager.shared
17|b4687f|    
18|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
19|b4687f|    
20|54113e|    private init() {}
21|b4687f|    
22|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
23|b4687f|    
24|d148d5|    /// Execute the currently active file
25|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
26|4cfe18|    ///   - fileName: Name of the file to execute
27|13e212|    ///   - content: Content/code of the file
28|97d12a|    func executeCurrentFile(fileName: String, content: String) {
29|cc9311|        let fileExtension = (fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
30|d6ed84|        
31|2eea91|        switch fileExtension {
32|ff039a|        case "js", "mjs":
33|760a4e|            executeJavaScript(fileName: fileName, code: content)
34|048ca0|        case "ts", "tsx":
35|b896b9|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] TypeScript execution requires transpilation. Coming soon!", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
36|de8aa1|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
37|e1d221|        case "py":
38|9e2a3c|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] Python execution not yet available on-device.", to: OutputChannel.python, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
39|25499b|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.python
40|520b7d|        default:
41|cc7290|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] No runner available for .\(fileExtension) files", to: OutputChannel.output, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
42|c75b79|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.output
43|5f3077|        }
44|27e597|    }
45|b4687f|    
46|9b6f68|    // MARK: - JavaScript Execution
47|b4687f|    
48|d76b7d|    private func executeJavaScript(fileName: String, code: String) {
49|0dec37|        // Switch to JavaScript output channel
50|e39e9c|        outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
51|d6ed84|        
52|a728d5|        // Clear previous output and show execution header
53|1511a8|        outputManager.clear(OutputChannel.javascript)
54|6cfb10|        outputManager.append("▶ Running: \(fileName)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
55|89174a|        outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
56|d6ed84|        
57|a3f62b|        // Create a fresh JSRunner instance
58|462f68|        jsRunner = JSRunner()
59|d6ed84|        
60|e61664|        // Set up console handler to capture output
61|305ad3|        jsRunner?.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
62|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
63|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
64|216278|                
65|b169c6|                // Determine stream type based on message prefix
66|27b18b|                let streamType: StreamType = message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") || message.hasPrefix("[EXCEPTION]") ? StreamType.stderr : StreamType.stdout
67|216278|                
68|4b39b7|                // Remove the prefix for cleaner output display
69|62636a|                var cleanMessage = message
70|121995|                for prefix in ["[LOG] ", "[INFO] ", "[WARN] ", "[ERROR] ", "[EXCEPTION] "] {
71|1df682|                    if message.hasPrefix(prefix) {
72|11af1f|                        cleanMessage = String(message.dropFirst(prefix.count))
73|28a64b|                        break
74|c9717a|                    }
75|4e2d32|                }
76|216278|                
77|6a3616|                self.outputManager.append(cleanMessage, to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: streamType)
78|a7dc16|            }
79|5f3077|        }
80|d6ed84|        
81|5a9195|        // Execute the code asynchronously
82|0f1953|        Task {
83|073be0|            let startTime = Date()
84|3070d1|            
85|71cc09|            do {
86|f3a1fd|                let result = try await jsRunner?.execute(code: code)
87|1ee120|                let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
88|216278|                
89|73b1fb|                // Show result if it's not undefined
90|f23508|                if let result = result, !result.isUndefined {
91|8a7075|                    let resultString = formatJSValue(result)
92|174733|                    outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
93|1c40a4|                    outputManager.append("⮐ Result: \(resultString)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
94|4e2d32|                }
95|216278|                
96|b2c6e7|                // Show completion message
97|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
98|2c8c65|                outputManager.append("✓ Completed in \(String(format: "%.2f", duration * 1000))ms", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
99|216278|                
100|77a0dc|            } catch let error as JSRunnerError {
101|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
102|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
103|216278|                
104|91b9a2|            } catch {
105|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
106|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
107|a7dc16|            }
108|3070d1|            
109|eb797f|            // Clean up runner
110|e9e019|            jsRunner = nil
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }
113|b4687f|    
114|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
115|b4687f|    
116|7aa5bd|    /// Format a JSValue for display
117|e68bfd|    private func formatJSValue(_ value: JSValue) -> String {
118|c903ed|        if value.isNull {
119|c04d4d|            return "null"
120|35d02e|        } else if value.isUndefined {
121|b32932|            return "undefined"
122|edfa6b|        } else if value.isBoolean {
123|1a76ee|            return value.toBool() ? "true" : "false"
124|4e414f|        } else if value.isNumber {
125|9abc83|            let num = value.toNumber()
126|d3fc6f|            // Check if it's an integer
127|a09f20|            if let n = num, n.doubleValue == Double(n.intValue) {
128|ee9ad8|                return "\(n.intValue)"
129|a7dc16|            }
130|64a140|            return "\(num?.doubleValue ?? 0)"
131|419991|        } else if value.isString {
132|7c8a45|            return "\"\(value.toString() ?? "")\""
133|a72377|        } else if value.isArray {
134|d7f252|            if let array = value.toArray() {
135|c35363|                return "[\(array.map { "\($0)" }.joined(separator: ", "))]"
136|a7dc16|            }
137|976c47|            return "[]"
138|bb3c98|        } else if value.isObject {
139|b4fae0|            if let dict = value.toDictionary() {
140|ee1ab7|                let json = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
141|a9b0f4|                if let json = json, let str = String(data: json, encoding: .utf8) {
142|cfed56|                    return str
143|4e2d32|                }
144|a7dc16|            }
145|0b436d|            return value.toString() ?? "[object]"
146|5f3077|        }
147|bbc620|        return value.toString() ?? "undefined"
148|27e597|    }
149|b31277|}
150|adc83b|

773|f5af03|    /// Toggles the fold state at a specific line for a specific file

775|b6ac8b|        guard var regions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] else { return }
776|d6ed84|

785|f5a6eb|            } else {

790|05b9d6|            // Save state after toggling

346|2b9817|    func startDebugging(code: String, fileName: String, fileId: String) {

348|96e590|        consoleEntries.removeAll()
349|f75c5d|        callStack.removeAll()
350|ad2751|        variables.removeAll()

361|220505|        ]

363|481302|        state = .running
364|d6ed84|        
365|fabbcb|        // Run JavaScript with JSRunner
366|0f1953|        Task {
367|78f5a7|            let runner = JSRunner()
368|3070d1|            
369|80530a|            // Capture console output
370|2bcb08|            runner.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
371|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
372|9e6003|                    guard let self = self else { return }
373|1b9d24|                    let kind: ConsoleEntry.Kind
374|571cf3|                    if message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") {
375|19d4ff|                        kind = .error
376|6ba763|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[WARN]") {
377|bd649a|                        kind = .warning
378|e9bff4|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[INFO]") {
379|cb1c58|                        kind = .info
380|540066|                    } else {
381|bc6733|                        kind = .output
382|c9717a|                    }
383|56aa6d|                    // Strip prefix for cleaner output
384|63772a|                    let cleanMessage = message
385|ba5a18|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[LOG] ", with: "")
386|dbc777|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[ERROR] ", with: "")
387|be10bc|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[WARN] ", with: "")
388|1f973e|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[INFO] ", with: "")
389|ffc155|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(message: cleanMessage, kind: kind))
390|4e2d32|                }
391|a7dc16|            }
392|3070d1|            
393|71cc09|            do {
394|8a3016|                let result = try await runner.execute(code: code, timeout: 30.0)
395|dbac47|                let resultString = result.toString() ?? ""
396|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
397|2160a3|                    if !resultString.isEmpty && resultString != "undefined" {
398|cfc3f8|                        self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
399|23cb42|                            message: "→ \(resultString)",
400|07ef2b|                            kind: .output
401|78dc58|                        ))
402|c9717a|                    }
403|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
404|7997c0|                        message: "Debug session ended.",
405|32eda6|                        kind: .system
406|c89922|                    ))
407|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
408|27adbc|                    self.callStack.removeAll()
409|4e2d32|                }
410|91b9a2|            } catch {

414|bddd8e|                        kind: .error
415|c89922|                    ))

420|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
421|4e2d32|                }
422|a7dc16|            }

450|d1c987|    private func advanceTopFrameLine(by delta: Int) {
451|1735de|        guard !callStack.isEmpty else { return }
452|adc83b|
453|5c5f53|        // IMPORTANT: mutate via a copy so @Published emits reliably for collection changes.
454|e6cfa2|        var cs = callStack
455|dc199c|        cs[0].line += delta
456|917f8a|        callStack = cs
457|adc83b|
458|390c0e|        // Make the demo watch expression change a bit.
459|592404|        if let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.expression == "counter" }) {
460|95bd8c|            var watches = watchExpressions
461|2ed9b0|            let n = Int(watches[idx].value) ?? 0
462|5b5bc8|            watches[idx].value = "\(n + delta)"
463|6dcd0c|            watchExpressions = watches
464|5f3077|        }
465|adc83b|
466|c6c3e0|        if let varIdx = variables.firstIndex(where: { $0.name == "counter" }) {
467|c2619d|            var vars = variables
468|1520a4|            let n = Int(vars[varIdx].value) ?? 0
469|5da7be|            vars[varIdx].value = "\(n + delta)"
470|dac60a|            variables = vars
471|5f3077|        }
472|27e597|    }

263|441de9|    private func buildFileTree(at url: URL) -> FileTreeNode? {
264|a367ea|        let fileManager = FileManager.default
265|adc83b|
266|4da690|        do {
267|45bac6|            let resourceValues = try url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey, .nameKey])
268|06b9e9|            let isDirectory = resourceValues.isDirectory ?? false
269|2496f5|            let name = resourceValues.name ?? url.lastPathComponent
270|adc83b|
271|8a6b94|            if isDirectory {
272|2a0651|                let contents = try fileManager.contentsOfDirectory(
273|81f0bc|                    at: url,
274|f8247b|                    includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isDirectoryKey],
275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }
282|853889|        } catch {
283|8e9e2d|            print("Error building file tree at \(url): \(error)")
284|1c8557|            return nil
285|5f3077|        }
286|27e597|    }

297|adc83b|
298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }

227|196f77|    /// VS Code `settings.json` can contain JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
228|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
229|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
230|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
231|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
232|adc83b|
233|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
234|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
235|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
236|27e597|    }

363|91b9a2|            } catch {

366|b31999|        } else {

369|1b6fc1|            return CompiledPattern(kind: .literal(needle: query.text,
370|7705be|                                                 compareLowercased: compareLowercased,
371|7ec981|                                                 wholeWord: query.options.isWholeWord))
372|5f3077|        }

409|737c2a|    private func regexMatches(in text: String, re: NSRegularExpression) -> [FileMatch.Match] {

414|adc83b|

423|5f3077|        }

426|045702|    private func literalMatches(in text: String,

472|aac90d|    private func isWholeWordMatch(in nsText: NSString, range: NSRange) -> Bool {
473|7a86e9|        // Word boundary definition: letters, numbers, underscore.
474|f103a7|        func isWordChar(_ u: unichar) -> Bool {

476|0b793e|            // ASCII letters/digits

479|5f3077|        }

489|5f3077|        }
490|4add8d|        return true

518|f7d19f|    private func replaceAll(in text: String,
519|9c700d|                            compiled: CompiledPattern,
520|26009e|                            replacement: String) -> (String, Int) {
521|53729f|        switch compiled.kind {
522|462837|        case .regex(let re):
523|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
524|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
525|39e029|            let matches = re.matches(in: text, options: [], range: range)
526|1cc29d|            if matches.isEmpty { return (text, 0) }
527|4d6888|            let out = re.stringByReplacingMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range, withTemplate: replacement)
528|2f64d1|            return (out, matches.count)
529|adc83b|
530|8554ef|        case .literal(let needle, let compareLowercased, let wholeWord):
531|c0f6dc|            if needle.isEmpty { return (text, 0) }
532|f2f430|            // For literal, we re-scan and build output to support whole-word.
533|818f83|            let haystack = compareLowercased ? text.lowercased() : text
534|7d22d9|            let n = compareLowercased ? needle.lowercased() : needle
535|adc83b|
536|e09c62|            let nsHay = haystack as NSString
537|d5b67f|            let nsOrig = text as NSString
538|fc8e73|            let nsNeedle = n as NSString
539|adc83b|
540|06c839|            var out = ""
541|8e842a|            out.reserveCapacity(text.count)
542|adc83b|
543|e70d5f|            var cursor = 0
544|39cefb|            var reps = 0
545|adc83b|
546|0cd27d|            while cursor < nsHay.length {
547|2c9083|                let searchRange = NSRange(location: cursor, length: nsHay.length - cursor)
548|ae1ea7|                let found = nsHay.range(of: n, options: [], range: searchRange)
549|4df494|                if found.location == NSNotFound {
550|8d5f82|                    out += nsOrig.substring(with: NSRange(location: cursor, length: nsOrig.length - cursor))
551|8dcb2c|                    break
552|4e2d32|                }
553|adc83b|
554|1bfe27|                // append leading segment
555|2f703d|                out += nsOrig.substring(with: NSRange(location: cursor, length: found.location - cursor))
556|adc83b|
557|9cbeba|                if wholeWord && !isWholeWordMatch(in: nsHay, range: found) {
558|efda73|                    // not a whole-word match; append original matched text and continue

560|eb07b6|                    cursor = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
561|f41bef|                    continue

564|80b507|                out += replacement
565|4d34ce|                reps += 1
566|adc83b|

568|a7dc16|            }
569|adc83b|
570|b4440a|            return (out, reps)
571|5f3077|        }
572|27e597|    }

576|76a6f8|    /// Very small glob matcher supporting '*', '**', and '?'.
577|97859c|    /// Matching is path-based (uses '/' as separator). Globs are compared against the full path.
578|b70596|    private func matchesAnyGlob(path: String, globs: [String]) -> Bool {
579|d4643f|        guard !globs.isEmpty else { return false }
580|c5ecd3|        for g in globs {
581|090ad0|            if globMatch(path: path, pattern: g) { return true }
582|5f3077|        }
583|dc1500|        return false
584|27e597|    }

586|028fc6|    private func globMatch(path: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
587|2d6c82|        // Convert glob to regex.
588|6bde96|        // - '**' => '.*'
589|efea0d|        // - '*' => '[^/]*'
590|6eb809|        // - '?' => '[^/]'
591|079dc7|        var regex = "^"
592|c72f2a|        var i = pattern.startIndex
593|10492c|        while i < pattern.endIndex {
594|ebcb12|            let ch = pattern[i]
595|8b01b3|            if ch == "*" {
596|324652|                let next = pattern.index(after: i)
597|1327fc|                if next < pattern.endIndex && pattern[next] == "*" {
598|dad527|                    regex += ".*"
599|3f2179|                    i = pattern.index(after: next)
600|fdd0e2|                } else {
601|fde091|                    regex += "[^/]*"
602|74f6aa|                    i = next
603|4e2d32|                }
604|735319|            } else if ch == "?" {
605|164012|                regex += "[^/]"
606|8a996a|                i = pattern.index(after: i)
607|f5a6eb|            } else {
608|a51d15|                // escape regex metacharacters
609|cf009b|                if "\\.^$|()[]{}+".contains(ch) {
610|b0575b|                    // Single backslash to escape the character in regex
611|366984|                    // e.g., "." becomes "\." which matches literal dot
612|504778|                    regex += "\\\(ch)"
613|fdd0e2|                } else {
614|a46a47|                    regex.append(ch)
615|4e2d32|                }
616|8a996a|                i = pattern.index(after: i)
617|a7dc16|            }
618|5f3077|        }
619|3a8c74|        regex += "$"
620|adc83b|
621|8e440e|        let opts: NSRegularExpression.Options = []
622|cda732|        guard let re = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: regex, options: opts) else { return false }
623|ef92c3|        let ns = path as NSString
624|5f54b4|        let r = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
625|68f6b6|        return re.firstMatch(in: path, options: [], range: r) != nil
626|27e597|    }

629|adc83b|

831|909c8a|// MARK: - Line indexing helper
832|adc83b|
833|01ee41|/// LineIndex is internal to allow testing while being encapsulated within SearchManager
834|d09a50|internal struct LineIndex {
835|f4be4a|    private let text: String
836|c348f4|    private let nsText: NSString
837|b41b69|    // line start offsets in UTF16
838|f3984c|    private var lineStarts: [Int] = [0]
839|b24272|    private var lines: [String] = []
840|adc83b|
841|23e59f|    init(_ text: String) {
842|226b10|        self.text = text
843|52183e|        self.nsText = text as NSString
844|adc83b|
845|2f4cf6|        // Build lineStarts and cache line strings.
846|c5b554|        // Use NSString lineRange(for:) to be safe with various newline types.
847|6ee764|        var idx = 0
848|17cda2|        var currentLine = 1
849|13db51|        while idx < nsText.length {
850|2c0444|            let r = nsText.lineRange(for: NSRange(location: idx, length: 0))
851|471553|            let lineStr = nsText.substring(with: r).trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet.newlines)
852|9855fd|            if lines.count < currentLine { lines.append(lineStr) } else { lines[currentLine - 1] = lineStr }
853|adc83b|
854|ae4d58|            idx = NSMaxRange(r)
855|1af0df|            if idx < nsText.length {
856|053f6f|                lineStarts.append(idx)
857|12fb7d|                currentLine += 1
858|a7dc16|            }
859|5f3077|        }
860|d679f2|        if nsText.length == 0 {
861|7cc276|            lines = [""]
862|3822a8|            lineStarts = [0]
863|706df5|        } else if lines.isEmpty {
864|5813e2|            // single line without newline
865|a3f790|            lines = [text]
866|3822a8|            lineStarts = [0]
867|5f3077|        }
868|27e597|    }
869|adc83b|
870|fb0e0a|    func lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: Int) -> (line: Int, column: Int) {
871|4aeba9|        // Binary search lineStarts to find last start <= offset.
872|32f4a9|        var lo = 0
873|c12820|        var hi = lineStarts.count - 1
874|7d7bcb|        while lo <= hi {
875|c1ca4d|            let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
876|e6933d|            let v = lineStarts[mid]
877|ef7066|            if v == utf16Offset {
878|52d775|                return (mid + 1, 1)
879|f31785|            } else if v < utf16Offset {
880|0a83f3|                lo = mid + 1
881|f5a6eb|            } else {
882|7320e6|                hi = mid - 1
883|a7dc16|            }
884|5f3077|        }
885|06fcf8|        let lineIndex = max(hi, 0)
886|acc313|        let lineStart = lineStarts[lineIndex]
887|ce9896|        let col = max(utf16Offset - lineStart, 0) + 1
888|fc379c|        return (lineIndex + 1, col)
889|27e597|    }
890|adc83b|
891|2fb6bf|    func lineText(line: Int) -> String {
892|329128|        let i = max(1, line) - 1
893|14d9cb|        if i >= 0 && i < lines.count { return lines[i] }
894|2ca6c1|        return ""
895|27e597|    }
896|b4687f|    
897|073a12|    /// Internal accessor for testing binary search behavior
898|11be92|    internal var lineStartOffsets: [Int] { lineStarts }
899|8b9d56|    internal var lineCount: Int { lines.count }
900|bc5c81|    internal var allLines: [String] { lines }
901|b31277|}
902|adc83b|

162|28844a|    // MARK: - Symbol Table Management
163|adc83b|
164|1e84c8|    /// Register a symbol definition in the symbol table
165|fd103d|    func registerSymbol(_ definition: SymbolDefinition) {
166|d6f68e|        // Add to symbol table
167|51d7af|        if symbolTable[definition.name] == nil {
168|da44c4|            symbolTable[definition.name] = []
169|5f3077|        }
170|adc83b|
171|a1e7e1|        // Avoid duplicates
172|a595a0|        if !symbolTable[definition.name]!.contains(where: { $0.location == definition.location }) {
173|908114|            symbolTable[definition.name]!.append(definition)
174|5f3077|        }
175|adc83b|
176|c6644c|        // Add to file index
177|e58d8b|        let filePath = definition.location.file
178|d306d9|        if fileSymbols[filePath] == nil {
179|e2cc5c|            fileSymbols[filePath] = []
180|5f3077|        }
181|414329|        if !fileSymbols[filePath]!.contains(where: { $0.location == definition.location }) {
182|1a1290|            fileSymbols[filePath]!.append(definition)
183|5f3077|        }
184|27e597|    }
185|adc83b|
186|725208|    /// Remove all symbols for a specific file (for refresh)
187|919970|    func clearSymbols(for file: String) {
188|0c04a5|        // Remove from file index
189|127407|        let removed = fileSymbols.removeValue(forKey: file) ?? []
190|adc83b|
191|820058|        // Remove from symbol table
192|18aa01|        for definition in removed {
193|ef805b|            symbolTable[definition.name]?.removeAll { $0.location.file == file }
194|30202c|            if symbolTable[definition.name]?.isEmpty == true {
195|55b7f4|                symbolTable.removeValue(forKey: definition.name)
196|a7dc16|            }
197|5f3077|        }
198|27e597|    }
199|adc83b|
200|524779|    /// Clear all symbols
201|ee2741|    func clearAllSymbols() {
202|c8e2f6|        symbolTable.removeAll()
203|cc080a|        fileSymbols.removeAll()
204|d18abf|        parseCache.removeAll()
205|27e597|    }

207|856a24|    // MARK: - Find Definition
208|adc83b|
209|043d1b|    /// Find the definition of a symbol
210|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
211|8615c7|    ///   - symbol: The symbol name to find
212|aae5bd|    ///   - context: Optional context (current file) for prioritizing results
213|08aaa0|    /// - Returns: NavigationResult with the definition location(s) or error
214|5f314f|    func findDefinition(symbol: String, in context: String? = nil) -> NavigationResult {
215|0c5b20|        let trimmedSymbol = symbol.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
216|916ae0|        guard !trimmedSymbol.isEmpty else {
217|5b6407|            return .notFound(reason: "Empty symbol name")
218|5f3077|        }
219|adc83b|
220|365503|        guard let definitions = symbolTable[trimmedSymbol], !definitions.isEmpty else {
221|821fe8|            return .notFound(reason: "No definition found for '\(trimmedSymbol)'")
222|5f3077|        }
223|adc83b|
224|40f63d|        // If only one definition, return it
225|65257d|        if definitions.count == 1, let first = definitions.first {
226|b3f95f|            return .found(first.location)
227|5f3077|        }
228|adc83b|
229|092d00|        // If we have context, try to prioritize definitions in the same file
230|d2ed01|        if let context {
231|c5bf12|            let inCurrentFile = definitions.filter { $0.location.file == context }
232|64ef97|            if inCurrentFile.count == 1, let first = inCurrentFile.first {
233|3e4923|                return .found(first.location)
234|a7dc16|            }
235|5f3077|        }
236|adc83b|
237|d57d7f|        // Return multiple definitions for user to choose
238|db0cf7|        return .multipleFound(definitions)
239|27e597|    }
240|adc83b|
241|7a535e|    /// Find definitions matching a partial name (for autocomplete/suggestions)
242|ac9c8b|    func findDefinitions(matching prefix: String, limit: Int = 20) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
243|b585fe|        let lowercasePrefix = prefix.lowercased()
244|adc83b|
245|abbee3|        return symbolTable.flatMap { (name, definitions) -> [SymbolDefinition] in
246|152acc|            if name.lowercased().hasPrefix(lowercasePrefix) {
247|0aba65|                return definitions
248|a7dc16|            }
249|b0f460|            return []
250|5f3077|        }
251|6617cd|        .prefix(limit)
252|3fff45|        .map { $0 }
253|27e597|    }
254|adc83b|
255|183c2f|    /// Get all symbols in a file
256|89ad6a|    func getSymbols(in file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
257|56cb17|        fileSymbols[file] ?? []

260|f62ec9|    // MARK: - Parse File for Symbols
261|adc83b|
262|cb275b|    /// Parse a file's content and extract symbol definitions
263|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
264|753bfd|    ///   - content: The source code content
265|41a464|    ///   - file: The file path/identifier
266|a9d40f|    ///   - language: The programming language
267|80dced|    func parseAndIndexFile(content: String, file: String, language: CodeLanguage) {
268|88adef|        // Check cache
269|ebd59d|        let contentHash = content.hashValue
270|d3c0e4|        if let cached = parseCache[contentHash] {
271|16bac4|            // Re-register cached symbols with new file path
272|664fb3|            for definition in cached {
273|33832a|                registerSymbol(definition)
274|a7dc16|            }
275|bef5d6|            return
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|e9e291|        // Clear existing symbols for this file
279|dfefdb|        clearSymbols(for: file)
280|adc83b|
281|310092|        // Parse based on language
282|62f598|        let definitions: [SymbolDefinition]
283|f3155b|        switch language {
284|3347f4|        case .swift:
285|79f37d|            definitions = parseSwiftDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
286|1cbd06|        case .javascript, .typescript:
287|ac8ad3|            definitions = parseJavaScriptDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
288|9fa55d|        case .python:
289|e1705b|            definitions = parsePythonDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
290|520b7d|        default:
291|1caddb|            definitions = parseGenericDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
292|5f3077|        }
293|adc83b|
294|e255fe|        // Register all definitions
295|1bc396|        for definition in definitions {
296|ac41ed|            registerSymbol(definition)
297|5f3077|        }
298|adc83b|
299|b82c0d|        // Cache the results
300|f34d79|        parseCache[contentHash] = definitions
301|27e597|    }
302|adc83b|
303|a2bb61|    // MARK: - Language Parsers (Regex based)
304|adc83b|
305|0b046d|    private func parseSwiftDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
306|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
307|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
308|adc83b|
309|a33600|        // Regex patterns for Swift
310|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
311|fc8340|            // Functions
312|8c783b|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(static |class )?(override )?func\s+(\w+)"#, .function, 4),
313|8fed15|            // Classes
314|83de3a|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(final )?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class, 3),
315|2f60d1|            // Structs
316|208bd6|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?struct\s+(\w+)"#, .struct, 2),
317|af4603|            // Enums
318|01d20a|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?enum\s+(\w+)"#, .enum, 2),
319|2fc5af|            // Protocols
320|6922b4|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?protocol\s+(\w+)"#, .protocol, 2)
321|220505|        ]
322|adc83b|
323|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
324|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
325|b87970|            for p in patterns {
326|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
327|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
328|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
329|adc83b|
330|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
331|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
332|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
333|adc83b|
334|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
335|840904|                let def = SymbolDefinition(
336|7761cb|                    name: name,
337|aee5d6|                    kind: p.kind,
338|0bc868|                    location: location,
339|aa376a|                    signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces),
340|a03384|                    documentation: nil,
341|f6b974|                    containerName: nil
342|6f642e|                )
343|4ec1cf|                definitions.append(def)
344|a7dc16|            }
345|adc83b|
346|426502|            // Enum cases (simple)
347|9ac8a2|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"^\s*case\s+(\w+)"#),
348|81cd99|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)) {
349|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
350|ff6da9|                if nameRange.location != NSNotFound {
351|1156fd|                    let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
352|9354ca|                    let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
353|7c1620|                    definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: .enumCase, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
354|4e2d32|                }
355|a7dc16|            }
356|5f3077|        }
357|adc83b|
358|02e31c|        return definitions
359|27e597|    }
360|adc83b|
361|9da06f|    private func parseJavaScriptDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
362|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
363|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
364|adc83b|
365|cf71b2|        // Basic JS/TS patterns
366|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
367|3f761a|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?(async\s+)?function\s+(\w+)"#, .function, 3),
368|a753f7|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class, 2),
369|3c35e9|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?(const|let|var)\s+(\w+)"#, .variable, 3),
370|5d845f|            (#"^\s*interface\s+(\w+)"#, .interface, 1),
371|f015d5|            (#"^\s*type\s+(\w+)"#, .type, 1)
372|220505|        ]
373|adc83b|
374|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
375|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
376|b87970|            for p in patterns {
377|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
378|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
379|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
380|adc83b|
381|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
382|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
383|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
384|adc83b|
385|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
386|85d12d|                definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: p.kind, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
387|a7dc16|            }
388|5f3077|        }
389|adc83b|
390|02e31c|        return definitions
391|27e597|    }
392|adc83b|
393|4fcbc6|    private func parsePythonDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
394|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
395|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
396|adc83b|
397|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
398|f3287f|            (#"^\s*def\s+(\w+)\s*\("#, .function, 1),
399|f0fbc1|            (#"^\s*class\s+(\w+)\s*\(?"#, .class, 1)
400|220505|        ]
401|adc83b|
402|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
403|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
404|b87970|            for p in patterns {
405|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
406|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
407|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
408|adc83b|
409|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
410|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
411|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
412|adc83b|
413|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
414|85d12d|                definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: p.kind, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|adc83b|
418|02e31c|        return definitions
419|27e597|    }

113|fc7910|func parsePythonError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
114|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
115|b4687f|    
116|f13885|    // Python traceback pattern: File "path", line N
117|78bf0d|    let filePattern = try! NSRegularExpression(

119|d114fc|        options: []

122|6abe93|    // Python exception pattern at the end of traceback
123|351cbb|    let exceptionPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
124|d57a96|        pattern: #"^(\w+Error):\s*(.+)$"#,
125|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
126|829c44|    )
127|b4687f|    
128|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
129|5e9409|    let matches = filePattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
130|b4687f|    
131|676c19|    // Get exception message from the end
132|93aee8|    var exceptionMessage = "Unknown Python error"
133|a2f2e9|    if let exceptionMatch = exceptionPattern.firstMatch(in: output, range: nsRange) {
134|754902|        if let messageRange = Range(exceptionMatch.range(at: 2), in: output) {
135|cbab8a|            exceptionMessage = String(output[messageRange])
136|5f3077|        }
137|27e597|    }
138|b4687f|    
139|6e2d2f|    for match in matches {

142|0e4f53|            continue

149|395c81|        var message = exceptionMessage

156|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(

265|cf9479|/// Parse Rust compiler errors from output
266|fb69d5|func parseRustError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
267|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
268|b4687f|    
269|7037f1|    // Rust error pattern: error[EXXXX]: message
270|b6cd14|    // followed by --> path:line:column
271|436e2c|    let errorHeaderPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
272|ca8561|        pattern: #"^(error|warning)\[(E\d+)\]:\s*(.+)$"#,
273|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
274|829c44|    )
275|b4687f|    
276|93d87e|    // Rust location pattern: --> path:line:column
277|ac1eda|    let locationPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
278|2f743f|        pattern: #"^\s*-->\s+([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+)"#,
279|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
280|829c44|    )
281|b4687f|    
282|0d8ef7|    // Alternative pattern without error code: error: message
283|f738e0|    let simpleErrorPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
284|d07935|        pattern: #"^(error|warning):\s*(.+)$"#,
285|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
286|829c44|    )
287|b4687f|    
288|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
289|fc288a|    let lines = output.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
290|b4687f|    
291|a310ae|    var currentMessage: String?
292|dcacfa|    var currentSeverity: ParsedError.ErrorSeverity = .error
293|b4687f|    
294|352c31|    for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
295|e1b372|        let lineRange = NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)
296|d6ed84|        
297|ded761|        // Check for error header with code
298|345436|        if let match = errorHeaderPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
299|aed211|            if let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
300|2eae41|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line),
301|fc5d23|               let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line) {
302|cc8cde|                let severityString = String(line[severityRange])
303|917c9b|                let code = String(line[codeRange])
304|bd16ab|                let message = String(line[messageRange])
305|b940e3|                currentMessage = "[\(code)] \(message)"
306|bf0e26|                currentSeverity = ParsedError.ErrorSeverity(rawValue: severityString) ?? .error
307|a7dc16|            }
308|5f3077|        }
309|40dc51|        // Check for simple error without code
310|40a9d1|        else if let match = simpleErrorPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
311|aed211|            if let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
312|50b8db|               let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line) {
313|cc8cde|                let severityString = String(line[severityRange])
314|bd16ab|                let message = String(line[messageRange])
315|0e4b8b|                currentMessage = message
316|bf0e26|                currentSeverity = ParsedError.ErrorSeverity(rawValue: severityString) ?? .error
317|a7dc16|            }
318|5f3077|        }
319|dde2ec|        // Check for location line
320|04b7bf|        else if let match = locationPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
321|510d16|            if let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
322|66f856|               let lineNumRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line),
323|a7176f|               let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line) {
324|8231df|                let file = String(line[fileRange])
325|d4a390|                let lineNum = Int(line[lineNumRange]) ?? 1
326|6d4e94|                let column = Int(line[colRange]) ?? 0
327|e4cfce|                let message = currentMessage ?? "Rust \(currentSeverity.displayName)"
328|216278|                
329|fd281c|                errors.append(ParsedError(
330|7b52a4|                    file: file,
331|88de6d|                    line: lineNum,
332|0adac9|                    column: column,
333|88bd6a|                    message: message,
334|ff4c75|                    severity: currentSeverity
335|2188d8|                ))
336|216278|                
337|a40ddf|                // Reset for next error
338|152685|                currentMessage = nil
339|a7dc16|            }
340|5f3077|        }
341|27e597|    }
342|b4687f|    
343|b5c4b2|    return errors
344|b31277|}

268|06b9e9|            let isDirectory = resourceValues.isDirectory ?? false
269|2496f5|            let name = resourceValues.name ?? url.lastPathComponent
270|adc83b|
271|8a6b94|            if isDirectory {
272|2a0651|                let contents = try fileManager.contentsOfDirectory(
273|81f0bc|                    at: url,
274|f8247b|                    includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isDirectoryKey],
275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }
282|853889|        } catch {

298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }

323|0fd45c|    @MainActor
324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {
325|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {

328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|e352e6|        let userMessage = ChatMessage(role: .user, content: content)
331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|        
334|8495c1|        // Update title if first message
335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {
336|066ce6|            currentSession.title = String(content.prefix(50))
337|e749a7|            updateSession()
338|5f3077|        }
339|d6ed84|        
340|d52924|        isLoading = true
341|0406ba|        error = nil
342|dc34fb|        streamingResponse = ""
343|d6ed84|        
344|4da690|        do {
345|ce5098|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: currentSession.messages, context: context)
346|70672e|            let assistantMessage = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response, codeBlocks: extractCodeBlocks(from: response))
347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {
350|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false
354|27e597|    }

391|0fd45c|    @MainActor
392|90c566|    private func sendAndGetResponse(_ prompt: String) async -> String {
393|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
394|1b72a2|            return "Error: Please set your API key in settings"
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|d52924|        isLoading = true
398|0406ba|        error = nil
399|d6ed84|        
400|4da690|        do {
401|3b5c4f|            let messages = [ChatMessage(role: .user, content: prompt)]
402|153d92|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: messages, context: nil)
403|612c3f|            isLoading = false
404|d392d0|            return response
405|853889|        } catch {
406|612c3f|            isLoading = false
407|0cacff|            return "Error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
408|5f3077|        }
409|27e597|    }

411|579307|    // MARK: - API Request
412|b4687f|    
413|0a6144|    private func makeAPIRequest(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
414|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
415|6ca85d|        case .openai:
416|d9a528|            return try await callOpenAI(messages: messages, context: context)
417|2b5eb0|        case .anthropic:
418|afe61a|            return try await callAnthropic(messages: messages, context: context)
419|51e5bc|        case .google:
420|688f02|            return try await callGoogle(messages: messages, context: context)
421|a90b5c|        case .kimi:
422|467f79|            return try await callKimi(messages: messages, context: context)
423|448974|        case .glm:
424|d03556|            return try await callGLM(messages: messages, context: context)
425|6a2402|        case .groq:
426|2fdc7f|            return try await callGroq(messages: messages, context: context)
427|586fca|        case .deepseek:
428|b7290a|            return try await callDeepSeek(messages: messages, context: context)
429|0935ee|        case .mistral:
430|048202|            return try await callMistral(messages: messages, context: context)
431|7b8ebd|        case .ollama:
432|20a226|            return try await callOllama(messages: messages, context: context)
433|5135a3|        case .localMLX:
434|258af5|            return try await callLocalMLX(messages: messages, context: context)
435|5f3077|        }
436|27e597|    }

438|b90399|    // MARK: - OpenAI API
439|b4687f|    
440|c4fdfa|    private func callOpenAI(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
441|bc2d67|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.openai.baseURL)/chat/completions")!
442|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
443|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
444|7fd512|        request.setValue("Bearer \(openAIKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
445|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
446|d6ed84|        
447|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
448|d6ed84|        
449|5740dd|        // Add system message with context
450|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
451|55709b|        apiMessages.append(["role": "system", "content": systemPrompt])
452|d6ed84|        
453|c5ae63|        // Add conversation messages
454|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
455|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
456|5f3077|        }
457|d6ed84|        
458|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
459|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
460|b5548e|            "messages": apiMessages,
461|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
462|f1c54d|            "temperature": 0.7
463|220505|        ]
464|d6ed84|        
465|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
466|d6ed84|        
467|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
468|d6ed84|        
469|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
470|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
471|5f3077|        }
472|d6ed84|        
473|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
474|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
475|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
476|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
477|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
478|a7dc16|            }
479|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
480|5f3077|        }
481|d6ed84|        
482|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
483|95fe6c|        guard let choices = json?["choices"] as? [[String: Any]],
484|6c7545|              let firstChoice = choices.first,
485|9e7d93|              let message = firstChoice["message"] as? [String: Any],
486|870b1f|              let content = message["content"] as? String else {
487|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
488|5f3077|        }
489|d6ed84|        
490|9be7b6|        return content
491|27e597|    }
492|b4687f|    
493|29e6f6|    // MARK: - Anthropic API
494|b4687f|    
495|f1fc2e|    private func callAnthropic(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
496|3b388d|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.anthropic.baseURL)/messages")!
497|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
498|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
499|ede6ed|        request.setValue(anthropicKey, forHTTPHeaderField: "x-api-key")
500|6b8824|        request.setValue("2023-06-01", forHTTPHeaderField: "anthropic-version")

545|87a420|    // MARK: - Google API
546|b4687f|    
547|190d00|    private func callGoogle(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
548|dd3258|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.google.baseURL)/models/\(selectedModel.id):generateContent?key=\(googleKey)")!
549|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
550|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
551|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
552|d6ed84|        
553|2ae98d|        var parts: [[String: Any]] = []
554|d6ed84|        
555|288895|        // Add system context
556|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
557|e08e07|        parts.append(["text": "System: \(systemPrompt)"])
558|d6ed84|        
559|c1c8d4|        // Add messages
560|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
561|989b77|            let role = msg.role == .assistant ? "Model" : "User"
562|35f120|            parts.append(["text": "\(role): \(msg.content)"])
563|5f3077|        }
564|d6ed84|        
565|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
566|6251fc|            "contents": [
567|f76f20|                ["parts": parts]
568|97e7d5|            ],
569|0eaa6f|            "generationConfig": [
570|80d7f4|                "maxOutputTokens": 4096,
571|e772de|                "temperature": 0.7
572|324820|            ]
573|220505|        ]
574|d6ed84|        
575|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
576|d6ed84|        
577|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
578|d6ed84|        
579|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
580|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
581|5f3077|        }
582|d6ed84|        
583|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
584|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
585|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
586|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
587|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
588|a7dc16|            }
589|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
590|5f3077|        }
591|d6ed84|        
592|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
593|12af8b|        guard let candidates = json?["candidates"] as? [[String: Any]],
594|977b10|              let firstCandidate = candidates.first,
595|0ff2f5|              let content = firstCandidate["content"] as? [String: Any],
596|9ddaf9|              let parts = content["parts"] as? [[String: Any]],
597|61737e|              let firstPart = parts.first,
598|a6eafc|              let text = firstPart["text"] as? String else {
599|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
600|5f3077|        }
601|d6ed84|        
602|ec263c|        return text
603|27e597|    }

926|158069|    // MARK: - Local MLX (On-Device)
927|b4687f|    
928|0fd45c|    @MainActor
929|8b65f7|    private func callLocalMLX(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
930|cdacf1|        let localLLM = LocalLLMService.shared
931|d6ed84|        
932|7f5962|        // Auto-load model if not loaded
933|8532e3|        if !localLLM.isModelLoaded {
934|b1c14b|            await localLLM.loadModel()
935|5f3077|        }
936|d6ed84|        
937|19b14f|        guard localLLM.isModelLoaded else {
938|c8173d|            throw AIError.apiError("Failed to load local model")
939|5f3077|        }
940|d6ed84|        
941|05abd5|        // Convert messages to the format LocalLLMService expects
942|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
943|20ec53|        var chatMessages: [(role: String, content: String)] = []
944|d6ed84|        
945|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
946|8df8ce|            chatMessages.append((role: msg.role.rawValue, content: msg.content))
947|5f3077|        }
948|d6ed84|        
949|b4ee8b|        let response = try await localLLM.chat(messages: chatMessages, systemPrompt: systemPrompt)
950|090c3f|        return response
951|27e597|    }
952|b4687f|    
953|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
954|b4687f|    
955|a96bea|    private func buildSystemPrompt(context: String?) -> String {
956|a60aaf|        var prompt = """
957|de15a3|You are an expert coding assistant integrated into a code editor on iPadOS. You help developers write, debug, explain, and improve their code. Always respond in English.
958|adc83b|
959|3584f0|Guidelines:
960|9e10fd|- Provide clear, concise explanations
961|d9814a|- Use code blocks with proper language tags for code snippets
962|fab31f|- Suggest best practices and optimizations
963|17f65d|- Be helpful with debugging and error resolution
964|a2707f|- When generating code, ensure it's complete and runnable
965|ea2d25|- ALWAYS respond in English regardless of input language
966|d72f9a|- Never output raw XML tags like <think> or </think>
967|e4615a|"""
968|d6ed84|        
969|54cd50|        if let context = context, !context.isEmpty {
970|b91f6a|            prompt += "\n\nCurrent file context:\n```\n\(context)\n```"
971|5f3077|        }
972|d6ed84|        
973|dd02e7|        return prompt
974|27e597|    }
975|b4687f|    
976|c53a51|    private func extractCodeBlocks(from text: String) -> [CodeBlock] {
977|791eb5|        var blocks: [CodeBlock] = []
978|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
979|d6ed84|        
980|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
981|f7ed63|            return blocks
982|5f3077|        }
983|d6ed84|        
984|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
985|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
986|d6ed84|        
987|847e6d|        for match in matches {
988|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
989|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
990|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
991|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
992|9e5c94|                blocks.append(CodeBlock(language: language.isEmpty ? "text" : language, code: code))
993|a7dc16|            }
994|5f3077|        }
995|d6ed84|        
996|db7106|        return blocks
997|27e597|    }

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String

228|79772b|        let memberBase: String?
