231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }
348|b31277|}
349|adc83b|
350|c6407f|// MARK: - Safe Array Access
351|adc83b|
352|d72239|private extension Array {
353|686e51|    subscript(safe index: Int) -> Element? {
354|0b415a|        indices.contains(index) ? self[index] : nil
355|27e597|    }

49|0dec37|        // Switch to JavaScript output channel
50|e39e9c|        outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
51|d6ed84|        
52|a728d5|        // Clear previous output and show execution header
53|1511a8|        outputManager.clear(OutputChannel.javascript)
54|6cfb10|        outputManager.append("▶ Running: \(fileName)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
55|89174a|        outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
56|d6ed84|        
57|a3f62b|        // Create a fresh JSRunner instance
58|462f68|        jsRunner = JSRunner()
59|d6ed84|        
60|e61664|        // Set up console handler to capture output
61|305ad3|        jsRunner?.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
62|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
63|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
64|216278|                
65|b169c6|                // Determine stream type based on message prefix
66|27b18b|                let streamType: StreamType = message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") || message.hasPrefix("[EXCEPTION]") ? StreamType.stderr : StreamType.stdout
67|216278|                
68|4b39b7|                // Remove the prefix for cleaner output display
69|62636a|                var cleanMessage = message
70|121995|                for prefix in ["[LOG] ", "[INFO] ", "[WARN] ", "[ERROR] ", "[EXCEPTION] "] {
71|1df682|                    if message.hasPrefix(prefix) {
72|11af1f|                        cleanMessage = String(message.dropFirst(prefix.count))
73|28a64b|                        break
74|c9717a|                    }
75|4e2d32|                }
76|216278|                
77|6a3616|                self.outputManager.append(cleanMessage, to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: streamType)
78|a7dc16|            }
79|5f3077|        }
80|d6ed84|        
81|5a9195|        // Execute the code asynchronously
82|0f1953|        Task {
83|073be0|            let startTime = Date()
84|3070d1|            
85|71cc09|            do {
86|f3a1fd|                let result = try await jsRunner?.execute(code: code)
87|1ee120|                let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
88|216278|

90|f23508|                if let result = result, !result.isUndefined {
91|8a7075|                    let resultString = formatJSValue(result)
92|174733|                    outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
93|1c40a4|                    outputManager.append("⮐ Result: \(resultString)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
94|4e2d32|                }
95|216278|                
96|b2c6e7|                // Show completion message
97|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
98|2c8c65|                outputManager.append("✓ Completed in \(String(format: "%.2f", duration * 1000))ms", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
99|216278|                
100|77a0dc|            } catch let error as JSRunnerError {
101|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
102|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
103|216278|                
104|91b9a2|            } catch {
105|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
106|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
107|a7dc16|            }
108|3070d1|            
109|eb797f|            // Clean up runner

116|7aa5bd|    /// Format a JSValue for display
117|e68bfd|    private func formatJSValue(_ value: JSValue) -> String {
118|c903ed|        if value.isNull {
119|c04d4d|            return "null"
120|35d02e|        } else if value.isUndefined {
121|b32932|            return "undefined"
122|edfa6b|        } else if value.isBoolean {
123|1a76ee|            return value.toBool() ? "true" : "false"
124|4e414f|        } else if value.isNumber {
125|9abc83|            let num = value.toNumber()
126|d3fc6f|            // Check if it's an integer
127|a09f20|            if let n = num, n.doubleValue == Double(n.intValue) {
128|ee9ad8|                return "\(n.intValue)"
129|a7dc16|            }
130|64a140|            return "\(num?.doubleValue ?? 0)"
131|419991|        } else if value.isString {
132|7c8a45|            return "\"\(value.toString() ?? "")\""
133|a72377|        } else if value.isArray {
134|d7f252|            if let array = value.toArray() {
135|c35363|                return "[\(array.map { "\($0)" }.joined(separator: ", "))]"
136|a7dc16|            }
137|976c47|            return "[]"
138|bb3c98|        } else if value.isObject {
139|b4fae0|            if let dict = value.toDictionary() {
140|ee1ab7|                let json = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
141|a9b0f4|                if let json = json, let str = String(data: json, encoding: .utf8) {
142|cfed56|                    return str
143|4e2d32|                }
144|a7dc16|            }
145|0b436d|            return value.toString() ?? "[object]"
146|5f3077|        }
147|bbc620|        return value.toString() ?? "undefined"
148|27e597|    }
149|b31277|}

37|16c9d6|    private func swiftTypeHints(for code: String) -> [InlayHint] {
38|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
39|46c824|        var result: [InlayHint] = []
40|adc83b|
41|225f78|        // Matches:
42|e2c046|        //   let x = 5
43|2cac4f|        //   var name = "abc"
44|21217b|        // Avoids explicit type annotations because the pattern does not accept `:` before `=`.
45|49e410|        let pattern = "^\\s*(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.+)$"
46|72432c|        let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [])
47|adc83b|

49|cbe876|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
50|9b2e7c|            guard !trimmed.hasPrefix("//"), !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
51|adc83b|
52|18a8aa|            let nsLine = line as NSString
53|89c109|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsLine.length)
54|c471d9|            guard let match = regex?.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: range) else { continue }
55|ad3867|            guard match.numberOfRanges >= 3 else { continue }
56|adc83b|
57|423174|            let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
58|3c5579|            let rhsRange = match.range(at: 2)
59|7a7150|            if nameRange.location == NSNotFound || rhsRange.location == NSNotFound { continue }
60|adc83b|
61|165da4|            // Basic sanity checks: ignore tuple bindings like `let (a, b) = ...`
62|679645|            let name = nsLine.substring(with: nameRange)
63|5c9927|            guard !name.isEmpty else { continue }
64|adc83b|
65|666b05|            // RHS, stripped of trailing `//` comments (naive but practical).
66|53413c|            var rhs = nsLine.substring(with: rhsRange)
67|8beea4|            if let commentRange = rhs.range(of: "//") {
68|a56309|                rhs = String(rhs[..<commentRange.lowerBound])
69|a7dc16|            }
70|107569|            rhs = rhs.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
71|adc83b|
72|8f6e07|            // Infer a type. If we can’t infer, don’t create a hint.
73|992808|            guard let inferred = inferSwiftType(from: rhs) else { continue }
74|adc83b|
75|ed8c63|            // Column for hint placement = end of identifier.
76|f4b52b|            let hintColumn = nameRange.location + nameRange.length
77|32af9e|            result.append(InlayHint(line: lineIndex, column: hintColumn, text: ": \(inferred)"))
78|5f3077|        }
79|adc83b|
80|67ed82|        return result
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|014518|    // MARK: - Swift type inference (basic)
84|adc83b|
85|e4ea7a|    private func inferSwiftType(from rawExpression: String) -> String? {
86|3784b4|        let expr = rawExpression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
87|a14679|        guard !expr.isEmpty else { return nil }
88|adc83b|
89|ea35f3|        // Bool
90|62989c|        if expr == "true" || expr == "false" { return "Bool" }
91|adc83b|
92|5f3b7c|        // String literal (simple)
93|553d7e|        if expr.hasPrefix("\"") { return "String" }
94|adc83b|
95|f70754|        // Numeric: Int
96|b5aa27|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+$") { return "Int" }
97|f87d78|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+$") { return "Int" }
98|212646|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0b[01]+$") { return "Int" }
99|d18d43|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0o[0-7]+$") { return "Int" }
100|adc83b|
101|e6218e|        // Numeric: Double (Swift defaults floating-point literals to Double)
102|53b861|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+\\.\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)?$") { return "Double" }
103|71e012|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)$") { return "Double" }
104|adc83b|
105|69d592|        // Array / Dictionary literals
106|20ec44|        if expr.hasPrefix("[") {
107|ce2ebb|            if let dictType = inferDictionaryType(from: expr) { return dictType }
108|f27fb4|            if let arrayType = inferArrayType(from: expr) { return arrayType }
109|5f3077|        }
110|adc83b|
111|c1c62e|        // Constructor-looking calls: `TypeName(...)` (biased toward UpperCamelCase types)
112|c8a287|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(") {
113|7cdb04|            return typeName
114|5f3077|        }
115|adc83b|
116|9ff15e|        // Enum/static member: `TypeName.member`
117|7c8b37|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\.[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") {
118|7cdb04|            return typeName
119|5f3077|        }
120|adc83b|
121|c2ae65|        return nil
122|27e597|    }
123|adc83b|
124|ebc532|    private func inferArrayType(from expr: String) -> String? {
125|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
126|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
127|adc83b|
128|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
129|4d16d8|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[Any]" }
130|adc83b|
131|bdbc65|        // Take the first top-level element (naive: split by comma).
132|51ddab|        let firstPart = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first
133|3197f4|        guard let first = firstPart.map(String.init)?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines), !first.isEmpty else {
134|88e905|            return "[Any]"
135|5f3077|        }
136|adc83b|
137|e844da|        if let elementType = inferSwiftType(from: first) {
138|655e59|            return "[\(elementType)]"
139|5f3077|        }
140|adc83b|
141|77d208|        return "[Any]"
142|27e597|    }
143|adc83b|
144|f7b9b1|    private func inferDictionaryType(from expr: String) -> String? {
145|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
146|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
147|adc83b|
148|85eff8|        // Fast check: dictionary literals must contain `:` somewhere.
149|8a247d|        guard trimmed.contains(":") else { return nil }
150|adc83b|
151|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|be74cb|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[AnyHashable: Any]" }
153|adc83b|
154|141281|        // Grab the first `key: value` pair (naive: up to first comma).
155|53580e|        let firstPair = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first.map(String.init) ?? ""
156|2ae14f|        guard let colonIndex = firstPair.firstIndex(of: ":") else { return nil }
157|adc83b|
158|90fe28|        let keyExpr = String(firstPair[..<colonIndex]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
159|c8c196|        let valueExpr = String(firstPair[firstPair.index(after: colonIndex)...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
160|adc83b|
161|28ea5b|        let keyType = inferSwiftType(from: keyExpr) ?? "AnyHashable"
162|eb3fdd|        let valueType = inferSwiftType(from: valueExpr) ?? "Any"
163|31573c|        return "[\(keyType): \(valueType)]"
164|27e597|    }
165|adc83b|
166|e21b8f|    // MARK: - Regex helpers
167|adc83b|
168|3efaff|    private func matches(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
169|695372|        (try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []))?.firstMatch(
170|7697e1|            in: text,
171|11ba8c|            options: [],
172|264c2c|            range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (text as NSString).length)
173|d36f78|        ) != nil
174|27e597|    }
175|adc83b|
176|133a2e|    private func firstRegexGroup(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> String? {
177|473ca5|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
178|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
179|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
180|090ffd|        guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: text, options: [], range: range), match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return nil }
181|5ad252|        let r = match.range(at: 1)
182|8bd644|        guard r.location != NSNotFound else { return nil }
183|2550a5|        return ns.substring(with: r)
184|27e597|    }
185|b31277|}
186|adc83b|

199|9c61fa|        defer { isLoading = false }
200|f0416e|        lastError = nil
201|d6ed84|        
202|b444e2|        guard let reader = nativeReader else {

209|d6ed84|

211|45f1be|        let localBranchNames = reader.localBranches()
212|caf998|        branches = localBranchNames.map { name in

214|5f3077|        }

216|95ddd9|        let remoteBranchPairs = reader.remoteBranches()
217|8c6249|        remoteBranches = remoteBranchPairs.map { (remote, branch) in
218|6f1cd3|            GitBranch(name: "\(remote)/\(branch)", isRemote: true, isCurrent: false)
219|5f3077|        }
220|d6ed84|        
221|0a3885|        // Status

223|d6ed84|

225|99c683|            guard let staged = status.staged else { return nil }
226|5ac02f|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: mapStatusType(staged), staged: true)
227|5f3077|        }
228|d6ed84|        
229|a813d6|        unstagedChanges = fileStatuses.compactMap { status -> GitFileChange? in
230|3d5fa5|            guard let working = status.working else { return nil }
231|c3fce9|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: mapStatusType(working), staged: false)
232|5f3077|        }
233|d6ed84|

235|c3b94d|            guard status.working == .untracked else { return nil }
236|80a4a3|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: .untracked, staged: false)
237|5f3077|        }
238|d6ed84|

240|1f2245|        let commits = reader.recentCommits(count: 20)
241|ae143e|        recentCommits = commits.map { commit in

243|5f3077|        }

259|422db6|    func diffWorkingCopyToHEAD(path: String, kind: GitChangeKind) async -> DiffFile? {
260|a40fde|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { return nil }
261|d6ed84|        
262|0dc171|        return await Task.detached {
263|3519ac|            guard let reader = NativeGitReader(repositoryURL: repoURL) else { return nil }
264|3070d1|            
265|83a740|            let headSha = reader.headSHA()
266|85bb51|            let oldText = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: path, commitSHA: headSha) ?? ""
267|3070d1|            
268|b35691|            let workingURL = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(path)
269|567024|            let newText = (try? String(contentsOf: workingURL, encoding: .utf8)) ?? ""
270|3070d1|            
271|848698|            return DiffBuilder.build(
272|d02bb2|                fileName: path,
273|7e8d9b|                status: kind.rawValue,
274|7f9b45|                old: oldText,
275|87834e|                new: newText
276|43d041|            )
277|2ecb78|        }.value
278|27e597|    }

140|dfa032|    /// Step 1: Request a device code from GitHub
141|376dc8|    func startDeviceFlow() async throws {
142|d52924|        isLoading = true
143|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
144|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
145|d6ed84|        
146|9c61fa|        defer { isLoading = false }
147|d6ed84|        
148|17160e|        let url = URL(string: "https://github.com/login/device/code")!
149|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
150|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
151|3fa184|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
152|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
153|d6ed84|        
154|90fe0a|        let body: [String: String] = [
155|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
156|63faec|            "scope": Self.scope
157|220505|        ]
158|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
159|d6ed84|        
160|4da690|        do {
161|051776|            let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
162|3070d1|            
163|f57d44|            guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
164|ecb912|                throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
165|a7dc16|            }
166|3070d1|            
167|2f4205|            guard httpResponse.statusCode == 200 else {
168|fae175|                let errorBody = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) ?? "Unknown error"
169|63ff7f|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed("HTTP \(httpResponse.statusCode): \(errorBody)")
170|a7dc16|            }
171|3070d1|            
172|dc8a03|            let decoder = JSONDecoder()
173|6a1726|            let deviceCode = try decoder.decode(DeviceCodeResponse.self, from: data)
174|3defcd|            self.deviceCodeResponse = deviceCode
175|3070d1|            
176|04fe54|            print("[GitHubAuth] Device code received. User code: \(deviceCode.userCode)")
177|f80845|            print("[GitHubAuth] Verification URL: \(deviceCode.verificationUri)")
178|3070d1|            
179|cbf015|            // Automatically open the verification URL in Safari
180|895363|            if let verifyURL = URL(string: deviceCode.verificationUri) {
181|25ae70|                await UIApplication.shared.open(verifyURL)
182|a7dc16|            }
183|3070d1|            
184|4e1018|            // Start polling for token
185|9add0f|            startPolling(
186|44754d|                deviceCode: deviceCode.deviceCode,
187|43470e|                interval: deviceCode.interval,
188|54e876|                expiresIn: deviceCode.expiresIn
189|43d041|            )
190|3070d1|            
191|086e8f|        } catch let error as GitHubAuthError {
192|42793f|            self.errorMessage = error.localizedDescription
193|864dfa|            throw error
194|853889|        } catch {
195|701836|            let authError = GitHubAuthError.networkError(error)
196|9fce19|            self.errorMessage = authError.localizedDescription
197|fc009e|            throw authError
198|5f3077|        }
199|27e597|    }

201|d6eb10|    // MARK: - Token Polling
202|b4687f|    
203|463ea2|    /// Step 2: Poll GitHub until user authorizes (or timeout)
204|f74cbb|    private func startPolling(deviceCode: String, interval: Int, expiresIn: Int) {
205|fd9eb9|        // Cancel any existing poll
206|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
207|780222|        isPolling = true
208|d6ed84|        
209|7bc0a7|        pollTask = Task {
210|683a9c|            let pollInterval = max(interval, 5) // GitHub minimum is 5 seconds
211|49b210|            let deadline = Date().addingTimeInterval(TimeInterval(expiresIn))
212|3070d1|            
213|dac4c4|            while !Task.isCancelled && Date() < deadline {
214|0def4c|                // Wait the required interval
215|89d237|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: UInt64(pollInterval) * 1_000_000_000)
216|216278|                
217|bc71c9|                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
218|216278|                
219|a9ed45|                do {
220|329790|                    let token = try await pollForToken(deviceCode: deviceCode)
221|dd2193|                    
222|7dcb0d|                    // Success! Save token and fetch user
223|8e6188|                    try? KeychainManager.shared.saveGitHubToken(token)
224|e3777a|                    self.isAuthenticated = true
225|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
226|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
227|dd2193|                    
228|5ed0e2|                    try? await fetchUser(token: token)
229|dd2193|                    
230|03abf0|                    print("[GitHubAuth] Successfully authenticated!")
231|dd2193|                    
232|433a32|                    // Notify other parts of the app
233|ec4297|                    NotificationCenter.default.post(
234|3740e3|                        name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
235|115d90|                        object: nil,
236|d0b441|                        userInfo: ["authenticated": true]
237|1961a4|                    )
238|d253ab|                    return
239|dd2193|                    
240|2559bc|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied {
241|fca15e|                    self.errorMessage = "Login was denied."
242|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
243|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
244|d253ab|                    return
245|dd2193|                    
246|eceb72|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired {
247|1af66c|                    // Keep polling until deadline
248|f41bef|                    continue
249|dd2193|                    
250|6bf1ca|                } catch {
251|6d6a4c|                    // authorization_pending - keep polling
252|f41bef|                    continue
253|4e2d32|                }
254|a7dc16|            }
255|3070d1|            
256|8a21bd|            // Timed out
257|a8f1c2|            if !Task.isCancelled {
258|d00484|                self.errorMessage = "Login timed out. Please try again."
259|95ab45|                self.isPolling = false
260|b2bc23|                self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
261|a7dc16|            }
262|5f3077|        }
263|27e597|    }
264|b4687f|    
265|5c071c|    /// Single poll attempt to exchange device code for token
266|8fdc58|    private func pollForToken(deviceCode: String) async throws -> String {
267|3b9f39|        let url = URL(string: "https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token")!
268|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
269|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
270|3fa184|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
271|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
272|d6ed84|        
273|90fe0a|        let body: [String: String] = [
274|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
275|155c27|            "device_code": deviceCode,
276|78700f|            "grant_type": "urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code"
277|220505|        ]
278|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
279|d6ed84|        
280|251aeb|        let (data, _) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
281|d6ed84|        
282|7f28b2|        // Parse response
283|eb46b7|        guard let json = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any] else {
284|fce97b|            throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
285|5f3077|        }
286|d6ed84|        
287|a20373|        // Check for access token
288|e54ce0|        if let accessToken = json["access_token"] as? String {
289|5f184c|            return accessToken
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|117542|        // Check for error states
293|e969c8|        if let error = json["error"] as? String {
294|da39ef|            switch error {
295|f29883|            case "authorization_pending":
296|15ace7|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired // Not really expired, just pending
297|938a8b|            case "slow_down":
298|2dcdae|                // Need to increase interval - sleep extra 5 seconds
299|0ec537|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 5_000_000_000)
300|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
301|6475f3|            case "expired_token":
302|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
303|354722|            case "access_denied":
304|7c97f9|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied
305|ea3438|            default:
306|6fb117|                let description = json["error_description"] as? String ?? error
307|6503e4|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed(description)
308|a7dc16|            }
309|5f3077|        }
310|d6ed84|        
311|f01e4e|        throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
312|27e597|    }
313|b4687f|    
314|265ecc|    // MARK: - Fetch User
315|b4687f|    
316|975a6e|    func fetchUser(token: String? = nil) async throws {
317|487094|        let authToken = token ?? KeychainManager.shared.getGitHubToken()
318|a15a83|        guard let authToken else {
319|a782aa|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("No token available")
320|5f3077|        }
321|d6ed84|        
322|9730a7|        let url = URL(string: "https://api.github.com/user")!
323|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
324|136018|        request.setValue("Bearer \(authToken)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
325|58101d|        request.setValue("application/vnd.github+json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
326|d6ed84|        
327|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
328|d6ed84|        
329|3a0c01|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse,
330|acd675|              httpResponse.statusCode == 200 else {
331|18d01d|            let statusCode = (response as? HTTPURLResponse)?.statusCode ?? -1
332|c4bb91|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("HTTP \(statusCode)")
333|5f3077|        }
334|d6ed84|        
335|900ed2|        let decoder = JSONDecoder()
336|2135f0|        self.user = try decoder.decode(GitHubUser.self, from: data)
337|27e597|    }
338|b4687f|    
339|62b3c3|    // MARK: - Logout
340|b4687f|    
341|69ba08|    func logout() {
342|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
343|ffbaca|        pollTask = nil
344|ca7dff|        isPolling = false
345|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
346|d6ed84|        
347|787655|        try? KeychainManager.shared.deleteGitHubToken()
348|579d6c|        isAuthenticated = false
349|500bbd|        user = nil
350|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
351|d6ed84|        
352|63edcc|        NotificationCenter.default.post(
353|277513|            name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
354|33f159|            object: nil,
355|47a97c|            userInfo: ["authenticated": false]
356|3143a4|        )
357|d6ed84|        
358|1aeafb|        print("[GitHubAuth] Logged out")
359|27e597|    }
360|b4687f|    
361|7a17f8|    // MARK: - Cancel Login
362|b4687f|    
363|477f9c|    func cancelLogin() {
364|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
365|ffbaca|        pollTask = nil
366|ca7dff|        isPolling = false
367|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
368|295f36|        isLoading = false
369|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
370|27e597|    }

376|aed3a6|        KeychainManager.shared.getGitHubToken()

214|2e9633|        if let index = savedConnections.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == connection.id }) {

222|f8ff24|              let connections = try? JSONDecoder().decode([SSHConnectionConfig].self, from: data) else {
223|bef5d6|            return
224|5f3077|        }
225|a65f6e|        savedConnections = connections.sorted { ($0.lastUsed ?? .distantPast) > ($1.lastUsed ?? .distantPast) }
226|27e597|    }
227|b4687f|    
228|a3fceb|    private func persistConnections() {
229|7e12a8|        guard let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(savedConnections) else { return }

65|5507e2|    func font(forFamily family: String, size: CGFloat) -> UIFont {
66|36809c|        // Try common iOS font PostScript names first.
67|8eed34|        let candidates: [String]
68|b37ed2|        switch family {
69|776aba|        case "Menlo":
70|bfb914|            candidates = ["Menlo-Regular", "Menlo"]
71|08b76c|        case "Courier New":
72|fb8c13|            candidates = ["CourierNewPSMT", "Courier New"]
73|0cfb7f|        case "SF Mono":
74|0617dd|            candidates = ["SFMono-Regular", "SF Mono", ".SFMono-Regular"]
75|0298e7|        case "Fira Code":
76|dc7760|            candidates = ["FiraCode-Regular", "Fira Code"]
77|30da51|        case "JetBrains Mono":
78|29ba7c|            candidates = ["JetBrainsMono-Regular", "JetBrains Mono"]
79|520b7d|        default:
80|d7ec8a|            candidates = [family]
81|5f3077|        }
82|adc83b|
83|ef3c25|        for name in candidates {
84|b0cf4a|            if let font = UIFont(name: name, size: size) {
85|404673|                // Ensure monospaced feel if available; otherwise return as-is.
86|6dcd7e|                return font
87|a7dc16|            }
88|5f3077|        }
89|adc83b|
90|c377bd|        // Fallback
91|0966c5|        return UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: size, weight: .regular)
92|27e597|    }
93|adc83b|
94|a8b407|    /// A stable key used to detect when re-highlighting is necessary.
95|01a4a7|    var editorStyleKey: String {
96|ccc4ec|        "\(fontFamily)|\(Int(fontSize))|\(clampedTabSize)"
97|27e597|    }

209|043d1b|    /// Find the definition of a symbol
210|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
211|8615c7|    ///   - symbol: The symbol name to find
212|aae5bd|    ///   - context: Optional context (current file) for prioritizing results
213|08aaa0|    /// - Returns: NavigationResult with the definition location(s) or error
214|5f314f|    func findDefinition(symbol: String, in context: String? = nil) -> NavigationResult {
215|0c5b20|        let trimmedSymbol = symbol.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
216|916ae0|        guard !trimmedSymbol.isEmpty else {
217|5b6407|            return .notFound(reason: "Empty symbol name")
218|5f3077|        }
219|adc83b|
220|365503|        guard let definitions = symbolTable[trimmedSymbol], !definitions.isEmpty else {
221|821fe8|            return .notFound(reason: "No definition found for '\(trimmedSymbol)'")
222|5f3077|        }
223|adc83b|
224|40f63d|        // If only one definition, return it
225|65257d|        if definitions.count == 1, let first = definitions.first {
226|b3f95f|            return .found(first.location)
227|5f3077|        }
228|adc83b|
229|092d00|        // If we have context, try to prioritize definitions in the same file
230|d2ed01|        if let context {
231|c5bf12|            let inCurrentFile = definitions.filter { $0.location.file == context }
232|64ef97|            if inCurrentFile.count == 1, let first = inCurrentFile.first {
233|3e4923|                return .found(first.location)
234|a7dc16|            }
235|5f3077|        }
236|adc83b|
237|d57d7f|        // Return multiple definitions for user to choose
238|db0cf7|        return .multipleFound(definitions)
239|27e597|    }

267|80dced|    func parseAndIndexFile(content: String, file: String, language: CodeLanguage) {
268|88adef|        // Check cache

271|16bac4|            // Re-register cached symbols with new file path

274|a7dc16|            }

276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|e9e291|        // Clear existing symbols for this file
279|dfefdb|        clearSymbols(for: file)
280|adc83b|
281|310092|        // Parse based on language
282|62f598|        let definitions: [SymbolDefinition]
283|f3155b|        switch language {
284|3347f4|        case .swift:
285|79f37d|            definitions = parseSwiftDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
286|1cbd06|        case .javascript, .typescript:
287|ac8ad3|            definitions = parseJavaScriptDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
288|9fa55d|        case .python:
289|e1705b|            definitions = parsePythonDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
290|520b7d|        default:

292|5f3077|        }
293|adc83b|

296|ac41ed|            registerSymbol(definition)
297|5f3077|        }
298|adc83b|
299|b82c0d|        // Cache the results
300|f34d79|        parseCache[contentHash] = definitions

303|a2bb61|    // MARK: - Language Parsers (Regex based)
304|adc83b|
305|0b046d|    private func parseSwiftDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
306|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
307|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
308|adc83b|
309|a33600|        // Regex patterns for Swift
310|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
311|fc8340|            // Functions
312|8c783b|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(static |class )?(override )?func\s+(\w+)"#, .function, 4),

175|027474|// MARK: - Snippet Expansion
176|adc83b|
177|ffaefa|extension SnippetsManager {
178|a686f9|    /// Expands a snippet body and returns:
179|c54008|    /// - text: body with $1/$2... placeholders removed
180|ddc512|    /// - cursorOffset: position of $1 if present, else end of expanded text
181|30e1d8|    func expand(_ snippet: Snippet) -> (text: String, cursorOffset: Int) {
182|8d4784|        let body = snippet.body
183|adc83b|
184|6fa346|        var output = ""
185|dc4dbb|        var i = body.startIndex
186|f91403|        var placeholderOffsets: [Int: Int] = [:]
187|adc83b|
188|ee9951|        while i < body.endIndex {
189|6a78bd|            let ch = body[i]
190|7d24e6|            if ch == "$" {
191|dbcb8c|                var j = body.index(after: i)
192|993846|                var digits = ""
193|f76007|                while j < body.endIndex, body[j].isNumber {
194|c59af6|                    digits.append(body[j])
195|f350a6|                    j = body.index(after: j)
196|4e2d32|                }
197|adc83b|
198|e6f600|                if !digits.isEmpty, let n = Int(digits) {
199|f67692|                    if placeholderOffsets[n] == nil {
200|173495|                        placeholderOffsets[n] = output.count
201|c9717a|                    }
202|5d22b9|                    i = j
203|f41bef|                    continue
204|4e2d32|                }
205|a7dc16|            }
206|adc83b|
207|87962f|            output.append(ch)
208|e6010d|            i = body.index(after: i)
209|5f3077|        }
210|adc83b|
211|b2860b|        let cursorOffset = placeholderOffsets[1] ?? output.count
212|e982be|        return (output, cursorOffset)
213|27e597|    }
214|b31277|}
215|adc83b|

225|ae92ad|    // MARK: - JSONC helpers
226|adc83b|
227|196f77|    /// VS Code `settings.json` can contain JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
228|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
229|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
230|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
231|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
232|adc83b|
233|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
234|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
235|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
236|27e597|    }

243|ae92ad|    // MARK: - JSONC helpers
244|adc83b|
245|8160ec|    /// VS Code `launch.json` often uses JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
246|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
247|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
248|e91279|        // Remove block comments first.
249|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
250|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
251|adc83b|
252|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
253|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
254|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
255|27e597|    }

285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"
290|5f3077|        }
291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }

353|763883|    private func detectDeclaration(_ line: String) -> (type: FoldRegion.FoldType, label: String)? {
354|3ccee6|        func matchName(pattern: String) -> String? {
355|6cc0c4|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
356|f2f390|            guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
357|ebf922|                  match.numberOfRanges >= 2,
358|762e94|                  let r = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
359|f5f042|            else { return nil }
360|480e4a|            return String(line[r])
361|5f3077|        }
362|adc83b|
363|f67078|        // Allow leading attributes like "@MainActor", "@available(...)"
364|0c5ed8|        // Allow common modifiers in any order (best-effort).
365|ca2c54|        let prefix = #"^(?:\s*@\w+(?:\([^\)]*\))?\s+)*(?:\s*(?:public|private|internal|fileprivate|open|final|indirect|lazy|static|override|mutating|nonmutating)\s+)*"#
366|adc83b|
367|cf49c1|        // IMPORTANT: avoid treating "class func"/"class var" as a type declaration.
368|e1fc33|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"class\s+(?!func\b|var\b|let\b)([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
369|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
370|5f3077|        }
371|adc83b|
372|8d6e9b|        // Actor (Swift concurrency) – fold like a class/struct
373|8d98f9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"actor\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
374|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
375|5f3077|        }
376|adc83b|
377|c629a9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"struct\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
378|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
379|5f3077|        }
380|adc83b|
381|75283c|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"enum\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
382|0f57db|            return (.enumDeclaration, name)
383|5f3077|        }
384|adc83b|
385|bb35e5|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"protocol\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
386|982dbc|            return (.protocolDeclaration, name)
387|5f3077|        }
388|adc83b|
389|940527|        // Extensions can include dotted names (Foo.Bar)
390|b2a8c3|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"extension\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.]*)"#) {
391|fbf8d2|            return (.extension, name)
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|c2ae65|        return nil
395|27e597|    }
396|b4687f|    
397|a1a6f6|    private func detectFunction(_ line: String) -> String? {
398|d7dbc1|        // Function detection with visibility modifiers
399|2861c1|        let visibilityKeywords = ["public", "private", "internal", "fileprivate", "static", "class", "override", "final", "mutating", "convenience"]
400|d6ed84|        
401|981adf|        // Check for 'func' keyword
402|db4a2c|        if line.contains("func ") {
403|25ca5f|            // Extract function name
404|270a0d|            let funcPattern = "func\\s+(\\w+)"
405|b5e31c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: funcPattern),
406|d7fb50|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
407|9e61c1|               let nameRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
408|456ee3|                let functionName = String(line[nameRange])
409|185b9c|                // Check for parameters to create label
410|bbf605|                if let parenStart = line.firstIndex(of: "("), let parenEnd = line.firstIndex(of: ")") {
411|2d3254|                    let params = String(line[parenStart...parenEnd])
412|929aa2|                    return "\(functionName)\(params)"
413|4e2d32|                }
414|8aa06e|                return functionName
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|4d99b7|        // Init detection
419|a1d502|        if let initName = extractName(from: line, prefix: "init", visibility: visibilityKeywords) {
420|3d8f8b|            return "\(initName)"
421|5f3077|        }
422|d6ed84|        
423|2a2371|        // Deinit detection
424|70e552|        if line.contains("deinit") {
425|9db7b1|            return "deinit"
426|5f3077|        }
427|d6ed84|        
428|307e69|        // Computed property with get/set
429|f3cc39|        if line.hasPrefix("var ") && (line.contains("{") || line.contains("get")) {
430|950394|            if let varName = extractVariableName(from: line) {
431|99146d|                return varName
432|a7dc16|            }
433|5f3077|        }
434|d6ed84|        
435|c2ae65|        return nil
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|1ec945|    private func detectControlFlow(_ line: String) -> String? {
439|bad9a4|        let controlFlowPatterns = [
440|0bf98c|            ("if ", "if"),
441|9fe51e|            ("guard ", "guard"),
442|62af45|            ("else if", "else if"),
443|7da324|            ("else", "else"),
444|99fc8d|            ("for ", "for"),
445|37f5a4|            ("while ", "while"),
446|402c75|            ("repeat", "repeat"),
447|f81318|            ("switch ", "switch"),
448|ff609c|            ("case ", "case"),
449|d493af|            ("default:", "default"),
450|0ca7b9|            ("do ", "do"),
451|30a630|            ("catch", "catch")
452|220505|        ]
453|d6ed84|        
454|186e39|        for (pattern, label) in controlFlowPatterns {
455|3cfde0|            if line.contains(pattern) {
456|6ef273|                return label
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|c2ae65|        return nil
460|27e597|    }
461|b4687f|    
462|143320|    private func extractName(from line: String, prefix: String, visibility: [String]) -> String? {
463|47867c|        var components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
464|d6ed84|        
465|b4fd50|        // Remove visibility modifiers
466|6bbc02|        components = components.filter { !visibility.contains($0) }
467|d6ed84|        
468|ad7b7d|        // Find prefix index
469|524a3a|        if let prefixIndex = components.firstIndex(where: { $0 == prefix }),
470|22dab3|           prefixIndex + 1 < components.count {
471|5c4751|            var name = components[prefixIndex + 1]
472|43f61d|            // Remove colons and other trailing characters
473|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
474|3f8c05|            name = name.components(separatedBy: "<").first ?? name
475|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
476|470adb|            return name
477|5f3077|        }
478|c2ae65|        return nil
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|c68b6f|    private func extractVariableName(from line: String) -> String? {
482|6e7aec|        let components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
483|a2b557|        if components.count >= 2, components[0] == "var" {
484|696097|            var varName = components[1]
485|cdb291|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? varName
486|0300ee|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: "=").first ?? varName
487|c7c291|            return varName
488|5f3077|        }
489|c2ae65|        return nil
490|27e597|    }
491|b4687f|    
492|9d571e|    private func findOpeningBrace(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int? {
493|1ccc79|        for i in startIndex..<min(startIndex + 5, lines.count) {
494|539363|            if lines[i].contains("{") {
495|883981|                return i
496|a7dc16|            }
497|5f3077|        }
498|c2ae65|        return nil
499|27e597|    }
500|b4687f|    
501|a3e3d4|    private func isDeclarationLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
502|3d6d16|        let keywords = ["class", "struct", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "init", "func"]
503|ce9d51|        return keywords.contains { line.contains("\($0) ") }

505|b4687f|    
506|785057|    private func isFunctionLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
507|00501b|        return line.contains("func ") || line.contains("init ")
508|27e597|    }
509|b4687f|    
510|70bda3|    private func detectBlockEnd(_ line: String, leadingWhitespace: Int) -> Bool {
511|ae2f5c|        return (line.hasPrefix("}") || line.starts(with: "}")) && 
512|9c322d|               (line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) == "}" || 
513|65b3d9|                line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).hasPrefix("}"))
514|27e597|    }

345|8e47e1|    /// Start a real JavaScript debug session
346|2b9817|    func startDebugging(code: String, fileName: String, fileId: String) {
347|4118d6|        // Clear previous state
348|96e590|        consoleEntries.removeAll()
349|f75c5d|        callStack.removeAll()
350|ad2751|        variables.removeAll()
351|d6ed84|        
352|c0f638|        // Add system message
353|49277e|        consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
354|c18490|            message: "Starting debug session for \(fileName)...",
355|27afb6|            kind: .system
356|813e75|        ))
357|d6ed84|        
358|ed1770|        // Set up initial call stack
359|ee221a|        callStack = [
360|db8273|            StackFrame(function: "<module>", file: fileName, line: 1)
361|220505|        ]
362|b51589|        selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
363|481302|        state = .running
364|d6ed84|        
365|fabbcb|        // Run JavaScript with JSRunner
366|0f1953|        Task {
367|78f5a7|            let runner = JSRunner()
368|3070d1|            
369|80530a|            // Capture console output
370|2bcb08|            runner.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
371|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
372|9e6003|                    guard let self = self else { return }
373|1b9d24|                    let kind: ConsoleEntry.Kind
374|571cf3|                    if message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") {
375|19d4ff|                        kind = .error
376|6ba763|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[WARN]") {
377|bd649a|                        kind = .warning
378|e9bff4|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[INFO]") {
379|cb1c58|                        kind = .info
380|540066|                    } else {
381|bc6733|                        kind = .output
382|c9717a|                    }
383|56aa6d|                    // Strip prefix for cleaner output
384|63772a|                    let cleanMessage = message
385|ba5a18|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[LOG] ", with: "")
386|dbc777|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[ERROR] ", with: "")
387|be10bc|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[WARN] ", with: "")
388|1f973e|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[INFO] ", with: "")
389|ffc155|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(message: cleanMessage, kind: kind))
390|4e2d32|                }
391|a7dc16|            }
392|3070d1|            
393|71cc09|            do {
394|8a3016|                let result = try await runner.execute(code: code, timeout: 30.0)
395|dbac47|                let resultString = result.toString() ?? ""
396|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
397|2160a3|                    if !resultString.isEmpty && resultString != "undefined" {
398|cfc3f8|                        self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
399|23cb42|                            message: "→ \(resultString)",
400|07ef2b|                            kind: .output
401|78dc58|                        ))
402|c9717a|                    }
403|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
404|7997c0|                        message: "Debug session ended.",
405|32eda6|                        kind: .system
406|c89922|                    ))
407|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
408|27adbc|                    self.callStack.removeAll()
409|4e2d32|                }
410|91b9a2|            } catch {
411|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
412|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
413|fd7354|                        message: error.localizedDescription,
414|bddd8e|                        kind: .error
415|c89922|                    ))
416|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
417|4ae511|                        message: "Debug session ended with error.",
418|32eda6|                        kind: .system
419|c89922|                    ))
420|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
421|4e2d32|                }
422|a7dc16|            }
423|5f3077|        }
424|27e597|    }

433|d1463b|    func stepOver() {

436|27e597|    }

438|2ca9c8|    func stepInto() {
439|ce02c3|        guard state.canStep else { return }
440|f0b58f|        advanceTopFrameLine(by: 1)
441|23d0ec|        // Pretend we stepped into a function.
442|982289|        if let top = callStack.first {
443|8c256c|            var cs = callStack
444|27877d|            cs.insert(StackFrame(function: "helper()", file: top.file, line: top.line), at: 0)
445|b80726|            callStack = cs
446|1e5c04|            selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
447|5f3077|        }
448|27e597|    }
449|adc83b|
450|d1c987|    private func advanceTopFrameLine(by delta: Int) {
451|1735de|        guard !callStack.isEmpty else { return }
452|adc83b|
453|5c5f53|        // IMPORTANT: mutate via a copy so @Published emits reliably for collection changes.
454|e6cfa2|        var cs = callStack
455|dc199c|        cs[0].line += delta
456|917f8a|        callStack = cs
457|adc83b|
458|390c0e|        // Make the demo watch expression change a bit.
459|592404|        if let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.expression == "counter" }) {
460|95bd8c|            var watches = watchExpressions
461|2ed9b0|            let n = Int(watches[idx].value) ?? 0
462|5b5bc8|            watches[idx].value = "\(n + delta)"
463|6dcd0c|            watchExpressions = watches
464|5f3077|        }
465|adc83b|
466|c6c3e0|        if let varIdx = variables.firstIndex(where: { $0.name == "counter" }) {
467|c2619d|            var vars = variables
468|1520a4|            let n = Int(vars[varIdx].value) ?? 0
469|5da7be|            vars[varIdx].value = "\(n + delta)"
470|dac60a|            variables = vars
471|5f3077|        }
472|27e597|    }

177|93bfe3|    /// Run a file on the remote server
178|4c2551|    func runFile(path: String, via sshManager: SSHManager) async throws {
179|ee913b|        guard sshManager.isConnected else {
180|a2276b|            throw SSHClientError.notConnected
181|5f3077|        }
182|d6ed84|        
183|25e543|        let language = detectLanguage(from: path)
184|1c1bfd|        let interpreter = RemoteSupportedLanguage(rawValue: language)?.interpreter ?? language
185|d6ed84|        
186|2c2d95|        // Build command based on language
187|49e4a0|        let command: String
188|f3155b|        switch language {
189|1c8542|        case "swift":
190|ed2b09|            command = "swift \(path)"
191|bbd027|        case "python", "python3":
192|8e3fde|            command = "python3 \(path)"
193|0db04c|        case "node":
194|86436d|            command = "node \(path)"
195|ee50e6|        case "go":
196|19cee7|            command = "cd $(dirname \(path)) && go run $(basename \(path))"
197|ced789|        case "rust":
198|2cb8e5|            let binaryName = (path as NSString).lastPathComponent.replacingOccurrences(of: ".rs", with: "")
199|a5a828|            command = "rustc \(path) -o /tmp/\(binaryName) && /tmp/\(binaryName)"
200|8cc904|        case "cpp":
201|750f8c|            let binaryName = UUID().uuidString
202|2d3c9c|            command = "g++ \(path) -o /tmp/\(binaryName) && /tmp/\(binaryName)"
203|79273a|        case "c":
204|750f8c|            let binaryName = UUID().uuidString
205|3702e2|            command = "gcc \(path) -o /tmp/\(binaryName) && /tmp/\(binaryName)"
206|520b7d|        default:
207|c4ac4a|            command = "\(interpreter) \(path)"
208|5f3077|        }
209|d6ed84|        
210|df86d1|        try await runCommand(command: command, via: sshManager)
211|27e597|    }
212|b4687f|    
213|e40fb0|    /// Run a command on the remote server
214|3aab3f|    func runCommand(command: String, via sshManager: SSHManager) async throws {
215|ee913b|        guard sshManager.isConnected else {
216|a2276b|            throw SSHClientError.notConnected
217|5f3077|        }
218|d6ed84|        
219|ee83d4|        // Reset state
220|8e25b2|        await resetState()
221|d6ed84|        
222|800dd1|        // Create process record
223|3bef75|        let process = RemoteProcess(
224|87869c|            command: command,
225|e7cc59|            pid: nil,
226|247345|            startTime: Date(),
227|739210|            exitCode: nil,
228|d7d37d|            endTime: nil
229|3143a4|        )
230|d6ed84|        
231|84c5ec|        await MainActor.run {
232|0b4ee8|            self.currentProcess = process
233|e27aa5|            self.isRunning = true
234|5f3077|        }
235|d6ed84|        
236|e436df|        // Build command with working directory if specified
237|7c267c|        let finalCommand: String
238|227cae|        if let cwd = workingDirectory {
239|af9d9d|            finalCommand = "cd '\(cwd)' && \(command)"
240|b31999|        } else {
241|507adb|            finalCommand = command
242|5f3077|        }
243|d6ed84|        
244|8a77a6|        // Execute via SSH with streaming
245|541668|        let stream = executeCommandStreaming(
246|dc4dd5|            command: finalCommand,
247|5bbfaa|            environment: environmentVariables,
248|de011a|            timeout: defaultTimeout,
249|669695|            via: sshManager
250|3143a4|        )
251|d6ed84|        
252|b84546|        // Process the stream
253|2e192c|        var outputBuffer = ""
254|0deb8f|        var receivedExit = false
255|d6ed84|        
256|4da690|        do {
257|0547b1|            for try await outputEvent in stream {
258|5b1a5e|                switch outputEvent {
259|f151c9|                case .stdout(let text):
260|a56a22|                    outputBuffer.append(text)
261|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
262|2f7b4c|                        self.output.append(text)
263|c9717a|                    }
264|dd2193|                    
265|cabb36|                case .stderr(let text):
266|a73586|                    outputBuffer.append("[stderr] \(text)")
267|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
268|0bf02e|                        self.output.append("[stderr] \(text)")
269|c9717a|                    }
270|dd2193|                    
271|f2d98c|                case .exit(let code):
272|4f3ed8|                    receivedExit = true
273|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
274|6d4aec|                        self.lastExitCode = Int(code)
275|0024c2|                        if var process = self.currentProcess {
276|67c3e1|                            process.exitCode = Int(code)
277|0e26a0|                            process.endTime = Date()
278|f33135|                            self.currentProcess = process
279|65a061|                            self.processHistory.append(process)
280|392b35|                        }
281|c0305c|                        self.isRunning = false
282|c9717a|                    }
283|dd2193|                    
284|b50a83|                case .timeout:
285|19b19d|                    outputBuffer.append("\n[Command timed out after \(defaultTimeout) seconds]")
286|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
287|78732a|                        self.output.append("\n[Command timed out after \(self.defaultTimeout) seconds]")
288|c0305c|                        self.isRunning = false
289|332dee|                        self.lastExitCode = -1
290|c9717a|                    }
291|dd2193|                    
292|0e578a|                case .error(let error):
293|a7f8db|                    throw error
294|4e2d32|                }
295|a7dc16|            }
296|3070d1|            
297|bd011c|            // If no exit code was received, mark as completed
298|5ad710|            if !receivedExit {
299|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
300|d34780|                    self.isRunning = false
301|28cc9a|                    if var process = self.currentProcess {
302|5ba53b|                        process.exitCode = self.lastExitCode ?? 0
303|33f76d|                        process.endTime = Date()
304|00b506|                        self.currentProcess = process
305|ab0475|                        self.processHistory.append(process)
306|c9717a|                    }
307|4e2d32|                }
308|a7dc16|            }
309|3070d1|            
310|853889|        } catch {
311|a6a73d|            await MainActor.run {
312|f029ce|                self.isRunning = false
313|5723f1|                self.output.append("\n[Error: \(error.localizedDescription)]")
314|a7dc16|            }
315|864dfa|            throw error
316|5f3077|        }
317|27e597|    }

319|bd227b|    /// Run a code selection on the remote server
320|9e91d6|    func runSelection(code: String, language: String, via sshManager: SSHManager) async throws {
321|ee913b|        guard sshManager.isConnected else {
322|a2276b|            throw SSHClientError.notConnected
323|5f3077|        }

334|d6ed84|        
335|1a086b|        // Build command to create temp file and execute
336|1c1bfd|        let interpreter = RemoteSupportedLanguage(rawValue: language)?.interpreter ?? language
337|90cb1c|        let runCommand: String
338|d6ed84|        
339|f3155b|        switch language {
340|1c8542|        case "swift":
341|13f1c7|            // For Swift, we need to write to file then run
342|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
343|d3d354|            let runCmd = "swift \(tempPath)"
344|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
345|3070d1|            
346|bbd027|        case "python", "python3":
347|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
348|e84d7b|            let runCmd = "python3 \(tempPath)"
349|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
350|3070d1|            
351|0db04c|        case "node":
352|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
353|0f6b2e|            let runCmd = "node \(tempPath)"
354|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
355|3070d1|            
356|9f8131|        case "bash", "sh":
357|feb049|            // For bash, we can use heredoc or direct execution
358|ef4846|            runCommand = "bash -c '\(escapedCode)'"
359|3070d1|

131|6224c3|    func updateSuggestions(for text: String, cursorPosition: Int) {
132|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))

134|0efe98|            apply(items: [])

137|adc83b|

139|042f0f|        guard !prefixLower.isEmpty else {
140|bacf86|            // If user just typed a dot, show members even with empty prefix.
141|a46e04|            if context.isMemberCompletion, let base = context.memberBase {
142|c9f7f8|                let members = memberCandidates(forBase: base)
143|92798d|                let items = members.map { Suggestion(kind: .member, displayText: $0, score: 1000) }
144|0b887c|                apply(items: items)
145|f5a6eb|            } else {
146|4c73d4|                apply(items: [])
147|a7dc16|            }
148|bef5d6|            return
149|5f3077|        }

152|adc83b|

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String

230|adc83b|
231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }
348|b31277|}

351|adc83b|
352|d72239|private extension Array {
353|686e51|    subscript(safe index: Int) -> Element? {
354|0b415a|        indices.contains(index) ? self[index] : nil
355|27e597|    }

235|144775|    @discardableResult
236|f1a606|    func deleteItem(at url: URL) -> Bool {
237|6ef294|        var success = false
238|adc83b|
239|8a4750|        // Try to access the item directly; if that fails, try its parent folder (common for child URLs).
240|329f7b|        let didStartItem = url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
241|1b55fa|        let parentURL = url.deletingLastPathComponent()
242|13dbc8|        let didStartParent = (!didStartItem) ? parentURL.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
243|adc83b|
244|cb255a|        defer {
245|d5ee8f|            if didStartItem { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
246|b12720|            if didStartParent { parentURL.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|4da690|        do {
250|32a845|            try FileManager.default.removeItem(at: url) // works for files and directories
251|5b7229|            success = true
252|853889|        } catch {
253|0b5bbc|            print("Error deleting item at \(url): \(error)")
254|4437a6|            success = false
255|5f3077|        }
256|adc83b|
257|9c36f1|        DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
258|1d3fe4|        return success
259|27e597|    }

263|441de9|    private func buildFileTree(at url: URL) -> FileTreeNode? {
264|a367ea|        let fileManager = FileManager.default
265|adc83b|
266|4da690|        do {
267|45bac6|            let resourceValues = try url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey, .nameKey])
268|06b9e9|            let isDirectory = resourceValues.isDirectory ?? false
269|2496f5|            let name = resourceValues.name ?? url.lastPathComponent
270|adc83b|
271|8a6b94|            if isDirectory {
272|2a0651|                let contents = try fileManager.contentsOfDirectory(
273|81f0bc|                    at: url,
274|f8247b|                    includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isDirectoryKey],
275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }
282|853889|        } catch {
283|8e9e2d|            print("Error building file tree at \(url): \(error)")
284|1c8557|            return nil
285|5f3077|        }
286|27e597|    }

292|35f20f|            expandedPaths.insert(path)

298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }

258|7a1b57|    /// Build a real diff for a working-copy file against HEAD (offline, using NativeGitReader).
259|422db6|    func diffWorkingCopyToHEAD(path: String, kind: GitChangeKind) async -> DiffFile? {
260|a40fde|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { return nil }
261|d6ed84|        
262|0dc171|        return await Task.detached {
263|3519ac|            guard let reader = NativeGitReader(repositoryURL: repoURL) else { return nil }
264|3070d1|            
265|83a740|            let headSha = reader.headSHA()
266|85bb51|            let oldText = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: path, commitSHA: headSha) ?? ""
267|3070d1|            
268|b35691|            let workingURL = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(path)
269|567024|            let newText = (try? String(contentsOf: workingURL, encoding: .utf8)) ?? ""
270|3070d1|            
271|848698|            return DiffBuilder.build(
272|d02bb2|                fileName: path,
273|7e8d9b|                status: kind.rawValue,
274|7f9b45|                old: oldText,
275|87834e|                new: newText
276|43d041|            )
277|2ecb78|        }.value
278|27e597|    }
