398|3b3ea2|    func discard(file: String) async throws {
399|ad5dbf|        // Discard changes by restoring from HEAD
400|7ac4a0|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory,
401|4ba5ca|              let reader = nativeReader else {
402|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
403|5f3077|        }
404|d6ed84|        
405|c615d4|        // Get file content from HEAD
406|e2e112|        if let headSHA = reader.headSHA(),
407|5eb0d8|           let content = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: file, commitSHA: headSHA) {
408|e883ab|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file)
409|144328|            try content.write(to: filePath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
410|b31999|        } else {
411|37d681|            // File doesn't exist in HEAD - delete it
412|e883ab|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file)
413|7528cd|            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: filePath)
414|5f3077|        }
415|d6ed84|        
416|61ed9d|        await refresh()
417|27e597|    }
418|b4687f|    
419|a51d62|    func discardAll() async throws {
420|f978f9|        // Discard all changes by restoring each file from HEAD
421|d11253|        for change in unstagedChanges {
422|025908|            try await discard(file: change.path)
423|5f3077|        }
424|9f2c52|        for file in untrackedFiles {
425|6e5080|            guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { continue }
426|079d80|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file.path)
427|7528cd|            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: filePath)
428|5f3077|        }
429|61ed9d|        await refresh()
430|27e597|    }

217|8cb06f|        if let formatOnSave = settings.formatOnSave { dict["editor.formatOnSave"] = formatOnSave }
218|cddc56|        if let theme = settings.theme, !theme.isEmpty { dict["workbench.colorTheme"] = theme }
219|cd41fb|        if let fontFamily = settings.fontFamily, !fontFamily.isEmpty { dict["editor.fontFamily"] = fontFamily }

225|ae92ad|    // MARK: - JSONC helpers
226|adc83b|
227|196f77|    /// VS Code `settings.json` can contain JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
228|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
229|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
230|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
231|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
232|adc83b|
233|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
234|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
235|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
236|27e597|    }

88|5f3077|        }

274|a58963|                        replacement: String,
275|bba210|                        fileURLs: [URL]? = nil) async throws -> ReplaceResult {

278|adc83b|

311|e3e05b|    private func resolveFiles(rootURL: URL, provided: [URL]?, query: SearchQuery) throws -> [URL] {
312|657d5a|        let all: [URL]
313|070c1c|        if let provided {
314|cc4ad8|            all = provided
315|b31999|        } else {
316|eb4c22|            all = try enumerateFiles(rootURL: rootURL)
317|5f3077|        }
318|97b3ce|        return all.filter { url in
319|f40362|            guard url.isFileURL else { return false }
320|b4ebdb|            let path = url.path
321|bfd9c6|            if matchesAnyGlob(path: path, globs: query.excludeGlobs) { return false }
322|1d0527|            if query.includeGlobs.isEmpty { return true }
323|994605|            return matchesAnyGlob(path: path, globs: query.includeGlobs)
324|5f3077|        }
325|27e597|    }

327|23fd14|    private func enumerateFiles(rootURL: URL) throws -> [URL] {
328|460d36|        let fm = FileManager.default
329|613364|        guard let enumerator = fm.enumerator(at: rootURL,
330|9e7a04|                                            includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isRegularFileKey, .isDirectoryKey],
331|03774c|                                            options: [.skipsHiddenFiles],
332|5fc71e|                                            errorHandler: { _, _ in true }) else {
333|b0f460|            return []
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|f2b1f2|        var urls: [URL] = []
337|3377e0|        for case let url as URL in enumerator {
338|0491f5|            let values = try? url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isRegularFileKey, .isDirectoryKey])
339|2a536d|            if values?.isDirectory == true { continue }
340|1ba475|            if values?.isRegularFile == true {
341|d82ffc|                urls.append(url)
342|a7dc16|            }
343|5f3077|        }
344|a10f36|        return urls
345|27e597|    }
346|adc83b|
347|3e8d6c|    // MARK: - Actual searching
348|adc83b|
349|73077d|    private struct CompiledPattern {
350|2ac01d|        enum Kind {
351|d75daa|            case regex(NSRegularExpression)
352|1637f8|            case literal(needle: String, compareLowercased: Bool, wholeWord: Bool)
353|5f3077|        }
354|895ca2|        let kind: Kind
355|27e597|    }
356|adc83b|
357|065357|    private func compilePattern(for query: SearchQuery) throws -> CompiledPattern {
358|4ff7ae|        if query.options.isRegex {
359|21ffa4|            let opts: NSRegularExpression.Options = query.options.isCaseSensitive ? [] : [.caseInsensitive]
360|71cc09|            do {
361|16d5c5|                let re = try NSRegularExpression(pattern: query.text, options: opts)
362|1452df|                return CompiledPattern(kind: .regex(re))
363|91b9a2|            } catch {
364|7ac396|                throw SearchError.invalidRegex(query.text)
365|a7dc16|            }
366|b31999|        } else {
367|051718|            // Literal search.
368|b0381b|            let compareLowercased = !query.options.isCaseSensitive
369|1b6fc1|            return CompiledPattern(kind: .literal(needle: query.text,
370|7705be|                                                 compareLowercased: compareLowercased,
371|7ec981|                                                 wholeWord: query.options.isWholeWord))
372|5f3077|        }
373|27e597|    }
374|adc83b|
375|b67a78|    private func searchFile(url: URL, rootURL: URL, query: SearchQuery) throws -> FileMatch? {
376|a21236|        let compiled = try compilePattern(for: query)
377|68eff0|        let data: Data
378|4da690|        do {
379|f9a970|            data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
380|853889|        } catch {
381|d40604|            // ignore unreadable files
382|1c8557|            return nil
383|5f3077|        }
384|1b20e1|        // Try UTF-8 first. If it fails, ignore file (keeps implementation safe).
385|52a873|        guard let text = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else { return nil }
386|adc83b|
387|1e56b5|        let relPath: String
388|e5c652|        if url.path.hasPrefix(rootURL.path) {
389|8f96cb|            relPath = String(url.path.dropFirst(rootURL.path.count)).trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet(charactersIn: "/"))
390|b31999|        } else {
391|1b9df7|            relPath = url.path
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|2c8472|        let matches = findMatches(in: text, compiled: compiled)
395|faae37|        if matches.isEmpty { return nil }
396|adc83b|
397|70220a|        return FileMatch(filePath: relPath, matches: matches)
398|27e597|    }
399|adc83b|
400|a3f3a0|    private func findMatches(in text: String, compiled: CompiledPattern) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
401|53729f|        switch compiled.kind {
402|462837|        case .regex(let re):
403|abfc29|            return regexMatches(in: text, re: re)
404|8554ef|        case .literal(let needle, let compareLowercased, let wholeWord):
405|5903fb|            return literalMatches(in: text, needle: needle, compareLowercased: compareLowercased, wholeWord: wholeWord)
406|5f3077|        }
407|27e597|    }
408|adc83b|
409|737c2a|    private func regexMatches(in text: String, re: NSRegularExpression) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
410|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
411|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
412|64c443|        let matches = re.matches(in: text, options: [], range: range)
413|27c73d|        if matches.isEmpty { return [] }
414|adc83b|
415|29f7c0|        // Precompute line starts for fast conversion.
416|6dffc4|        let lineIndex = LineIndex(text)
417|adc83b|
418|2e97c7|        return matches.compactMap { m in
419|bc719f|            guard m.range.location != NSNotFound, m.range.length > 0 else { return nil }
420|e3d5c9|            let (line, col) = lineIndex.lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: m.range.location)
421|1119bd|            let preview = lineIndex.lineText(line: line)
422|3d0a04|            return .init(location: .init(line: line, column: col, length: m.range.length), preview: preview)
423|5f3077|        }
424|27e597|    }
425|adc83b|
426|045702|    private func literalMatches(in text: String,
427|6e8b53|                               needle: String,
428|b73c28|                               compareLowercased: Bool,
429|cb607c|                               wholeWord: Bool) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
430|865c1f|        guard !needle.isEmpty else { return [] }
431|adc83b|
432|9c36ac|        let haystack = compareLowercased ? text.lowercased() : text
433|2f6ee4|        let n = compareLowercased ? needle.lowercased() : needle
434|adc83b|
435|9ba542|        // Use NSString for UTF16 indexing.
436|384be5|        let nsHay = haystack as NSString
437|643b7b|        let nsOrig = text as NSString
438|adc83b|
439|6dffc4|        let lineIndex = LineIndex(text)
440|adc83b|
441|6b1517|        var results: [FileMatch.Match] = []
442|f134a9|        var searchRange = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsHay.length)
443|adc83b|
444|722ae9|        while true {
445|9bb985|            let found = nsHay.range(of: n, options: [], range: searchRange)
446|1815e9|            if found.location == NSNotFound { break }
447|adc83b|
448|e31f22|            if wholeWord {
449|ae0edf|                if !isWholeWordMatch(in: nsHay, range: found) {
450|10e352|                    let nextLoc = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
451|8c9165|                    if nextLoc >= nsHay.length { break }
452|a45a51|                    searchRange = NSRange(location: nextLoc, length: nsHay.length - nextLoc)
453|f41bef|                    continue
454|4e2d32|                }
455|a7dc16|            }
456|adc83b|
457|cdba18|            let (line, col) = lineIndex.lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: found.location)
458|1119bd|            let preview = lineIndex.lineText(line: line)
459|adc83b|
460|868369|            // Use original needle length in UTF16 for accurate highlighting.
461|d60ad7|            let origLen = (needle as NSString).length
462|6c2b48|            results.append(.init(location: .init(line: line, column: col, length: origLen), preview: preview))
463|adc83b|
464|7d1039|            let nextLoc = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
465|44b268|            if nextLoc >= nsHay.length { break }
466|49bf1c|            searchRange = NSRange(location: nextLoc, length: nsHay.length - nextLoc)
467|5f3077|        }
468|adc83b|
469|32b4af|        return results
470|27e597|    }
471|adc83b|
472|aac90d|    private func isWholeWordMatch(in nsText: NSString, range: NSRange) -> Bool {
473|7a86e9|        // Word boundary definition: letters, numbers, underscore.
474|f103a7|        func isWordChar(_ u: unichar) -> Bool {
475|4a1e5c|            if u == 95 { return true } // '_'
476|0b793e|            // ASCII letters/digits
477|cd26fb|            if (u >= 48 && u <= 57) || (u >= 65 && u <= 90) || (u >= 97 && u <= 122) { return true }
478|e2e187|            return false
479|5f3077|        }
480|adc83b|
481|132159|        if range.location > 0 {
482|c016ec|            let prev = nsText.character(at: range.location - 1)
483|a49431|            if isWordChar(prev) { return false }
484|5f3077|        }
485|f8cd54|        let end = range.location + range.length
486|cee764|        if end < nsText.length {
487|468111|            let next = nsText.character(at: end)
488|594cf5|            if isWordChar(next) { return false }
489|5f3077|        }
490|4add8d|        return true
491|27e597|    }
492|adc83b|
493|2b0ba3|    // MARK: - Replace implementation
494|adc83b|
495|594372|    private func replaceInFile(url: URL,
496|710b1e|                               compiled: CompiledPattern,
497|ed9f89|                               replacement: String) throws -> (changed: Bool, replacements: Int) {
498|68eff0|        let data: Data
499|4da690|        do {
500|f9a970|            data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
501|853889|        } catch {
502|18ad8c|            return (false, 0)
503|5f3077|        }
504|8c8e01|        guard let text = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else { return (false, 0) }
505|adc83b|
506|0a048a|        let (newText, reps) = replaceAll(in: text, compiled: compiled, replacement: replacement)
507|92a836|        guard reps > 0 else { return (false, 0) }
508|adc83b|
509|4da690|        do {
510|ea2ea9|            // Atomic write.
511|5c5c3b|            try newText.data(using: .utf8)?.write(to: url, options: [.atomic])
512|853889|        } catch {
513|20715e|            throw SearchError.ioError("Failed to write file: \(url.path)")
514|5f3077|        }
515|876315|        return (true, reps)
516|27e597|    }
517|adc83b|
518|f7d19f|    private func replaceAll(in text: String,
519|9c700d|                            compiled: CompiledPattern,
520|26009e|                            replacement: String) -> (String, Int) {
521|53729f|        switch compiled.kind {
522|462837|        case .regex(let re):
523|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
524|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
525|39e029|            let matches = re.matches(in: text, options: [], range: range)
526|1cc29d|            if matches.isEmpty { return (text, 0) }
527|4d6888|            let out = re.stringByReplacingMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range, withTemplate: replacement)
528|2f64d1|            return (out, matches.count)
529|adc83b|
530|8554ef|        case .literal(let needle, let compareLowercased, let wholeWord):
531|c0f6dc|            if needle.isEmpty { return (text, 0) }
532|f2f430|            // For literal, we re-scan and build output to support whole-word.
533|818f83|            let haystack = compareLowercased ? text.lowercased() : text
534|7d22d9|            let n = compareLowercased ? needle.lowercased() : needle
535|adc83b|
536|e09c62|            let nsHay = haystack as NSString
537|d5b67f|            let nsOrig = text as NSString
538|fc8e73|            let nsNeedle = n as NSString
539|adc83b|
540|06c839|            var out = ""
541|8e842a|            out.reserveCapacity(text.count)
542|adc83b|
543|e70d5f|            var cursor = 0
544|39cefb|            var reps = 0
545|adc83b|
546|0cd27d|            while cursor < nsHay.length {
547|2c9083|                let searchRange = NSRange(location: cursor, length: nsHay.length - cursor)
548|ae1ea7|                let found = nsHay.range(of: n, options: [], range: searchRange)
549|4df494|                if found.location == NSNotFound {
550|8d5f82|                    out += nsOrig.substring(with: NSRange(location: cursor, length: nsOrig.length - cursor))
551|8dcb2c|                    break
552|4e2d32|                }
553|adc83b|
554|1bfe27|                // append leading segment
555|2f703d|                out += nsOrig.substring(with: NSRange(location: cursor, length: found.location - cursor))
556|adc83b|
557|9cbeba|                if wholeWord && !isWholeWordMatch(in: nsHay, range: found) {
558|efda73|                    // not a whole-word match; append original matched text and continue
559|c0aa04|                    out += nsOrig.substring(with: found)
560|eb07b6|                    cursor = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
561|f41bef|                    continue
562|4e2d32|                }
563|adc83b|
564|80b507|                out += replacement
565|4d34ce|                reps += 1
566|adc83b|
567|61d066|                cursor = found.location + max(nsNeedle.length, 1)
568|a7dc16|            }
569|adc83b|
570|b4440a|            return (out, reps)
571|5f3077|        }
572|27e597|    }
573|adc83b|
574|016baf|    // MARK: - Glob matching
575|adc83b|
576|76a6f8|    /// Very small glob matcher supporting '*', '**', and '?'.
577|97859c|    /// Matching is path-based (uses '/' as separator). Globs are compared against the full path.
578|b70596|    private func matchesAnyGlob(path: String, globs: [String]) -> Bool {
579|d4643f|        guard !globs.isEmpty else { return false }
580|c5ecd3|        for g in globs {
581|090ad0|            if globMatch(path: path, pattern: g) { return true }
582|5f3077|        }
583|dc1500|        return false
584|27e597|    }
585|adc83b|
586|028fc6|    private func globMatch(path: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
587|2d6c82|        // Convert glob to regex.
588|6bde96|        // - '**' => '.*'
589|efea0d|        // - '*' => '[^/]*'
590|6eb809|        // - '?' => '[^/]'
591|079dc7|        var regex = "^"
592|c72f2a|        var i = pattern.startIndex
593|10492c|        while i < pattern.endIndex {
594|ebcb12|            let ch = pattern[i]
595|8b01b3|            if ch == "*" {
596|324652|                let next = pattern.index(after: i)
597|1327fc|                if next < pattern.endIndex && pattern[next] == "*" {
598|dad527|                    regex += ".*"
599|3f2179|                    i = pattern.index(after: next)
600|fdd0e2|                } else {
601|fde091|                    regex += "[^/]*"
602|74f6aa|                    i = next
603|4e2d32|                }
604|735319|            } else if ch == "?" {
605|164012|                regex += "[^/]"
606|8a996a|                i = pattern.index(after: i)
607|f5a6eb|            } else {
608|a51d15|                // escape regex metacharacters
609|cf009b|                if "\\.^$|()[]{}+".contains(ch) {
610|b0575b|                    // Single backslash to escape the character in regex
611|366984|                    // e.g., "." becomes "\." which matches literal dot
612|504778|                    regex += "\\\(ch)"
613|fdd0e2|                } else {
614|a46a47|                    regex.append(ch)
615|4e2d32|                }
616|8a996a|                i = pattern.index(after: i)
617|a7dc16|            }
618|5f3077|        }
619|3a8c74|        regex += "$"
620|adc83b|
621|8e440e|        let opts: NSRegularExpression.Options = []
622|cda732|        guard let re = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: regex, options: opts) else { return false }
623|ef92c3|        let ns = path as NSString
624|5f54b4|        let r = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
625|68f6b6|        return re.firstMatch(in: path, options: [], range: r) != nil
626|27e597|    }
627|adc83b|
628|a2fe2d|    // MARK: - Glob Pattern Testing
629|adc83b|
630|abaafb|    /// Runs all glob pattern tests and returns results for verification
631|8dabfe|    /// - Returns: Tuple containing (passedCount, failedCount, [failureDetails])
632|fcd371|    public func runGlobTests() -> (passed: Int, failed: Int, failures: [String]) {
633|519438|        var passed = 0
634|05dd4a|        var failed = 0
635|82aab2|        var failures: [String] = []
636|adc83b|
637|c53e2a|        func assert(_ condition: Bool, _ message: String) {
638|0580b1|            if condition {
639|023fd0|                passed += 1
640|f5a6eb|            } else {
641|731d09|                failed += 1
642|2ddcdc|                failures.append(message)
643|a7dc16|            }
644|5f3077|        }
645|adc83b|
646|31804a|        // MARK: 1. testGlobStar - single * matches any chars except /
647|d6ed84|        
648|f9337d|        // Single * should match any characters except path separator /
649|828aef|        assert(globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match file.swift")
650|c77ed4|        assert(globMatch(path: "main.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match main.swift")
651|0ade40|        assert(globMatch(path: "ViewController.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match ViewController.swift")
652|228c0b|        assert(!globMatch(path: "src/file.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should NOT match src/file.swift (contains /)")
653|60094a|        assert(!globMatch(path: "path/to/file.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should NOT match path/to/file.swift (contains /)")
654|d6ed84|        
655|4703ea|        // * in the middle
656|b6c29a|        assert(globMatch(path: "test-file.txt", pattern: "test-*.txt"), "testGlobStar: test-*.txt should match test-file.txt")
657|1a7b98|        assert(globMatch(path: "test-123.txt", pattern: "test-*.txt"), "testGlobStar: test-*.txt should match test-123.txt")
658|acdfb6|        assert(globMatch(path: "test-123-456.txt", pattern: "test-*.txt"), "testGlobStar: test-*.txt should match test-123-456.txt")
659|d6ed84|        
660|b41aa1|        // Multiple *
661|ae4fc1|        assert(globMatch(path: "a.b.swift", pattern: "*.*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.*.swift should match a.b.swift")
662|f900bf|        assert(globMatch(path: "View.Controller.swift", pattern: "*.*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.*.swift should match View.Controller.swift")
663|0b990d|        assert(!globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: "*.*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.*.swift should NOT match file.swift (no dot before .swift)")
664|adc83b|
665|7099ac|        // MARK: 2. testGlobDoubleStar - ** matches any path including /
666|d6ed84|        
667|53dedb|        // ** should match any characters including path separator /
668|95cd30|        assert(globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: "**/*.swift"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/*.swift should match file.swift")
669|2a2a82|        assert(globMatch(path: "src/file.swift", pattern: "**/*.swift"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/*.swift should match src/file.swift")
670|11eba9|        assert(globMatch(path: "path/to/file.swift", pattern: "**/*.swift"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/*.swift should match path/to/file.swift")
671|818c01|        assert(globMatch(path: "very/deep/nested/path/file.swift", pattern: "**/*.swift"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/*.swift should match very/deep/nested/path/file.swift")
672|a35c5a|        assert(!globMatch(path: "file.txt", pattern: "**/*.swift"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/*.swift should NOT match file.txt (wrong extension)")
673|415ab5|        assert(!globMatch(path: "src/file.txt", pattern: "**/*.swift"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/*.swift should NOT match src/file.txt (wrong extension)")
674|d6ed84|        
675|d6b8bf|        // ** at the start only
676|23855a|        assert(globMatch(path: "foo/bar/baz", pattern: "**/baz"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/baz should match foo/bar/baz")
677|0df0b3|        assert(globMatch(path: "baz", pattern: "**/baz"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/baz should match baz")
678|b5ac5d|        assert(globMatch(path: "a/b/c/baz", pattern: "**/baz"), "testGlobDoubleStar: **/baz should match a/b/c/baz")
679|d6ed84|        
680|1c564f|        // ** at the end
681|514381|        assert(globMatch(path: "src/", pattern: "src/**"), "testGlobDoubleStar: src/** should match src/")
682|fc1d44|        assert(globMatch(path: "src/file.swift", pattern: "src/**"), "testGlobDoubleStar: src/** should match src/file.swift")
683|a37277|        assert(globMatch(path: "src/components/Button.swift", pattern: "src/**"), "testGlobDoubleStar: src/** should match src/components/Button.swift")
684|adc83b|
685|ba8670|        // MARK: 3. testGlobQuestion - ? matches single char
686|d6ed84|        
687|c406d7|        // ? should match exactly one character (any char except /)
688|10021d|        assert(globMatch(path: "file1.swift", pattern: "file?.swift"), "testGlobQuestion: file?.swift should match file1.swift")
689|65743e|        assert(globMatch(path: "fileA.swift", pattern: "file?.swift"), "testGlobQuestion: file?.swift should match fileA.swift")
690|234ff6|        assert(globMatch(path: "file_.swift", pattern: "file?.swift"), "testGlobQuestion: file?.swift should match file_.swift")
691|183fe1|        assert(!globMatch(path: "file12.swift", pattern: "file?.swift"), "testGlobQuestion: file?.swift should NOT match file12.swift (two chars)")
692|2bf48e|        assert(!globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: "file?.swift"), "testGlobQuestion: file?.swift should NOT match file.swift (no char before .swift)")
693|91aff5|        assert(!globMatch(path: "file/1.swift", pattern: "file?.swift"), "testGlobQuestion: file?.swift should NOT match file/1.swift (? doesn't match /)")
694|d6ed84|        
695|053c89|        // Multiple ?
696|12f127|        assert(globMatch(path: "file01.txt", pattern: "file??.txt"), "testGlobQuestion: file??.txt should match file01.txt")
697|b54531|        assert(globMatch(path: "fileAB.txt", pattern: "file??.txt"), "testGlobQuestion: file??.txt should match fileAB.txt")
698|744b37|        assert(!globMatch(path: "file1.txt", pattern: "file??.txt"), "testGlobQuestion: file??.txt should NOT match file1.txt (only one char)")
699|adc83b|
700|e163ce|        // MARK: 4. testGlobExactMatch - exact path matching
701|d6ed84|        
702|f0d364|        // Exact path should match exactly
703|add19f|        assert(globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: "file.swift"), "testGlobExactMatch: exact match file.swift")
704|cb9ce7|        assert(globMatch(path: "src/file.swift", pattern: "src/file.swift"), "testGlobExactMatch: exact match src/file.swift")
705|302efc|        assert(!globMatch(path: "File.swift", pattern: "file.swift"), "testGlobExactMatch: file.swift should NOT match File.swift (case sensitive)")
706|982ca0|        assert(!globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: "file.txt"), "testGlobExactMatch: file.txt should NOT match file.swift")
707|ae3264|        assert(!globMatch(path: "src/file.swift", pattern: "file.swift"), "testGlobExactMatch: file.swift should NOT match src/file.swift (different path)")
708|d6ed84|        
709|383d19|        // Empty pattern edge case
710|e55374|        assert(!globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: ""), "testGlobExactMatch: empty pattern should NOT match file.swift")
711|4da06e|        assert(globMatch(path: "", pattern: ""), "testGlobExactMatch: empty pattern should match empty path")
712|adc83b|
713|f2e3ac|        // MARK: 5. testGlobMultiplePatterns - test matchesAnyGlob with array
714|d6ed84|        
715|80c7e9|        // Test matchesAnyGlob with multiple patterns
716|a4e23b|        assert(matchesAnyGlob(path: "file.swift", globs: ["*.swift", "*.md"]), "testGlobMultiplePatterns: should match *.swift in array")
717|dc8167|        assert(matchesAnyGlob(path: "README.md", globs: ["*.swift", "*.md"]), "testGlobMultiplePatterns: should match *.md in array")
718|79a7fe|        assert(!matchesAnyGlob(path: "file.txt", globs: ["*.swift", "*.md"]), "testGlobMultiplePatterns: should NOT match *.txt")
719|d6ed84|        
720|937640|        assert(matchesAnyGlob(path: "src/main.swift", globs: ["**/*.swift", "**/*.h", "**/*.m"]), "testGlobMultiplePatterns: should match **/*.swift")
721|bfcf31|        assert(matchesAnyGlob(path: "headers/main.h", globs: ["**/*.swift", "**/*.h", "**/*.m"]), "testGlobMultiplePatterns: should match **/*.h")
722|2f2cc1|        assert(matchesAnyGlob(path: "impl/main.m", globs: ["**/*.swift", "**/*.h", "**/*.m"]), "testGlobMultiplePatterns: should match **/*.m")
723|15e94f|        assert(!matchesAnyGlob(path: "src/main.js", globs: ["**/*.swift", "**/*.h", "**/*.m"]), "testGlobMultiplePatterns: should NOT match **/*.js")
724|d6ed84|        
725|108627|        // Empty globs array

727|d6ed84|

736|9dcea3|        assert(globMatch(path: "", pattern: "*"), "testGlobEdgeCases: * should match empty string")

738|d6ed84|        
739|d63cb7|        // Special regex characters that should be escaped (treated as literals)

741|12cb45|        assert(!globMatch(path: "fileXswift", pattern: "file.swift"), "testGlobEdgeCases: . should NOT match X")
742|0ac256|        assert(globMatch(path: "test+file.swift", pattern: "test+file.swift"), "testGlobEdgeCases: + should be literal")
743|92bcfb|        assert(globMatch(path: "(test).swift", pattern: "(test).swift"), "testGlobEdgeCases: () should be literal")
744|ce5d9c|        assert(globMatch(path: "[test].swift", pattern: "[test].swift"), "testGlobEdgeCases: [] should be literal")
745|d6ed84|        
746|cf7450|        // Escaped characters in pattern

748|d6ed84|        
749|e14a49|        // Whitespace handling

751|9ff105|        assert(globMatch(path: "file name.swift", pattern: "file *.swift"), "testGlobEdgeCases: should match with space in pattern")

760|d6ed84|

831|909c8a|// MARK: - Line indexing helper
832|adc83b|
833|01ee41|/// LineIndex is internal to allow testing while being encapsulated within SearchManager
834|d09a50|internal struct LineIndex {
835|f4be4a|    private let text: String
836|c348f4|    private let nsText: NSString
837|b41b69|    // line start offsets in UTF16
838|f3984c|    private var lineStarts: [Int] = [0]
839|b24272|    private var lines: [String] = []
840|adc83b|
841|23e59f|    init(_ text: String) {
842|226b10|        self.text = text
843|52183e|        self.nsText = text as NSString
844|adc83b|
845|2f4cf6|        // Build lineStarts and cache line strings.
846|c5b554|        // Use NSString lineRange(for:) to be safe with various newline types.
847|6ee764|        var idx = 0
848|17cda2|        var currentLine = 1
849|13db51|        while idx < nsText.length {
850|2c0444|            let r = nsText.lineRange(for: NSRange(location: idx, length: 0))
851|471553|            let lineStr = nsText.substring(with: r).trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet.newlines)
852|9855fd|            if lines.count < currentLine { lines.append(lineStr) } else { lines[currentLine - 1] = lineStr }
853|adc83b|
854|ae4d58|            idx = NSMaxRange(r)
855|1af0df|            if idx < nsText.length {
856|053f6f|                lineStarts.append(idx)
857|12fb7d|                currentLine += 1
858|a7dc16|            }
859|5f3077|        }
860|d679f2|        if nsText.length == 0 {
861|7cc276|            lines = [""]
862|3822a8|            lineStarts = [0]
863|706df5|        } else if lines.isEmpty {
864|5813e2|            // single line without newline
865|a3f790|            lines = [text]
866|3822a8|            lineStarts = [0]
867|5f3077|        }
868|27e597|    }
869|adc83b|
870|fb0e0a|    func lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: Int) -> (line: Int, column: Int) {
871|4aeba9|        // Binary search lineStarts to find last start <= offset.
872|32f4a9|        var lo = 0
873|c12820|        var hi = lineStarts.count - 1
874|7d7bcb|        while lo <= hi {
875|c1ca4d|            let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
876|e6933d|            let v = lineStarts[mid]
877|ef7066|            if v == utf16Offset {
878|52d775|                return (mid + 1, 1)
879|f31785|            } else if v < utf16Offset {
880|0a83f3|                lo = mid + 1
881|f5a6eb|            } else {
882|7320e6|                hi = mid - 1
883|a7dc16|            }
884|5f3077|        }
885|06fcf8|        let lineIndex = max(hi, 0)
886|acc313|        let lineStart = lineStarts[lineIndex]
887|ce9896|        let col = max(utf16Offset - lineStart, 0) + 1
888|fc379c|        return (lineIndex + 1, col)
889|27e597|    }
890|adc83b|
891|2fb6bf|    func lineText(line: Int) -> String {
892|329128|        let i = max(1, line) - 1
893|14d9cb|        if i >= 0 && i < lines.count { return lines[i] }
894|2ca6c1|        return ""
895|27e597|    }
896|b4687f|    
897|073a12|    /// Internal accessor for testing binary search behavior
898|11be92|    internal var lineStartOffsets: [Int] { lineStarts }
899|8b9d56|    internal var lineCount: Int { lines.count }
900|bc5c81|    internal var allLines: [String] { lines }
901|b31277|}
902|adc83b|

195|e6d260|class AIManager: ObservableObject {
196|9a4557|    // API Keys stored in UserDefaults (consider Keychain for production)
197|51e181|    @AppStorage("openai_api_key") var openAIKey: String = ""
198|feba64|    @AppStorage("anthropic_api_key") var anthropicKey: String = ""
199|8eac3c|    @AppStorage("google_api_key") var googleKey: String = ""
200|7011c5|    @AppStorage("kimi_api_key") var kimiKey: String = ""
201|2a856e|    @AppStorage("glm_api_key") var glmKey: String = ""
202|719111|    @AppStorage("groq_api_key") var groqKey: String = ""
203|a1c0fd|    @AppStorage("deepseek_api_key") var deepseekKey: String = ""
204|66e37b|    @AppStorage("mistral_api_key") var mistralKey: String = ""
205|0ca61a|    @AppStorage("ollama_host") var ollamaHost: String = "http://localhost:11434"
206|b4687f|    
207|018888|    @AppStorage("selected_provider") private var selectedProviderRaw: String = AIProvider.openai.rawValue
208|e31d85|    @AppStorage("selected_model_id") private var selectedModelId: String = "gpt-4o"
209|b4687f|    
210|73f80f|    @Published var currentSession: ChatSession = ChatSession()
211|4e22ed|    @Published var sessions: [ChatSession] = []
212|2a51f8|    @Published var isLoading = false
213|f5a541|    @Published var error: String?
214|7da9ba|    @Published var streamingResponse = ""
215|b4687f|    
216|1cd389|    var selectedProvider: AIProvider {
217|7c273a|        get { AIProvider(rawValue: selectedProviderRaw) ?? .openai }
218|1d48ce|        set { selectedProviderRaw = newValue.rawValue }
219|27e597|    }
220|b4687f|    
221|436d4f|    var selectedModel: AIModel {

223|bcf6de|            selectedProvider.models.first { $0.id == selectedModelId } ?? selectedProvider.models[0]
224|5f3077|        }
225|70bd55|        set { selectedModelId = newValue.id }
226|27e597|    }
227|b4687f|    
228|359b1b|    init() {
229|9ec2c3|        loadSessions()
230|d760e7|        if sessions.isEmpty {
231|84aa73|            createNewSession()
232|b31999|        } else {
233|28bc19|            currentSession = sessions[0]
234|5f3077|        }
235|27e597|    }

237|d4b4d7|    // MARK: - Session Management
238|b4687f|    
239|026706|    func createNewSession() {
240|8b68ee|        let session = ChatSession()

242|0a41be|        currentSession = session
243|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
244|27e597|    }
245|b4687f|    
246|e33e11|    func selectSession(_ session: ChatSession) {

248|27e597|    }
249|b4687f|    
250|a2e6f9|    func deleteSession(_ session: ChatSession) {
251|d6c3da|        sessions.removeAll { $0.id == session.id }
252|0290aa|        if currentSession.id == session.id {
253|132ab3|            currentSession = sessions.first ?? ChatSession()
254|a1938c|            if sessions.isEmpty {
255|187c87|                sessions.append(currentSession)
256|a7dc16|            }
257|5f3077|        }
258|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
259|27e597|    }
260|b4687f|    
261|338502|    func clearCurrentSession() {
262|bf5063|        currentSession.messages.removeAll()
263|aa2963|        updateSession()
264|27e597|    }
265|b4687f|    
266|8c2b8c|    private func updateSession() {
267|2ecb1b|        currentSession.updatedAt = Date()
268|3817b6|        if let index = sessions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == currentSession.id }) {
269|6fcbfa|            sessions[index] = currentSession
270|5f3077|        }
271|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
272|27e597|    }

279|5f3077|        }
280|27e597|    }
281|b4687f|    
282|429d69|    private func loadSessions() {

284|4a226f|           let decoded = try? JSONDecoder().decode([ChatSession].self, from: data) {

289|0ea925|    // MARK: - API Key Validation

291|ca1870|    func hasValidAPIKey() -> Bool {
292|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
293|9ecaf9|        case .openai: return !openAIKey.isEmpty
294|9e889d|        case .anthropic: return !anthropicKey.isEmpty
295|913761|        case .google: return !googleKey.isEmpty
296|2d4ef2|        case .kimi: return !kimiKey.isEmpty
297|bc2b9b|        case .glm: return !glmKey.isEmpty
298|47ba54|        case .groq: return !groqKey.isEmpty
299|d902be|        case .deepseek: return !deepseekKey.isEmpty
300|c5192a|        case .mistral: return !mistralKey.isEmpty
301|06a0e1|        case .ollama: return true // Ollama doesn't require API key
302|6c4184|        case .localMLX: return true // Local model, no API key needed
303|5f3077|        }
304|27e597|    }
305|b4687f|    
306|9839dd|    func getAPIKey() -> String {
307|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
308|93ff72|        case .openai: return openAIKey
309|7ce3eb|        case .anthropic: return anthropicKey
310|ca0d01|        case .google: return googleKey
311|30539a|        case .kimi: return kimiKey
312|d32dc6|        case .glm: return glmKey
313|40a8a4|        case .groq: return groqKey
314|5109f7|        case .deepseek: return deepseekKey
315|2ffd6d|        case .mistral: return mistralKey
316|c37216|        case .ollama: return ""
317|443135|        case .localMLX: return ""
318|5f3077|        }
319|27e597|    }

321|caea46|    // MARK: - Send Message
322|b4687f|    
323|0fd45c|    @MainActor
324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {
325|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
326|06856b|            error = "Please set your API key in settings"
327|bef5d6|            return
328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|e352e6|        let userMessage = ChatMessage(role: .user, content: content)
331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|        
334|8495c1|        // Update title if first message
335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {
336|066ce6|            currentSession.title = String(content.prefix(50))
337|e749a7|            updateSession()
338|5f3077|        }
339|d6ed84|        
340|d52924|        isLoading = true
341|0406ba|        error = nil
342|dc34fb|        streamingResponse = ""
343|d6ed84|        
344|4da690|        do {
345|ce5098|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: currentSession.messages, context: context)
346|70672e|            let assistantMessage = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response, codeBlocks: extractCodeBlocks(from: response))
347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {
350|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false
354|27e597|    }
355|b4687f|    
356|7e38b7|    // MARK: - Code Actions
357|b4687f|    
358|0fd45c|    @MainActor
359|70008d|    func explainCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
360|337b30|        let prompt = "Explain the following \(language) code in detail. What does it do, and how does it work?\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
361|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
362|27e597|    }
363|b4687f|    
364|0fd45c|    @MainActor
365|a1609b|    func fixCode(_ code: String, language: String, errorMessage: String? = nil) async -> String {
366|7b5f15|        var prompt = "Fix any issues in the following \(language) code and explain what was wrong:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
367|bf3125|        if let error = errorMessage {
368|5ee495|            prompt += "\n\nError message: \(error)"
369|5f3077|        }
370|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
371|27e597|    }
372|b4687f|    
373|0fd45c|    @MainActor
374|61e13d|    func generateTests(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
375|a6412a|        let prompt = "Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following \(language) code. Include edge cases and typical usage:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
376|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
377|27e597|    }
378|b4687f|    
379|0fd45c|    @MainActor
380|83d5b9|    func refactorCode(_ code: String, language: String, instruction: String) async -> String {
381|eefc66|        let prompt = "Refactor the following \(language) code according to this instruction: \(instruction)\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
382|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
383|27e597|    }
384|b4687f|    
385|0fd45c|    @MainActor
386|e7b4e9|    func documentCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
387|02ed0f|        let prompt = "Add comprehensive documentation/comments to the following \(language) code:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
388|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
389|27e597|    }
390|b4687f|    
391|0fd45c|    @MainActor
392|90c566|    private func sendAndGetResponse(_ prompt: String) async -> String {
393|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
394|1b72a2|            return "Error: Please set your API key in settings"
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|d52924|        isLoading = true
398|0406ba|        error = nil
399|d6ed84|        
400|4da690|        do {
401|3b5c4f|            let messages = [ChatMessage(role: .user, content: prompt)]
402|153d92|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: messages, context: nil)
403|612c3f|            isLoading = false
404|d392d0|            return response
405|853889|        } catch {
406|612c3f|            isLoading = false
407|0cacff|            return "Error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
408|5f3077|        }
409|27e597|    }
410|b4687f|    
411|579307|    // MARK: - API Request
412|b4687f|    
413|0a6144|    private func makeAPIRequest(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
414|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
415|6ca85d|        case .openai:
416|d9a528|            return try await callOpenAI(messages: messages, context: context)
417|2b5eb0|        case .anthropic:
418|afe61a|            return try await callAnthropic(messages: messages, context: context)
419|51e5bc|        case .google:
420|688f02|            return try await callGoogle(messages: messages, context: context)
421|a90b5c|        case .kimi:
422|467f79|            return try await callKimi(messages: messages, context: context)
423|448974|        case .glm:
424|d03556|            return try await callGLM(messages: messages, context: context)
425|6a2402|        case .groq:
426|2fdc7f|            return try await callGroq(messages: messages, context: context)
427|586fca|        case .deepseek:
428|b7290a|            return try await callDeepSeek(messages: messages, context: context)
429|0935ee|        case .mistral:
430|048202|            return try await callMistral(messages: messages, context: context)
431|7b8ebd|        case .ollama:
432|20a226|            return try await callOllama(messages: messages, context: context)
433|5135a3|        case .localMLX:
434|258af5|            return try await callLocalMLX(messages: messages, context: context)
435|5f3077|        }
436|27e597|    }

438|b90399|    // MARK: - OpenAI API
439|b4687f|    
440|c4fdfa|    private func callOpenAI(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
441|bc2d67|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.openai.baseURL)/chat/completions")!
442|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
443|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
444|7fd512|        request.setValue("Bearer \(openAIKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
445|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
446|d6ed84|        
447|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
448|d6ed84|        
449|5740dd|        // Add system message with context
450|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
451|55709b|        apiMessages.append(["role": "system", "content": systemPrompt])
452|d6ed84|        
453|c5ae63|        // Add conversation messages
454|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
455|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
456|5f3077|        }
457|d6ed84|        
458|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
459|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
460|b5548e|            "messages": apiMessages,
461|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
462|f1c54d|            "temperature": 0.7
463|220505|        ]
464|d6ed84|        
465|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
466|d6ed84|        
467|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
468|d6ed84|        
469|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
470|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
471|5f3077|        }
472|d6ed84|        
473|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
474|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
475|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
476|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
477|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
478|a7dc16|            }
479|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
480|5f3077|        }
481|d6ed84|        
482|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
483|95fe6c|        guard let choices = json?["choices"] as? [[String: Any]],
484|6c7545|              let firstChoice = choices.first,
485|9e7d93|              let message = firstChoice["message"] as? [String: Any],
486|870b1f|              let content = message["content"] as? String else {
487|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
488|5f3077|        }
489|d6ed84|        
490|9be7b6|        return content
491|27e597|    }
492|b4687f|    
493|29e6f6|    // MARK: - Anthropic API
494|b4687f|    
495|f1fc2e|    private func callAnthropic(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
496|3b388d|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.anthropic.baseURL)/messages")!
497|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)

499|ede6ed|        request.setValue(anthropicKey, forHTTPHeaderField: "x-api-key")
500|6b8824|        request.setValue("2023-06-01", forHTTPHeaderField: "anthropic-version")
501|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
502|d6ed84|        
503|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
504|d6ed84|        
505|113613|        for msg in messages where msg.role != .system {
506|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
507|5f3077|        }
508|d6ed84|        
509|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
510|d6ed84|        
511|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
512|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
513|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
514|f06de6|            "system": systemPrompt,
515|60c92e|            "messages": apiMessages
516|220505|        ]
517|d6ed84|        
518|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
519|d6ed84|        
520|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
521|d6ed84|        
522|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
523|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
524|5f3077|        }
525|d6ed84|        
526|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
527|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
528|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
529|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
530|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
531|a7dc16|            }
532|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
533|5f3077|        }
534|d6ed84|        
535|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
536|918dea|        guard let content = json?["content"] as? [[String: Any]],
537|fda5e9|              let firstContent = content.first,
538|31d41c|              let text = firstContent["text"] as? String else {
539|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
540|5f3077|        }
541|d6ed84|        
542|ec263c|        return text
543|27e597|    }

545|87a420|    // MARK: - Google API
546|b4687f|    
547|190d00|    private func callGoogle(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
548|dd3258|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.google.baseURL)/models/\(selectedModel.id):generateContent?key=\(googleKey)")!
549|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
550|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
551|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
552|d6ed84|        
553|2ae98d|        var parts: [[String: Any]] = []
554|d6ed84|        
555|288895|        // Add system context
556|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
557|e08e07|        parts.append(["text": "System: \(systemPrompt)"])
558|d6ed84|        
559|c1c8d4|        // Add messages
560|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
561|989b77|            let role = msg.role == .assistant ? "Model" : "User"
562|35f120|            parts.append(["text": "\(role): \(msg.content)"])
563|5f3077|        }
564|d6ed84|        
565|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
566|6251fc|            "contents": [
567|f76f20|                ["parts": parts]
568|97e7d5|            ],
569|0eaa6f|            "generationConfig": [
570|80d7f4|                "maxOutputTokens": 4096,
571|e772de|                "temperature": 0.7
572|324820|            ]
573|220505|        ]
574|d6ed84|        
575|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
576|d6ed84|        
577|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
578|d6ed84|        
579|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
580|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
581|5f3077|        }
582|d6ed84|        
583|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
584|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
585|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
586|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
587|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
588|a7dc16|            }
589|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
590|5f3077|        }
591|d6ed84|        
592|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
593|12af8b|        guard let candidates = json?["candidates"] as? [[String: Any]],
594|977b10|              let firstCandidate = candidates.first,
595|0ff2f5|              let content = firstCandidate["content"] as? [String: Any],
596|9ddaf9|              let parts = content["parts"] as? [[String: Any]],
597|61737e|              let firstPart = parts.first,
598|a6eafc|              let text = firstPart["text"] as? String else {
599|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
600|5f3077|        }
601|d6ed84|        
602|ec263c|        return text
603|27e597|    }

928|0fd45c|    @MainActor
929|8b65f7|    private func callLocalMLX(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
930|cdacf1|        let localLLM = LocalLLMService.shared
931|d6ed84|        
932|7f5962|        // Auto-load model if not loaded
933|8532e3|        if !localLLM.isModelLoaded {
934|b1c14b|            await localLLM.loadModel()
935|5f3077|        }
936|d6ed84|        
937|19b14f|        guard localLLM.isModelLoaded else {
938|c8173d|            throw AIError.apiError("Failed to load local model")
939|5f3077|        }
940|d6ed84|        
941|05abd5|        // Convert messages to the format LocalLLMService expects
942|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
943|20ec53|        var chatMessages: [(role: String, content: String)] = []
944|d6ed84|        
945|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
946|8df8ce|            chatMessages.append((role: msg.role.rawValue, content: msg.content))
947|5f3077|        }
948|d6ed84|        
949|b4ee8b|        let response = try await localLLM.chat(messages: chatMessages, systemPrompt: systemPrompt)
950|090c3f|        return response
951|27e597|    }
952|b4687f|    
953|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
954|b4687f|    
955|a96bea|    private func buildSystemPrompt(context: String?) -> String {
956|a60aaf|        var prompt = """
957|de15a3|You are an expert coding assistant integrated into a code editor on iPadOS. You help developers write, debug, explain, and improve their code. Always respond in English.
958|adc83b|
959|3584f0|Guidelines:
960|9e10fd|- Provide clear, concise explanations
961|d9814a|- Use code blocks with proper language tags for code snippets
962|fab31f|- Suggest best practices and optimizations
963|17f65d|- Be helpful with debugging and error resolution
964|a2707f|- When generating code, ensure it's complete and runnable
965|ea2d25|- ALWAYS respond in English regardless of input language
966|d72f9a|- Never output raw XML tags like <think> or </think>
967|e4615a|"""
968|d6ed84|        
969|54cd50|        if let context = context, !context.isEmpty {
970|b91f6a|            prompt += "\n\nCurrent file context:\n```\n\(context)\n```"
971|5f3077|        }
972|d6ed84|        
973|dd02e7|        return prompt
974|27e597|    }
975|b4687f|    
976|c53a51|    private func extractCodeBlocks(from text: String) -> [CodeBlock] {
977|791eb5|        var blocks: [CodeBlock] = []
978|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
979|d6ed84|        
980|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
981|f7ed63|            return blocks
982|5f3077|        }
983|d6ed84|        
984|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
985|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
986|d6ed84|        
987|847e6d|        for match in matches {
988|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
989|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
990|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
991|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
992|9e5c94|                blocks.append(CodeBlock(language: language.isEmpty ? "text" : language, code: code))
993|a7dc16|            }
994|5f3077|        }
995|d6ed84|        
996|db7106|        return blocks
997|27e597|    }
998|b31277|}
999|adc83b|
1000|e2fa47|// MARK: - AI Errors
1001|adc83b|
1002|c16cee|enum AIError: LocalizedError {
1003|06d89d|    case invalidResponse
1004|dbebbc|    case httpError(Int)
1005|24e92a|    case apiError(String)
1006|b833b2|    case noAPIKey
1007|b4687f|    
1008|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
1009|2e6d08|        switch self {
1010|9a7b43|        case .invalidResponse: return "Invalid response from AI service"
1011|385ec1|        case .httpError(let code): return "HTTP Error: \(code)"
1012|1b0277|        case .apiError(let message): return message
1013|e8a23b|        case .noAPIKey: return "No API key configured"
1014|5f3077|        }
1015|27e597|    }
1016|b31277|}

2|421767|import Combine
3|adc83b|
4|910fc8|/// Manages inline code suggestions with debouncing, throttling, and cancellation support.
5|a3a85a|/// Uses Combine operators to prevent excessive API calls while maintaining responsive UX.
6|e0ad8a|/// 
7|eafd18|/// Request Flow:
8|59449b|/// 1. User types → typingSubject receives event
9|4129a0|/// 2. Cancel any pending request immediately (prevent stale results)
10|60cc0a|/// 3. Debounce: Wait 300ms after user stops typing
11|d7895c|/// 4. Throttle: Max 1 request per 2 seconds (drop events if under throttle window)
12|170e3f|/// 5. Filter: Remove duplicates and empty contexts
13|b648e9|/// 6. Fetch: Execute API request with cancellation support
14|2798da|/// 7. Update: Publish result to currentSuggestion
15|69d728|@MainActor
16|b4b6d6|final class InlineSuggestionManager: ObservableObject {
17|b4687f|    
18|36e733|    // MARK: - Published Properties
19|b4687f|    
20|2d54c7|    /// The current inline suggestion text to display, if any.
21|508f65|    @Published var currentSuggestion: String?
22|b4687f|    
23|e9359c|    /// The current cursor position in the document.
24|059686|    @Published var cursorPosition: CursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: 0, column: 0)
25|b4687f|    
26|8bc45f|    /// Whether a suggestion request is currently in progress.
27|e588e6|    @Published var isLoading: Bool = false
28|b4687f|    
29|5accbc|    /// The last error that occurred during suggestion fetching.
30|020420|    @Published var lastError: Error?
31|b4687f|    
32|f5c08e|    // MARK: - Configuration
33|b4687f|    
34|d29118|    /// Debounce interval after user stops typing (300ms).
35|8aea18|    /// This prevents firing requests while user is actively typing.
36|d21a74|    private let debounceInterval: TimeInterval = 0.3
37|b4687f|    
38|857e9e|    /// Throttle interval for maximum request rate (2 seconds).
39|e5cbc1|    /// This ensures max 1 request per 2 seconds, preventing API abuse.
40|f1edb6|    private let throttleInterval: TimeInterval = 2.0
41|b4687f|    
42|7d6c39|    // MARK: - Combine Pipeline
43|b4687f|    
44|840b2a|    /// Subject for user typing events.
45|5f700b|    /// Uses unlimited buffer to ensure no events are dropped.
46|feca53|    private let typingSubject = PassthroughSubject<TextChangeEvent, Never>()
47|b4687f|    
48|9e0911|    /// The Combine pipeline subscription.
49|7a6440|    private var pipelineCancellable: AnyCancellable?
50|b4687f|    
51|e685a4|    /// Set to store all subscriptions.
52|c209d8|    private var cancellables = Set<AnyCancellable>()
53|b4687f|    
54|2b582a|    /// Current async task handle for fetching suggestions.
55|dcdd34|    /// Used to cancel in-flight requests.
56|3e50fc|    private var fetchTask: Task<String?, Never>?
57|b4687f|    
58|d882ba|    // MARK: - Partial Accept State
59|b4687f|    
60|521649|    /// Tracks the current position within a partially accepted suggestion.
61|edb2e7|    /// This is the offset into `currentSuggestion` that has already been accepted.
62|66558c|    @Published var partialAcceptPosition: Int = 0
63|b4687f|    
64|252bbe|    /// The text that has been partially accepted so far.
65|23c0b7|    var acceptedText: String {
66|34727b|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion,
67|99f0e4|              partialAcceptPosition > 0,
68|6f186d|              partialAcceptPosition <= suggestion.count else {
69|273b25|            return ""
70|5f3077|        }
71|c58169|        let endIndex = suggestion.index(suggestion.startIndex, offsetBy: partialAcceptPosition)
72|a6d7a3|        return String(suggestion[..<endIndex])
73|27e597|    }
74|b4687f|    
75|623cce|    /// The remaining unaccepted portion of the suggestion.
76|36f580|    var remainingSuggestionText: String {
77|34727b|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion,
78|c20245|              partialAcceptPosition < suggestion.count else {
79|273b25|            return ""
80|5f3077|        }
81|1c274a|        let startIndex = suggestion.index(suggestion.startIndex, offsetBy: partialAcceptPosition)
82|ccf36e|        return String(suggestion[startIndex...])
83|27e597|    }

86|b4687f|    
87|17e491|    /// Represents a cursor position in the editor.
88|917bb6|    struct CursorPosition: Equatable, Hashable {
89|c0eddc|        let line: Int
90|1b9532|        let column: Int
91|d6ed84|        
92|844b66|        var isValid: Bool {
93|81130d|            return line >= 0 && column >= 0
94|5f3077|        }
95|27e597|    }
96|b4687f|    
97|f2b8ad|    /// Represents a text change event with all context needed for suggestions.
98|e11c4a|    struct TextChangeEvent: Equatable {
99|b93cbb|        let content: String
100|f8e1d1|        let position: CursorPosition
101|5c32fb|        let timestamp: Date
102|d6ed84|        
103|0ac630|        static func == (lhs: TextChangeEvent, rhs: TextChangeEvent) -> Bool {
104|d5e1e4|            lhs.content == rhs.content &&
105|9312b1|            lhs.position == rhs.position
106|5f3077|        }
107|27e597|    }
108|b4687f|    
109|ff7267|    /// Extracted context for suggestion requests.
110|dfae94|    struct SuggestionContext: Equatable {
111|32465c|        let currentLine: String
112|e144be|        let precedingCode: String
113|01f5f8|        let cursorPosition: CursorPosition
114|1b9168|        let language: String?
115|27e597|    }

117|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
118|b4687f|

120|272263|        setupSuggestionPipeline()

122|b4687f|    
123|e57f77|    deinit {
124|64e2e1|        pipelineCancellable?.cancel()
125|f12123|        fetchTask?.cancel()
126|358450|        cancellables.forEach { $0.cancel() }
127|27e597|    }

129|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
130|b4687f|    
131|7f6935|    /// Requests a suggestion for the given content at the current cursor position.
132|7cfeb1|    /// 
133|287474|    /// This method:
134|78e1e3|    /// 1. Immediately cancels any pending request (keystroke takes priority)
135|f889c3|    /// 2. Updates the cursor position
136|b5e254|    /// 3. Sends event through the Combine pipeline (debounce + throttle)
137|2cbc84|    ///
138|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
139|bd00e9|    ///   - content: The full text content of the document.
140|0fcb11|    ///   - position: The current cursor position.
141|54e85a|    func requestSuggestion(for content: String, at position: CursorPosition) {
142|401d59|        // CRITICAL: Cancel any in-flight request immediately on new keystroke
143|1d1cad|        // This prevents stale suggestions from appearing when user types quickly
144|4457ec|        cancelPendingRequest()
145|d6ed84|        
146|5adefc|        // Update cursor position
147|c3ed42|        self.cursorPosition = position
148|d6ed84|        
149|7daa90|        // Create text change event
150|ad3099|        let event = TextChangeEvent(
151|e6ca21|            content: content,
152|f4cdd2|            position: position,
153|2319c3|            timestamp: Date()
154|3143a4|        )
155|d6ed84|        
156|8fce95|        // Send through Combine pipeline (debounce + throttle will be applied)
157|58ab86|        typingSubject.send(event)
158|27e597|    }
159|b4687f|    
160|73bb6e|    /// Cancels any pending suggestion request and clears loading state.
161|3454b1|    func cancelPendingRequest() {
162|f12123|        fetchTask?.cancel()
163|cfb6df|        fetchTask = nil
164|295f36|        isLoading = false
165|27e597|    }
166|b4687f|    
167|40da37|    /// Clears the current suggestion.
168|ca0623|    func clearSuggestion() {
169|dc082b|        currentSuggestion = nil
170|6683cd|        partialAcceptPosition = 0
171|f0416e|        lastError = nil
172|27e597|    }
173|b4687f|    
174|a87e8a|    /// Accepts the next word of the current inline suggestion.
175|27e25b|    /// - Returns: The text that was accepted in this call, or nil if no suggestion is active
176|144775|    @discardableResult
177|d82f01|    func partialAccept() -> String? {
178|cc51cf|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion else {
179|1c8557|            return nil
180|5f3077|        }
181|d6ed84|        
182|35c2c0|        // Check if we've already fully accepted the suggestion
183|11df65|        guard partialAcceptPosition < suggestion.count else {
184|8a7c5e|            clearSuggestion()
185|1c8557|            return nil
186|5f3077|        }
187|d6ed84|        
188|85ec0e|        // Find the next word boundary from current position
189|4fcb47|        let remainingText = remainingSuggestionText
190|f918e6|        let charsToAccept = findNextWordEnd(in: remainingText)
191|d6ed84|        
192|b04df9|        // Get the text to accept
193|1c274a|        let startIndex = suggestion.index(suggestion.startIndex, offsetBy: partialAcceptPosition)
194|df48c9|        let endIndex = suggestion.index(startIndex, offsetBy: charsToAccept)
195|c90a59|        let textToAccept = String(suggestion[startIndex..<endIndex])
196|d6ed84|        
197|ff36dc|        // Update the partial accept position
198|ab09a0|        partialAcceptPosition += charsToAccept
199|d6ed84|        
200|a847b3|        return textToAccept
201|27e597|    }
202|b4687f|    
203|5ed567|    /// Resets the partial accept state to start from the beginning.
204|cdb2fa|    func resetPartialAcceptState() {
205|6683cd|        partialAcceptPosition = 0
206|27e597|    }
207|b4687f|    
208|bc645c|    /// Checks if the suggestion has been fully accepted.
209|65f031|    var isSuggestionFullyAccepted: Bool {
210|d2249d|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion else { return false }
211|8ad5d9|        return partialAcceptPosition >= suggestion.count
212|27e597|    }
213|b4687f|    
214|afabb4|    /// Returns the ghost text to display (remaining unaccepted portion).
215|ab34aa|    var ghostText: String {
216|7b2152|        return remainingSuggestionText
217|27e597|    }
218|b4687f|    
219|3e5efc|    /// Updates the cursor position without triggering a suggestion request.
220|6beca1|    func updateCursorPosition(_ position: CursorPosition) {
221|c3ed42|        self.cursorPosition = position
222|27e597|    }
223|b4687f|    
224|049941|    // MARK: - Private Methods
225|b4687f|    
226|886d26|    /// Sets up the Combine pipeline with debounce and throttle operators.
227|7cfeb1|    /// 
228|2302ea|    /// Pipeline flow:
229|fcd00b|    /// 1. typingSubject receives events
230|a7ce76|    /// 2. debounce(0.3s): Wait 300ms after user stops typing
231|a5971a|    /// 3. throttle(2.0s): Max 1 event per 2 seconds (latest=true for responsive updates)
232|c17292|    /// 4. removeDuplicates: Filter identical events
233|627455|    /// 5. filter: Remove empty/unworthy contexts
234|6f85e6|    /// 6. flatMap: Execute async fetch with cancellation support
235|2181d5|    private func setupSuggestionPipeline() {
236|ca13c2|        pipelineCancellable = typingSubject
237|0245e4|            // STEP 1: DEBOUNCE (300ms)
238|70cff9|            // Wait 300ms after user stops typing before processing
239|d9fce5|            // This prevents firing requests while user is actively typing
240|84dd17|            .debounce(for: .seconds(debounceInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main)
241|3070d1|            
242|89fc5a|            // STEP 2: THROTTLE (2 seconds)
243|dbb01b|            // Maximum 1 request per 2 seconds
244|bce2c6|            // latest=true ensures we get the most recent event if multiple occur within throttle window
245|ecc467|            .throttle(for: .seconds(throttleInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main, latest: true)
246|3070d1|            
247|844254|            // STEP 3: REMOVE DUPLICATES
248|413909|            // Filter out events with identical content and position
249|0a99da|            // This prevents duplicate API calls for the same context
250|cf49b3|            .removeDuplicates()
251|3070d1|            
252|202ed6|            // STEP 4: FILTER WORTHY CONTEXTS
253|a23af6|            // Only proceed if we have meaningful content to get suggestions for
254|845b1e|            .filter { [weak self] event in
255|06905f|                guard let self = self else { return false }
256|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
257|cc659b|                return self.shouldRequestSuggestion(context: context)
258|a7dc16|            }
259|3070d1|            
260|339920|            // STEP 5: FLATMAP TO ASYNC FETCH
261|2bc815|            // Transform each event into a publisher that fetches suggestions
262|dbc22b|            // This creates a new async context that can be cancelled
263|11fcbf|            .flatMap { [weak self] event -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> in
264|ec615d|                guard let self = self else {
265|6156c3|                    return Just(nil).eraseToAnyPublisher()
266|4e2d32|                }
267|216278|                
268|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
269|6830af|                return self.createFetchPublisher(for: context)
270|a7dc16|            }
271|4de6c5|            // Ensure we receive on main thread for UI updates
272|a8597a|            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
273|1051e2|            .sink { [weak self] suggestion in
274|518c9e|                self?.currentSuggestion = suggestion
275|02c979|                self?.isLoading = false
276|a7dc16|            }
277|27e597|    }
278|b4687f|    
279|984754|    /// Creates a Combine publisher that performs the async suggestion fetch.
280|f2b66e|    /// This allows the fetch to be cancelled when new events arrive.
281|4c0331|    private func createFetchPublisher(for context: SuggestionContext) -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> {
282|c401a0|        // Cancel any existing fetch task
283|f12123|        fetchTask?.cancel()
284|d6ed84|        
285|1c5d21|        // Create new async task for fetching
286|6b1f07|        let task = Task { [weak self] () -> String? in
287|8c11f0|            guard let self = self else { return nil }
288|3070d1|            
289|a6a73d|            await MainActor.run {
290|7494b5|                self.isLoading = true
291|db594a|                self.lastError = nil
292|a7dc16|            }
293|3070d1|            
294|71cc09|            do {
295|88792d|                // Perform the actual fetch
296|5f8cb1|                let suggestion = try await self.fetchSuggestion(for: context)
297|216278|                
298|056141|                // Check if cancelled before updating UI
299|ac578d|                try Task.checkCancellation()
300|d0b7e3|                return suggestion
301|57e5c6|            } catch is CancellationError {
302|9f1433|                // Task was cancelled - return nil silently
303|15034a|                return nil
304|91b9a2|            } catch {
305|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
306|98968a|                    self.lastError = error
307|4e2d32|                }
308|15034a|                return nil
309|a7dc16|            }
310|5f3077|        }
311|d6ed84|        
312|5854c9|        fetchTask = task
313|d6ed84|        
314|544041|        // Convert the async task to a publisher
315|5c40d7|        return Future<String?, Never> { promise in
316|47ed67|            Task {
317|458ee4|                let result = await task.value
318|67db9f|                promise(.success(result))
319|a7dc16|            }
320|5f3077|        }
321|3dc442|        .eraseToAnyPublisher()
322|27e597|    }
323|b4687f|

326|69a1e9|        // Simulate network delay - replace with actual API call
327|7caa27|        try await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 100_000_000) // 0.1 seconds
328|d6ed84|        
329|7fc63b|        // Check for cancellation before returning
330|495744|        try Task.checkCancellation()
331|d6ed84|        
332|47167e|        // Placeholder: Return nil or mock suggestion based on context
333|7f89a9|        // This should be replaced with actual LLM or completion service integration
334|c2ae65|        return nil
335|27e597|    }
336|b4687f|    
337|4ab122|    /// Fetches a suggestion from the completion service.
338|0191c7|    /// This is a placeholder that should be replaced with actual implementation.
339|aa3012|    private func fetchSuggestion(for context: SuggestionContext) async throws -> String? {
340|69a1e9|        // Simulate network delay - replace with actual API call
341|7caa27|        try await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 100_000_000) // 0.1 seconds
342|d6ed84|        
343|c28476|        // Check for cancellation
344|495744|        try Task.checkCancellation()
345|d6ed84|        
346|47167e|        // Placeholder: Return nil or mock suggestion based on context
347|7f89a9|        // This should be replaced with actual LLM or completion service integration
348|c2ae65|        return nil
349|27e597|    }
350|b4687f|    
351|ec5f51|    /// Extracts context information from the content at the given position.
352|9fc150|    private func extractContext(from content: String, at position: CursorPosition) -> SuggestionContext {
353|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
354|d6ed84|        
355|781fff|        // Get current line
356|f4fd53|        let currentLineIndex = min(position.line, max(0, lines.count - 1))
357|35c41a|        let currentLine = lines.indices.contains(currentLineIndex) ? lines[currentLineIndex] : ""
358|d6ed84|        
359|2e5ac5|        // Get preceding code (all lines before current)
360|93d93c|        let precedingLines = lines.prefix(currentLineIndex)
361|ba8451|        let precedingCode = precedingLines.joined(separator: "\n")
362|d6ed84|        
363|d09899|        // Detect language from file extension or content (placeholder)
364|d3169b|        let language = detectLanguage(from: content)
365|d6ed84|        
366|a185cb|        return SuggestionContext(
367|d52293|            currentLine: currentLine,
368|5ee51b|            precedingCode: precedingCode,
369|567a23|            cursorPosition: position,
370|82f146|            language: language
371|3143a4|        )
372|27e597|    }
373|b4687f|    
374|b850a0|    /// Detects the programming language from content.
375|4ca7ae|    /// This is a simple placeholder implementation.
376|bd0232|    private func detectLanguage(from content: String) -> String? {
377|a8e760|        // Basic heuristics for language detection
378|6adfea|        // In a real implementation, this would use file extension or more sophisticated detection
379|d6ed84|        
380|0f82fd|        if content.contains("import Swift") || content.contains("func ") && content.contains("->") {
381|99935c|            return "swift"
382|6fd626|        } else if content.contains("function") || content.contains("const ") || content.contains("let ") {
383|fbfb5d|            return "javascript"
384|ba13c3|        } else if content.contains("def ") || content.contains("import ") && content.contains("print(") {
385|aa2434|            return "python"
386|5f3077|        }
387|d6ed84|        
388|c2ae65|        return nil
389|27e597|    }
390|b4687f|    
391|36b8b2|    /// Determines if a suggestion should be requested based on context.
392|09fa9b|    /// This can be used to avoid requesting suggestions in inappropriate contexts.
393|df8f21|    private func shouldRequestSuggestion(context: SuggestionContext) -> Bool {
394|7b378b|        // Don't suggest on empty lines unless there's preceding context
395|8778db|        if context.currentLine.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).isEmpty {
396|84cc0e|            return !context.precedingCode.isEmpty
397|5f3077|        }
398|d6ed84|        
399|e8fcd4|        // Minimum content length to trigger suggestions
400|040d23|        let minContextLength = 10
401|3e1d44|        let totalContextLength = context.precedingCode.count + context.currentLine.count
402|d6ed84|        
403|390255|        return totalContextLength >= minContextLength
404|27e597|    }
405|b4687f|    
406|691d16|    // MARK: - Word Boundary Helpers for Partial Accept
407|b4687f|    
408|a4030c|    /// Finds the end position of the next word in the given text.
409|11fe08|    /// A word is defined as a sequence of characters up to and including:
410|bb7830|    /// - The next whitespace character (space, tab, newline)
411|0c3e7d|    /// - The end of the punctuation after a word
412|72b3cd|    /// - The next punctuation boundary
413|7924b5|    private func findNextWordEnd(in text: String) -> Int {
414|97b6e3|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 0 }
415|d6ed84|        
416|e21158|        let characters = Array(text)
417|ef04de|        var position = 0
418|d6ed84|        
419|12514b|        // Skip leading whitespace (accept it as part of the word if present)
420|3aa0c3|        var leadingWhitespaceCount = 0
421|d475df|        while position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
422|f0583e|            position += 1
423|7de75f|            leadingWhitespaceCount += 1
424|5f3077|        }
425|d6ed84|        
426|a4acf3|        // If we only had whitespace, return that
427|71ca00|        if position >= characters.count {
428|b99609|            return position
429|5f3077|        }
430|d6ed84|        
431|c2a7bd|        // Get the current character type
432|39bbe7|        let firstChar = characters[position]
433|d6ed84|        
434|8f8367|        if firstChar.isLetter || firstChar.isNumber {
435|b722f9|            // Word character: consume all word characters
436|02eced|            while position < characters.count && (characters[position].isLetter || characters[position].isNumber) {
437|de2813|                position += 1
438|a7dc16|            }
439|3070d1|            
440|d4a201|            // Also consume any trailing punctuation attached to the word (like "word.")
441|4f05d1|            while position < characters.count && isWordPunctuation(characters[position]) {
442|de2813|                position += 1
443|a7dc16|            }
444|3070d1|            
445|0c75aa|            // Include trailing whitespace after the word (just one space)
446|5b0346|            if position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
447|de2813|                position += 1
448|a7dc16|            }
449|7a1786|        } else if isPunctuation(firstChar) {
450|1a436e|            // Punctuation: consume all consecutive punctuation
451|d5ff38|            while position < characters.count && isPunctuation(characters[position]) {
452|de2813|                position += 1
453|a7dc16|            }
454|3070d1|            
455|c673d1|            // Include trailing whitespace (just one space)
456|5b0346|            if position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
457|de2813|                position += 1
458|a7dc16|            }
459|5c9934|        } else if firstChar.isWhitespace {
460|9874c8|            // Multiple whitespace: accept all consecutive whitespace
461|b51034|            while position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
462|de2813|                position += 1
463|a7dc16|            }
464|b31999|        } else {
465|1cc2f4|            // Other characters: just consume one character
466|f0583e|            position += 1
467|5f3077|        }
468|d6ed84|        
469|9a857a|        // Ensure we always accept at least one non-whitespace character
470|792181|        // or all leading whitespace if that's all there is
471|01985b|        return max(position, leadingWhitespaceCount > 0 ? leadingWhitespaceCount : 1)
472|27e597|    }
473|b4687f|    
474|fdb5d7|    /// Checks if a character is punctuation that can be part of a word (like period, comma, etc.)
475|afa9e9|    private func isWordPunctuation(_ char: Character) -> Bool {
476|f80730|        let wordPunctuation = CharacterSet(charactersIn: ".,;:!?-_'")
477|732148|        guard let scalar = char.unicodeScalars.first else { return false }
478|725015|        return wordPunctuation.contains(scalar)
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|6c65dc|    /// Checks if a character is general punctuation or symbol
482|3dbf46|    private func isPunctuation(_ char: Character) -> Bool {
483|00b935|        return char.isPunctuation || char.isSymbol
484|27e597|    }
485|b31277|}
