487|9f0d64|// MARK: - Error Types
488|adc83b|
489|19dffe|enum InlineSuggestionError: Error {
490|8f612b|    case requestThrottled
491|395e26|    case noContextAvailable
492|a4913f|    case serviceUnavailable
493|989d08|    case cancelled
494|b31277|}
495|adc83b|
496|5ed7e0|// MARK: - UIKeyCommand Extensions for Partial Accept
497|adc83b|
498|204354|/// Extension to provide keyboard shortcut bindings for partial accept functionality.
499|6933fd|/// Bind to Ctrl+Right Arrow or Option+Right Arrow.
500|ea8a39|extension UIResponder {
501|b4687f|    
502|06ecd9|    /// Registers keyboard commands for inline suggestions partial accept.
503|6a3cce|    /// Call this from your editor view controller to enable Ctrl+Right and Option+Right shortcuts.
504|05bcd9|    static func registerInlineSuggestionKeyCommands() -> [UIKeyCommand] {
505|d0ba57|        // Ctrl+Right Arrow for partial accept
506|4e4369|        let ctrlRightCommand = UIKeyCommand(
507|810d7f|            input: UIKeyCommand.inputRightArrow,
508|d08628|            modifierFlags: .control,
509|0e3f78|            action: #selector(performPartialAccept(_:))
510|3143a4|        )
511|b4eef5|        ctrlRightCommand.wantsPriorityOverSystemBehavior = true
512|d6ed84|        
513|6c4e41|        // Option+Right Arrow for partial accept (alternative binding)
514|c44b96|        let optRightCommand = UIKeyCommand(
515|810d7f|            input: UIKeyCommand.inputRightArrow,
516|722957|            modifierFlags: .alternate,
517|0e3f78|            action: #selector(performPartialAccept(_:))
518|3143a4|        )
519|67b4a4|        optRightCommand.wantsPriorityOverSystemBehavior = true
520|d6ed84|        
521|44f52a|        return [ctrlRightCommand, optRightCommand]
522|27e597|    }

184|4e2d32|                }
185|cda61a|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = true
186|fd1885|            } else if detectCommentEnd(trimmed) {
187|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
188|e33d82|                if let comment = commentStack.popLast() {
189|bf0471|                    if index - comment.startLine > 1 {
190|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
191|d5b0c0|                            startLine: comment.startLine,
192|46d058|                            endLine: index,
193|64e6ca|                            type: .comment,
194|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"
195|78dc58|                        ))
196|c9717a|                    }
197|4e2d32|                }
198|f5a6eb|            } else {
199|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
200|a7dc16|            }
201|3070d1|            
202|3d946d|            // MARK: - Class/Struct/Enum/Protocol/Extension Detection
203|2f1070|            if let declaration = detectDeclaration(trimmed) {
204|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
205|2b937f|                    blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
206|fdd0e2|                } else {
207|7ec133|                    // Declaration without opening brace - look ahead for it
208|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
209|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
210|c09b95|                        blockStack.append((declaration.type, index, declaration.label))
211|c9717a|                    }
212|4e2d32|                }
213|a7dc16|            }
214|3070d1|            
215|9273f4|            // MARK: - Function/Method Detection
216|8fb15a|            if let functionInfo = detectFunction(trimmed) {
217|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
218|072276|                    blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
219|fdd0e2|                } else {
220|ca50d4|                    // Function without opening brace - look ahead
221|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
222|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
223|568400|                        blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
224|c9717a|                    }
225|4e2d32|                }
226|a7dc16|            }
227|3070d1|            
228|1e5bf2|            // MARK: - Control Flow Detection (if, guard, for, while, switch, etc.)
229|6b5dd6|            if let controlFlowLabel = detectControlFlow(trimmed) {
230|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
231|cb4212|                    blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
232|fdd0e2|                } else {
233|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
234|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
235|648280|                        blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
236|c9717a|                    }
237|4e2d32|                }
238|a7dc16|            }
239|3070d1|            
240|b850f8|            // MARK: - Generic Block Detection
241|83f6cf|            // Avoid adding a generic block for a standalone "{" that belongs to a previously detected declaration.
242|bcf366|            if trimmed.hasSuffix("{"),
243|bd639e|               trimmed != "{",
244|f372eb|               !braceLinesClaimed.contains(index),
245|097ec3|               !isDeclarationLine(trimmed),
246|747356|               !isFunctionLine(trimmed) {
247|d74eec|                blockStack.append((.genericBlock, index, nil))
248|a7dc16|            }
249|adc83b|
250|caca44|            _ = leadingWhitespace // keep param for potential future heuristics
251|5f3077|        }
252|d6ed84|        
253|a60e7c|        // Handle any remaining unclosed blocks
254|193bf7|        while let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
255|30813f|            if lines.count - 1 - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
256|e50ab8|                regions.append(FoldRegion(
257|42046c|                    startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
258|a646f4|                    endLine: lines.count - 1,
259|68bd66|                    type: lastBlock.type,
260|2cb6f6|                    label: lastBlock.label
261|2188d8|                ))
262|a7dc16|            }
263|5f3077|        }
264|d6ed84|        
265|da4698|        // Sort regions by start line
266|e60f91|        regions.sort { $0.startLine < $1.startLine }
267|d6ed84|        
268|5f2f76|        self.foldRegions = regions
269|d6ed84|        
270|3b484c|        // Store regions in the per-file dictionary
271|8c6b47|        if let fileId = currentFileId {
272|823f0a|            foldRegionsByFile[fileId] = regions
273|5f3077|        }
274|d6ed84|        
275|83ae12|        // Restore previous fold state for this file
276|f7b7e9|        if let filePath = filePath {
277|b86c9c|            restoreFoldState(for: filePath)
278|5f3077|        }
279|d6ed84|        
280|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()
281|27e597|    }
282|b4687f|    
283|f96bbc|    // MARK: - Detection Helper Methods
284|b4687f|    
285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"
290|5f3077|        }
291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }
312|b4687f|    
313|c62450|    private func detectRegionEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
314|6c0837|        return line.hasPrefix("#endregion") || 
315|325a81|               line == "// MARK: -" ||
316|52ea28|               line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark -")
317|27e597|    }
318|b4687f|    
319|c6e97d|    private func detectCommentStart(_ line: String) -> Bool {
320|1cbff6|        return line.hasPrefix("/*") && !line.contains("*/")
321|27e597|    }
322|b4687f|    
323|ea9113|    private func detectCommentEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
324|d521b7|        return line.contains("*/") && !line.hasPrefix("/*")
325|27e597|    }
326|b4687f|    
327|766920|    private func findConsecutiveImports(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
328|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
329|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
330|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
331|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
332|d549e2|                endIndex = i
333|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
334|74cfd8|                break
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|7678e6|        return endIndex
338|27e597|    }
339|b4687f|    
340|fd2e13|    private func findConsecutiveComments(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
341|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
342|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
343|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
344|730926|            if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
345|d549e2|                endIndex = i
346|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
347|74cfd8|                break
348|a7dc16|            }
349|5f3077|        }
350|7678e6|        return endIndex
351|27e597|    }
352|b4687f|    
353|763883|    private func detectDeclaration(_ line: String) -> (type: FoldRegion.FoldType, label: String)? {
354|3ccee6|        func matchName(pattern: String) -> String? {
355|6cc0c4|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
356|f2f390|            guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
357|ebf922|                  match.numberOfRanges >= 2,
358|762e94|                  let r = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
359|f5f042|            else { return nil }
360|480e4a|            return String(line[r])
361|5f3077|        }
362|adc83b|
363|f67078|        // Allow leading attributes like "@MainActor", "@available(...)"
364|0c5ed8|        // Allow common modifiers in any order (best-effort).
365|ca2c54|        let prefix = #"^(?:\s*@\w+(?:\([^\)]*\))?\s+)*(?:\s*(?:public|private|internal|fileprivate|open|final|indirect|lazy|static|override|mutating|nonmutating)\s+)*"#
366|adc83b|
367|cf49c1|        // IMPORTANT: avoid treating "class func"/"class var" as a type declaration.
368|e1fc33|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"class\s+(?!func\b|var\b|let\b)([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
369|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
370|5f3077|        }
371|adc83b|
372|8d6e9b|        // Actor (Swift concurrency) – fold like a class/struct
373|8d98f9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"actor\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
374|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
375|5f3077|        }
376|adc83b|
377|c629a9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"struct\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
378|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
379|5f3077|        }
380|adc83b|
381|75283c|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"enum\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
382|0f57db|            return (.enumDeclaration, name)
383|5f3077|        }
384|adc83b|
385|bb35e5|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"protocol\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
386|982dbc|            return (.protocolDeclaration, name)
387|5f3077|        }
388|adc83b|
389|940527|        // Extensions can include dotted names (Foo.Bar)
390|b2a8c3|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"extension\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.]*)"#) {
391|fbf8d2|            return (.extension, name)
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|c2ae65|        return nil
395|27e597|    }
396|b4687f|    
397|a1a6f6|    private func detectFunction(_ line: String) -> String? {
398|d7dbc1|        // Function detection with visibility modifiers
399|2861c1|        let visibilityKeywords = ["public", "private", "internal", "fileprivate", "static", "class", "override", "final", "mutating", "convenience"]
400|d6ed84|        
401|981adf|        // Check for 'func' keyword
402|db4a2c|        if line.contains("func ") {
403|25ca5f|            // Extract function name
404|270a0d|            let funcPattern = "func\\s+(\\w+)"
405|b5e31c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: funcPattern),
406|d7fb50|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
407|9e61c1|               let nameRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
408|456ee3|                let functionName = String(line[nameRange])
409|185b9c|                // Check for parameters to create label
410|bbf605|                if let parenStart = line.firstIndex(of: "("), let parenEnd = line.firstIndex(of: ")") {
411|2d3254|                    let params = String(line[parenStart...parenEnd])
412|929aa2|                    return "\(functionName)\(params)"
413|4e2d32|                }
414|8aa06e|                return functionName
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|4d99b7|        // Init detection
419|a1d502|        if let initName = extractName(from: line, prefix: "init", visibility: visibilityKeywords) {
420|3d8f8b|            return "\(initName)"
421|5f3077|        }
422|d6ed84|        
423|2a2371|        // Deinit detection
424|70e552|        if line.contains("deinit") {
425|9db7b1|            return "deinit"
426|5f3077|        }
427|d6ed84|        
428|307e69|        // Computed property with get/set
429|f3cc39|        if line.hasPrefix("var ") && (line.contains("{") || line.contains("get")) {
430|950394|            if let varName = extractVariableName(from: line) {
431|99146d|                return varName
432|a7dc16|            }
433|5f3077|        }
434|d6ed84|        
435|c2ae65|        return nil
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|1ec945|    private func detectControlFlow(_ line: String) -> String? {
439|bad9a4|        let controlFlowPatterns = [
440|0bf98c|            ("if ", "if"),
441|9fe51e|            ("guard ", "guard"),
442|62af45|            ("else if", "else if"),
443|7da324|            ("else", "else"),
444|99fc8d|            ("for ", "for"),
445|37f5a4|            ("while ", "while"),
446|402c75|            ("repeat", "repeat"),
447|f81318|            ("switch ", "switch"),
448|ff609c|            ("case ", "case"),
449|d493af|            ("default:", "default"),
450|0ca7b9|            ("do ", "do"),
451|30a630|            ("catch", "catch")
452|220505|        ]
453|d6ed84|        
454|186e39|        for (pattern, label) in controlFlowPatterns {
455|3cfde0|            if line.contains(pattern) {
456|6ef273|                return label
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|c2ae65|        return nil
460|27e597|    }
461|b4687f|    
462|143320|    private func extractName(from line: String, prefix: String, visibility: [String]) -> String? {
463|47867c|        var components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
464|d6ed84|        
465|b4fd50|        // Remove visibility modifiers
466|6bbc02|        components = components.filter { !visibility.contains($0) }
467|d6ed84|        
468|ad7b7d|        // Find prefix index
469|524a3a|        if let prefixIndex = components.firstIndex(where: { $0 == prefix }),
470|22dab3|           prefixIndex + 1 < components.count {
471|5c4751|            var name = components[prefixIndex + 1]
472|43f61d|            // Remove colons and other trailing characters
473|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
474|3f8c05|            name = name.components(separatedBy: "<").first ?? name
475|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
476|470adb|            return name
477|5f3077|        }
478|c2ae65|        return nil
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|c68b6f|    private func extractVariableName(from line: String) -> String? {
482|6e7aec|        let components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
483|a2b557|        if components.count >= 2, components[0] == "var" {
484|696097|            var varName = components[1]
485|cdb291|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? varName
486|0300ee|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: "=").first ?? varName
487|c7c291|            return varName
488|5f3077|        }
489|c2ae65|        return nil
490|27e597|    }
491|b4687f|    
492|9d571e|    private func findOpeningBrace(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int? {
493|1ccc79|        for i in startIndex..<min(startIndex + 5, lines.count) {
494|539363|            if lines[i].contains("{") {
495|883981|                return i
496|a7dc16|            }
497|5f3077|        }
498|c2ae65|        return nil
499|27e597|    }
500|b4687f|    
501|a3e3d4|    private func isDeclarationLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
502|3d6d16|        let keywords = ["class", "struct", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "init", "func"]
503|ce9d51|        return keywords.contains { line.contains("\($0) ") }
504|27e597|    }
505|b4687f|    
506|785057|    private func isFunctionLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
507|00501b|        return line.contains("func ") || line.contains("init ")
508|27e597|    }
509|b4687f|    
510|70bda3|    private func detectBlockEnd(_ line: String, leadingWhitespace: Int) -> Bool {
511|ae2f5c|        return (line.hasPrefix("}") || line.starts(with: "}")) && 
512|9c322d|               (line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) == "}" || 
513|65b3d9|                line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).hasPrefix("}"))
514|27e597|    }

516|94cc0f|    // MARK: - Fold State Persistence
517|b4687f|    
518|786ea9|    /// Saves the current fold state to UserDefaults
519|1043ae|    func saveFoldState(for filePath: String) {
520|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
521|d6ed84|        
522|1c2856|        // Use regions from the dictionary if available
523|19f890|        let regionsToSave: [FoldRegion]
524|021ffe|        if let fileId = currentFileId, let storedRegions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] {
525|b1db84|            regionsToSave = storedRegions
526|b31999|        } else {
527|210675|            regionsToSave = foldRegions
528|5f3077|        }
529|d6ed84|        
530|c424a6|        // Create a simplified representation for storage
531|40fb34|        let foldState = regionsToSave.map { FoldStateEntry(startLine: $0.startLine, isFolded: $0.isFolded) }
532|d6ed84|        
533|284b9a|        if let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(foldState) {
534|d8ca2f|            UserDefaults.standard.set(data, forKey: key)
535|5f3077|        }
536|27e597|    }
537|b4687f|    
538|171d6b|    /// Restores fold state from UserDefaults
539|710040|    private func restoreFoldState(for filePath: String) {
540|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
541|d6ed84|        
542|d7f816|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: key),
543|9cfa7e|              let foldState = try? JSONDecoder().decode([FoldStateEntry].self, from: data) else {
544|bef5d6|            return
545|5f3077|        }
546|d6ed84|        
547|f0448e|        // Apply saved state to current regions
548|9663b0|        for savedState in foldState {
549|65fcdc|            if let index = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == savedState.startLine }) {
550|7dfd32|                foldRegions[index].isFolded = savedState.isFolded
551|a7dc16|            }
552|5f3077|        }
553|27e597|    }
554|b4687f|    
555|1981e4|    /// Helper struct for persisting fold state
556|2b3d97|    private struct FoldStateEntry: Codable {
557|eef71e|        let startLine: Int
558|8ba562|        let isFolded: Bool
559|27e597|    }
560|b4687f|    
561|e874ec|    /// Clears fold state for a specific file
562|00eab3|    func clearFoldState(for filePath: String) {
563|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
564|f413e9|        UserDefaults.standard.removeObject(forKey: key)
565|27e597|    }
566|b4687f|    
567|61f95b|    /// Clears all fold states
568|e8e04b|    func clearAllFoldStates() {
569|2f577c|        let defaults = UserDefaults.standard
570|a64386|        let keys = defaults.dictionaryRepresentation().keys.filter { $0.hasPrefix(UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix) }
571|35aefd|        for key in keys {
572|984243|            defaults.removeObject(forKey: key)
573|5f3077|        }
574|27e597|    }
575|b4687f|    
576|8aaef2|    // MARK: - Fold Operations
577|b4687f|    
578|37bb1e|    /// Toggles the fold state at a specific line
579|e2ee32|    func toggleFold(at line: Int) {
580|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
581|c49ebc|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded.toggle()
582|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
583|3070d1|            
584|05b9d6|            // Save state after toggling
585|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
586|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
587|a7dc16|            }
588|5f3077|        }
589|27e597|    }
590|b4687f|    
591|96748f|    /// Expands a folded region
592|d06486|    func expandRegion(at line: Int) {
593|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
594|916cf7|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded = false
595|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
596|3070d1|            
597|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
598|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
599|a7dc16|            }
600|5f3077|        }
601|27e597|    }
602|b4687f|    
603|4383f2|    /// Collapses a region
604|f7a196|    func collapseRegion(at line: Int) {
605|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
606|20e273|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded = true
607|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
608|3070d1|            
609|3a89b4|            if let filePath = currentFilePath {
610|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
611|a7dc16|            }
612|5f3077|        }
613|27e597|    }
614|b4687f|    
615|98aa18|    /// Expands all folded regions
616|60d5e4|    func expandAll() {
617|8f6c3b|        for index in foldRegions.indices {
618|24f435|            foldRegions[index].isFolded = false
619|5f3077|        }
620|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()
621|d6ed84|        
622|8b7173|        if let filePath = currentFilePath {
623|4212f0|            saveFoldState(for: filePath)
624|5f3077|        }
625|27e597|    }
626|b4687f|    
627|3693ad|    /// Folds the region containing the given cursor line
628|d8038c|    func foldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
629|03814c|        // Find the innermost region containing this line
630|2e3469|        if let region = foldRegions.filter({ 
631|fd455c|            cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine && !$0.isFolded
632|0a42c8|        }).min(by: { ($0.endLine - $0.startLine) < ($1.endLine - $1.startLine) }) {
633|acad0e|            collapseRegion(at: region.startLine)
634|5f3077|        }
635|27e597|    }
636|b4687f|    
637|97b9ff|    /// Unfolds the region containing the given cursor line

18|7a2975|        /// 0-based line index.
19|c0eddc|        let line: Int
20|adc83b|
21|efa22a|        /// 0-based UTF16 column index within the line.
22|1b9532|        let column: Int
23|adc83b|
24|c52f44|        /// Render-ready hint text (e.g. ": Int").
25|aa57fc|        let text: String
26|27e597|    }
27|adc83b|
28|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
29|adc83b|
30|2ce197|    func hints(for code: String, language: CodeLanguage) -> [InlayHint] {
31|b95802|        guard language == .swift else { return [] }
32|bb2b0b|        return swiftTypeHints(for: code)
33|27e597|    }
34|adc83b|
35|52c601|    // MARK: - Swift parsing
36|adc83b|
37|16c9d6|    private func swiftTypeHints(for code: String) -> [InlayHint] {
38|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
39|46c824|        var result: [InlayHint] = []
40|adc83b|
41|225f78|        // Matches:
42|e2c046|        //   let x = 5
43|2cac4f|        //   var name = "abc"
44|21217b|        // Avoids explicit type annotations because the pattern does not accept `:` before `=`.
45|49e410|        let pattern = "^\\s*(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.+)$"
46|72432c|        let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [])
47|adc83b|
48|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
49|cbe876|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
50|9b2e7c|            guard !trimmed.hasPrefix("//"), !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
51|adc83b|
52|18a8aa|            let nsLine = line as NSString
53|89c109|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsLine.length)
54|c471d9|            guard let match = regex?.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: range) else { continue }
55|ad3867|            guard match.numberOfRanges >= 3 else { continue }
56|adc83b|
57|423174|            let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
58|3c5579|            let rhsRange = match.range(at: 2)
59|7a7150|            if nameRange.location == NSNotFound || rhsRange.location == NSNotFound { continue }
60|adc83b|
61|165da4|            // Basic sanity checks: ignore tuple bindings like `let (a, b) = ...`
62|679645|            let name = nsLine.substring(with: nameRange)
63|5c9927|            guard !name.isEmpty else { continue }
64|adc83b|
65|666b05|            // RHS, stripped of trailing `//` comments (naive but practical).
66|53413c|            var rhs = nsLine.substring(with: rhsRange)
67|8beea4|            if let commentRange = rhs.range(of: "//") {
68|a56309|                rhs = String(rhs[..<commentRange.lowerBound])
69|a7dc16|            }
70|107569|            rhs = rhs.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
71|adc83b|
72|8f6e07|            // Infer a type. If we can’t infer, don’t create a hint.
73|992808|            guard let inferred = inferSwiftType(from: rhs) else { continue }
74|adc83b|
75|ed8c63|            // Column for hint placement = end of identifier.
76|f4b52b|            let hintColumn = nameRange.location + nameRange.length
77|32af9e|            result.append(InlayHint(line: lineIndex, column: hintColumn, text: ": \(inferred)"))
78|5f3077|        }
79|adc83b|
80|67ed82|        return result
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|014518|    // MARK: - Swift type inference (basic)
84|adc83b|
85|e4ea7a|    private func inferSwiftType(from rawExpression: String) -> String? {
86|3784b4|        let expr = rawExpression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
87|a14679|        guard !expr.isEmpty else { return nil }
88|adc83b|
89|ea35f3|        // Bool
90|62989c|        if expr == "true" || expr == "false" { return "Bool" }
91|adc83b|
92|5f3b7c|        // String literal (simple)
93|553d7e|        if expr.hasPrefix("\"") { return "String" }
94|adc83b|
95|f70754|        // Numeric: Int
96|b5aa27|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+$") { return "Int" }
97|f87d78|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+$") { return "Int" }
98|212646|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0b[01]+$") { return "Int" }
99|d18d43|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0o[0-7]+$") { return "Int" }
100|adc83b|
101|e6218e|        // Numeric: Double (Swift defaults floating-point literals to Double)
102|53b861|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+\\.\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)?$") { return "Double" }
103|71e012|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)$") { return "Double" }
104|adc83b|
105|69d592|        // Array / Dictionary literals
106|20ec44|        if expr.hasPrefix("[") {
107|ce2ebb|            if let dictType = inferDictionaryType(from: expr) { return dictType }
108|f27fb4|            if let arrayType = inferArrayType(from: expr) { return arrayType }
109|5f3077|        }
110|adc83b|
111|c1c62e|        // Constructor-looking calls: `TypeName(...)` (biased toward UpperCamelCase types)
112|c8a287|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(") {
113|7cdb04|            return typeName
114|5f3077|        }
115|adc83b|
116|9ff15e|        // Enum/static member: `TypeName.member`
117|7c8b37|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\.[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") {
118|7cdb04|            return typeName
119|5f3077|        }
120|adc83b|
121|c2ae65|        return nil
122|27e597|    }
123|adc83b|
124|ebc532|    private func inferArrayType(from expr: String) -> String? {
125|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
126|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
127|adc83b|
128|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
129|4d16d8|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[Any]" }
130|adc83b|
131|bdbc65|        // Take the first top-level element (naive: split by comma).
132|51ddab|        let firstPart = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first
133|3197f4|        guard let first = firstPart.map(String.init)?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines), !first.isEmpty else {
134|88e905|            return "[Any]"
135|5f3077|        }
136|adc83b|
137|e844da|        if let elementType = inferSwiftType(from: first) {
138|655e59|            return "[\(elementType)]"
139|5f3077|        }
140|adc83b|
141|77d208|        return "[Any]"
142|27e597|    }
143|adc83b|
144|f7b9b1|    private func inferDictionaryType(from expr: String) -> String? {
145|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
146|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
147|adc83b|
148|85eff8|        // Fast check: dictionary literals must contain `:` somewhere.
149|8a247d|        guard trimmed.contains(":") else { return nil }
150|adc83b|
151|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|be74cb|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[AnyHashable: Any]" }
153|adc83b|
154|141281|        // Grab the first `key: value` pair (naive: up to first comma).
155|53580e|        let firstPair = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first.map(String.init) ?? ""
156|2ae14f|        guard let colonIndex = firstPair.firstIndex(of: ":") else { return nil }
157|adc83b|
158|90fe28|        let keyExpr = String(firstPair[..<colonIndex]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
159|c8c196|        let valueExpr = String(firstPair[firstPair.index(after: colonIndex)...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
160|adc83b|
161|28ea5b|        let keyType = inferSwiftType(from: keyExpr) ?? "AnyHashable"
162|eb3fdd|        let valueType = inferSwiftType(from: valueExpr) ?? "Any"
163|31573c|        return "[\(keyType): \(valueType)]"
164|27e597|    }
165|adc83b|
166|e21b8f|    // MARK: - Regex helpers
167|adc83b|
168|3efaff|    private func matches(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
169|695372|        (try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []))?.firstMatch(
170|7697e1|            in: text,
171|11ba8c|            options: [],
172|264c2c|            range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (text as NSString).length)
173|d36f78|        ) != nil
174|27e597|    }
175|adc83b|
176|133a2e|    private func firstRegexGroup(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> String? {
177|473ca5|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
178|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
179|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
180|090ffd|        guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: text, options: [], range: range), match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return nil }
181|5ad252|        let r = match.range(at: 1)
182|8bd644|        guard r.location != NSNotFound else { return nil }
183|2550a5|        return ns.substring(with: r)
184|27e597|    }
185|b31277|}
186|adc83b|

203|463ea2|    /// Step 2: Poll GitHub until user authorizes (or timeout)
204|f74cbb|    private func startPolling(deviceCode: String, interval: Int, expiresIn: Int) {
205|fd9eb9|        // Cancel any existing poll
206|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
207|780222|        isPolling = true
208|d6ed84|        
209|7bc0a7|        pollTask = Task {
210|683a9c|            let pollInterval = max(interval, 5) // GitHub minimum is 5 seconds
211|49b210|            let deadline = Date().addingTimeInterval(TimeInterval(expiresIn))
212|3070d1|            
213|dac4c4|            while !Task.isCancelled && Date() < deadline {
214|0def4c|                // Wait the required interval
215|89d237|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: UInt64(pollInterval) * 1_000_000_000)
216|216278|                
217|bc71c9|                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
218|216278|                
219|a9ed45|                do {
220|329790|                    let token = try await pollForToken(deviceCode: deviceCode)
221|dd2193|                    
222|7dcb0d|                    // Success! Save token and fetch user
223|8e6188|                    try? KeychainManager.shared.saveGitHubToken(token)
224|e3777a|                    self.isAuthenticated = true
225|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
226|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
227|dd2193|                    
228|5ed0e2|                    try? await fetchUser(token: token)
229|dd2193|                    
230|03abf0|                    print("[GitHubAuth] Successfully authenticated!")
231|dd2193|                    
232|433a32|                    // Notify other parts of the app
233|ec4297|                    NotificationCenter.default.post(
234|3740e3|                        name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
235|115d90|                        object: nil,
236|d0b441|                        userInfo: ["authenticated": true]
237|1961a4|                    )
238|d253ab|                    return
239|dd2193|                    
240|2559bc|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied {
241|fca15e|                    self.errorMessage = "Login was denied."
242|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
243|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
244|d253ab|                    return
245|dd2193|                    
246|eceb72|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired {
247|1af66c|                    // Keep polling until deadline
248|f41bef|                    continue
249|dd2193|                    
250|6bf1ca|                } catch {
251|6d6a4c|                    // authorization_pending - keep polling
252|f41bef|                    continue
253|4e2d32|                }
254|a7dc16|            }
255|3070d1|            
256|8a21bd|            // Timed out
257|a8f1c2|            if !Task.isCancelled {
258|d00484|                self.errorMessage = "Login timed out. Please try again."
259|95ab45|                self.isPolling = false
260|b2bc23|                self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
261|a7dc16|            }
262|5f3077|        }
263|27e597|    }

265|5c071c|    /// Single poll attempt to exchange device code for token
266|8fdc58|    private func pollForToken(deviceCode: String) async throws -> String {
267|3b9f39|        let url = URL(string: "https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token")!
268|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
269|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
270|3fa184|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
271|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
272|d6ed84|        
273|90fe0a|        let body: [String: String] = [
274|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
275|155c27|            "device_code": deviceCode,
276|78700f|            "grant_type": "urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code"
277|220505|        ]
278|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
279|d6ed84|        
280|251aeb|        let (data, _) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
281|d6ed84|        
282|7f28b2|        // Parse response
283|eb46b7|        guard let json = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any] else {
284|fce97b|            throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
285|5f3077|        }
286|d6ed84|        
287|a20373|        // Check for access token
288|e54ce0|        if let accessToken = json["access_token"] as? String {
289|5f184c|            return accessToken
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|117542|        // Check for error states
293|e969c8|        if let error = json["error"] as? String {
294|da39ef|            switch error {
295|f29883|            case "authorization_pending":
296|15ace7|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired // Not really expired, just pending
297|938a8b|            case "slow_down":
298|2dcdae|                // Need to increase interval - sleep extra 5 seconds
299|0ec537|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 5_000_000_000)
300|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
301|6475f3|            case "expired_token":
302|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
303|354722|            case "access_denied":
304|7c97f9|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied
305|ea3438|            default:
306|6fb117|                let description = json["error_description"] as? String ?? error
307|6503e4|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed(description)
308|a7dc16|            }
309|5f3077|        }
310|d6ed84|        
311|f01e4e|        throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
312|27e597|    }
313|b4687f|

316|975a6e|    func fetchUser(token: String? = nil) async throws {
317|487094|        let authToken = token ?? KeychainManager.shared.getGitHubToken()
318|a15a83|        guard let authToken else {
319|a782aa|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("No token available")
320|5f3077|        }
321|d6ed84|        
322|9730a7|        let url = URL(string: "https://api.github.com/user")!
323|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
324|136018|        request.setValue("Bearer \(authToken)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
325|58101d|        request.setValue("application/vnd.github+json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
326|d6ed84|        
327|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
328|d6ed84|        
329|3a0c01|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse,
330|acd675|              httpResponse.statusCode == 200 else {
331|18d01d|            let statusCode = (response as? HTTPURLResponse)?.statusCode ?? -1
332|c4bb91|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("HTTP \(statusCode)")
333|5f3077|        }
334|d6ed84|        
335|900ed2|        let decoder = JSONDecoder()
336|2135f0|        self.user = try decoder.decode(GitHubUser.self, from: data)
337|27e597|    }

213|08aaa0|    /// - Returns: NavigationResult with the definition location(s) or error

226|b3f95f|            return .found(first.location)

236|adc83b|
237|d57d7f|        // Return multiple definitions for user to choose

262|cb275b|    /// Parse a file's content and extract symbol definitions
263|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:

265|41a464|    ///   - file: The file path/identifier
266|a9d40f|    ///   - language: The programming language
267|80dced|    func parseAndIndexFile(content: String, file: String, language: CodeLanguage) {
268|88adef|        // Check cache
269|ebd59d|        let contentHash = content.hashValue
270|d3c0e4|        if let cached = parseCache[contentHash] {
271|16bac4|            // Re-register cached symbols with new file path
272|664fb3|            for definition in cached {
273|33832a|                registerSymbol(definition)
274|a7dc16|            }
275|bef5d6|            return
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|e9e291|        // Clear existing symbols for this file
279|dfefdb|        clearSymbols(for: file)
280|adc83b|
281|310092|        // Parse based on language
282|62f598|        let definitions: [SymbolDefinition]
283|f3155b|        switch language {
284|3347f4|        case .swift:
285|79f37d|            definitions = parseSwiftDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
286|1cbd06|        case .javascript, .typescript:
287|ac8ad3|            definitions = parseJavaScriptDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
288|9fa55d|        case .python:
289|e1705b|            definitions = parsePythonDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
290|520b7d|        default:
291|1caddb|            definitions = parseGenericDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
292|5f3077|        }
293|adc83b|
294|e255fe|        // Register all definitions
295|1bc396|        for definition in definitions {
296|ac41ed|            registerSymbol(definition)
297|5f3077|        }
298|adc83b|
299|b82c0d|        // Cache the results
300|f34d79|        parseCache[contentHash] = definitions
301|27e597|    }
302|adc83b|
303|a2bb61|    // MARK: - Language Parsers (Regex based)
304|adc83b|
305|0b046d|    private func parseSwiftDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
306|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
307|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
308|adc83b|
309|a33600|        // Regex patterns for Swift
310|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
311|fc8340|            // Functions
312|8c783b|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(static |class )?(override )?func\s+(\w+)"#, .function, 4),
313|8fed15|            // Classes
314|83de3a|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(final )?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class, 3),
315|2f60d1|            // Structs
316|208bd6|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?struct\s+(\w+)"#, .struct, 2),
317|af4603|            // Enums
318|01d20a|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?enum\s+(\w+)"#, .enum, 2),
319|2fc5af|            // Protocols
320|6922b4|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?protocol\s+(\w+)"#, .protocol, 2)
321|220505|        ]
322|adc83b|
323|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
324|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
325|b87970|            for p in patterns {
326|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
327|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
328|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
329|adc83b|
330|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
331|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
332|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
333|adc83b|
334|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
335|840904|                let def = SymbolDefinition(
336|7761cb|                    name: name,
337|aee5d6|                    kind: p.kind,
338|0bc868|                    location: location,
339|aa376a|                    signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces),
340|a03384|                    documentation: nil,
341|f6b974|                    containerName: nil
342|6f642e|                )
343|4ec1cf|                definitions.append(def)
344|a7dc16|            }
345|adc83b|
346|426502|            // Enum cases (simple)
347|9ac8a2|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"^\s*case\s+(\w+)"#),
348|81cd99|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)) {
349|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
350|ff6da9|                if nameRange.location != NSNotFound {
351|1156fd|                    let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
352|9354ca|                    let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
353|7c1620|                    definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: .enumCase, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
354|4e2d32|                }
355|a7dc16|            }
356|5f3077|        }
357|adc83b|
358|02e31c|        return definitions
359|27e597|    }
360|adc83b|
361|9da06f|    private func parseJavaScriptDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
362|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
363|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
364|adc83b|
365|cf71b2|        // Basic JS/TS patterns
366|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
367|3f761a|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?(async\s+)?function\s+(\w+)"#, .function, 3),
368|a753f7|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class, 2),
369|3c35e9|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?(const|let|var)\s+(\w+)"#, .variable, 3),
370|5d845f|            (#"^\s*interface\s+(\w+)"#, .interface, 1),
371|f015d5|            (#"^\s*type\s+(\w+)"#, .type, 1)
372|220505|        ]
373|adc83b|
374|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
375|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
376|b87970|            for p in patterns {
377|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
378|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
379|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
380|adc83b|
381|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
382|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
383|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
384|adc83b|
385|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
386|85d12d|                definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: p.kind, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
387|a7dc16|            }
388|5f3077|        }
389|adc83b|
390|02e31c|        return definitions
391|27e597|    }
392|adc83b|
393|4fcbc6|    private func parsePythonDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
394|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
395|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
396|adc83b|
397|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
398|f3287f|            (#"^\s*def\s+(\w+)\s*\("#, .function, 1),
399|f0fbc1|            (#"^\s*class\s+(\w+)\s*\(?"#, .class, 1)
400|220505|        ]
401|adc83b|
402|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
403|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
404|b87970|            for p in patterns {
405|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
406|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
407|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
408|adc83b|
409|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
410|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
411|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
412|adc83b|
413|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
414|85d12d|                definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: p.kind, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|adc83b|
418|02e31c|        return definitions
419|27e597|    }
420|adc83b|
421|0fe3a0|    private func parseGenericDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
422|34d6fd|        // Fallback: try to detect simple function-like declarations
423|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
424|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
425|adc83b|
426|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
427|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
428|adc83b|
429|fb5ec3|            // Very rough: identifier followed by "(" at start
430|7ac4de|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"^\s*(\w+)\s*\("#),
431|81cd99|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)) {
432|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
433|ff6da9|                if nameRange.location != NSNotFound {
434|1156fd|                    let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
435|9354ca|                    let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
436|7d3f64|                    definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: .function, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
437|4e2d32|                }
438|a7dc16|            }
439|5f3077|        }
440|adc83b|
441|02e31c|        return definitions
442|27e597|    }
443|adc83b|
444|6e9ce4|    // MARK: - Navigation History
445|adc83b|
446|bc5827|    /// Record a navigation location in history
447|1c946a|    func recordNavigation(to location: SymbolLocation) {
448|69bc1f|        // Remove any forward history if we're not at the end
449|608721|        if historyIndex < navigationHistory.count - 1 {
450|73fe3e|            navigationHistory = Array(navigationHistory.prefix(historyIndex + 1))
451|5f3077|        }
452|adc83b|
453|09f159|        navigationHistory.append(location)
454|cda03f|        historyIndex = navigationHistory.count - 1
455|adc83b|
456|023658|        // Limit history size
457|901de2|        if navigationHistory.count > maxHistorySize {
458|75c8c7|            navigationHistory.removeFirst()
459|99e819|            historyIndex -= 1
460|5f3077|        }
461|27e597|    }
462|adc83b|
463|82489f|    /// Navigate back in history
464|d5d9dc|    func navigateBack() -> SymbolLocation? {
465|092c1a|        guard historyIndex > 0 else { return nil }
466|9c0030|        historyIndex -= 1
467|be1f03|        return navigationHistory[historyIndex]
468|27e597|    }
469|adc83b|
470|e5a8e5|    /// Navigate forward in history
471|c1bf7e|    func navigateForward() -> SymbolLocation? {
472|bc627d|        guard historyIndex < navigationHistory.count - 1 else { return nil }
473|9855df|        historyIndex += 1
474|be1f03|        return navigationHistory[historyIndex]
475|27e597|    }
476|adc83b|
477|0d5023|    /// Check if back navigation is possible
478|959715|    var canNavigateBack: Bool {
479|573018|        historyIndex > 0
480|27e597|    }
481|adc83b|
482|cb9a0a|    /// Check if forward navigation is possible
483|809e6a|    var canNavigateForward: Bool {
484|2815dd|        historyIndex < navigationHistory.count - 1
485|27e597|    }
486|adc83b|
487|d8eee9|    // MARK: - Word at Position
488|adc83b|
489|d302b6|    /// Extract the word/symbol at a given position in text
490|0acd55|    func getWordAtPosition(_ position: Int, in text: String) -> String? {
491|37ae73|        guard position >= 0 && position <= text.count else { return nil }
492|adc83b|
493|599630|        let nsText = text as NSString
494|026ed8|        let wordCharacters = CharacterSet.alphanumerics.union(CharacterSet(charactersIn: "_"))
495|adc83b|
496|b5bfb0|        // Find start of word
497|def66a|        var start = position
498|aaa57c|        while start > 0 {
499|148e5a|            let char = nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: start - 1, length: 1))
500|70b198|            if char.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy({ wordCharacters.contains($0) }) {
501|0c6efe|                start -= 1
502|f5a6eb|            } else {
503|74cfd8|                break
504|a7dc16|            }
505|5f3077|        }
506|adc83b|
507|3d8df8|        // Find end of word
508|f5c145|        var end = position
509|b8851f|        while end < nsText.length {
510|244ed1|            let char = nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: end, length: 1))
511|70b198|            if char.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy({ wordCharacters.contains($0) }) {
512|fddf9a|                end += 1
513|f5a6eb|            } else {
514|74cfd8|                break
515|a7dc16|            }
516|5f3077|        }
517|adc83b|
518|77048a|        if start == end {
519|1c8557|            return nil
520|5f3077|        }
521|adc83b|
522|782e12|        return nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: start, length: end - start))
523|27e597|    }
524|b31277|}
525|adc83b|
526|15f57f|// MARK: - EditorCore Integration Extension
527|adc83b|
528|9150d2|extension EditorCore {
529|6c0670|    /// Navigate to a symbol definition (F12 / Cmd+Click)
530|0fd45c|    @MainActor
531|d5887d|    func goToDefinition(at position: Int) {
532|5101b9|        guard let tab = activeTab else { return }
533|adc83b|
534|dee0b2|        let navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
535|adc83b|
536|0491f9|        // Get the word at cursor position
537|3b232a|        guard let symbol = navigationManager.getWordAtPosition(position, in: tab.content) else {
538|bef5d6|            return
539|5f3077|        }
540|adc83b|
541|be40c7|        // Find the definition
542|7465f1|        let result = navigationManager.findDefinition(symbol: symbol, in: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
543|adc83b|
544|3c3bc0|        switch result {
545|331189|        case .found(let location):
546|007f7f|            navigateToLocation(location)
547|adc83b|
548|0d99ea|        case .multipleFound(let definitions):
549|31da23|            // Show picker for multiple definitions
550|14daaf|            navigationManager.multipleDefinitions = definitions
551|25280e|            navigationManager.showDefinitionPicker = true
552|adc83b|
553|613170|        case .notFound(let reason):
554|294719|            navigationManager.lastNavigationError = reason
555|5f3077|        }
556|27e597|    }
557|adc83b|
558|eb220c|    /// Convenience used by keyboard/menu actions.
559|0fd45c|    @MainActor
560|ad0b4b|    func goToDefinitionAtCursor() {
561|16aa8a|        let position = multiCursorState.primaryCursor?.position ?? 0
562|007e61|        goToDefinition(at: position)
563|27e597|    }
564|adc83b|
565|be5f9a|    /// Peek a symbol definition inline (without navigating away).
566|0fd45c|    @MainActor
567|ca89ad|    func peekDefinition(at position: Int) {
568|5101b9|        guard let tab = activeTab else { return }
569|adc83b|
570|dee0b2|        let navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
571|adc83b|
572|3b232a|        guard let symbol = navigationManager.getWordAtPosition(position, in: tab.content) else {
573|bef5d6|            return
574|5f3077|        }
575|adc83b|
576|7465f1|        let result = navigationManager.findDefinition(symbol: symbol, in: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
577|adc83b|
578|3c3bc0|        switch result {
579|331189|        case .found(let location):
580|3fa950|            showPeekPreview(for: location)
581|adc83b|
582|0d99ea|        case .multipleFound(let definitions):
583|14daaf|            navigationManager.multipleDefinitions = definitions
584|25280e|            navigationManager.showDefinitionPicker = true
585|adc83b|
586|613170|        case .notFound(let reason):
587|294719|            navigationManager.lastNavigationError = reason
588|5f3077|        }
589|27e597|    }
590|adc83b|
591|eb220c|    /// Convenience used by keyboard/menu actions.
592|0fd45c|    @MainActor
593|3b3bf5|    func peekDefinitionAtCursor() {
594|16aa8a|        let position = multiCursorState.primaryCursor?.position ?? 0
595|1bc9f1|        peekDefinition(at: position)
596|27e597|    }
597|adc83b|
598|fe33aa|    /// Navigate back in recorded navigation history.
599|0fd45c|    @MainActor
600|6d2481|    func navigateBack() {
601|cd2f2e|        if let location = NavigationManager.shared.navigateBack() {
602|007f7f|            navigateToLocation(location)
603|5f3077|        }
604|27e597|    }
605|adc83b|
606|27ff23|    /// Navigate forward in recorded navigation history.
607|0fd45c|    @MainActor
608|773fd1|    func navigateForward() {
609|dd83a6|        if let location = NavigationManager.shared.navigateForward() {
610|007f7f|            navigateToLocation(location)
611|5f3077|        }
612|27e597|    }
613|adc83b|
614|04b3fc|    /// Navigate to a specific location
615|0fd45c|    @MainActor
616|9257ba|    func navigateToLocation(_ location: SymbolLocation) {
617|dee0b2|        let navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
618|adc83b|
619|052921|        // Record current position in history
620|b99c0f|        if let currentTab = activeTab {
621|e0e89c|            let currentLocation = SymbolLocation(
622|437fa5|                file: currentTab.url?.path ?? currentTab.fileName,
623|3293f1|                line: cursorPosition.line,
624|7fd768|                column: cursorPosition.column
625|43d041|            )
626|309243|            navigationManager.recordNavigation(to: currentLocation)
627|5f3077|        }
628|adc83b|
629|61d697|        // If it's a different file, open it first
630|3d2b0b|        if let tab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url?.path == location.file || $0.fileName == location.fileName }) {
631|2f7846|            activeTabId = tab.id
632|5f3077|        }
633|adc83b|
634|5adefc|        // Update cursor position
635|17a355|        cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: location.line, column: location.column)
636|adc83b|
637|de1125|        // Record the navigation destination
638|0ff369|        navigationManager.recordNavigation(to: location)
639|27e597|    }
640|adc83b|
641|1badc2|    /// Parse and index the current active tab
642|49f050|    func indexActiveTab() {
643|5101b9|        guard let tab = activeTab else { return }
644|dee0b2|        let navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
645|adc83b|
646|d9cab9|        // NavigationManager is @MainActor; indexActiveTab can be called from non-isolated contexts.
647|d79336|        Task { @MainActor in
648|74e3d9|            navigationManager.parseAndIndexFile(
649|e983b5|                content: tab.content,
650|09e9a2|                file: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName,
651|2acbeb|                language: tab.language
652|43d041|            )
653|5f3077|        }
654|27e597|    }
655|adc83b|
656|27eda1|    /// Show peek preview inline (without navigating away)
657|0fd45c|    @MainActor
658|8f4c19|    private func showPeekPreview(for location: SymbolLocation) {
659|52fbba|        // Find the content at the definition location
660|3d2b0b|        if let tab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url?.path == location.file || $0.fileName == location.fileName }) {
661|aa8c7c|            let lines = tab.content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
662|457d9e|            let startLine = max(0, location.line - 3)
663|584ce0|            let endLine = min(lines.count, location.line + 7)
664|8ff293|            let previewLines = lines[startLine..<endLine].joined(separator: "\n")
665|adc83b|
666|3e1c69|            // Store peek state for display
667|122f72|            peekState = PeekState(
668|3699c5|                file: location.fileName,
669|39378d|                line: location.line,
670|2aa486|                content: previewLines,
671|d4b469|                sourceLine: cursorPosition.line
672|43d041|            )
673|5f3077|        }
674|27e597|    }
675|adc83b|
676|49f400|    /// Convert line/column to character position
677|7c7ab4|    private func getCharacterPosition(line: Int, column: Int, in text: String) -> Int {
678|2f18b4|        let lines = text.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
679|ef04de|        var position = 0
680|adc83b|
681|dbfcfe|        for i in 0..<min(line - 1, lines.count) {
682|3baa9e|            position += lines[i].count + 1 // +1 for newline
683|5f3077|        }
684|adc83b|
685|93d564|        position += min(column - 1, lines.count > line - 1 ? lines[line - 1].count : 0)
686|f21544|        return position
687|27e597|    }
688|b31277|}

690|d989cb|// MARK: - Go To Definition Picker View
691|adc83b|
692|5fab56|/// View for selecting from multiple definition locations
693|88491f|struct GoToDefinitionPicker: View {
694|990e62|    @ObservedObject var navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
695|e5f895|    @ObservedObject var editorCore: EditorCore
696|adc83b|
697|6c323c|    @State private var selectedIndex = 0
698|036c20|    @FocusState private var isFocused: Bool
699|adc83b|
700|3e3cd1|    private var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] {
701|db7f43|        navigationManager.multipleDefinitions
702|27e597|    }
703|adc83b|
704|504e43|    var body: some View {
705|d354fb|        let base = VStack(spacing: 0) {
706|bb59bc|            // Header
707|f49fd2|            HStack {
708|34b23a|                Image(systemName: "arrow.right.circle.fill")
709|153725|                    .foregroundColor(.accentColor)
710|62f4cb|                Text("Go to Definition")
711|cd6b9b|                    .font(.system(size: 14, weight: .semibold))
712|a02350|                Spacer()
713|7f1661|                if let first = definitions.first {
714|0ff3e6|                    Text("'\(first.name)'")
715|67dec4|                        .font(.system(size: 12, design: .monospaced))
716|d991cd|                        .foregroundColor(.secondary)
717|4e2d32|                }
718|6f76fa|                Text("×")
719|cbb637|                    .font(.system(size: 16, weight: .light))
720|72464b|                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
721|f14e80|                    .onTapGesture { dismiss() }
722|a7dc16|            }
723|94e6d5|            .padding(.horizontal, 16)
724|b3298d|            .padding(.vertical, 12)
725|a894e7|            #if canImport(UIKit)
726|508ae7|            .background(Color(UIColor.secondarySystemBackground))
727|717308|            #endif
728|adc83b|
729|e744dc|            Divider()
730|adc83b|
731|d565d1|            // Definitions list
732|db6e07|            ScrollViewReader { proxy in
733|5deb41|                ScrollView {
734|1b3e39|                    LazyVStack(spacing: 0) {
735|779882|                        ForEach(Array(definitions.enumerated()), id: \.element.id) { index, definition in
736|a078e2|                            DefinitionRow(
737|4618c0|                                definition: definition,
738|c3a93b|                                isSelected: index == selectedIndex
739|3d140c|                            )
740|48f34a|                            .id(index)
741|9925b9|                            .onTapGesture {
742|26ba2b|                                selectDefinition(definition)
743|89d40a|                            }
744|392b35|                        }
745|c9717a|                    }
746|dd4f38|                    .padding(.vertical, 4)
747|4e2d32|                }
748|65a3c2|                .onChange(of: selectedIndex) { newIndex in
749|276987|                    withAnimation(.easeInOut(duration: 0.1)) {
750|64186a|                        proxy.scrollTo(newIndex, anchor: .center)
751|c9717a|                    }
752|4e2d32|                }
753|a7dc16|            }
754|7c98d3|            .frame(maxHeight: 300)
755|adc83b|
756|e744dc|            Divider()
757|adc83b|
758|4e198e|            // Footer with hints
759|3185eb|            HStack(spacing: 16) {
760|17ef0d|                KeyboardHint(keys: ["↑", "↓"], description: "navigate")
761|0378df|                KeyboardHint(keys: ["↵"], description: "go to")
762|7250df|                KeyboardHint(keys: ["esc"], description: "close")
763|a02350|                Spacer()
764|366331|                Text("\(definitions.count) definitions")
765|a5b455|                    .font(.system(size: 11))
766|72464b|                    .foregroundColor(.secondary)
767|a7dc16|            }
768|94e6d5|            .padding(.horizontal, 16)
769|5b6fc5|            .padding(.vertical, 8)
770|a894e7|            #if canImport(UIKit)
771|13cf90|            .background(Color(UIColor.tertiarySystemBackground))
772|717308|            #endif
773|5f3077|        }
774|92aa16|        .frame(width: 500)
775|6c0b43|        #if canImport(UIKit)
776|928ed0|        .background(Color(UIColor.systemBackground))
777|6a3e13|        #endif
778|1599ca|        .cornerRadius(12)
779|b945e2|        .shadow(color: .black.opacity(0.3), radius: 20, x: 0, y: 10)
780|72be24|        .focused($isFocused)
781|2bd24e|        .onAppear {
782|d5c54a|            isFocused = true
783|5373e9|            selectedIndex = 0
784|5f3077|        }
785|adc83b|
786|031737|        // iOS 17+: keyboard navigation via onKeyPress
787|5ddca0|        if #available(iOS 17.0, *) {
788|c1b3ac|            base
789|6c31b1|                .onKeyPress(.upArrow) {
790|cc0327|                    if selectedIndex > 0 { selectedIndex -= 1 }
791|bd4d3d|                    return .handled
792|4e2d32|                }
793|40e788|                .onKeyPress(.downArrow) {
794|df3b23|                    if selectedIndex < definitions.count - 1 { selectedIndex += 1 }
795|bd4d3d|                    return .handled
796|4e2d32|                }
797|cd73d2|                .onKeyPress(.return) {
798|6729b9|                    if let def = selectedIndex < definitions.count ? definitions[selectedIndex] : nil {
799|a52629|                        selectDefinition(def)
800|c9717a|                    }

246|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
247|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
248|e91279|        // Remove block comments first.
249|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"

195|e6d260|class AIManager: ObservableObject {
196|9a4557|    // API Keys stored in UserDefaults (consider Keychain for production)
197|51e181|    @AppStorage("openai_api_key") var openAIKey: String = ""
198|feba64|    @AppStorage("anthropic_api_key") var anthropicKey: String = ""
199|8eac3c|    @AppStorage("google_api_key") var googleKey: String = ""
200|7011c5|    @AppStorage("kimi_api_key") var kimiKey: String = ""
201|2a856e|    @AppStorage("glm_api_key") var glmKey: String = ""
202|719111|    @AppStorage("groq_api_key") var groqKey: String = ""
203|a1c0fd|    @AppStorage("deepseek_api_key") var deepseekKey: String = ""
204|66e37b|    @AppStorage("mistral_api_key") var mistralKey: String = ""
205|0ca61a|    @AppStorage("ollama_host") var ollamaHost: String = "http://localhost:11434"
206|b4687f|    
207|018888|    @AppStorage("selected_provider") private var selectedProviderRaw: String = AIProvider.openai.rawValue
208|e31d85|    @AppStorage("selected_model_id") private var selectedModelId: String = "gpt-4o"
209|b4687f|    
210|73f80f|    @Published var currentSession: ChatSession = ChatSession()
211|4e22ed|    @Published var sessions: [ChatSession] = []
212|2a51f8|    @Published var isLoading = false
213|f5a541|    @Published var error: String?
214|7da9ba|    @Published var streamingResponse = ""
215|b4687f|    
216|1cd389|    var selectedProvider: AIProvider {

218|1d48ce|        set { selectedProviderRaw = newValue.rawValue }
219|27e597|    }
220|b4687f|    
221|436d4f|    var selectedModel: AIModel {
222|41ddcc|        get {
223|bcf6de|            selectedProvider.models.first { $0.id == selectedModelId } ?? selectedProvider.models[0]
224|5f3077|        }
225|70bd55|        set { selectedModelId = newValue.id }
226|27e597|    }
227|b4687f|    
228|359b1b|    init() {
229|9ec2c3|        loadSessions()
230|d760e7|        if sessions.isEmpty {
231|84aa73|            createNewSession()
232|b31999|        } else {
233|28bc19|            currentSession = sessions[0]
234|5f3077|        }
235|27e597|    }
236|b4687f|    
237|d4b4d7|    // MARK: - Session Management
238|b4687f|    
239|026706|    func createNewSession() {
240|8b68ee|        let session = ChatSession()
241|27939c|        sessions.insert(session, at: 0)
242|0a41be|        currentSession = session
243|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
244|27e597|    }
245|b4687f|    
246|e33e11|    func selectSession(_ session: ChatSession) {
247|0a41be|        currentSession = session
248|27e597|    }
249|b4687f|    
250|a2e6f9|    func deleteSession(_ session: ChatSession) {
251|d6c3da|        sessions.removeAll { $0.id == session.id }
252|0290aa|        if currentSession.id == session.id {
253|132ab3|            currentSession = sessions.first ?? ChatSession()
254|a1938c|            if sessions.isEmpty {
255|187c87|                sessions.append(currentSession)
256|a7dc16|            }
257|5f3077|        }
258|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
259|27e597|    }
260|b4687f|    
261|338502|    func clearCurrentSession() {
262|bf5063|        currentSession.messages.removeAll()
263|aa2963|        updateSession()
264|27e597|    }
265|b4687f|    
266|8c2b8c|    private func updateSession() {
267|2ecb1b|        currentSession.updatedAt = Date()
268|3817b6|        if let index = sessions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == currentSession.id }) {
269|6fcbfa|            sessions[index] = currentSession
270|5f3077|        }
271|7ad73d|        saveSessions()
272|27e597|    }
273|b4687f|    
274|89259d|    // MARK: - Persistence
275|b4687f|    
276|8542d4|    private func saveSessions() {
277|29004a|        if let encoded = try? JSONEncoder().encode(sessions) {
278|c1502a|            UserDefaults.standard.set(encoded, forKey: "ai_chat_sessions")
279|5f3077|        }
280|27e597|    }
281|b4687f|    
282|429d69|    private func loadSessions() {
283|b75853|        if let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: "ai_chat_sessions"),
284|4a226f|           let decoded = try? JSONDecoder().decode([ChatSession].self, from: data) {
285|e0ba43|            sessions = decoded
286|5f3077|        }
287|27e597|    }

289|0ea925|    // MARK: - API Key Validation
290|b4687f|    
291|ca1870|    func hasValidAPIKey() -> Bool {
292|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
293|9ecaf9|        case .openai: return !openAIKey.isEmpty
294|9e889d|        case .anthropic: return !anthropicKey.isEmpty
295|913761|        case .google: return !googleKey.isEmpty
296|2d4ef2|        case .kimi: return !kimiKey.isEmpty
297|bc2b9b|        case .glm: return !glmKey.isEmpty
298|47ba54|        case .groq: return !groqKey.isEmpty
299|d902be|        case .deepseek: return !deepseekKey.isEmpty
300|c5192a|        case .mistral: return !mistralKey.isEmpty
301|06a0e1|        case .ollama: return true // Ollama doesn't require API key
302|6c4184|        case .localMLX: return true // Local model, no API key needed
303|5f3077|        }
304|27e597|    }
305|b4687f|    
306|9839dd|    func getAPIKey() -> String {
307|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
308|93ff72|        case .openai: return openAIKey
309|7ce3eb|        case .anthropic: return anthropicKey
310|ca0d01|        case .google: return googleKey
311|30539a|        case .kimi: return kimiKey
312|d32dc6|        case .glm: return glmKey
313|40a8a4|        case .groq: return groqKey
314|5109f7|        case .deepseek: return deepseekKey
315|2ffd6d|        case .mistral: return mistralKey
316|c37216|        case .ollama: return ""
317|443135|        case .localMLX: return ""
318|5f3077|        }
