321|caea46|    // MARK: - Send Message
322|b4687f|    
323|0fd45c|    @MainActor
324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {
325|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
326|06856b|            error = "Please set your API key in settings"
327|bef5d6|            return
328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|        
330|e352e6|        let userMessage = ChatMessage(role: .user, content: content)
331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|        
334|8495c1|        // Update title if first message
335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {
336|066ce6|            currentSession.title = String(content.prefix(50))
337|e749a7|            updateSession()
338|5f3077|        }
339|d6ed84|        
340|d52924|        isLoading = true
341|0406ba|        error = nil
342|dc34fb|        streamingResponse = ""
343|d6ed84|        
344|4da690|        do {
345|ce5098|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: currentSession.messages, context: context)
346|70672e|            let assistantMessage = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response, codeBlocks: extractCodeBlocks(from: response))
347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {
350|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false
354|27e597|    }
355|b4687f|    
356|7e38b7|    // MARK: - Code Actions
357|b4687f|    
358|0fd45c|    @MainActor
359|70008d|    func explainCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
360|337b30|        let prompt = "Explain the following \(language) code in detail. What does it do, and how does it work?\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
361|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
362|27e597|    }
363|b4687f|    
364|0fd45c|    @MainActor
365|a1609b|    func fixCode(_ code: String, language: String, errorMessage: String? = nil) async -> String {
366|7b5f15|        var prompt = "Fix any issues in the following \(language) code and explain what was wrong:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
367|bf3125|        if let error = errorMessage {
368|5ee495|            prompt += "\n\nError message: \(error)"
369|5f3077|        }
370|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
371|27e597|    }
372|b4687f|    
373|0fd45c|    @MainActor
374|61e13d|    func generateTests(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
375|a6412a|        let prompt = "Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following \(language) code. Include edge cases and typical usage:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
376|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
377|27e597|    }
378|b4687f|    
379|0fd45c|    @MainActor
380|83d5b9|    func refactorCode(_ code: String, language: String, instruction: String) async -> String {
381|eefc66|        let prompt = "Refactor the following \(language) code according to this instruction: \(instruction)\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
382|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
383|27e597|    }
384|b4687f|    
385|0fd45c|    @MainActor
386|e7b4e9|    func documentCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
387|02ed0f|        let prompt = "Add comprehensive documentation/comments to the following \(language) code:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
388|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
389|27e597|    }
390|b4687f|    
391|0fd45c|    @MainActor
392|90c566|    private func sendAndGetResponse(_ prompt: String) async -> String {
393|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
394|1b72a2|            return "Error: Please set your API key in settings"
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|d52924|        isLoading = true
398|0406ba|        error = nil
399|d6ed84|        
400|4da690|        do {
401|3b5c4f|            let messages = [ChatMessage(role: .user, content: prompt)]
402|153d92|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: messages, context: nil)
403|612c3f|            isLoading = false
404|d392d0|            return response
405|853889|        } catch {
406|612c3f|            isLoading = false
407|0cacff|            return "Error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
408|5f3077|        }
409|27e597|    }
410|b4687f|    
411|579307|    // MARK: - API Request
412|b4687f|    
413|0a6144|    private func makeAPIRequest(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
414|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
415|6ca85d|        case .openai:
416|d9a528|            return try await callOpenAI(messages: messages, context: context)
417|2b5eb0|        case .anthropic:
418|afe61a|            return try await callAnthropic(messages: messages, context: context)
419|51e5bc|        case .google:
420|688f02|            return try await callGoogle(messages: messages, context: context)
421|a90b5c|        case .kimi:
422|467f79|            return try await callKimi(messages: messages, context: context)
423|448974|        case .glm:
424|d03556|            return try await callGLM(messages: messages, context: context)
425|6a2402|        case .groq:
426|2fdc7f|            return try await callGroq(messages: messages, context: context)
427|586fca|        case .deepseek:
428|b7290a|            return try await callDeepSeek(messages: messages, context: context)
429|0935ee|        case .mistral:
430|048202|            return try await callMistral(messages: messages, context: context)
431|7b8ebd|        case .ollama:
432|20a226|            return try await callOllama(messages: messages, context: context)
433|5135a3|        case .localMLX:
434|258af5|            return try await callLocalMLX(messages: messages, context: context)
435|5f3077|        }
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|b90399|    // MARK: - OpenAI API
439|b4687f|    
440|c4fdfa|    private func callOpenAI(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
441|bc2d67|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.openai.baseURL)/chat/completions")!
442|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
443|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
444|7fd512|        request.setValue("Bearer \(openAIKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
445|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
446|d6ed84|        
447|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
448|d6ed84|        
449|5740dd|        // Add system message with context
450|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
451|55709b|        apiMessages.append(["role": "system", "content": systemPrompt])
452|d6ed84|        
453|c5ae63|        // Add conversation messages
454|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
455|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
456|5f3077|        }
457|d6ed84|        
458|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
459|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
460|b5548e|            "messages": apiMessages,
461|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
462|f1c54d|            "temperature": 0.7
463|220505|        ]
464|d6ed84|        
465|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
466|d6ed84|        
467|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
468|d6ed84|        
469|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
470|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
471|5f3077|        }
472|d6ed84|        
473|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
474|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
475|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
476|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
477|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
478|a7dc16|            }
479|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
480|5f3077|        }
481|d6ed84|        
482|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
483|95fe6c|        guard let choices = json?["choices"] as? [[String: Any]],
484|6c7545|              let firstChoice = choices.first,
485|9e7d93|              let message = firstChoice["message"] as? [String: Any],
486|870b1f|              let content = message["content"] as? String else {
487|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
488|5f3077|        }
489|d6ed84|        
490|9be7b6|        return content
491|27e597|    }
492|b4687f|    
493|29e6f6|    // MARK: - Anthropic API
494|b4687f|    
495|f1fc2e|    private func callAnthropic(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
496|3b388d|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.anthropic.baseURL)/messages")!
497|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
498|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
499|ede6ed|        request.setValue(anthropicKey, forHTTPHeaderField: "x-api-key")
500|6b8824|        request.setValue("2023-06-01", forHTTPHeaderField: "anthropic-version")
501|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
502|d6ed84|        
503|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
504|d6ed84|        
505|113613|        for msg in messages where msg.role != .system {
506|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
507|5f3077|        }
508|d6ed84|        
509|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
510|d6ed84|

545|87a420|    // MARK: - Google API
546|b4687f|    
547|190d00|    private func callGoogle(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
548|dd3258|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.google.baseURL)/models/\(selectedModel.id):generateContent?key=\(googleKey)")!
549|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
550|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
551|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
552|d6ed84|        
553|2ae98d|        var parts: [[String: Any]] = []
554|d6ed84|        
555|288895|        // Add system context
556|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
557|e08e07|        parts.append(["text": "System: \(systemPrompt)"])
558|d6ed84|        
559|c1c8d4|        // Add messages
560|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
561|989b77|            let role = msg.role == .assistant ? "Model" : "User"
562|35f120|            parts.append(["text": "\(role): \(msg.content)"])
563|5f3077|        }
564|d6ed84|        
565|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
566|6251fc|            "contents": [
567|f76f20|                ["parts": parts]
568|97e7d5|            ],
569|0eaa6f|            "generationConfig": [
570|80d7f4|                "maxOutputTokens": 4096,
571|e772de|                "temperature": 0.7
572|324820|            ]
573|220505|        ]
574|d6ed84|        
575|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
576|d6ed84|        
577|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
578|d6ed84|        
579|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
580|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
581|5f3077|        }
582|d6ed84|        
583|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
584|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
585|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
586|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
587|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
588|a7dc16|            }
589|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
590|5f3077|        }
591|d6ed84|        
592|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
593|12af8b|        guard let candidates = json?["candidates"] as? [[String: Any]],
594|977b10|              let firstCandidate = candidates.first,
595|0ff2f5|              let content = firstCandidate["content"] as? [String: Any],
596|9ddaf9|              let parts = content["parts"] as? [[String: Any]],
597|61737e|              let firstPart = parts.first,
598|a6eafc|              let text = firstPart["text"] as? String else {
599|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
600|5f3077|        }
601|d6ed84|        
602|ec263c|        return text
603|27e597|    }

926|158069|    // MARK: - Local MLX (On-Device)
927|b4687f|    
928|0fd45c|    @MainActor
929|8b65f7|    private func callLocalMLX(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
930|cdacf1|        let localLLM = LocalLLMService.shared
931|d6ed84|        
932|7f5962|        // Auto-load model if not loaded
933|8532e3|        if !localLLM.isModelLoaded {
934|b1c14b|            await localLLM.loadModel()
935|5f3077|        }
936|d6ed84|        
937|19b14f|        guard localLLM.isModelLoaded else {
938|c8173d|            throw AIError.apiError("Failed to load local model")
939|5f3077|        }
940|d6ed84|        
941|05abd5|        // Convert messages to the format LocalLLMService expects
942|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
943|20ec53|        var chatMessages: [(role: String, content: String)] = []
944|d6ed84|        
945|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
946|8df8ce|            chatMessages.append((role: msg.role.rawValue, content: msg.content))
947|5f3077|        }
948|d6ed84|        
949|b4ee8b|        let response = try await localLLM.chat(messages: chatMessages, systemPrompt: systemPrompt)
950|090c3f|        return response
951|27e597|    }
952|b4687f|    
953|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
954|b4687f|    
955|a96bea|    private func buildSystemPrompt(context: String?) -> String {
956|a60aaf|        var prompt = """
957|de15a3|You are an expert coding assistant integrated into a code editor on iPadOS. You help developers write, debug, explain, and improve their code. Always respond in English.
958|adc83b|
959|3584f0|Guidelines:
960|9e10fd|- Provide clear, concise explanations
961|d9814a|- Use code blocks with proper language tags for code snippets
962|fab31f|- Suggest best practices and optimizations
963|17f65d|- Be helpful with debugging and error resolution
964|a2707f|- When generating code, ensure it's complete and runnable
965|ea2d25|- ALWAYS respond in English regardless of input language
966|d72f9a|- Never output raw XML tags like <think> or </think>
967|e4615a|"""
968|d6ed84|        
969|54cd50|        if let context = context, !context.isEmpty {
970|b91f6a|            prompt += "\n\nCurrent file context:\n```\n\(context)\n```"
971|5f3077|        }
972|d6ed84|        
973|dd02e7|        return prompt
974|27e597|    }
975|b4687f|    
976|c53a51|    private func extractCodeBlocks(from text: String) -> [CodeBlock] {
977|791eb5|        var blocks: [CodeBlock] = []
978|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
979|d6ed84|        
980|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
981|f7ed63|            return blocks
982|5f3077|        }
983|d6ed84|        
984|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
985|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
986|d6ed84|        
987|847e6d|        for match in matches {
988|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
989|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
990|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
991|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
992|9e5c94|                blocks.append(CodeBlock(language: language.isEmpty ? "text" : language, code: code))
993|a7dc16|            }
994|5f3077|        }
995|d6ed84|        
996|db7106|        return blocks
997|27e597|    }
998|b31277|}
999|adc83b|
1000|e2fa47|// MARK: - AI Errors
1001|adc83b|
1002|c16cee|enum AIError: LocalizedError {
1003|06d89d|    case invalidResponse
1004|dbebbc|    case httpError(Int)
1005|24e92a|    case apiError(String)
1006|b833b2|    case noAPIKey
1007|b4687f|    
1008|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
1009|2e6d08|        switch self {
1010|9a7b43|        case .invalidResponse: return "Invalid response from AI service"
1011|385ec1|        case .httpError(let code): return "HTTP Error: \(code)"
1012|1b0277|        case .apiError(let message): return message
1013|e8a23b|        case .noAPIKey: return "No API key configured"
1014|5f3077|        }
1015|27e597|    }

324|b8b714|    func sendMessage(_ content: String, context: String? = nil) async {

326|06856b|            error = "Please set your API key in settings"

328|5f3077|        }
329|d6ed84|

331|382c05|        currentSession.messages.append(userMessage)
332|aa2963|        updateSession()
333|d6ed84|

335|8926e1|        if currentSession.messages.count == 1 {

337|e749a7|            updateSession()
338|5f3077|        }
339|d6ed84|        
340|d52924|        isLoading = true
341|0406ba|        error = nil
342|dc34fb|        streamingResponse = ""
343|d6ed84|        
344|4da690|        do {
345|ce5098|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: currentSession.messages, context: context)
346|70672e|            let assistantMessage = ChatMessage(role: .assistant, content: response, codeBlocks: extractCodeBlocks(from: response))
347|c17117|            currentSession.messages.append(assistantMessage)
348|e749a7|            updateSession()
349|853889|        } catch {
350|97a9c5|            self.error = error.localizedDescription
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|295f36|        isLoading = false
354|27e597|    }

364|0fd45c|    @MainActor
365|a1609b|    func fixCode(_ code: String, language: String, errorMessage: String? = nil) async -> String {
366|7b5f15|        var prompt = "Fix any issues in the following \(language) code and explain what was wrong:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
367|bf3125|        if let error = errorMessage {
368|5ee495|            prompt += "\n\nError message: \(error)"
369|5f3077|        }
370|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
371|27e597|    }
372|b4687f|    
373|0fd45c|    @MainActor
374|61e13d|    func generateTests(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
375|a6412a|        let prompt = "Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following \(language) code. Include edge cases and typical usage:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"
376|5569b7|        return await sendAndGetResponse(prompt)
377|27e597|    }
378|b4687f|

380|83d5b9|    func refactorCode(_ code: String, language: String, instruction: String) async -> String {
381|eefc66|        let prompt = "Refactor the following \(language) code according to this instruction: \(instruction)\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"

386|e7b4e9|    func documentCode(_ code: String, language: String) async -> String {
387|02ed0f|        let prompt = "Add comprehensive documentation/comments to the following \(language) code:\n\n```\(language)\n\(code)\n```"

390|b4687f|    
391|0fd45c|    @MainActor
392|90c566|    private func sendAndGetResponse(_ prompt: String) async -> String {
393|915e6f|        guard hasValidAPIKey() else {
394|1b72a2|            return "Error: Please set your API key in settings"
395|5f3077|        }
396|d6ed84|        
397|d52924|        isLoading = true
398|0406ba|        error = nil
399|d6ed84|        
400|4da690|        do {
401|3b5c4f|            let messages = [ChatMessage(role: .user, content: prompt)]
402|153d92|            let response = try await makeAPIRequest(messages: messages, context: nil)
403|612c3f|            isLoading = false
404|d392d0|            return response
405|853889|        } catch {
406|612c3f|            isLoading = false
407|0cacff|            return "Error: \(error.localizedDescription)"
408|5f3077|        }
409|27e597|    }
410|b4687f|    
411|579307|    // MARK: - API Request
412|b4687f|    
413|0a6144|    private func makeAPIRequest(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
414|162b99|        switch selectedProvider {
415|6ca85d|        case .openai:
416|d9a528|            return try await callOpenAI(messages: messages, context: context)
417|2b5eb0|        case .anthropic:
418|afe61a|            return try await callAnthropic(messages: messages, context: context)
419|51e5bc|        case .google:
420|688f02|            return try await callGoogle(messages: messages, context: context)
421|a90b5c|        case .kimi:
422|467f79|            return try await callKimi(messages: messages, context: context)
423|448974|        case .glm:
424|d03556|            return try await callGLM(messages: messages, context: context)
425|6a2402|        case .groq:
426|2fdc7f|            return try await callGroq(messages: messages, context: context)
427|586fca|        case .deepseek:
428|b7290a|            return try await callDeepSeek(messages: messages, context: context)
429|0935ee|        case .mistral:
430|048202|            return try await callMistral(messages: messages, context: context)
431|7b8ebd|        case .ollama:
432|20a226|            return try await callOllama(messages: messages, context: context)
433|5135a3|        case .localMLX:
434|258af5|            return try await callLocalMLX(messages: messages, context: context)
435|5f3077|        }
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|b90399|    // MARK: - OpenAI API
439|b4687f|    
440|c4fdfa|    private func callOpenAI(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
441|bc2d67|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.openai.baseURL)/chat/completions")!
442|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
443|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
444|7fd512|        request.setValue("Bearer \(openAIKey)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
445|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
446|d6ed84|        
447|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
448|d6ed84|        
449|5740dd|        // Add system message with context
450|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
451|55709b|        apiMessages.append(["role": "system", "content": systemPrompt])
452|d6ed84|        
453|c5ae63|        // Add conversation messages
454|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
455|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
456|5f3077|        }
457|d6ed84|        
458|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
459|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
460|b5548e|            "messages": apiMessages,
461|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
462|f1c54d|            "temperature": 0.7
463|220505|        ]
464|d6ed84|        
465|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
466|d6ed84|        
467|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
468|d6ed84|        
469|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
470|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
471|5f3077|        }
472|d6ed84|        
473|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
474|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
475|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
476|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
477|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
478|a7dc16|            }
479|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
480|5f3077|        }
481|d6ed84|        
482|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
483|95fe6c|        guard let choices = json?["choices"] as? [[String: Any]],
484|6c7545|              let firstChoice = choices.first,
485|9e7d93|              let message = firstChoice["message"] as? [String: Any],
486|870b1f|              let content = message["content"] as? String else {
487|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
488|5f3077|        }
489|d6ed84|        
490|9be7b6|        return content
491|27e597|    }
492|b4687f|    
493|29e6f6|    // MARK: - Anthropic API
494|b4687f|    
495|f1fc2e|    private func callAnthropic(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
496|3b388d|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.anthropic.baseURL)/messages")!
497|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
498|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
499|ede6ed|        request.setValue(anthropicKey, forHTTPHeaderField: "x-api-key")
500|6b8824|        request.setValue("2023-06-01", forHTTPHeaderField: "anthropic-version")
501|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
502|d6ed84|        
503|84a07c|        var apiMessages: [[String: String]] = []
504|d6ed84|        
505|113613|        for msg in messages where msg.role != .system {
506|89949c|            apiMessages.append(["role": msg.role.rawValue, "content": msg.content])
507|5f3077|        }
508|d6ed84|        
509|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
510|d6ed84|        
511|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
512|e981b8|            "model": selectedModel.id,
513|d6271e|            "max_tokens": 4096,
514|f06de6|            "system": systemPrompt,
515|60c92e|            "messages": apiMessages
516|220505|        ]
517|d6ed84|        
518|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
519|d6ed84|        
520|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
521|d6ed84|        
522|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
523|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
524|5f3077|        }
525|d6ed84|        
526|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
527|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
528|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
529|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
530|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
531|a7dc16|            }
532|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
533|5f3077|        }
534|d6ed84|        
535|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
536|918dea|        guard let content = json?["content"] as? [[String: Any]],
537|fda5e9|              let firstContent = content.first,
538|31d41c|              let text = firstContent["text"] as? String else {
539|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
540|5f3077|        }
541|d6ed84|        
542|ec263c|        return text
543|27e597|    }

545|87a420|    // MARK: - Google API
546|b4687f|    
547|190d00|    private func callGoogle(messages: [ChatMessage], context: String?) async throws -> String {
548|dd3258|        let url = URL(string: "\(AIProvider.google.baseURL)/models/\(selectedModel.id):generateContent?key=\(googleKey)")!
549|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
550|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
551|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
552|d6ed84|        
553|2ae98d|        var parts: [[String: Any]] = []
554|d6ed84|        
555|288895|        // Add system context
556|fd71f7|        let systemPrompt = buildSystemPrompt(context: context)
557|e08e07|        parts.append(["text": "System: \(systemPrompt)"])
558|d6ed84|        
559|c1c8d4|        // Add messages
560|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
561|989b77|            let role = msg.role == .assistant ? "Model" : "User"
562|35f120|            parts.append(["text": "\(role): \(msg.content)"])
563|5f3077|        }
564|d6ed84|        
565|825e3e|        let body: [String: Any] = [
566|6251fc|            "contents": [
567|f76f20|                ["parts": parts]
568|97e7d5|            ],
569|0eaa6f|            "generationConfig": [
570|80d7f4|                "maxOutputTokens": 4096,
571|e772de|                "temperature": 0.7
572|324820|            ]
573|220505|        ]
574|d6ed84|        
575|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
576|d6ed84|        
577|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
578|d6ed84|        
579|2748ab|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
580|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
581|5f3077|        }
582|d6ed84|        
583|42034c|        if httpResponse.statusCode != 200 {
584|a214f5|            if let errorJson = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any],
585|3cebbe|               let error = errorJson["error"] as? [String: Any],
586|be8727|               let message = error["message"] as? String {
587|f87f3a|                throw AIError.apiError(message)
588|a7dc16|            }
589|6baa43|            throw AIError.httpError(httpResponse.statusCode)
590|5f3077|        }
591|d6ed84|        
592|c94159|        let json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any]
593|12af8b|        guard let candidates = json?["candidates"] as? [[String: Any]],
594|977b10|              let firstCandidate = candidates.first,
595|0ff2f5|              let content = firstCandidate["content"] as? [String: Any],
596|9ddaf9|              let parts = content["parts"] as? [[String: Any]],
597|61737e|              let firstPart = parts.first,
598|a6eafc|              let text = firstPart["text"] as? String else {
599|aa0282|            throw AIError.invalidResponse
600|5f3077|        }
601|d6ed84|        
602|ec263c|        return text
603|27e597|    }

953|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
954|b4687f|    
955|a96bea|    private func buildSystemPrompt(context: String?) -> String {
956|a60aaf|        var prompt = """
957|de15a3|You are an expert coding assistant integrated into a code editor on iPadOS. You help developers write, debug, explain, and improve their code. Always respond in English.
958|adc83b|
959|3584f0|Guidelines:
960|9e10fd|- Provide clear, concise explanations
961|d9814a|- Use code blocks with proper language tags for code snippets
962|fab31f|- Suggest best practices and optimizations
963|17f65d|- Be helpful with debugging and error resolution
964|a2707f|- When generating code, ensure it's complete and runnable
965|ea2d25|- ALWAYS respond in English regardless of input language
966|d72f9a|- Never output raw XML tags like <think> or </think>
967|e4615a|"""
968|d6ed84|        
969|54cd50|        if let context = context, !context.isEmpty {
970|b91f6a|            prompt += "\n\nCurrent file context:\n```\n\(context)\n```"
971|5f3077|        }
972|d6ed84|        
973|dd02e7|        return prompt
974|27e597|    }
975|b4687f|    
976|c53a51|    private func extractCodeBlocks(from text: String) -> [CodeBlock] {
977|791eb5|        var blocks: [CodeBlock] = []
978|0f2b2b|        let pattern = "```(\\w*)\\n([\\s\\S]*?)```"
979|d6ed84|        
980|cbccc8|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern) else {
981|f7ed63|            return blocks
982|5f3077|        }
983|d6ed84|        
984|10d615|        let range = NSRange(text.startIndex..., in: text)
985|b29406|        let matches = regex.matches(in: text, range: range)
986|d6ed84|        
987|847e6d|        for match in matches {
988|b137ab|            if let langRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: text),
989|f66f31|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: text) {
990|dfd4cc|                let language = String(text[langRange])
991|894c52|                let code = String(text[codeRange]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
992|9e5c94|                blocks.append(CodeBlock(language: language.isEmpty ? "text" : language, code: code))
993|a7dc16|            }
994|5f3077|        }
995|d6ed84|        
996|db7106|        return blocks
997|27e597|    }
998|b31277|}
999|adc83b|
1000|e2fa47|// MARK: - AI Errors
1001|adc83b|
1002|c16cee|enum AIError: LocalizedError {
1003|06d89d|    case invalidResponse
1004|dbebbc|    case httpError(Int)
1005|24e92a|    case apiError(String)
1006|b833b2|    case noAPIKey
1007|b4687f|    
1008|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
1009|2e6d08|        switch self {
1010|9a7b43|        case .invalidResponse: return "Invalid response from AI service"
1011|385ec1|        case .httpError(let code): return "HTTP Error: \(code)"
1012|1b0277|        case .apiError(let message): return message
1013|e8a23b|        case .noAPIKey: return "No API key configured"
1014|5f3077|        }
1015|27e597|    }
1016|b31277|}

127|e66206|    /// Updates suggestions based on the current text and cursor.
128|2cbc84|    ///
129|d91771|    /// FEAT-046: extracts symbols from `text` and mixes them into the suggestion list.
130|785f23|    /// FEAT-047: adds a curated set of Swift stdlib completions.
131|6224c3|    func updateSuggestions(for text: String, cursorPosition: Int) {
132|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
133|97fb6b|        guard let context = completionContext(in: text, cursorPosition: safeCursor) else {
134|0efe98|            apply(items: [])
135|bef5d6|            return
136|5f3077|        }
137|adc83b|
138|c2e8b0|        let prefixLower = context.prefix.lowercased()
139|042f0f|        guard !prefixLower.isEmpty else {
140|bacf86|            // If user just typed a dot, show members even with empty prefix.
141|a46e04|            if context.isMemberCompletion, let base = context.memberBase {
142|c9f7f8|                let members = memberCandidates(forBase: base)
143|92798d|                let items = members.map { Suggestion(kind: .member, displayText: $0, score: 1000) }
144|0b887c|                apply(items: items)
145|f5a6eb|            } else {
146|4c73d4|                apply(items: [])
147|a7dc16|            }
148|bef5d6|            return
149|5f3077|        }
150|adc83b|
151|3e8861|        var candidates: [Suggestion] = []
152|adc83b|
153|67a42f|        // FEAT-046: current file symbols
154|f70c93|        let symbols = extractSymbols(from: text)
155|27a302|        candidates.append(contentsOf: symbols
156|488fb3|            .filter { $0.lowercased().hasPrefix(prefixLower) }
157|9de4dd|            .map { Suggestion(kind: .symbol, displayText: $0, score: 900) })
158|adc83b|
159|5f2431|        // Keywords
160|1a6e20|        candidates.append(contentsOf: keywords
161|488fb3|            .filter { $0.lowercased().hasPrefix(prefixLower) }
162|b40e7e|            .map { Suggestion(kind: .keyword, displayText: $0, score: 800) })
163|adc83b|
164|fcf131|        // FEAT-047: Swift stdlib (top level)
165|d76253|        candidates.append(contentsOf: stdlibTopLevel
166|488fb3|            .filter { $0.lowercased().hasPrefix(prefixLower) }
167|3cfc84|            .map { Suggestion(kind: .stdlib, displayText: $0, score: 700) })
168|adc83b|
169|07fafa|        // Member completions (very small heuristic-based set)
170|7f874f|        if context.isMemberCompletion, let base = context.memberBase {
171|68d0ac|            let members = memberCandidates(forBase: base)
172|a69811|            candidates.append(contentsOf: members
173|585680|                .filter { $0.lowercased().hasPrefix(prefixLower) }
174|73995e|                .map { Suggestion(kind: .member, displayText: $0, score: 1000) })
175|5f3077|        }
176|adc83b|
177|41630d|        // De-dupe + rank
178|673af4|        let merged = mergeAndSort(candidates)
179|678fc2|        apply(items: merged)
180|27e597|    }

183|1052ec|        guard showSuggestions else { return }

188|adc83b|

192|ee2279|            selectedIndex -= 1

194|27e597|    }

206|68b7cb|    /// (Not wired by default; added as plumbing for FEAT-045 dropdown selection.)
207|85ca8d|    func commitCurrentSuggestion(into text: inout String, cursorPosition: inout Int) {
208|f15814|        guard let suggestion = suggestionItems[safe: selectedIndex], showSuggestions else { return }
209|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
210|2e795d|        guard let context = completionContext(in: text, cursorPosition: safeCursor) else { return }
211|adc83b|
212|9bab77|        let replacementRange = context.replacementRange
213|323d10|        text.replaceSubrange(replacementRange, with: suggestion.insertText)
214|adc83b|
215|8d1541|        // Move cursor to end of inserted text.
216|b73dac|        let newCursorOffset = text.distance(from: text.startIndex, to: replacementRange.lowerBound) + suggestion.insertText.count
217|68489c|        cursorPosition = min(newCursorOffset, text.count)
218|adc83b|
219|be2759|        hideSuggestions()
220|27e597|    }

224|7d7b95|    private struct CompletionContext {
225|0dee4e|        let prefix: String
226|b4787e|        let replacementRange: Range<String.Index>
227|56198f|        let isMemberCompletion: Bool
228|79772b|        let memberBase: String?
229|27e597|    }
230|adc83b|
231|f6601a|    private func completionContext(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> CompletionContext? {
232|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
233|d6ed84|        
234|42915b|        // Safety check: ensure cursorPosition is within bounds
235|4b5e56|        let safeCursor = max(0, min(cursorPosition, text.count))
236|1fae78|        let cursorIndex = text.index(text.startIndex, offsetBy: safeCursor)
237|adc83b|
238|5aebf3|        // Find start of current identifier (letters/digits/_).
239|39f169|        var start = cursorIndex
240|26ebb3|        while start > text.startIndex {
241|c5c76e|            let prev = text.index(before: start)
242|9f8a31|            if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
243|1929f8|                start = prev
244|f5a6eb|            } else {
245|74cfd8|                break
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|bf292f|        let prefix = String(text[start..<cursorIndex])
250|adc83b|
251|824562|        // Member completion if immediately preceded by '.'
252|e374b4|        var isMember = false
253|e47c72|        var memberBase: String? = nil
254|adc83b|
255|0c2c38|        if start > text.startIndex {
256|2aa058|            let dotIndex = text.index(before: start)
257|88bd65|            if text[dotIndex] == "." {
258|ca8397|                isMember = true
259|adc83b|
260|6f6689|                // Parse identifier before '.'
261|91f615|                var baseEnd = dotIndex
262|521a36|                var baseStart = baseEnd
263|5fa357|                while baseStart > text.startIndex {
264|56e352|                    let prev = text.index(before: baseStart)
265|2a8ddd|                    if isIdentifierChar(text[prev]) {
266|fbabfa|                        baseStart = prev
267|540066|                    } else {
268|28a64b|                        break
269|c9717a|                    }
270|4e2d32|                }
271|f96abf|                let base = String(text[baseStart..<baseEnd])
272|ce472b|                if !base.isEmpty {
273|b9c992|                    memberBase = base
274|4e2d32|                }
275|a7dc16|            }
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|081616|        return CompletionContext(prefix: prefix,
279|c93ac4|                                 replacementRange: start..<cursorIndex,
280|a50c25|                                 isMemberCompletion: isMember,
281|ee9636|                                 memberBase: memberBase)
282|27e597|    }
283|adc83b|
284|818e4b|    private func isIdentifierChar(_ c: Character) -> Bool {
285|c233b9|        // Swift identifiers are more complex, but this is enough for basic autocomplete.
286|a164d4|        return c.isLetter || c.isNumber || c == "_"
287|27e597|    }
288|adc83b|
289|117bcf|    private func memberCandidates(forBase base: String) -> [String] {
290|cf1cb2|        // Basic heuristic: only match known stdlib types by exact name.
291|622249|        if let members = memberCompletions[base] { return members }
292|b72a10|        return []
293|27e597|    }
294|adc83b|
295|6ba6d8|    private func extractSymbols(from text: String) -> [String] {
296|1098cf|        // Very lightweight symbol extraction: looks for common declarations.
297|141450|        // Intentionally best-effort; keeps FEAT-046 self-contained.
298|f746d2|        var results = Set<String>()
299|adc83b|
300|f97d0d|        func addMatches(pattern: String) {
301|ca0afa|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return }
302|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
303|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
304|d25847|            regex.enumerateMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range) { match, _, _ in
305|14f5aa|                guard let match, match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return }
306|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
307|de56e8|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { return }
308|8989a1|                let name = ns.substring(with: nameRange)
309|66b469|                if !name.isEmpty { results.insert(name) }
310|a7dc16|            }
311|5f3077|        }
312|adc83b|
313|a1c515|        // func Foo
314|cd4071|        addMatches(pattern: "\\bfunc\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
315|5eaefb|        // class/struct/enum/protocol/typealias Foo
316|685691|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:class|struct|enum|protocol|typealias)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)")
317|3764b8|        // let/var foo (captures first name before : = , )
318|bbf05c|        addMatches(pattern: "\\b(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)(?=\\s*[:=,])")
319|adc83b|
320|01a90c|        return results.sorted { $0.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1) == .orderedAscending }
321|27e597|    }
322|adc83b|
323|1470f2|    private func mergeAndSort(_ items: [Suggestion]) -> [Suggestion] {
324|ff1146|        // Keep highest-scored entry per id.
325|f6e288|        var bestById: [String: Suggestion] = [:]
326|686171|        for item in items {
327|0701eb|            if let existing = bestById[item.id] {
328|d5a6de|                if item.score > existing.score {
329|763640|                    bestById[item.id] = item
330|4e2d32|                }
331|f5a6eb|            } else {
332|b949a2|                bestById[item.id] = item
333|a7dc16|            }
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|cfe5f9|        return bestById.values.sorted {
337|708c2d|            if $0.score != $1.score { return $0.score > $1.score }
338|e5aa71|            return $0.displayText.localizedCaseInsensitiveCompare($1.displayText) == .orderedAscending
339|5f3077|        }
340|27e597|    }
341|adc83b|
342|ba218c|    private func apply(items: [Suggestion]) {
343|02d13b|        suggestionItems = items
344|f6da05|        suggestions = items.map { $0.displayText }
345|c77b90|        showSuggestions = !items.isEmpty
346|81a6a8|        selectedIndex = 0
347|27e597|    }
348|b31277|}
349|adc83b|
350|c6407f|// MARK: - Safe Array Access
351|adc83b|
352|d72239|private extension Array {
353|686e51|    subscript(safe index: Int) -> Element? {
354|0b415a|        indices.contains(index) ? self[index] : nil
355|27e597|    }
356|b31277|}
357|adc83b|

24|20c960|            switch self {

52|a86427|    func findMatchingBracket(in text: String, cursorPosition: Int) -> BracketPair? {
53|4c2df9|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return nil }
54|d6ed84|        
55|9df2e8|        let chars = Array(text)
56|7169cc|        let count = chars.count
57|d6ed84|        
58|eb0050|        // Clamp cursor position
59|112372|        let pos = max(0, min(cursorPosition, count))
60|d6ed84|        
61|404d74|        // Check character at cursor and before cursor
62|58bc54|        let positionsToCheck = [pos, pos - 1].filter { $0 >= 0 && $0 < count }
63|d6ed84|

68|3a7bbf|                if isOpen {
69|265e1e|                    // Search forward for closing bracket

99|d6ed84|

101|11cf75|            // Handle escape sequences
102|5c254a|            if escapeNext {
103|b7c801|                escapeNext = false

105|a7dc16|            }
106|3070d1|

109|1df510|                continue
110|a7dc16|            }
111|3070d1|

122|3070d1|            
123|801179|            // Skip brackets inside strings
124|28e059|            if inString { continue }
125|3070d1|            
126|ae2237|            // Check for brackets
127|e89ec3|            if let (bracketType, isOpen) = BracketType.from(char: char) {
128|3a7bbf|                if isOpen {

130|fdd0e2|                } else {

134|4e2d32|                }
135|a7dc16|            }
136|5f3077|        }
137|d6ed84|        
138|4ca1cd|        return pairs.sorted { $0.openIndex < $1.openIndex }
139|27e597|    }

4|adc83b|
5|6486b8|// MARK: - CodeExecutionService
6|adc83b|
7|260b9d|/// Service that handles code execution requests from the Run menu.
8|f40e11|/// Routes execution to appropriate runners based on file type and outputs results to the Output panel.
9|69d728|@MainActor
10|a43a38|final class CodeExecutionService {
11|6dc112|    static let shared = CodeExecutionService()
12|b4687f|    
13|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
14|b4687f|    
15|37bd08|    private var jsRunner: JSRunner?
16|33c15c|    private let outputManager = OutputPanelManager.shared
17|b4687f|    
18|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
19|b4687f|    
20|54113e|    private init() {}
21|b4687f|    
22|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
23|b4687f|    
24|d148d5|    /// Execute the currently active file
25|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
26|4cfe18|    ///   - fileName: Name of the file to execute
27|13e212|    ///   - content: Content/code of the file
28|97d12a|    func executeCurrentFile(fileName: String, content: String) {
29|cc9311|        let fileExtension = (fileName as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
30|d6ed84|        
31|2eea91|        switch fileExtension {
32|ff039a|        case "js", "mjs":
33|760a4e|            executeJavaScript(fileName: fileName, code: content)
34|048ca0|        case "ts", "tsx":
35|b896b9|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] TypeScript execution requires transpilation. Coming soon!", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
36|de8aa1|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
37|e1d221|        case "py":
38|9e2a3c|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] Python execution not yet available on-device.", to: OutputChannel.python, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
39|25499b|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.python
40|520b7d|        default:
41|cc7290|            outputManager.append("[ERROR] No runner available for .\(fileExtension) files", to: OutputChannel.output, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
42|c75b79|            outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.output
43|5f3077|        }
44|27e597|    }
45|b4687f|    
46|9b6f68|    // MARK: - JavaScript Execution
47|b4687f|    
48|d76b7d|    private func executeJavaScript(fileName: String, code: String) {
49|0dec37|        // Switch to JavaScript output channel
50|e39e9c|        outputManager.selectedChannel = OutputChannel.javascript
51|d6ed84|        
52|a728d5|        // Clear previous output and show execution header
53|1511a8|        outputManager.clear(OutputChannel.javascript)
54|6cfb10|        outputManager.append("▶ Running: \(fileName)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
55|89174a|        outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
56|d6ed84|        
57|a3f62b|        // Create a fresh JSRunner instance
58|462f68|        jsRunner = JSRunner()
59|d6ed84|        
60|e61664|        // Set up console handler to capture output
61|305ad3|        jsRunner?.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
62|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
63|150252|                guard let self = self else { return }
64|216278|                
65|b169c6|                // Determine stream type based on message prefix
66|27b18b|                let streamType: StreamType = message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") || message.hasPrefix("[EXCEPTION]") ? StreamType.stderr : StreamType.stdout
67|216278|                
68|4b39b7|                // Remove the prefix for cleaner output display
69|62636a|                var cleanMessage = message
70|121995|                for prefix in ["[LOG] ", "[INFO] ", "[WARN] ", "[ERROR] ", "[EXCEPTION] "] {
71|1df682|                    if message.hasPrefix(prefix) {
72|11af1f|                        cleanMessage = String(message.dropFirst(prefix.count))
73|28a64b|                        break
74|c9717a|                    }
75|4e2d32|                }
76|216278|                
77|6a3616|                self.outputManager.append(cleanMessage, to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: streamType)
78|a7dc16|            }
79|5f3077|        }
80|d6ed84|        
81|5a9195|        // Execute the code asynchronously
82|0f1953|        Task {
83|073be0|            let startTime = Date()
84|3070d1|            
85|71cc09|            do {
86|f3a1fd|                let result = try await jsRunner?.execute(code: code)
87|1ee120|                let duration = Date().timeIntervalSince(startTime)
88|216278|                
89|73b1fb|                // Show result if it's not undefined
90|f23508|                if let result = result, !result.isUndefined {
91|8a7075|                    let resultString = formatJSValue(result)
92|174733|                    outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
93|1c40a4|                    outputManager.append("⮐ Result: \(resultString)", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
94|4e2d32|                }
95|216278|                
96|b2c6e7|                // Show completion message
97|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
98|2c8c65|                outputManager.append("✓ Completed in \(String(format: "%.2f", duration * 1000))ms", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
99|216278|                
100|77a0dc|            } catch let error as JSRunnerError {
101|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
102|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
103|216278|                
104|91b9a2|            } catch {
105|dc27a4|                outputManager.append("─────────────────────────────────────", to: OutputChannel.javascript)
106|a0d863|                outputManager.append("✗ Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: OutputChannel.javascript, streamType: StreamType.stderr)
107|a7dc16|            }
108|3070d1|            
109|eb797f|            // Clean up runner
110|e9e019|            jsRunner = nil
111|5f3077|        }
112|27e597|    }
113|b4687f|    
114|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
115|b4687f|    
116|7aa5bd|    /// Format a JSValue for display
117|e68bfd|    private func formatJSValue(_ value: JSValue) -> String {
118|c903ed|        if value.isNull {
119|c04d4d|            return "null"
120|35d02e|        } else if value.isUndefined {
121|b32932|            return "undefined"
122|edfa6b|        } else if value.isBoolean {
123|1a76ee|            return value.toBool() ? "true" : "false"
124|4e414f|        } else if value.isNumber {
125|9abc83|            let num = value.toNumber()
126|d3fc6f|            // Check if it's an integer
127|a09f20|            if let n = num, n.doubleValue == Double(n.intValue) {
128|ee9ad8|                return "\(n.intValue)"
129|a7dc16|            }
130|64a140|            return "\(num?.doubleValue ?? 0)"
131|419991|        } else if value.isString {
132|7c8a45|            return "\"\(value.toString() ?? "")\""
133|a72377|        } else if value.isArray {
134|d7f252|            if let array = value.toArray() {
135|c35363|                return "[\(array.map { "\($0)" }.joined(separator: ", "))]"
136|a7dc16|            }
137|976c47|            return "[]"
138|bb3c98|        } else if value.isObject {
139|b4fae0|            if let dict = value.toDictionary() {
140|ee1ab7|                let json = try? JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
141|a9b0f4|                if let json = json, let str = String(data: json, encoding: .utf8) {
142|cfed56|                    return str
143|4e2d32|                }
144|a7dc16|            }
145|0b436d|            return value.toString() ?? "[object]"
146|5f3077|        }
147|bbc620|        return value.toString() ?? "undefined"
148|27e597|    }
149|b31277|}
150|adc83b|

100|adc83b|
101|ff8cec|        // If we detect a declaration/function/control-flow whose opening brace is on a later line,

104|adc83b|
105|cce061|        // Used to prevent duplicate regions for grouped constructs (imports, // comments)
106|0cdafa|        var previousNonEmptyWasImport = false

108|d6ed84|

111|8a2732|            let leadingWhitespace = line.prefix { $0 == " " || $0 == "\t" }.count
112|3070d1|            
113|4be2b3|            // Skip empty lines for most detections
114|94f56f|            guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
115|adc83b|
116|096595|            // MARK: - Close blocks BEFORE opening new ones (handles "} else {" correctly)
117|3c0070|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("}") {

119|7f8903|                let closeCount = max(1, trimmed.prefix { $0 == "}" }.count)
120|539d99|                for _ in 0..<closeCount {
121|75d4ef|                    if let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {

123|9008b5|                            regions.append(FoldRegion(

125|419111|                                endLine: index,

139|58d5c1|                    if index - region.startLine > 1 {

149|3070d1|

151|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
152|7054bb|                if !previousNonEmptyWasImport {
153|a670fd|                    let importEnd = findConsecutiveImports(from: index, in: lines)
154|83c6e4|                    if importEnd > index {

161|c9717a|                    }
162|4e2d32|                }

164|f5a6eb|            } else {

167|3070d1|            
168|9e2e57|            // MARK: - Comment Detection
169|d91d6c|            if detectCommentStart(trimmed) {

171|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
172|08da46|            } else if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
173|058130|                // Only create a fold region at the start of a consecutive // block
174|d2441e|                if !previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment {
175|a2e79c|                    let commentEnd = findConsecutiveComments(from: index, in: lines)
176|1111e2|                    if commentEnd > index {
177|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
178|0dc011|                            startLine: index,
179|03f2b5|                            endLine: commentEnd,

181|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"

183|c9717a|                    }
184|4e2d32|                }
185|cda61a|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = true
186|fd1885|            } else if detectCommentEnd(trimmed) {
187|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
188|e33d82|                if let comment = commentStack.popLast() {
189|bf0471|                    if index - comment.startLine > 1 {
190|22c663|                        regions.append(FoldRegion(
191|d5b0c0|                            startLine: comment.startLine,
192|46d058|                            endLine: index,
193|64e6ca|                            type: .comment,
194|0e7feb|                            label: "Comment"
195|78dc58|                        ))
196|c9717a|                    }
197|4e2d32|                }
198|f5a6eb|            } else {
199|0b3758|                previousNonEmptyWasSingleLineComment = false
200|a7dc16|            }
201|3070d1|            
202|3d946d|            // MARK: - Class/Struct/Enum/Protocol/Extension Detection
203|2f1070|            if let declaration = detectDeclaration(trimmed) {

206|fdd0e2|                } else {

208|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {

211|c9717a|                    }
212|4e2d32|                }
213|a7dc16|            }
214|3070d1|            
215|9273f4|            // MARK: - Function/Method Detection
216|8fb15a|            if let functionInfo = detectFunction(trimmed) {
217|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
218|072276|                    blockStack.append((.function, index, functionInfo))
219|fdd0e2|                } else {
220|ca50d4|                    // Function without opening brace - look ahead
221|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
222|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)

224|c9717a|                    }
225|4e2d32|                }
226|a7dc16|            }
227|3070d1|            
228|1e5bf2|            // MARK: - Control Flow Detection (if, guard, for, while, switch, etc.)
229|6b5dd6|            if let controlFlowLabel = detectControlFlow(trimmed) {
230|8d1233|                if trimmed.contains("{") {
231|cb4212|                    blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
232|fdd0e2|                } else {
233|ffa621|                    if let braceLine = findOpeningBrace(from: index + 1, in: lines) {
234|59357e|                        braceLinesClaimed.insert(braceLine)
235|648280|                        blockStack.append((.controlFlow, index, controlFlowLabel))
236|c9717a|                    }
237|4e2d32|                }
238|a7dc16|            }
239|3070d1|            
240|b850f8|            // MARK: - Generic Block Detection
241|83f6cf|            // Avoid adding a generic block for a standalone "{" that belongs to a previously detected declaration.
242|bcf366|            if trimmed.hasSuffix("{"),
243|bd639e|               trimmed != "{",
244|f372eb|               !braceLinesClaimed.contains(index),

246|747356|               !isFunctionLine(trimmed) {

251|5f3077|        }
252|d6ed84|        
253|a60e7c|        // Handle any remaining unclosed blocks
254|193bf7|        while let lastBlock = blockStack.popLast() {
255|30813f|            if lines.count - 1 - lastBlock.startLine > 1 {
256|e50ab8|                regions.append(FoldRegion(
257|42046c|                    startLine: lastBlock.startLine,
258|a646f4|                    endLine: lines.count - 1,
259|68bd66|                    type: lastBlock.type,
260|2cb6f6|                    label: lastBlock.label
261|2188d8|                ))
262|a7dc16|            }
263|5f3077|        }
264|d6ed84|        
265|da4698|        // Sort regions by start line
266|e60f91|        regions.sort { $0.startLine < $1.startLine }
267|d6ed84|        
268|5f2f76|        self.foldRegions = regions

272|823f0a|            foldRegionsByFile[fileId] = regions
273|5f3077|        }

276|f7b7e9|        if let filePath = filePath {
277|b86c9c|            restoreFoldState(for: filePath)
278|5f3077|        }
279|d6ed84|        
280|08ca44|        updateCollapsedLines()
281|27e597|    }

283|f96bbc|    // MARK: - Detection Helper Methods
284|b4687f|    
285|d80e09|    private func detectRegionStart(_ line: String) -> String? {
286|2a6674|        // C# / VS style regions
287|1989c4|        if line.hasPrefix("#region") {
288|08b9aa|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#region")
289|94d9b5|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Region"
290|5f3077|        }
291|39fca1|        // Objective-C pragma marks
292|667815|        if line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark") {
293|4621b4|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "#pragma mark")
294|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
295|5f3077|        }
296|ccd53a|        // Swift MARK comments
297|b5e23f|        if line.contains("MARK:") {
298|504937|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "MARK:")
299|fec7ec|            return components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "Mark"
300|5f3077|        }
301|c9afee|        // TODO/FIXME regions
302|453092|        if line.contains("TODO:") {
303|a4bc68|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "TODO:")
304|5b14a7|            return "TODO: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
305|5f3077|        }
306|92ac0a|        if line.contains("FIXME:") {
307|0b0cff|            let components = line.components(separatedBy: "FIXME:")
308|218d1e|            return "FIXME: " + (components.count > 1 ? components[1].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : "")
309|5f3077|        }
310|c2ae65|        return nil
311|27e597|    }
312|b4687f|    
313|c62450|    private func detectRegionEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
314|6c0837|        return line.hasPrefix("#endregion") || 
315|325a81|               line == "// MARK: -" ||
316|52ea28|               line.hasPrefix("#pragma mark -")
317|27e597|    }
318|b4687f|    
319|c6e97d|    private func detectCommentStart(_ line: String) -> Bool {
320|1cbff6|        return line.hasPrefix("/*") && !line.contains("*/")
321|27e597|    }
322|b4687f|    
323|ea9113|    private func detectCommentEnd(_ line: String) -> Bool {
324|d521b7|        return line.contains("*/") && !line.hasPrefix("/*")
325|27e597|    }
326|b4687f|    
327|766920|    private func findConsecutiveImports(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
328|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
329|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
330|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
331|25e1cc|            if trimmed.hasPrefix("import ") {
332|d549e2|                endIndex = i
333|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
334|74cfd8|                break
335|a7dc16|            }
336|5f3077|        }
337|7678e6|        return endIndex
338|27e597|    }
339|b4687f|    
340|fd2e13|    private func findConsecutiveComments(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int {
341|b1d128|        var endIndex = startIndex
342|2c6406|        for i in startIndex..<lines.count {
343|ac4d84|            let trimmed = lines[i].trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
344|730926|            if trimmed.starts(with: "//") {
345|d549e2|                endIndex = i
346|4a3466|            } else if !trimmed.isEmpty {
347|74cfd8|                break
348|a7dc16|            }
349|5f3077|        }
350|7678e6|        return endIndex
351|27e597|    }
352|b4687f|    
353|763883|    private func detectDeclaration(_ line: String) -> (type: FoldRegion.FoldType, label: String)? {
354|3ccee6|        func matchName(pattern: String) -> String? {
355|6cc0c4|            guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
356|f2f390|            guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
357|ebf922|                  match.numberOfRanges >= 2,
358|762e94|                  let r = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
359|f5f042|            else { return nil }
360|480e4a|            return String(line[r])
361|5f3077|        }
362|adc83b|
363|f67078|        // Allow leading attributes like "@MainActor", "@available(...)"
364|0c5ed8|        // Allow common modifiers in any order (best-effort).
365|ca2c54|        let prefix = #"^(?:\s*@\w+(?:\([^\)]*\))?\s+)*(?:\s*(?:public|private|internal|fileprivate|open|final|indirect|lazy|static|override|mutating|nonmutating)\s+)*"#
366|adc83b|
367|cf49c1|        // IMPORTANT: avoid treating "class func"/"class var" as a type declaration.
368|e1fc33|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"class\s+(?!func\b|var\b|let\b)([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
369|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
370|5f3077|        }
371|adc83b|
372|8d6e9b|        // Actor (Swift concurrency) – fold like a class/struct
373|8d98f9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"actor\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
374|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
375|5f3077|        }
376|adc83b|
377|c629a9|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"struct\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
378|d80de1|            return (.classOrStruct, name)
379|5f3077|        }
380|adc83b|
381|75283c|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"enum\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
382|0f57db|            return (.enumDeclaration, name)
383|5f3077|        }
384|adc83b|
385|bb35e5|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"protocol\s+([A-Za-z_]\w*)"#) {
386|982dbc|            return (.protocolDeclaration, name)
387|5f3077|        }
388|adc83b|
389|940527|        // Extensions can include dotted names (Foo.Bar)
390|b2a8c3|        if let name = matchName(pattern: prefix + #"extension\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_\.]*)"#) {
391|fbf8d2|            return (.extension, name)
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|c2ae65|        return nil
395|27e597|    }
396|b4687f|    
397|a1a6f6|    private func detectFunction(_ line: String) -> String? {
398|d7dbc1|        // Function detection with visibility modifiers
399|2861c1|        let visibilityKeywords = ["public", "private", "internal", "fileprivate", "static", "class", "override", "final", "mutating", "convenience"]
400|d6ed84|        
401|981adf|        // Check for 'func' keyword
402|db4a2c|        if line.contains("func ") {
403|25ca5f|            // Extract function name
404|270a0d|            let funcPattern = "func\\s+(\\w+)"
405|b5e31c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: funcPattern),
406|d7fb50|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)),
407|9e61c1|               let nameRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
408|456ee3|                let functionName = String(line[nameRange])
409|185b9c|                // Check for parameters to create label
410|bbf605|                if let parenStart = line.firstIndex(of: "("), let parenEnd = line.firstIndex(of: ")") {
411|2d3254|                    let params = String(line[parenStart...parenEnd])
412|929aa2|                    return "\(functionName)\(params)"
413|4e2d32|                }
414|8aa06e|                return functionName
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|d6ed84|        
418|4d99b7|        // Init detection
419|a1d502|        if let initName = extractName(from: line, prefix: "init", visibility: visibilityKeywords) {
420|3d8f8b|            return "\(initName)"
421|5f3077|        }
422|d6ed84|        
423|2a2371|        // Deinit detection
424|70e552|        if line.contains("deinit") {
425|9db7b1|            return "deinit"
426|5f3077|        }
427|d6ed84|        
428|307e69|        // Computed property with get/set
429|f3cc39|        if line.hasPrefix("var ") && (line.contains("{") || line.contains("get")) {
430|950394|            if let varName = extractVariableName(from: line) {
431|99146d|                return varName
432|a7dc16|            }
433|5f3077|        }
434|d6ed84|        
435|c2ae65|        return nil
436|27e597|    }
437|b4687f|    
438|1ec945|    private func detectControlFlow(_ line: String) -> String? {
439|bad9a4|        let controlFlowPatterns = [
440|0bf98c|            ("if ", "if"),
441|9fe51e|            ("guard ", "guard"),
442|62af45|            ("else if", "else if"),
443|7da324|            ("else", "else"),
444|99fc8d|            ("for ", "for"),
445|37f5a4|            ("while ", "while"),
446|402c75|            ("repeat", "repeat"),
447|f81318|            ("switch ", "switch"),
448|ff609c|            ("case ", "case"),
449|d493af|            ("default:", "default"),
450|0ca7b9|            ("do ", "do"),
451|30a630|            ("catch", "catch")
452|220505|        ]
453|d6ed84|        
454|186e39|        for (pattern, label) in controlFlowPatterns {
455|3cfde0|            if line.contains(pattern) {
456|6ef273|                return label
457|a7dc16|            }
458|5f3077|        }
459|c2ae65|        return nil
460|27e597|    }
461|b4687f|    
462|143320|    private func extractName(from line: String, prefix: String, visibility: [String]) -> String? {
463|47867c|        var components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
464|d6ed84|        
465|b4fd50|        // Remove visibility modifiers
466|6bbc02|        components = components.filter { !visibility.contains($0) }
467|d6ed84|        
468|ad7b7d|        // Find prefix index
469|524a3a|        if let prefixIndex = components.firstIndex(where: { $0 == prefix }),
470|22dab3|           prefixIndex + 1 < components.count {
471|5c4751|            var name = components[prefixIndex + 1]
472|43f61d|            // Remove colons and other trailing characters
473|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
474|3f8c05|            name = name.components(separatedBy: "<").first ?? name
475|dcb9cb|            name = name.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? name
476|470adb|            return name
477|5f3077|        }
478|c2ae65|        return nil
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|c68b6f|    private func extractVariableName(from line: String) -> String? {
482|6e7aec|        let components = line.components(separatedBy: .whitespaces).filter { !$0.isEmpty }
483|a2b557|        if components.count >= 2, components[0] == "var" {
484|696097|            var varName = components[1]
485|cdb291|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: ":").first ?? varName
486|0300ee|            varName = varName.components(separatedBy: "=").first ?? varName
487|c7c291|            return varName
488|5f3077|        }
489|c2ae65|        return nil
490|27e597|    }
491|b4687f|    
492|9d571e|    private func findOpeningBrace(from startIndex: Int, in lines: [String]) -> Int? {
493|1ccc79|        for i in startIndex..<min(startIndex + 5, lines.count) {
494|539363|            if lines[i].contains("{") {
495|883981|                return i
496|a7dc16|            }
497|5f3077|        }
498|c2ae65|        return nil
499|27e597|    }
500|b4687f|    
501|a3e3d4|    private func isDeclarationLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
502|3d6d16|        let keywords = ["class", "struct", "enum", "protocol", "extension", "init", "func"]
503|ce9d51|        return keywords.contains { line.contains("\($0) ") }
504|27e597|    }
505|b4687f|    
506|785057|    private func isFunctionLine(_ line: String) -> Bool {
507|00501b|        return line.contains("func ") || line.contains("init ")
508|27e597|    }
509|b4687f|    
510|70bda3|    private func detectBlockEnd(_ line: String, leadingWhitespace: Int) -> Bool {
511|ae2f5c|        return (line.hasPrefix("}") || line.starts(with: "}")) && 
512|9c322d|               (line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) == "}" || 
513|65b3d9|                line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).hasPrefix("}"))
514|27e597|    }

516|94cc0f|    // MARK: - Fold State Persistence
517|b4687f|    
518|786ea9|    /// Saves the current fold state to UserDefaults
519|1043ae|    func saveFoldState(for filePath: String) {
520|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
521|d6ed84|        
522|1c2856|        // Use regions from the dictionary if available
523|19f890|        let regionsToSave: [FoldRegion]
524|021ffe|        if let fileId = currentFileId, let storedRegions = foldRegionsByFile[fileId] {
525|b1db84|            regionsToSave = storedRegions
526|b31999|        } else {
527|210675|            regionsToSave = foldRegions
528|5f3077|        }
529|d6ed84|        
530|c424a6|        // Create a simplified representation for storage
531|40fb34|        let foldState = regionsToSave.map { FoldStateEntry(startLine: $0.startLine, isFolded: $0.isFolded) }
532|d6ed84|        
533|284b9a|        if let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(foldState) {
534|d8ca2f|            UserDefaults.standard.set(data, forKey: key)
535|5f3077|        }
536|27e597|    }
537|b4687f|    
538|171d6b|    /// Restores fold state from UserDefaults
539|710040|    private func restoreFoldState(for filePath: String) {
540|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
541|d6ed84|        
542|d7f816|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: key),
543|9cfa7e|              let foldState = try? JSONDecoder().decode([FoldStateEntry].self, from: data) else {
544|bef5d6|            return
545|5f3077|        }
546|d6ed84|        
547|f0448e|        // Apply saved state to current regions
548|9663b0|        for savedState in foldState {
549|65fcdc|            if let index = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == savedState.startLine }) {
550|7dfd32|                foldRegions[index].isFolded = savedState.isFolded
551|a7dc16|            }
552|5f3077|        }
553|27e597|    }
554|b4687f|

560|b4687f|    
561|e874ec|    /// Clears fold state for a specific file
562|00eab3|    func clearFoldState(for filePath: String) {
563|d1c5a5|        let key = UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix + filePath
564|f413e9|        UserDefaults.standard.removeObject(forKey: key)
565|27e597|    }
566|b4687f|    
567|61f95b|    /// Clears all fold states
568|e8e04b|    func clearAllFoldStates() {
569|2f577c|        let defaults = UserDefaults.standard
570|a64386|        let keys = defaults.dictionaryRepresentation().keys.filter { $0.hasPrefix(UserDefaultsKeys.foldStatePrefix) }
571|35aefd|        for key in keys {
572|984243|            defaults.removeObject(forKey: key)
573|5f3077|        }
574|27e597|    }

576|8aaef2|    // MARK: - Fold Operations

578|37bb1e|    /// Toggles the fold state at a specific line

580|24bb8d|        if let regionIndex = foldRegions.firstIndex(where: { $0.startLine == line }) {
581|c49ebc|            foldRegions[regionIndex].isFolded.toggle()
582|bfd980|            updateCollapsedLines()
583|3070d1|            
584|05b9d6|            // Save state after toggling

586|4a82a6|                saveFoldState(for: filePath)
587|a7dc16|            }
588|5f3077|        }
589|27e597|    }
590|b4687f|    
591|96748f|    /// Expands a folded region

602|b4687f|

627|3693ad|    /// Folds the region containing the given cursor line
628|d8038c|    func foldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
629|03814c|        // Find the innermost region containing this line
630|2e3469|        if let region = foldRegions.filter({ 
631|fd455c|            cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine && !$0.isFolded
632|0a42c8|        }).min(by: { ($0.endLine - $0.startLine) < ($1.endLine - $1.startLine) }) {
633|acad0e|            collapseRegion(at: region.startLine)
634|5f3077|        }
635|27e597|    }
636|b4687f|    
637|97b9ff|    /// Unfolds the region containing the given cursor line
638|97b77c|    func unfoldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
639|f02da6|        // Find any folded region that starts at or contains this line
640|add066|        if let region = foldRegions.first(where: { 
641|89c4dd|            $0.isFolded && ($0.startLine == cursorLine || (cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine))
642|294d4c|        }) {
643|2e10a5|            expandRegion(at: region.startLine)
644|5f3077|        }
645|27e597|    }
646|b4687f|    
647|8dc40d|    /// Toggle fold at cursor line - convenience method
648|d4ed4a|    func toggleFoldAtLine(_ cursorLine: Int) {
649|3df676|        // First check if we're on a fold start line
650|1c9044|        if let region = foldRegions.first(where: { $0.startLine == cursorLine }) {
651|d4146c|            toggleFold(at: region.startLine)
652|bef5d6|            return
653|5f3077|        }
654|d6ed84|        
655|f75a08|        // Otherwise find the innermost region containing this line
656|2e3469|        if let region = foldRegions.filter({ 
657|00876f|            cursorLine >= $0.startLine && cursorLine <= $0.endLine
658|0a42c8|        }).min(by: { ($0.endLine - $0.startLine) < ($1.endLine - $1.startLine) }) {
659|d4146c|            toggleFold(at: region.startLine)
660|5f3077|        }
661|27e597|    }

773|f5af03|    /// Toggles the fold state at a specific line for a specific file

776|d6ed84|

783|e474f1|                self.foldRegions = regions
784|9602e4|                updateCollapsedLines()
785|f5a6eb|            } else {

789|3070d1|            
790|05b9d6|            // Save state after toggling

809|b4687f|    
810|f4a6da|    /// Gets folded line ranges for text hiding
811|ef545f|    /// Returns an array of closed ranges representing the line numbers that should be hidden
812|75472c|    func getFoldedLineRanges() -> [ClosedRange<Int>] {
813|c3280d|        var ranges: [ClosedRange<Int>] = []
814|d6ed84|        
815|40e9a9|        // Sort regions by start line to ensure proper ordering
816|cfa917|        let sortedRegions = foldRegions.sorted { $0.startLine < $1.startLine }
817|d6ed84|        
818|ec4ee6|        for region in sortedRegions where region.isFolded {
819|81a008|            ranges.append((region.startLine + 1)...region.endLine)
820|5f3077|        }
821|d6ed84|        
822|56ed1a|        return ranges
823|27e597|    }
824|b4687f|    
825|cefce4|    /// Gets the total count of folded lines

828|27e597|    }
829|b4687f|    
830|d6f051|    /// Gets a summary of fold statistics
831|0f46cc|    func getFoldStatistics() -> FoldStatistics {
832|590e8f|        let totalCount = foldRegions.count
833|b5a3cd|        let foldedCount = foldRegions.filter { $0.isFolded }.count
834|d6ed84|        
835|be54ca|        var typeBreakdown: [FoldRegion.FoldType: Int] = [:]
836|812a24|        for region in foldRegions {
837|6b9f03|            typeBreakdown[region.type, default: 0] += 1
838|5f3077|        }
839|d6ed84|        
840|1fae88|        return FoldStatistics(
841|8971d3|            totalRegions: totalCount,
842|b1ec0c|            foldedRegions: foldedCount,
843|247fa6|            typeBreakdown: typeBreakdown
844|3143a4|        )
845|27e597|    }

847|049941|    // MARK: - Private Methods
848|b4687f|    
849|822cbf|    private func updateCollapsedLines() {

47|76333f|        let uic = UIColor(self)

49|1c8557|            return nil

52|cf2b3a|        let g = Float(components[1])
53|dc86e2|        let b = Float(components[2])
54|419f0b|        var a = Float(1.0)
55|d4091d|        if components.count >= 4 {
56|556ad6|            a = Float(components[3])
57|5f3077|        }
58|d6ed84|        
59|23c222|        if a != 1.0 {
60|090560|            return String(format: "#%02lX%02lX%02lX%02lX", lroundf(r * 255), lroundf(g * 255), lroundf(b * 255), lroundf(a * 255))
61|b31999|        } else {
62|5f1c55|            return String(format: "#%02lX%02lX%02lX", lroundf(r * 255), lroundf(g * 255), lroundf(b * 255))
63|5f3077|        }

158|cb81b4|    private func canonicalFileId(_ file: String) -> String {

160|b513c2|        // don't end up with duplicate breakpoint buckets for the same file.

169|20e2d8|    /// The editor UI typically uses 0-based indices for line iteration. We clamp
170|6014a1|    /// to a minimum of 0 to avoid negative values.
171|b22942|    private func canonicalLine(_ line: Int) -> Int {
172|20f91b|        max(0, line)
173|27e597|    }
174|adc83b|
175|5ce9fa|    func hasBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int) -> Bool {
