179|27e597|    }
180|adc83b|
181|c99ea4|    func toggleBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int) {
182|345f2b|        let fileId = canonicalFileId(file)
183|e74a32|        let line = canonicalLine(line)
184|adc83b|
185|5c5f53|        // IMPORTANT: mutate via a copy so @Published emits reliably for collection changes.
186|8dfb09|        var dict = breakpointsByFile
187|2eb6b8|        var set = dict[fileId] ?? []
188|adc83b|
189|e49052|        if set.contains(line) {
190|646b56|            set.remove(line)
191|b31999|        } else {
192|ec8126|            set.insert(line)
193|5f3077|        }
194|adc83b|
195|be2c1c|        if set.isEmpty {
196|9e6e9b|            dict.removeValue(forKey: fileId)
197|b31999|        } else {
198|63e6d5|            dict[fileId] = set
199|5f3077|        }
200|adc83b|
201|718dd5|        breakpointsByFile = dict
202|27e597|    }
203|adc83b|
204|1f1804|    func setBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int, isEnabled: Bool) {
205|7614bc|        // UI-only model currently treats "enabled" as "present/absent".
206|de12f2|        // (Real debugger integration can extend this to store disabled breakpoints.)
207|771692|        if isEnabled {
208|e95a4e|            if !hasBreakpoint(file: file, line: line) {
209|b3cdcc|                toggleBreakpoint(file: file, line: line)
210|a7dc16|            }
211|b31999|        } else {
212|d0d375|            removeBreakpoint(file: file, line: line)
213|5f3077|        }
214|27e597|    }
215|adc83b|
216|de9666|    func removeBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int) {
217|345f2b|        let fileId = canonicalFileId(file)
218|e74a32|        let line = canonicalLine(line)
219|adc83b|
220|8dfb09|        var dict = breakpointsByFile
221|5f981e|        guard var set = dict[fileId] else { return }
222|adc83b|
223|24ed09|        set.remove(line)
224|be2c1c|        if set.isEmpty {
225|9e6e9b|            dict.removeValue(forKey: fileId)
226|b31999|        } else {
227|63e6d5|            dict[fileId] = set
228|5f3077|        }
229|718dd5|        breakpointsByFile = dict
230|27e597|    }

241|923c00|    func addWatchExpression(_ expression: String, initialValue: String = "—") -> WatchExpression? {
242|074c5b|        let trimmed = expression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
243|e44359|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { return nil }
244|adc83b|
245|8392ab|        // Avoid duplicates by expression text.
246|08eef3|        if watchExpressions.contains(where: { $0.expression == trimmed }) {
247|000cef|            return watchExpressions.first(where: { $0.expression == trimmed })
248|5f3077|        }

250|5dc639|        let watch = WatchExpression(expression: trimmed, value: initialValue)
251|c52964|        var watches = watchExpressions
252|edd007|        watches.append(watch)
253|6dfccd|        watchExpressions = watches
254|8e207e|        return watch
255|27e597|    }

266|8f9568|        guard let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
267|adc83b|

269|4d1038|        watches[idx].expression = trimmed

310|be9780|    func play() {

312|b6ddc2|        if state == .stopped {
313|99b12d|            callStack = [
314|796293|                StackFrame(function: "main()", file: "App.swift", line: 12),
315|4dd7d2|                StackFrame(function: "run()", file: "Runner.swift", line: 48),
316|0ac5cf|                StackFrame(function: "doWork()", file: "Worker.swift", line: 103)
317|324820|            ]
318|1e5c04|            selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
319|adc83b|
320|637a32|            variables = [
321|55b8bc|                Variable(name: "counter", value: "0", type: "Int"),
322|c94f21|                Variable(
323|1eb713|                    name: "user",
324|31c053|                    value: "User(…)",
325|2538a3|                    type: "User",
326|f2148b|                    children: [

329|3b8c65|                    ]
330|6f642e|                )
331|324820|            ]
332|5f3077|        }
333|adc83b|
334|481302|        state = .running
335|adc83b|

337|bcc94c|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.35) { [weak self] in
338|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
339|5db6fa|                guard let self else { return }
340|417546|                if self.state == .running { self.state = .paused }
341|a7dc16|            }

345|8e47e1|    /// Start a real JavaScript debug session
346|2b9817|    func startDebugging(code: String, fileName: String, fileId: String) {
347|4118d6|        // Clear previous state
348|96e590|        consoleEntries.removeAll()
349|f75c5d|        callStack.removeAll()
350|ad2751|        variables.removeAll()
351|d6ed84|        
352|c0f638|        // Add system message
353|49277e|        consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
354|c18490|            message: "Starting debug session for \(fileName)...",
355|27afb6|            kind: .system
356|813e75|        ))
357|d6ed84|        
358|ed1770|        // Set up initial call stack
359|ee221a|        callStack = [
360|db8273|            StackFrame(function: "<module>", file: fileName, line: 1)
361|220505|        ]
362|b51589|        selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
363|481302|        state = .running
364|d6ed84|        
365|fabbcb|        // Run JavaScript with JSRunner
366|0f1953|        Task {
367|78f5a7|            let runner = JSRunner()
368|3070d1|            
369|80530a|            // Capture console output
370|2bcb08|            runner.setConsoleHandler { [weak self] message in
371|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
372|9e6003|                    guard let self = self else { return }
373|1b9d24|                    let kind: ConsoleEntry.Kind
374|571cf3|                    if message.hasPrefix("[ERROR]") {
375|19d4ff|                        kind = .error
376|6ba763|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[WARN]") {
377|bd649a|                        kind = .warning
378|e9bff4|                    } else if message.hasPrefix("[INFO]") {
379|cb1c58|                        kind = .info
380|540066|                    } else {
381|bc6733|                        kind = .output
382|c9717a|                    }
383|56aa6d|                    // Strip prefix for cleaner output
384|63772a|                    let cleanMessage = message
385|ba5a18|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[LOG] ", with: "")
386|dbc777|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[ERROR] ", with: "")
387|be10bc|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[WARN] ", with: "")
388|1f973e|                        .replacingOccurrences(of: "[INFO] ", with: "")
389|ffc155|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(message: cleanMessage, kind: kind))
390|4e2d32|                }
391|a7dc16|            }
392|3070d1|            
393|71cc09|            do {
394|8a3016|                let result = try await runner.execute(code: code, timeout: 30.0)
395|dbac47|                let resultString = result.toString() ?? ""
396|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
397|2160a3|                    if !resultString.isEmpty && resultString != "undefined" {
398|cfc3f8|                        self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
399|23cb42|                            message: "→ \(resultString)",
400|07ef2b|                            kind: .output
401|78dc58|                        ))
402|c9717a|                    }
403|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
404|7997c0|                        message: "Debug session ended.",
405|32eda6|                        kind: .system
406|c89922|                    ))
407|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
408|27adbc|                    self.callStack.removeAll()
409|4e2d32|                }
410|91b9a2|            } catch {
411|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
412|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
413|fd7354|                        message: error.localizedDescription,
414|bddd8e|                        kind: .error
415|c89922|                    ))
416|8a0189|                    self.consoleEntries.append(ConsoleEntry(
417|4ae511|                        message: "Debug session ended with error.",
418|32eda6|                        kind: .system
419|c89922|                    ))
420|f62f49|                    self.state = .stopped
421|4e2d32|                }
422|a7dc16|            }
423|5f3077|        }
424|27e597|    }
425|b4687f|    
426|bed8ef|    func stop() {
427|9f038d|        state = .stopped
428|458bf1|        callStack = []
429|79284e|        variables = []
430|629278|        selectedFrameId = nil
431|27e597|    }
432|adc83b|
433|d1463b|    func stepOver() {
434|ce02c3|        guard state.canStep else { return }
435|f0b58f|        advanceTopFrameLine(by: 1)
436|27e597|    }
437|adc83b|
438|2ca9c8|    func stepInto() {
439|ce02c3|        guard state.canStep else { return }
440|f0b58f|        advanceTopFrameLine(by: 1)
441|23d0ec|        // Pretend we stepped into a function.
442|982289|        if let top = callStack.first {
443|8c256c|            var cs = callStack
444|27877d|            cs.insert(StackFrame(function: "helper()", file: top.file, line: top.line), at: 0)
445|b80726|            callStack = cs
446|1e5c04|            selectedFrameId = callStack.first?.id
447|5f3077|        }
448|27e597|    }
449|adc83b|
450|d1c987|    private func advanceTopFrameLine(by delta: Int) {
451|1735de|        guard !callStack.isEmpty else { return }
452|adc83b|
453|5c5f53|        // IMPORTANT: mutate via a copy so @Published emits reliably for collection changes.
454|e6cfa2|        var cs = callStack
455|dc199c|        cs[0].line += delta
456|917f8a|        callStack = cs
457|adc83b|
458|390c0e|        // Make the demo watch expression change a bit.
459|592404|        if let idx = watchExpressions.firstIndex(where: { $0.expression == "counter" }) {
460|95bd8c|            var watches = watchExpressions
461|2ed9b0|            let n = Int(watches[idx].value) ?? 0
462|5b5bc8|            watches[idx].value = "\(n + delta)"
463|6dcd0c|            watchExpressions = watches
464|5f3077|        }
465|adc83b|
466|c6c3e0|        if let varIdx = variables.firstIndex(where: { $0.name == "counter" }) {
467|c2619d|            var vars = variables
468|1520a4|            let n = Int(vars[varIdx].value) ?? 0
469|5da7be|            vars[varIdx].value = "\(n + delta)"
470|dac60a|            variables = vars
471|5f3077|        }
472|27e597|    }
473|b31277|}

289|e05c05|#!/usr/bin/env python3

291|a39a14|Python Example - Modern Python Features
292|d6a5ac|Demonstrates type hints, dataclasses, async, and more.
293|5aac47|\"\"\"
294|adc83b|
295|e13070|import asyncio
296|57a161|from dataclasses import dataclass, field
297|3e7c83|from typing import Optional, List
298|acc0ed|from enum import Enum
299|adc83b|
300|054df8|class Status(Enum):
301|5c9625|    PENDING = "pending"
302|132770|    ACTIVE = "active"
303|bacb8e|    COMPLETED = "completed"
304|adc83b|
305|4cd340|@dataclass
306|603d0e|class Task:
307|e89e79|    \"\"\"Represents a task with metadata.\"\"\"
308|45c89b|    id: int
309|c662c5|    title: str
310|4b5b96|    status: Status = Status.PENDING
311|d39601|    tags: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
312|c4d782|    description: Optional[str] = None
313|b4687f|    
314|291a22|    def mark_complete(self) -> None:
315|b93a57|        self.status = Status.COMPLETED
316|b90567|        print(f"Task '{self.title}' completed!")
317|adc83b|
318|d9ba4a|class TaskManager:
319|8fa5a7|    def __init__(self):
320|2e7c6d|        self._tasks: dict[int, Task] = {}
321|1ced01|        self._next_id = 1
322|b4687f|    
323|1a3e8a|    def add_task(self, title: str, **kwargs) -> Task:
324|c350a2|        task = Task(id=self._next_id, title=title, **kwargs)
325|8f87cb|        self._tasks[task.id] = task
326|48db70|        self._next_id += 1
327|46b7e5|        return task
328|b4687f|    
329|ffb550|    async def process_tasks(self) -> None:
330|1f6997|        for task in self._tasks.values():
331|960af6|            await asyncio.sleep(0.1)  # Simulate work
332|741a3c|            task.mark_complete()
333|adc83b|
334|8efbd4|# Main execution
335|fe03be|async def main():
336|a47a74|    manager = TaskManager()
337|b84b88|    manager.add_task("Learn Python", tags=["programming", "learning"])
338|081e24|    manager.add_task("Build app", description="Create VSCode for iPad")
339|b4687f|    
340|bef3bc|    await manager.process_tasks()
341|adc83b|
342|cfba8f|if __name__ == "__main__":
343|33c963|    asyncio.run(main())
344|b7ce6e|""",
345|cdea1f|            language: "python"
346|813e75|        ))

380|063e71|  },

444|94fd82|        // CSS example
445|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
446|889224|            fileName: "styles.css",
447|7a029b|            content: """
448|4fbc3e|/* VS Code iPadOS - Stylesheet */
449|8f459f|/* Modern CSS with variables, grid, and animations */
450|adc83b|
451|80477a|:root {
452|08021a|    --primary-color: #007acc;
453|f3d2d1|    --secondary-color: #3c3c3c;
454|b8e284|    --background-dark: #1e1e1e;
455|49fc5d|    --text-light: #d4d4d4;
456|e07b10|    --accent-green: #4ec9b0;
457|ba90a3|    --font-mono: 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace;
458|0ca247|    --shadow-lg: 0 10px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3);
459|b31277|}
460|adc83b|
461|528114|* {
462|0d96ba|    margin: 0;
463|20ce36|    padding: 0;
464|59004d|    box-sizing: border-box;
465|b31277|}
466|adc83b|
467|3e84a3|body {
468|b2d922|    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
469|e33751|    background-color: var(--background-dark);
470|a7026f|    color: var(--text-light);
471|508c34|    line-height: 1.6;
472|b31277|}
473|adc83b|
474|bca70d|.navbar {
475|701f74|    position: sticky;
476|978aba|    top: 0;
477|b44137|    background: rgba(30, 30, 30, 0.95);
478|2859c9|    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
479|420323|    padding: 1rem 2rem;
480|35c4be|    z-index: 1000;
481|b31277|}
482|adc83b|
483|40cda2|.hero-section {
484|9dd02d|    min-height: 100vh;
485|8928a5|    display: grid;
486|d1ff91|    place-items: center;
487|2d6734|    text-align: center;
488|4173b0|    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--background-dark), #2d2d30);
489|b31277|}
490|adc83b|
491|de992a|.btn.primary {
492|1af0b4|    background: var(--primary-color);
493|3b4c82|    color: white;
494|4bafa9|    padding: 12px 24px;
495|84f6c0|    border: none;
496|7265d9|    border-radius: 6px;
497|0235f4|    font-size: 1rem;
498|ad2c58|    cursor: pointer;
499|6f67b9|    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
500|b31277|}
501|adc83b|
502|9ad7b2|.btn.primary:hover {
503|9a2e0f|    transform: translateY(-2px);
504|c6f6d6|    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
505|b31277|}
506|adc83b|
507|2dae44|.feature-grid {
508|8928a5|    display: grid;
509|4a5fbb|    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
510|2a5a6f|    gap: 2rem;
511|54ce2f|    padding: 2rem;
512|b31277|}
513|adc83b|
514|0202ba|@keyframes fadeIn {
515|77cf08|    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
516|4358d6|    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
517|b31277|}
518|adc83b|
519|a0a323|.feature-card {
520|f63ff0|    animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease-out forwards;
521|b31277|}
522|adc83b|
523|09eb02|@media (max-width: 768px) {
524|fc0953|    .nav-links { display: none; }
525|36bb36|    .hero-section { padding: 2rem; }
526|b31277|}
527|b7ce6e|""",
528|37073b|            language: "css"
529|813e75|        ))
530|d6ed84|        
531|70854a|        // Go example
532|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
533|173417|            fileName: "main.go",
534|7a029b|            content: """
535|dd18bb|// Go Example - HTTP Server with Goroutines
536|af96a5|package main
537|adc83b|
538|f7ab87|import (
539|f48f0e|\t"context"
540|567e13|\t"encoding/json"
541|b1db2d|\t"fmt"
542|7293d7|\t"log"
543|dbc36b|\t"net/http"
544|5284c6|\t"sync"
545|5f54ea|\t"time"
546|a35077|)
547|adc83b|
548|39ac9c|// User represents a user in the system
549|00db38|type User struct {
550|c77d6f|\tID        int       `json:"id"`
551|4698d5|\tName      string    `json:"name"`
552|b65b1b|\tEmail     string    `json:"email"`
553|2ed51e|\tCreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"`
554|b31277|}
555|adc83b|
556|e578a6|// UserStore handles user data with thread-safe access
557|c88728|type UserStore struct {
558|c3fdfb|\tmu    sync.RWMutex
559|051305|\tusers map[int]*User
560|d54867|\tnextID int
561|b31277|}
562|adc83b|
563|cc854c|func NewUserStore() *UserStore {
564|ed9ea3|\treturn &UserStore{
565|020c9f|\t\tusers:  make(map[int]*User),
566|5bfe05|\t\tnextID: 1,
567|bceb9c|\t}
568|b31277|}
569|adc83b|
570|e1b92c|func (s *UserStore) Create(name, email string) *User {
571|1db638|\ts.mu.Lock()
572|7d9ed0|\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()
573|80050b|\t
574|d8abf6|\tuser := &User{
575|e00997|\t\tID:        s.nextID,
576|6a68d6|\t\tName:      name,
577|9c5c36|\t\tEmail:     email,
578|97639d|\t\tCreatedAt: time.Now(),
579|bceb9c|\t}
580|72a210|\ts.users[user.ID] = user
581|1e16b2|\ts.nextID++
582|53ef3f|\treturn user
583|b31277|}
584|adc83b|
585|366ce6|func (s *UserStore) Get(id int) (*User, bool) {
586|4ddb51|\ts.mu.RLock()
587|bced95|\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()
588|4eba9b|\tuser, ok := s.users[id]
589|00df77|\treturn user, ok
590|b31277|}
591|adc83b|
592|ff8f91|func handleUsers(store *UserStore) http.HandlerFunc {
593|339c11|\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
594|53b88a|\t\tswitch r.Method {
595|9d2118|\t\tcase http.MethodGet:
596|394019|\t\t\t// Return all users
597|9e9af3|\t\t\tw.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
598|43bf24|\t\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(store.users)
599|59888b|\t\tcase http.MethodPost:
600|0965d8|\t\t\t// Create new user
601|e913f0|\t\t\tvar req struct {
602|2f0bda|\t\t\t\tName  string `json:"name"`
603|0c4cc3|\t\t\t\tEmail string `json:"email"`
604|1f4a90|\t\t\t}
605|2b3653|\t\t\tif err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
606|447a17|\t\t\t\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
607|1b1356|\t\t\t\treturn
608|1f4a90|\t\t\t}
609|b82a43|\t\t\tuser := store.Create(req.Name, req.Email)
610|d73497|\t\t\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
611|17b111|\t\t\tjson.NewEncoder(w).Encode(user)
612|04883b|\t\tdefault:
613|2ea09d|\t\t\thttp.Error(w, "Method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
614|53a2fc|\t\t}
615|bceb9c|\t}
616|b31277|}
617|adc83b|
618|a4072f|func main() {
619|ca7100|\tstore := NewUserStore()
620|80050b|\t
621|1b6d3b|\t// Seed some data
622|6ea9c7|\tstore.Create("Alice", "alice@example.com")
623|2c81f1|\tstore.Create("Bob", "bob@example.com")
624|80050b|\t
625|45645c|\tmux := http.NewServeMux()
626|b3170f|\tmux.HandleFunc("/api/users", handleUsers(store))
627|80050b|\t
628|a3c17c|\tserver := &http.Server{
629|879a10|\t\tAddr:         ":8080",
630|876c57|\t\tHandler:      mux,
631|a8bd2e|\t\tReadTimeout:  10 * time.Second,
632|aa51e5|\t\tWriteTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
633|bceb9c|\t}
634|80050b|\t
635|8d2b91|\tfmt.Println("Server starting on :8080")
636|fd5ced|\tlog.Fatal(server.ListenAndServe())
637|b31277|}
638|b7ce6e|""",
639|9eaac4|            language: "go"
640|813e75|        ))
641|d6ed84|        
642|6fa96a|        // Rust example
643|f0955b|        examples.append(Tab(
644|f13142|            fileName: "main.rs",
645|7a029b|            content: """
646|0e41ca|//! Rust Example - Async Web Server
647|fa16f5|//! Demonstrates ownership, traits, async/await, and error handling
648|adc83b|
649|9acfeb|use std::collections::HashMap;
650|b948b2|use std::sync::Arc;
651|859d9d|use tokio::sync::RwLock;
652|adc83b|
653|5f279c|/// Represents a task in our system
654|fc0948|#[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
655|9fa61b|pub struct Task {
656|eb40d9|    pub id: u64,
657|b30539|    pub title: String,
658|968947|    pub completed: bool,
659|3f7fee|    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
660|eb696e|    pub description: Option<String>,
661|b31277|}
662|adc83b|
663|c65acf|/// Task store with thread-safe access
664|aa97ce|pub struct TaskStore {
665|f700f3|    tasks: RwLock<HashMap<u64, Task>>,
666|4ca795|    next_id: RwLock<u64>,
667|b31277|}
668|adc83b|
669|302a3c|impl TaskStore {
670|8ad9f1|    pub fn new() -> Self {
671|3f21ea|        Self {
672|c4b209|            tasks: RwLock::new(HashMap::new()),
673|a066e2|            next_id: RwLock::new(1),
674|5f3077|        }
675|27e597|    }
676|b4687f|    
677|5b894d|    pub async fn create(&self, title: String, description: Option<String>) -> Task {
678|c96765|        let mut next_id = self.next_id.write().await;
679|582717|        let id = *next_id;
680|35ab64|        *next_id += 1;
681|d6ed84|        
682|8ffd70|        let task = Task {
683|c48bb6|            id,
684|9643f5|            title,
685|49769d|            completed: false,
686|d6d80b|            description,
687|105ee3|        };
688|d6ed84|        
689|c79c9c|        self.tasks.write().await.insert(id, task.clone());
690|9cec82|        task
691|27e597|    }
692|b4687f|    
693|d18a8f|    pub async fn get(&self, id: u64) -> Option<Task> {
694|ee96f9|        self.tasks.read().await.get(&id).cloned()
695|27e597|    }
696|b4687f|    
697|c542c4|    pub async fn list(&self) -> Vec<Task> {
698|26bc2e|        self.tasks.read().await.values().cloned().collect()
699|27e597|    }
700|b4687f|    
701|1e6608|    pub async fn complete(&self, id: u64) -> Result<Task, &'static str> {
702|8b2ab5|        let mut tasks = self.tasks.write().await;
703|1e8e13|        match tasks.get_mut(&id) {
704|7711a1|            Some(task) => {
705|9cb7d9|                task.completed = true;
706|b1925e|                Ok(task.clone())
707|a7dc16|            }
708|ba0906|            None => Err("Task not found"),
709|5f3077|        }
710|27e597|    }
711|b31277|}
712|adc83b|
713|167169|/// Error type for our application
714|351e30|#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
715|f57677|pub enum AppError {
716|552bc0|    #[error("Task not found: {0}")]
717|953fad|    NotFound(u64),
718|50ef8b|    #[error("Invalid input: {0}")]
719|e8e806|    InvalidInput(String),
720|b31277|}
721|adc83b|
722|50ce0f|#[tokio::main]
723|c703d0|async fn main() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
724|0ea21b|    let store = Arc::new(TaskStore::new());
725|b4687f|    
726|d1b2bd|    // Create some tasks
727|2a3a42|    let task1 = store.create("Learn Rust".into(), Some("Study ownership".into())).await;
728|edbb66|    let task2 = store.create("Build app".into(), None).await;
729|b4687f|    
730|aafcec|    println!("Created tasks:");
731|9c5f1e|    for task in store.list().await {
732|2d361b|        println!("  - {} ({})", task.title, if task.completed { "✓" } else { "○" });
733|27e597|    }
734|b4687f|    
735|c1ed84|    // Complete a task
736|2d32bb|    store.complete(task1.id).await?;
737|3db4e3|    println!("\\nCompleted task: {}", task1.title);
738|b4687f|    
739|b54f61|    Ok(())
740|b31277|}
741|adc83b|
742|9a36b8|#[cfg(test)]
743|0a8608|mod tests {
744|2b9eed|    use super::*;
745|b4687f|    
746|fe8662|    #[tokio::test]
747|c05d04|    async fn test_create_task() {
748|c8da74|        let store = TaskStore::new();
749|286898|        let task = store.create("Test".into(), None).await;
750|75629b|        assert_eq!(task.title, "Test");
751|f10fec|        assert!(!task.completed);
752|27e597|    }
753|b31277|}
754|b7ce6e|""",
755|fb2489|            language: "rust"
756|813e75|        ))
757|d6ed84|        
758|3e02a9|        return examples
759|27e597|    }
760|adc83b|
761|4dde5e|    // MARK: - Tab Management
762|adc83b|
763|76ae59|    func addTab(fileName: String = "Untitled.swift", content: String = "", url: URL? = nil) {
764|741280|        // Check if file is already open by URL
765|0ac880|        if let url = url, let existingTab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url == url }) {
766|552ca0|            activeTabId = existingTab.id
767|bef5d6|            return
768|5f3077|        }
769|d6ed84|        
770|95bffd|        // For tabs without URLs (demo/untitled), check by fileName to avoid duplicates
771|c31f65|        if url == nil, let existingTab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url == nil && $0.fileName == fileName }) {
772|552ca0|            activeTabId = existingTab.id
773|bef5d6|            return
774|5f3077|        }
775|adc83b|
776|813121|        let newTab = Tab(fileName: fileName, content: content, url: url)
777|c48936|        tabs.append(newTab)
778|731705|        activeTabId = newTab.id
779|27e597|    }
780|adc83b|
781|32d0a2|    func closeTab(id: UUID) {
782|b4daef|        guard let index = tabs.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == id }) else { return }
783|adc83b|
784|91aee8|        // Release security-scoped access if this tab was holding it.
785|f9902f|        if let url = tabs[index].url {
786|c0ad41|            releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
787|5f3077|        }
788|adc83b|
789|f8d587|        tabs.remove(at: index)
790|adc83b|
791|75e35f|        // Update active tab if we closed the active one
792|7a2997|        if activeTabId == id {
793|420e70|            if tabs.isEmpty {
794|562329|                activeTabId = nil
795|9f1ca7|            } else if index >= tabs.count {
796|fe0d6f|                activeTabId = tabs[tabs.count - 1].id
797|f5a6eb|            } else {
798|fea167|                activeTabId = tabs[index].id
799|a7dc16|            }
800|5f3077|        }
801|27e597|    }
802|adc83b|
803|da8c92|    func closeAllTabs() {
804|480aa6|        // Release security-scoped access held by any open tabs.
805|f898d5|        for tab in tabs {
806|e59f65|            if let url = tab.url {
807|4f4725|                releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
808|a7dc16|            }
809|5f3077|        }
810|adc83b|
811|11c622|        tabs.removeAll()
812|73f75a|        activeTabId = nil
813|27e597|    }
814|adc83b|
815|637501|    func closeOtherTabs(except id: UUID) {
816|7cae19|        // Release security-scoped access for tabs being closed.
817|cd7359|        for tab in tabs where tab.id != id {
818|e59f65|            if let url = tab.url {
819|4f4725|                releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
820|a7dc16|            }
821|5f3077|        }
822|adc83b|
823|9e38c3|        tabs.removeAll { $0.id != id }
824|124072|        activeTabId = id
825|27e597|    }
826|adc83b|
827|01b632|    func selectTab(id: UUID) {
828|124072|        activeTabId = id
829|27e597|    }
830|adc83b|
831|4d82c6|    func nextTab() {
832|0b2bdb|        guard let currentIndex = activeTabIndex, tabs.count > 1 else { return }
833|713593|        let nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % tabs.count
834|40ccb0|        activeTabId = tabs[nextIndex].id
835|27e597|    }
836|adc83b|
837|50e532|    func previousTab() {
838|0b2bdb|        guard let currentIndex = activeTabIndex, tabs.count > 1 else { return }
839|6fd10d|        let prevIndex = currentIndex == 0 ? tabs.count - 1 : currentIndex - 1
840|3edfe7|        activeTabId = tabs[prevIndex].id
841|27e597|    }
842|adc83b|
843|f5367a|    func moveTab(from source: IndexSet, to destination: Int) {
844|d4de4a|        tabs.move(fromOffsets: source, toOffset: destination)
845|27e597|    }
846|adc83b|
847|7e7abf|    // MARK: - Content Management
848|adc83b|
849|eb64ec|    func updateActiveTabContent(_ content: String) {
850|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
851|adc83b|
852|c5cef8|        // Avoid marking a tab dirty when we're just syncing state (e.g., initial onAppear assignment).
853|206567|        guard tabs[index].content != content else { return }
854|adc83b|
855|a364aa|        tabs[index].content = content
856|adc83b|
857|d56c61|        // Mark dirty for both saved and unsaved-new files.
858|6625d3|        tabs[index].isUnsaved = true
859|27e597|    }
860|adc83b|
861|d01c74|    func saveActiveTab() {
862|0a66d5|        guard let index = activeTabIndex,
863|b955cb|              let url = tabs[index].url else { return }
864|adc83b|
865|4da690|        do {
866|8eaea8|            if let fileNavigator {
867|30e940|                try fileNavigator.writeFile(at: url, content: tabs[index].content)
868|f5a6eb|            } else {
869|120ff8|                // Fallback: Ensure we have access when writing, even if this URL wasn't opened via openFile().
870|498601|                let didStart = (securityScopedAccessCounts[url] == nil) ? url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
871|b9e991|                defer { if didStart { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() } }
872|6f7d16|                try tabs[index].content.write(to: url, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
873|a7dc16|            }
874|adc83b|
875|6adfeb|            tabs[index].isUnsaved = false
876|853889|        } catch {
877|8217f6|            print("Error saving file: \(error)")
878|5f3077|        }
879|27e597|    }
880|adc83b|
881|733624|    func saveAllTabs() {
882|be31b4|        for index in tabs.indices {
883|2205f5|            guard let url = tabs[index].url, tabs[index].isUnsaved else { continue }
884|adc83b|
885|71cc09|            do {
886|d06464|                if let fileNavigator {
887|882974|                    try fileNavigator.writeFile(at: url, content: tabs[index].content)
888|fdd0e2|                } else {
889|fa1070|                    // Fallback: Ensure we have access when writing, even if this URL wasn't opened via openFile().
890|a62986|                    let didStart = (securityScopedAccessCounts[url] == nil) ? url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
891|981337|                    defer { if didStart { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() } }
892|5eb718|                    try tabs[index].content.write(to: url, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
893|4e2d32|                }
894|adc83b|
895|c47dbe|                tabs[index].isUnsaved = false
896|91b9a2|            } catch {
897|a5c86a|                print("Error saving file: \(error)")
898|a7dc16|            }
899|5f3077|        }
900|27e597|    }
901|adc83b|
902|7fcf6b|    // MARK: - File Operations
903|adc83b|
904|c94d4f|    /// Retain security scoped access for as long as a tab referencing the URL is open.
905|80f870|    /// - Returns: `true` if access was retained (either already retained or started successfully).
906|144775|    @discardableResult
907|047478|    private func retainSecurityScopedAccess(to url: URL) -> Bool {
908|3361e8|        if let count = securityScopedAccessCounts[url] {
909|74a992|            securityScopedAccessCounts[url] = count + 1
910|40cfc4|            return true
911|5f3077|        }
912|adc83b|
913|6bae9a|        let started = url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
914|eab9dd|        if started {
915|f70ee6|            securityScopedAccessCounts[url] = 1
916|40cfc4|            return true
917|5f3077|        }
918|adc83b|
919|e24e9c|        // Not all URLs are security-scoped; startAccessing may legitimately return false.
920|dc1500|        return false
921|27e597|    }
922|adc83b|
923|bb512f|    private func releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to url: URL) {
924|e6f2d9|        guard let count = securityScopedAccessCounts[url] else { return }
925|d1b9b6|        if count <= 1 {
926|a8ee0e|            securityScopedAccessCounts.removeValue(forKey: url)
927|1a1387|            url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
928|b31999|        } else {
929|385b72|            securityScopedAccessCounts[url] = count - 1
930|5f3077|        }
931|27e597|    }
932|adc83b|
933|cf78ab|    func openFile(from url: URL) {
934|588853|        // If already open, just activate it (and avoid re-reading / re-requesting access).
935|b525f3|        if let existingTab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url == url }) {
936|552ca0|            activeTabId = existingTab.id
937|bef5d6|            return
938|5f3077|        }
939|adc83b|
940|932f65|        // IMPORTANT (BUG-005):
941|473a90|        // Do not early-return if startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() fails.
942|9fa2d8|        // For many URLs (non-security-scoped, or when parent scope is active), this may return false,
943|66c5ff|        // but the file is still readable. We retain access if available.
944|b64f72|        let retained = retainSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
945|adc83b|
946|4da690|        do {
947|71b351|            let content = try String(contentsOf: url, encoding: .utf8)
948|b7a845|            addTab(fileName: url.lastPathComponent, content: content, url: url)
949|adc83b|
950|029423|            // Index the file in Spotlight for search
951|89eebb|            SpotlightManager.shared.indexFile(url: url, content: content, fileName: url.lastPathComponent)
952|853889|        } catch {
953|6234c2|            print("Error opening file: \(error)")
954|b8e2ff|            if retained {
955|3785d1|                // We retained access but failed to open; release our retain.
956|4f4725|                releaseSecurityScopedAccess(to: url)
957|a7dc16|            }
958|5f3077|        }
959|27e597|    }
960|adc83b|
961|ecab4a|    func openFile(_ fileItem: FileItem) {
962|5644a7|        guard let url = fileItem.url else {
963|5428ce|            // Try path
964|cc691d|            if !fileItem.path.isEmpty {
965|0d25db|                let fileURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: fileItem.path)
966|04ee6d|                openFile(from: fileURL)
967|a7dc16|            }
968|bef5d6|            return
969|5f3077|        }
970|aa85ed|        openFile(from: url)
971|27e597|    }
972|adc83b|
973|a458b1|    // MARK: - File System Event Handlers
974|adc83b|
975|9aaca8|    /// Called when a file or folder is moved/renamed in the file system.
976|fa3810|    /// Updates any open tabs that reference the old URL.
977|1aeb4b|    func handleFileSystemItemMoved(from oldURL: URL, to newURL: URL) {
978|be31b4|        for index in tabs.indices {
979|73b1a5|            guard let tabURL = tabs[index].url else { continue }
980|adc83b|
981|d91d40|            // Check if tab URL matches the moved item or is inside it (for folders)
982|6c0d3c|            let oldPath = oldURL.standardizedFileURL.path
983|354993|            let tabPath = tabURL.standardizedFileURL.path
984|adc83b|
985|ca2206|            if tabPath == oldPath {
986|5a4762|                // Direct match - update URL
987|93dccc|                tabs[index].url = newURL
988|f8a1b8|                tabs[index].fileName = newURL.lastPathComponent
989|d38dd0|            } else if tabPath.hasPrefix(oldPath + "/") {
990|cbbd97|                // Tab is inside a moved folder - update the path prefix
991|14ba8e|                let relativePath = String(tabPath.dropFirst(oldPath.count))
992|a19b0f|                let newTabURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: newURL.path + relativePath)
993|cf0bad|                tabs[index].url = newTabURL
994|a7dc16|            }
995|5f3077|        }
996|27e597|    }
997|adc83b|
998|8e6575|    /// Called when a file or folder is deleted from the file system.
999|cc8758|    /// Closes any open tabs that reference the deleted item.
1000|c5a4eb|    func handleFileSystemItemDeleted(at url: URL) {
1001|2e29c5|        let deletedPath = url.standardizedFileURL.path
1002|adc83b|
1003|1f90b1|        // Find all tabs that should be closed
1004|e5b209|        let tabsToClose = tabs.filter { tab in
1005|2a4205|            guard let tabURL = tab.url else { return false }
1006|354993|            let tabPath = tabURL.standardizedFileURL.path
1007|5f7d97|            // Close if exact match or if tab is inside deleted folder
1008|5ea75a|            return tabPath == deletedPath || tabPath.hasPrefix(deletedPath + "/")
1009|5f3077|        }
1010|adc83b|
1011|a7d718|        // Close the tabs (release security access)
1012|97cba5|        for tab in tabsToClose {
1013|cf059e|            closeTab(id: tab.id)
1014|5f3077|        }
1015|27e597|    }

1111|274aab|    /// Add cursor at a specific position (Option+Click)
1112|6a8c80|    func addCursorAtPosition(_ position: Int) {
1113|1d6502|        multiCursorState.addCursor(at: position)
1114|27e597|    }
1115|adc83b|
1116|44d2df|    /// Add cursor on the line above (Cmd+Option+Up)
1117|2c94f4|    func addCursorAbove() {
1118|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
1119|760df9|        let content = tabs[index].content
1120|d6ed84|        
1121|c36153|        guard let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor else { return }
1122|d6ed84|        
1123|97e112|        // Find current line and column
1124|cae86c|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: "\n")
1125|4c16f5|        var currentLine = 0
1126|788b38|        var charCount = 0
1127|efbb41|        var columnInLine = 0
1128|d6ed84|        
1129|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
1130|28f01c|            let lineLength = line.count + 1 // +1 for newline
1131|855639|            if charCount + lineLength > primary.position {
1132|1f2410|                currentLine = lineIndex
1133|e165bc|                columnInLine = primary.position - charCount
1134|74cfd8|                break
1135|a7dc16|            }
1136|8f266f|            charCount += lineLength
1137|5f3077|        }
1138|d6ed84|        
1139|4ff883|        // Can't add cursor above line 0
1140|b7a259|        guard currentLine > 0 else { return }
1141|d6ed84|        
1142|ce6291|        // Calculate position on line above
1143|899b8a|        let targetLine = currentLine - 1
1144|e8b652|        var targetPosition = 0
1145|4dc12b|        for i in 0..<targetLine {
1146|8e5904|            targetPosition += lines[i].count + 1
1147|5f3077|        }
1148|90bb82|        targetPosition += min(columnInLine, lines[targetLine].count)
1149|d6ed84|        
1150|22be0f|        multiCursorState.addCursor(at: targetPosition)
1151|27e597|    }
1152|adc83b|
1153|fec522|    /// Add cursor on the line below (Cmd+Option+Down)
1154|c1a645|    func addCursorBelow() {
1155|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
1156|760df9|        let content = tabs[index].content
1157|d6ed84|        
1158|c36153|        guard let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor else { return }
1159|d6ed84|        
1160|97e112|        // Find current line and column
1161|cae86c|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: "\n")
1162|4c16f5|        var currentLine = 0
1163|788b38|        var charCount = 0
1164|efbb41|        var columnInLine = 0
1165|d6ed84|        
1166|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
1167|28f01c|            let lineLength = line.count + 1 // +1 for newline
1168|855639|            if charCount + lineLength > primary.position {
1169|1f2410|                currentLine = lineIndex
1170|e165bc|                columnInLine = primary.position - charCount
1171|74cfd8|                break
1172|a7dc16|            }
1173|8f266f|            charCount += lineLength
1174|5f3077|        }
1175|d6ed84|        
1176|f6134c|        // Can't add cursor below last line
1177|df788d|        guard currentLine < lines.count - 1 else { return }
1178|d6ed84|        
1179|f2ffac|        // Calculate position on line below
1180|a09bd7|        let targetLine = currentLine + 1
1181|e8b652|        var targetPosition = 0
1182|4dc12b|        for i in 0..<targetLine {
1183|8e5904|            targetPosition += lines[i].count + 1
1184|5f3077|        }
1185|90bb82|        targetPosition += min(columnInLine, lines[targetLine].count)
1186|d6ed84|        
1187|22be0f|        multiCursorState.addCursor(at: targetPosition)
1188|27e597|    }
1189|adc83b|
1190|77aabc|    /// Add next occurrence of current selection (Cmd+D)
1191|e6ce2e|    func addNextOccurrence() {
1192|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
1193|760df9|        let content = tabs[index].content
1194|adc83b|
1195|5425d2|        // Get the word/selection to search for
1196|14ac96|        let searchText: String
1197|b70289|        let startPosition: Int
1198|adc83b|
1199|cfba87|        if let range = currentSelectionRange, range.length > 0,
1200|0939c5|           let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1201|451be1|            searchText = String(content[swiftRange])
1202|0b5fe8|            startPosition = range.location + range.length
1203|f70aa5|        } else if let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor {
1204|aed341|            // No selection - select the word under cursor
1205|1688ec|            let wordRange = findWordAtPosition(primary.position, in: content)
1206|8dbaff|            if let range = wordRange, range.length > 0,
1207|6998ee|               let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1208|f4b9bc|                searchText = String(content[swiftRange])
1209|d7f1fc|                startPosition = range.location + range.length
1210|adc83b|
1211|8bf0a9|                // First Cmd+D selects the word under cursor
1212|0cebd2|                multiCursorState.cursors = [Cursor(position: range.location + range.length, anchor: range.location, isPrimary: true)]
1213|70c25c|                currentSelectionRange = range
1214|311604|                currentSelection = searchText
1215|53ab34|                return
1216|f5a6eb|            } else {
1217|53ab34|                return
1218|a7dc16|            }
1219|b31999|        } else {
1220|bef5d6|            return
1221|5f3077|        }
1222|adc83b|
1223|2e0155|        // Find next occurrence
1224|c59f65|        if let nextRange = content.findNextOccurrence(of: searchText, after: startPosition) {
1225|372de1|            // Check if this occurrence is already selected
1226|222428|            let alreadySelected = multiCursorState.cursors.contains { cursor in
1227|d4114c|                if let selRange = cursor.selectionRange {
1228|173534|                    return selRange.location == nextRange.location
1229|4e2d32|                }
1230|473d08|                return false
1231|a7dc16|            }
1232|adc83b|
1233|068570|            if !alreadySelected {
1234|11d39c|                multiCursorState.addCursorWithSelection(
1235|b8d907|                    position: nextRange.location + nextRange.length,
1236|4db973|                    anchor: nextRange.location
1237|6f642e|                )
1238|a7dc16|            }
1239|5f3077|        }
1240|27e597|    }
1241|adc83b|
1242|455218|    /// Select all occurrences of current selection (Cmd+Shift+L)
1243|db732c|    func selectAllOccurrences() {
1244|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
1245|760df9|        let content = tabs[index].content
1246|adc83b|
1247|5425d2|        // Get the word/selection to search for
1248|14ac96|        let searchText: String
1249|adc83b|
1250|cfba87|        if let range = currentSelectionRange, range.length > 0,
1251|0939c5|           let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1252|451be1|            searchText = String(content[swiftRange])
1253|f70aa5|        } else if let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor {
1254|da9f76|            // No selection - use word under cursor
1255|1688ec|            let wordRange = findWordAtPosition(primary.position, in: content)
1256|8dbaff|            if let range = wordRange, range.length > 0,
1257|6998ee|               let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1258|f4b9bc|                searchText = String(content[swiftRange])
1259|f5a6eb|            } else {
1260|53ab34|                return
1261|a7dc16|            }
1262|b31999|        } else {
1263|bef5d6|            return
1264|5f3077|        }
1265|adc83b|
1266|5b5fb8|        // Find all occurrences
1267|d3dc0b|        let allRanges = content.findAllOccurrences(of: searchText)
1268|adc83b|
1269|64295a|        guard !allRanges.isEmpty else { return }
1270|adc83b|
1271|91a2a1|        // Create cursors for all occurrences
1272|897764|        multiCursorState.cursors = allRanges.enumerated().map { index, range in
1273|ea4ddb|            Cursor(
1274|4a52a3|                position: range.location + range.length,
1275|a68855|                anchor: range.location,
1276|501395|                isPrimary: index == 0
1277|43d041|            )
1278|5f3077|        }
1279|adc83b|
1280|f352f6|        currentSelection = searchText
1281|27e597|    }
1282|adc83b|
1283|169518|    /// Reset to single cursor
1284|6ea64a|    func resetToSingleCursor(at position: Int) {
1285|a156ab|        multiCursorState.reset(to: position)
1286|633a0d|        currentSelectionRange = nil
1287|3ed4e9|        currentSelection = ""
1288|27e597|    }
1289|adc83b|
1290|f7916f|    /// Update selection from text view
1291|fc455c|    func updateSelection(range: NSRange?, text: String) {
1292|69c3ac|        currentSelectionRange = range
1293|a147d3|        if let range = range, range.length > 0,
1294|4c0c23|           let index = activeTabIndex {
1295|527d1a|            let content = tabs[index].content
1296|69d76b|            if let swiftRange = Range(range, in: content) {
1297|6e1e02|                currentSelection = String(content[swiftRange])
1298|a7dc16|            }
1299|b31999|        } else {
1300|1e5b1e|            currentSelection = ""
1301|5f3077|        }
1302|27e597|    }
1303|adc83b|
1304|8984f8|    /// Find word boundaries at a given position
1305|10f43e|    func findWordAtPosition(_ position: Int, in text: String) -> NSRange? {
1306|37ae73|        guard position >= 0 && position <= text.count else { return nil }
1307|adc83b|
1308|599630|        let nsText = text as NSString
1309|026ed8|        let wordCharacters = CharacterSet.alphanumerics.union(CharacterSet(charactersIn: "_"))
1310|adc83b|
1311|b5bfb0|        // Find start of word
1312|def66a|        var start = position
1313|aaa57c|        while start > 0 {
1314|148e5a|            let char = nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: start - 1, length: 1))
1315|70b198|            if char.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy({ wordCharacters.contains($0) }) {
1316|0c6efe|                start -= 1
1317|f5a6eb|            } else {
1318|74cfd8|                break
1319|a7dc16|            }
1320|5f3077|        }
1321|adc83b|
1322|3d8df8|        // Find end of word
1323|f5c145|        var end = position
1324|b8851f|        while end < nsText.length {
1325|244ed1|            let char = nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: end, length: 1))
1326|70b198|            if char.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy({ wordCharacters.contains($0) }) {
1327|fddf9a|                end += 1
1328|f5a6eb|            } else {
1329|74cfd8|                break
1330|a7dc16|            }
1331|5f3077|        }
1332|adc83b|
1333|77048a|        if start == end {
1334|1c8557|            return nil
1335|5f3077|        }
1336|adc83b|
1337|469001|        return NSRange(location: start, length: end - start)
1338|27e597|    }
1339|adc83b|
1340|b207fc|    /// Escape multi-cursor mode
1341|2874f6|    func escapeMultiCursor() {
1342|09e325|        if multiCursorState.isMultiCursor {
1343|30a482|            if let primary = multiCursorState.primaryCursor {
1344|a206bf|                resetToSingleCursor(at: primary.position)
1345|a7dc16|            }
1346|5f3077|        }
1347|27e597|    }
1348|adc83b|
1349|0de0c3|    // MARK: - Code Folding
1350|adc83b|
1351|2cd425|    /// Collapse all foldable regions in the active editor
1352|17ae91|    func collapseAllFolds() {
1353|f3cca9|        guard let index = activeTabIndex else { return }
1354|309336|        // Post notification that will be picked up by the editor view
1355|63edcc|        NotificationCenter.default.post(

90|5f3077|        }
91|d6ed84|        
92|ceb47d|        let file = String(output[fileRange])
93|054d61|        let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
94|857777|        let column = Int(output[colRange]) ?? 0
95|edf968|        let severityString = String(output[severityRange])
96|0af55b|        let message = String(output[messageRange])

100|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(

103|b3d857|            column: column,
104|b934ce|            message: message,

106|813e75|        ))
107|27e597|    }

112|3fd25f|/// Parse Python errors from traceback output
113|fc7910|func parsePythonError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
114|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
115|b4687f|    
116|f13885|    // Python traceback pattern: File "path", line N
117|78bf0d|    let filePattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
118|145f7b|        pattern: #"File \"([^\"]+)\", line (\d+)(?:, in (.+))?"#,
119|d114fc|        options: []
120|829c44|    )
121|b4687f|    
122|6abe93|    // Python exception pattern at the end of traceback
123|351cbb|    let exceptionPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
124|d57a96|        pattern: #"^(\w+Error):\s*(.+)$"#,
125|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
126|829c44|    )
127|b4687f|    
128|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
129|5e9409|    let matches = filePattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
130|b4687f|    
131|676c19|    // Get exception message from the end
132|93aee8|    var exceptionMessage = "Unknown Python error"
133|a2f2e9|    if let exceptionMatch = exceptionPattern.firstMatch(in: output, range: nsRange) {
134|754902|        if let messageRange = Range(exceptionMatch.range(at: 2), in: output) {
135|cbab8a|            exceptionMessage = String(output[messageRange])
136|5f3077|        }
137|27e597|    }
138|b4687f|    
139|6e2d2f|    for match in matches {
140|f65006|        guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
141|a240d7|              let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output) else {
142|0e4f53|            continue
143|5f3077|        }
144|d6ed84|        
145|ceb47d|        let file = String(output[fileRange])
146|054d61|        let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
147|d6ed84|        
148|cbd9dd|        // Try to get function name
149|395c81|        var message = exceptionMessage
150|f0084d|        if match.numberOfRanges > 3,
151|8cd76a|           let funcRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output) {
152|af6c49|            let function = String(output[funcRange])
153|b31f6e|            message = "\(exceptionMessage) (in '\(function)')"
154|5f3077|        }
155|d6ed84|        
156|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(
157|5bb816|            file: file,
158|13903b|            line: line,
159|310bbd|            column: 0,
160|b934ce|            message: message,
161|1c1924|            severity: .error
162|813e75|        ))
163|27e597|    }
164|b4687f|    
165|b5c4b2|    return errors

265|cf9479|/// Parse Rust compiler errors from output
266|fb69d5|func parseRustError(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
267|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []
268|b4687f|    
269|7037f1|    // Rust error pattern: error[EXXXX]: message
270|b6cd14|    // followed by --> path:line:column
271|436e2c|    let errorHeaderPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
272|ca8561|        pattern: #"^(error|warning)\[(E\d+)\]:\s*(.+)$"#,
273|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
274|829c44|    )
275|b4687f|    
276|93d87e|    // Rust location pattern: --> path:line:column
277|ac1eda|    let locationPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
278|2f743f|        pattern: #"^\s*-->\s+([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+)"#,
279|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
280|829c44|    )
281|b4687f|    
282|0d8ef7|    // Alternative pattern without error code: error: message
283|f738e0|    let simpleErrorPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
284|d07935|        pattern: #"^(error|warning):\s*(.+)$"#,
285|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
286|829c44|    )
287|b4687f|    
288|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
289|fc288a|    let lines = output.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
290|b4687f|    
291|a310ae|    var currentMessage: String?
292|dcacfa|    var currentSeverity: ParsedError.ErrorSeverity = .error
293|b4687f|    
294|352c31|    for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
295|e1b372|        let lineRange = NSRange(line.startIndex..., in: line)
296|d6ed84|        
297|ded761|        // Check for error header with code
298|345436|        if let match = errorHeaderPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
299|aed211|            if let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
300|2eae41|               let codeRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line),
301|fc5d23|               let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line) {
302|cc8cde|                let severityString = String(line[severityRange])
303|917c9b|                let code = String(line[codeRange])
304|bd16ab|                let message = String(line[messageRange])
305|b940e3|                currentMessage = "[\(code)] \(message)"
306|bf0e26|                currentSeverity = ParsedError.ErrorSeverity(rawValue: severityString) ?? .error
307|a7dc16|            }
308|5f3077|        }
309|40dc51|        // Check for simple error without code
310|40a9d1|        else if let match = simpleErrorPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
311|aed211|            if let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
312|50b8db|               let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line) {
313|cc8cde|                let severityString = String(line[severityRange])
314|bd16ab|                let message = String(line[messageRange])
315|0e4b8b|                currentMessage = message
316|bf0e26|                currentSeverity = ParsedError.ErrorSeverity(rawValue: severityString) ?? .error
317|a7dc16|            }
318|5f3077|        }
319|dde2ec|        // Check for location line
320|04b7bf|        else if let match = locationPattern.firstMatch(in: line, range: lineRange) {
321|510d16|            if let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line),
322|66f856|               let lineNumRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line),
323|a7176f|               let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line) {
324|8231df|                let file = String(line[fileRange])
325|d4a390|                let lineNum = Int(line[lineNumRange]) ?? 1
326|6d4e94|                let column = Int(line[colRange]) ?? 0
327|e4cfce|                let message = currentMessage ?? "Rust \(currentSeverity.displayName)"
328|216278|                
329|fd281c|                errors.append(ParsedError(
330|7b52a4|                    file: file,
331|88de6d|                    line: lineNum,
332|0adac9|                    column: column,
333|88bd6a|                    message: message,
334|ff4c75|                    severity: currentSeverity
335|2188d8|                ))
336|216278|                
337|a40ddf|                // Reset for next error
338|152685|                currentMessage = nil
339|a7dc16|            }
340|5f3077|        }
341|27e597|    }
342|b4687f|    
343|b5c4b2|    return errors
344|b31277|}

346|d03b27|/// Generic regex fallback parser for unknown formats
347|9a0fc5|func parseGeneric(output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
348|021783|    var errors: [ParsedError] = []

350|5318fc|    // Generic file:line:column pattern as fallback

353|d114fc|        options: []
354|829c44|    )
355|b4687f|    
356|48813d|    let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
357|91f230|    let matches = pattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
358|b4687f|    
359|6e2d2f|    for match in matches {
360|f65006|        guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),

362|0e4f53|            continue
363|5f3077|        }
364|d6ed84|

368|0e4f53|            continue

370|d6ed84|        
371|054d61|        let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
372|ce30c0|        var column = 0

374|f0084d|        if match.numberOfRanges > 3,

377|2b064b|            column = Int(colString) ?? 0

379|d6ed84|        
380|a8808f|        errors.append(ParsedError(

388|b4687f|    
389|b5c4b2|    return errors

394|30a3a8|/// Represents the location of an error in source code
395|f83b08|struct ErrorLocation: Identifiable, Equatable, Hashable {
396|c90f8e|    let id = UUID()
397|2553d0|    let file: String
398|390384|    let line: Int

400|edcb08|    let message: String

403|b4687f|    
404|7fa33d|    enum ErrorType: String, CaseIterable {
405|30a1fa|        case python
406|d25fa3|        case nodeJS
407|2eb380|        case swift
408|e98076|        case go
409|287255|        case ruby
410|4419ed|        case gcc
411|b8e490|        case rust
412|456663|        case unknown
413|d6ed84|        
414|ea6d43|        var displayName: String {
415|20c960|            switch self {
416|c303fc|            case .python: return "Python"
417|cc84dd|            case .nodeJS: return "Node.js"
418|c0642e|            case .swift: return "Swift"
419|eaf685|            case .go: return "Go"
420|fe6fc8|            case .ruby: return "Ruby"
421|0d270e|            case .gcc: return "GCC/Clang"
422|171964|            case .rust: return "Rust"
423|e5821b|            case .unknown: return "Unknown"
424|a7dc16|            }
425|5f3077|        }
426|27e597|    }
427|b4687f|    
428|ad4226|    /// Creates a sanitized file path
429|b841da|    var sanitizedFile: String {
430|2894bc|        return file.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
431|27e597|    }
432|b4687f|    
433|538079|    /// Returns a display-friendly location string
434|25720f|    var locationString: String {
435|7976fb|        if column > 0 {
436|d80915|            return "\(sanitizedFile):\(line):\(column)"
437|5f3077|        }
438|d4b357|        return "\(sanitizedFile):\(line)"
439|27e597|    }
440|b4687f|    
441|694767|    /// Converts to new ParsedError format
442|a1a2d0|    func toParsedError() -> ParsedError {
443|f72422|        let severity: ParsedError.ErrorSeverity
444|cea86c|        if message.contains("[ERROR]") {
445|2c99ce|            severity = .error
446|39bb83|        } else if message.contains("[WARNING]") {
447|3064d0|            severity = .warning
448|308424|        } else if message.contains("[NOTE]") {
449|81926d|            severity = .note
450|b31999|        } else {
451|a6c96a|            severity = .unknown
452|5f3077|        }
453|d6ed84|        
454|7a00bf|        // Clean up message by removing severity prefix
455|d17ac6|        var cleanMessage = message
456|22730d|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "[ERROR] ", with: "")
457|5fcb5e|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "[WARNING] ", with: "")
458|64c3f2|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "[NOTE] ", with: "")
459|d6ed84|        
460|7fdb78|        return ParsedError(
461|5bb816|            file: file,
462|13903b|            line: line,
463|b3d857|            column: column,
464|5dd76c|            message: cleanMessage,
465|cb0000|            severity: severity
466|3143a4|        )
467|27e597|    }
468|b31277|}
469|adc83b|
470|88786c|// MARK: - Protocol for error navigation delegates
471|adc83b|
472|794c51|protocol ErrorNavigationDelegate: AnyObject {
473|1ecc22|    func navigateToFile(_ file: String, line: Int, column: Int)
474|d8a587|    func highlightError(in outputView: UIView, location: ErrorLocation)
475|b31277|}
476|adc83b|
477|bec4ae|// MARK: - Main ErrorParser Class
478|adc83b|
479|787102|/// Parser for extracting error locations from various language outputs
480|ada787|class ErrorParser {
481|b4687f|    
482|110f8f|    // MARK: - Regex Patterns
483|b4687f|    
484|55eb77|    /// Python traceback pattern: File "path", line N
485|c1ced3|    private let pythonPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
486|145f7b|        pattern: #"File \"([^\"]+)\", line (\d+)(?:, in (.+))?"#,
487|d114fc|        options: []
488|829c44|    )
489|b4687f|    
490|2f688a|    /// Python exception pattern at the end of traceback
491|ee8936|    private let pythonExceptionPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
492|d57a96|        pattern: #"^(\w+Error):\s*(.+)$"#,
493|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
494|829c44|    )
495|b4687f|    
496|8ce785|    /// Node.js/V8 stack trace pattern: at function (path:line:column)
497|9c7450|    private let nodeJSPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
498|2f19ba|        pattern: #"at\s+(?:.+?\s+)?\(?([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+)\)?"#,
499|d114fc|        options: []
500|829c44|    )
501|b4687f|    
502|918c60|    /// Node.js error message pattern
503|46f687|    private let nodeJSErrorPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
504|d57a96|        pattern: #"^(\w+Error):\s*(.+)$"#,
505|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
506|829c44|    )
507|b4687f|    
508|3a7c11|    /// Swift compiler error pattern: path:line:column: error: message
509|015be5|    private let swiftPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
510|66fc67|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+):\s*(error|warning|note):\s*(.+)$"#,
511|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
512|829c44|    )
513|b4687f|    
514|c0f8d7|    /// Go build error pattern: path:line:column: message OR path:line: message
515|c280f8|    private let goPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
516|88ebcb|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+)(?::(\d+))?:\s*(.+)$"#,
517|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
518|829c44|    )
519|b4687f|    
520|9e8fd1|    /// Ruby error pattern: path:line:in `method': message (ErrorClass)
521|15a462|    private let rubyPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
522|7b0cc1|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+):in\s+`([^']+)':\s*(.+)$"#,
523|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
524|829c44|    )
525|b4687f|    
526|3f256e|    /// Ruby traceback pattern: from path:line:in `method'
527|93f074|    private let rubyTracePattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
528|36c3ba|        pattern: #"from\s+([^:]+):(\d+):in\s+`([^']+)'"#,
529|d114fc|        options: []
530|829c44|    )
531|b4687f|    
532|7f0bcb|    /// GCC/Clang error pattern: path:line:column: error: message
533|190101|    private let gccPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
534|66fc67|        pattern: #"^([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+):\s*(error|warning|note):\s*(.+)$"#,
535|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
536|829c44|    )
537|b4687f|    
538|22f606|    /// Rust error header pattern: error[E####]: message
539|e8baf2|    private let rustErrorPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
540|ca8561|        pattern: #"^(error|warning)\[(E\d+)\]:\s*(.+)$"#,
541|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
542|829c44|    )
543|b4687f|    
544|3ed228|    /// Rust location pattern: --> path:line:column
545|22d678|    private let rustLocationPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
546|2f743f|        pattern: #"^\s*-->\s+([^:]+):(\d+):(\d+)"#,
547|96974d|        options: [.anchorsMatchLines]
548|829c44|    )
549|b4687f|    
550|104fb3|    /// Generic file:line pattern as fallback
551|8c2b97|    private let genericPattern = try! NSRegularExpression(
552|b84b2f|        pattern: #"([^\s:]+):(\d+)(?::(\d+))?"#,
553|d114fc|        options: []
554|829c44|    )
555|b4687f|    
556|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
557|b4687f|    
558|f076c7|    weak var navigationDelegate: ErrorNavigationDelegate?
559|292b4b|    private var errorHighlighter: ErrorHighlighter?
560|b4687f|    
561|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
562|b4687f|    
563|f4a5f7|    init(delegate: ErrorNavigationDelegate? = nil) {
564|3acbd5|        self.navigationDelegate = delegate
565|b1287f|        self.errorHighlighter = ErrorHighlighter()
566|27e597|    }
567|b4687f|    
568|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
569|b4687f|    
570|82ad5e|    /// Parse error output and extract all error locations using new ParsedError format
571|bce787|    func parseErrorsToParsedErrors(from output: String, language: ErrorLocation.ErrorType? = nil) -> [ParsedError] {
572|ed19ec|        if let lang = language {
573|b9eed3|            switch lang {
574|a15bc4|            case .python:
575|56129f|                return parsePythonError(output: output)
576|433a23|            case .nodeJS:
577|ed68bd|                return parseNodeError(output: output)
578|fb4d4c|            case .swift:
579|f13af8|                return parseSwiftError(output: output)
580|267968|            case .go:
581|f4b2f7|                return parseGoErrorsToParsedErrors(output)
582|ca5b3f|            case .ruby:
583|222f01|                return parseRubyErrorsToParsedErrors(output)
584|016192|            case .gcc:
585|d3cf73|                return parseGccError(output: output)
586|0db80b|            case .rust:
587|70f0e2|                return parseRustError(output: output)
588|de2fec|            case .unknown:
589|17fb9c|                return parseGeneric(output: output)
590|a7dc16|            }
591|b31999|        } else {
592|6bd52e|            // Try all parsers and combine results
593|a709a5|            var allErrors: [ParsedError] = []
594|4120a3|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseSwiftError(output: output))
595|bfe2d2|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parsePythonError(output: output))
596|6d2820|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseNodeError(output: output))
597|00f5ab|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseGccError(output: output))
598|61f1b4|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseRustError(output: output))
599|bddefc|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseGoErrorsToParsedErrors(output))
600|06bd43|            allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseRubyErrorsToParsedErrors(output))
601|3070d1|            
602|591600|            // If no specific errors found, try generic parsing
603|9ae25d|            if allErrors.isEmpty {
604|788970|                allErrors.append(contentsOf: parseGeneric(output: output))
605|a7dc16|            }
606|3070d1|            
607|ec0371|            // Remove duplicates while preserving order
608|e3fdfb|            var seen = Set<String>()
609|835b3f|            return allErrors.filter { error in
610|0e2c5d|                let key = "\(error.file):\(error.line):\(error.column)"
611|a704c8|                if seen.contains(key) {
612|df59cf|                    return false
613|4e2d32|                }
614|6a87ac|                seen.insert(key)
615|50bdea|                return true
616|a7dc16|            }
617|5f3077|        }
618|27e597|    }
619|b4687f|    
620|329539|    /// Parse error output and extract all error locations (legacy format)
621|afd3f0|    func parseErrors(from output: String, language: ErrorLocation.ErrorType? = nil) -> [ErrorLocation] {
622|d3099f|        let parsedErrors = parseErrorsToParsedErrors(from: output, language: language)
623|57e677|        return parsedErrors.map { error in
624|b4b203|            let type = language ?? detectLanguage(from: output)
625|d2e123|            return error.toErrorLocation(errorType: type, fullOutput: output)
626|5f3077|        }
627|27e597|    }
628|b4687f|    
629|14e133|    /// Navigate to a specific error location
630|c2eb9d|    func navigateToError(_ error: ErrorLocation) {
631|bf1ec3|        navigationDelegate?.navigateToFile(
632|5824b6|            error.sanitizedFile,
633|3f1c73|            line: error.line,
634|11b099|            column: error.column
635|3143a4|        )
636|27e597|    }
637|b4687f|    
638|6c7295|    /// Navigate to a specific parsed error
639|daf5f4|    func navigateToParsedError(_ error: ParsedError) {
640|bf1ec3|        navigationDelegate?.navigateToFile(
641|5824b6|            error.sanitizedFile,
642|3f1c73|            line: error.line,
643|11b099|            column: error.column
644|3143a4|        )
645|27e597|    }
646|b4687f|    
647|50a9d6|    /// Highlight all errors in an output view
648|7e746e|    func highlightErrors(in outputView: UIView, errors: [ErrorLocation]) {
649|c885b2|        errorHighlighter?.highlightErrors(in: outputView, errors: errors)
650|27e597|    }
651|b4687f|    
652|965297|    /// Highlight all parsed errors in an output view
653|13b699|    func highlightParsedErrors(in outputView: UIView, errors: [ParsedError]) {
654|655f4d|        let locations = errors.map { $0.toErrorLocation(fullOutput: "") }
655|db8816|        errorHighlighter?.highlightErrors(in: outputView, errors: locations)
656|27e597|    }
657|b4687f|    
658|4563a2|    /// Clear all error highlights from a view
659|353e74|    func clearHighlights(from view: UIView) {
660|2b80b7|        errorHighlighter?.clearHighlights(from: view)
661|27e597|    }
662|b4687f|    
663|8f5206|    // MARK: - Private Helper Methods
664|b4687f|    
665|ddccdf|    private func detectLanguage(from output: String) -> ErrorLocation.ErrorType {
666|09730a|        // Auto-detect language based on patterns in output
667|75ad8c|        if output.contains("File \"") && output.contains("Traceback") {
668|48afab|            return .python
669|eee598|        } else if output.contains("at ") && output.contains(".js:") {
670|8ced1e|            return .nodeJS
671|91e39d|        } else if output.contains(".swift:") && output.contains("error:") {
672|ce5dbf|            return .swift
673|c15af2|        } else if output.contains("error[E") && output.contains("-->") {
674|60ea5d|            return .rust
675|f73a6d|        } else if output.contains(".go:") {
676|25b895|            return .go
677|bcff79|        } else if output.contains(".rb:") && output.contains("in `") {
678|dc8932|            return .ruby
679|34d868|        } else if output.contains(".c:") || output.contains(".cpp:") || output.contains(".h:") {
680|a3e89c|            return .gcc
681|5f3077|        }
682|471f60|        return .unknown
683|27e597|    }
684|b4687f|    
685|21f42a|    // MARK: - Legacy Parsing Methods (maintained for compatibility)
686|b4687f|    
687|76d80a|    private func parseGoErrorsToParsedErrors(_ output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
688|57d34d|        var errors: [ParsedError] = []
689|587dfb|        let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
690|ebfe3d|        let matches = goPattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
691|d6ed84|        
692|847e6d|        for match in matches {
693|9e2436|            guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
694|aa24a2|                  let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output) else {
695|1df510|                continue
696|a7dc16|            }
697|3070d1|            
698|40d9f4|            let file = String(output[fileRange])
699|af1c35|            let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
700|487efc|            var column = 0
701|3070d1|            
702|e08c95|            if match.numberOfRanges > 3,
703|290821|               let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output) {
704|3fac53|                let colString = String(output[colRange])
705|4e7762|                column = Int(colString) ?? 0
706|a7dc16|            }
707|3070d1|            
708|49ae1c|            guard let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 4), in: output) else {
709|1df510|                continue
710|a7dc16|            }
711|c8551a|            let message = String(output[messageRange])
712|3070d1|            
713|0d070a|            errors.append(ParsedError(
714|18a4fa|                file: file,
715|39366e|                line: line,
716|7273ea|                column: column,
717|596fe8|                message: message,
718|76f119|                severity: .error
719|30ec32|            ))
720|5f3077|        }
721|d6ed84|        
722|6f1798|        return errors
723|27e597|    }
724|b4687f|    
725|120f2c|    private func parseRubyErrorsToParsedErrors(_ output: String) -> [ParsedError] {
726|57d34d|        var errors: [ParsedError] = []
727|587dfb|        let nsRange = NSRange(output.startIndex..., in: output)
728|d6ed84|        
729|64fd14|        // Parse main error line
730|93052d|        let mainMatches = rubyPattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
731|d6ed84|        
732|e19e5e|        for match in mainMatches {
733|9e2436|            guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
734|cf9ef8|                  let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output),
735|adce16|                  let funcRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: output),
736|12e8a4|                  let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 4), in: output) else {
737|1df510|                continue
738|a7dc16|            }
739|3070d1|            
740|40d9f4|            let file = String(output[fileRange])
741|af1c35|            let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
742|af6c49|            let function = String(output[funcRange])
743|c8551a|            let message = String(output[messageRange])
744|3070d1|            
745|0d070a|            errors.append(ParsedError(
746|18a4fa|                file: file,
747|39366e|                line: line,
748|b7efb0|                column: 0,
749|610ff8|                message: "\(message) (in '\(function)')",
750|76f119|                severity: .error
751|30ec32|            ))
752|5f3077|        }
753|d6ed84|        
754|30bca0|        // Parse traceback lines
755|7d83a5|        let traceMatches = rubyTracePattern.matches(in: output, range: nsRange)
756|d6ed84|        
757|b5826c|        for match in traceMatches {
758|9e2436|            guard let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: output),
759|aa24a2|                  let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: output) else {
760|1df510|                continue
761|a7dc16|            }
762|3070d1|            
763|40d9f4|            let file = String(output[fileRange])
764|af1c35|            let line = Int(output[lineRange]) ?? 1
765|3070d1|            
766|0d070a|            errors.append(ParsedError(
767|18a4fa|                file: file,
768|39366e|                line: line,
769|b7efb0|                column: 0,
770|b86d57|                message: "Called from traceback",
771|9cae7c|                severity: .note
772|30ec32|            ))
773|5f3077|        }
774|d6ed84|        
775|6f1798|        return errors
776|27e597|    }
777|b31277|}
778|adc83b|
779|f7530a|// MARK: - Error Highlighter
780|adc83b|
781|47348d|/// Handles visual highlighting of errors in output views
782|1e8861|class ErrorHighlighter {
783|b4687f|    
784|3f70f8|    private var highlightViews: [UIView] = []
785|b4687f|    
786|dcf911|    /// Highlight error locations in a text view
787|7e746e|    func highlightErrors(in outputView: UIView, errors: [ErrorLocation]) {
788|762079|        clearHighlights(from: outputView)
789|d6ed84|        
790|4c0ed3|        guard let textView = outputView as? UITextView else {
791|751fd9|            // For non-text views, add overlay highlights
792|58ea54|            addOverlayHighlights(to: outputView, errors: errors)
793|bef5d6|            return
794|5f3077|        }
795|d6ed84|        
796|8b2e8e|        highlightInTextView(textView, errors: errors)
797|27e597|    }
798|b4687f|    
799|e8510e|    /// Clear all highlights from a view
800|353e74|    func clearHighlights(from view: UIView) {
801|08ac99|        for highlightView in highlightViews {
802|7c5272|            highlightView.removeFromSuperview()
803|5f3077|        }
804|e9ec4d|        highlightViews.removeAll()
805|d6ed84|        
806|0f3469|        // Reset text view attributes if applicable
807|85eee7|        if let textView = view as? UITextView {
808|201d60|            let text = textView.text
809|a127ba|            textView.attributedText = NSAttributedString(string: text)
810|5f3077|        }
811|27e597|    }
812|b4687f|    
813|049941|    // MARK: - Private Methods
814|b4687f|    
815|e22ba9|    private func highlightInTextView(_ textView: UITextView, errors: [ErrorLocation]) {
816|2f71ae|        guard !errors.isEmpty else { return }
817|d6ed84|        
818|9238f3|        let attributedText = NSMutableAttributedString(string: textView.text)
819|2dbd96|        let text = textView.text
820|d6ed84|        
821|ee3291|        // Set default attributes
822|dc9a81|        let fullRange = NSRange(location: 0, length: text.count)
823|aad3d0|        attributedText.addAttribute(
824|48dfef|            .foregroundColor,
825|b79871|            value: UIColor.label,
826|278cde|            range: fullRange
827|3143a4|        )
828|d6ed84|        
829|bf6af6|        // Highlight each error location
830|6588d5|        for error in errors {
831|f8388d|            // Find the location string in the text
832|0c58a3|            let locationString = error.locationString
833|a14a4f|            if let range = text.range(of: locationString) {
834|3664a3|                let nsRange = NSRange(range, in: text)
835|216278|                
836|a4ef67|                // Apply error styling
837|4cbfc8|                attributedText.addAttribute(
838|c437e2|                    .backgroundColor,
839|5662c7|                    value: UIColor.systemRed.withAlphaComponent(0.3),
840|9bfaef|                    range: nsRange
841|6f642e|                )
842|4cbfc8|                attributedText.addAttribute(
843|d21c6d|                    .foregroundColor,
844|3ec0cf|                    value: UIColor.systemRed,
845|9bfaef|                    range: nsRange
846|6f642e|                )
847|4cbfc8|                attributedText.addAttribute(
848|3ac709|                    .underlineStyle,
849|3ff5b6|                    value: NSUnderlineStyle.single.rawValue,
850|9bfaef|                    range: nsRange
851|6f642e|                )
852|a7dc16|            }
853|3070d1|            
854|af1192|            // Also try to find and highlight the error message
855|893b0a|            if let messageRange = text.range(of: error.message) {
856|870817|                let nsRange = NSRange(messageRange, in: text)
857|4cbfc8|                attributedText.addAttribute(
858|d21c6d|                    .foregroundColor,
859|3ec0cf|                    value: UIColor.systemRed,
860|9bfaef|                    range: nsRange
861|6f642e|                )
862|a7dc16|            }
863|5f3077|        }
864|d6ed84|        
865|b47883|        textView.attributedText = attributedText
866|27e597|    }
867|b4687f|    
868|7f56d2|    private func addOverlayHighlights(to view: UIView, errors: [ErrorLocation]) {
869|ebbab7|        // Add a badge showing error count
870|1ea415|        let badge = UILabel()
871|363dd4|        badge.text = "\(errors.count) error\(errors.count == 1 ? "" : "s")"
872|53532f|        badge.font = UIFont.preferredFont(forTextStyle: .caption1)
873|9e1e82|        badge.textColor = .white
874|ceee64|        badge.backgroundColor = .systemRed
875|5b2115|        badge.textAlignment = .center
876|418c5a|        badge.layer.cornerRadius = 4
877|047d60|        badge.clipsToBounds = true
878|d6ed84|        
879|cb1e7b|        badge.translatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraints = false
880|d2ae20|        view.addSubview(badge)
881|d6ed84|        
882|c31f08|        NSLayoutConstraint.activate([
883|170c62|            badge.topAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.topAnchor, constant: 8),
884|120a64|            badge.trailingAnchor.constraint(equalTo: view.trailingAnchor, constant: -8),
885|cc557b|            badge.widthAnchor.constraint(greaterThanOrEqualToConstant: 60),
886|65a01b|            badge.heightAnchor.constraint(equalToConstant: 20)
887|082e2d|        ])
888|d6ed84|        
889|3b8efd|        highlightViews.append(badge)
890|27e597|    }
891|b31277|}
892|adc83b|
893|4627af|// MARK: - SwiftUI Integration
894|adc83b|
895|521b35|#if canImport(SwiftUI)
896|adc83b|
897|92a882|/// SwiftUI view modifier for error highlighting
898|07b677|struct ErrorHighlightModifier: ViewModifier {
899|b6dbc7|    let errors: [ErrorLocation]
900|190f98|    let parser: ErrorParser
901|b4687f|    
902|881671|    func body(content: Content) -> some View {
903|9749af|        content
904|18f111|            .overlay(
905|2d2b57|                ErrorBadgeView(errors: errors)
906|cc57fe|                    .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity, alignment: .topTrailing)
907|d79a18|                    .padding(8)
908|43d041|            )
909|27e597|    }
910|b31277|}
911|adc83b|
912|067d9b|/// Badge showing error count
913|53b20f|struct ErrorBadgeView: View {
914|b6dbc7|    let errors: [ErrorLocation]
915|b4687f|    
916|504e43|    var body: some View {
917|249108|        if errors.isEmpty {
918|2d07b8|            EmptyView()
919|b31999|        } else {
920|8e935a|            Text("\(errors.count) error\(errors.count == 1 ? "" : "s")")
921|916793|                .font(.caption)
922|3263f8|                .padding(.horizontal, 8)
923|4b050c|                .padding(.vertical, 4)
924|938c35|                .background(Color.red.opacity(0.8))
925|52ba43|                .foregroundColor(.white)
926|ad2177|                .cornerRadius(4)
927|5f3077|        }

17|df9bf2|        rootURL = url
