32|1db17d|    /// Write UTF-8 text to a URL, handling security-scoped access when applicable.
33|596754|    func writeFile(at url: URL, content: String) throws {
34|e58278|        // Try to access the file; if that fails, try its parent folder (common on iPadOS).
35|329f7b|        let didStartItem = url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
36|1b55fa|        let parentURL = url.deletingLastPathComponent()
37|13dbc8|        let didStartParent = (!didStartItem) ? parentURL.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
38|adc83b|
39|cb255a|        defer {
40|d5ee8f|            if didStartItem { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
41|b12720|            if didStartParent { parentURL.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
42|5f3077|        }
43|adc83b|
44|86709e|        try content.write(to: url, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
45|27e597|    }

47|ab3f0d|    /// Create a new empty file, choosing a unique name if needed, and return its URL.
48|e6d714|    func createFileUnique(named name: String, in folder: URL) throws -> URL {
49|c79090|        let didStart = folder.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
50|165f7e|        defer { if didStart { folder.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() } }
51|adc83b|
52|f26e72|        let initialURL = folder.appendingPathComponent(name, isDirectory: false)
53|fcc8ab|        let finalURL = uniqueDestinationURL(for: initialURL, fileManager: FileManager.default)
54|adc83b|
55|322e8f|        let created = FileManager.default.createFile(atPath: finalURL.path, contents: Data(), attributes: nil)
56|138d5a|        if !created {
57|71a9fe|            throw NSError(domain: "FileSystemNavigator", code: 2, userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Failed to create file"])
58|5f3077|        }
59|adc83b|
60|9c36f1|        DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
61|398349|        return finalURL
62|27e597|    }

170|3123e6|    /// Move a file/folder into a destination folder and return the new URL.
171|b64a18|    func moveItem(at source: URL, to destinationFolder: URL) throws -> URL {
172|1fc2ac|        let destinationIsDirectory = (try? destinationFolder.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? destinationFolder.hasDirectoryPath
173|0db880|        guard destinationIsDirectory else {
174|a9902e|            throw NSError(domain: "FileSystemNavigator", code: 4, userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Destination must be a folder"])
175|5f3077|        }
176|adc83b|
177|1552e8|        let isDirectory = (try? source.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? source.hasDirectoryPath
178|a367ea|        let fileManager = FileManager.default
179|adc83b|
180|2f0388|        // Access security scoped resources for both ends.
181|02eef9|        let didStartSource = source.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
182|1743f6|        let didStartSourceParent = (!didStartSource) ? source.deletingLastPathComponent().startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
183|61e821|        let didStartDest = destinationFolder.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
184|cb255a|        defer {
185|143445|            if didStartSource { source.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
186|ea4c03|            if didStartSourceParent { source.deletingLastPathComponent().stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
187|e4107f|            if didStartDest { destinationFolder.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
188|5f3077|        }
189|adc83b|
190|dfbde9|        let initialDest = destinationFolder.appendingPathComponent(source.lastPathComponent, isDirectory: isDirectory)
191|994ef8|        let finalDest = uniqueDestinationURL(for: initialDest, fileManager: fileManager)
192|adc83b|
193|4da690|        do {
194|805ffe|            try fileManager.moveItem(at: source, to: finalDest)
195|853889|        } catch {
196|52af20|            // Fallback for cross-volume moves.
197|38364f|            try fileManager.copyItem(at: source, to: finalDest)
198|acdeb6|            try fileManager.removeItem(at: source)
199|5f3077|        }
200|adc83b|
201|9c36f1|        DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
202|4e0314|        return finalDest
203|27e597|    }

205|38f505|    /// Task-required API: move `source` to `destination`.
206|b08146|    /// - If `destination` is a folder, the item is moved *into* that folder.
207|7b9b24|    /// - If `destination` is a file URL, the item is moved/renamed to that exact URL.
208|144775|    @discardableResult
209|48d5ef|    func moveItem(from source: URL, to destination: URL) -> Bool {
210|4da690|        do {
211|9edeba|            let destinationIsDirectory = (try? destination.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? destination.hasDirectoryPath
212|ed4781|            if destinationIsDirectory {
213|e4114c|                _ = try moveItem(at: source, to: destination)
214|f5a6eb|            } else {
215|3ee1c6|                let didStartSource = source.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
216|b65ae4|                let didStartSourceParent = (!didStartSource) ? source.deletingLastPathComponent().startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
217|13510b|                let didStartDestParent = destination.deletingLastPathComponent().startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
218|cf089b|                defer {
219|481a15|                    if didStartSource { source.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
220|74071a|                    if didStartSourceParent { source.deletingLastPathComponent().stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
221|aedab7|                    if didStartDestParent { destination.deletingLastPathComponent().stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
222|4e2d32|                }
223|adc83b|
224|57e707|                try FileManager.default.moveItem(at: source, to: destination)
225|f4cba8|                DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }
226|a7dc16|            }
227|40cfc4|            return true
228|853889|        } catch {
229|3cc302|            print("Error moving item from \(source) to \(destination): \(error)")
230|e2e187|            return false
231|5f3077|        }
232|27e597|    }

234|878ef1|    /// Delete a file or folder and refresh the tree.
235|144775|    @discardableResult
236|f1a606|    func deleteItem(at url: URL) -> Bool {
237|6ef294|        var success = false
238|adc83b|
239|8a4750|        // Try to access the item directly; if that fails, try its parent folder (common for child URLs).
240|329f7b|        let didStartItem = url.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource()
241|1b55fa|        let parentURL = url.deletingLastPathComponent()
242|13dbc8|        let didStartParent = (!didStartItem) ? parentURL.startAccessingSecurityScopedResource() : false
243|adc83b|
244|cb255a|        defer {
245|d5ee8f|            if didStartItem { url.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
246|b12720|            if didStartParent { parentURL.stopAccessingSecurityScopedResource() }
247|5f3077|        }
248|adc83b|
249|4da690|        do {
250|32a845|            try FileManager.default.removeItem(at: url) // works for files and directories
251|5b7229|            success = true
252|853889|        } catch {
253|0b5bbc|            print("Error deleting item at \(url): \(error)")
254|4437a6|            success = false
255|5f3077|        }
256|adc83b|
257|9c36f1|        DispatchQueue.main.async { self.refreshFileTree() }

259|27e597|    }

261|9f2857|    // MARK: - Tree
262|adc83b|
263|441de9|    private func buildFileTree(at url: URL) -> FileTreeNode? {
264|a367ea|        let fileManager = FileManager.default
265|adc83b|
266|4da690|        do {
267|45bac6|            let resourceValues = try url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey, .nameKey])
268|06b9e9|            let isDirectory = resourceValues.isDirectory ?? false
269|2496f5|            let name = resourceValues.name ?? url.lastPathComponent
270|adc83b|
271|8a6b94|            if isDirectory {
272|2a0651|                let contents = try fileManager.contentsOfDirectory(
273|81f0bc|                    at: url,
274|f8247b|                    includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isDirectoryKey],
275|710ee3|                    options: [.skipsHiddenFiles]
276|6f642e|                )
277|c19b31|                let children = contents.compactMap { buildFileTree(at: $0) }.sorted { $0.name < $1.name }
278|f12663|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: true, children: children)
279|f5a6eb|            } else {
280|0a1aa4|                return FileTreeNode(url: url, name: name, isDirectory: false, children: [])
281|a7dc16|            }
282|853889|        } catch {
283|8e9e2d|            print("Error building file tree at \(url): \(error)")
284|1c8557|            return nil
285|5f3077|        }
286|27e597|    }
287|adc83b|
288|d090c5|    func toggleExpanded(path: String) {
289|50b6a4|        if expandedPaths.contains(path) {
290|f464b3|            expandedPaths.remove(path)
291|b31999|        } else {
292|35f20f|            expandedPaths.insert(path)
293|5f3077|        }
294|27e597|    }
295|adc83b|
296|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
297|adc83b|
298|c1ef96|    private func uniqueDestinationURL(for initial: URL, fileManager: FileManager) -> URL {
299|690372|        if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: initial.path) { return initial }
300|adc83b|
301|e383c4|        let folder = initial.deletingLastPathComponent()
302|75aa53|        let isDirectory = (try? initial.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isDirectoryKey]).isDirectory) ?? initial.hasDirectoryPath
303|adc83b|
304|b8c47e|        let baseName = initial.deletingPathExtension().lastPathComponent
305|ef2053|        let ext = initial.pathExtension
306|adc83b|
307|48b2e9|        var counter = 1
308|722ae9|        while true {
309|41dfde|            let candidateName: String
310|f8f674|            if ext.isEmpty {
311|943330|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter)"
312|f5a6eb|            } else {
313|b2e7c3|                candidateName = "\(baseName) \(counter).\(ext)"
314|a7dc16|            }
315|adc83b|
316|80986c|            let candidate = folder.appendingPathComponent(candidateName, isDirectory: isDirectory)
317|840e8b|            if !fileManager.fileExists(atPath: candidate.path) {
318|659238|                return candidate
319|a7dc16|            }
320|484fa6|            counter += 1
321|5f3077|        }
322|27e597|    }
323|b31277|}
324|adc83b|
325|775255|struct FileTreeNode: Identifiable {
326|c90f8e|    let id = UUID()
327|bbb634|    let url: URL
328|a5193b|    let name: String
329|e1c6d7|    let isDirectory: Bool
330|b61a7b|    let children: [FileTreeNode]
331|adc83b|
332|e25084|    var fileExtension: String {
333|26034d|        (name as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
334|27e597|    }
335|b31277|}

141|376dc8|    func startDeviceFlow() async throws {
142|d52924|        isLoading = true
143|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
144|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
145|d6ed84|        
146|9c61fa|        defer { isLoading = false }
147|d6ed84|        
148|17160e|        let url = URL(string: "https://github.com/login/device/code")!
149|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
150|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
151|3fa184|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
152|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
153|d6ed84|        
154|90fe0a|        let body: [String: String] = [
155|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
156|63faec|            "scope": Self.scope
157|220505|        ]
158|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
159|d6ed84|        
160|4da690|        do {
161|051776|            let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
162|3070d1|            
163|f57d44|            guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse else {
164|ecb912|                throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
165|a7dc16|            }
166|3070d1|            
167|2f4205|            guard httpResponse.statusCode == 200 else {
168|fae175|                let errorBody = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) ?? "Unknown error"
169|63ff7f|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed("HTTP \(httpResponse.statusCode): \(errorBody)")
170|a7dc16|            }
171|3070d1|            
172|dc8a03|            let decoder = JSONDecoder()
173|6a1726|            let deviceCode = try decoder.decode(DeviceCodeResponse.self, from: data)
174|3defcd|            self.deviceCodeResponse = deviceCode
175|3070d1|            
176|04fe54|            print("[GitHubAuth] Device code received. User code: \(deviceCode.userCode)")
177|f80845|            print("[GitHubAuth] Verification URL: \(deviceCode.verificationUri)")
178|3070d1|            
179|cbf015|            // Automatically open the verification URL in Safari
180|895363|            if let verifyURL = URL(string: deviceCode.verificationUri) {
181|25ae70|                await UIApplication.shared.open(verifyURL)
182|a7dc16|            }
183|3070d1|            
184|4e1018|            // Start polling for token
185|9add0f|            startPolling(
186|44754d|                deviceCode: deviceCode.deviceCode,
187|43470e|                interval: deviceCode.interval,
188|54e876|                expiresIn: deviceCode.expiresIn
189|43d041|            )
190|3070d1|            
191|086e8f|        } catch let error as GitHubAuthError {
192|42793f|            self.errorMessage = error.localizedDescription
193|864dfa|            throw error
194|853889|        } catch {
195|701836|            let authError = GitHubAuthError.networkError(error)
196|9fce19|            self.errorMessage = authError.localizedDescription
197|fc009e|            throw authError
198|5f3077|        }

203|463ea2|    /// Step 2: Poll GitHub until user authorizes (or timeout)
204|f74cbb|    private func startPolling(deviceCode: String, interval: Int, expiresIn: Int) {
205|fd9eb9|        // Cancel any existing poll
206|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
207|780222|        isPolling = true
208|d6ed84|        
209|7bc0a7|        pollTask = Task {
210|683a9c|            let pollInterval = max(interval, 5) // GitHub minimum is 5 seconds
211|49b210|            let deadline = Date().addingTimeInterval(TimeInterval(expiresIn))
212|3070d1|            
213|dac4c4|            while !Task.isCancelled && Date() < deadline {
214|0def4c|                // Wait the required interval
215|89d237|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: UInt64(pollInterval) * 1_000_000_000)
216|216278|                
217|bc71c9|                guard !Task.isCancelled else { break }
218|216278|                
219|a9ed45|                do {
220|329790|                    let token = try await pollForToken(deviceCode: deviceCode)
221|dd2193|                    
222|7dcb0d|                    // Success! Save token and fetch user
223|8e6188|                    try? KeychainManager.shared.saveGitHubToken(token)
224|e3777a|                    self.isAuthenticated = true
225|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
226|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
227|dd2193|                    
228|5ed0e2|                    try? await fetchUser(token: token)
229|dd2193|                    
230|03abf0|                    print("[GitHubAuth] Successfully authenticated!")
231|dd2193|                    
232|433a32|                    // Notify other parts of the app
233|ec4297|                    NotificationCenter.default.post(
234|3740e3|                        name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
235|115d90|                        object: nil,
236|d0b441|                        userInfo: ["authenticated": true]
237|1961a4|                    )
238|d253ab|                    return
239|dd2193|                    
240|2559bc|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied {
241|fca15e|                    self.errorMessage = "Login was denied."
242|be724b|                    self.isPolling = false
243|536f8b|                    self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
244|d253ab|                    return
245|dd2193|                    
246|eceb72|                } catch GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired {
247|1af66c|                    // Keep polling until deadline
248|f41bef|                    continue
249|dd2193|                    
250|6bf1ca|                } catch {
251|6d6a4c|                    // authorization_pending - keep polling
252|f41bef|                    continue
253|4e2d32|                }
254|a7dc16|            }
255|3070d1|            
256|8a21bd|            // Timed out
257|a8f1c2|            if !Task.isCancelled {
258|d00484|                self.errorMessage = "Login timed out. Please try again."
259|95ab45|                self.isPolling = false
260|b2bc23|                self.deviceCodeResponse = nil
261|a7dc16|            }
262|5f3077|        }
263|27e597|    }
264|b4687f|    
265|5c071c|    /// Single poll attempt to exchange device code for token
266|8fdc58|    private func pollForToken(deviceCode: String) async throws -> String {
267|3b9f39|        let url = URL(string: "https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token")!
268|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
269|89eca9|        request.httpMethod = "POST"
270|3fa184|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
271|0b9fcc|        request.setValue("application/json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Content-Type")
272|d6ed84|        
273|90fe0a|        let body: [String: String] = [
274|86ed4b|            "client_id": Self.clientID,
275|155c27|            "device_code": deviceCode,
276|78700f|            "grant_type": "urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code"
277|220505|        ]
278|bae13e|        request.httpBody = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: body)
279|d6ed84|        
280|251aeb|        let (data, _) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
281|d6ed84|        
282|7f28b2|        // Parse response
283|eb46b7|        guard let json = try? JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any] else {
284|fce97b|            throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
285|5f3077|        }
286|d6ed84|        
287|a20373|        // Check for access token
288|e54ce0|        if let accessToken = json["access_token"] as? String {
289|5f184c|            return accessToken
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|117542|        // Check for error states
293|e969c8|        if let error = json["error"] as? String {
294|da39ef|            switch error {
295|f29883|            case "authorization_pending":
296|15ace7|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired // Not really expired, just pending
297|938a8b|            case "slow_down":
298|2dcdae|                // Need to increase interval - sleep extra 5 seconds
299|0ec537|                try? await Task.sleep(nanoseconds: 5_000_000_000)
300|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
301|6475f3|            case "expired_token":
302|a2c53f|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollExpired
303|354722|            case "access_denied":
304|7c97f9|                throw GitHubAuthError.tokenPollDenied
305|ea3438|            default:
306|6fb117|                let description = json["error_description"] as? String ?? error
307|6503e4|                throw GitHubAuthError.deviceFlowFailed(description)
308|a7dc16|            }
309|5f3077|        }
310|d6ed84|        
311|f01e4e|        throw GitHubAuthError.invalidResponse
312|27e597|    }
313|b4687f|    
314|265ecc|    // MARK: - Fetch User
315|b4687f|    
316|975a6e|    func fetchUser(token: String? = nil) async throws {
317|487094|        let authToken = token ?? KeychainManager.shared.getGitHubToken()
318|a15a83|        guard let authToken else {
319|a782aa|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("No token available")
320|5f3077|        }
321|d6ed84|        
322|9730a7|        let url = URL(string: "https://api.github.com/user")!
323|6007aa|        var request = URLRequest(url: url)
324|136018|        request.setValue("Bearer \(authToken)", forHTTPHeaderField: "Authorization")
325|58101d|        request.setValue("application/vnd.github+json", forHTTPHeaderField: "Accept")
326|d6ed84|        
327|57e527|        let (data, response) = try await URLSession.shared.data(for: request)
328|d6ed84|        
329|3a0c01|        guard let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse,
330|acd675|              httpResponse.statusCode == 200 else {
331|18d01d|            let statusCode = (response as? HTTPURLResponse)?.statusCode ?? -1
332|c4bb91|            throw GitHubAuthError.userFetchFailed("HTTP \(statusCode)")
333|5f3077|        }
334|d6ed84|        
335|900ed2|        let decoder = JSONDecoder()
336|2135f0|        self.user = try decoder.decode(GitHubUser.self, from: data)
337|27e597|    }
338|b4687f|    
339|62b3c3|    // MARK: - Logout
340|b4687f|    
341|69ba08|    func logout() {
342|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
343|ffbaca|        pollTask = nil
344|ca7dff|        isPolling = false
345|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
346|d6ed84|        
347|787655|        try? KeychainManager.shared.deleteGitHubToken()
348|579d6c|        isAuthenticated = false
349|500bbd|        user = nil
350|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
351|d6ed84|        
352|63edcc|        NotificationCenter.default.post(
353|277513|            name: NSNotification.Name("GitHubAuthDidChange"),
354|33f159|            object: nil,
355|47a97c|            userInfo: ["authenticated": false]
356|3143a4|        )
357|d6ed84|        
358|1aeafb|        print("[GitHubAuth] Logged out")
359|27e597|    }
360|b4687f|    
361|7a17f8|    // MARK: - Cancel Login
362|b4687f|    
363|477f9c|    func cancelLogin() {
364|34c205|        pollTask?.cancel()
365|ffbaca|        pollTask = nil
366|ca7dff|        isPolling = false
367|dc2ea0|        deviceCodeResponse = nil
368|295f36|        isLoading = false
369|5a9168|        errorMessage = nil
370|27e597|    }
371|b4687f|

376|aed3a6|        KeychainManager.shared.getGitHubToken()

134|69d728|@MainActor
135|fe2d1c|class GitManager: ObservableObject {
136|3ee011|    static let shared = GitManager()
137|b4687f|    
138|a6df6f|    // MARK: - Published State
139|b4687f|    
140|f8b7f2|    @Published var isRepository: Bool = false
141|143b6b|    @Published var currentBranch: String = "main"
142|4f0eb3|    @Published var branches: [GitBranch] = []
143|254438|    @Published var remoteBranches: [GitBranch] = []
144|087468|    @Published var stagedChanges: [GitFileChange] = []
145|2f344d|    @Published var unstagedChanges: [GitFileChange] = []
146|6d948f|    @Published var untrackedFiles: [GitFileChange] = []
147|79fc52|    @Published var recentCommits: [GitCommit] = []
148|ac5590|    @Published var stashes: [GitStashEntry] = []
149|e588e6|    @Published var isLoading: Bool = false
150|ced50d|    @Published var lastError: String?
151|2c2fe3|    @Published var aheadCount: Int = 0
152|470fd2|    @Published var behindCount: Int = 0
153|b4687f|    
154|e28cad|    private var workingDirectory: URL?
155|28e1f5|    private var nativeReader: NativeGitReader?
156|924ed0|    private var nativeWriter: NativeGitWriter?
157|b4687f|    
158|54113e|    private init() {}
159|b4687f|    
160|43f74b|    // MARK: - Repository Setup
161|b4687f|    
162|754bc0|    func setWorkingDirectory(_ url: URL?) {
163|795ec8|        self.workingDirectory = url
164|d6ed84|        
165|e43f58|        if let url {
166|0d8835|            self.nativeReader = NativeGitReader(repositoryURL: url)
167|d5f9ae|            self.nativeWriter = NativeGitWriter(repositoryURL: url)
168|71286a|            self.isRepository = (self.nativeReader != nil)
169|b31999|        } else {
170|13238f|            self.nativeReader = nil
171|afe6f4|            self.nativeWriter = nil
172|6bc6df|            self.isRepository = false
173|5f3077|        }
174|d6ed84|        
175|f4140b|        if isRepository {
176|2bb1e0|            Task { await refresh() }
177|b31999|        } else {
178|e4ade3|            clearRepository()
179|5f3077|        }
180|27e597|    }
181|b4687f|    
182|46db57|    func clearRepository() {
183|78dc66|        isRepository = false
184|d7f3a5|        currentBranch = "main"
185|b42be3|        branches = []
186|98fabb|        remoteBranches = []
187|9501c8|        stagedChanges = []
188|f62fa3|        unstagedChanges = []
189|a42b5b|        untrackedFiles = []
190|082a68|        recentCommits = []
191|7604df|        stashes = []
192|f0416e|        lastError = nil
193|27e597|    }
194|b4687f|    
195|24d09e|    // MARK: - Git Operations
196|b4687f|    
197|698888|    func refresh() async {
198|d52924|        isLoading = true
199|9c61fa|        defer { isLoading = false }
200|f0416e|        lastError = nil
201|d6ed84|        
202|b444e2|        guard let reader = nativeReader else {
203|8b820e|            lastError = "No git repository found"
204|bef5d6|            return
205|5f3077|        }
206|d6ed84|        
207|804616|        // Current branch
208|a2eb60|        currentBranch = reader.currentBranch() ?? "HEAD"
209|d6ed84|        
210|51e308|        // Branches
211|45f1be|        let localBranchNames = reader.localBranches()
212|caf998|        branches = localBranchNames.map { name in
213|53c644|            GitBranch(name: name, isRemote: false, isCurrent: name == currentBranch)
214|5f3077|        }
215|d6ed84|        
216|95ddd9|        let remoteBranchPairs = reader.remoteBranches()
217|8c6249|        remoteBranches = remoteBranchPairs.map { (remote, branch) in
218|6f1cd3|            GitBranch(name: "\(remote)/\(branch)", isRemote: true, isCurrent: false)
219|5f3077|        }
220|d6ed84|        
221|0a3885|        // Status
222|92252a|        let fileStatuses = reader.status()
223|d6ed84|        
224|4f9ab0|        stagedChanges = fileStatuses.compactMap { status -> GitFileChange? in
225|99c683|            guard let staged = status.staged else { return nil }
226|5ac02f|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: mapStatusType(staged), staged: true)
227|5f3077|        }
228|d6ed84|        
229|a813d6|        unstagedChanges = fileStatuses.compactMap { status -> GitFileChange? in
230|3d5fa5|            guard let working = status.working else { return nil }
231|c3fce9|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: mapStatusType(working), staged: false)
232|5f3077|        }
233|d6ed84|        
234|251543|        untrackedFiles = fileStatuses.compactMap { status -> GitFileChange? in
235|c3b94d|            guard status.working == .untracked else { return nil }
236|80a4a3|            return GitFileChange(path: status.path, kind: .untracked, staged: false)
237|5f3077|        }
238|d6ed84|        
239|e17e18|        // Recent commits
240|1f2245|        let commits = reader.recentCommits(count: 20)
241|ae143e|        recentCommits = commits.map { commit in
242|a4114d|            GitCommit(id: commit.sha, message: commit.message, author: commit.author, date: commit.authorDate)
243|5f3077|        }
244|27e597|    }
245|b4687f|    
246|cd06a1|    private func mapStatusType(_ status: GitStatusType) -> GitChangeKind {
247|845f72|        switch status {
248|710db6|        case .modified: return .modified
249|899ede|        case .added: return .added
250|4e70e5|        case .deleted: return .deleted
251|b204a9|        case .renamed: return .renamed
252|997535|        case .copied: return .copied
253|fa020b|        case .untracked: return .untracked
254|6f806d|        case .ignored: return .ignored
255|5f3077|        }
256|27e597|    }
257|b4687f|    
258|7a1b57|    /// Build a real diff for a working-copy file against HEAD (offline, using NativeGitReader).
259|422db6|    func diffWorkingCopyToHEAD(path: String, kind: GitChangeKind) async -> DiffFile? {
260|a40fde|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { return nil }
261|d6ed84|        
262|0dc171|        return await Task.detached {
263|3519ac|            guard let reader = NativeGitReader(repositoryURL: repoURL) else { return nil }
264|3070d1|            
265|83a740|            let headSha = reader.headSHA()
266|85bb51|            let oldText = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: path, commitSHA: headSha) ?? ""
267|3070d1|            
268|b35691|            let workingURL = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(path)
269|567024|            let newText = (try? String(contentsOf: workingURL, encoding: .utf8)) ?? ""
270|3070d1|            
271|848698|            return DiffBuilder.build(
272|d02bb2|                fileName: path,
273|7e8d9b|                status: kind.rawValue,
274|7f9b45|                old: oldText,
275|87834e|                new: newText
276|43d041|            )
277|2ecb78|        }.value
278|27e597|    }
279|b4687f|    
280|707ea2|    func stage(file: String) async throws {
281|e1bfbb|        guard let writer = nativeWriter else {
282|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
283|5f3077|        }
284|bd709d|        try writer.stageFile(path: file)
285|61ed9d|        await refresh()
286|27e597|    }
287|b4687f|    
288|6b4fc1|    func stageAll() async throws {
289|e1bfbb|        guard let writer = nativeWriter else {

304|0163dc|    func commit(message: String) async throws {
305|d9ce95|        guard let dir = workingDirectory else {
306|bfc324|            throw GitManagerError.noRepository
307|5f3077|        }
308|e1bfbb|        guard let writer = nativeWriter else {
309|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
310|5f3077|        }

312|61ed9d|        await refresh()

314|b4687f|    
315|8bd662|    func checkout(branch: String) async throws {
316|bc04c9|        // Local branch checkout via ref file manipulation
317|56aa58|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else {
318|bfc324|            throw GitManagerError.noRepository
319|5f3077|        }
320|d6ed84|        
321|9b2e3a|        let refPath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(".git/refs/heads/\(branch)")
322|4b52aa|        guard FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: refPath.path) else {
323|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
324|5f3077|        }
325|d6ed84|        
326|e1fb71|        // Update HEAD to point to the branch
327|12c7b8|        let headPath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(".git/HEAD")
328|d578f4|        try "ref: refs/heads/\(branch)\n".write(to: headPath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
329|d6ed84|        
330|5bbb8c|        currentBranch = branch
331|61ed9d|        await refresh()
332|27e597|    }
333|b4687f|    
334|7440d7|    func createBranch(name: String) async throws {
335|7ac4a0|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory,
336|cb37c3|              let reader = nativeReader,
337|9ea91d|              let headSHA = reader.headSHA() else {
338|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
339|5f3077|        }
340|d6ed84|        
341|0a7a99|        // Create branch ref file
342|91e869|        let refPath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(".git/refs/heads/\(name)")
343|e1760b|        try headSHA.write(to: refPath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
344|d6ed84|        
345|61ed9d|        await refresh()
346|27e597|    }
347|b4687f|    
348|7ecbb9|    func deleteBranch(name: String) async throws {
349|56aa58|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else {
350|bfc324|            throw GitManagerError.noRepository
351|5f3077|        }
352|d6ed84|        
353|f93625|        // Can't delete current branch
354|73bf3f|        guard name != currentBranch else {
355|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository

357|d6ed84|        
358|91e869|        let refPath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(".git/refs/heads/\(name)")
359|78eda2|        try FileManager.default.removeItem(at: refPath)
360|d6ed84|        
361|61ed9d|        await refresh()

398|3b3ea2|    func discard(file: String) async throws {
399|ad5dbf|        // Discard changes by restoring from HEAD
400|7ac4a0|        guard let repoURL = workingDirectory,
401|4ba5ca|              let reader = nativeReader else {
402|2085bb|            throw GitManagerError.invalidRepository
403|5f3077|        }
404|d6ed84|        
405|c615d4|        // Get file content from HEAD
406|e2e112|        if let headSHA = reader.headSHA(),
407|5eb0d8|           let content = reader.fileContentsString(atPath: file, commitSHA: headSHA) {
408|e883ab|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file)
409|144328|            try content.write(to: filePath, atomically: true, encoding: .utf8)
410|b31999|        } else {
411|37d681|            // File doesn't exist in HEAD - delete it
412|e883ab|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file)
413|7528cd|            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: filePath)
414|5f3077|        }
415|d6ed84|        
416|61ed9d|        await refresh()
417|27e597|    }
418|b4687f|    
419|a51d62|    func discardAll() async throws {
420|f978f9|        // Discard all changes by restoring each file from HEAD
421|d11253|        for change in unstagedChanges {
422|025908|            try await discard(file: change.path)
423|5f3077|        }
424|9f2c52|        for file in untrackedFiles {
425|6e5080|            guard let repoURL = workingDirectory else { continue }
426|079d80|            let filePath = repoURL.appendingPathComponent(file.path)
427|7528cd|            try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: filePath)
428|5f3077|        }
429|61ed9d|        await refresh()
430|27e597|    }
431|b4687f|    
432|83db62|    func discardChanges(file: String) async throws {
433|ec122b|        try await discard(file: file)
434|27e597|    }

82|27e597|    }
83|adc83b|
84|e92111|    func commit(message: String) {
85|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
86|145a34|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.8) {
87|04295e|            self.aheadCount += 1
88|b4dd6e|            self.statusText = "On branch \(self.currentBranch)\n" +
89|8958eb|            "Your branch is ahead of 'origin/\(self.currentBranch)' by \(self.aheadCount) commit(s).\n\n" +
90|21e260|            "nothing to commit, working tree clean"
91|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
92|5f3077|        }
93|27e597|    }
94|adc83b|
95|cdc5c9|    func pull() {
96|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
97|145a34|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.8) {
98|3c3495|            if self.behindCount > 0 {
99|4fb755|                self.behindCount = 0
100|a7dc16|            }
101|b4dd6e|            self.statusText = "On branch \(self.currentBranch)\n" +
102|b4e992|            "Already up to date."
103|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
104|5f3077|        }
105|27e597|    }
106|adc83b|
107|6ae160|    func push() {
108|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
109|145a34|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.8) {
110|71ac8a|            if self.aheadCount > 0 {
111|02a64f|                self.aheadCount = 0
112|a7dc16|            }
113|b4dd6e|            self.statusText = "On branch \(self.currentBranch)\n" +
114|d615dd|            "Everything up-to-date"
115|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
116|5f3077|        }
117|27e597|    }
118|adc83b|
119|be1804|    // MARK: - Stash
120|adc83b|
121|d58a1b|    func stashSave(message: String?) {
122|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
123|5b07be|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.4) {
124|a21659|            let trimmed = (message ?? "").trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
125|5c3d57|            let msg = trimmed.isEmpty ? "WIP on \(self.currentBranch)" : trimmed
126|69b2a1|            self.stashes.insert(GitStash(message: msg, date: Date()), at: 0)
127|c1d148|            self.statusText = "Saved working directory and index state: \(msg)"
128|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
129|5f3077|        }
130|27e597|    }
131|adc83b|
132|de20de|    func stashApply(index: Int) {
133|91826e|        guard stashes.indices.contains(index) else { return }
134|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
135|7d951c|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.5) {
136|85868c|            self.statusText = "Applied stash@{\(index)}: \(self.stashes[index].message)"
137|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
138|5f3077|        }
139|27e597|    }
140|adc83b|
141|3d2837|    func stashPop(index: Int) {
142|91826e|        guard stashes.indices.contains(index) else { return }
143|3fe7b8|        isBusy = true
144|7d951c|        DispatchQueue.main.asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + 0.5) {
145|c4fb80|            let msg = self.stashes[index].message
146|103eb1|            self.stashes.remove(at: index)
147|308397|            self.statusText = "Dropped stash@{\(index)}: \(msg)"
148|f7aca3|            self.isBusy = false
149|5f3077|        }
150|27e597|    }
151|b31277|}

1|8b6b78|import Foundation
2|adc83b|
3|6505f2|/// A lightweight inlay-hints engine used to show inline type annotations.
4|63c993|///
5|18e543|/// Scope (FEAT-133):
6|1f06c1|/// - Detect simple Swift variable declarations without explicit types.
7|6b0114|/// - Infer basic types from the initializer expression.
8|b1b02e|/// - Return hint objects with line/column + a display string (e.g. ": Int").
9|4f8cca|final class InlayHintsManager {
10|5960e0|    static let shared = InlayHintsManager()
11|54113e|    private init() {}
12|adc83b|
13|d9f5b5|    // MARK: - Models
14|adc83b|
15|14e2da|    struct InlayHint: Identifiable, Equatable {
16|d16339|        let id = UUID()
17|adc83b|
18|7a2975|        /// 0-based line index.
19|c0eddc|        let line: Int
20|adc83b|
21|efa22a|        /// 0-based UTF16 column index within the line.
22|1b9532|        let column: Int
23|adc83b|
24|c52f44|        /// Render-ready hint text (e.g. ": Int").
25|aa57fc|        let text: String
26|27e597|    }
27|adc83b|
28|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
29|adc83b|
30|2ce197|    func hints(for code: String, language: CodeLanguage) -> [InlayHint] {
31|b95802|        guard language == .swift else { return [] }
32|bb2b0b|        return swiftTypeHints(for: code)
33|27e597|    }
34|adc83b|
35|52c601|    // MARK: - Swift parsing
36|adc83b|
37|16c9d6|    private func swiftTypeHints(for code: String) -> [InlayHint] {
38|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
39|46c824|        var result: [InlayHint] = []
40|adc83b|
41|225f78|        // Matches:
42|e2c046|        //   let x = 5
43|2cac4f|        //   var name = "abc"
44|21217b|        // Avoids explicit type annotations because the pattern does not accept `:` before `=`.
45|49e410|        let pattern = "^\\s*(?:let|var)\\s+([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*=\\s*(.+)$"
46|72432c|        let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [])
47|adc83b|
48|d1a1ab|        for (lineIndex, line) in lines.enumerated() {
49|cbe876|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
50|9b2e7c|            guard !trimmed.hasPrefix("//"), !trimmed.isEmpty else { continue }
51|adc83b|
52|18a8aa|            let nsLine = line as NSString
53|89c109|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsLine.length)
54|c471d9|            guard let match = regex?.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: range) else { continue }
55|ad3867|            guard match.numberOfRanges >= 3 else { continue }
56|adc83b|
57|423174|            let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
58|3c5579|            let rhsRange = match.range(at: 2)
59|7a7150|            if nameRange.location == NSNotFound || rhsRange.location == NSNotFound { continue }
60|adc83b|
61|165da4|            // Basic sanity checks: ignore tuple bindings like `let (a, b) = ...`
62|679645|            let name = nsLine.substring(with: nameRange)
63|5c9927|            guard !name.isEmpty else { continue }
64|adc83b|
65|666b05|            // RHS, stripped of trailing `//` comments (naive but practical).
66|53413c|            var rhs = nsLine.substring(with: rhsRange)
67|8beea4|            if let commentRange = rhs.range(of: "//") {
68|a56309|                rhs = String(rhs[..<commentRange.lowerBound])
69|a7dc16|            }
70|107569|            rhs = rhs.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
71|adc83b|
72|8f6e07|            // Infer a type. If we can’t infer, don’t create a hint.
73|992808|            guard let inferred = inferSwiftType(from: rhs) else { continue }
74|adc83b|
75|ed8c63|            // Column for hint placement = end of identifier.
76|f4b52b|            let hintColumn = nameRange.location + nameRange.length
77|32af9e|            result.append(InlayHint(line: lineIndex, column: hintColumn, text: ": \(inferred)"))
78|5f3077|        }
79|adc83b|
80|67ed82|        return result
81|27e597|    }
82|adc83b|
83|014518|    // MARK: - Swift type inference (basic)
84|adc83b|
85|e4ea7a|    private func inferSwiftType(from rawExpression: String) -> String? {
86|3784b4|        let expr = rawExpression.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
87|a14679|        guard !expr.isEmpty else { return nil }
88|adc83b|
89|ea35f3|        // Bool
90|62989c|        if expr == "true" || expr == "false" { return "Bool" }
91|adc83b|
92|5f3b7c|        // String literal (simple)
93|553d7e|        if expr.hasPrefix("\"") { return "String" }
94|adc83b|
95|f70754|        // Numeric: Int
96|b5aa27|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+$") { return "Int" }
97|f87d78|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0x[0-9A-Fa-f]+$") { return "Int" }
98|212646|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0b[01]+$") { return "Int" }
99|d18d43|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?0o[0-7]+$") { return "Int" }
100|adc83b|
101|e6218e|        // Numeric: Double (Swift defaults floating-point literals to Double)
102|53b861|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+\\.\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)?$") { return "Double" }
103|71e012|        if matches(expr, pattern: "^-?\\d+(?:[eE][-+]?\\d+)$") { return "Double" }
104|adc83b|
105|69d592|        // Array / Dictionary literals
106|20ec44|        if expr.hasPrefix("[") {
107|ce2ebb|            if let dictType = inferDictionaryType(from: expr) { return dictType }
108|f27fb4|            if let arrayType = inferArrayType(from: expr) { return arrayType }
109|5f3077|        }
110|adc83b|
111|c1c62e|        // Constructor-looking calls: `TypeName(...)` (biased toward UpperCamelCase types)
112|c8a287|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*\\(") {
113|7cdb04|            return typeName
114|5f3077|        }
115|adc83b|
116|9ff15e|        // Enum/static member: `TypeName.member`
117|7c8b37|        if let typeName = firstRegexGroup(expr, pattern: "^([A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\.[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") {
118|7cdb04|            return typeName
119|5f3077|        }
120|adc83b|
121|c2ae65|        return nil
122|27e597|    }
123|adc83b|
124|ebc532|    private func inferArrayType(from expr: String) -> String? {
125|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
126|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
127|adc83b|
128|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
129|4d16d8|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[Any]" }
130|adc83b|
131|bdbc65|        // Take the first top-level element (naive: split by comma).
132|51ddab|        let firstPart = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first
133|3197f4|        guard let first = firstPart.map(String.init)?.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines), !first.isEmpty else {
134|88e905|            return "[Any]"
135|5f3077|        }
136|adc83b|
137|e844da|        if let elementType = inferSwiftType(from: first) {
138|655e59|            return "[\(elementType)]"
139|5f3077|        }
140|adc83b|
141|77d208|        return "[Any]"
142|27e597|    }
143|adc83b|
144|f7b9b1|    private func inferDictionaryType(from expr: String) -> String? {
145|53c5a0|        let trimmed = expr.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
146|c8c4b9|        guard trimmed.hasPrefix("[") && trimmed.hasSuffix("]") else { return nil }
147|adc83b|
148|85eff8|        // Fast check: dictionary literals must contain `:` somewhere.
149|8a247d|        guard trimmed.contains(":") else { return nil }
150|adc83b|
151|81b2b5|        let inner = trimmed.dropFirst().dropLast().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
152|be74cb|        if inner.isEmpty { return "[AnyHashable: Any]" }
153|adc83b|
154|141281|        // Grab the first `key: value` pair (naive: up to first comma).
155|53580e|        let firstPair = inner.split(separator: ",", maxSplits: 1, omittingEmptySubsequences: true).first.map(String.init) ?? ""
156|2ae14f|        guard let colonIndex = firstPair.firstIndex(of: ":") else { return nil }
157|adc83b|
158|90fe28|        let keyExpr = String(firstPair[..<colonIndex]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
159|c8c196|        let valueExpr = String(firstPair[firstPair.index(after: colonIndex)...]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
160|adc83b|
161|28ea5b|        let keyType = inferSwiftType(from: keyExpr) ?? "AnyHashable"
162|eb3fdd|        let valueType = inferSwiftType(from: valueExpr) ?? "Any"
163|31573c|        return "[\(keyType): \(valueType)]"
164|27e597|    }
165|adc83b|
166|e21b8f|    // MARK: - Regex helpers
167|adc83b|
168|3efaff|    private func matches(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
169|695372|        (try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []))?.firstMatch(
170|7697e1|            in: text,
171|11ba8c|            options: [],
172|264c2c|            range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (text as NSString).length)
173|d36f78|        ) != nil
174|27e597|    }
175|adc83b|
176|133a2e|    private func firstRegexGroup(_ text: String, pattern: String) -> String? {
177|473ca5|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else { return nil }
178|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
179|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
180|090ffd|        guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: text, options: [], range: range), match.numberOfRanges >= 2 else { return nil }
181|5ad252|        let r = match.range(at: 1)
182|8bd644|        guard r.location != NSNotFound else { return nil }
183|2550a5|        return ns.substring(with: r)
184|27e597|    }
185|b31277|}
186|adc83b|

1|8b6b78|import Foundation
2|421767|import Combine
3|adc83b|
4|910fc8|/// Manages inline code suggestions with debouncing, throttling, and cancellation support.
5|a3a85a|/// Uses Combine operators to prevent excessive API calls while maintaining responsive UX.
6|e0ad8a|/// 
7|eafd18|/// Request Flow:
8|59449b|/// 1. User types → typingSubject receives event
9|4129a0|/// 2. Cancel any pending request immediately (prevent stale results)
10|60cc0a|/// 3. Debounce: Wait 300ms after user stops typing
11|d7895c|/// 4. Throttle: Max 1 request per 2 seconds (drop events if under throttle window)
12|170e3f|/// 5. Filter: Remove duplicates and empty contexts
13|b648e9|/// 6. Fetch: Execute API request with cancellation support
14|2798da|/// 7. Update: Publish result to currentSuggestion
15|69d728|@MainActor
16|b4b6d6|final class InlineSuggestionManager: ObservableObject {
17|b4687f|    
18|36e733|    // MARK: - Published Properties
19|b4687f|    
20|2d54c7|    /// The current inline suggestion text to display, if any.
21|508f65|    @Published var currentSuggestion: String?
22|b4687f|    
23|e9359c|    /// The current cursor position in the document.
24|059686|    @Published var cursorPosition: CursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: 0, column: 0)
25|b4687f|    
26|8bc45f|    /// Whether a suggestion request is currently in progress.
27|e588e6|    @Published var isLoading: Bool = false
28|b4687f|    
29|5accbc|    /// The last error that occurred during suggestion fetching.
30|020420|    @Published var lastError: Error?
31|b4687f|    
32|f5c08e|    // MARK: - Configuration
33|b4687f|    
34|d29118|    /// Debounce interval after user stops typing (300ms).
35|8aea18|    /// This prevents firing requests while user is actively typing.
36|d21a74|    private let debounceInterval: TimeInterval = 0.3
37|b4687f|    
38|857e9e|    /// Throttle interval for maximum request rate (2 seconds).
39|e5cbc1|    /// This ensures max 1 request per 2 seconds, preventing API abuse.
40|f1edb6|    private let throttleInterval: TimeInterval = 2.0
41|b4687f|    
42|7d6c39|    // MARK: - Combine Pipeline
43|b4687f|    
44|840b2a|    /// Subject for user typing events.
45|5f700b|    /// Uses unlimited buffer to ensure no events are dropped.
46|feca53|    private let typingSubject = PassthroughSubject<TextChangeEvent, Never>()
47|b4687f|    
48|9e0911|    /// The Combine pipeline subscription.
49|7a6440|    private var pipelineCancellable: AnyCancellable?
50|b4687f|    
51|e685a4|    /// Set to store all subscriptions.
52|c209d8|    private var cancellables = Set<AnyCancellable>()
53|b4687f|    
54|2b582a|    /// Current async task handle for fetching suggestions.
55|dcdd34|    /// Used to cancel in-flight requests.
56|3e50fc|    private var fetchTask: Task<String?, Never>?
57|b4687f|    
58|d882ba|    // MARK: - Partial Accept State
59|b4687f|    
60|521649|    /// Tracks the current position within a partially accepted suggestion.
61|edb2e7|    /// This is the offset into `currentSuggestion` that has already been accepted.
62|66558c|    @Published var partialAcceptPosition: Int = 0
63|b4687f|    
64|252bbe|    /// The text that has been partially accepted so far.
65|23c0b7|    var acceptedText: String {
66|34727b|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion,
67|99f0e4|              partialAcceptPosition > 0,
68|6f186d|              partialAcceptPosition <= suggestion.count else {
69|273b25|            return ""
70|5f3077|        }
71|c58169|        let endIndex = suggestion.index(suggestion.startIndex, offsetBy: partialAcceptPosition)
72|a6d7a3|        return String(suggestion[..<endIndex])
73|27e597|    }
74|b4687f|    
75|623cce|    /// The remaining unaccepted portion of the suggestion.
76|36f580|    var remainingSuggestionText: String {
77|34727b|        guard let suggestion = currentSuggestion,
78|c20245|              partialAcceptPosition < suggestion.count else {
79|273b25|            return ""
80|5f3077|        }
81|1c274a|        let startIndex = suggestion.index(suggestion.startIndex, offsetBy: partialAcceptPosition)
82|ccf36e|        return String(suggestion[startIndex...])
83|27e597|    }
84|b4687f|    
85|c21cd1|    // MARK: - Types
86|b4687f|    
87|17e491|    /// Represents a cursor position in the editor.
88|917bb6|    struct CursorPosition: Equatable, Hashable {
89|c0eddc|        let line: Int
90|1b9532|        let column: Int

92|844b66|        var isValid: Bool {
93|81130d|            return line >= 0 && column >= 0
94|5f3077|        }
95|27e597|    }

134|78e1e3|    /// 1. Immediately cancels any pending request (keystroke takes priority)
135|f889c3|    /// 2. Updates the cursor position

143|1d1cad|        // This prevents stale suggestions from appearing when user types quickly
144|4457ec|        cancelPendingRequest()

177|d82f01|    func partialAccept() -> String? {

226|886d26|    /// Sets up the Combine pipeline with debounce and throttle operators.
227|7cfeb1|    /// 
228|2302ea|    /// Pipeline flow:
229|fcd00b|    /// 1. typingSubject receives events
230|a7ce76|    /// 2. debounce(0.3s): Wait 300ms after user stops typing
231|a5971a|    /// 3. throttle(2.0s): Max 1 event per 2 seconds (latest=true for responsive updates)
232|c17292|    /// 4. removeDuplicates: Filter identical events
233|627455|    /// 5. filter: Remove empty/unworthy contexts
234|6f85e6|    /// 6. flatMap: Execute async fetch with cancellation support
235|2181d5|    private func setupSuggestionPipeline() {
236|ca13c2|        pipelineCancellable = typingSubject
237|0245e4|            // STEP 1: DEBOUNCE (300ms)
238|70cff9|            // Wait 300ms after user stops typing before processing
239|d9fce5|            // This prevents firing requests while user is actively typing
240|84dd17|            .debounce(for: .seconds(debounceInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main)
241|3070d1|            
242|89fc5a|            // STEP 2: THROTTLE (2 seconds)
243|dbb01b|            // Maximum 1 request per 2 seconds
244|bce2c6|            // latest=true ensures we get the most recent event if multiple occur within throttle window
245|ecc467|            .throttle(for: .seconds(throttleInterval), scheduler: DispatchQueue.main, latest: true)
246|3070d1|            
247|844254|            // STEP 3: REMOVE DUPLICATES
248|413909|            // Filter out events with identical content and position
249|0a99da|            // This prevents duplicate API calls for the same context
250|cf49b3|            .removeDuplicates()
251|3070d1|            
252|202ed6|            // STEP 4: FILTER WORTHY CONTEXTS
253|a23af6|            // Only proceed if we have meaningful content to get suggestions for
254|845b1e|            .filter { [weak self] event in
255|06905f|                guard let self = self else { return false }
256|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
257|cc659b|                return self.shouldRequestSuggestion(context: context)
258|a7dc16|            }
259|3070d1|            
260|339920|            // STEP 5: FLATMAP TO ASYNC FETCH
261|2bc815|            // Transform each event into a publisher that fetches suggestions
262|dbc22b|            // This creates a new async context that can be cancelled
263|11fcbf|            .flatMap { [weak self] event -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> in
264|ec615d|                guard let self = self else {
265|6156c3|                    return Just(nil).eraseToAnyPublisher()
266|4e2d32|                }
267|216278|                
268|531968|                let context = self.extractContext(from: event.content, at: event.position)
269|6830af|                return self.createFetchPublisher(for: context)
270|a7dc16|            }
271|4de6c5|            // Ensure we receive on main thread for UI updates
272|a8597a|            .receive(on: DispatchQueue.main)
273|1051e2|            .sink { [weak self] suggestion in
274|518c9e|                self?.currentSuggestion = suggestion
275|02c979|                self?.isLoading = false
276|a7dc16|            }
277|27e597|    }

279|984754|    /// Creates a Combine publisher that performs the async suggestion fetch.
280|f2b66e|    /// This allows the fetch to be cancelled when new events arrive.
281|4c0331|    private func createFetchPublisher(for context: SuggestionContext) -> AnyPublisher<String?, Never> {
282|c401a0|        // Cancel any existing fetch task
283|f12123|        fetchTask?.cancel()
284|d6ed84|        
285|1c5d21|        // Create new async task for fetching
286|6b1f07|        let task = Task { [weak self] () -> String? in
287|8c11f0|            guard let self = self else { return nil }
288|3070d1|            
289|a6a73d|            await MainActor.run {
290|7494b5|                self.isLoading = true
291|db594a|                self.lastError = nil
292|a7dc16|            }
293|3070d1|            
294|71cc09|            do {
295|88792d|                // Perform the actual fetch
296|5f8cb1|                let suggestion = try await self.fetchSuggestion(for: context)
297|216278|                
298|056141|                // Check if cancelled before updating UI
299|ac578d|                try Task.checkCancellation()
300|d0b7e3|                return suggestion
301|57e5c6|            } catch is CancellationError {
302|9f1433|                // Task was cancelled - return nil silently
303|15034a|                return nil
304|91b9a2|            } catch {
305|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
306|98968a|                    self.lastError = error
307|4e2d32|                }
308|15034a|                return nil
309|a7dc16|            }
310|5f3077|        }
311|d6ed84|        
312|5854c9|        fetchTask = task
313|d6ed84|        
314|544041|        // Convert the async task to a publisher
315|5c40d7|        return Future<String?, Never> { promise in
316|47ed67|            Task {
317|458ee4|                let result = await task.value
318|67db9f|                promise(.success(result))
319|a7dc16|            }
320|5f3077|        }
321|3dc442|        .eraseToAnyPublisher()
322|27e597|    }

351|ec5f51|    /// Extracts context information from the content at the given position.
352|9fc150|    private func extractContext(from content: String, at position: CursorPosition) -> SuggestionContext {

354|d6ed84|        
355|781fff|        // Get current line
356|f4fd53|        let currentLineIndex = min(position.line, max(0, lines.count - 1))
357|35c41a|        let currentLine = lines.indices.contains(currentLineIndex) ? lines[currentLineIndex] : ""
358|d6ed84|

361|ba8451|        let precedingCode = precedingLines.joined(separator: "\n")

365|d6ed84|

369|567a23|            cursorPosition: position,
370|82f146|            language: language

374|b850a0|    /// Detects the programming language from content.

387|d6ed84|        
388|c2ae65|        return nil

391|36b8b2|    /// Determines if a suggestion should be requested based on context.
392|09fa9b|    /// This can be used to avoid requesting suggestions in inappropriate contexts.
393|df8f21|    private func shouldRequestSuggestion(context: SuggestionContext) -> Bool {
394|7b378b|        // Don't suggest on empty lines unless there's preceding context
395|8778db|        if context.currentLine.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).isEmpty {
396|84cc0e|            return !context.precedingCode.isEmpty
397|5f3077|        }
398|d6ed84|        
399|e8fcd4|        // Minimum content length to trigger suggestions
400|040d23|        let minContextLength = 10
401|3e1d44|        let totalContextLength = context.precedingCode.count + context.currentLine.count
402|d6ed84|        
403|390255|        return totalContextLength >= minContextLength
404|27e597|    }

406|691d16|    // MARK: - Word Boundary Helpers for Partial Accept
407|b4687f|    
408|a4030c|    /// Finds the end position of the next word in the given text.
409|11fe08|    /// A word is defined as a sequence of characters up to and including:
410|bb7830|    /// - The next whitespace character (space, tab, newline)
411|0c3e7d|    /// - The end of the punctuation after a word
412|72b3cd|    /// - The next punctuation boundary
413|7924b5|    private func findNextWordEnd(in text: String) -> Int {
414|97b6e3|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return 0 }
415|d6ed84|        
416|e21158|        let characters = Array(text)
417|ef04de|        var position = 0
418|d6ed84|        
419|12514b|        // Skip leading whitespace (accept it as part of the word if present)
420|3aa0c3|        var leadingWhitespaceCount = 0
421|d475df|        while position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
422|f0583e|            position += 1
423|7de75f|            leadingWhitespaceCount += 1
424|5f3077|        }
425|d6ed84|        
426|a4acf3|        // If we only had whitespace, return that
427|71ca00|        if position >= characters.count {
428|b99609|            return position
429|5f3077|        }
430|d6ed84|        
431|c2a7bd|        // Get the current character type
432|39bbe7|        let firstChar = characters[position]
433|d6ed84|        
434|8f8367|        if firstChar.isLetter || firstChar.isNumber {
435|b722f9|            // Word character: consume all word characters
436|02eced|            while position < characters.count && (characters[position].isLetter || characters[position].isNumber) {
437|de2813|                position += 1
438|a7dc16|            }
439|3070d1|            
440|d4a201|            // Also consume any trailing punctuation attached to the word (like "word.")
441|4f05d1|            while position < characters.count && isWordPunctuation(characters[position]) {
442|de2813|                position += 1
443|a7dc16|            }
444|3070d1|            
445|0c75aa|            // Include trailing whitespace after the word (just one space)
446|5b0346|            if position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
447|de2813|                position += 1
448|a7dc16|            }
449|7a1786|        } else if isPunctuation(firstChar) {
450|1a436e|            // Punctuation: consume all consecutive punctuation
451|d5ff38|            while position < characters.count && isPunctuation(characters[position]) {
452|de2813|                position += 1
453|a7dc16|            }
454|3070d1|            
455|c673d1|            // Include trailing whitespace (just one space)
456|5b0346|            if position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
457|de2813|                position += 1
458|a7dc16|            }
459|5c9934|        } else if firstChar.isWhitespace {
460|9874c8|            // Multiple whitespace: accept all consecutive whitespace
461|b51034|            while position < characters.count && characters[position].isWhitespace {
462|de2813|                position += 1
463|a7dc16|            }
464|b31999|        } else {
465|1cc2f4|            // Other characters: just consume one character
466|f0583e|            position += 1
467|5f3077|        }
468|d6ed84|        
469|9a857a|        // Ensure we always accept at least one non-whitespace character
470|792181|        // or all leading whitespace if that's all there is
471|01985b|        return max(position, leadingWhitespaceCount > 0 ? leadingWhitespaceCount : 1)
472|27e597|    }
473|b4687f|    
474|fdb5d7|    /// Checks if a character is punctuation that can be part of a word (like period, comma, etc.)
475|afa9e9|    private func isWordPunctuation(_ char: Character) -> Bool {
476|f80730|        let wordPunctuation = CharacterSet(charactersIn: ".,;:!?-_'")
477|732148|        guard let scalar = char.unicodeScalars.first else { return false }
478|725015|        return wordPunctuation.contains(scalar)
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|6c65dc|    /// Checks if a character is general punctuation or symbol
482|3dbf46|    private func isPunctuation(_ char: Character) -> Bool {
483|00b935|        return char.isPunctuation || char.isSymbol
484|27e597|    }

511|b4eef5|        ctrlRightCommand.wantsPriorityOverSystemBehavior = true
512|d6ed84|        
513|6c4e41|        // Option+Right Arrow for partial accept (alternative binding)
514|c44b96|        let optRightCommand = UIKeyCommand(

516|722957|            modifierFlags: .alternate,
517|0e3f78|            action: #selector(performPartialAccept(_:))
518|3143a4|        )
519|67b4a4|        optRightCommand.wantsPriorityOverSystemBehavior = true
520|d6ed84|        
521|44f52a|        return [ctrlRightCommand, optRightCommand]
522|27e597|    }

525|a96529|        // Access the shared manager and perform partial accept
526|5e69c5|        // This requires the editor to insert the accepted text at cursor position

528|ca72b7|            name: .inlineSuggestionPartialAccept,
529|b4da80|            object: nil
530|3143a4|        )
531|27e597|    }

48|b4687f|    
49|66bea7|    // MARK: - Core Methods
50|b4687f|    
51|2fe82f|    /// Save a value to the keychain
52|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
53|9a4d47|    ///   - key: The key identifier for the item
54|f8a426|    ///   - value: The string value to store
55|cf6dd2|    ///   - service: The service identifier for the keychain item
56|429146|    /// - Throws: KeychainError if the operation fails
57|e382c8|    func save(key: String, value: String, service: String? = nil) throws {
58|463f6a|        let serviceID = service ?? serviceIdentifier
59|d6ed84|        
60|227486|        // Convert string to data
61|671bfa|        guard let valueData = value.data(using: .utf8) else {
62|00a03b|            throw KeychainError.conversionFailed
63|5f3077|        }
64|d6ed84|        
65|ecadbe|        // Check if item already exists
66|ac9417|        let existingQuery = buildQuery(key: key, service: serviceID, returnData: false)
67|cae9c6|        let existingStatus = SecItemCopyMatching(existingQuery as CFDictionary, nil)
68|d6ed84|        
69|b25cd9|        if existingStatus == errSecSuccess {
70|5c5459|            // Update existing item
71|826053|            let updateQuery: [String: Any] = [
72|894052|                kSecClass as String: kSecClassGenericPassword,
73|f602cb|                kSecAttrAccount as String: key,
74|13894c|                kSecAttrService as String: serviceID
75|324820|            ]
76|3070d1|            
77|1f37fd|            let attributesToUpdate: [String: Any] = [
78|1d3df1|                kSecValueData as String: valueData,
79|a7e1f2|                kSecAttrModificationDate as String: Date()
80|324820|            ]
81|3070d1|            
82|006601|            let status = SecItemUpdate(updateQuery as CFDictionary, attributesToUpdate as CFDictionary)
83|3070d1|            
84|d377a9|            guard status == errSecSuccess else {
85|47073f|                throw KeychainError.invalidStatus(status)
86|a7dc16|            }
87|b31999|        } else {
88|fbab0d|            // Add new item
89|25081a|            let query = buildQuery(key: key, service: serviceID, value: valueData)
90|3070d1|            
91|abdb8d|            let status = SecItemAdd(query as CFDictionary, nil)
92|3070d1|            
93|f6e25f|            if status == errSecDuplicateItem {
94|fc7171|                throw KeychainError.duplicateItem
95|a7dc16|            }
96|3070d1|            
97|d377a9|            guard status == errSecSuccess else {
98|47073f|                throw KeychainError.invalidStatus(status)
99|a7dc16|            }
100|5f3077|        }
101|27e597|    }
102|b4687f|    
103|a7ed5a|    /// Retrieve a value from the keychain
104|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
105|9a4d47|    ///   - key: The key identifier for the item
106|cf6dd2|    ///   - service: The service identifier for the keychain item
107|6e9faf|    /// - Returns: The stored string value, or nil if not found
108|429146|    /// - Throws: KeychainError if the operation fails
109|33ad7c|    func get(key: String, service: String? = nil) throws -> String? {
110|463f6a|        let serviceID = service ?? serviceIdentifier
111|d6ed84|        
112|7ac1be|        let query = buildQuery(key: key, service: serviceID, returnData: true)
113|d6ed84|        
114|145c76|        var result: CFTypeRef?
115|5dd201|        let status = SecItemCopyMatching(query as CFDictionary, &result)
116|d6ed84|        
117|808ed0|        if status == errSecItemNotFound {
118|1c8557|            return nil
119|5f3077|        }
120|d6ed84|        
121|3a6fe5|        guard status == errSecSuccess else {
122|867b2d|            throw KeychainError.invalidStatus(status)
123|5f3077|        }
124|d6ed84|        
125|c3f222|        guard let item = result as? [String: Any],
126|5ffe2a|              let data = item[kSecValueData as String] as? Data else {
127|a27f0a|            throw KeychainError.invalidItemFormat
128|5f3077|        }
129|d6ed84|        
130|5624da|        guard let stringValue = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else {
131|00a03b|            throw KeychainError.conversionFailed
132|5f3077|        }
133|d6ed84|        
134|6c1aa1|        return stringValue
135|27e597|    }
136|b4687f|    
137|c7cc7c|    /// Delete a value from the keychain
138|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
139|9a4d47|    ///   - key: The key identifier for the item
140|cf6dd2|    ///   - service: The service identifier for the keychain item
141|429146|    /// - Throws: KeychainError if the operation fails
142|2e6f7d|    func delete(key: String, service: String? = nil) throws {
143|463f6a|        let serviceID = service ?? serviceIdentifier
144|d6ed84|        
145|e5b769|        let query = buildQuery(key: key, service: serviceID, returnData: false)
146|d6ed84|        
147|95a699|        let status = SecItemDelete(query as CFDictionary)
148|d6ed84|        
149|c1a6f3|        // errSecItemNotFound is acceptable when deleting
150|808ed0|        if status == errSecItemNotFound {
151|bef5d6|            return
152|5f3077|        }
153|d6ed84|        
154|3a6fe5|        guard status == errSecSuccess else {
155|867b2d|            throw KeychainError.invalidStatus(status)
156|5f3077|        }
157|27e597|    }
158|b4687f|    
159|c18b10|    /// Check if a key exists in the keychain
160|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
161|9a4d47|    ///   - key: The key identifier for the item
162|cf6dd2|    ///   - service: The service identifier for the keychain item

164|a45126|    func exists(key: String, service: String? = nil) -> Bool {
165|4da690|        do {
166|157178|            let serviceID = service ?? serviceIdentifier

168|3070d1|            
169|0a093e|            let status = SecItemCopyMatching(query as CFDictionary, nil)
170|df5324|            return status == errSecSuccess
171|853889|        } catch {
172|e2e187|            return false
173|5f3077|        }
174|27e597|    }
175|b4687f|    
176|24da38|    /// Delete all items for a given service

178|429146|    /// - Throws: KeychainError if the operation fails
179|5138d6|    func deleteAll(for service: String? = nil) throws {
180|463f6a|        let serviceID = service ?? serviceIdentifier
181|d6ed84|        
182|5d182b|        let query: [String: Any] = [
183|94f6b8|            kSecClass as String: kSecClassGenericPassword,
184|1d16ab|            kSecAttrService as String: serviceID
185|220505|        ]
186|d6ed84|        
187|95a699|        let status = SecItemDelete(query as CFDictionary)
188|d6ed84|        
189|91453d|        // errSecItemNotFound is acceptable when bulk deleting

197|c3a08d|    /// Build a keychain query dictionary
198|6913a2|    private func buildQuery(key: String, service: String, value: Data? = nil, returnData: Bool = false) -> [String: Any] {
199|072133|        var query: [String: Any] = [
200|94f6b8|            kSecClass as String: kSecClassGenericPassword,
201|3ddc6c|            kSecAttrAccount as String: key,
202|a095c2|            kSecAttrService as String: service
203|220505|        ]
204|d6ed84|        
205|58b0c6|        if let value = value {
206|ebca8f|            query[kSecValueData as String] = value
207|5f3077|        }
208|d6ed84|        
209|989343|        if returnData {
210|62f6e2|            query[kSecReturnData as String] = true
211|c012c1|            query[kSecReturnAttributes as String] = true
212|449229|            query[kSecMatchLimit as String] = kSecMatchLimitOne
213|b31999|        } else {
214|a024eb|            query[kSecReturnData as String] = false
215|5f3077|        }
216|d6ed84|        
217|096478|        // Add accessible level - require device unlock
218|9a3560|        query[kSecAttrAccessible as String] = kSecAttrAccessibleWhenUnlockedThisDeviceOnly
219|d6ed84|        
220|1035be|        return query
221|27e597|    }

122|d6ed84|

131|4da690|        do {

136|43588f|            statusMessage = "Downloading \(config.name)..."

138|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
139|70839c|                    self?.downloadProgress = progress.fractionCompleted
140|5e7594|                    self?.statusMessage = "Downloading... \(Int(progress.fractionCompleted * 100))%"
141|4e2d32|                }
142|a7dc16|            }
143|3070d1|            
144|1e8fbf|            // Step 2: Patch tokenizer_config.json if needed
145|b7866c|            let tokenizerConfigURL = modelDir.appending(path: "tokenizer_config.json")

147|fde120|                try patchTokenizerConfig(at: tokenizerConfigURL)
148|a7dc16|            }
149|3070d1|            
150|f3c70d|            // Step 3: Load from patched local directory
151|ebd7b6|            statusMessage = "Loading \(config.name)..."
152|0f15d7|            modelContainer = try await loadModelContainer(directory: modelDir) { [weak self] progress in

156|a7dc16|            }
157|3070d1|            
158|cb2e88|            // Create chat session with system prompt
159|d5b266|            if let container = modelContainer {
160|030c8b|                chatSession = MLXChatSession(container, instructions: defaultSystemPrompt, generateParameters: generateParams)
161|a7dc16|            }
162|3070d1|            
163|6175de|            isModelLoaded = true
164|87d390|            isDownloading = false
165|2c5418|            statusMessage = "\(config.name) ready"
166|ebf689|            print("[LocalLLM] Model loaded: \(config.repo)")
167|3070d1|            
168|853889|        } catch {
169|87d390|            isDownloading = false
170|a0c97a|            print("[LocalLLM] Load failed for \(config.repo): \(error)")
171|3070d1|            
172|f47b9b|            // Auto-fallback: try next model in the list
173|b7591e|            if let currentIndex = availableModels.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == targetId }) {
174|93d823|                let nextIndex = availableModels.index(after: currentIndex)
175|f96cce|                if nextIndex < availableModels.endIndex {
176|72a6b6|                    let fallback = availableModels[nextIndex]
177|534871|                    print("[LocalLLM] Trying fallback: \(fallback.name)")
178|0f36bf|                    statusMessage = "Trying \(fallback.name)..."
179|cdb863|                    currentModelId = fallback.id
180|be616a|                    await loadModel(modelId: fallback.id)
181|d253ab|                    return
182|4e2d32|                }
183|a7dc16|            }
184|883796|            statusMessage = "Failed: \(error.localizedDescription)"
185|5f3077|        }
186|27e597|    }
187|b4687f|    
188|7aea86|    /// Patch tokenizer_config.json to fix known issues with MLX community models.
189|2cbc84|    ///
190|0b5bd8|    /// ## Nanbeige 4.1 Chat Template Fix
191|2cbc84|    ///
192|a45827|    /// **Problem:** `mlx-community/Nanbeige4.1-3B-heretic-4bit` is missing the `chat_template`
193|a8d0ea|    /// field entirely in its `tokenizer_config.json`. The official `Nanbeige/Nanbeige4.1-3B` has
194|abe787|    /// the template, but the MLX community quantization stripped it out. Without a chat template,
195|473ad3|    /// the model receives raw unformatted text instead of properly delimited messages, causing
196|d68212|    /// broken/looping output.
197|2cbc84|    ///
198|e24a63|    /// **Root Cause:** Nanbeige uses non-standard STX/ETX control characters (U+0002/U+0003)
199|4933b8|    /// as message delimiters instead of ChatML's `<|im_start|>/<|im_end|>` tokens. Format:
200|5ac9b4|    /// ```
201|aa8a94|    /// ␂system\n{system_prompt}␃\n
202|499cc3|    /// ␂user\n{user_message}␃\n
203|b4a140|    /// ␂assistant\n{response}␃\n
204|5ac9b4|    /// ```
205|dfda8b|    /// The official template also defaults to Chinese system prompts ("你是南北阁...").
206|2cbc84|    ///
207|ed7654|    /// **Fix:** Two cases:
208|5a42c5|    /// 1. MLX version (no template): Inject full Jinja template with STX/ETX tokens + English defaults
209|05cc99|    /// 2. Official version (Chinese defaults): String-replace Chinese prompts with English equivalents
210|2cbc84|    ///
211|7d8d3c|    /// ## TokenizerClass Fix
212|2cbc84|    ///
213|f8be54|    /// The MLX version also uses `"TokenizersBackend"` as `tokenizer_class`, which
214|12ef07|    /// `swift-transformers` doesn't recognize. We patch it to `"PreTrainedTokenizerFast"`.
215|2cbc84|    ///
216|458bb8|    /// - Parameter url: Path to the downloaded `tokenizer_config.json`
217|bbb846|    private func patchTokenizerConfig(at url: URL) throws {
218|7dcb26|        let data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
219|9f35b7|        guard var json = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: data) as? [String: Any] else { return }
220|d6ed84|        
221|5d331a|        var needsWrite = false
222|65d968|        let tokenizerClass = json["tokenizer_class"] as? String ?? ""
223|d6ed84|        
224|e4affc|        // Fix non-standard tokenizer classes that swift-transformers doesn't recognize
225|697e82|        if tokenizerClass == "TokenizersBackend" {
226|9c6f93|            json["tokenizer_class"] = "PreTrainedTokenizerFast"
227|fdd298|            print("[LocalLLM] Patched tokenizer_class: \(tokenizerClass) -> PreTrainedTokenizerFast")
228|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
229|5f3077|        }
230|d6ed84|        
231|a3249e|        // Nanbeige MLX version is MISSING chat_template entirely - must add full template
232|c727fd|        let existingTemplate = json["chat_template"] as? String
233|0b19c4|        let isNanbeige = url.path.lowercased().contains("nanbeige")
234|d6ed84|        
235|7c1a07|        if isNanbeige && (existingTemplate == nil || existingTemplate?.isEmpty == true) {
236|106acd|            // Full Nanbeige template with English defaults (from official repo)
237|3dce45|            // Uses special tokens: ␂system, ␃, ␂user, ␂assistant, etc.
238|51b788|            let nanbeigeTemplate = """
239|574591|{%- if messages[0]['role'] == 'system' -%}
240|799d9d|{{- '\u{0002}system\n' + messages[0]['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
241|a01acf|{%- else -%}
242|15ae22|{{- '\u{0002}system\nYou are a helpful coding assistant. Always respond in English.\u{0003}\n' -}}
243|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
244|f60180|{%- for message in messages -%}
245|7bf0d8|{%- if message['role'] == 'user' -%}
246|9eb39a|{{- '\u{0002}user\n' + message['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
247|b7e345|{%- elif message['role'] == 'assistant' -%}
248|3ef1d3|{{- '\u{0002}assistant\n' + message['content'] + '\u{0003}\n' -}}
249|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
250|617545|{%- endfor -%}
251|9361ae|{%- if add_generation_prompt -%}
252|0c97c4|{{- '\u{0002}assistant\n' -}}
253|14e4f2|{%- endif -%}
254|e4615a|"""
255|de0b01|            json["chat_template"] = nanbeigeTemplate
256|f8c633|            print("[LocalLLM] Added Nanbeige chat_template (was missing in MLX version)")
257|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
258|c7757d|        } else if let template = existingTemplate, template.contains("你是南北阁") {
259|83aa9f|            // Official version has template but with Chinese - replace with English
260|4f1c0a|            var patched = template
261|265ecc|            patched = patched.replacingOccurrences(
262|9b5091|                of: "你是南北阁，一款由BOSS直聘自主研发并训练的专业大语言模型。",
263|56d38a|                with: "You are a helpful coding assistant. Always respond in English."
264|43d041|            )
265|265ecc|            patched = patched.replacingOccurrences(
266|887387|                of: "你是一位工具函数调用专家，你会得到一个问题和一组可能的工具函数。根据问题，你需要进行一个或多个函数/工具调用以实现目的，请尽量尝试探索通过工具解决问题。\n如果没有一个函数可以使用，请直接使用自然语言回复用户。\n如果给定的问题缺少函数所需的参数，请使用自然语言进行提问，向用户询问必要信息。\n如果调用结果已经足够回答用户问题，请对历史结果进行总结，使用自然语言回复用户。",
267|e3e136|                with: "You are a tool function expert. Based on the question, make function calls to achieve the goal. Always respond in English."
268|43d041|            )
269|b13f0a|            json["chat_template"] = patched
270|519888|            print("[LocalLLM] Patched Nanbeige: replaced Chinese defaults with English")
271|8b1a9f|            needsWrite = true
272|5f3077|        }
273|d6ed84|        
274|9bb1a4|        if needsWrite {
275|087460|            let patched = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: json, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
276|a03c25|            try patched.write(to: url)
277|5f3077|        }
278|27e597|    }

280|d04b10|    func unloadModel() {
281|f29fa7|        modelContainer = nil
282|2e6390|        chatSession = nil
283|3f48d8|        modelConfig = nil
284|fdc6e5|        isModelLoaded = false
