289|26f7b8|    /// Clear all cached models to force re-download with fixed templates
290|302181|    func clearModelCache() {
291|e5b060|        unloadModel()
292|d6ed84|        
293|bd4342|        // Clear HuggingFace Hub cache in Caches directory
294|0aa2ea|        if let cachesDir = FileManager.default.urls(for: .cachesDirectory, in: .userDomainMask).first {
295|933ded|            let hubCache = cachesDir.appendingPathComponent("huggingface")
296|71cc09|            do {
297|27c422|                if FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: hubCache.path) {
298|0151c7|                    try FileManager.default.removeItem(at: hubCache)
299|06b3b3|                    print("[LocalLLM] Cleared model cache at \(hubCache.path)")
300|d66464|                    statusMessage = "Cache cleared - models will re-download"
301|4e2d32|                }
302|91b9a2|            } catch {
303|558db7|                print("[LocalLLM] Failed to clear cache: \(error)")
304|b3742c|                statusMessage = "Failed to clear cache"
305|a7dc16|            }
306|5f3077|        }
307|27e597|    }

309|9a1e51|    func switchModel(to modelId: String) async {
310|e5b060|        unloadModel()
311|cb54b2|        await loadModel(modelId: modelId)
312|27e597|    }

314|72eb88|    // MARK: - Chat Interface (non-streaming)
315|b4687f|    
316|07dae2|    func chat(messages: [(role: String, content: String)], systemPrompt: String? = nil) async throws -> String {
317|ec510f|        guard isModelLoaded, let container = modelContainer else {
318|57ecf6|            throw LocalLLMError.modelNotLoaded
319|5f3077|        }
320|d6ed84|        
321|4e596a|        guard !isGenerating else {
322|9094d3|            throw LocalLLMError.alreadyGenerating
323|5f3077|        }
324|d6ed84|        
325|446c05|        isGenerating = true
326|8830ac|        defer { isGenerating = false }
327|d6ed84|        
328|f32e1d|        let system = systemPrompt ?? defaultSystemPrompt
329|85fbf7|        let session = MLXChatSession(container, instructions: system, generateParameters: generateParams)
330|d6ed84|        
331|f7e1c3|        // Get last user message only
332|308cc9|        let lastUserMessage = messages.last(where: { $0.role == "user" })?.content ?? ""
333|d6ed84|        
334|3ff51d|        let response = try await session.respond(to: lastUserMessage)
335|d6ed84|        
336|04d412|        // Strip thinking tags
337|198207|        let cleaned = stripThinkingTags(response)
338|d35461|        return cleaned.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
339|27e597|    }
340|b4687f|    
341|47ed15|    // MARK: - Streaming Chat (for UI)
342|b4687f|    
343|6476ec|    func chatStream(messages: [(role: String, content: String)], systemPrompt: String? = nil) -> AsyncThrowingStream<String, Error> {
344|731cf1|        AsyncThrowingStream { continuation in
345|270dfc|            Task { @MainActor in
346|e99810|                guard self.isModelLoaded, let container = self.modelContainer else {
347|98baf4|                    continuation.finish(throwing: LocalLLMError.modelNotLoaded)
348|d253ab|                    return
349|4e2d32|                }
350|216278|                
351|b4aa24|                guard !self.isGenerating else {
352|20ee93|                    continuation.finish(throwing: LocalLLMError.alreadyGenerating)
353|d253ab|                    return
354|4e2d32|                }
355|216278|                
356|30f28d|                self.isGenerating = true
357|02acf8|                self.currentResponse = ""
358|216278|                
359|a9ed45|                do {
360|8d9e95|                    let system = systemPrompt ?? self.defaultSystemPrompt
361|09c31c|                    let session = MLXChatSession(container, instructions: system, generateParameters: self.generateParams)
362|dd2193|                    
363|af8d44|                    // Get last user message only
364|efae57|                    let lastUserMessage = messages.last(where: { $0.role == "user" })?.content ?? ""
365|dd2193|                    
366|bb3164|                    // Stream response
367|135b42|                    for try await chunk in session.streamResponse(to: lastUserMessage) {
368|ac5a80|                        if !chunk.isEmpty {
369|ec52aa|                            self.currentResponse += chunk
370|81451f|                            continuation.yield(chunk)
371|392b35|                        }
372|c9717a|                    }
373|dd2193|                    
374|c65a9a|                    continuation.finish()
375|6bf1ca|                } catch {
376|39aec1|                    continuation.finish(throwing: error)
377|4e2d32|                }
378|216278|                
379|22b947|                self.isGenerating = false
380|02acf8|                self.currentResponse = ""
381|a7dc16|            }
382|5f3077|        }
383|27e597|    }

391|436b74|    func canFitInMemory(modelId: String, availableMemoryMB: Int) -> Bool {
392|c40366|        guard let config = availableModels.first(where: { $0.id == modelId }) else {
393|e2e187|            return false
394|5f3077|        }
395|321e36|        return config.estimatedMemoryMB <= availableMemoryMB

398|0f23ba|    // MARK: - Think Tag Filtering
399|b4687f|    
400|ab0000|    /// Strip <think>...</think> blocks from model output
401|0a2ec3|    /// These are chain-of-thought tags used by reasoning models (DeepSeek, Qwen thinking, etc.)
402|5c7352|    private func stripThinkingTags(_ text: String) -> String {
403|f89754|        var result = text
404|d6ed84|        
405|9c7200|        // Remove complete <think>...</think> blocks (including multiline)
406|42757a|        let thinkPattern = #"<think>[\s\S]*?</think>"#
407|2fe825|        if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: thinkPattern, options: []) {
408|852aad|            result = regex.stringByReplacingMatches(
409|1532fe|                in: result,
410|8a934d|                range: NSRange(result.startIndex..., in: result),
411|57eb34|                withTemplate: ""
412|43d041|            )
413|5f3077|        }
414|d6ed84|        
415|1852a1|        // Remove incomplete opening <think> tag at end (partial streaming)
416|a66ec3|        if let range = result.range(of: "<think>") {
417|e6c93a|            if !result[range.upperBound...].contains("</think>") {
418|1542dd|                result = String(result[..<range.lowerBound])
419|a7dc16|            }
420|5f3077|        }
421|d6ed84|        
422|f1a415|        // Remove stray </think> tags
423|b10ad5|        result = result.replacingOccurrences(of: "</think>", with: "")
424|d6ed84|        
425|ae4b06|        return result.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
426|27e597|    }
427|b4687f|    
428|8843e0|    // MARK: - Message Conversion
429|b4687f|    
430|7356fa|    /// Convert tuple messages to Chat.Message history for ChatSession
431|b91bc9|    private func convertToHistory(messages: [(role: String, content: String)]) -> [Chat.Message] {
432|97c167|        var history: [Chat.Message] = []
433|d6ed84|        
434|0c7100|        for msg in messages {
435|2398bd|            switch msg.role.lowercased() {
436|bab5dd|            case "user":
437|db3088|                history.append(.user(msg.content))
438|d5fa87|            case "assistant":
439|898b14|                history.append(.assistant(msg.content))
440|df5e21|            case "system":
441|c2d406|                // System is handled via instructions parameter, skip here
442|1df510|                continue
443|ea3438|            default:
444|2ebd25|                // Treat unknown roles as user
445|db3088|                history.append(.user(msg.content))
446|a7dc16|            }
447|5f3077|        }
448|d6ed84|        
449|fb4ac8|        return history
450|27e597|    }

462|c14feb|enum LocalLLMError: LocalizedError {
463|18d2a0|    case modelNotLoaded
464|ed579d|    case alreadyGenerating
465|e9f7cc|    case generationFailed(String)
466|d8ed80|    case downloadFailed(String)
467|44edfd|    case invalidModelConfig
468|b4687f|    
469|242b78|    var errorDescription: String? {
470|2e6d08|        switch self {
471|e82c65|        case .modelNotLoaded:
472|de6e05|            return "Local model is not loaded. Please load the model first."
473|5bf469|        case .alreadyGenerating:
474|3173b9|            return "Already generating a response. Please wait."
475|9746bf|        case .generationFailed(let reason):
476|1d68f3|            return "Generation failed: \(reason)"
477|8012b0|        case .downloadFailed(let reason):
478|a055fe|            return "Download failed: \(reason)"
479|c983b2|        case .invalidModelConfig:
480|04ba6c|            return "Invalid model configuration."
481|5f3077|        }
482|27e597|    }

116|adc83b|
117|dbdcc4|// MARK: - Navigation Result
118|adc83b|
119|1af30a|enum NavigationResult {
120|12c525|    case found(SymbolLocation)
121|ed5e75|    case multipleFound([SymbolDefinition])
122|f474e7|    case notFound(reason: String)
123|b31277|}
124|adc83b|
125|73b175|// MARK: - Navigation Manager
126|adc83b|
127|e63475|/// Manages symbol tracking and Go to Definition functionality
128|69d728|@MainActor
129|e80eed|final class NavigationManager: ObservableObject {
130|584e40|    static let shared = NavigationManager()
131|adc83b|
132|a6df6f|    // MARK: - Published State
133|adc83b|
134|bd9dfc|    @Published var isNavigating = false
135|ade7f1|    @Published var lastNavigationError: String?
136|1dedda|    @Published var definitionPreview: SymbolDefinition?
137|104d29|    @Published var showDefinitionPicker = false
138|449160|    @Published var multipleDefinitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
139|adc83b|
140|02ed94|    // MARK: - Symbol Table
141|adc83b|
142|745473|    /// Symbol table: maps symbol names to their definitions
143|dc4d2c|    /// Key: symbol name, Value: array of definitions (can have multiple for overloads)
144|485e60|    private var symbolTable: [String: [SymbolDefinition]] = [:]
145|adc83b|
146|30c835|    /// File index: maps file paths to their symbols for quick lookup
147|276d05|    private var fileSymbols: [String: [SymbolDefinition]] = [:]
148|adc83b|
149|89957e|    /// Cache of parsed file contents (hash -> symbols)
150|c2fa04|    private var parseCache: [Int: [SymbolDefinition]] = [:]
151|adc83b|
152|6e9ce4|    // MARK: - Navigation History
153|adc83b|
154|2743df|    private var navigationHistory: [SymbolLocation] = []
155|fb924c|    private var historyIndex: Int = -1
156|9b98b1|    private let maxHistorySize = 50
157|adc83b|
158|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
159|adc83b|
160|54113e|    private init() {}
161|adc83b|
162|28844a|    // MARK: - Symbol Table Management
163|adc83b|
164|1e84c8|    /// Register a symbol definition in the symbol table
165|fd103d|    func registerSymbol(_ definition: SymbolDefinition) {
166|d6f68e|        // Add to symbol table
167|51d7af|        if symbolTable[definition.name] == nil {
168|da44c4|            symbolTable[definition.name] = []
169|5f3077|        }
170|adc83b|
171|a1e7e1|        // Avoid duplicates
172|a595a0|        if !symbolTable[definition.name]!.contains(where: { $0.location == definition.location }) {
173|908114|            symbolTable[definition.name]!.append(definition)
174|5f3077|        }
175|adc83b|
176|c6644c|        // Add to file index
177|e58d8b|        let filePath = definition.location.file
178|d306d9|        if fileSymbols[filePath] == nil {
179|e2cc5c|            fileSymbols[filePath] = []
180|5f3077|        }
181|414329|        if !fileSymbols[filePath]!.contains(where: { $0.location == definition.location }) {
182|1a1290|            fileSymbols[filePath]!.append(definition)
183|5f3077|        }
184|27e597|    }
185|adc83b|
186|725208|    /// Remove all symbols for a specific file (for refresh)
187|919970|    func clearSymbols(for file: String) {
188|0c04a5|        // Remove from file index
189|127407|        let removed = fileSymbols.removeValue(forKey: file) ?? []
190|adc83b|
191|820058|        // Remove from symbol table
192|18aa01|        for definition in removed {
193|ef805b|            symbolTable[definition.name]?.removeAll { $0.location.file == file }
194|30202c|            if symbolTable[definition.name]?.isEmpty == true {
195|55b7f4|                symbolTable.removeValue(forKey: definition.name)
196|a7dc16|            }
197|5f3077|        }
198|27e597|    }
199|adc83b|
200|524779|    /// Clear all symbols
201|ee2741|    func clearAllSymbols() {
202|c8e2f6|        symbolTable.removeAll()
203|cc080a|        fileSymbols.removeAll()
204|d18abf|        parseCache.removeAll()
205|27e597|    }
206|adc83b|
207|856a24|    // MARK: - Find Definition
208|adc83b|
209|043d1b|    /// Find the definition of a symbol
210|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
211|8615c7|    ///   - symbol: The symbol name to find
212|aae5bd|    ///   - context: Optional context (current file) for prioritizing results
213|08aaa0|    /// - Returns: NavigationResult with the definition location(s) or error
214|5f314f|    func findDefinition(symbol: String, in context: String? = nil) -> NavigationResult {
215|0c5b20|        let trimmedSymbol = symbol.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
216|916ae0|        guard !trimmedSymbol.isEmpty else {
217|5b6407|            return .notFound(reason: "Empty symbol name")
218|5f3077|        }
219|adc83b|
220|365503|        guard let definitions = symbolTable[trimmedSymbol], !definitions.isEmpty else {
221|821fe8|            return .notFound(reason: "No definition found for '\(trimmedSymbol)'")
222|5f3077|        }
223|adc83b|
224|40f63d|        // If only one definition, return it
225|65257d|        if definitions.count == 1, let first = definitions.first {
226|b3f95f|            return .found(first.location)
227|5f3077|        }
228|adc83b|
229|092d00|        // If we have context, try to prioritize definitions in the same file
230|d2ed01|        if let context {
231|c5bf12|            let inCurrentFile = definitions.filter { $0.location.file == context }
232|64ef97|            if inCurrentFile.count == 1, let first = inCurrentFile.first {
233|3e4923|                return .found(first.location)
234|a7dc16|            }
235|5f3077|        }
236|adc83b|
237|d57d7f|        // Return multiple definitions for user to choose
238|db0cf7|        return .multipleFound(definitions)
239|27e597|    }
240|adc83b|
241|7a535e|    /// Find definitions matching a partial name (for autocomplete/suggestions)
242|ac9c8b|    func findDefinitions(matching prefix: String, limit: Int = 20) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
243|b585fe|        let lowercasePrefix = prefix.lowercased()
244|adc83b|
245|abbee3|        return symbolTable.flatMap { (name, definitions) -> [SymbolDefinition] in
246|152acc|            if name.lowercased().hasPrefix(lowercasePrefix) {
247|0aba65|                return definitions
248|a7dc16|            }
249|b0f460|            return []
250|5f3077|        }
251|6617cd|        .prefix(limit)
252|3fff45|        .map { $0 }
253|27e597|    }
254|adc83b|
255|183c2f|    /// Get all symbols in a file
256|89ad6a|    func getSymbols(in file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
257|56cb17|        fileSymbols[file] ?? []
258|27e597|    }
259|adc83b|
260|f62ec9|    // MARK: - Parse File for Symbols
261|adc83b|
262|cb275b|    /// Parse a file's content and extract symbol definitions
263|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
264|753bfd|    ///   - content: The source code content
265|41a464|    ///   - file: The file path/identifier
266|a9d40f|    ///   - language: The programming language
267|80dced|    func parseAndIndexFile(content: String, file: String, language: CodeLanguage) {
268|88adef|        // Check cache
269|ebd59d|        let contentHash = content.hashValue
270|d3c0e4|        if let cached = parseCache[contentHash] {
271|16bac4|            // Re-register cached symbols with new file path
272|664fb3|            for definition in cached {
273|33832a|                registerSymbol(definition)
274|a7dc16|            }
275|bef5d6|            return
276|5f3077|        }
277|adc83b|
278|e9e291|        // Clear existing symbols for this file
279|dfefdb|        clearSymbols(for: file)
280|adc83b|
281|310092|        // Parse based on language
282|62f598|        let definitions: [SymbolDefinition]
283|f3155b|        switch language {
284|3347f4|        case .swift:
285|79f37d|            definitions = parseSwiftDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
286|1cbd06|        case .javascript, .typescript:
287|ac8ad3|            definitions = parseJavaScriptDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
288|9fa55d|        case .python:
289|e1705b|            definitions = parsePythonDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
290|520b7d|        default:
291|1caddb|            definitions = parseGenericDefinitions(content: content, file: file)
292|5f3077|        }
293|adc83b|
294|e255fe|        // Register all definitions
295|1bc396|        for definition in definitions {
296|ac41ed|            registerSymbol(definition)
297|5f3077|        }
298|adc83b|
299|b82c0d|        // Cache the results
300|f34d79|        parseCache[contentHash] = definitions
301|27e597|    }
302|adc83b|
303|a2bb61|    // MARK: - Language Parsers (Regex based)
304|adc83b|
305|0b046d|    private func parseSwiftDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
306|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
307|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
308|adc83b|
309|a33600|        // Regex patterns for Swift
310|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
311|fc8340|            // Functions
312|8c783b|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(static |class )?(override )?func\s+(\w+)"#, .function, 4),
313|8fed15|            // Classes
314|83de3a|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?(final )?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class, 3),
315|2f60d1|            // Structs
316|208bd6|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?struct\s+(\w+)"#, .struct, 2),
317|af4603|            // Enums
318|01d20a|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?enum\s+(\w+)"#, .enum, 2),
319|2fc5af|            // Protocols
320|6922b4|            (#"^\s*(public |private |internal |fileprivate |open )?protocol\s+(\w+)"#, .protocol, 2)
321|220505|        ]
322|adc83b|
323|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
324|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
325|b87970|            for p in patterns {
326|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
327|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
328|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
329|adc83b|
330|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
331|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
332|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
333|adc83b|
334|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
335|840904|                let def = SymbolDefinition(
336|7761cb|                    name: name,
337|aee5d6|                    kind: p.kind,
338|0bc868|                    location: location,
339|aa376a|                    signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces),
340|a03384|                    documentation: nil,
341|f6b974|                    containerName: nil
342|6f642e|                )
343|4ec1cf|                definitions.append(def)
344|a7dc16|            }
345|adc83b|
346|426502|            // Enum cases (simple)
347|9ac8a2|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"^\s*case\s+(\w+)"#),
348|81cd99|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)) {
349|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
350|ff6da9|                if nameRange.location != NSNotFound {
351|1156fd|                    let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
352|9354ca|                    let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
353|7c1620|                    definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: .enumCase, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
354|4e2d32|                }
355|a7dc16|            }
356|5f3077|        }
357|adc83b|
358|02e31c|        return definitions
359|27e597|    }
360|adc83b|
361|9da06f|    private func parseJavaScriptDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
362|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
363|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
364|adc83b|
365|cf71b2|        // Basic JS/TS patterns
366|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
367|3f761a|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?(async\s+)?function\s+(\w+)"#, .function, 3),
368|a753f7|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?class\s+(\w+)"#, .class, 2),
369|3c35e9|            (#"^\s*(export\s+)?(const|let|var)\s+(\w+)"#, .variable, 3),
370|5d845f|            (#"^\s*interface\s+(\w+)"#, .interface, 1),
371|f015d5|            (#"^\s*type\s+(\w+)"#, .type, 1)
372|220505|        ]
373|adc83b|
374|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
375|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
376|b87970|            for p in patterns {
377|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
378|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
379|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
380|adc83b|
381|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
382|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
383|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
384|adc83b|
385|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
386|85d12d|                definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: p.kind, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
387|a7dc16|            }
388|5f3077|        }
389|adc83b|
390|02e31c|        return definitions
391|27e597|    }
392|adc83b|
393|4fcbc6|    private func parsePythonDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
394|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
395|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
396|adc83b|
397|d50565|        let patterns: [(pattern: String, kind: SymbolKind, nameGroup: Int)] = [
398|f3287f|            (#"^\s*def\s+(\w+)\s*\("#, .function, 1),
399|f0fbc1|            (#"^\s*class\s+(\w+)\s*\(?"#, .class, 1)
400|220505|        ]
401|adc83b|
402|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
403|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
404|b87970|            for p in patterns {
405|d8df88|                guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: p.pattern) else { continue }
406|9094c4|                let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)
407|a82746|                guard let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: range) else { continue }
408|adc83b|
409|901584|                let nameRange = match.range(at: p.nameGroup)
410|b77a8c|                guard nameRange.location != NSNotFound else { continue }
411|9d68c5|                let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
412|adc83b|
413|10df08|                let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
414|85d12d|                definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: p.kind, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
415|a7dc16|            }
416|5f3077|        }
417|adc83b|
418|02e31c|        return definitions
419|27e597|    }
420|adc83b|
421|0fe3a0|    private func parseGenericDefinitions(content: String, file: String) -> [SymbolDefinition] {
422|34d6fd|        // Fallback: try to detect simple function-like declarations
423|db4e65|        var definitions: [SymbolDefinition] = []
424|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
425|adc83b|
426|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
427|e07449|            let lineNum = index + 1
428|adc83b|
429|fb5ec3|            // Very rough: identifier followed by "(" at start
430|7ac4de|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"^\s*(\w+)\s*\("#),
431|81cd99|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, range: NSRange(location: 0, length: (line as NSString).length)) {
432|345d9a|                let nameRange = match.range(at: 1)
433|ff6da9|                if nameRange.location != NSNotFound {
434|1156fd|                    let name = (line as NSString).substring(with: nameRange)
435|9354ca|                    let location = SymbolLocation(file: file, line: lineNum, column: 1)
436|7d3f64|                    definitions.append(.init(name: name, kind: .function, location: location, signature: line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces), documentation: nil, containerName: nil))
437|4e2d32|                }
438|a7dc16|            }
439|5f3077|        }
440|adc83b|
441|02e31c|        return definitions
442|27e597|    }
443|adc83b|
444|6e9ce4|    // MARK: - Navigation History
445|adc83b|
446|bc5827|    /// Record a navigation location in history
447|1c946a|    func recordNavigation(to location: SymbolLocation) {
448|69bc1f|        // Remove any forward history if we're not at the end
449|608721|        if historyIndex < navigationHistory.count - 1 {
450|73fe3e|            navigationHistory = Array(navigationHistory.prefix(historyIndex + 1))
451|5f3077|        }
452|adc83b|
453|09f159|        navigationHistory.append(location)
454|cda03f|        historyIndex = navigationHistory.count - 1
455|adc83b|
456|023658|        // Limit history size
457|901de2|        if navigationHistory.count > maxHistorySize {
458|75c8c7|            navigationHistory.removeFirst()
459|99e819|            historyIndex -= 1
460|5f3077|        }
461|27e597|    }
462|adc83b|
463|82489f|    /// Navigate back in history
464|d5d9dc|    func navigateBack() -> SymbolLocation? {
465|092c1a|        guard historyIndex > 0 else { return nil }
466|9c0030|        historyIndex -= 1
467|be1f03|        return navigationHistory[historyIndex]
468|27e597|    }
469|adc83b|
470|e5a8e5|    /// Navigate forward in history
471|c1bf7e|    func navigateForward() -> SymbolLocation? {
472|bc627d|        guard historyIndex < navigationHistory.count - 1 else { return nil }
473|9855df|        historyIndex += 1
474|be1f03|        return navigationHistory[historyIndex]
475|27e597|    }
476|adc83b|
477|0d5023|    /// Check if back navigation is possible
478|959715|    var canNavigateBack: Bool {
479|573018|        historyIndex > 0
480|27e597|    }
481|adc83b|
482|cb9a0a|    /// Check if forward navigation is possible
483|809e6a|    var canNavigateForward: Bool {
484|2815dd|        historyIndex < navigationHistory.count - 1
485|27e597|    }
486|adc83b|
487|d8eee9|    // MARK: - Word at Position
488|adc83b|
489|d302b6|    /// Extract the word/symbol at a given position in text
490|0acd55|    func getWordAtPosition(_ position: Int, in text: String) -> String? {
491|37ae73|        guard position >= 0 && position <= text.count else { return nil }
492|adc83b|
493|599630|        let nsText = text as NSString
494|026ed8|        let wordCharacters = CharacterSet.alphanumerics.union(CharacterSet(charactersIn: "_"))
495|adc83b|
496|b5bfb0|        // Find start of word
497|def66a|        var start = position
498|aaa57c|        while start > 0 {
499|148e5a|            let char = nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: start - 1, length: 1))
500|70b198|            if char.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy({ wordCharacters.contains($0) }) {
501|0c6efe|                start -= 1
502|f5a6eb|            } else {
503|74cfd8|                break
504|a7dc16|            }
505|5f3077|        }
506|adc83b|
507|3d8df8|        // Find end of word
508|f5c145|        var end = position
509|b8851f|        while end < nsText.length {
510|244ed1|            let char = nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: end, length: 1))
511|70b198|            if char.unicodeScalars.allSatisfy({ wordCharacters.contains($0) }) {
512|fddf9a|                end += 1
513|f5a6eb|            } else {
514|74cfd8|                break
515|a7dc16|            }
516|5f3077|        }
517|adc83b|
518|77048a|        if start == end {
519|1c8557|            return nil
520|5f3077|        }
521|adc83b|
522|782e12|        return nsText.substring(with: NSRange(location: start, length: end - start))
523|27e597|    }
524|b31277|}
525|adc83b|
526|15f57f|// MARK: - EditorCore Integration Extension
527|adc83b|
528|9150d2|extension EditorCore {
529|6c0670|    /// Navigate to a symbol definition (F12 / Cmd+Click)
530|0fd45c|    @MainActor
531|d5887d|    func goToDefinition(at position: Int) {
532|5101b9|        guard let tab = activeTab else { return }
533|adc83b|
534|dee0b2|        let navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
535|adc83b|
536|0491f9|        // Get the word at cursor position
537|3b232a|        guard let symbol = navigationManager.getWordAtPosition(position, in: tab.content) else {
538|bef5d6|            return
539|5f3077|        }
540|adc83b|
541|be40c7|        // Find the definition
542|7465f1|        let result = navigationManager.findDefinition(symbol: symbol, in: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
543|adc83b|
544|3c3bc0|        switch result {
545|331189|        case .found(let location):
546|007f7f|            navigateToLocation(location)
547|adc83b|
548|0d99ea|        case .multipleFound(let definitions):
549|31da23|            // Show picker for multiple definitions
550|14daaf|            navigationManager.multipleDefinitions = definitions
551|25280e|            navigationManager.showDefinitionPicker = true
552|adc83b|
553|613170|        case .notFound(let reason):
554|294719|            navigationManager.lastNavigationError = reason
555|5f3077|        }
556|27e597|    }
557|adc83b|
558|eb220c|    /// Convenience used by keyboard/menu actions.
559|0fd45c|    @MainActor
560|ad0b4b|    func goToDefinitionAtCursor() {
561|16aa8a|        let position = multiCursorState.primaryCursor?.position ?? 0
562|007e61|        goToDefinition(at: position)
563|27e597|    }
564|adc83b|
565|be5f9a|    /// Peek a symbol definition inline (without navigating away).
566|0fd45c|    @MainActor
567|ca89ad|    func peekDefinition(at position: Int) {
568|5101b9|        guard let tab = activeTab else { return }
569|adc83b|
570|dee0b2|        let navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
571|adc83b|
572|3b232a|        guard let symbol = navigationManager.getWordAtPosition(position, in: tab.content) else {
573|bef5d6|            return
574|5f3077|        }
575|adc83b|
576|7465f1|        let result = navigationManager.findDefinition(symbol: symbol, in: tab.url?.path ?? tab.fileName)
577|adc83b|
578|3c3bc0|        switch result {
579|331189|        case .found(let location):
580|3fa950|            showPeekPreview(for: location)
581|adc83b|
582|0d99ea|        case .multipleFound(let definitions):
583|14daaf|            navigationManager.multipleDefinitions = definitions
584|25280e|            navigationManager.showDefinitionPicker = true
585|adc83b|
586|613170|        case .notFound(let reason):

614|04b3fc|    /// Navigate to a specific location
615|0fd45c|    @MainActor
616|9257ba|    func navigateToLocation(_ location: SymbolLocation) {
617|dee0b2|        let navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
618|adc83b|
619|052921|        // Record current position in history
620|b99c0f|        if let currentTab = activeTab {
621|e0e89c|            let currentLocation = SymbolLocation(
622|437fa5|                file: currentTab.url?.path ?? currentTab.fileName,
623|3293f1|                line: cursorPosition.line,
624|7fd768|                column: cursorPosition.column
625|43d041|            )
626|309243|            navigationManager.recordNavigation(to: currentLocation)
627|5f3077|        }
628|adc83b|
629|61d697|        // If it's a different file, open it first
630|3d2b0b|        if let tab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url?.path == location.file || $0.fileName == location.fileName }) {
631|2f7846|            activeTabId = tab.id
632|5f3077|        }
633|adc83b|
634|5adefc|        // Update cursor position
635|17a355|        cursorPosition = CursorPosition(line: location.line, column: location.column)
636|adc83b|
637|de1125|        // Record the navigation destination
638|0ff369|        navigationManager.recordNavigation(to: location)
639|27e597|    }

641|1badc2|    /// Parse and index the current active tab
642|49f050|    func indexActiveTab() {
643|5101b9|        guard let tab = activeTab else { return }
644|dee0b2|        let navigationManager = NavigationManager.shared
645|adc83b|
646|d9cab9|        // NavigationManager is @MainActor; indexActiveTab can be called from non-isolated contexts.
647|d79336|        Task { @MainActor in
648|74e3d9|            navigationManager.parseAndIndexFile(
649|e983b5|                content: tab.content,

651|2acbeb|                language: tab.language
652|43d041|            )
653|5f3077|        }
654|27e597|    }
655|adc83b|
656|27eda1|    /// Show peek preview inline (without navigating away)
657|0fd45c|    @MainActor
658|8f4c19|    private func showPeekPreview(for location: SymbolLocation) {
659|52fbba|        // Find the content at the definition location
660|3d2b0b|        if let tab = tabs.first(where: { $0.url?.path == location.file || $0.fileName == location.fileName }) {
661|aa8c7c|            let lines = tab.content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
662|457d9e|            let startLine = max(0, location.line - 3)
663|584ce0|            let endLine = min(lines.count, location.line + 7)
664|8ff293|            let previewLines = lines[startLine..<endLine].joined(separator: "\n")
665|adc83b|
666|3e1c69|            // Store peek state for display
667|122f72|            peekState = PeekState(
668|3699c5|                file: location.fileName,
669|39378d|                line: location.line,
670|2aa486|                content: previewLines,
671|d4b469|                sourceLine: cursorPosition.line
672|43d041|            )
673|5f3077|        }
674|27e597|    }
675|adc83b|
676|49f400|    /// Convert line/column to character position
677|7c7ab4|    private func getCharacterPosition(line: Int, column: Int, in text: String) -> Int {
678|2f18b4|        let lines = text.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
679|ef04de|        var position = 0
680|adc83b|
681|dbfcfe|        for i in 0..<min(line - 1, lines.count) {
682|3baa9e|            position += lines[i].count + 1 // +1 for newline
683|5f3077|        }
684|adc83b|
685|93d564|        position += min(column - 1, lines.count > line - 1 ? lines[line - 1].count : 0)
686|f21544|        return position
687|27e597|    }

13|b4687f|    
14|31cdf7|    func addRecentFile(_ url: URL) {
15|5f4c28|        // Remove existing if present to move it to top
16|1cc211|        recentFiles.removeAll { $0 == url }
17|d6ed84|        
18|bb59ea|        // Add to front
19|163b1a|        recentFiles.insert(url, at: 0)
20|d6ed84|        
21|ea3619|        // Trim
22|ae380b|        if recentFiles.count > maxRecentFiles {
23|4828d2|            recentFiles = Array(recentFiles.prefix(maxRecentFiles))
24|5f3077|        }
25|d6ed84|        
26|555a4b|        saveRecentFiles()
27|27e597|    }
28|b4687f|    
29|07316b|    private func saveRecentFiles() {
30|e18424|        let urlStrings = recentFiles.map { $0.absoluteString }
31|1d8d51|        UserDefaults.standard.set(urlStrings, forKey: defaultsKey)
32|27e597|    }
33|b4687f|    
34|935b09|    private func loadRecentFiles() {
35|056740|        guard let urlStrings = UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: defaultsKey) else { return }
36|7277d1|        recentFiles = urlStrings.compactMap { URL(string: $0) }
37|27e597|    }
38|b4687f|    
39|2bcfec|    func clearRecents() {

256|0fbfe3|    /// Connect to remote debugger via SSH
257|d326c6|    func connect(config: RemoteDebuggerConfig, sshConfig: SSHConnectionConfig) async throws {
258|0c76b9|        self.config = config
259|58134f|        self.debuggerType = config.debuggerType
260|d6ed84|        
261|5673e6|        state = .connecting
262|bc7fbc|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.connecting))
263|d6ed84|        
264|0bf4a9|        // Create and configure SSH manager
265|fbb1dc|        let ssh = SSHManager()
266|26c4e6|        self.sshManager = ssh
267|d6ed84|        
268|94f4d1|        // Set up SSH delegate to receive output
269|51d252|        let outputHandler = SSHOutputHandler(debugger: self)
270|831741|        ssh.delegate = outputHandler
271|d6ed84|        
272|813ed1|        // Connect via SSH
273|7ba7c7|        try await withCheckedThrowingContinuation { (continuation: CheckedContinuation<Void, Error>) in
274|af5471|            ssh.connect(config: sshConfig) { result in
275|7a4073|                switch result {
276|2cfe35|                case .success:
277|7115ac|                    continuation.resume()
278|6b00fe|                case .failure(let error):
279|773145|                    continuation.resume(throwing: error)
280|4e2d32|                }
281|a7dc16|            }
282|5f3077|        }
283|d6ed84|        
284|87d109|        state = .connected
285|419741|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.connected))
286|d6ed84|        
287|1a1d4e|        // Start the debugger
288|a3253f|        try await startDebugger()
289|27e597|    }
290|b4687f|

296|f97166|            try? await sendCommand(quitCmd)

298|d6ed84|        
299|9da246|        sshManager?.disconnect()
300|e2702b|        sshManager = nil
301|d6ed84|        
302|96470c|        state = .disconnected
303|a6f291|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.disconnected))
304|d6ed84|

314|9d26e9|    private func startDebugger() async throws {
315|a80ce1|        guard let config = config else {
316|eb8613|            throw RemoteDebuggerError.notConfigured
317|5f3077|        }
318|d6ed84|        
319|50fe5f|        state = .launching
320|9400dc|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.launching))
321|d6ed84|        
322|520e08|        // Build debugger launch command
323|4c21b2|        let debuggerPath = config.debuggerPath ?? config.debuggerType.executableName
324|58df43|        var launchCommand = debuggerPath
325|d6ed84|        
326|6d707f|        // Add program to debug
327|df47a9|        if config.attachToPID == nil && config.remoteTarget == nil {
328|2d7f58|            launchCommand += " \"\(config.programPath)\""
329|5f3077|        }
330|d6ed84|        
331|b84119|        // Send command to start debugger
332|0d05c4|        sshManager?.send(command: launchCommand)
333|d6ed84|        
334|c85885|        // Wait for debugger prompt
335|496f11|        try await waitForPrompt(timeout: 10)
336|d6ed84|        
337|4411be|        // Configure debugger settings
338|3648c2|        try await configureDebugger()
339|d6ed84|        
340|372127|        // Handle attach or remote target if specified
341|b3cb7b|        if let pid = config.attachToPID {
342|32e793|            try await attach(toPID: pid)
343|8144bc|        } else if let target = config.remoteTarget {
344|a72cdb|            try await connectToRemoteTarget(target)
345|b31999|        } else {
346|d225c3|            // Set program arguments if any
347|9d2d3c|            if !config.programArguments.isEmpty {
348|7164d1|                try await setProgramArguments(config.programArguments)
349|a7dc16|            }
350|3070d1|            
351|b56645|            // Set environment variables
352|4c3a6a|            for (key, value) in config.environmentVariables {
353|ace688|                try await setEnvironmentVariable(key: key, value: value)
354|a7dc16|            }
355|3070d1|            
356|73bacc|            // Set working directory
357|0dc4ad|            if let workDir = config.workingDirectory {
358|c90d94|                try await setWorkingDirectory(workDir)
359|a7dc16|            }
360|5f3077|        }
361|d6ed84|        
362|017ddc|        state = .stopped(reason: .unknown)
363|261975|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.stopped(reason: .unknown)))
364|27e597|    }

366|6df3f2|    private func configureDebugger() async throws {
367|6df6f4|        if debuggerType == .lldb {
368|f159e2|            // LLDB configuration
369|5d0a63|            _ = try await sendCommand("settings set stop-line-count-after 0")
370|b31f0d|            _ = try await sendCommand("settings set stop-line-count-before 0")
371|f924b8|            _ = try await sendCommand("settings set frame-format \"frame #${frame.index}: ${frame.pc}{ ${module.file.basename}{`${function.name-with-args}{${frame.no-debug}${function.pc-offset}}}}{ at ${line.file.basename}:${line.number}}\\n\"")
372|b31999|        } else {
373|6a6fb3|            // GDB configuration
374|63f6a5|            _ = try await sendCommand("set pagination off")
375|5384f5|            _ = try await sendCommand("set print pretty on")
376|ff9bf0|            _ = try await sendCommand("set print array on")
377|5f3077|        }
378|27e597|    }

382|c67684|    /// Set a breakpoint at file:line
383|144775|    @discardableResult
384|b6c09a|    func setBreakpoint(file: String, line: Int, condition: String? = nil) async throws -> RemoteBreakpoint {
385|49e4a0|        let command: String

387|17807d|            command = "breakpoint set --file \"\(file)\" --line \(line)"
388|b31999|        } else {
389|962e65|            command = "break \(file):\(line)"
390|5f3077|        }
391|d6ed84|        
392|1867e2|        let response = try await sendCommand(command)
393|d6ed84|        
394|733c9d|        // Parse breakpoint ID from response
395|fe4f0b|        let breakpointId = parseBreakpointId(from: response)
396|d6ed84|        
397|e69cfc|        var breakpoint = RemoteBreakpoint(
398|798b4b|            id: breakpointId,
399|5bb816|            file: file,
400|13903b|            line: line,
401|c9dd71|            condition: condition
402|3143a4|        )
403|d6ed84|        
404|7f6722|        // Set condition if provided
405|f55554|        if let condition = condition {
406|3e5145|            try await setBreakpointCondition(id: breakpointId, condition: condition)
407|b4ce25|            breakpoint.condition = condition
408|5f3077|        }
409|d6ed84|        
410|acfd56|        breakpoint.isPending = false
411|23f383|        breakpoints[breakpointId] = breakpoint
412|d6ed84|        
413|a08691|        emitEvent(.breakpointAdded(breakpoint))
414|dc2674|        return breakpoint
415|27e597|    }

492|32ad20|        try await removeBreakpoint(id: bp.id)

568|980e6e|        handleStopResponse(response)

650|b4687f|    
651|7e9d36|    /// Pause/interrupt the running program
652|15cdff|    func pause() async throws {
653|ca4813|        guard state == .running else {
654|801b8a|            throw RemoteDebuggerError.invalidState
655|5f3077|        }
656|d6ed84|        
657|13ba21|        // Send Ctrl+C to interrupt
658|0bbfc5|        sshManager?.sendInterrupt()
659|d6ed84|        
660|71d1cd|        // Wait for stop
661|72bf70|        try await waitForPrompt(timeout: 5)
662|d6ed84|        
663|05c3e7|        state = .stopped(reason: .signal(name: "SIGINT"))
664|b93e54|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.stopped(reason: .signal(name: "SIGINT"))))
665|d6ed84|        
666|4f4378|        try await refreshState()
667|27e597|    }

679|f187a5|    // MARK: - Attach

681|854069|    /// Attach to a running process by PID
682|72f818|    func attach(toPID pid: Int) async throws {
683|49e4a0|        let command: String

689|d6ed84|        
690|481302|        state = .running
691|206cd9|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.running))
692|d6ed84|        
693|1867e2|        let response = try await sendCommand(command)
694|d6ed84|        
695|a1b2a3|        if response.contains("error") || response.contains("failed") {
696|f4eae6|            throw RemoteDebuggerError.attachFailed(response)
697|5f3077|        }
698|d6ed84|        
699|017ddc|        state = .stopped(reason: .unknown)
700|261975|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.stopped(reason: .unknown)))
701|d6ed84|        
702|4f4378|        try await refreshState()
703|27e597|    }
704|b4687f|    
705|486b05|    /// Attach to a process by name

713|a7dc16|            }

716|007dd2|            command = "attach $(pidof \(name))"

718|d6ed84|        
719|481302|        state = .running
720|206cd9|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.running))
721|d6ed84|

723|d6ed84|        
724|a1b2a3|        if response.contains("error") || response.contains("failed") {
725|f4eae6|            throw RemoteDebuggerError.attachFailed(response)
726|5f3077|        }
727|d6ed84|        
728|017ddc|        state = .stopped(reason: .unknown)
729|261975|        emitEvent(.stateChanged(.stopped(reason: .unknown)))
730|d6ed84|        
731|4f4378|        try await refreshState()
732|27e597|    }

776|b4687f|

783|b0ca1f|        return T(result.value)

1038|50b4f0|    private func processNextCommand() {

1209|1df510|                continue

1217|3028ad|                return String(line[range])

1220|49e101|            guard let frameIndexStr = extractGroup(groups.frame),

1222|1df510|                continue

1225|2a8566|            let address = extractGroup(groups.addr) ?? "0x0"

1240|d6ed84|        
1241|c2ae65|        return nil
1242|27e597|    }

67|f29a6e|    case python3 = "python3"
68|c65f4d|    case node = "node"
69|79ac44|    case ruby = "ruby"
70|be7aa6|    case bash = "bash"

83|338655|    case r = "r"
84|b4687f|    
85|797c64|    var interpreter: String {
86|2e6d08|        switch self {

97|63fd4e|        case .kotlin: return "kotlin"
98|b644ed|        case .cpp: return "g++ -o /tmp/out && /tmp/out"

130|42e98e|// MARK: - Remote Runner
131|adc83b|
132|69d728|@MainActor
133|98479a|class RemoteRunner: ObservableObject {
134|b4687f|    
135|36e733|    // MARK: - Published Properties
136|b4687f|    
137|591dcc|    @Published var output: String = ""
138|6b6ac5|    @Published var isRunning: Bool = false
139|65c6ed|    @Published var currentProcess: RemoteProcess?
140|2eea19|    @Published var processHistory: [RemoteProcess] = []
141|6588c4|    @Published var lastExitCode: Int?
142|b4687f|    
143|ba6bbf|    // MARK: - Environment & Configuration
144|b4687f|    
145|b31635|    var environmentVariables: [String: String] = [:]
146|145d6f|    var workingDirectory: String?
147|6a927e|    var defaultTimeout: TimeInterval = 300 // 5 minutes
148|b4687f|    
149|98eb20|    // MARK: - Private Properties
150|b4687f|    
151|315461|    private var activeContinuation: AsyncStream<SSHCommandOutput>.Continuation?
152|dd50e7|    private var activeChannel: Channel?
153|c209d8|    private var cancellables = Set<AnyCancellable>()
154|b4687f|    
155|e19e3e|    // MARK: - Output Stream
156|b4687f|    
157|8a0339|    private var outputStream: AsyncStream<String>?
158|c0a7fc|    private var outputContinuation: AsyncStream<String>.Continuation?
159|b4687f|    
160|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
161|b4687f|    
162|359b1b|    init() {
163|982288|        setupDefaultEnvironment()
164|27e597|    }
165|b4687f|    
166|e32994|    private func setupDefaultEnvironment() {
167|fbd26d|        // Default environment variables
168|669ac2|        environmentVariables = [
169|b066c8|            "TERM": "xterm-256color",
170|39e683|            "LANG": "en_US.UTF-8",
171|aabd7d|            "PATH": "/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin"
172|220505|        ]
173|27e597|    }
174|b4687f|    
175|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
176|b4687f|    
177|93bfe3|    /// Run a file on the remote server
178|4c2551|    func runFile(path: String, via sshManager: SSHManager) async throws {
179|ee913b|        guard sshManager.isConnected else {
180|a2276b|            throw SSHClientError.notConnected
181|5f3077|        }
182|d6ed84|        
183|25e543|        let language = detectLanguage(from: path)
184|1c1bfd|        let interpreter = RemoteSupportedLanguage(rawValue: language)?.interpreter ?? language
185|d6ed84|        
186|2c2d95|        // Build command based on language
187|49e4a0|        let command: String
188|f3155b|        switch language {
189|1c8542|        case "swift":
190|ed2b09|            command = "swift \(path)"
191|bbd027|        case "python", "python3":
192|8e3fde|            command = "python3 \(path)"
193|0db04c|        case "node":
194|86436d|            command = "node \(path)"
195|ee50e6|        case "go":
196|19cee7|            command = "cd $(dirname \(path)) && go run $(basename \(path))"
197|ced789|        case "rust":
198|2cb8e5|            let binaryName = (path as NSString).lastPathComponent.replacingOccurrences(of: ".rs", with: "")
199|a5a828|            command = "rustc \(path) -o /tmp/\(binaryName) && /tmp/\(binaryName)"
200|8cc904|        case "cpp":
201|750f8c|            let binaryName = UUID().uuidString
202|2d3c9c|            command = "g++ \(path) -o /tmp/\(binaryName) && /tmp/\(binaryName)"
203|79273a|        case "c":
204|750f8c|            let binaryName = UUID().uuidString
205|3702e2|            command = "gcc \(path) -o /tmp/\(binaryName) && /tmp/\(binaryName)"
206|520b7d|        default:
207|c4ac4a|            command = "\(interpreter) \(path)"
208|5f3077|        }
209|d6ed84|        
210|df86d1|        try await runCommand(command: command, via: sshManager)
211|27e597|    }
212|b4687f|    
213|e40fb0|    /// Run a command on the remote server
214|3aab3f|    func runCommand(command: String, via sshManager: SSHManager) async throws {
215|ee913b|        guard sshManager.isConnected else {
216|a2276b|            throw SSHClientError.notConnected
217|5f3077|        }
218|d6ed84|        
219|ee83d4|        // Reset state
220|8e25b2|        await resetState()
221|d6ed84|        
222|800dd1|        // Create process record
223|3bef75|        let process = RemoteProcess(
224|87869c|            command: command,
225|e7cc59|            pid: nil,
226|247345|            startTime: Date(),
227|739210|            exitCode: nil,
228|d7d37d|            endTime: nil
229|3143a4|        )
230|d6ed84|        
231|84c5ec|        await MainActor.run {
232|0b4ee8|            self.currentProcess = process
233|e27aa5|            self.isRunning = true
234|5f3077|        }
235|d6ed84|        
236|e436df|        // Build command with working directory if specified
237|7c267c|        let finalCommand: String
238|227cae|        if let cwd = workingDirectory {
239|af9d9d|            finalCommand = "cd '\(cwd)' && \(command)"
240|b31999|        } else {
241|507adb|            finalCommand = command
242|5f3077|        }
243|d6ed84|        
244|8a77a6|        // Execute via SSH with streaming
245|541668|        let stream = executeCommandStreaming(
246|dc4dd5|            command: finalCommand,
247|5bbfaa|            environment: environmentVariables,
248|de011a|            timeout: defaultTimeout,
249|669695|            via: sshManager
250|3143a4|        )
251|d6ed84|        
252|b84546|        // Process the stream
253|2e192c|        var outputBuffer = ""
254|0deb8f|        var receivedExit = false
255|d6ed84|        
256|4da690|        do {
257|0547b1|            for try await outputEvent in stream {
258|5b1a5e|                switch outputEvent {
259|f151c9|                case .stdout(let text):
260|a56a22|                    outputBuffer.append(text)
261|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
262|2f7b4c|                        self.output.append(text)
263|c9717a|                    }
264|dd2193|                    
265|cabb36|                case .stderr(let text):
266|a73586|                    outputBuffer.append("[stderr] \(text)")
267|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
268|0bf02e|                        self.output.append("[stderr] \(text)")
269|c9717a|                    }
270|dd2193|                    
271|f2d98c|                case .exit(let code):
272|4f3ed8|                    receivedExit = true
273|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
274|6d4aec|                        self.lastExitCode = Int(code)
275|0024c2|                        if var process = self.currentProcess {
276|67c3e1|                            process.exitCode = Int(code)
277|0e26a0|                            process.endTime = Date()
278|f33135|                            self.currentProcess = process
279|65a061|                            self.processHistory.append(process)
280|392b35|                        }
281|c0305c|                        self.isRunning = false
282|c9717a|                    }
283|dd2193|                    
284|b50a83|                case .timeout:
285|19b19d|                    outputBuffer.append("\n[Command timed out after \(defaultTimeout) seconds]")
286|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
287|78732a|                        self.output.append("\n[Command timed out after \(self.defaultTimeout) seconds]")
288|c0305c|                        self.isRunning = false
289|332dee|                        self.lastExitCode = -1
290|c9717a|                    }
291|dd2193|                    
292|0e578a|                case .error(let error):
293|a7f8db|                    throw error
294|4e2d32|                }
295|a7dc16|            }
296|3070d1|            
297|bd011c|            // If no exit code was received, mark as completed
298|5ad710|            if !receivedExit {
299|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
300|d34780|                    self.isRunning = false
301|28cc9a|                    if var process = self.currentProcess {
302|5ba53b|                        process.exitCode = self.lastExitCode ?? 0
303|33f76d|                        process.endTime = Date()
304|00b506|                        self.currentProcess = process
305|ab0475|                        self.processHistory.append(process)
306|c9717a|                    }
307|4e2d32|                }
308|a7dc16|            }
309|3070d1|            
310|853889|        } catch {
311|a6a73d|            await MainActor.run {
312|f029ce|                self.isRunning = false
313|5723f1|                self.output.append("\n[Error: \(error.localizedDescription)]")
314|a7dc16|            }
315|864dfa|            throw error
316|5f3077|        }
317|27e597|    }
318|b4687f|    
319|bd227b|    /// Run a code selection on the remote server
320|9e91d6|    func runSelection(code: String, language: String, via sshManager: SSHManager) async throws {
321|ee913b|        guard sshManager.isConnected else {
322|a2276b|            throw SSHClientError.notConnected
323|5f3077|        }
324|d6ed84|        
325|a93b5e|        // Create a temporary file with the code
326|2f2c6c|        let tempFileName = "vscode_ipad_\(UUID().uuidString)\(fileExtension(for: language))"
327|a10ef3|        let tempPath = "/tmp/\(tempFileName)"
328|d6ed84|        
329|671dbc|        // Escape the code for shell
330|60d21e|        let escapedCode = code
331|f01928|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "\\", with: "\\\\")
332|c811b2|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "'", with: "'\"'\"'")
333|81c43c|            .replacingOccurrences(of: "\n", with: "\\n")
334|d6ed84|        
335|1a086b|        // Build command to create temp file and execute
336|1c1bfd|        let interpreter = RemoteSupportedLanguage(rawValue: language)?.interpreter ?? language
337|90cb1c|        let runCommand: String
338|d6ed84|        
339|f3155b|        switch language {
340|1c8542|        case "swift":
341|13f1c7|            // For Swift, we need to write to file then run
342|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
343|d3d354|            let runCmd = "swift \(tempPath)"
344|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
345|3070d1|            
346|bbd027|        case "python", "python3":
347|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
348|e84d7b|            let runCmd = "python3 \(tempPath)"
349|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
350|3070d1|            
351|0db04c|        case "node":
352|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
353|0f6b2e|            let runCmd = "node \(tempPath)"
354|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
355|3070d1|            
356|9f8131|        case "bash", "sh":
357|feb049|            // For bash, we can use heredoc or direct execution
358|ef4846|            runCommand = "bash -c '\(escapedCode)'"
359|3070d1|            
360|f6a68d|        case "ruby":
361|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
362|5a2cd2|            let runCmd = "ruby \(tempPath)"
363|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
364|3070d1|            
365|520b7d|        default:
366|2463f3|            let createFileCmd = "printf '%b' '\(escapedCode)' > \(tempPath)"
367|7e2baf|            let runCmd = "\(interpreter) \(tempPath)"
368|bd2938|            runCommand = "\(createFileCmd) && \(runCmd) && rm \(tempPath)"
369|5f3077|        }
370|d6ed84|        
371|0deed6|        try await runCommand(command: runCommand, via: sshManager)
372|27e597|    }
373|b4687f|    
374|610afc|    /// Detect language from file path
375|1c454c|    func detectLanguage(from path: String) -> String {
376|8c62fe|        let ext = (path as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
377|d6ed84|        
378|f60e4e|        switch ext {
379|1c8542|        case "swift":
380|99935c|            return "swift"
381|602f99|        case "py", "pyw":
382|9fd5ab|            return "python3"
383|ee3fc6|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs":
384|ee0c89|            return "node"
385|da3e57|        case "ts":
386|debe63|            return "node" // TypeScript can be run with ts-node or node
387|c53984|        case "rb":
388|6d1ce7|            return "ruby"
389|e14c20|        case "sh":
390|1ae98a|            return "bash"
391|d5369e|        case "zsh":
392|0c1c21|            return "zsh"
393|01aff6|        case "php":
394|765c96|            return "php"
395|ee50e6|        case "go":
396|8fbc2b|            return "go"
397|c28591|        case "rs":
398|67577c|            return "rust"
399|a547fd|        case "java":
400|034ba3|            return "java"
401|90fc25|        case "kt":
402|820913|            return "kotlin"
403|0fc947|        case "cpp", "cc", "cxx":
404|317ab1|            return "c++"
405|79273a|        case "c":
406|a76f90|            return "c"
407|4d33d4|        case "cs":
408|a3ece2|            return "csharp"
409|a2e5a3|        case "pl", "pm":
410|61bf9a|            return "perl"
411|fb7046|        case "lua":
412|638a08|            return "lua"
413|7b9c34|        case "r":
414|8190ac|            return "r"
415|676398|        case "m", "mm":
416|eb2a76|            return "objc" // Objective-C
417|520b7d|        default:
418|8c2e72|            // Try to detect from shebang if possible
419|1d6a45|            return "bash" // Default fallback
420|5f3077|        }
421|27e597|    }
422|b4687f|    
423|cb7007|    /// Kill the current running process
424|8a737e|    func kill() {
425|242f84|        // Close the active channel if any
426|6c5325|        if let channel = activeChannel {
427|f1c133|            channel.close(promise: nil)
428|7d1ca7|            activeChannel = nil
429|5f3077|        }
430|d6ed84|        
431|f1a4e8|        // Signal continuation to finish
432|856ef4|        activeContinuation?.finish()
433|e66f0f|        activeContinuation = nil
434|d6ed84|        
435|6422f4|        // Update state
436|e6ae78|        if isRunning {
437|97537f|            output.append("\n[Process terminated by user]")
438|86f671|            isRunning = false
439|3070d1|            
440|37eb79|            if var process = currentProcess {
441|3a267c|                process.exitCode = -9 // SIGKILL
442|bbfcc4|                process.endTime = Date()
443|d89d12|                currentProcess = process
444|69851e|                processHistory.append(process)
445|a7dc16|            }
446|3070d1|            
447|2902e8|            lastExitCode = -9
448|5f3077|        }
449|27e597|    }
450|b4687f|    
451|59a7c5|    /// Get output as async stream for real-time processing
452|140446|    func outputStream() -> AsyncStream<String> {
453|be5df0|        return AsyncStream { continuation in
454|b0acda|            self.outputContinuation = continuation
455|3070d1|            
456|d21138|            // Yield current output immediately
457|06ecc8|            continuation.yield(output)
458|3070d1|            
459|901f86|            // Handle termination
460|bba5ce|            continuation.onTermination = { _ in
461|8dff67|                self.outputContinuation = nil
462|a7dc16|            }
463|5f3077|        }
464|27e597|    }
465|b4687f|    
466|8e9f06|    /// Clear output buffer
467|e55375|    func clearOutput() {
468|587914|        output = ""
469|27e597|    }
470|b4687f|    
471|6687dc|    /// Set environment variable
472|cd6145|    func setEnvironmentVariable(key: String, value: String) {
473|b9b3c7|        environmentVariables[key] = value
474|27e597|    }
475|b4687f|    
476|5ea09a|    /// Remove environment variable
477|ea292e|    func removeEnvironmentVariable(key: String) {
478|398a47|        environmentVariables.removeValue(forKey: key)
479|27e597|    }
480|b4687f|    
481|909009|    /// Set working directory
482|b01a88|    func setWorkingDirectory(_ path: String?) {
483|2a101d|        workingDirectory = path
484|27e597|    }
485|b4687f|    
486|d5e6b5|    /// Get available languages
487|a2a2cf|    func availableLanguages() -> [String] {
488|da9ad0|        return RemoteSupportedLanguage.allCases.map { $0.rawValue }
489|27e597|    }
490|b4687f|    
491|049941|    // MARK: - Private Methods
492|b4687f|    
493|151ae4|    private func resetState() async {
494|84c5ec|        await MainActor.run {
495|ccd561|            output = ""
496|48838a|            lastExitCode = nil
497|5f3077|        }
498|27e597|    }
499|b4687f|    
500|40ed1d|    private func fileExtension(for language: String) -> String {
501|7726bd|        return RemoteSupportedLanguage(rawValue: language)?.fileExtension ?? ".tmp"
502|27e597|    }
503|b4687f|    
504|ec4714|    /// Execute command with streaming output using AsyncStream
505|b56235|    private func executeCommandStreaming(
506|f87c55|        command: String,
507|bf3905|        environment: [String: String]? = nil,
508|660e4a|        timeout: TimeInterval = 60,
509|93e7c9|        via sshManager: SSHManager
510|4f800a|    ) -> AsyncStream<SSHCommandOutput> {
511|50fdb2|        return AsyncStream { [weak self] continuation in
512|b38552|            guard let self = self else {
513|dc0580|                continuation.finish()
514|53ab34|                return
515|a7dc16|            }
516|3070d1|            
517|6291fe|            self.activeContinuation = continuation
518|3070d1|            
519|2a8932|            // Use SSHManager's async execution
520|004366|            let stream = sshManager.executeCommandAsync(
521|6c40a1|                command: command,
522|8d7f7b|                workingDirectory: nil, // Already handled in command building
523|578bd5|                environment: environment,
524|f7c74e|                timeout: timeout
525|43d041|            )
526|3070d1|            
527|47ed67|            Task {
528|a9ed45|                do {
529|5a65b2|                    for try await event in stream {
530|f4bfbf|                        continuation.yield(event)
531|956cfe|                        
532|ef8b2c|                        // Store reference to channel for kill functionality
533|eb3659|                        if case .stdout = event, let channel = self.activeChannel {
534|e450d9|                            // Channel is tracked
535|392b35|                        }
536|c9717a|                    }
537|c65a9a|                    continuation.finish()
538|6bf1ca|                } catch {
539|bf16bb|                    continuation.yield(.error(error))
540|c65a9a|                    continuation.finish()
541|4e2d32|                }
542|a7dc16|            }
543|3070d1|            
544|302ed0|            // Handle cancellation
545|bba5ce|            continuation.onTermination = { _ in
546|434c92|                self.activeContinuation = nil
547|a7dc16|            }
548|5f3077|        }
549|27e597|    }
550|b31277|}
551|adc83b|
552|902381|// MARK: - Extension to add executeCommandAsync to SSHManager if not present
553|adc83b|
554|1b07de|extension SSHManager {
555|85e374|    /// Execute a command with real-time output streaming via AsyncStream
556|61a266|    func executeCommandAsync(
557|f87c55|        command: String,
558|5dd7f1|        workingDirectory: String? = nil,
559|bf3905|        environment: [String: String]? = nil,
560|96a3cf|        timeout: TimeInterval = 60
561|4f800a|    ) -> AsyncStream<SSHCommandOutput> {
562|50fdb2|        return AsyncStream { [weak self] continuation in
563|b3f256|            guard let self = self, self.isConnected, let channel = self.channel, let sshHandler = self.sshHandler else {
564|01d206|                continuation.yield(.error(SSHClientError.notConnected))
565|dc0580|                continuation.finish()
566|53ab34|                return
567|a7dc16|            }
568|3070d1|            
569|7b1e91|            let channelPromise = channel.eventLoop.makePromise(of: Channel.self)
570|f5b3ab|            var timeoutTask: DispatchWorkItem?
571|99e366|            var isFinished = false
572|3070d1|            
573|15ece8|            func finishStream() {
574|557e7a|                guard !isFinished else { return }
575|67a1d9|                isFinished = true
576|d8d7bd|                timeoutTask?.cancel()
577|dc0580|                continuation.finish()
578|a7dc16|            }
579|3070d1|            
580|b019cd|            // Create the exec channel with real-time output handler
581|e97e9d|            sshHandler.createChannel(channelPromise) { childChannel, channelType in
582|ec4593|                guard channelType == .session else {
583|98cd51|                    return childChannel.eventLoop.makeFailedFuture(SSHClientError.invalidChannelType)
584|4e2d32|                }
585|216278|                
586|81476c|                let handler = RemoteExecChannelHandler(
587|e29847|                    outputHandler: { output in
588|a04d14|                        DispatchQueue.main.async {
589|4adc5c|                            guard !isFinished else { return }
590|58f8c2|                            continuation.yield(output)
591|e4abf2|                            
592|afbe0c|                            if case .exit = output {
593|3b6701|                                finishStream()
594|89d40a|                            }
595|392b35|                        }
596|12b5e6|                    },
597|75a38c|                    completionHandler: { result in
598|a04d14|                        DispatchQueue.main.async {
599|4adc5c|                            guard !isFinished else { return }
600|e4abf2|                            
601|2f41be|                            if result.isTimedOut {
602|4d7bcd|                                continuation.yield(.timeout)
603|240f50|                            } else {
604|47f090|                                continuation.yield(.exit(Int32(result.exitCode)))
605|89d40a|                            }
606|88c9f2|                            finishStream()
607|392b35|                        }
608|c9717a|                    }
609|6f642e|                )
610|216278|                
611|825638|                let execRequest = SSHChannelRequestEvent.ExecRequest(
612|618145|                    command: workingDirectory != nil ? "cd '\(workingDirectory!)' && \(command)" : command,
613|3d0428|                    wantReply: true
614|6f642e|                )
615|216278|                
616|bd2732|                return childChannel.pipeline.addHandler(handler).flatMap {
617|ef581e|                    childChannel.triggerUserOutboundEvent(execRequest, promise: nil)
618|0f70a9|                    return childChannel.setOption(ChannelOptions.allowRemoteHalfClosure, value: true)
619|4e2d32|                }
620|a7dc16|            }
621|3070d1|            
622|7a94f6|            // Handle errors
623|8fc388|            channelPromise.futureResult.whenFailure { error in
624|f143b8|                DispatchQueue.main.async {
625|206f0a|                    guard !isFinished else { return }
626|bf16bb|                    continuation.yield(.error(error))
627|a34e10|                    finishStream()
628|4e2d32|                }
629|a7dc16|            }
630|3070d1|            
631|577c5f|            // Set up timeout
632|8f4749|            timeoutTask = DispatchWorkItem {
633|f143b8|                DispatchQueue.main.async {
634|206f0a|                    guard !isFinished else { return }
635|0acb74|                    continuation.yield(.timeout)
636|a34e10|                    finishStream()
637|4e2d32|                }
638|a7dc16|            }
639|e7ec4b|            DispatchQueue.global().asyncAfter(deadline: .now() + timeout, execute: timeoutTask!)
640|3070d1|            
641|302ed0|            // Handle cancellation
642|bba5ce|            continuation.onTermination = { _ in
643|d8d7bd|                timeoutTask?.cancel()
644|ef3fc0|                channelPromise.futureResult.whenSuccess { channel in
645|a3f0ae|                    channel.close(promise: nil)
646|4e2d32|                }
647|a7dc16|            }
648|5f3077|        }
649|27e597|    }
650|b31277|}
651|adc83b|
652|c466a9|// MARK: - Remote Exec Channel Handler
653|adc83b|
654|fd4b43|private class RemoteExecChannelHandler: ChannelDuplexHandler {
655|818f81|    typealias InboundIn = SSHChannelData
656|aac853|    typealias InboundOut = ByteBuffer
657|bd586f|    typealias OutboundIn = ByteBuffer
658|638ff5|    typealias OutboundOut = SSHChannelData
659|b4687f|    
660|1af299|    private var stdoutBuffer = ByteBufferAllocator().buffer(capacity: 4096)
661|c04dfa|    private var stderrBuffer = ByteBufferAllocator().buffer(capacity: 4096)
662|cf9c45|    private var exitCode: Int?
663|65b487|    private var outputHandler: ((SSHCommandOutput) -> Void)?
664|aa5b99|    private var completionHandler: ((SSHCommandResult) -> Void)?
665|b4687f|    
666|62e028|    init(
667|6d5297|        outputHandler: ((SSHCommandOutput) -> Void)? = nil,
668|2a76d6|        completionHandler: ((SSHCommandResult) -> Void)? = nil
669|981e04|    ) {
670|2a7d83|        self.outputHandler = outputHandler
671|1d72bc|        self.completionHandler = completionHandler
672|27e597|    }
673|b4687f|    
674|d46995|    func channelRead(context: ChannelHandlerContext, data: NIOAny) {
675|da8887|        let channelData = unwrapInboundIn(data)
676|d6ed84|        
677|1ddac8|        switch channelData.type {
678|6a22d1|        case .channel:
679|7107a8|            guard case .byteBuffer(let buffer) = channelData.data else { return }
680|3070d1|            
681|16e0bf|            // Accumulate stdout
682|6285a3|            var mutableBuffer = buffer
683|0cd634|            stdoutBuffer.writeBuffer(&mutableBuffer)
684|3070d1|            
685|5dd2f6|            // Notify real-time handler
686|ebff58|            if let text = buffer.getString(at: 0, length: buffer.readableBytes) {
687|352552|                outputHandler?(.stdout(text))
688|a7dc16|            }
689|3070d1|            
690|f290c8|        case .stdErr:
691|7107a8|            guard case .byteBuffer(let buffer) = channelData.data else { return }
692|3070d1|            
693|e8be37|            // Accumulate stderr
694|6285a3|            var mutableBuffer = buffer
695|e6c7c0|            stderrBuffer.writeBuffer(&mutableBuffer)
696|3070d1|            
697|5dd2f6|            // Notify real-time handler
698|ebff58|            if let text = buffer.getString(at: 0, length: buffer.readableBytes) {
699|a633fe|                outputHandler?(.stderr(text))
700|a7dc16|            }
701|3070d1|            
702|520b7d|        default:
703|4c03e4|            break
704|5f3077|        }
705|27e597|    }
706|b4687f|    
707|734243|    func userInboundEventTriggered(context: ChannelHandlerContext, event: Any) {
708|2f42d4|        if let exitStatus = event as? SSHChannelRequestEvent.ExitStatus {
709|33bbd7|            exitCode = Int(exitStatus.exitStatus)
710|c1eae8|            outputHandler?(.exit(exitStatus.exitStatus))
711|5f3077|        }
712|27e597|    }
713|b4687f|    
714|4a71fc|    func channelInactive(context: ChannelHandlerContext) {
715|02fc3f|        let stdout = stdoutBuffer.getString(at: 0, length: stdoutBuffer.readableBytes) ?? ""
716|bab9da|        let stderr = stderrBuffer.getString(at: 0, length: stderrBuffer.readableBytes) ?? ""
717|aa1cf0|        let result = SSHCommandResult(
718|86c8cc|            stdout: stdout,
719|1dc099|            stderr: stderr,
720|626e57|            exitCode: exitCode ?? -1,
721|41dcab|            isTimedOut: false
722|3143a4|        )
723|a45864|        completionHandler?(result)
724|27e597|    }
725|b4687f|    
726|68ecb6|    func errorCaught(context: ChannelHandlerContext, error: Error) {
727|284950|        outputHandler?(.error(error))
728|3c2d3e|        context.close(promise: nil)
729|27e597|    }
730|b31277|}
731|adc83b|

102|fd2c33|    /// Returns the text color for a given Tree-sitter highlight name
103|a1869c|    /// - Parameter highlightName: The Tree-sitter capture name (e.g., "keyword", "string")
104|6ea7e8|    /// - Returns: The UIColor to use for that highlight, or nil for default color
105|1128fc|    func textColor(for highlightName: String) -> UIColor? {
106|695709|        // Handle compound highlight names like "keyword.return" by checking prefixes
107|76be7a|        let normalizedName = normalizeHighlightName(highlightName)
108|d6ed84|        
109|b15f72|        switch normalizedName {
110|0ada81|        // Keywords (control flow, storage, etc.)
111|be33b0|        case "keyword", "keyword.control", "keyword.return", "keyword.function",
112|b5f364|             "keyword.operator", "keyword.import", "keyword.storage", "keyword.type":
113|2a47e8|            return UIColor(theme.keyword)
114|3070d1|            
115|ff8ced|        // Strings and string-like content
116|68affe|        case "string", "string.special", "string.escape", "string.regex":
117|0fca43|            return UIColor(theme.string)
118|3070d1|            
119|185d89|        // Comments
120|e5f3c4|        case "comment", "comment.line", "comment.block", "comment.documentation":
121|a49948|            return UIColor(theme.comment)
122|3070d1|            
123|ae064e|        // Functions and method calls
124|dc8626|        case "function", "function.call", "function.method", "function.builtin",
125|9d4a45|             "method", "method.call":
126|3ae348|            return UIColor(theme.function)
127|3070d1|            
128|b78fa4|        // Types, classes, and type-like constructs
129|16d91f|        case "type", "type.builtin", "type.definition", "type.qualifier",
130|d27e19|             "class", "struct", "enum", "interface", "namespace":
131|b0b48c|            return UIColor(theme.type)
132|3070d1|            
133|2d9b47|        // Variables and properties
134|547832|        case "variable", "variable.parameter", "variable.member",
135|a222a0|             "property", "property.definition", "field":
136|75c89a|            return UIColor(theme.variable)
137|3070d1|            
138|b3cd2e|        // Variable builtins (self, this, super)
139|371683|        case "variable.builtin", "variable.language":
140|4edd6d|            return UIColor(theme.keyword).withAlphaComponent(0.9)
141|3070d1|            
142|403047|        // Numbers and numeric constants
143|8a79e0|        case "number", "number.float", "float", "integer":
144|d74abb|            return UIColor(theme.number)
145|3070d1|            
146|e330b9|        // Constants
147|ef2663|        case "constant", "constant.builtin", "constant.character", "boolean":
148|d74abb|            return UIColor(theme.number)
149|3070d1|            
150|642bea|        // Constructors
151|549c6e|        case "constructor":

153|3070d1|            
154|791de8|        // Operators and punctuation
155|0d2ed8|        case "operator":

157|3070d1|            
158|552dcb|        case "punctuation", "punctuation.bracket", "punctuation.delimiter",
159|f5ebe1|             "punctuation.special":
160|38bc25|            return UIColor(theme.editorForeground).withAlphaComponent(0.8)
161|3070d1|            
162|3cffe4|        // Tags (HTML/XML)
163|89b399|        case "tag", "tag.builtin":
164|2a47e8|            return UIColor(theme.keyword)
165|3070d1|            
166|e7ed29|        // Attributes
167|75ac11|        case "attribute", "attribute.builtin":
168|3ae348|            return UIColor(theme.function)
169|3070d1|            
170|81d4a3|        // Labels
171|89a20f|        case "label":

173|3070d1|            
174|fae865|        // Embedded code (like template literals)
175|65616c|        case "embedded":

177|3070d1|

183|b4687f|    
184|e3e1f4|    /// Attempts to find a color by checking highlight name prefixes
185|9b4381|    private func textColorByPrefix(_ highlightName: String) -> UIColor? {
186|e47d48|        if highlightName.hasPrefix("keyword") {
187|2a47e8|            return UIColor(theme.keyword)
188|bce4e1|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("string") {
189|0fca43|            return UIColor(theme.string)
190|0bf6d3|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("comment") {
191|a49948|            return UIColor(theme.comment)
192|5a9db3|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("function") || highlightName.hasPrefix("method") {
193|3ae348|            return UIColor(theme.function)
194|8a3a4c|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("type") || highlightName.hasPrefix("class") {
195|b0b48c|            return UIColor(theme.type)
196|84c72c|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("variable") || highlightName.hasPrefix("property") {
197|75c89a|            return UIColor(theme.variable)
198|39995b|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("number") || highlightName.hasPrefix("constant") {
199|d74abb|            return UIColor(theme.number)
200|5f3077|        }
201|c2ae65|        return nil
202|27e597|    }
203|b4687f|

228|3e2b1f|        // Comments are italic

232|5845a7|        // Type definitions can be bold

255|f09a49|    func highlightedRange(
