102|fd2c33|    /// Returns the text color for a given Tree-sitter highlight name
103|a1869c|    /// - Parameter highlightName: The Tree-sitter capture name (e.g., "keyword", "string")
104|6ea7e8|    /// - Returns: The UIColor to use for that highlight, or nil for default color
105|3b58d8|    public func textColor(for highlightName: String) -> UIColor? {
106|695709|        // Handle compound highlight names like "keyword.return" by checking prefixes
107|76be7a|        let normalizedName = normalizeHighlightName(highlightName)
108|d6ed84|        
109|b15f72|        switch normalizedName {
110|0ada81|        // Keywords (control flow, storage, etc.)
111|be33b0|        case "keyword", "keyword.control", "keyword.return", "keyword.function",
112|b5f364|             "keyword.operator", "keyword.import", "keyword.storage", "keyword.type":
113|2a47e8|            return UIColor(theme.keyword)
114|3070d1|            
115|ff8ced|        // Strings and string-like content
116|68affe|        case "string", "string.special", "string.escape", "string.regex":
117|0fca43|            return UIColor(theme.string)
118|3070d1|            
119|185d89|        // Comments
120|e5f3c4|        case "comment", "comment.line", "comment.block", "comment.documentation":
121|a49948|            return UIColor(theme.comment)
122|3070d1|            
123|ae064e|        // Functions and method calls
124|dc8626|        case "function", "function.call", "function.method", "function.builtin",
125|9d4a45|             "method", "method.call":
126|3ae348|            return UIColor(theme.function)
127|3070d1|            
128|b78fa4|        // Types, classes, and type-like constructs
129|16d91f|        case "type", "type.builtin", "type.definition", "type.qualifier",
130|d27e19|             "class", "struct", "enum", "interface", "namespace":
131|b0b48c|            return UIColor(theme.type)
132|3070d1|            
133|2d9b47|        // Variables and properties
134|547832|        case "variable", "variable.parameter", "variable.member",
135|a222a0|             "property", "property.definition", "field":
136|75c89a|            return UIColor(theme.variable)
137|3070d1|            
138|b3cd2e|        // Variable builtins (self, this, super)
139|371683|        case "variable.builtin", "variable.language":
140|4edd6d|            return UIColor(theme.keyword).withAlphaComponent(0.9)
141|3070d1|            
142|403047|        // Numbers and numeric constants
143|8a79e0|        case "number", "number.float", "float", "integer":
144|d74abb|            return UIColor(theme.number)
145|3070d1|            
146|e330b9|        // Constants
147|ef2663|        case "constant", "constant.builtin", "constant.character", "boolean":
148|d74abb|            return UIColor(theme.number)
149|3070d1|            
150|642bea|        // Constructors
151|549c6e|        case "constructor":
152|3ae348|            return UIColor(theme.function)
153|3070d1|            
154|791de8|        // Operators and punctuation
155|0d2ed8|        case "operator":
156|e812ed|            return UIColor(theme.editorForeground)
157|3070d1|            
158|552dcb|        case "punctuation", "punctuation.bracket", "punctuation.delimiter",
159|f5ebe1|             "punctuation.special":
160|38bc25|            return UIColor(theme.editorForeground).withAlphaComponent(0.8)
161|3070d1|            
162|3cffe4|        // Tags (HTML/XML)
163|89b399|        case "tag", "tag.builtin":
164|2a47e8|            return UIColor(theme.keyword)
165|3070d1|            
166|e7ed29|        // Attributes
167|75ac11|        case "attribute", "attribute.builtin":
168|3ae348|            return UIColor(theme.function)
169|3070d1|            
170|81d4a3|        // Labels
171|89a20f|        case "label":
172|b0b48c|            return UIColor(theme.type)
173|3070d1|            
174|fae865|        // Embedded code (like template literals)
175|65616c|        case "embedded":
176|0fca43|            return UIColor(theme.string)
177|3070d1|            
178|520b7d|        default:
179|7dedca|            // For unrecognized names, try to match by prefix
180|82d8d0|            return textColorByPrefix(highlightName)
181|5f3077|        }
182|27e597|    }
183|b4687f|    
184|e3e1f4|    /// Attempts to find a color by checking highlight name prefixes
185|9b4381|    private func textColorByPrefix(_ highlightName: String) -> UIColor? {
186|e47d48|        if highlightName.hasPrefix("keyword") {
187|2a47e8|            return UIColor(theme.keyword)
188|bce4e1|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("string") {
189|0fca43|            return UIColor(theme.string)
190|0bf6d3|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("comment") {
191|a49948|            return UIColor(theme.comment)
192|5a9db3|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("function") || highlightName.hasPrefix("method") {
193|3ae348|            return UIColor(theme.function)
194|8a3a4c|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("type") || highlightName.hasPrefix("class") {
195|b0b48c|            return UIColor(theme.type)
196|84c72c|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("variable") || highlightName.hasPrefix("property") {
197|75c89a|            return UIColor(theme.variable)
198|39995b|        } else if highlightName.hasPrefix("number") || highlightName.hasPrefix("constant") {
199|d74abb|            return UIColor(theme.number)
200|5f3077|        }
201|c2ae65|        return nil
202|27e597|    }
203|b4687f|    
204|96c5f2|    /// Normalizes a highlight name by converting it to lowercase and trimming whitespace
205|fc42ae|    private func normalizeHighlightName(_ name: String) -> String {
206|ce55e6|        name.lowercased().trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
207|27e597|    }
208|b4687f|    
209|707871|    /// Returns the font for a given highlight name (optional override)
210|acc614|    /// - Parameter highlightName: The Tree-sitter capture name
211|340dcd|    /// - Returns: A custom font, or nil to use the default font
212|79ec99|    public func font(for highlightName: String) -> UIFont? {
213|daddc9|        // Use default font for all highlights - traits will modify it
214|c2ae65|        return nil
215|27e597|    }
216|b4687f|    
217|52ec87|    /// Returns font traits (bold, italic) for a given highlight name
218|acc614|    /// - Parameter highlightName: The Tree-sitter capture name
219|aa9604|    /// - Returns: FontTraits to apply to the text
220|bf5027|    public func fontTraits(for highlightName: String) -> FontTraits {
221|76be7a|        let normalizedName = normalizeHighlightName(highlightName)
222|d6ed84|        
223|b15f72|        switch normalizedName {
224|1a6b85|        // Keywords are bold
225|cb9891|        case let name where name.hasPrefix("keyword"):
226|7775b3|            return .bold
227|3070d1|            
228|3e2b1f|        // Comments are italic
229|008bed|        case let name where name.hasPrefix("comment"):
230|9ac334|            return .italic
231|3070d1|            
232|5845a7|        // Type definitions can be bold
233|eb95eb|        case "type.definition", "class", "struct", "enum", "interface":
234|7775b3|            return .bold
235|3070d1|            
236|925f99|        // Storage modifiers (static, const, etc.) are italic
237|d27d1d|        case "storage", "storage.modifier":
238|9ac334|            return .italic
239|3070d1|            
240|520b7d|        default:
241|b0f460|            return []
242|5f3077|        }
243|27e597|    }
244|b4687f|

249|9cadd8|        // No shadows by default - can be customized if needed

255|9181f7|    public func highlightedRange(

257|09a725|        ofStyle style: UITextSearchFoundTextStyle

8|711815|    case javascript = "javascript"

21|5b2161|    /// Returns true if the language can potentially run on-device
22|ed3041|    public var supportsOnDeviceExecution: Bool {
23|2e6d08|        switch self {
24|cd15d1|        case .javascript, .lua:
25|927510|            return true // JavaScriptCore available
26|9fa55d|        case .python:
27|7ad79e|            return false // Requires embedded Python or Pyodide
28|3347f4|        case .swift:

30|df946e|        case .typescript:
31|a2d703|            return true // Transpiles to JS
32|06bb56|        case .wasm:
33|ad407b|            return true // WebAssembly via WKWebView
34|f74e2b|        case .bash, .ruby, .php, .go, .rust, .unknown:
35|2d392c|            return false // Requires interpreter/compiler not on iOS
36|5f3077|        }
37|27e597|    }

43|620be7|        case .python: return ["py", "pyw"]
44|24d683|        case .swift: return ["swift"]
45|bf69f2|        case .typescript: return ["ts", "tsx"]

50|c5fd5f|        case .rust: return ["rs"]
51|14f8b7|        case .lua: return ["lua"]

57|89b9c5|    /// Detect language from file extension or code content
58|4e28f7|    public static func detect(from filename: String, code: String? = nil) -> Language {
59|98942b|        let ext = (filename as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
60|f60e4e|        switch ext {
61|0af4e0|        case "js", "mjs": return .javascript
62|20a752|        case "ts", "tsx": return .typescript
63|e1e2fb|        case "py", "pyw": return .python
64|6a01dc|        case "swift": return .swift
65|8ebeed|        case "sh", "bash": return .bash
66|56dccc|        case "rb": return .ruby
67|e8bfcf|        case "php": return .php
68|edae84|        case "go": return .go
69|714d49|        case "rs": return .rust
70|04dee0|        case "lua": return .lua
71|63cc2e|        case "wasm": return .wasm
72|520b7d|        default:
73|31e196|            // Try to detect from code heuristics
74|c06164|            if let code = code {
75|3ab5c9|                return detectFromCode(code)
76|a7dc16|            }
77|5062c2|            return .unknown
78|5f3077|        }
79|27e597|    }
80|b4687f|    
81|bd46dc|    private static func detectFromCode(_ code: String) -> Language {
82|05ac6a|        if code.contains("func ") && code.contains("{") && (code.contains("var ") || code.contains("let ")) {
83|ce5dbf|            return .swift
84|5f3077|        }
85|79b719|        if code.contains("def ") && code.contains(":") {
86|48afab|            return .python
87|5f3077|        }
88|bedde6|        if code.contains("function ") || code.contains("const ") || code.contains("let ") {
89|ddb75d|            if code.contains(": ") && code.contains("interface ") {
90|bbadbf|                return .typescript
91|a7dc16|            }
92|63d43b|            return .javascript
93|5f3077|        }
94|a7b1d4|        if code.contains("#!/bin/bash") || code.contains("#!/bin/sh") {
95|e62265|            return .bash
96|5f3077|        }
97|471f60|        return .unknown
98|27e597|    }

181|a83384|    public let name: String
182|cfb400|    public let status: FactorStatus
183|94eac9|    public let description: String
184|b4687f|    
185|f2a1a6|    public init(name: String, status: FactorStatus, description: String) {
186|b8025b|        self.name = name
187|55d357|        self.status = status
188|957e00|        self.description = description
189|27e597|    }
190|b31277|}
191|adc83b|
192|2c85e5|public enum FactorStatus: String, Sendable {
193|0ecb59|    case pass = "✅"
194|cc540e|    case warning = "⚠️"
195|61a970|    case fail = "❌"
196|b31277|}

198|695f9d|/// User preferences for execution

201|fab66f|    public var preferRemote: Bool
202|536b2f|    public var warnBeforeRemote: Bool
203|cb360f|    public var maxOnDeviceTimeSeconds: Double
204|e7f7f9|    public var maxOnDeviceMemoryMB: Double
205|b4687f|    
206|fb99ae|    public init(
207|7efe31|        preferOnDevice: Bool = true,

211|6f7a82|        maxOnDeviceMemoryMB: Double = 256.0
212|981e04|    ) {
213|7fab45|        self.preferOnDevice = preferOnDevice
214|9e7da1|        self.preferRemote = preferRemote
215|b60fb5|        self.warnBeforeRemote = warnBeforeRemote
216|b31206|        self.maxOnDeviceTimeSeconds = maxOnDeviceTimeSeconds
217|3e926f|        self.maxOnDeviceMemoryMB = maxOnDeviceMemoryMB
218|27e597|    }
219|b31277|}

221|1b2788|/// Configuration for the RunnerSelector

224|e7f7f9|    public var maxOnDeviceMemoryMB: Double

234|2c49d8|        allowFileSystemAccess: true

238|020144|        maxOnDeviceExecutionTime: TimeInterval = 30.0,

252|efbc0e|// MARK: - RunnerSelector
253|adc83b|
254|2ea47b|/// Intelligent runner selection that decides on-device vs remote execution
255|69d728|@MainActor
256|4a1612|public final class RunnerSelector: Sendable {
257|b4687f|    
258|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
259|b4687f|    
260|a360ee|    public var userPreferences: ExecutionPreferences
261|336f66|    public var configuration: RunnerConfiguration
262|ee35f9|    public var delegate: RunnerSelectorDelegate?
263|b4687f|    
264|7dca75|    // MARK: - Initialization
265|b4687f|    
266|fb99ae|    public init(
267|c43b28|        preferences: ExecutionPreferences = ExecutionPreferences(),
268|ad60dc|        configuration: RunnerConfiguration = .default
269|981e04|    ) {
270|a20738|        self.userPreferences = preferences
271|e62f56|        self.configuration = configuration
272|27e597|    }
273|b4687f|    
274|81c2c9|    // MARK: - Public Methods
275|b4687f|    
276|a9a1b6|    /// Analyzes code and determines the best execution strategy
277|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
278|1f5198|    ///   - code: The source code to analyze
279|a9d40f|    ///   - language: The programming language
280|34436c|    /// - Returns: Recommended execution strategy
281|e9562e|    public func analyze(code: String, language: Language) -> ExecutionStrategy {
282|36f4ee|        // Step 1: Check user preference overrides
283|d8949b|        if userPreferences.preferRemote {
284|7462a9|            return .remote(reason: "User preference for remote execution")
285|5f3077|        }
286|d6ed84|        
287|67c50e|        // Step 2: Check if language supports on-device execution at all
288|4a8dca|        if !language.supportsOnDeviceExecution {
289|2ce1cb|            return .remote(reason: "\(language.rawValue) requires remote interpreter")
290|5f3077|        }
291|d6ed84|        
292|5bddb9|        // Step 3: Estimate resource usage
293|103428|        let resourceEstimate = estimateResourceUsage(code: code, language: language)
294|d6ed84|        
295|866789|        // Step 4: Check for file system requirements
296|5f189b|        let requiresFileSystem = detectFileSystemAccess(code: code, language: language)
297|f6546e|        if requiresFileSystem && !configuration.allowFileSystemAccess {
298|831ece|            return .remote(reason: "File system access required but not allowed on-device")
299|5f3077|        }
300|d6ed84|        
301|a0460f|        // Step 5: Check for network requirements
302|a0de0e|        let requiresNetwork = detectNetworkAccess(code: code, language: language)
303|7ec4a5|        if requiresNetwork && !configuration.allowNetworkAccess {
304|a6a758|            return .remote(reason: "Network access required but not allowed on-device")
305|5f3077|        }
306|d6ed84|        
307|91a683|        // Step 6: Check resource limits
308|de90e5|        if resourceEstimate.exceedsOnDeviceLimits {
309|d1bef1|            let reason = buildLimitExceededReason(estimate: resourceEstimate)
310|a5b154|            return .remote(reason: reason)
311|5f3077|        }
312|d6ed84|        
313|1a4acd|        // Step 7: Check execution time against user preference
314|a0b704|        if resourceEstimate.estimatedTimeSeconds > userPreferences.maxOnDeviceTimeSeconds {
315|680bf5|            return .remote(reason: "Estimated execution time (\(Int(resourceEstimate.estimatedTimeSeconds))s) exceeds user limit")
316|5f3077|        }
317|d6ed84|        
318|bca17e|        // Step 8: Check code complexity
319|ee8203|        let complexity = calculateComplexityScore(code: code, language: language)
320|7e4e31|        if complexity > 100 {
321|6df5e2|            return .hybrid(analysisOnDevice: true, executionRemote: true)
322|5f3077|        }
323|d6ed84|        
324|012218|        // All checks passed - can run on-device
325|39c0ca|        return .onDevice
326|27e597|    }
327|b4687f|    
328|1e4529|    /// Determines if code can run on-device and provides detailed analysis
329|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
330|1f5198|    ///   - code: The source code to analyze
331|a9d40f|    ///   - language: The programming language
332|4372e4|    /// - Returns: Detailed execution result with factors
333|fe3de9|    public func canRunOnDevice(code: String, language: Language) -> DeviceExecutionResult {
334|b35fba|        var factors: [ExecutionFactor] = []
335|d6ed84|        
336|75ad74|        // Language support check
337|de5c51|        if language.supportsOnDeviceExecution {
338|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
339|8ddf61|                name: "Language Support",
340|365222|                status: .pass,
341|8c3934|                description: "\(language.rawValue) supports on-device execution"
342|30ec32|            ))
343|b31999|        } else {
344|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
345|8ddf61|                name: "Language Support",
346|1a38e1|                status: .fail,
347|c35789|                description: "\(language.rawValue) requires remote execution"
348|30ec32|            ))
349|5f3077|        }
350|d6ed84|        
351|e5dbc4|        // Resource estimation
352|c429ad|        let resources = estimateResourceUsage(code: code, language: language)
353|1e73f8|        if resources.exceedsOnDeviceLimits {
354|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
355|e64804|                name: "Resource Usage",
356|1a38e1|                status: .fail,
357|f49cb2|                description: "Exceeds on-device limits (time: \(Int(resources.estimatedTimeSeconds))s, memory: \(Int(resources.estimatedMemoryMB))MB)"
358|30ec32|            ))
359|b31999|        } else {
360|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
361|e64804|                name: "Resource Usage",
362|365222|                status: .pass,
363|77b784|                description: "Within on-device limits"
364|30ec32|            ))
365|5f3077|        }
366|d6ed84|        
367|6c13ad|        // Dependencies check
368|8d9074|        let dependencies = analyzeDependencies(code: code, language: language)
369|7bc240|        if dependencies.isEmpty {
370|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
371|044bd3|                name: "Dependencies",
372|365222|                status: .pass,
373|2ab7f9|                description: "No external dependencies detected"
374|30ec32|            ))
375|b31999|        } else {
376|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
377|044bd3|                name: "Dependencies",
378|11070c|                status: .warning,
379|409563|                description: "Detected dependencies: \(dependencies.joined(separator: ", "))"
380|30ec32|            ))
381|5f3077|        }
382|d6ed84|        
383|5e7230|        // Network check
384|f7a506|        let network = detectNetworkAccess(code: code, language: language)
385|00a6a9|        if network {
386|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
387|b0706c|                name: "Network Access",
388|97a453|                status: configuration.allowNetworkAccess ? .warning : .fail,
389|a63ea4|                description: configuration.allowNetworkAccess ? "Network access detected" : "Network access not allowed on-device"
390|30ec32|            ))
391|b31999|        } else {
392|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
393|b0706c|                name: "Network Access",
394|365222|                status: .pass,
395|76d0d2|                description: "No network access required"
396|30ec32|            ))
397|5f3077|        }
398|d6ed84|        
399|bd76c2|        // File system check
400|3e4c0f|        let fileSystem = detectFileSystemAccess(code: code, language: language)
401|56c45e|        if fileSystem {
402|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
403|add843|                name: "File System",
404|a54427|                status: configuration.allowFileSystemAccess ? .warning : .fail,
405|f98595|                description: configuration.allowFileSystemAccess ? "File system access detected" : "File system access restricted"
406|30ec32|            ))
407|b31999|        } else {
408|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
409|add843|                name: "File System",
410|365222|                status: .pass,
411|c7d4c9|                description: "No file system access required"
412|30ec32|            ))
413|5f3077|        }
414|d6ed84|        
415|cb6db1|        // Complexity check
416|ee8203|        let complexity = calculateComplexityScore(code: code, language: language)
417|7e4e31|        if complexity > 100 {
418|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
419|dc79ef|                name: "Code Complexity",
420|11070c|                status: .warning,
421|716c54|                description: "High complexity score: \(complexity)"
422|30ec32|            ))
423|b31999|        } else {
424|934c75|            factors.append(ExecutionFactor(
425|dc79ef|                name: "Code Complexity",
426|365222|                status: .pass,
427|2838e4|                description: "Complexity score: \(complexity)"
428|30ec32|            ))
429|5f3077|        }
430|d6ed84|        
431|703083|        let strategy = analyze(code: code, language: language)
432|296906|        let isHybrid: Bool
433|73b0e1|        if case .hybrid = strategy { isHybrid = true } else { isHybrid = false }
434|8a7779|        let canRun = strategy == .onDevice || (isHybrid && factors.allSatisfy { $0.status != .fail })
435|d6ed84|        
436|86ac69|        return DeviceExecutionResult(
437|1a5d1a|            canRunOnDevice: canRun,
438|e7d056|            recommendedStrategy: strategy,
439|da62d6|            factors: factors,
440|5b0d9d|            resourceEstimate: resources
441|3143a4|        )
442|27e597|    }
443|b4687f|    
444|d8542a|    /// Estimates resource usage for the given code
445|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
446|378f16|    ///   - code: The source code
447|a9d40f|    ///   - language: The programming language
448|07aeb1|    /// - Returns: Resource estimate
449|a5ae00|    public func estimateResourceUsage(code: String, language: Language) -> ResourceEstimate {
450|7fa1d4|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines).count
451|3a2a94|        let characters = code.count
452|d6ed84|        
453|021338|        // Base estimates
454|d5777f|        var timeEstimate = Double(lines) * 0.01 // 10ms per line baseline
455|145fb6|        var memoryEstimate = Double(characters) * 0.001 // 1KB per 1000 chars
456|b1e634|        var cpuEstimate = 0.3
457|18df1b|        var hasExternalDeps = false
458|7fc726|        var requiresNetwork = false
459|55701b|        var requiresFileSystem = false
460|d6ed84|        
461|f445aa|        // Language-specific adjustments
462|f3155b|        switch language {
463|47baba|        case .javascript:
464|5b5f6b|            // Check for complex operations
465|8954eb|            if code.contains("while(true)") || code.contains("for(;;)") {
466|ffde62|                timeEstimate *= 10
467|4a0d47|                cpuEstimate = 1.0
468|a7dc16|            }
469|6258ea|            // Check for large data structures
470|397925|            if code.contains("new Array(1000000)") || code.contains("Array(1000000)") {
471|712430|                memoryEstimate += 8.0 // ~8MB for million element array
472|a7dc16|            }
473|3070d1|            
474|9fa55d|        case .python:
475|cc0433|            // Python typically needs more memory
476|5b850d|            memoryEstimate *= 1.5
477|90ef2b|            if code.contains("import numpy") || code.contains("import pandas") {
478|4b23f0|                memoryEstimate += 100.0
479|118049|                hasExternalDeps = true
480|a7dc16|            }
481|3070d1|            
482|3347f4|        case .swift:
483|ae089e|            // Swift compilation time
484|dde790|            timeEstimate += 2.0
485|78701d|            memoryEstimate *= 1.2
486|3070d1|            
487|520b7d|        default:
488|4c03e4|            break
489|5f3077|        }
490|d6ed84|        
491|9dd287|        // Check for network operations
492|5fc077|        requiresNetwork = detectNetworkAccess(code: code, language: language)
493|d6ed84|        
494|775440|        // Check for file operations
495|dc04f3|        requiresFileSystem = detectFileSystemAccess(code: code, language: language)
496|d6ed84|        
497|71bfc0|        // Check for external dependencies
498|170680|        let deps = analyzeDependencies(code: code, language: language)
499|a4b061|        hasExternalDeps = !deps.isEmpty
500|d6ed84|        
501|18749d|        return ResourceEstimate(
502|fe38e9|            estimatedTimeSeconds: min(timeEstimate, 300.0), // Cap at 5 minutes
503|c3b660|            estimatedMemoryMB: min(memoryEstimate, 2048.0), // Cap at 2GB
504|09bb7c|            estimatedCPUUsage: min(cpuEstimate, 1.0),
505|a91993|            hasExternalDependencies: hasExternalDeps,
506|0ec9ee|            requiresNetwork: requiresNetwork,
507|7f678e|            requiresFileSystem: requiresFileSystem
508|3143a4|        )
509|27e597|    }
510|b4687f|    
511|049941|    // MARK: - Private Methods
512|b4687f|    
513|f40b05|    /// Calculate complexity score based on code analysis
514|cb1c5f|    private func calculateComplexityScore(code: String, language: Language) -> Int {
515|268b95|        var score = 0
516|d6ed84|        
517|5e39ae|        // Lines of code
518|7fa1d4|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines).count
519|fe3748|        score += lines / 10 // 1 point per 10 lines
520|d6ed84|        
521|d53ec1|        // Control flow complexity
522|bad9a4|        let controlFlowPatterns = [
523|2e3177|            "if", "else", "switch", "case", "for", "while", "do",
524|7744e8|            "try", "catch", "finally", "guard", "defer"
525|220505|        ]
526|f786bd|        for pattern in controlFlowPatterns {
527|46eab4|            score += code.components(separatedBy: pattern).count - 1
528|5f3077|        }
529|d6ed84|        
530|71c52a|        // Nesting depth (approximate)
531|39d63a|        let braceCount = code.filter { $0 == "{" }.count
532|c62b86|        score += braceCount / 3
533|d6ed84|        
534|7a6e9e|        // Function/method count
535|f3155b|        switch language {
536|1cbd06|        case .javascript, .typescript:
537|fdcf43|            score += code.components(separatedBy: "function ").count - 1
538|c26521|            score += code.components(separatedBy: "=> ").count - 1
539|9fa55d|        case .python:
540|84d85c|            score += code.components(separatedBy: "def ").count - 1
541|3347f4|        case .swift:
542|13df58|            score += code.components(separatedBy: "func ").count - 1
543|520b7d|        default:
544|4c03e4|            break
545|5f3077|        }
546|d6ed84|        
547|51b0fb|        // API calls (external complexity)
548|3ba188|        let apiPatterns = ["fetch(", "XMLHttpRequest", "URLSession", "AF.request", "Alamofire"]
549|fd6ed2|        for pattern in apiPatterns {
550|46eab4|            score += code.components(separatedBy: pattern).count - 1
551|5f3077|        }
552|d6ed84|        
553|c07521|        return score
554|27e597|    }
555|b4687f|    
556|282614|    /// Detect imports/requires to find external dependencies
557|cf7aa0|    private func analyzeDependencies(code: String, language: Language) -> [String] {
558|88f7af|        var dependencies: [String] = []
559|d6ed84|        
560|f3155b|        switch language {
561|1cbd06|        case .javascript, .typescript:
562|61cd6d|            // ES6 imports
563|ff56c1|            let importRegex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"import\s+(?:{[^}]+}|\*?\s+as\s+\w+|\w+)\s+from\s+['"]([^'"]+)['"]"#, options: [])
564|870e63|            let importMatches = importRegex?.matches(in: code, options: [], range: NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)) ?? []
565|5e345d|            for match in importMatches {
566|70b497|                if let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: code) {
567|a57e9e|                    dependencies.append(String(code[range]))
568|4e2d32|                }
569|a7dc16|            }
570|3070d1|            
571|21b0e4|            // CommonJS requires
572|4c919b|            let requireRegex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"require\s*\(\s*['"]([^'"]+)['"]\s*\)"#, options: [])
573|adfe59|            let requireMatches = requireRegex?.matches(in: code, options: [], range: NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)) ?? []
574|eeb0f8|            for match in requireMatches {
575|70b497|                if let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: code) {
576|a57e9e|                    dependencies.append(String(code[range]))
577|4e2d32|                }
578|a7dc16|            }
579|3070d1|            
580|9fa55d|        case .python:
581|a74742|            // Python imports
582|c43333|            let importRegex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"^\s*(?:import|from)\s+(\w+)"#, options: [.anchorsMatchLines])
583|236390|            let matches = importRegex?.matches(in: code, options: [], range: NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)) ?? []
584|7c58fe|            for match in matches {
585|70b497|                if let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: code) {
586|05cd71|                    let module = String(code[range])
587|0d324c|                    // Filter out standard library
588|4c2dfc|                    let stdLib = ["os", "sys", "json", "math", "random", "datetime", "collections", "itertools", "functools"]
589|c3522c|                    if !stdLib.contains(module) {
590|ff894e|                        dependencies.append(module)
591|c9717a|                    }
592|4e2d32|                }
593|a7dc16|            }
594|3070d1|            
595|3347f4|        case .swift:
596|665fed|            // Swift imports
597|2b052a|            let importRegex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: #"^\s*import\s+(\w+)"#, options: [.anchorsMatchLines])
598|236390|            let matches = importRegex?.matches(in: code, options: [], range: NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)) ?? []
599|7c58fe|            for match in matches {
600|70b497|                if let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: code) {
601|05cd71|                    let module = String(code[range])
602|0d324c|                    // Filter out standard library
603|4f1ce9|                    let stdLib = ["Foundation", "Swift", "Dispatch"]
604|c3522c|                    if !stdLib.contains(module) {
605|ff894e|                        dependencies.append(module)
606|c9717a|                    }
607|4e2d32|                }
608|a7dc16|            }
609|3070d1|            
610|520b7d|        default:
611|4c03e4|            break
612|5f3077|        }
613|d6ed84|        
614|339f3e|        return dependencies
615|27e597|    }
616|b4687f|    
617|cbc39a|    /// Detect file system access patterns
618|fd6689|    private func detectFileSystemAccess(code: String, language: Language) -> Bool {
619|f3155b|        switch language {
620|1cbd06|        case .javascript, .typescript:
621|2e366c|            let patterns = ["fs.readFile", "fs.writeFile", "require('fs')", "import.*fs", "FileReader"]
622|f940c3|            return patterns.contains { code.contains($0) }
623|3070d1|            
624|9fa55d|        case .python:
625|84f076|            let patterns = ["open(", "os.path", "pathlib", "shutil", "with open"]
626|f940c3|            return patterns.contains { code.contains($0) }
627|3070d1|            
628|3347f4|        case .swift:
629|5d4c8c|            let patterns = ["FileManager", "NSData(contentsOfFile:", "String(contentsOfFile:", "FileHandle"]
630|f940c3|            return patterns.contains { code.contains($0) }
631|3070d1|            
632|528e1b|        case .bash:
633|924093|            return true // Bash almost always uses file system
634|3070d1|            
635|520b7d|        default:
636|e2e187|            return false
637|5f3077|        }
638|27e597|    }
639|b4687f|    
640|4286f7|    /// Detect network access patterns
641|3e2f30|    private func detectNetworkAccess(code: String, language: Language) -> Bool {
642|f3155b|        switch language {
643|1cbd06|        case .javascript, .typescript:
644|167191|            let patterns = [
645|7ac6f0|                "fetch(", "XMLHttpRequest", "axios", "$.ajax", "$.get", "$.post",
646|2a345d|                "request(", "require('http')", "require('https')", "new WebSocket",
647|4b211e|                "navigator.sendBeacon", "EventSource"
648|324820|            ]
649|f940c3|            return patterns.contains { code.contains($0) }
650|3070d1|            
651|9fa55d|        case .python:
652|19606a|            let patterns = ["import requests", "import urllib", "import http", "socket.socket", "urlopen"]
653|f940c3|            return patterns.contains { code.contains($0) }
654|3070d1|            
655|3347f4|        case .swift:
656|70bde8|            let patterns = ["URLSession", "URLRequest", "Alamofire", "AF.request"]
657|f940c3|            return patterns.contains { code.contains($0) }
658|3070d1|            
659|528e1b|        case .bash:
660|2dd898|            let patterns = ["curl", "wget", "ssh", "scp", "ftp"]
661|f940c3|            return patterns.contains { code.contains($0) }
662|3070d1|            
663|520b7d|        default:
664|e2e187|            return false
665|5f3077|        }
666|27e597|    }
667|b4687f|    
668|a03740|    /// Build a descriptive reason for why limits were exceeded
669|2ba9a8|    private func buildLimitExceededReason(estimate: ResourceEstimate) -> String {
670|b8f5e6|        var reasons: [String] = []
671|d6ed84|        
672|1d942a|        if estimate.estimatedTimeSeconds > 30 {
673|5a5ed2|            reasons.append("long execution time (\(Int(estimate.estimatedTimeSeconds))s)")
674|5f3077|        }
675|442b8c|        if estimate.estimatedMemoryMB > 256 {
676|b6d668|            reasons.append("high memory usage (\(Int(estimate.estimatedMemoryMB))MB)")
677|5f3077|        }
678|d733bb|        if estimate.hasExternalDependencies {
679|f6f404|            reasons.append("external dependencies required")
680|5f3077|        }
681|68f370|        if estimate.requiresNetwork {
682|06c85a|            reasons.append("network access required")
683|5f3077|        }
684|d6ed84|        
685|f23f42|        return reasons.isEmpty ? "Resource limits exceeded" : reasons.joined(separator: ", ")
686|27e597|    }
687|b31277|}
688|adc83b|
689|790072|// MARK: - Delegate Protocol
690|adc83b|
691|1464e5|/// Protocol for receiving runner selection events
692|83f68a|public protocol RunnerSelectorDelegate: AnyObject {
693|dcf1d0|    /// Called when remote execution is required
694|f41131|    func runnerSelector(_ selector: RunnerSelector, requiresRemoteExecution reason: String, for code: String)
695|b4687f|    
696|210e45|    /// Called when on-device execution is selected
697|1fcf65|    func runnerSelector(_ selector: RunnerSelector, willExecuteOnDevice code: String)
698|b4687f|    
699|9d9b39|    /// Called when execution strategy is determined
700|183001|    func runnerSelector(_ selector: RunnerSelector, selectedStrategy: ExecutionStrategy, for code: String)
701|b31277|}
702|adc83b|
703|eb33bc|// MARK: - Convenience Extensions
704|adc83b|
705|1d4e08|public extension RunnerSelector {
706|a76e29|    /// Quick check if code should run remotely
707|093f67|    func shouldRunRemotely(code: String, language: Language) -> Bool {
708|703083|        let strategy = analyze(code: code, language: language)
709|f18e06|        if case .remote = strategy {
710|40cfc4|            return true
711|5f3077|        }
712|dc1500|        return false
713|27e597|    }
714|b4687f|    
715|7198d9|    /// Get execution strategy with formatted explanation
716|04dbad|    func analyzeWithExplanation(code: String, language: Language) -> (strategy: ExecutionStrategy, explanation: String) {
717|3ae7a7|        let result = canRunOnDevice(code: code, language: language)
718|d6ed84|        
719|31824e|        var explanation = "Execution Analysis:\n"
720|9cd92c|        explanation += "Strategy: \(result.recommendedStrategy.description)\n"
721|0d2869|        explanation += "Can run on-device: \(result.canRunOnDevice ? "Yes" : "No")\n\n"
722|3b2cfd|        explanation += "Factors:\n"
723|684bbf|        for factor in result.factors {
724|af0821|            explanation += "  \(factor.status.rawValue) \(factor.name): \(factor.description)\n"
725|5f3077|        }
726|1474e7|        explanation += "\nResource Estimate:\n"
727|fc8352|        explanation += "  Time: \(Int(result.resourceEstimate.estimatedTimeSeconds))s\n"
728|d75dfd|        explanation += "  Memory: \(Int(result.resourceEstimate.estimatedMemoryMB))MB\n"
729|427900|        explanation += "  CPU: \(Int(result.resourceEstimate.estimatedCPUUsage * 100))%\n"
730|d6ed84|        
731|058b2d|        return (result.recommendedStrategy, explanation)
732|27e597|    }
733|b31277|}
734|adc83b|
735|950eba|// MARK: - Usage Examples
736|adc83b|
737|32ca1a|/*
738|991d9c| // Example 1: Basic usage
739|f1ee82| let selector = RunnerSelector()
740|8b2d61| let strategy = selector.analyze(code: "console.log('Hello')", language: .javascript)
741|403835| // Returns: .onDevice
742|dd1225| 
743|307147| // Example 2: Network access requires remote
744|69cc90| let strategy = selector.analyze(
745|13f75d|     code: "fetch('https://api.example.com')",
746|9ad517|     language: .javascript
747|c37227| )
748|40f8b6| // Returns: .remote(reason: "Network access required but not allowed on-device")
749|dd1225| 
750|247be3| // Example 3: Detailed analysis
751|2c6479| let result = selector.canRunOnDevice(
752|ddec13|     code: "import numpy; print('test')",
753|3e9b5d|     language: .python
754|c37227| )
755|7a7463| // result.canRunOnDevice = false
756|8b806d| // result.factors contains warnings about Python not being available
757|dd1225| 
758|5092f3| // Example 4: With user preferences
759|c0523c| let preferences = ExecutionPreferences(
760|751ea3|     preferOnDevice: true,
761|ce66f0|     warnBeforeRemote: true,
762|e53b22|     maxOnDeviceTimeSeconds: 5.0
763|c37227| )
764|f8ce0b| let selector = RunnerSelector(preferences: preferences)
765|dd1225| 
766|b36628| // Example 5: Using delegate
767|9895ad| class ExecutionCoordinator: RunnerSelectorDelegate {
768|89dc6e|     func runnerSelector(_ selector: RunnerSelector, requiresRemoteExecution reason: String, for code: String) {
769|9bade8|         showRemoteExecutionWarning(reason: reason)
770|48082f|     }
771|8f1f4b|     
772|6dc5ad|     func runnerSelector(_ selector: RunnerSelector, willExecuteOnDevice code: String) {
773|16c4b5|         showLoadingIndicator()
774|48082f|     }
775|02e5c8| }
776|dd1225| 
777|f1ee82| let selector = RunnerSelector()
778|1d1494| selector.delegate = coordinator
779|dd1225| 
780|43cef1| // Example 6: Resource estimation
781|bb02df| let estimate = selector.estimateResourceUsage(
782|d6336f|     code: largeScript,
783|9ad517|     language: .javascript
784|c37227| )
785|8f8173| print("Estimated: \(estimate.estimatedTimeSeconds)s, \(estimate.estimatedMemoryMB)MB")
786|dd1225| 
787|5245b8| // Example 7: With formatted explanation
788|f3ca15| let (strategy, explanation) = selector.analyzeWithExplanation(
789|a1fa5c|     code: code,
790|4bfba8|     language: .swift
791|c37227| )
792|9f6b72| print(explanation) // Human-readable analysis
793|d48ab4| */
794|adc83b|

12|35544c|// MARK: - Supported Languages
13|adc83b|
14|211545|/// Languages the app knows how to route to an execution backend.

16|6d618f|/// - Note: On-device execution is currently supported for **JavaScript only**.
17|b9f598|///         Other languages (python, swift, go, rust, etc.) are **remote-only**.
18|1494b8|enum SupportedLanguage: String, CaseIterable, Sendable {
19|8dc4c3|    // On-device supported
20|711815|    case javascript = "javascript"
21|adc83b|
22|1ae5ca|    // Remote-only (via SSH RemoteRunner)
23|efcbf5|    case swift = "swift"
24|45eeb0|    case python = "python"
25|f29a6e|    case python3 = "python3"
26|c65f4d|    case node = "node"
27|100b23|    case typescript = "typescript"
28|79ac44|    case ruby = "ruby"
29|be7aa6|    case bash = "bash"
30|18807b|    case sh = "sh"
31|f0ce1a|    case zsh = "zsh"
32|67d38c|    case php = "php"
33|c04123|    case go = "go"
34|62f77b|    case rust = "rust"
35|e7f22e|    case java = "java"
36|014623|    case kotlin = "kotlin"
37|594a38|    case cpp = "c++"
38|9336a5|    case c = "c"
39|96ff93|    case csharp = "csharp"
40|994bed|    case perl = "perl"
41|4247bc|    case lua = "lua"
42|338655|    case r = "r"
43|508750|    case objc = "objc"
44|adc83b|
45|1a5f59|    static let onDeviceSupported: Set<SupportedLanguage> = [.javascript]
46|749d54|    static let remoteOnly: Set<SupportedLanguage> = Set(Self.allCases).subtracting(Self.onDeviceSupported)
47|b31277|}
48|adc83b|
49|efbc0e|// MARK: - RunnerSelector
50|adc83b|
51|69d728|@MainActor
52|85be92|final class RunnerSelector: ObservableObject {
53|adc83b|
54|fd093e|    private let remoteRunner: RemoteRunner = RemoteRunner()
55|adc83b|
56|315b4e|    /// Returns `true` iff the language can run on-device.
57|2cbc84|    ///
58|86936b|    /// - Important: Only **javascript** is supported on-device.
59|2c2cdf|    func canRunOnDevice(language: String) -> Bool {
60|dfd6cd|        let normalized = normalize(language)
61|d64c36|        return normalized == SupportedLanguage.javascript.rawValue
62|27e597|    }
63|adc83b|
64|e73f28|    /// Selects which execution target should be used for a file.
65|9c5c87|    func selectRunner(for file: String, preferOnDevice: Bool) -> ExecutionTarget {
66|cab72f|        guard preferOnDevice else { return .remote }
67|adc83b|
68|410704|        if let language = languageForFile(file) {
69|aa4ddb|            return canRunOnDevice(language: language.rawValue) ? .onDevice : .remote
70|5f3077|        }
71|adc83b|
72|3dd06a|        return .remote
73|27e597|    }
74|adc83b|
75|596235|    /// Returns an on-device runner for the provided language if available.
76|2cbc84|    ///
77|b4d86a|    /// - Note: On-device is currently **JavaScript only**.
78|940977|    func getOnDeviceRunner(for language: String) -> (any CodeRunner)? {
79|ec358d|        guard canRunOnDevice(language: language) else { return nil }
80|d353d8|        // Current on-device implementation uses the JS mock runner which conforms to the shared CodeRunner protocol.
81|ef96dc|        return MockJSRunner()
82|27e597|    }
83|adc83b|
84|ff9b62|    /// Returns the shared remote runner.
85|d8289b|    func getRemoteRunner() -> RemoteRunner {
86|0b8a3a|        remoteRunner
87|27e597|    }
88|adc83b|
89|ee02fb|    // MARK: - Helpers
90|adc83b|
91|7ee4bd|    private func normalize(_ language: String) -> String {
92|6436f5|        let trimmed = language.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines).lowercased()
93|5bf827|        switch trimmed {
94|ee3fc6|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs":
95|fbfb5d|            return "javascript"
96|520b7d|        default:
97|868c3a|            return trimmed
98|5f3077|        }
99|27e597|    }
100|adc83b|
101|ce8ee5|    private func languageForFile(_ file: String) -> SupportedLanguage? {
102|dec58c|        let ext = (file as NSString).pathExtension.lowercased()
103|f60e4e|        switch ext {
104|ee3fc6|        case "js", "mjs", "cjs":
105|63d43b|            return .javascript
106|048ca0|        case "ts", "tsx":
107|aa8f54|            return .typescript
108|85dfd3|        case "py", "pyw", "pyi":
109|48afab|            return .python
110|1c8542|        case "swift":
111|ce5dbf|            return .swift
112|ee50e6|        case "go":
113|25b895|            return .go
114|c28591|        case "rs":
115|60ea5d|            return .rust
116|c53984|        case "rb":
117|dc8932|            return .ruby
118|e14c20|        case "sh":
119|e62265|            return .bash
120|d5369e|        case "zsh":
121|0f4e2a|            return .zsh
122|01aff6|        case "php":
123|145ec7|            return .php
124|a547fd|        case "java":
125|23e43b|            return .java
126|90fc25|        case "kt":
127|1a6624|            return .kotlin
128|e2afd5|        case "cpp", "cc", "cxx", "hpp", "hh":
129|d82d05|            return .cpp
130|503c08|        case "c", "h":
131|38860c|            return .c
132|4d33d4|        case "cs":
133|c0a53e|            return .csharp
134|a2e5a3|        case "pl", "pm":
135|3b936c|            return .perl
136|fb7046|        case "lua":
137|16ab36|            return .lua
138|7b9c34|        case "r":
139|55150e|            return .r
140|676398|        case "m", "mm":
141|f0f3bf|            return .objc
142|520b7d|        default:
143|1c8557|            return nil
144|5f3077|        }
145|27e597|    }

150|116968|    public func addToHistory(_ query: SearchQuery) {

153|adc83b|

202|3d4464|    /// Search files under `rootURL`.
203|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:

207|0fd45c|    @MainActor

211|f0416e|        lastError = nil
212|8ff3fb|        results = []
213|ba9370|        progress = 0
214|adc83b|
215|bdac63|        let trimmed = query.text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
216|658bd9|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else {
217|18af28|            lastError = SearchError.emptyQuery.localizedDescription
218|bef5d6|            return
219|5f3077|        }
220|adc83b|
221|ebf179|        // update history immediately
222|4dd67e|        addToHistory(query)
223|adc83b|
224|7657bd|        cancelSearch()
225|b31e9e|        isSearching = true
226|adc83b|
227|2a4395|        let q = SearchQuery(text: trimmed,
228|827ce5|                            options: query.options,
229|407261|                            includeGlobs: query.includeGlobs,
230|9388a1|                            excludeGlobs: query.excludeGlobs)
231|adc83b|
232|9880df|        searchTask = Task.detached(priority: .userInitiated) { [weak self] in
233|bd7394|            guard let self else { return }
234|71cc09|            do {
235|030fd6|                let resolvedFiles = try self.resolveFiles(rootURL: rootURL, provided: fileURLs, query: q)
236|58e6ab|                let total = max(resolvedFiles.count, 1)
237|adc83b|
238|5b0c43|                var aggregated: [FileMatch] = []
239|5780de|                for (idx, url) in resolvedFiles.enumerated() {
240|257e20|                    try Task.checkCancellation()
241|bba096|                    if let match = try self.searchFile(url: url, rootURL: rootURL, query: q), !match.matches.isEmpty {
242|3c1aaf|                        aggregated.append(match)
243|c9717a|                    }
244|8080d2|                    let p = Double(idx + 1) / Double(total)
245|72e736|                    await MainActor.run {
246|a74df1|                        self.progress = p
247|c9717a|                    }
248|4e2d32|                }
249|adc83b|
250|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
251|3dcd82|                    self.results = aggregated
252|5abc40|                    self.isSearching = false
253|1050b1|                    self.progress = 1
254|4e2d32|                }
255|57e5c6|            } catch is CancellationError {
256|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
257|5abc40|                    self.isSearching = false
258|4e2d32|                }
259|91b9a2|            } catch {
260|41f488|                await MainActor.run {
261|f47429|                    self.lastError = error.localizedDescription
262|5abc40|                    self.isSearching = false
263|4e2d32|                }
264|a7dc16|            }
265|5f3077|        }
266|27e597|    }
267|adc83b|
268|6a4efe|    // MARK: - Replace in files
269|adc83b|
270|53a2b3|    /// Replace occurrences for `query` with `replacement` under `rootURL`.
271|81d5d9|    /// Returns counts per file.
272|c8dd7c|    public func replace(in rootURL: URL,
273|bfd124|                        query: SearchQuery,
274|a58963|                        replacement: String,
275|bba210|                        fileURLs: [URL]? = nil) async throws -> ReplaceResult {
276|bdac63|        let trimmed = query.text.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
277|6acc1c|        guard !trimmed.isEmpty else { throw SearchError.emptyQuery }
278|adc83b|
279|2a4395|        let q = SearchQuery(text: trimmed,
280|827ce5|                            options: query.options,
281|407261|                            includeGlobs: query.includeGlobs,
282|9388a1|                            excludeGlobs: query.excludeGlobs)
283|adc83b|
284|071e09|        // Pre-compile pattern.
285|08cce0|        let compiled = try compilePattern(for: q)
286|adc83b|
287|53fc4b|        let resolvedFiles = try resolveFiles(rootURL: rootURL, provided: fileURLs, query: q)
288|94cda5|        var perFile: [ReplaceResult.PerFile] = []
289|43c9e8|        perFile.reserveCapacity(resolvedFiles.count)
290|adc83b|
291|0241e1|        var totalReplacements = 0
292|4bd1b6|        var filesTouched = 0
293|adc83b|
294|9a2d93|        for url in resolvedFiles {
295|8c8e63|            try Task.checkCancellation()
296|28fec5|            let (changed, reps) = try replaceInFile(url: url, compiled: compiled, replacement: replacement)
297|cd8fb1|            if changed {
298|4f3e48|                filesTouched += 1
299|7541a4|                totalReplacements += reps
300|f98c81|                perFile.append(.init(filePath: url.path, replacements: reps))
301|a7dc16|            }
302|5f3077|        }
303|adc83b|
304|9d1002|        return ReplaceResult(filesTouched: filesTouched,
305|e59e21|                             replacements: totalReplacements,
306|dcee4f|                             fileResults: perFile)
307|27e597|    }
308|adc83b|
309|7de015|    // MARK: - File enumeration + filtering
310|adc83b|
311|e3e05b|    private func resolveFiles(rootURL: URL, provided: [URL]?, query: SearchQuery) throws -> [URL] {
312|657d5a|        let all: [URL]
313|070c1c|        if let provided {
314|cc4ad8|            all = provided
315|b31999|        } else {
316|eb4c22|            all = try enumerateFiles(rootURL: rootURL)
317|5f3077|        }
318|97b3ce|        return all.filter { url in
319|f40362|            guard url.isFileURL else { return false }
320|b4ebdb|            let path = url.path
321|bfd9c6|            if matchesAnyGlob(path: path, globs: query.excludeGlobs) { return false }
322|1d0527|            if query.includeGlobs.isEmpty { return true }
323|994605|            return matchesAnyGlob(path: path, globs: query.includeGlobs)
324|5f3077|        }
325|27e597|    }
326|adc83b|
327|23fd14|    private func enumerateFiles(rootURL: URL) throws -> [URL] {
328|460d36|        let fm = FileManager.default
329|613364|        guard let enumerator = fm.enumerator(at: rootURL,
330|9e7a04|                                            includingPropertiesForKeys: [.isRegularFileKey, .isDirectoryKey],
331|03774c|                                            options: [.skipsHiddenFiles],
332|5fc71e|                                            errorHandler: { _, _ in true }) else {
333|b0f460|            return []
334|5f3077|        }
335|adc83b|
336|f2b1f2|        var urls: [URL] = []
337|3377e0|        for case let url as URL in enumerator {
338|0491f5|            let values = try? url.resourceValues(forKeys: [.isRegularFileKey, .isDirectoryKey])
339|2a536d|            if values?.isDirectory == true { continue }
340|1ba475|            if values?.isRegularFile == true {
341|d82ffc|                urls.append(url)
342|a7dc16|            }
343|5f3077|        }
344|a10f36|        return urls
345|27e597|    }
346|adc83b|
347|3e8d6c|    // MARK: - Actual searching
348|adc83b|
349|73077d|    private struct CompiledPattern {
350|2ac01d|        enum Kind {
351|d75daa|            case regex(NSRegularExpression)
352|1637f8|            case literal(needle: String, compareLowercased: Bool, wholeWord: Bool)
353|5f3077|        }
354|895ca2|        let kind: Kind
355|27e597|    }
356|adc83b|
357|065357|    private func compilePattern(for query: SearchQuery) throws -> CompiledPattern {
358|4ff7ae|        if query.options.isRegex {
359|21ffa4|            let opts: NSRegularExpression.Options = query.options.isCaseSensitive ? [] : [.caseInsensitive]
360|71cc09|            do {
361|16d5c5|                let re = try NSRegularExpression(pattern: query.text, options: opts)
362|1452df|                return CompiledPattern(kind: .regex(re))
363|91b9a2|            } catch {
364|7ac396|                throw SearchError.invalidRegex(query.text)
365|a7dc16|            }
366|b31999|        } else {
367|051718|            // Literal search.
368|b0381b|            let compareLowercased = !query.options.isCaseSensitive
369|1b6fc1|            return CompiledPattern(kind: .literal(needle: query.text,
370|7705be|                                                 compareLowercased: compareLowercased,
371|7ec981|                                                 wholeWord: query.options.isWholeWord))
372|5f3077|        }
373|27e597|    }
374|adc83b|
375|b67a78|    private func searchFile(url: URL, rootURL: URL, query: SearchQuery) throws -> FileMatch? {
376|a21236|        let compiled = try compilePattern(for: query)
377|68eff0|        let data: Data
378|4da690|        do {
379|f9a970|            data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
380|853889|        } catch {
381|d40604|            // ignore unreadable files
382|1c8557|            return nil
383|5f3077|        }
384|1b20e1|        // Try UTF-8 first. If it fails, ignore file (keeps implementation safe).
385|52a873|        guard let text = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else { return nil }
386|adc83b|
387|1e56b5|        let relPath: String
388|e5c652|        if url.path.hasPrefix(rootURL.path) {
389|8f96cb|            relPath = String(url.path.dropFirst(rootURL.path.count)).trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet(charactersIn: "/"))
390|b31999|        } else {
391|1b9df7|            relPath = url.path
392|5f3077|        }
393|adc83b|
394|2c8472|        let matches = findMatches(in: text, compiled: compiled)
395|faae37|        if matches.isEmpty { return nil }
396|adc83b|
397|70220a|        return FileMatch(filePath: relPath, matches: matches)
398|27e597|    }
399|adc83b|
400|a3f3a0|    private func findMatches(in text: String, compiled: CompiledPattern) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
401|53729f|        switch compiled.kind {
402|462837|        case .regex(let re):
403|abfc29|            return regexMatches(in: text, re: re)
404|8554ef|        case .literal(let needle, let compareLowercased, let wholeWord):
405|5903fb|            return literalMatches(in: text, needle: needle, compareLowercased: compareLowercased, wholeWord: wholeWord)
406|5f3077|        }
407|27e597|    }
408|adc83b|
409|737c2a|    private func regexMatches(in text: String, re: NSRegularExpression) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
410|c60005|        let ns = text as NSString
411|05fef3|        let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
412|64c443|        let matches = re.matches(in: text, options: [], range: range)
413|27c73d|        if matches.isEmpty { return [] }
414|adc83b|
415|29f7c0|        // Precompute line starts for fast conversion.
416|6dffc4|        let lineIndex = LineIndex(text)
417|adc83b|
418|2e97c7|        return matches.compactMap { m in
419|bc719f|            guard m.range.location != NSNotFound, m.range.length > 0 else { return nil }
420|e3d5c9|            let (line, col) = lineIndex.lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: m.range.location)
421|1119bd|            let preview = lineIndex.lineText(line: line)
422|3d0a04|            return .init(location: .init(line: line, column: col, length: m.range.length), preview: preview)
423|5f3077|        }
424|27e597|    }
425|adc83b|
426|045702|    private func literalMatches(in text: String,
427|6e8b53|                               needle: String,
428|b73c28|                               compareLowercased: Bool,
429|cb607c|                               wholeWord: Bool) -> [FileMatch.Match] {
430|865c1f|        guard !needle.isEmpty else { return [] }
431|adc83b|
432|9c36ac|        let haystack = compareLowercased ? text.lowercased() : text
433|2f6ee4|        let n = compareLowercased ? needle.lowercased() : needle
434|adc83b|
435|9ba542|        // Use NSString for UTF16 indexing.
436|384be5|        let nsHay = haystack as NSString
437|643b7b|        let nsOrig = text as NSString
438|adc83b|
439|6dffc4|        let lineIndex = LineIndex(text)
440|adc83b|
441|6b1517|        var results: [FileMatch.Match] = []
442|f134a9|        var searchRange = NSRange(location: 0, length: nsHay.length)
443|adc83b|
444|722ae9|        while true {
445|9bb985|            let found = nsHay.range(of: n, options: [], range: searchRange)
446|1815e9|            if found.location == NSNotFound { break }
447|adc83b|
448|e31f22|            if wholeWord {
449|ae0edf|                if !isWholeWordMatch(in: nsHay, range: found) {
450|10e352|                    let nextLoc = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
451|8c9165|                    if nextLoc >= nsHay.length { break }
452|a45a51|                    searchRange = NSRange(location: nextLoc, length: nsHay.length - nextLoc)
453|f41bef|                    continue
454|4e2d32|                }
455|a7dc16|            }
456|adc83b|
457|cdba18|            let (line, col) = lineIndex.lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: found.location)
458|1119bd|            let preview = lineIndex.lineText(line: line)
459|adc83b|
460|868369|            // Use original needle length in UTF16 for accurate highlighting.
461|d60ad7|            let origLen = (needle as NSString).length
462|6c2b48|            results.append(.init(location: .init(line: line, column: col, length: origLen), preview: preview))
463|adc83b|
464|7d1039|            let nextLoc = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
465|44b268|            if nextLoc >= nsHay.length { break }
466|49bf1c|            searchRange = NSRange(location: nextLoc, length: nsHay.length - nextLoc)
467|5f3077|        }
468|adc83b|
469|32b4af|        return results
470|27e597|    }
471|adc83b|
472|aac90d|    private func isWholeWordMatch(in nsText: NSString, range: NSRange) -> Bool {
473|7a86e9|        // Word boundary definition: letters, numbers, underscore.
474|f103a7|        func isWordChar(_ u: unichar) -> Bool {
475|4a1e5c|            if u == 95 { return true } // '_'
476|0b793e|            // ASCII letters/digits
477|cd26fb|            if (u >= 48 && u <= 57) || (u >= 65 && u <= 90) || (u >= 97 && u <= 122) { return true }
478|e2e187|            return false
479|5f3077|        }
480|adc83b|
481|132159|        if range.location > 0 {
482|c016ec|            let prev = nsText.character(at: range.location - 1)
483|a49431|            if isWordChar(prev) { return false }
484|5f3077|        }
485|f8cd54|        let end = range.location + range.length
486|cee764|        if end < nsText.length {
487|468111|            let next = nsText.character(at: end)
488|594cf5|            if isWordChar(next) { return false }
489|5f3077|        }
490|4add8d|        return true
491|27e597|    }
492|adc83b|
493|2b0ba3|    // MARK: - Replace implementation
494|adc83b|
495|594372|    private func replaceInFile(url: URL,
496|710b1e|                               compiled: CompiledPattern,
497|ed9f89|                               replacement: String) throws -> (changed: Bool, replacements: Int) {
498|68eff0|        let data: Data
499|4da690|        do {
500|f9a970|            data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
501|853889|        } catch {
502|18ad8c|            return (false, 0)
503|5f3077|        }
504|8c8e01|        guard let text = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8) else { return (false, 0) }
505|adc83b|
506|0a048a|        let (newText, reps) = replaceAll(in: text, compiled: compiled, replacement: replacement)
507|92a836|        guard reps > 0 else { return (false, 0) }
508|adc83b|
509|4da690|        do {
510|ea2ea9|            // Atomic write.
511|5c5c3b|            try newText.data(using: .utf8)?.write(to: url, options: [.atomic])
512|853889|        } catch {
513|20715e|            throw SearchError.ioError("Failed to write file: \(url.path)")
514|5f3077|        }
515|876315|        return (true, reps)
516|27e597|    }
517|adc83b|
518|f7d19f|    private func replaceAll(in text: String,
519|9c700d|                            compiled: CompiledPattern,
520|26009e|                            replacement: String) -> (String, Int) {
521|53729f|        switch compiled.kind {
522|462837|        case .regex(let re):
523|6c811f|            let ns = text as NSString
524|b25f5b|            let range = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
525|39e029|            let matches = re.matches(in: text, options: [], range: range)
526|1cc29d|            if matches.isEmpty { return (text, 0) }
527|4d6888|            let out = re.stringByReplacingMatches(in: text, options: [], range: range, withTemplate: replacement)
528|2f64d1|            return (out, matches.count)
529|adc83b|
530|8554ef|        case .literal(let needle, let compareLowercased, let wholeWord):
531|c0f6dc|            if needle.isEmpty { return (text, 0) }
532|f2f430|            // For literal, we re-scan and build output to support whole-word.
533|818f83|            let haystack = compareLowercased ? text.lowercased() : text
534|7d22d9|            let n = compareLowercased ? needle.lowercased() : needle
535|adc83b|
536|e09c62|            let nsHay = haystack as NSString
537|d5b67f|            let nsOrig = text as NSString
538|fc8e73|            let nsNeedle = n as NSString
539|adc83b|
540|06c839|            var out = ""
541|8e842a|            out.reserveCapacity(text.count)
542|adc83b|
543|e70d5f|            var cursor = 0
544|39cefb|            var reps = 0
545|adc83b|
546|0cd27d|            while cursor < nsHay.length {
547|2c9083|                let searchRange = NSRange(location: cursor, length: nsHay.length - cursor)
548|ae1ea7|                let found = nsHay.range(of: n, options: [], range: searchRange)
549|4df494|                if found.location == NSNotFound {
550|8d5f82|                    out += nsOrig.substring(with: NSRange(location: cursor, length: nsOrig.length - cursor))
551|8dcb2c|                    break
552|4e2d32|                }
553|adc83b|
554|1bfe27|                // append leading segment
555|2f703d|                out += nsOrig.substring(with: NSRange(location: cursor, length: found.location - cursor))
556|adc83b|
557|9cbeba|                if wholeWord && !isWholeWordMatch(in: nsHay, range: found) {
558|efda73|                    // not a whole-word match; append original matched text and continue
559|c0aa04|                    out += nsOrig.substring(with: found)
560|eb07b6|                    cursor = found.location + max(found.length, 1)
561|f41bef|                    continue
562|4e2d32|                }
563|adc83b|
564|80b507|                out += replacement
565|4d34ce|                reps += 1
566|adc83b|
567|61d066|                cursor = found.location + max(nsNeedle.length, 1)
568|a7dc16|            }
569|adc83b|
570|b4440a|            return (out, reps)
571|5f3077|        }
572|27e597|    }
573|adc83b|
574|016baf|    // MARK: - Glob matching
575|adc83b|
576|76a6f8|    /// Very small glob matcher supporting '*', '**', and '?'.
577|97859c|    /// Matching is path-based (uses '/' as separator). Globs are compared against the full path.
578|b70596|    private func matchesAnyGlob(path: String, globs: [String]) -> Bool {
579|d4643f|        guard !globs.isEmpty else { return false }
580|c5ecd3|        for g in globs {
581|090ad0|            if globMatch(path: path, pattern: g) { return true }
582|5f3077|        }
583|dc1500|        return false
584|27e597|    }
585|adc83b|
586|028fc6|    private func globMatch(path: String, pattern: String) -> Bool {
587|2d6c82|        // Convert glob to regex.
588|6bde96|        // - '**' => '.*'
589|efea0d|        // - '*' => '[^/]*'
590|6eb809|        // - '?' => '[^/]'
591|079dc7|        var regex = "^"
592|c72f2a|        var i = pattern.startIndex
593|10492c|        while i < pattern.endIndex {
594|ebcb12|            let ch = pattern[i]
595|8b01b3|            if ch == "*" {
596|324652|                let next = pattern.index(after: i)
597|1327fc|                if next < pattern.endIndex && pattern[next] == "*" {
598|dad527|                    regex += ".*"
599|3f2179|                    i = pattern.index(after: next)
600|fdd0e2|                } else {
601|fde091|                    regex += "[^/]*"
602|74f6aa|                    i = next
603|4e2d32|                }
604|735319|            } else if ch == "?" {
605|164012|                regex += "[^/]"
606|8a996a|                i = pattern.index(after: i)
607|f5a6eb|            } else {
608|a51d15|                // escape regex metacharacters
609|cf009b|                if "\\.^$|()[]{}+".contains(ch) {
610|b0575b|                    // Single backslash to escape the character in regex
611|366984|                    // e.g., "." becomes "\." which matches literal dot
612|504778|                    regex += "\\\(ch)"
613|fdd0e2|                } else {
614|a46a47|                    regex.append(ch)
615|4e2d32|                }
616|8a996a|                i = pattern.index(after: i)
617|a7dc16|            }
618|5f3077|        }
619|3a8c74|        regex += "$"
620|adc83b|
621|8e440e|        let opts: NSRegularExpression.Options = []
622|cda732|        guard let re = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: regex, options: opts) else { return false }
623|ef92c3|        let ns = path as NSString
624|5f54b4|        let r = NSRange(location: 0, length: ns.length)
625|68f6b6|        return re.firstMatch(in: path, options: [], range: r) != nil
626|27e597|    }
627|adc83b|
628|a2fe2d|    // MARK: - Glob Pattern Testing
629|adc83b|
630|abaafb|    /// Runs all glob pattern tests and returns results for verification
631|8dabfe|    /// - Returns: Tuple containing (passedCount, failedCount, [failureDetails])
632|fcd371|    public func runGlobTests() -> (passed: Int, failed: Int, failures: [String]) {
633|519438|        var passed = 0
634|05dd4a|        var failed = 0
635|82aab2|        var failures: [String] = []
636|adc83b|
637|c53e2a|        func assert(_ condition: Bool, _ message: String) {
638|0580b1|            if condition {
639|023fd0|                passed += 1
640|f5a6eb|            } else {
641|731d09|                failed += 1
642|2ddcdc|                failures.append(message)
643|a7dc16|            }
644|5f3077|        }
645|adc83b|
646|31804a|        // MARK: 1. testGlobStar - single * matches any chars except /
647|d6ed84|        
648|f9337d|        // Single * should match any characters except path separator /
649|828aef|        assert(globMatch(path: "file.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match file.swift")
650|c77ed4|        assert(globMatch(path: "main.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match main.swift")
651|0ade40|        assert(globMatch(path: "ViewController.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should match ViewController.swift")
652|228c0b|        assert(!globMatch(path: "src/file.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should NOT match src/file.swift (contains /)")
653|60094a|        assert(!globMatch(path: "path/to/file.swift", pattern: "*.swift"), "testGlobStar: *.swift should NOT match path/to/file.swift (contains /)")
654|d6ed84|        
655|4703ea|        // * in the middle
656|b6c29a|        assert(globMatch(path: "test-file.txt", pattern: "test-*.txt"), "testGlobStar: test-*.txt should match test-file.txt")
657|1a7b98|        assert(globMatch(path: "test-123.txt", pattern: "test-*.txt"), "testGlobStar: test-*.txt should match test-123.txt")
658|acdfb6|        assert(globMatch(path: "test-123-456.txt", pattern: "test-*.txt"), "testGlobStar: test-*.txt should match test-123-456.txt")
659|d6ed84|        
660|b41aa1|        // Multiple *

831|909c8a|// MARK: - Line indexing helper
832|adc83b|
833|01ee41|/// LineIndex is internal to allow testing while being encapsulated within SearchManager
834|d09a50|internal struct LineIndex {
835|f4be4a|    private let text: String
836|c348f4|    private let nsText: NSString
837|b41b69|    // line start offsets in UTF16
838|f3984c|    private var lineStarts: [Int] = [0]
839|b24272|    private var lines: [String] = []
840|adc83b|
841|23e59f|    init(_ text: String) {
842|226b10|        self.text = text
843|52183e|        self.nsText = text as NSString
844|adc83b|
845|2f4cf6|        // Build lineStarts and cache line strings.
846|c5b554|        // Use NSString lineRange(for:) to be safe with various newline types.
847|6ee764|        var idx = 0
848|17cda2|        var currentLine = 1
849|13db51|        while idx < nsText.length {
850|2c0444|            let r = nsText.lineRange(for: NSRange(location: idx, length: 0))
851|471553|            let lineStr = nsText.substring(with: r).trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet.newlines)
852|9855fd|            if lines.count < currentLine { lines.append(lineStr) } else { lines[currentLine - 1] = lineStr }
853|adc83b|
854|ae4d58|            idx = NSMaxRange(r)
855|1af0df|            if idx < nsText.length {
856|053f6f|                lineStarts.append(idx)
857|12fb7d|                currentLine += 1
858|a7dc16|            }
859|5f3077|        }
860|d679f2|        if nsText.length == 0 {
861|7cc276|            lines = [""]
862|3822a8|            lineStarts = [0]
863|706df5|        } else if lines.isEmpty {
864|5813e2|            // single line without newline
865|a3f790|            lines = [text]
866|3822a8|            lineStarts = [0]
867|5f3077|        }
868|27e597|    }
869|adc83b|
870|fb0e0a|    func lineAndColumn(utf16Offset: Int) -> (line: Int, column: Int) {
871|4aeba9|        // Binary search lineStarts to find last start <= offset.
872|32f4a9|        var lo = 0
873|c12820|        var hi = lineStarts.count - 1
874|7d7bcb|        while lo <= hi {
875|c1ca4d|            let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
876|e6933d|            let v = lineStarts[mid]
877|ef7066|            if v == utf16Offset {
878|52d775|                return (mid + 1, 1)
879|f31785|            } else if v < utf16Offset {
880|0a83f3|                lo = mid + 1
881|f5a6eb|            } else {
882|7320e6|                hi = mid - 1
883|a7dc16|            }
884|5f3077|        }
885|06fcf8|        let lineIndex = max(hi, 0)
886|acc313|        let lineStart = lineStarts[lineIndex]
887|ce9896|        let col = max(utf16Offset - lineStart, 0) + 1
888|fc379c|        return (lineIndex + 1, col)
889|27e597|    }
890|adc83b|
891|2fb6bf|    func lineText(line: Int) -> String {
892|329128|        let i = max(1, line) - 1
893|14d9cb|        if i >= 0 && i < lines.count { return lines[i] }
894|2ca6c1|        return ""
895|27e597|    }
896|b4687f|    
897|073a12|    /// Internal accessor for testing binary search behavior
898|11be92|    internal var lineStartOffsets: [Int] { lineStarts }
899|8b9d56|    internal var lineCount: Int { lines.count }
900|bc5c81|    internal var allLines: [String] { lines }
901|b31277|}
902|adc83b|

65|5507e2|    func font(forFamily family: String, size: CGFloat) -> UIFont {
66|36809c|        // Try common iOS font PostScript names first.
67|8eed34|        let candidates: [String]
68|b37ed2|        switch family {
69|776aba|        case "Menlo":
70|bfb914|            candidates = ["Menlo-Regular", "Menlo"]
71|08b76c|        case "Courier New":
72|fb8c13|            candidates = ["CourierNewPSMT", "Courier New"]
73|0cfb7f|        case "SF Mono":
74|0617dd|            candidates = ["SFMono-Regular", "SF Mono", ".SFMono-Regular"]
75|0298e7|        case "Fira Code":
76|dc7760|            candidates = ["FiraCode-Regular", "Fira Code"]
77|30da51|        case "JetBrains Mono":
78|29ba7c|            candidates = ["JetBrainsMono-Regular", "JetBrains Mono"]
79|520b7d|        default:
80|d7ec8a|            candidates = [family]
81|5f3077|        }
82|adc83b|
83|ef3c25|        for name in candidates {
84|b0cf4a|            if let font = UIFont(name: name, size: size) {
85|404673|                // Ensure monospaced feel if available; otherwise return as-is.
86|6dcd7e|                return font
87|a7dc16|            }
88|5f3077|        }
89|adc83b|
90|c377bd|        // Fallback
91|0966c5|        return UIFont.monospacedSystemFont(ofSize: size, weight: .regular)
92|27e597|    }
93|adc83b|
94|a8b407|    /// A stable key used to detect when re-highlighting is necessary.
95|01a4a7|    var editorStyleKey: String {
96|ccc4ec|        "\(fontFamily)|\(Int(fontSize))|\(clampedTabSize)"
97|27e597|    }
98|b31277|}
99|adc83b|

120|539cfb|    func loadCustomSnippets() {
121|0a4b6f|        // Prefer JSON file if present, else fallback to UserDefaults.
122|eb9d3d|        if let fileSnippets = loadFromJSONFile() {
123|470230|            customSnippets = fileSnippets
124|bef5d6|            return
125|5f3077|        }
126|adc83b|
127|ff322b|        guard let data = UserDefaults.standard.data(forKey: userDefaultsKey) else {
128|b2d2dd|            customSnippets = []
129|bef5d6|            return
130|5f3077|        }
131|adc83b|
132|4da690|        do {
133|31f9d1|            customSnippets = try JSONDecoder().decode([Snippet].self, from: data)
134|853889|        } catch {
135|b2d2dd|            customSnippets = []
136|5f3077|        }
137|27e597|    }
138|adc83b|
139|391f55|    func saveCustomSnippets() {
140|4da690|        do {
141|f872df|            let data = try JSONEncoder().encode(customSnippets)
142|86d2be|            UserDefaults.standard.set(data, forKey: userDefaultsKey)
143|309942|            saveToJSONFile(data: data)
144|853889|        } catch {
145|ae003d|            // Ignore persistence errors.
146|5f3077|        }
147|27e597|    }
148|adc83b|
149|206abd|    private func snippetsFileURL() -> URL? {
150|460d36|        let fm = FileManager.default
151|2f53ca|        guard let docs = fm.urls(for: .documentDirectory, in: .userDomainMask).first else { return nil }
152|cfadbf|        return docs.appendingPathComponent("snippets.json")
153|27e597|    }
154|adc83b|
155|59f1b6|    private func loadFromJSONFile() -> [Snippet]? {
156|a1f3a6|        guard let url = snippetsFileURL(), FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: url.path) else { return nil }
157|4da690|        do {
158|2bd687|            let data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
159|6faf62|            return try JSONDecoder().decode([Snippet].self, from: data)
160|853889|        } catch {
161|1c8557|            return nil
162|5f3077|        }
163|27e597|    }
164|adc83b|
165|277671|    private func saveToJSONFile(data: Data) {
166|7d19d6|        guard let url = snippetsFileURL() else { return }
167|4da690|        do {
168|e150b2|            try data.write(to: url, options: [.atomic])
169|853889|        } catch {
170|a416e9|            // Ignore.
171|5f3077|        }
172|27e597|    }
173|b31277|}
174|adc83b|
175|027474|// MARK: - Snippet Expansion
176|adc83b|
177|ffaefa|extension SnippetsManager {
178|a686f9|    /// Expands a snippet body and returns:
179|c54008|    /// - text: body with $1/$2... placeholders removed
180|ddc512|    /// - cursorOffset: position of $1 if present, else end of expanded text
181|30e1d8|    func expand(_ snippet: Snippet) -> (text: String, cursorOffset: Int) {
182|8d4784|        let body = snippet.body
183|adc83b|
184|6fa346|        var output = ""
185|dc4dbb|        var i = body.startIndex
186|f91403|        var placeholderOffsets: [Int: Int] = [:]
187|adc83b|
188|ee9951|        while i < body.endIndex {
189|6a78bd|            let ch = body[i]
190|7d24e6|            if ch == "$" {
191|dbcb8c|                var j = body.index(after: i)
192|993846|                var digits = ""
193|f76007|                while j < body.endIndex, body[j].isNumber {
194|c59af6|                    digits.append(body[j])
195|f350a6|                    j = body.index(after: j)
196|4e2d32|                }
197|adc83b|
198|e6f600|                if !digits.isEmpty, let n = Int(digits) {
199|f67692|                    if placeholderOffsets[n] == nil {
200|173495|                        placeholderOffsets[n] = output.count
201|c9717a|                    }
202|5d22b9|                    i = j
203|f41bef|                    continue
204|4e2d32|                }
205|a7dc16|            }
206|adc83b|
207|87962f|            output.append(ch)
208|e6010d|            i = body.index(after: i)
209|5f3077|        }
210|adc83b|
211|b2860b|        let cursorOffset = placeholderOffsets[1] ?? output.count
212|e982be|        return (output, cursorOffset)
213|27e597|    }
214|b31277|}
215|adc83b|
