6|47c75e|/// Manages CoreSpotlight indexing for opened files
7|c41b57|class SpotlightManager {
8|f2ec68|    static let shared = SpotlightManager()
9|b4687f|    
10|52b597|    private let searchableIndex = CSSearchableIndex.default()
11|c74752|    private let domainIdentifier = "com.vscode.ipados.files"
12|b4687f|    
13|54113e|    private init() {}
14|b4687f|    
15|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
16|b4687f|    
17|92c498|    /// Index a file that was opened in the editor
18|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
19|c841df|    ///   - url: The file URL
20|6a8a9f|    ///   - content: The file content
21|a646b8|    ///   - fileName: The file name
22|c4dda7|    func indexFile(url: URL, content: String, fileName: String) {
23|790006|        let attributeSet = CSSearchableItemAttributeSet(contentType: .content)
24|d6ed84|        
25|795554|        // Basic attributes
26|b52257|        attributeSet.title = fileName
27|fef742|        attributeSet.displayName = fileName
28|e09637|        attributeSet.contentDescription = generateContentPreview(from: content)
29|d6ed84|        
30|f87021|        // Path and URL
31|4aeb44|        attributeSet.path = url.path
32|7f2ba6|        attributeSet.contentURL = url
33|d6ed84|        
34|7bc3ae|        // Content
35|ccd7f6|        attributeSet.textContent = content
36|d6ed84|        
37|2851f6|        // File metadata
38|15291c|        let fileExtension = url.pathExtension
39|1edb5f|        attributeSet.keywords = [fileName, fileExtension, "code", "editor"]
40|d6ed84|        
41|049cab|        // Determine content type based on extension
42|64a59e|        if let utType = UTType(filenameExtension: fileExtension) {
43|d70222|            attributeSet.contentType = utType.identifier
44|5f3077|        }
45|d6ed84|        
46|dc8335|        // Add language/syntax info if available
47|4bf62a|        if let language = detectLanguage(from: fileExtension) {
48|5bf66c|            attributeSet.keywords?.append(language)
49|5f3077|        }
50|d6ed84|        
51|85b171|        // Timestamps
52|bd9796|        attributeSet.contentModificationDate = Date()
53|0b7aa7|        attributeSet.addedDate = Date()
54|d6ed84|        
55|b0872e|        // Create searchable item
56|f0b8b3|        let uniqueIdentifier = url.path
57|71c138|        let searchableItem = CSSearchableItem(
58|32bb1e|            uniqueIdentifier: uniqueIdentifier,
59|c76664|            domainIdentifier: domainIdentifier,
60|9e98a4|            attributeSet: attributeSet
61|3143a4|        )
62|d6ed84|        
63|112640|        // Set expiration - files remain indexed for 30 days after last open
64|77a026|        searchableItem.expirationDate = Date().addingTimeInterval(30 * 24 * 60 * 60)
65|d6ed84|        
66|8cfa8e|        // Index the item
67|665ede|        searchableIndex.indexSearchableItems([searchableItem]) { error in
68|b2967c|            if let error = error {
69|f1d6fb|                print("Spotlight indexing error: \(error.localizedDescription)")
70|f5a6eb|            } else {
71|0fdfe9|                print("Successfully indexed file: \(fileName)")
72|a7dc16|            }
73|5f3077|        }
74|27e597|    }
75|b4687f|    
76|df3eb8|    /// Update the index for a file (e.g., after saving)
77|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
78|c841df|    ///   - url: The file URL
79|70abf6|    ///   - content: The updated file content
80|a646b8|    ///   - fileName: The file name
81|6e9b58|    func updateFile(url: URL, content: String, fileName: String) {
82|1a7384|        // Re-indexing with the same uniqueIdentifier updates the existing entry
83|ea2e96|        indexFile(url: url, content: content, fileName: fileName)
84|27e597|    }
85|b4687f|    
86|b21ac1|    /// Remove a file from the Spotlight index
87|f1f049|    /// - Parameter url: The file URL to remove
88|6dbdcc|    func removeFile(url: URL) {
89|f0b8b3|        let uniqueIdentifier = url.path
90|8728aa|        searchableIndex.deleteSearchableItems(withIdentifiers: [uniqueIdentifier]) { error in
91|b2967c|            if let error = error {
92|029020|                print("Error removing from Spotlight index: \(error.localizedDescription)")
93|f5a6eb|            } else {
94|5d1366|                print("Successfully removed from index: \(url.lastPathComponent)")
95|a7dc16|            }
96|5f3077|        }
97|27e597|    }
98|b4687f|    
99|e376a9|    /// Remove all indexed files for this app
100|79fd2a|    func clearAllIndexes() {
101|006259|        searchableIndex.deleteSearchableItems(withDomainIdentifiers: [domainIdentifier]) { error in
102|b2967c|            if let error = error {
103|8c705c|                print("Error clearing Spotlight indexes: \(error.localizedDescription)")
104|f5a6eb|            } else {
105|11957f|                print("Successfully cleared all Spotlight indexes")
106|a7dc16|            }
107|5f3077|        }
108|27e597|    }
109|b4687f|    
110|6822a6|    // MARK: - Helper Methods
111|b4687f|    
112|7396a1|    /// Generate a preview of the file content (first few lines)
113|e56cac|    private func generateContentPreview(from content: String, maxLines: Int = 5, maxLength: Int = 200) -> String {
114|228023|        let lines = content.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
115|aa57c1|        let previewLines = lines.prefix(maxLines).joined(separator: " ")
116|d6ed84|        
117|83398f|        if previewLines.count > maxLength {
118|06f7ac|            let index = previewLines.index(previewLines.startIndex, offsetBy: maxLength)
119|82503d|            return String(previewLines[..<index]) + "..."
120|5f3077|        }
121|d6ed84|        
122|3721c8|        return previewLines
123|27e597|    }
124|b4687f|

131|6038bc|            "jsx": "React",

142|d053a5|            "go": "Go",
143|fca832|            "rs": "Rust",
144|4deb9f|            "php": "PHP",
145|ca9508|            "html": "HTML",
146|557688|            "css": "CSS",
147|61bece|            "scss": "SCSS",
148|713bf7|            "json": "JSON",
149|c14d9e|            "xml": "XML",
150|1b6066|            "md": "Markdown",

187|b4687f|

199|b12566|        if let index = savedConnections.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == config.id }) {

204|d6ed84|        
205|2d7bb4|        persistConnections()
206|27e597|    }
207|b4687f|    
208|eea006|    func delete(_ connection: SSHConnectionConfig) {

210|2d7bb4|        persistConnections()
211|27e597|    }
212|b4687f|

214|2e9633|        if let index = savedConnections.firstIndex(where: { $0.id == connection.id }) {

216|da901b|            persistConnections()

218|27e597|    }

220|ae0029|    private func loadConnections() {

222|f8ff24|              let connections = try? JSONDecoder().decode([SSHConnectionConfig].self, from: data) else {
223|bef5d6|            return
224|5f3077|        }
225|a65f6e|        savedConnections = connections.sorted { ($0.lastUsed ?? .distantPast) > ($1.lastUsed ?? .distantPast) }
226|27e597|    }
227|b4687f|    
228|a3fceb|    private func persistConnections() {
229|7e12a8|        guard let data = try? JSONEncoder().encode(savedConnections) else { return }
230|ad5d30|        userDefaults.set(data, forKey: storageKey)
231|27e597|    }

9|b4687f|

21|fe2801|/// Thread-safe LRU cache for inline code suggestions with TTL expiration
22|e5ec5c|/// Maximum 100 entries, 5 minute expiration
23|4db88e|final class SuggestionCache {
24|f620b3|    // MARK: - Constants
25|b4687f|    
26|21ee5c|    static let maxEntries = 100
27|d2414b|    static let expirationInterval: TimeInterval = 300 // 5 minutes
28|b4687f|    
29|6503ae|    // MARK: - Properties
30|b4687f|    
31|34e47f|    private var cache: [String: CacheEntry] = [:]
32|48d9ba|    /// Ordered list to track LRU access order (least recently used at the beginning)
33|830760|    private var lruOrder: [String] = []
34|b4687f|    
35|dd918f|    /// Thread-safe queue for cache operations using concurrent queue with barriers
36|a3a1ae|    private let cacheQueue = DispatchQueue(label: "com.vscodeipados.suggestioncache", attributes: .concurrent)
37|b4687f|    
38|db9bbb|    // MARK: - Singleton
39|b4687f|    
40|8f377e|    static let shared = SuggestionCache()
41|b4687f|    
42|54113e|    private init() {}
43|b4687f|    
44|fb9d4d|    // MARK: - Key Generation
45|b4687f|    
46|938b88|    /// Generates a SHA256 hash from the code context string
47|62811f|    /// - Parameter context: The code context to hash
48|d02457|    /// - Returns: A hex-encoded SHA256 hash string
49|233ae6|    private func hashContext(_ context: String) -> String {
50|ab8594|        let data = Data(context.utf8)
51|97a5e1|        var hash = [UInt8](repeating: 0, count: Int(CC_SHA256_DIGEST_LENGTH))
52|3e64b0|        _ = data.withUnsafeBytes { bytes in
53|3e6f69|            CC_SHA256(bytes.baseAddress, CC_LONG(data.count), &hash)
54|5f3077|        }
55|f6441a|        return hash.map { String(format: "%02hhx", $0) }.joined()
56|27e597|    }
57|b4687f|    
58|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
59|b4687f|    
60|033bf4|    /// Retrieves a cached suggestion for the given code context if it exists and hasn't expired.
61|c435d3|    /// Updates LRU order on successful retrieval.
62|112b9c|    /// - Parameter context: The code context string to look up
63|6d9dea|    /// - Returns: The cached suggestion string, or nil if not found or expired
64|5ba297|    func get(context: String) -> String? {
65|a9c444|        let key = hashContext(context)
66|d6ed84|        
67|98f033|        return cacheQueue.sync {
68|9d266a|            guard let entry = cache[key] else {
69|15034a|                return nil
70|a7dc16|            }
71|3070d1|            
72|2f14e2|            // Check if entry has expired
73|e16ac4|            if entry.isExpired {
74|89aad4|                // Remove expired entry
75|185e7a|                cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
76|8d693c|                removeFromLRU(key)
77|15034a|                return nil
78|a7dc16|            }
79|3070d1|            
80|bff744|            // Update LRU order - move to end (most recently used)
81|960881|            updateLRUOrder(key)
82|3070d1|            
83|c5897e|            return entry.suggestion
84|5f3077|        }
85|27e597|    }
86|b4687f|    
87|c07d11|    /// Stores a suggestion for the given code context in the cache.
88|94f7ba|    /// Evicts oldest entry if cache is at max capacity.
89|45b4bd|    /// - Parameters:
90|3b7936|    ///   - context: The code context string (used as cache key via SHA256 hash)
91|0e56d7|    ///   - suggestion: The AI suggestion to cache
92|682096|    func set(context: String, suggestion: String) {
93|a9c444|        let key = hashContext(context)
94|d6ed84|        
95|2eb06b|        cacheQueue.async(flags: .barrier) { [weak self] in
96|2baf81|            guard let self = self else { return }
97|3070d1|            
98|48bad1|            // Create new entry with TTL
99|464f63|            let entry = CacheEntry(
100|47deb4|                suggestion: suggestion,
101|95552d|                contextHash: key,
102|3a2d94|                ttl: Self.expirationInterval
103|43d041|            )
104|3070d1|            
105|9c2fb2|            // Check if this is an update to existing entry
106|1b247c|            if self.cache[key] != nil {
107|b09099|                // Update existing entry
108|04cd95|                self.cache[key] = entry
109|664568|                self.updateLRUOrder(key)
110|f5a6eb|            } else {
111|a4567b|                // Check if we need to evict oldest entry
112|20b4bf|                if self.cache.count >= Self.maxEntries {
113|f4766d|                    self.evictLRUEntry()
114|4e2d32|                }
115|216278|                
116|e926f1|                // Add new entry
117|04cd95|                self.cache[key] = entry
118|d4d7a7|                self.lruOrder.append(key)
119|a7dc16|            }
120|5f3077|        }
121|27e597|    }
122|b4687f|    
123|06e36f|    /// Clears all entries from the cache.
124|5416f6|    func clear() {
125|2eb06b|        cacheQueue.async(flags: .barrier) { [weak self] in
126|1e7e79|            self?.cache.removeAll()
127|a434d2|            self?.lruOrder.removeAll()
128|5f3077|        }
129|27e597|    }
130|b4687f|    
131|81a958|    // MARK: - Private Helpers
132|b4687f|    
133|e268ba|    /// Removes a key from the LRU order tracking
134|9850b8|    private func removeFromLRU(_ key: String) {
135|acf9f5|        lruOrder.removeAll { $0 == key }
136|27e597|    }
137|b4687f|    
138|4e5908|    /// Updates LRU order by moving the accessed key to the end (most recently used)
139|e5b0f9|    private func updateLRUOrder(_ key: String) {
140|33983e|        removeFromLRU(key)
141|b3c36a|        lruOrder.append(key)
142|27e597|    }
143|b4687f|    
144|1d8cd3|    /// Evicts the least recently used entry from the cache
145|9bba21|    private func evictLRUEntry() {
146|1374a3|        guard !lruOrder.isEmpty else { return }
147|d6ed84|        
148|4b277f|        let oldestKey = lruOrder.removeFirst()
149|5cda32|        cache.removeValue(forKey: oldestKey)
150|27e597|    }
151|b4687f|    
152|70f772|    // MARK: - Debug/Testing
153|b4687f|    
154|897b17|    /// Returns the current number of cached entries (for testing/debugging purposes)
155|26c304|    var count: Int {
156|98f033|        return cacheQueue.sync {
157|14ea56|            // Clean up expired entries before counting
158|a1af1c|            let now = Date()
159|bfa8e1|            let expiredKeys = cache.filter { $0.value.expirationDate < now }.map { $0.key }
160|b44dd2|            for key in expiredKeys {
161|185e7a|                cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
162|8d693c|                removeFromLRU(key)
163|a7dc16|            }
164|27c5f5|            return cache.count
165|5f3077|        }
166|27e597|    }
167|b4687f|    
168|55c124|    /// Removes all expired entries from the cache
169|0ac3ae|    func cleanupExpired() {
170|2eb06b|        cacheQueue.async(flags: .barrier) { [weak self] in
171|2baf81|            guard let self = self else { return }
172|3070d1|            
173|a1af1c|            let now = Date()
174|9b20de|            let expiredKeys = self.cache.filter { $0.value.expirationDate < now }.map { $0.key }
175|3070d1|            
176|b44dd2|            for key in expiredKeys {
177|a42745|                self.cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
178|98338e|                self.removeFromLRU(key)
179|a7dc16|            }

181|27e597|    }

235|a5a532|    /// Create a new streaming session
236|848bf0|    func createStream(sessionId: UUID) -> AsyncStream<TaskOutputLine> {

257|b4687f|    
258|a61c77|    /// Complete a session

263|27e597|    }
264|b4687f|

348|f63ecf|    /// Start streaming output for remote execution
349|34fc21|    func startRemoteExecution(command: String, sessionId: UUID = UUID()) async -> AsyncStream<TaskOutputLine> {
350|b990eb|        remoteExecutionStatus = TaskRemoteExecutionStatus(
351|e24961|            isRunning: true,
352|87869c|            command: command,
353|247345|            startTime: Date(),
354|e95ce4|            progressMessage: "Running: \(command)"
355|3143a4|        )
356|d6ed84|        
357|fa475e|        // Clear previous remote output
358|7feb2a|        clear(.remote)
359|0ba5b1|        selectedChannel = .remote
360|d6ed84|        
361|ea2539|        // Return the async stream for this session
362|8c2cae|        return await streamingManager.createStream(sessionId: sessionId)
363|27e597|    }
364|b4687f|    
365|9f7c3c|    /// Stream a line to remote output (can be called from AsyncStream)
366|2edac5|    func streamLine(_ line: TaskOutputLine, to channel: TaskOutputChannel = .remote, sessionId: UUID? = nil) {
367|4b6161|        var current = outputLines[channel] ?? []
368|1fcc10|        current.append(line)

370|d6ed84|        
371|a31535|        if let sessionId = sessionId {
372|47ed67|            Task {
373|14d97c|                await streamingManager.emit(sessionId: sessionId, line: line)
374|a7dc16|            }
375|5f3077|        }
376|27e597|    }
377|b4687f|    
378|8c9080|    /// Complete remote execution
379|6288ea|    func finishRemoteExecution(sessionId: UUID? = nil, exitMessage: String? = nil) {
380|a6af2f|        if let message = exitMessage {
381|fe3803|            let exitLine = TaskOutputLine(
382|1dc710|                text: message,
383|8867e4|                streamType: .stdout,
384|49f669|                timestamp: Date()
385|43d041|            )
386|3a7d31|            streamLine(exitLine)
387|5f3077|        }
388|d6ed84|        
389|a31535|        if let sessionId = sessionId {
390|47ed67|            Task {
391|b9d411|                await streamingManager.finish(sessionId: sessionId)
392|a7dc16|            }
393|5f3077|        }
394|d6ed84|        
395|20fd84|        remoteExecutionStatus = .idle
396|27e597|    }
397|b4687f|

401|b990eb|        remoteExecutionStatus = TaskRemoteExecutionStatus(
402|e24961|            isRunning: true,

404|7d8ba1|            startTime: remoteExecutionStatus.startTime,
405|640911|            progressMessage: message

418|d6ed84|

424|b4687f|    
425|9fa22f|    /// Get lines for a specific stream type only
426|e91f58|    func lines(for channel: TaskOutputChannel, streamType: OutputStreamType? = nil) -> [TaskOutputLine] {

435|b4687f|    
436|deb752|    /// Legacy string lines support
437|8d9365|    func stringLines(for channel: TaskOutputChannel) -> [String] {
438|2c65dc|        return filteredLines(for: channel).map { line in
439|291898|            if showTimestamps {

441|779866|                formatter.timeStyle = .medium
442|7ccb5e|                let timestamp = formatter.string(from: line.timestamp)
443|9419c5|                let prefix = line.streamType == .stderr ? "[ERR]" : "[OUT]"

445|a7dc16|            }
446|8c57af|            return line.text
447|5f3077|        }
448|27e597|    }

482|adc83b|
483|91e5b2|enum VSCodeTaskType: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Identifiable {
484|6ff8b1|    case shell
485|e265ce|    case process

488|b31277|}
489|adc83b|
490|1b7239|enum VSCodeTaskGroup: String, Codable, CaseIterable, Identifiable {

492|162a3f|    case test

496|adc83b|
497|f7ada9|struct VSCodeTask: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable {
498|541f79|    var id: UUID = UUID()
499|adc83b|
500|ff17ca|    var label: String
501|c8acea|    var type: VSCodeTaskType
502|e5947c|    var command: String
503|4a4799|    var args: [String]?
504|cbf8a9|    var group: VSCodeTaskGroup?
505|adc83b|
506|863a84|    enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
507|c4a7d4|        case label, type, command, args, group
508|27e597|    }
509|adc83b|
510|62e028|    init(
511|c65c52|        id: UUID = UUID(),
512|91fcb7|        label: String,
513|28aa7a|        type: VSCodeTaskType,
514|f87c55|        command: String,
515|f966e8|        args: [String]? = nil,
516|1c965a|        group: VSCodeTaskGroup? = nil
517|981e04|    ) {
518|51d091|        self.id = id
519|f24a0a|        self.label = label
520|de3425|        self.type = type
521|47de06|        self.command = command
522|8c0a6a|        self.args = args
523|9cd42a|        self.group = group
524|27e597|    }
525|adc83b|
526|212a92|    init(from decoder: Decoder) throws {
527|ba69f7|        let container = try decoder.container(keyedBy: CodingKeys.self)
528|19590e|        self.id = UUID()
529|6f0ed4|        self.label = try container.decode(String.self, forKey: .label)
530|faf6a4|        self.type = (try? container.decode(VSCodeTaskType.self, forKey: .type)) ?? .shell
531|82b8aa|        self.command = try container.decode(String.self, forKey: .command)
532|a6cbe5|        self.args = try container.decodeIfPresent([String].self, forKey: .args)
533|adc83b|
534|7819fb|        // VS Code supports either string or object for group.
535|b12095|        if let groupString = try? container.decode(String.self, forKey: .group) {
536|c356ad|            self.group = VSCodeTaskGroup(rawValue: groupString)
537|627963|        } else if let groupObj = try? container.decode([String: String].self, forKey: .group),
538|498061|                  let kind = groupObj["kind"] {
539|46b5fd|            self.group = VSCodeTaskGroup(rawValue: kind)
540|b31999|        } else {
541|5cdd88|            self.group = nil
542|5f3077|        }
543|27e597|    }
544|b31277|}

553|26d767|// MARK: - Tasks Manager
554|adc83b|
555|69d728|@MainActor
556|eef3fc|final class TasksManager: ObservableObject {
557|a046e1|    static let shared = TasksManager()
558|adc83b|
559|3bb647|    @Published private(set) var tasks: [VSCodeTask] = VSCodeTask.builtInTemplates
560|4eb5d8|    @Published private(set) var workspaceRootURL: URL?
561|adc83b|
562|ceba7d|    @Published var lastErrorMessage: String?
563|6b6ac5|    @Published var isRunning: Bool = false
564|a7f013|    @Published var runningTaskLabel: String?
565|adc83b|
566|54113e|    private init() {}
567|adc83b|
568|55686d|    func setWorkspaceRoot(_ url: URL?) {
569|92bf0e|        workspaceRootURL = url
570|4e0cdc|        reload()
571|27e597|    }
572|adc83b|
573|68094a|    func reload() {
574|288471|        lastErrorMessage = nil
575|adc83b|
576|86eb27|        guard let workspaceRootURL else {
577|8618dc|            tasks = VSCodeTask.builtInTemplates
578|bef5d6|            return
579|5f3077|        }
580|adc83b|
581|9bde95|        let tasksURL = workspaceRootURL
582|f52c63|            .appendingPathComponent(".vscode", isDirectory: true)
583|931a25|            .appendingPathComponent("tasks.json", isDirectory: false)
584|adc83b|
585|4da690|        do {
586|9ddfb1|            let data = try Data(contentsOf: tasksURL)
587|123a84|            let raw = String(decoding: data, as: UTF8.self)
588|9e9702|            let stripped = Self.stripJSONComments(raw)
589|41b2b6|            let decoded = try JSONDecoder().decode(TasksJSON.self, from: Data(stripped.utf8))
590|643b25|            tasks = decoded.tasks
591|6b2aa9|            if tasks.isEmpty {
592|da1a89|                tasks = VSCodeTask.builtInTemplates
593|a7dc16|            }
594|853889|        } catch {
595|2b5db4|            // Fall back to templates if the file doesn't exist or can't be read.
596|8618dc|            tasks = VSCodeTask.builtInTemplates
597|78f267|            lastErrorMessage = "Couldn’t load .vscode/tasks.json"
598|5f3077|        }
599|27e597|    }
600|adc83b|
601|07fb8a|    func addTemplate(_ template: VSCodeTask) {
602|645e48|        tasks.append(template)
603|27e597|    }
604|adc83b|
605|e63df7|    func task(named label: String) -> VSCodeTask? {
606|819c83|        tasks.first { $0.label == label }
607|27e597|    }
608|adc83b|
609|2b3feb|    // MARK: - Run Task
610|adc83b|
611|6abbea|    func run(_ task: VSCodeTask) {
612|385524|        TaskOutputPanelManager.shared.selectedChannel = .tasks
613|7f9425|        TaskOutputPanelManager.shared.appendLine("[Task] \(task.label)", to: .tasks)
614|adc83b|
615|0cab24|        isRunning = true
616|0db282|        runningTaskLabel = task.label
617|adc83b|
618|b8a81d|        // Perform in the background.
619|cca378|        DispatchQueue.global(qos: .userInitiated).async {
620|acda8c|            let start = Date()
621|adc83b|
622|71cc09|            do {
623|cb0d35|                try Self.runWithProcess(task: task, workspaceRootURL: self.workspaceRootURL) { chunk in
624|3d4547|                    Task { @MainActor in
625|6d7bc4|                        TaskOutputPanelManager.shared.append(chunk, to: .tasks)
626|c9717a|                    }
627|4e2d32|                }
628|adc83b|
629|ed8fb4|                let elapsed = Date().timeIntervalSince(start)
630|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
631|ebe60b|                    TaskOutputPanelManager.shared.appendLine(String(format: "[Task] Finished (%.2fs)", elapsed), to: .tasks)
632|d34780|                    self.isRunning = false
633|01f0a7|                    self.runningTaskLabel = nil
634|4e2d32|                }
635|91b9a2|            } catch {
636|df2890|                Task { @MainActor in
637|0d776b|                    TaskOutputPanelManager.shared.appendLine("[Task] Error: \(error.localizedDescription)", to: .tasks)
638|c862fb|                    self.lastErrorMessage = error.localizedDescription
639|d34780|                    self.isRunning = false
640|01f0a7|                    self.runningTaskLabel = nil
641|4e2d32|                }
642|a7dc16|            }
643|5f3077|        }
644|27e597|    }
645|adc83b|
646|bee245|    private static func runWithProcess(
647|e5dc05|        task: VSCodeTask,
648|82b696|        workspaceRootURL: URL?,
649|4bc83d|        onOutput: @escaping (String) -> Void
650|53fcb2|    ) throws {
651|f2b054|#if os(macOS)
652|6d92f9|        let process = Process()
653|adc83b|
654|954421|        if let cwd = workspaceRootURL {
655|9f27f7|            process.currentDirectoryURL = cwd
656|5f3077|        }
657|adc83b|
658|cb7289|        let expandedCommand = expandVariables(task.command, workspaceRootURL: workspaceRootURL)
659|18c5c4|        let expandedArgs = (task.args ?? []).map { expandVariables($0, workspaceRootURL: workspaceRootURL) }
660|adc83b|
661|01b605|        switch task.type {
662|25e00e|        case .shell:
663|e6c111|            // Use a login shell so things like `swift`/`npm` resolve from PATH (where supported).
664|a1da9c|            // Note: This is expected to work on macOS / Mac Catalyst. On iPadOS, spawning processes
665|10d484|            // may be restricted; errors will be reported to the output panel.
666|c56cfe|            process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: "/bin/zsh")
667|11ebc0|            let commandLine = ([expandedCommand] + expandedArgs)
668|6598dc|                .map(shellEscape)
669|9739e2|                .joined(separator: " ")
670|9b4d66|            process.arguments = ["-lc", commandLine]
671|adc83b|
672|0cfd10|        case .process:
673|728cfa|            // Use /usr/bin/env so a bare command name can be resolved via PATH.
674|9dce62|            process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: "/usr/bin/env")
675|a102d5|            process.arguments = [expandedCommand] + expandedArgs
676|5f3077|        }
677|adc83b|
678|9cbcc0|        let stdoutPipe = Pipe()
679|edd8ac|        let stderrPipe = Pipe()
680|62a0a1|        process.standardOutput = stdoutPipe
681|7dc19f|        process.standardError = stderrPipe
682|adc83b|
683|059b19|        let lock = NSLock()
684|f7e808|        func forward(_ data: Data) {
685|52e34c|            guard !data.isEmpty else { return }
686|3d8279|            if let s = String(data: data, encoding: .utf8), !s.isEmpty {
687|1a0efa|                lock.lock()
688|ca3df0|                onOutput(s)
689|369d2c|                lock.unlock()
690|a7dc16|            }
691|5f3077|        }
692|adc83b|
693|1e04df|        stdoutPipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler = { handle in
694|4eeee5|            forward(handle.availableData)
695|5f3077|        }
696|86c33c|        stderrPipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler = { handle in
697|4eeee5|            forward(handle.availableData)
698|5f3077|        }
699|adc83b|
700|949e5a|        try process.run()
701|143813|        process.waitUntilExit()
702|adc83b|
703|f6d30d|        stdoutPipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler = nil
704|de4647|        stderrPipe.fileHandleForReading.readabilityHandler = nil
705|adc83b|
706|1a961c|        // Flush any remaining data.
707|78de64|        forward(stdoutPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile())
708|99b3d6|        forward(stderrPipe.fileHandleForReading.readDataToEndOfFile())
709|adc83b|
710|fe411a|        if process.terminationStatus != 0 {
711|a632fc|            throw NSError(
712|489020|                domain: "TasksManager",
713|cad6d3|                code: Int(process.terminationStatus),
714|701bc2|                userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Task exited with code \(process.terminationStatus)"]
715|43d041|            )
716|5f3077|        }
717|97d907|#else
718|3af01f|        // Process execution not available on iOS
719|59a7d5|        onOutput("Error: Task execution is not available on iOS\n")
720|b2fbe2|        throw NSError(
721|78e5e5|            domain: "TasksManager",
722|bf3b57|            code: 1,
723|a20e53|            userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Task execution is not available on iOS"]
724|3143a4|        )
725|3f6acf|#endif
726|27e597|    }
727|adc83b|
728|ae92ad|    // MARK: - JSONC helpers
729|adc83b|
730|a26719|    /// VS Code `tasks.json` often uses JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
731|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
732|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
733|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
734|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
735|adc83b|
736|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
737|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
738|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
739|27e597|    }
740|adc83b|
741|2bbb9c|    // MARK: - Variable expansion
742|adc83b|
743|2af0bf|    private static func expandVariables(_ value: String, workspaceRootURL: URL?) -> String {
744|7c78bd|        var out = value
745|69ca93|        if let workspaceRootURL {
746|059e23|            out = out.replacingOccurrences(of: "${workspaceFolder}", with: workspaceRootURL.path)
747|5f3077|        }
748|300c03|        // `${file}` is not currently resolved (needs active editor tab), but we keep it intact.
749|9231ab|        return out
750|27e597|    }
751|adc83b|
752|cffd9d|    private static func shellEscape(_ s: String) -> String {
753|6b5897|        if s.isEmpty { return "''" }
754|68194e|        // Basic single-quote escaping for zsh/bash.
755|314dc1|        if s.contains(where: { $0.isWhitespace || $0 == "\"" || $0 == "'" || $0 == "\\" || $0 == "(" || $0 == ")" }) {
756|09f4bd|            return "'" + s.replacingOccurrences(of: "'", with: "'\\''") + "'"
757|5f3077|        }
758|48af33|        return s
759|27e597|    }

159|63bca8|// MARK: - Color Hex Extension
160|adc83b|
161|12fceb|extension Color {
162|2aa4ad|    init(hex: String) {
163|a6780c|        let hex = hex.trimmingCharacters(in: CharacterSet.alphanumerics.inverted)
164|2abdc7|        var int: UInt64 = 0
165|bc542d|        Scanner(string: hex).scanHexInt64(&int)
166|d580d5|        let a, r, g, b: UInt64
167|3c6530|        switch hex.count {
168|99c972|        case 3: // RGB (12-bit)
169|3dddf7|            (a, r, g, b) = (255, (int >> 8) * 17, (int >> 4 & 0xF) * 17, (int & 0xF) * 17)
170|68f5fc|        case 6: // RGB (24-bit)
171|887140|            (a, r, g, b) = (255, int >> 16, int >> 8 & 0xFF, int & 0xFF)
172|f9a927|        case 8: // ARGB (32-bit)
173|f3f01d|            (a, r, g, b) = (int >> 24, int >> 16 & 0xFF, int >> 8 & 0xFF, int & 0xFF)
174|520b7d|        default:
175|30aca1|            (a, r, g, b) = (1, 1, 1, 0)
176|5f3077|        }
177|12bb4e|        self.init(
178|505cc1|            .sRGB,
179|23ff46|            red: Double(r) / 255,
180|86e915|            green: Double(g) / 255,
181|cd3d7a|            blue: Double(b) / 255,
182|6a9c25|            opacity: Double(a) / 255
183|3143a4|        )
184|27e597|    }
185|b31277|}

160|5a4644|        let openFiles = editorCore.tabs.map { tab in

162|30e736|                id: tab.id,
163|d90d0f|                filePath: tab.url?.path ?? "",
164|3e7b26|                fileName: tab.fileName,
165|e93877|                cursorLine: editorCore.cursorPosition.line,

167|8c1c74|                scrollPosition: 0,
168|243271|                isUnsaved: tab.isUnsaved,
169|d3da41|                unsavedContent: tab.isUnsaved ? tab.content : nil
170|43d041|            )
171|5f3077|        }
172|d6ed84|        
173|8b0c89|        let activeIndex = editorCore.activeTabId.flatMap { activeId in
174|14b61f|            editorCore.tabs.firstIndex { $0.id == activeId }
175|5f3077|        }
176|d6ed84|        
177|f86b6c|        let windowTitle = editorCore.activeTab?.fileName ?? workspacePath?.components(separatedBy: "/").last
178|d6ed84|        
179|89aaca|        updateWindowState(id: windowId) { state in
180|63f6ce|            state.workspacePath = workspacePath
181|8be2e1|            state.openFiles = openFiles
182|8b3915|            state.activeFileIndex = activeIndex
183|1bf64c|            state.sidebarVisible = editorCore.showSidebar
184|1ba5d0|            state.sidebarWidth = editorCore.sidebarWidth
185|bf01c5|            state.windowTitle = windowTitle

187|27e597|    }

189|b02eb4|    // MARK: - State Restoration to EditorCore
190|b4687f|    
191|7b3e4c|    /// Restore state to an EditorCore instance
192|6032c6|    func restoreState(to editorCore: EditorCore, windowId: UUID) {
193|289939|        guard let state = windowStates[windowId] else { return }
194|d6ed84|        
195|930090|        // Restore sidebar state
196|6ae3e7|        editorCore.showSidebar = state.sidebarVisible
197|3189f8|        editorCore.sidebarWidth = state.sidebarWidth
198|d6ed84|        
199|54ba3d|        // Restore open files
200|558c3c|        for fileState in state.openFiles {
201|266a96|            if !fileState.filePath.isEmpty {
202|cce0be|                let url = URL(fileURLWithPath: fileState.filePath)
203|7827b3|                if FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: fileState.filePath) {
204|c9657b|                    editorCore.openFile(from: url)
205|4e2d32|                }
206|3adb3b|            } else if let content = fileState.unsavedContent {
207|554703|                // Restore unsaved file
208|ccb0b1|                editorCore.addTab(fileName: fileState.fileName, content: content)
209|a7dc16|            }
210|5f3077|        }
211|d6ed84|        
212|f6d7c0|        // Restore active tab
213|e7f308|        if let activeIndex = state.activeFileIndex, activeIndex < editorCore.tabs.count {
214|02a130|            editorCore.selectTab(id: editorCore.tabs[activeIndex].id)
215|5f3077|        }
216|27e597|    }

234|5f3077|        }
235|d6ed84|

254|c93a9c|    /// Request a new window with optional file URL
255|0fd45c|    @MainActor
256|0f50df|    func requestNewWindow(with fileURL: URL? = nil, workspacePath: String? = nil) {
257|ae4d44|        let options = UIScene.ActivationRequestOptions()
258|562215|        options.requestingScene = UIApplication.shared.connectedScenes.first as? UIWindowScene
259|d6ed84|        
260|1859eb|        // Create user activity for the new window
261|14aca1|        let activity = NSUserActivity(activityType: WindowActivity.activityType)
262|f953b9|        activity.title = fileURL?.lastPathComponent ?? "New Window"
263|d6ed84|        
264|1c8fc3|        var userInfo: [String: Any] = [:]
265|aef252|        if let fileURL = fileURL {
266|ebd65f|            userInfo[WindowActivity.fileURLKey] = fileURL.absoluteString
267|5f3077|        }
268|b3d33c|        if let workspacePath = workspacePath {
269|70a85f|            userInfo[WindowActivity.workspacePathKey] = workspacePath
270|5f3077|        }
271|ddaf03|        activity.userInfo = userInfo
272|d6ed84|        
273|e1188a|        UIApplication.shared.requestSceneSessionActivation(
274|889bbb|            nil,
275|76d462|            userActivity: activity,
276|62f7ee|            options: options,
277|21ee2c|            errorHandler: { error in
278|95658f|                print("Failed to create new window: \(error.localizedDescription)")
279|a7dc16|            }
280|3143a4|        )
281|27e597|    }

302|8141ad|        if let uuid = UUID(uuidString: persistentIdentifier) {
303|956e7f|            return uuid
304|5f3077|        }
305|e1e8ff|        // Fallback: create deterministic UUID from identifier

315|8da4f9|        withUnsafeBytes(of: &value) { buffer in
316|615038|            for (index, byte) in buffer.enumerated() where index < 16 {
317|dadee0|                bytes[index] = byte

1|8b6b78|import Foundation
2|9ed0a9|import UIKit
3|adc83b|
4|4d7b2e|/// Highlights all occurrences of the currently selected word in the editor.
5|9741e9|/// This is a key VSCode feature - when you select/double-click a word, all other
6|b48e9d|/// instances get a subtle background highlight.
7|d26d31|final class WordOccurrenceHighlighter {
8|247366|    static let shared = WordOccurrenceHighlighter()
9|54113e|    private init() {}
10|b4687f|    
11|f5c08e|    // MARK: - Configuration
12|b4687f|    
13|7c3bf1|    /// Minimum word length to trigger highlighting
14|d7e9fc|    var minimumWordLength: Int = 2
15|b4687f|    
16|01c4aa|    /// Maximum occurrences to highlight (for performance)
17|c1fe73|    var maxOccurrences: Int = 500
18|b4687f|    
19|3dcc5f|    /// Whether highlighting is enabled
20|cab970|    var isEnabled: Bool = true
21|b4687f|    
22|d9f5b5|    // MARK: - Models
23|b4687f|    
24|bc1b35|    struct Occurrence: Equatable {
25|fc96cf|        let range: NSRange
26|30b904|        let lineNumber: Int
27|27e597|    }
28|b4687f|    
29|36e755|    // MARK: - Public API
30|b4687f|    
31|0db09b|    /// Finds all occurrences of the word at the given selection.
32|782867|    /// Returns empty array if selection is not a valid word.
33|03c715|    func findOccurrences(in text: String, selection: NSRange) -> [Occurrence] {
34|26a118|        guard isEnabled else { return [] }
35|1e8f51|        guard !text.isEmpty else { return [] }
36|d6ed84|        
37|96769a|        // Get the selected word (or word at cursor)
38|8d5934|        let selectedWord = getWordAtSelection(in: text, selection: selection)
39|11239b|        guard let word = selectedWord, word.count >= minimumWordLength else { return [] }
40|d6ed84|        
41|c59428|        // Don't highlight if selection spans multiple words
42|55f097|        if selection.length > 0 {
43|b036f2|            let selectedText = (text as NSString).substring(with: selection)
44|fe4a6e|            if selectedText.contains(" ") || selectedText.contains("\n") {
45|f82059|                return []
46|a7dc16|            }
47|5f3077|        }
48|d6ed84|        
49|fb07c9|        return findAllOccurrences(of: word, in: text)
50|27e597|    }
51|b4687f|    
52|3a75eb|    /// Finds all occurrences of a specific word in text.
53|f7a572|    func findAllOccurrences(of word: String, in text: String) -> [Occurrence] {
54|3cb057|        guard !word.isEmpty, !text.isEmpty else { return [] }
55|d6ed84|        
56|1f64f3|        var occurrences: [Occurrence] = []
57|599630|        let nsText = text as NSString
58|aeec71|        let textLength = nsText.length
59|d6ed84|        
60|51ec77|        // Use word boundary matching for whole words only
61|d0a79c|        var searchStart = 0
62|eeb1ac|        var count = 0
63|d6ed84|        
64|610917|        while searchStart < textLength && count < maxOccurrences {
65|a973f7|            let searchRange = NSRange(location: searchStart, length: textLength - searchStart)
66|ee2e33|            let foundRange = nsText.range(of: word, options: .literal, range: searchRange)
67|3070d1|            
68|d96f17|            if foundRange.location == NSNotFound {
69|74cfd8|                break
70|a7dc16|            }
71|3070d1|            
72|968346|            // Check word boundaries
73|d2562b|            if isWholeWord(range: foundRange, in: nsText) {
74|bb074f|                let lineNumber = lineNumber(at: foundRange.location, in: nsText)
75|1fc2a4|                occurrences.append(Occurrence(range: foundRange, lineNumber: lineNumber))
76|31d0c1|                count += 1
77|a7dc16|            }
78|3070d1|            
79|df59ca|            searchStart = foundRange.location + foundRange.length
80|5f3077|        }
81|d6ed84|        
82|39951e|        return occurrences
83|27e597|    }
84|b4687f|    
85|0f4930|    /// Gets the word at or around the selection/cursor position.
86|71f28a|    func getWordAtSelection(in text: String, selection: NSRange) -> String? {
87|599630|        let nsText = text as NSString
88|e7c576|        let length = nsText.length
89|d6ed84|        
90|ffdf26|        guard length > 0 else { return nil }
91|d6ed84|        
92|deb447|        // If there's a selection, use it directly
93|d7e4d7|        if selection.length > 0 && selection.location + selection.length <= length {
94|7eede4|            let selectedText = nsText.substring(with: selection)
95|726c91|            // Validate it's a word (no spaces/newlines)
96|8f774f|            if !selectedText.contains(" ") && !selectedText.contains("\n") && !selectedText.contains("\t") {
97|ac9589|                return selectedText
98|a7dc16|            }
99|1c8557|            return nil
100|5f3077|        }
101|d6ed84|        
102|7995f7|        // Otherwise, find the word at cursor position
103|4e40d9|        let cursorPos = min(selection.location, length)
104|39fe05|        return wordAt(position: cursorPos, in: nsText)
105|27e597|    }
106|b4687f|    
107|81a958|    // MARK: - Private Helpers
108|b4687f|    
109|caf3f8|    private func wordAt(position: Int, in text: NSString) -> String? {
110|178e14|        let length = text.length
111|6909b9|        guard position >= 0, position <= length else { return nil }
112|d6ed84|        
113|1af2b6|        // Find word start
114|def66a|        var start = position
115|aaa57c|        while start > 0 {
116|52497e|            let char = text.character(at: start - 1)
117|79d904|            if !isWordCharacter(char) {
118|74cfd8|                break
119|a7dc16|            }
120|eca9a8|            start -= 1
121|5f3077|        }
122|d6ed84|        
123|9f8e29|        // Find word end
124|f5c145|        var end = position
125|1d360d|        while end < length {
126|60a211|            let char = text.character(at: end)
127|79d904|            if !isWordCharacter(char) {
128|74cfd8|                break
129|a7dc16|            }
130|6378a7|            end += 1
131|5f3077|        }
132|d6ed84|        
133|5b2f94|        guard end > start else { return nil }
134|d6ed84|        
135|ab8876|        let range = NSRange(location: start, length: end - start)
136|112b3e|        return text.substring(with: range)
137|27e597|    }
138|b4687f|    
139|8b9c99|    private func isWordCharacter(_ char: unichar) -> Bool {
140|ef4ddc|        // Letters, digits, underscore
141|0f6ec6|        let scalar = Unicode.Scalar(char)
142|a78564|        if let s = scalar {
143|99d2b0|            return CharacterSet.alphanumerics.contains(s) || char == 95 // underscore
144|5f3077|        }
145|dc1500|        return false
146|27e597|    }
147|b4687f|    
148|73368d|    private func isWholeWord(range: NSRange, in text: NSString) -> Bool {
149|178e14|        let length = text.length
150|d6ed84|        
151|4aacd9|        // Check character before
152|132159|        if range.location > 0 {
153|aa5c94|            let charBefore = text.character(at: range.location - 1)
154|c5d09f|            if isWordCharacter(charBefore) {
155|473d08|                return false
156|a7dc16|            }
157|5f3077|        }
158|d6ed84|        
159|3389bc|        // Check character after
160|7de0b2|        let afterPos = range.location + range.length
161|fc83e4|        if afterPos < length {
162|c390ca|            let charAfter = text.character(at: afterPos)
163|e03575|            if isWordCharacter(charAfter) {
164|473d08|                return false
165|a7dc16|            }
166|5f3077|        }
167|d6ed84|        
168|4add8d|        return true
169|27e597|    }
170|b4687f|    
171|aac27f|    private func lineNumber(at position: Int, in text: NSString) -> Int {
172|d609cf|        var line = 0
173|8fbf6b|        var pos = 0
174|d6ed84|        
175|63746c|        while pos < position && pos < text.length {
176|93ad89|            if text.character(at: pos) == 10 { // newline
177|6204fa|                line += 1
178|a7dc16|            }
179|c9d564|            pos += 1
180|5f3077|        }
181|d6ed84|        
182|bf9a21|        return line
183|27e597|    }
184|b31277|}
185|adc83b|
186|3b0726|// MARK: - Highlight Colors
187|adc83b|
188|35651a|extension WordOccurrenceHighlighter {

190|3137ba|    static func highlightColor(for theme: Theme) -> UIColor {
191|0a0869|        if theme.isDark {
192|d72402|            return UIColor(white: 1.0, alpha: 0.1)
193|b31999|        } else {
194|74dc13|            return UIColor(white: 0.0, alpha: 0.07)
195|5f3077|        }
196|27e597|    }
197|b4687f|    
198|031232|    /// Border color for word occurrence highlights
199|b0dd2d|    static func borderColor(for theme: Theme) -> UIColor {
200|0a0869|        if theme.isDark {
201|420197|            return UIColor(white: 1.0, alpha: 0.2)
202|b31999|        } else {
203|e6dbda|            return UIColor(white: 0.0, alpha: 0.15)
204|5f3077|        }
205|27e597|    }

120|68094a|    func reload() {
121|288471|        lastErrorMessage = nil
122|741d33|        workspaceSettings = .empty
123|adc83b|
124|de1de1|        guard let root = workspaceRootURL else { return }
125|adc83b|
126|29c204|        let settingsURL = root
127|f52c63|            .appendingPathComponent(".vscode", isDirectory: true)
128|ac5c20|            .appendingPathComponent("settings.json", isDirectory: false)
129|adc83b|
130|4da690|        do {

134|537543|            let obj = try JSONSerialization.jsonObject(with: Data(stripped.utf8), options: [])
135|adc83b|
136|6ffd29|            guard let dict = obj as? [String: Any] else {
137|af3e64|                lastErrorMessage = "Couldn’t parse .vscode/settings.json"
138|53ab34|                return
139|a7dc16|            }
140|adc83b|
141|0e7035|            workspaceSettings = Self.parseWorkspaceSettings(from: dict)
142|853889|        } catch {

144|e71453|            // Only show an error if the file exists but couldn't be read.
145|f2176e|            if FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: settingsURL.path) {
146|90691f|                lastErrorMessage = "Couldn’t load .vscode/settings.json"
147|a7dc16|            }
148|5f3077|        }
149|27e597|    }

158|79ca4f|    func save() {
159|288471|        lastErrorMessage = nil
160|27fcd0|        guard let root = workspaceRootURL else {
161|a04589|            lastErrorMessage = "No workspace folder is open"
162|bef5d6|            return
163|5f3077|        }
164|adc83b|
165|ff9873|        let vscodeDir = root.appendingPathComponent(".vscode", isDirectory: true)
166|37ea42|        let settingsURL = vscodeDir.appendingPathComponent("settings.json", isDirectory: false)
167|adc83b|
168|4da690|        do {
169|bbe253|            try FileManager.default.createDirectory(at: vscodeDir, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
170|adc83b|
171|6c19a0|            let dict = Self.serializeWorkspaceSettings(workspaceSettings)
172|0f31e5|            let data = try JSONSerialization.data(withJSONObject: dict, options: [.prettyPrinted, .sortedKeys])
173|adc83b|
174|613f33|            // Add trailing newline for nicer diffs.
175|c44c47|            var out = String(decoding: data, as: UTF8.self)
176|424c8a|            if !out.hasSuffix("\n") { out += "\n" }
177|adc83b|
178|5e6d38|            try out.data(using: .utf8)?.write(to: settingsURL, options: [.atomic])
179|853889|        } catch {
180|9746f2|            lastErrorMessage = "Couldn’t save .vscode/settings.json"
181|5f3077|        }
182|27e597|    }

188|2a8834|            dict[key] as? Int
189|5f3077|        }
190|6abde4|        func bool(_ key: String) -> Bool? {
191|ad025c|            dict[key] as? Bool
192|5f3077|        }
193|9ee76d|        func string(_ key: String) -> String? {
194|bef963|            dict[key] as? String
195|5f3077|        }
196|5d9d58|        func double(_ key: String) -> Double? {
197|e3c63f|            if let d = dict[key] as? Double { return d }
198|af9729|            if let i = dict[key] as? Int { return Double(i) }
199|1c8557|            return nil
200|5f3077|        }
201|adc83b|
202|260924|        return WorkspaceSettings(
203|c5ac08|            tabSize: int("editor.tabSize"),
204|dbd09f|            insertSpaces: bool("editor.insertSpaces"),
205|90f950|            formatOnSave: bool("editor.formatOnSave"),
206|8561bc|            theme: string("workbench.colorTheme"),

212|10c1a7|    private static func serializeWorkspaceSettings(_ settings: WorkspaceSettings) -> [String: Any] {
213|4bd403|        var dict: [String: Any] = [:]
214|adc83b|
215|5c5c54|        if let tabSize = settings.tabSize { dict["editor.tabSize"] = tabSize }
216|a7ff32|        if let insertSpaces = settings.insertSpaces { dict["editor.insertSpaces"] = insertSpaces }
217|8cb06f|        if let formatOnSave = settings.formatOnSave { dict["editor.formatOnSave"] = formatOnSave }
218|cddc56|        if let theme = settings.theme, !theme.isEmpty { dict["workbench.colorTheme"] = theme }
219|cd41fb|        if let fontFamily = settings.fontFamily, !fontFamily.isEmpty { dict["editor.fontFamily"] = fontFamily }
220|49f99f|        if let fontSize = settings.fontSize { dict["editor.fontSize"] = fontSize }
221|adc83b|
222|7849e9|        return dict
223|27e597|    }
224|adc83b|
225|ae92ad|    // MARK: - JSONC helpers
226|adc83b|
227|196f77|    /// VS Code `settings.json` can contain JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
228|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
229|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
230|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
231|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
232|adc83b|
233|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
234|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
235|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
236|27e597|    }

6|0ad7cc|    static let shared = WorkspaceTrustManager()

8|af5d80|    @Published private(set) var trustedPaths: Set<String> = []
9|b4687f|    
10|641fe5|    private let trustedPathsKey = "workspace.trustedPaths"
11|b4687f|    
12|dff922|    private init() {
13|f19fa2|        loadTrustedPaths()
14|27e597|    }
15|b4687f|    
16|1fa823|    func isTrusted(url: URL) -> Bool {
17|3e9dc5|        return trustedPaths.contains(url.path)
18|27e597|    }
19|b4687f|    
20|970619|    func trust(url: URL) {
21|ce9029|        trustedPaths.insert(url.path)
22|af6dda|        saveTrustedPaths()
23|27e597|    }
24|b4687f|    
25|366fb5|    func revoke(url: URL) {
26|e02e2c|        trustedPaths.remove(url.path)
27|af6dda|        saveTrustedPaths()
28|27e597|    }
29|b4687f|    
30|5d5bd8|    private func loadTrustedPaths() {
31|635890|        if let saved = UserDefaults.standard.array(forKey: trustedPathsKey) as? [String] {
32|3f9da9|            trustedPaths = Set(saved)
33|5f3077|        }
34|27e597|    }
35|b4687f|    
36|6570c2|    private func saveTrustedPaths() {
37|967df8|        UserDefaults.standard.set(Array(trustedPaths), forKey: trustedPathsKey)
38|27e597|    }

148|68094a|    func reload() {
149|288471|        lastErrorMessage = nil
150|adc83b|
151|86eb27|        guard let workspaceRootURL else {
152|9f6110|            // No workspace: keep templates.
153|671444|            if configs.isEmpty {
154|116dea|                configs = LaunchConfig.builtInTemplates

163|adc83b|
164|4da690|        do {

174|99282a|            ensureActiveConfigValid()

176|5f3077|        }

184|5f3077|        }

187|bef5d6|            return
188|5f3077|        }
189|adc83b|
190|f53c33|        activeConfigId = configs.first?.id
191|adc83b|

194|5f3077|        }

233|630842|            // NOTE: Real debug adapter integration will be implemented later.

245|8160ec|    /// VS Code `launch.json` often uses JSON with comments (JSONC). This strips
246|11a55b|    /// both `//` line comments and `/* ... */` block comments.
247|fb989d|    private static func stripJSONComments(_ input: String) -> String {
248|e91279|        // Remove block comments first.
249|5749dc|        let blockPattern = "/\\*[^*]*\\*+(?:[^/*][^*]*\\*+)*/"
250|e0e74b|        let linePattern = "(?m)//.*$"
251|adc83b|
252|aec1b9|        let withoutBlocks = input.replacingOccurrences(of: blockPattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
253|1e4b82|        let withoutLines = withoutBlocks.replacingOccurrences(of: linePattern, with: "", options: .regularExpression)
254|2c31a3|        return withoutLines
255|27e597|    }

37|d497c0|        self.repoURL = repositoryURL
38|46721d|        self.gitDir = repositoryURL.appendingPathComponent(".git")
39|d6ed84|        
40|b424a0|        // Verify .git directory exists
41|6e4239|        var isDir: ObjCBool = false
42|1af6b0|        guard FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: gitDir.path, isDirectory: &isDir),
43|2f0e01|              isDir.boolValue else {
44|1c8557|            return nil
45|5f3077|        }
46|27e597|    }
