224|49d20e|    /// Parses Python traceback output into a structured error
225|7a5685|    func parseTraceback(_ output: String) -> PythonError? {
226|b18c49|        let lines = output.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
227|fabe5e|        var entries: [TracebackEntry] = []
228|fc39ff|        var errorType = ""
229|fe5cf9|        var errorMessage = ""
230|de7cda|        var parsingTraceback = false
231|0f75e4|        var currentFile: String?
232|15d6c7|        var currentLine: Int?
233|60ff7b|        var currentFunction: String?
234|d6ed84|        
235|589d54|        var i = 0
236|9a423c|        while i < lines.count {
237|ef0328|            let line = lines[i]
238|3070d1|            
239|d66c5c|            // Check for traceback header
240|839a36|            if line.contains("Traceback (most recent call last):") {
241|e0be48|                parsingTraceback = true
242|c190bb|                i += 1
243|1df510|                continue
244|a7dc16|            }
245|3070d1|            
246|0c58d7|            // Parse File "...", line X, in ...
247|db15b0|            if parsingTraceback && line.starts(with: "  File \"") {
248|ecf05c|                let pattern = #"File \"([^\"]+)\", line (\d+), in (\w+)"#
249|66048b|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
250|54bbdd|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(location: 0, length: line.utf16.count)) {
251|dd2193|                    
252|4864f3|                    if let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
253|c15c3e|                        currentFile = String(line[fileRange])
254|c9717a|                    }
255|930cdc|                    if let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line),
256|36e8d9|                       let lineNum = Int(line[lineRange]) {
257|338cc2|                        currentLine = lineNum
258|c9717a|                    }
259|bfa86d|                    if let funcRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line) {
260|221b62|                        currentFunction = String(line[funcRange])
261|c9717a|                    }
262|4e2d32|                }
263|c190bb|                i += 1
264|1df510|                continue
265|a7dc16|            }
266|3070d1|            
267|9e990f|            // Parse code line (starts with "    ")
268|72f330|            if parsingTraceback && line.starts(with: "    ") && !line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).isEmpty {
269|5c7857|                if let file = currentFile, let lineNum = currentLine, let function = currentFunction {
270|fc13a3|                    let code = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
271|f6e89d|                    entries.append(TracebackEntry(
272|bc7442|                        file: file,
273|02bd59|                        line: lineNum,
274|64c68e|                        function: function,
275|ccacd2|                        code: code
276|c89922|                    ))
277|4e2d32|                }
278|c4a3f3|                currentFile = nil
279|df6bcb|                currentLine = nil
280|5f9bbc|                currentFunction = nil
281|c190bb|                i += 1
282|1df510|                continue
283|a7dc16|            }
284|3070d1|            
285|3cde42|            // Parse error type and message (last line before blank or end)
286|99b886|            if parsingTraceback && !line.hasPrefix("  ") && !line.isEmpty {
287|af99e3|                let errorPattern = #"^(\w+Error|\w+Exception|KeyboardInterrupt|SystemExit|GeneratorExit):\s*(.*)$"#
288|b7d609|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: errorPattern, options: []),
289|54bbdd|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(location: 0, length: line.utf16.count)) {
290|0323c7|                    if let typeRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
291|3e6979|                        errorType = String(line[typeRange])
292|c9717a|                    }
293|dd22e3|                    if let msgRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line) {
294|ef1f6c|                        errorMessage = String(line[msgRange])
295|c9717a|                    }
296|a11237|                } else if !line.isEmpty {
297|b08f3c|                    // Custom exception class
298|1236d6|                    let components = line.split(separator: ":", maxSplits: 1)
299|494eb5|                    errorType = String(components.first ?? "")
300|5b37fd|                    errorMessage = components.count > 1 ? String(components[1]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : ""
301|4e2d32|                }
302|74cfd8|                break
303|a7dc16|            }
304|3070d1|            
305|d59338|            i += 1
306|5f3077|        }
307|d6ed84|        
308|c41de1|        // Only return error if we found an error type
309|fa0844|        guard !errorType.isEmpty else {
310|1c8557|            return nil
311|5f3077|        }
312|d6ed84|        
313|7a4811|        return PythonError(
314|bb0c2f|            errorType: errorType,
315|ac86d9|            message: errorMessage,
316|e77b15|            traceback: entries,
317|44e486|            fullTraceback: output
318|3143a4|        )
319|27e597|    }

321|98d431|    /// Formats a traceback entry for display
322|366006|    func formatTracebackEntry(_ entry: TracebackEntry) -> String {
323|2e3a15|        var result = "File \"\(entry.file)\", line \(entry.line), in \(entry.function)"
324|4d3e2f|        if let code = entry.code {
325|1b2516|            result += "\n    \(code)"
326|5f3077|        }
327|67ed82|        return result
328|27e597|    }

101|4d6757|    func detectPythonVersion(via ssh: SSHManager) async throws -> String {
102|35312e|        // Try python3 first (more common on modern systems)
103|4da690|        do {
104|0f1706|            let output = try await ssh.execute(command: "python3 --version 2>&1")

107|cffbea|                if !version.isEmpty {
108|72aae1|                    self.pythonCommand = "python3"
109|948ce9|                    return version
110|4e2d32|                }
111|a7dc16|            }
112|853889|        } catch {
113|72ed4f|            // python3 not available, try python
114|5f3077|        }
115|d6ed84|        
116|8eeb15|        // Fallback to python
117|f1f65a|        let output = try await ssh.execute(command: "python --version 2>&1")
118|603b7d|        if output.exitCode == 0 {
119|d90e19|            let version = output.stdout.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespacesAndNewlines)
120|295aa8|            if !version.isEmpty {
121|4a0520|                self.pythonCommand = "python"
122|9ce6e6|                return version
123|a7dc16|            }
124|5f3077|        }
125|d6ed84|        
126|82a19c|        throw RunnerError.executionFailed("No Python installation found on remote system")
127|27e597|    }

222|1f23a5|    // MARK: - Traceback Parsing

224|49d20e|    /// Parses Python traceback output into a structured error
225|7a5685|    func parseTraceback(_ output: String) -> PythonError? {
226|b18c49|        let lines = output.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
227|fabe5e|        var entries: [TracebackEntry] = []
228|fc39ff|        var errorType = ""
229|fe5cf9|        var errorMessage = ""
230|de7cda|        var parsingTraceback = false
231|0f75e4|        var currentFile: String?
232|15d6c7|        var currentLine: Int?
233|60ff7b|        var currentFunction: String?
234|d6ed84|        
235|589d54|        var i = 0
236|9a423c|        while i < lines.count {
237|ef0328|            let line = lines[i]
238|3070d1|            
239|d66c5c|            // Check for traceback header
240|839a36|            if line.contains("Traceback (most recent call last):") {
241|e0be48|                parsingTraceback = true
242|c190bb|                i += 1
243|1df510|                continue
244|a7dc16|            }
245|3070d1|            
246|0c58d7|            // Parse File "...", line X, in ...
247|db15b0|            if parsingTraceback && line.starts(with: "  File \"") {
248|ecf05c|                let pattern = #"File \"([^\"]+)\", line (\d+), in (\w+)"#
249|66048b|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
250|54bbdd|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(location: 0, length: line.utf16.count)) {
251|dd2193|                    
252|4864f3|                    if let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
253|c15c3e|                        currentFile = String(line[fileRange])
254|c9717a|                    }
255|930cdc|                    if let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line),
256|36e8d9|                       let lineNum = Int(line[lineRange]) {
257|338cc2|                        currentLine = lineNum
258|c9717a|                    }
259|bfa86d|                    if let funcRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line) {
260|221b62|                        currentFunction = String(line[funcRange])
261|c9717a|                    }
262|4e2d32|                }
263|c190bb|                i += 1
264|1df510|                continue
265|a7dc16|            }
266|3070d1|            
267|9e990f|            // Parse code line (starts with "    ")
268|72f330|            if parsingTraceback && line.starts(with: "    ") && !line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).isEmpty {
269|5c7857|                if let file = currentFile, let lineNum = currentLine, let function = currentFunction {
270|fc13a3|                    let code = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
271|f6e89d|                    entries.append(TracebackEntry(
272|bc7442|                        file: file,
273|02bd59|                        line: lineNum,
274|64c68e|                        function: function,
275|ccacd2|                        code: code
276|c89922|                    ))
277|4e2d32|                }
278|c4a3f3|                currentFile = nil
279|df6bcb|                currentLine = nil
280|5f9bbc|                currentFunction = nil
281|c190bb|                i += 1
282|1df510|                continue
283|a7dc16|            }
284|3070d1|            
285|3cde42|            // Parse error type and message (last line before blank or end)
286|99b886|            if parsingTraceback && !line.hasPrefix("  ") && !line.isEmpty {
287|af99e3|                let errorPattern = #"^(\w+Error|\w+Exception|KeyboardInterrupt|SystemExit|GeneratorExit):\s*(.*)$"#
288|b7d609|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: errorPattern, options: []),
289|54bbdd|                   let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(location: 0, length: line.utf16.count)) {
290|0323c7|                    if let typeRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line) {
291|3e6979|                        errorType = String(line[typeRange])
292|c9717a|                    }
293|dd22e3|                    if let msgRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line) {
294|ef1f6c|                        errorMessage = String(line[msgRange])
295|c9717a|                    }
296|a11237|                } else if !line.isEmpty {
297|b08f3c|                    // Custom exception class
298|1236d6|                    let components = line.split(separator: ":", maxSplits: 1)
299|494eb5|                    errorType = String(components.first ?? "")
300|5b37fd|                    errorMessage = components.count > 1 ? String(components[1]).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces) : ""
301|4e2d32|                }
302|74cfd8|                break
303|a7dc16|            }
304|3070d1|            
305|d59338|            i += 1
306|5f3077|        }
307|d6ed84|        
308|c41de1|        // Only return error if we found an error type
309|fa0844|        guard !errorType.isEmpty else {
310|1c8557|            return nil
311|5f3077|        }
312|d6ed84|        
313|7a4811|        return PythonError(
314|bb0c2f|            errorType: errorType,
315|ac86d9|            message: errorMessage,
316|e77b15|            traceback: entries,
317|44e486|            fullTraceback: output
318|3143a4|        )
319|27e597|    }

321|98d431|    /// Formats a traceback entry for display
322|366006|    func formatTracebackEntry(_ entry: TracebackEntry) -> String {
323|2e3a15|        var result = "File \"\(entry.file)\", line \(entry.line), in \(entry.function)"
324|4d3e2f|        if let code = entry.code {
325|1b2516|            result += "\n    \(code)"
326|5f3077|        }
327|67ed82|        return result
328|27e597|    }

148|ee062c|    /// Build command for executing Swift code
149|795436|    func buildCommand(for file: String, args: [String]) -> String {
150|85cb07|        let filePath = escapePath(file)
151|f1d336|        var command = ""
152|d6ed84|        
153|5608a1|        // Determine execution mode based on file/project structure
154|24c8ff|        let mode = determineExecutionMode(for: file)
155|d6ed84|        
156|a187af|        switch mode {
157|b965d7|        case .swiftRun:
158|ab8b23|            // SPM project - use swift run
159|772f80|            command = "swift run"
160|c29c02|            if let target = buildConfig.target {
161|0822f3|                command += " \(target)"
162|a7dc16|            }
163|732692|            // Add additional flags
164|b5726d|            if !buildConfig.additionalFlags.isEmpty {
165|6af301|                command += " \(buildConfig.additionalFlags.joined(separator: " "))"
166|a7dc16|            }
167|3070d1|            
168|503771|        case .direct:
169|bd3196|            // Single file - use swift directly
170|0afbe8|            command = "swift \(filePath)"
171|3070d1|            
172|4161d7|        case .swiftc:
173|69c5f9|            // Compile then execute
174|1bbec6|            let binaryName = "swift_binary_\(UUID().uuidString.prefix(8))"
175|b6e8ff|            let tempBinary = "/tmp/\(binaryName)"
176|3070d1|            
177|07170e|            // Build compilation command
178|07669a|            var compileFlags = [buildConfig.optimization.rawValue]
179|b5726d|            if !buildConfig.additionalFlags.isEmpty {
180|66ad97|                compileFlags.append(contentsOf: buildConfig.additionalFlags)
181|a7dc16|            }
182|3070d1|            
183|d12a4c|            command = "swiftc \(compileFlags.joined(separator: " ")) \(filePath) -o \(tempBinary) && \(tempBinary)"
184|5f3077|        }
185|d6ed84|        
186|c03742|        // Add arguments
187|372b2b|        if !args.isEmpty {
188|736e04|            let escapedArgs = args.map { escapeArgument($0) }.joined(separator: " ")
189|6ab3de|            command += " \(escapedArgs)"
190|5f3077|        }
191|d6ed84|        
192|d8c0f7|        return command
193|27e597|    }

195|b97ba2|    func execute(file: String, args: [String]) async throws -> ExecutionResult {

206|43d041|            )

208|d6ed84|        
209|c2ccde|        return ExecutionResult(

226|d4a1b0|                if let version = parseSwiftVersionOutput(versionOutput) {
227|4fc7e9|                    self.detectedSwiftVersion = version
228|948ce9|                    return version
229|4e2d32|                }
230|a7dc16|            }
231|853889|        } catch {
232|c3f9b3|            // Try swiftc as fallback
233|5f3077|        }
234|d6ed84|

245|5d5441|        throw RunnerError.executionFailed("No Swift installation found on remote system")
246|27e597|    }

380|b4687f|    
381|3eead1|    /// Parses Swift compiler errors/warnings from output
382|15e5b1|    func parseCompilerErrors(_ output: String) -> SwiftCompilerError? {
383|b18c49|        let lines = output.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
384|60e665|        var errors: [CompilerDiagnostic] = []
385|86161f|        var notes: [String] = []
386|546cb5|        var contextLines: [String] = []
387|d6ed84|        
388|aadab6|        // Swift error format: "file.swift:10:5: error: message"
389|d540ab|        // Or: "file.swift:10:5: warning: message"
390|d9dd33|        let errorPattern = #"^(.*):(\d+):(\d+):\s*(error|warning|note):\s*(.*)$"#
391|d6ed84|        
392|08a605|        for line in lines {
393|d16d4b|            // Try to match standard Swift error format
394|2a4fd3|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: errorPattern, options: []),
395|8caef9|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(location: 0, length: line.utf16.count)) {
396|216278|                
397|f5c7a7|                let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
398|1bc1e8|                let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line)
399|926b40|                let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line)
400|4aff93|                let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 4), in: line)
401|93d145|                let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 5), in: line)
402|216278|                
403|a0f7bc|                let file = fileRange.map { String(line[$0]) } ?? ""
404|24536e|                let lineNum = lineRange.flatMap { Int(line[$0]) } ?? 0
405|4a3aa5|                let colNum = colRange.flatMap { Int(line[$0]) } ?? 0
406|2020bc|                let severity = severityRange.map { String(line[$0]) } ?? "error"
407|a06cde|                let message = messageRange.map { String(line[$0]) } ?? ""
408|216278|                
409|c20e60|                if severity == "error" {
410|84c706|                    errors.append(CompilerDiagnostic(
411|67234d|                        severity: .error,
412|1c5846|                        message: message,
413|bc7442|                        file: file,
414|02bd59|                        line: lineNum,
415|60e535|                        column: colNum,
416|9aae14|                        category: nil
417|c89922|                    ))
418|4e2d32|                }
419|37d266|            } else if line.contains("error:") || line.contains("Error:") {
420|ce9840|                // Try to parse non-standard error format
421|8c9b5b|                if let errorInfo = parseGenericError(line) {
422|2e1a71|                    errors.append(errorInfo)
423|4e2d32|                }
424|9722ee|            } else if !line.isEmpty && !line.contains(":") {
425|df1fa7|                // Could be context/suggestion line
426|4f90a8|                contextLines.append(line)
427|a7dc16|            }
428|5f3077|        }
429|d6ed84|        
430|7b6cae|        // Return the first error as the main error
431|71b3c2|        guard let firstError = errors.first else {
432|1c8557|            return nil
433|5f3077|        }
434|d6ed84|        
435|9c6b7d|        // Extract suggestions from context lines
436|43b6b2|        let suggestions = contextLines.filter { line in
437|76c4b6|            line.contains("did you mean") ||
438|a5299e|            line.contains("replace with") ||
439|f1cf4c|            line.contains("insert") ||
440|9db734|            line.contains("remove")
441|5f3077|        }
442|d6ed84|        
443|fc8dfd|        return SwiftCompilerError(
444|66b4a4|            errorType: "SwiftCompilerError",
445|3c4165|            message: firstError.message,
446|20168c|            file: firstError.file,
447|9d47a6|            line: firstError.line,
448|54690b|            column: firstError.column,
449|789fd3|            context: contextLines.first,
450|e7e841|            suggestions: suggestions,
451|751514|            fullOutput: output
452|3143a4|        )
453|27e597|    }
454|b4687f|    
455|83730a|    /// Format Swift error for display in IDE
456|9ea945|    func formatErrorForDisplay(_ error: SwiftCompilerError) -> String {
457|ed391d|        var output = "[\(error.errorType)] \(error.message)"
458|d6ed84|        
459|ea793d|        output += "\n  File: \(error.file)"
460|99fe87|        output += ":\(error.line)"
461|c11086|        if error.column > 0 {
462|4b5be1|            output += ":\(error.column)"
463|5f3077|        }
464|d6ed84|        
465|df0a8a|        if let context = error.context {
466|623b09|            output += "\n\n  \(context)"
467|5f3077|        }
468|d6ed84|        
469|79d2a4|        if !error.suggestions.isEmpty {
470|de5e72|            output += "\n\nSuggestions:\n"
471|234d58|            for suggestion in error.suggestions.prefix(3) {
472|6a8c90|                output += "  • \(suggestion)\n"

478|b4687f|    
479|235230|    /// Extract all diagnostics (errors and warnings) from output
480|3c31dc|    func extractDiagnostics(_ output: String) -> [CompilerDiagnostic] {
481|a5a333|        var diagnostics: [CompilerDiagnostic] = []
482|b18c49|        let lines = output.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
483|d6ed84|        
484|57b155|        let pattern = #"^(.*):(\d+):(\d+):\s*(error|warning|note):\s*(.*)$"#
485|d6ed84|        
486|08a605|        for line in lines {
487|6dac5d|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []),
488|8caef9|               let match = regex.firstMatch(in: line, options: [], range: NSRange(location: 0, length: line.utf16.count)) {
489|216278|                
490|f5c7a7|                let fileRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: line)
491|1bc1e8|                let lineRange = Range(match.range(at: 2), in: line)
492|926b40|                let colRange = Range(match.range(at: 3), in: line)
493|4aff93|                let severityRange = Range(match.range(at: 4), in: line)
494|93d145|                let messageRange = Range(match.range(at: 5), in: line)
495|216278|                
496|a0f7bc|                let file = fileRange.map { String(line[$0]) } ?? ""
497|24536e|                let lineNum = lineRange.flatMap { Int(line[$0]) } ?? 0
498|4a3aa5|                let colNum = colRange.flatMap { Int(line[$0]) } ?? 0
499|6af09a|                let severityStr = severityRange.map { String(line[$0]) } ?? "error"
500|a06cde|                let message = messageRange.map { String(line[$0]) } ?? ""
501|216278|                
502|fb7c4c|                let severity: CompilerDiagnostic.Severity
503|65312a|                switch severityStr.lowercased() {
504|b17116|                case "error": severity = .error
505|07a856|                case "warning": severity = .warning
506|815231|                case "note": severity = .note
507|fc6eb4|                default: severity = .error
508|4e2d32|                }
509|216278|                
510|5b8490|                diagnostics.append(CompilerDiagnostic(
511|2116ef|                    severity: severity,
512|88bd6a|                    message: message,
513|7b52a4|                    file: file,
514|88de6d|                    line: lineNum,
515|94a51f|                    column: colNum,
516|eed66a|                    category: nil
517|2188d8|                ))
518|a7dc16|            }
519|5f3077|        }
520|d6ed84|        
521|2d5ba2|        return diagnostics
522|27e597|    }

553|556c94|    private func parseGenericError(_ line: String) -> CompilerDiagnostic? {
554|113bf9|        // Try to extract error info from lines like "error: message" or "Error: message"
555|03c851|        if let colonIndex = line.firstIndex(of: ":") {
556|4f69a9|            let message = String(line[colonIndex...].dropFirst()).trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
557|720e2d|            return CompilerDiagnostic(
558|47328f|                severity: .error,
559|596fe8|                message: message,
560|1bd6ec|                file: "",
561|b5daa2|                line: 0,
562|b7efb0|                column: 0,
563|5b1136|                category: nil
564|43d041|            )
565|5f3077|        }
566|c2ae65|        return nil
567|27e597|    }

570|ff22be|        return path.replacingOccurrences(of: " ", with: "\\ ")

572|441be6|                   .replacingOccurrences(of: "'", with: "'\"'\"'")

580|5f3077|        }
581|90c6d1|        return arg
582|27e597|    }

663|1c1133|extension SwiftRunner {
664|5326ff|    /// Parse Package.swift to extract package information
665|9a5b22|    func parsePackageManifest(at path: String, via ssh: SSHManager) async throws -> SwiftPackage {
666|02dea3|        let manifestPath = "\(path)/Package.swift"
667|d6ed84|        
668|c55fe0|        // Read Package.swift content
669|9a2920|        let output = try await ssh.execute(command: "cat \(escapePath(manifestPath))")
670|7969c0|        let content = output.stdout
671|d6ed84|        
672|1be157|        // Extract package name
673|7c7547|        let namePattern = #"name:\s*\"([^\"]+)\""#
674|73d465|        var packageName = "Unknown"
675|6b8e6c|        if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: namePattern, options: []),
676|828bcb|           let match = regex.firstMatch(in: content, options: [], range: NSRange(location: 0, length: content.utf16.count)),
677|d64ffe|           let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: content) {
678|c5dcfc|            packageName = String(content[range])
679|5f3077|        }
680|d6ed84|        
681|c09632|        // Extract target names (simplified)
682|0a7864|        let targetPattern = #"\.target\(name:\s*\"([^\"]+)\""#
683|82e938|        var targets: [String] = []
684|22b2bb|        if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: targetPattern, options: []) {
685|e1da38|            let matches = regex.matches(in: content, options: [], range: NSRange(location: 0, length: content.utf16.count))
686|7c58fe|            for match in matches {
687|3f9a81|                if let range = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: content) {
688|eac202|                    targets.append(String(content[range]))
689|4e2d32|                }
690|a7dc16|            }
691|5f3077|        }
692|d6ed84|        
693|06184a|        // Check for executable products
694|1111af|        let hasExecutable = content.contains(".executable(") ||
695|851983|                           content.contains("products: [.executable")
696|d6ed84|        
697|537919|        return SwiftPackage(
698|0ce3c6|            name: packageName,
699|261e6a|            path: path,
700|cc0733|            targets: targets,
701|8c8348|            hasExecutable: hasExecutable
702|3143a4|        )
703|27e597|    }
704|b31277|}
705|adc83b|

255|d6ed84|        
256|a1b6fa|        // Cache result
257|90002a|        cacheAnalysis(hash: codeHash, result: result)
258|d6ed84|        
259|67ed82|        return result
260|27e597|    }
261|b4687f|    
262|ce9456|    /// Quick pre-flight check
263|174e0b|    public func canExecuteSafely(code: String, language: Language? = nil) -> Bool {
264|480676|        let result = analyze(code: code, language: language)
265|37426e|        return result.executionRecommendation != .blocked && 
266|c93759|               result.riskAssessment.score < 80
267|27e597|    }
268|b4687f|    
269|495b0b|    /// Clear analysis cache
270|d7763f|    public func clearCache() {
271|1553f6|        cacheQueue.sync {
272|7a06ce|            cache.removeAll()
273|5f3077|        }
274|27e597|    }
275|b4687f|    
276|b06c80|    // MARK: - Analysis Methods
277|b4687f|    
278|352f7e|    /// Detect imports/requires/includes in code
279|5df77f|    public func detectImports(code: String, language: Language) -> [String] {
280|eae0c9|        let patterns = getPatterns(for: language)
281|b1aa30|        var imports: [String] = []
282|d6ed84|        
283|5ca9ff|        for pattern in patterns.importPatterns {
284|ae688c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) {
285|d63259|                let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
286|5adc20|                let matches = regex.matches(in: code, options: [], range: range)
287|216278|                
288|7adf33|                for match in matches {
289|7b6b67|                    if let importRange = Range(match.range(at: 1), in: code) {
290|7223a1|                        let importName = String(code[importRange])
291|b228ec|                        imports.append(importName)
292|c9717a|                    }
293|4e2d32|                }
294|a7dc16|            }
295|5f3077|        }
296|d6ed84|        
297|5f4561|        return Array(Set(imports)).sorted()
298|27e597|    }
299|b4687f|    
300|de7f41|    /// Detect network usage patterns
301|7eb801|    public func detectNetworkUsage(code: String) -> Bool {
302|5adbdd|        let networkPatterns = [
303|dc6776|            // JavaScript/TypeScript
304|c36701|            "fetch\\s*\\(",
305|fbfdbc|            "XMLHttpRequest",
306|aef9e5|            "axios", "request", "http\\.", "https\\.",
307|b5234e|            "WebSocket", "Socket\\.IO", "socket",
308|0d9df5|            "navigator\\.sendBeacon",
309|f9ddb2|            "new\\s+Request\\s*\\(",
310|3070d1|            
311|6a07d4|            // Python
312|e31867|            "requests\\.", "urllib", "http\\.client",
313|b91da8|            "socket\\.socket", "asyncio\\.open_connection",
314|2d47a3|            "aiohttp", "httpx",
315|3070d1|            
316|e0cdf6|            // Swift
317|d029ad|            "URLSession", "URLRequest", "Alamofire",
318|281745|            "NSURLConnection", "CFNetwork",
319|3070d1|            
320|d5f897|            // General
321|7f04f7|            "ws://", "wss://", "http://", "https://",
322|d6a8f4|            "@\\w+\\.com", // Email patterns
323|b0b414|            "api\\.", "apiKey", "API_KEY"
324|220505|        ]
325|d6ed84|        
326|46e9cb|        return containsAnyPattern(code: code, patterns: networkPatterns)
327|27e597|    }
328|b4687f|    
329|f138ef|    /// Detect file system usage patterns
330|a75b55|    public func detectFileSystemUsage(code: String) -> Bool {
331|e09465|        let fsPatterns = [
332|dc6776|            // JavaScript/TypeScript
333|cefe16|            "fs\\.", "require\\s*\\(\\s*['\"]fs", "fs/promises",
334|d08061|            "path\\.", "require\\s*\\(\\s*['\"]path",
335|521ba3|            "os\\.", "process\\.cwd",
336|3070d1|            
337|6a07d4|            // Python
338|cc9070|            "open\\s*\\(", "with\\s+open\\s*\\(",
339|0a3bcd|            "os\\.path", "pathlib", "shutil", "fileinput",
340|ace7ad|            "os\\.mkdir", "os\\.makedirs", "os\\.remove",
341|3070d1|            
342|e0cdf6|            // Swift
343|11e511|            "FileManager", "FileHandle",
344|1d3aca|            "URL\\s*\\(.*fileURLWithPath",
345|3f994f|            "NSFileManager", "NSFileHandle",
346|3070d1|            
347|d5f897|            // General
348|f59bf8|            "\\.readFile", "\\.writeFile",
349|9731f5|            "createReadStream", "createWriteStream",
350|f2b289|            "readdir", "readdirSync", "read_dir"
351|220505|        ]
352|d6ed84|        
353|066bba|        return containsAnyPattern(code: code, patterns: fsPatterns)
354|27e597|    }
355|b4687f|    
356|db7f64|    /// Estimate code complexity
357|8e9fb4|    public func estimateComplexity(code: String, language: Language? = nil) -> ComplexityScore {
358|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
359|e5b771|        let nonEmptyLines = lines.filter { !$0.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces).isEmpty }
360|3922f0|        let linesOfCode = nonEmptyLines.count
361|d6ed84|        
362|84d219|        // Count functions
363|09431a|        let functionPattern = getFunctionPattern(for: language)
364|2209e8|        let functionCount = countMatches(code: code, pattern: functionPattern)
365|d6ed84|        
366|3ee089|        // Calculate cyclomatic complexity (branches + 1)
367|bbfe9a|        let branchKeywords = ["if", "while", "for", "switch", "case", "catch", "&&", "||", "?"]
368|200f0c|        var cyclomaticComplexity = 1
369|aab704|        for keyword in branchKeywords {
370|ad011c|            cyclomaticComplexity += countOccurrences(code: code, of: keyword)
371|5f3077|        }
372|d6ed84|        
373|21bfff|        // Calculate nesting depth
374|54942b|        let nestingDepth = calculateNestingDepth(code: code)
375|d6ed84|        
376|5b79aa|        // Cognitive complexity (simplified)
377|15de81|        let cognitiveComplexity = calculateCognitiveComplexity(
378|d924a7|            cyclomaticComplexity: cyclomaticComplexity,
379|2380f0|            nestingDepth: nestingDepth,
380|34c679|            functionCount: functionCount
381|3143a4|        )
382|d6ed84|        
383|7e4f4b|        // Overall score (0-100)
384|841d4a|        let score = calculateOverallComplexityScore(
385|5c6d46|            linesOfCode: linesOfCode,
386|d924a7|            cyclomaticComplexity: cyclomaticComplexity,
387|2380f0|            nestingDepth: nestingDepth,
388|34c679|            functionCount: functionCount
389|3143a4|        )
390|d6ed84|        
391|a5d810|        return ComplexityScore(
392|f27c8c|            score: score,
393|d924a7|            cyclomaticComplexity: cyclomaticComplexity,
394|5c6d46|            linesOfCode: linesOfCode,
395|2380f0|            nestingDepth: nestingDepth,
396|96101d|            functionCount: functionCount,
397|e7006c|            cognitiveComplexity: cognitiveComplexity
398|3143a4|        )
399|27e597|    }
400|b4687f|    
401|577138|    /// Find unsafe patterns in code
402|c56133|    public func findUnsafePatterns(code: String, language: Language? = nil) -> [SecurityWarning] {
403|a1871e|        var warnings: [SecurityWarning] = []
404|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
405|d6ed84|        
406|e6c20f|        // Critical patterns
407|f10f4c|        warnings.append(contentsOf: findEvalPatterns(code: code, lines: lines))
408|094453|        warnings.append(contentsOf: findInjectionPatterns(code: code, lines: lines))
409|dd85d5|        warnings.append(contentsOf: findUnsafeCodePatterns(code: code, lines: lines, language: language))
410|d6ed84|        
411|e8dc9c|        // High severity
412|3f1b69|        warnings.append(contentsOf: findCryptoIssues(code: code, lines: lines))
413|bcf5cd|        warnings.append(contentsOf: findResourceExhaustion(code: code, lines: lines))
414|d6ed84|        
415|6830d1|        // Medium severity
416|f40ff4|        warnings.append(contentsOf: findPrivacyIssues(code: code, lines: lines))
417|d6ed84|        
418|1bdbe4|        // Sort by severity
419|30d9ee|        return warnings.sorted { $0.severity.priority > $1.severity.priority }
420|27e597|    }
421|b4687f|    
422|81a958|    // MARK: - Private Helpers
423|b4687f|    
424|127778|    private func initializePatterns() {
425|b5a010|        // JavaScript/TypeScript patterns
426|11a25e|        patterns[.javascript] = LanguagePatterns(
427|201340|            importPatterns: [
428|1f0f86|                "(?:import|require)\\s*\\(?(?:['\"])([^'\"]+)(?:['\"])",
429|885774|                "import\\s+.*?\\s+from\\s+['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]",
430|ddcae6|                "import\\s+['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]"
431|97e7d5|            ],
432|8c3f01|            functionPattern: "(?:function|const|let|var)\\s+(\\w+)\\s*[=:]\\s*(?:async\\s*)?(?:function\\s*\\(|\\([^)]*\\)\\s*=>)",
433|e5c3f0|            unsafePatterns: [
434|cb2277|                "eval\\s*\\(": .critical,
435|f55fab|                "Function\\s*\\(": .high,
436|469b84|                "setTimeout\\s*\\([^,]+,": .medium,
437|4a93ab|                "setInterval\\s*\\([^,]+,": .medium
438|324820|            ]
439|3143a4|        )
440|d6ed84|        
441|c25e43|        // TypeScript uses same patterns as JavaScript
442|70c7c7|        patterns[.typescript] = patterns[.javascript]
443|d6ed84|        
444|4803e7|        // Python patterns
445|d2c69f|        patterns[.python] = LanguagePatterns(
446|201340|            importPatterns: [
447|af3784|                "(?:import|from)\\s+([\\w.]+)",
448|bbeebf|                "__import__\\s*\\(\\s*['\"]([^'\"]+)['\"]"
449|97e7d5|            ],
450|cda67a|            functionPattern: "(?:def|lambda)\\s+(\\w+)",
451|e5c3f0|            unsafePatterns: [
452|cb2277|                "eval\\s*\\(": .critical,
453|d30f18|                "exec\\s*\\(": .critical,
454|0cc5e1|                "compile\\s*\\(": .high,
455|ce7e5a|                "__import__\\s*\\(": .medium,
456|a463de|                "subprocess\\.": .high,
457|895244|                "os\\.system": .critical,
458|2e763b|                "pickle\\.loads": .high
459|324820|            ]
460|3143a4|        )
461|d6ed84|        
462|f069bf|        // Swift patterns
463|08be88|        patterns[.swift] = LanguagePatterns(
464|201340|            importPatterns: [
465|6bacac|                "import\\s+([\\w.]+)"
466|97e7d5|            ],
467|885722|            functionPattern: "(?:func)\\s+(\\w+)",
468|e5c3f0|            unsafePatterns: [
469|2de893|                "NSClassFromString": .medium,
470|dad6a1|                "unsafe": .high,
471|bd8e12|                "UnsafePointer": .high,
472|115f22|                "UnsafeMutablePointer": .high,
473|ea85df|                "UnsafeRawPointer": .high,
474|a17a63|                "UnsafeMutableRawPointer": .high,
475|4b0f3c|                "UnsafeBufferPointer": .high,
476|c5a950|                "dlopen": .critical,
477|267500|                "dlsym": .critical,
478|0bfd51|                "NSBundle\\.main\\.executablePath": .medium
479|324820|            ]
480|3143a4|        )
481|27e597|    }
482|b4687f|    
483|3815e2|    private func getPatterns(for language: Language) -> LanguagePatterns {
484|855641|        return patterns[language] ?? patterns[.javascript]!
485|27e597|    }
486|b4687f|    
487|290151|    private func getFunctionPattern(for language: Language?) -> String {
488|fb1cf7|        guard let lang = language else {
489|d3d8cb|            return "(?:function|def|func)\\s+(\\w+)"
490|5f3077|        }
491|d5491f|        return getPatterns(for: lang).functionPattern
492|27e597|    }
493|b4687f|    
494|d565b1|    private func containsAnyPattern(code: String, patterns: [String]) -> Bool {
495|9ac756|        for pattern in patterns {
496|4b744c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [.caseInsensitive]) {
497|d63259|                let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
498|f4a894|                if regex.firstMatch(in: code, options: [], range: range) != nil {
499|e5c602|                    return true
500|4e2d32|                }
501|a7dc16|            }
502|5f3077|        }
503|dc1500|        return false
504|27e597|    }
505|b4687f|    
506|e72ed6|    private func countMatches(code: String, pattern: String) -> Int {
507|a4a259|        guard let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) else {
508|5889ee|            return 0
509|5f3077|        }
510|72a5f1|        let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
511|bd0c63|        return regex.matches(in: code, options: [], range: range).count
512|27e597|    }
513|b4687f|    
514|3fb8da|    private func countOccurrences(code: String, of substring: String) -> Int {
515|eeb1ac|        var count = 0
516|1ce335|        var searchRange = code.startIndex..<code.endIndex
517|d6ed84|        
518|d2c26b|        while let range = code.range(of: substring, options: [], range: searchRange) {
519|8dd0e8|            count += 1
520|395703|            searchRange = range.upperBound..<code.endIndex
521|5f3077|        }
522|d6ed84|        
523|c7b6e6|        return count
524|27e597|    }
525|b4687f|    
526|d9e383|    private func calculateNestingDepth(code: String) -> Int {
527|fdeff0|        let lines = code.components(separatedBy: .newlines)
528|c431d9|        var maxDepth = 0
529|45daec|        var currentDepth = 0
530|d6ed84|        
531|08a605|        for line in lines {
532|ec6750|            let trimmed = line.trimmingCharacters(in: .whitespaces)
533|3070d1|            
534|af53d6|            // Count opening braces/brackets
535|eb0439|            let openCount = trimmed.filter { "{[(".contains($0) }.count
536|98a08d|            let closeCount = trimmed.filter { "}])".contains($0) }.count
537|3070d1|            
538|8b7b8f|            // Check for control structures that increase depth
539|def7da|            let controlPatterns = ["if\\s*\\(", "for\\s*\\(", "while\\s*\\(", "switch\\s*"]
540|bd789f|            var hasControl = false
541|20955e|            for pattern in controlPatterns {
542|901065|                if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) {
543|315a22|                    if regex.firstMatch(in: trimmed, options: [], range: NSRange(trimmed.startIndex..., in: trimmed)) != nil {
544|db2756|                        hasControl = true
545|28a64b|                        break
546|c9717a|                    }
547|4e2d32|                }
548|a7dc16|            }
549|3070d1|            
550|f34df0|            if hasControl && openCount == 0 {
551|d1213c|                currentDepth += 1
552|a7dc16|            }
553|3070d1|            
554|44b58d|            currentDepth += openCount - closeCount
555|2e813c|            maxDepth = max(maxDepth, currentDepth)
556|5f3077|        }
557|d6ed84|        
558|5cd98e|        return maxDepth
559|27e597|    }
560|b4687f|    
561|7f9ee5|    private func calculateCognitiveComplexity(
562|c1d6ef|        cyclomaticComplexity: Int,
563|74fda6|        nestingDepth: Int,
564|a0a763|        functionCount: Int
565|b9eebc|    ) -> Int {
566|7617e2|        return cyclomaticComplexity + (nestingDepth * 2) + (functionCount / 2)
567|27e597|    }
568|b4687f|    
569|e38800|    private func calculateOverallComplexityScore(
570|7ef2ff|        linesOfCode: Int,
571|c1d6ef|        cyclomaticComplexity: Int,
572|74fda6|        nestingDepth: Int,
573|a0a763|        functionCount: Int
574|b9eebc|    ) -> Int {
575|268b95|        var score = 0
576|d6ed84|        
577|7fc977|        // Lines of code factor (max 20 points)
578|8c66aa|        score += min(20, linesOfCode / 50)
579|d6ed84|        
580|db1084|        // Cyclomatic complexity factor (max 30 points)
581|f522d8|        score += min(30, cyclomaticComplexity * 2)
582|d6ed84|        
583|149d5d|        // Nesting depth factor (max 25 points)
584|85f225|        score += min(25, nestingDepth * 5)
585|d6ed84|        
586|b29fab|        // Function count factor (max 25 points)
587|3a047f|        score += min(25, functionCount * 2)
588|d6ed84|        
589|230f69|        return min(100, score)
590|27e597|    }
591|b4687f|    
592|75829f|    // MARK: - Security Pattern Detection
593|b4687f|    
594|1e0038|    private func findEvalPatterns(code: String, lines: [String]) -> [SecurityWarning] {
595|a1871e|        var warnings: [SecurityWarning] = []
596|d6ed84|        
597|e1466a|        let evalPatterns = [
598|412f30|            ("eval\\s*\\(", SecurityWarning.Severity.critical, "eval() execution"),
599|f5623b|            ("new\\s+Function\\s*\\(", SecurityWarning.Severity.critical, "Function constructor"),
600|2d4b34|            ("setTimeout\\s*\\(['\"]", SecurityWarning.Severity.high, "setTimeout with string"),
601|55b785|            ("setInterval\\s*\\(['\"]", SecurityWarning.Severity.high, "setInterval with string")
602|220505|        ]
603|d6ed84|        
604|677987|        for (pattern, severity, description) in evalPatterns {
605|ae688c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) {
606|d63259|                let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
607|5adc20|                let matches = regex.matches(in: code, options: [], range: range)
608|216278|                
609|7adf33|                for match in matches {
610|ab4bd7|                    let line = findLineNumber(for: match.range, in: lines)
611|6ce799|                    warnings.append(SecurityWarning(
612|7507a6|                        severity: severity,
613|7d4a7d|                        category: .eval,
614|2f4699|                        pattern: pattern,
615|3ce613|                        line: line,
616|a0123b|                        message: "\(description) detected - arbitrary code execution risk",
617|9632d3|                        suggestion: "Replace with direct function calls or safe alternatives"
618|c89922|                    ))
619|4e2d32|                }
620|a7dc16|            }
621|5f3077|        }
622|d6ed84|        
623|ff5dbb|        return warnings
624|27e597|    }
625|b4687f|    
626|ce5a68|    private func findInjectionPatterns(code: String, lines: [String]) -> [SecurityWarning] {
627|a1871e|        var warnings: [SecurityWarning] = []
628|d6ed84|        
629|ff47b3|        let injectionPatterns = [
630|115624|            ("innerHTML\\s*[=:]", SecurityWarning.Severity.high, "innerHTML assignment"),
631|faf52c|            ("outerHTML\\s*[=:]", SecurityWarning.Severity.high, "outerHTML assignment"),
632|2527d5|            ("document\\.write\\s*\\(", SecurityWarning.Severity.high, "document.write"),
633|d955c8|            ("\\.html\\s*\\(", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "jQuery .html()"),
634|ec8c29|            ("sql|SELECT|INSERT|UPDATE|DELETE.*\\+", SecurityWarning.Severity.critical, "SQL concatenation"),
635|f82cc2|            ("process\\.env", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Environment variable access")
636|220505|        ]
637|d6ed84|        
638|92f2d3|        for (pattern, severity, description) in injectionPatterns {
639|4b744c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [.caseInsensitive]) {
640|d63259|                let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
641|5adc20|                let matches = regex.matches(in: code, options: [], range: range)
642|216278|                
643|7adf33|                for match in matches {
644|ab4bd7|                    let line = findLineNumber(for: match.range, in: lines)
645|6ce799|                    warnings.append(SecurityWarning(
646|7507a6|                        severity: severity,
647|fabf50|                        category: .injection,
648|2f4699|                        pattern: pattern,
649|3ce613|                        line: line,
650|3808aa|                        message: "\(description) - injection risk",
651|efcac1|                        suggestion: "Use parameterized queries, textContent, or safe sanitization"
652|c89922|                    ))
653|4e2d32|                }
654|a7dc16|            }
655|5f3077|        }
656|d6ed84|        
657|ff5dbb|        return warnings
658|27e597|    }
659|b4687f|    
660|d1ac28|    private func findUnsafeCodePatterns(
661|412ab1|        code: String,
662|f63708|        lines: [String],
663|3de2cf|        language: Language?
664|a856f5|    ) -> [SecurityWarning] {
665|a1871e|        var warnings: [SecurityWarning] = []
666|d6ed84|        
667|d38e40|        guard let lang = language else { return warnings }
668|0dcf94|        let patterns = getPatterns(for: lang)
669|d6ed84|        
670|cb5744|        for (pattern, severity) in patterns.unsafePatterns {
671|ae688c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) {
672|d63259|                let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
673|5adc20|                let matches = regex.matches(in: code, options: [], range: range)
674|216278|                
675|7adf33|                for match in matches {
676|ab4bd7|                    let line = findLineNumber(for: match.range, in: lines)
677|862ba4|                    let message = "Unsafe pattern '\(pattern)' detected"
678|dd2193|                    
679|658568|                    let category: SecurityWarning.Category
680|e0cac4|                    if pattern.contains("unsafe") || pattern.contains("Pointer") {
681|bf8027|                        category = .unsafeCode
682|540066|                    } else {
683|bf8027|                        category = .unsafeCode
684|c9717a|                    }
685|dd2193|                    
686|6ce799|                    warnings.append(SecurityWarning(
687|7507a6|                        severity: severity,
688|3f6f45|                        category: category,
689|2f4699|                        pattern: pattern,
690|3ce613|                        line: line,
691|1c5846|                        message: message,
692|0dc997|                        suggestion: "Review and use safe alternatives"
693|c89922|                    ))
694|4e2d32|                }
695|a7dc16|            }
696|5f3077|        }
697|d6ed84|        
698|ff5dbb|        return warnings
699|27e597|    }
700|b4687f|    
701|4c6988|    private func findCryptoIssues(code: String, lines: [String]) -> [SecurityWarning] {
702|a1871e|        var warnings: [SecurityWarning] = []
703|d6ed84|        
704|608591|        let cryptoPatterns = [
705|35aefb|            ("Math\\.random\\s*\\(\\s*\\)", SecurityWarning.Severity.high, "Weak random number generator"),
706|5b9d43|            ("MD5|SHA1[^2-9]", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Weak hash algorithm"),
707|cc9161|            ("crypto\\.createHash\\s*\\(\\s*['\"](md5|sha1)['\"]", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Weak hash algorithm")
708|220505|        ]
709|d6ed84|        
710|7b3a5b|        for (pattern, severity, description) in cryptoPatterns {
711|4b744c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: [.caseInsensitive]) {
712|d63259|                let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
713|5adc20|                let matches = regex.matches(in: code, options: [], range: range)
714|216278|                
715|7adf33|                for match in matches {

717|6ce799|                    warnings.append(SecurityWarning(
718|7507a6|                        severity: severity,
719|5b8c5a|                        category: .crypto,
720|2f4699|                        pattern: pattern,
721|3ce613|                        line: line,
722|1ae948|                        message: description,
723|388620|                        suggestion: "Use crypto.getRandomValues or Web Crypto API"
724|c89922|                    ))
725|4e2d32|                }
726|a7dc16|            }
727|5f3077|        }
728|d6ed84|        
729|ff5dbb|        return warnings
730|27e597|    }
731|b4687f|    
732|76d6a2|    private func findResourceExhaustion(code: String, lines: [String]) -> [SecurityWarning] {
733|a1871e|        var warnings: [SecurityWarning] = []
734|d6ed84|        
735|cc6cbf|        let resourcePatterns = [
736|04dde3|            ("while\\s*\\(\\s*true\\s*\\)", SecurityWarning.Severity.high, "Infinite loop risk"),
737|fb03dd|            ("for\\s*\\(\\s*;;\\s*\\)", SecurityWarning.Severity.high, "Infinite loop risk"),
738|5dab97|            ("Array\\s*\\(\\s*[0-9]{7,}\\s*\\)", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Large array allocation"),
739|22898c|            ("new\\s+Array\\s*\\(\\s*[0-9]{7,}\\s*\\)", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Large array allocation"),
740|1d856e|            ("setInterval\\s*\\(", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Unbounded interval")
741|220505|        ]
742|d6ed84|        
743|2fa925|        for (pattern, severity, description) in resourcePatterns {
744|ae688c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) {
745|d63259|                let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
746|5adc20|                let matches = regex.matches(in: code, options: [], range: range)
747|216278|                
748|7adf33|                for match in matches {
749|ab4bd7|                    let line = findLineNumber(for: match.range, in: lines)
750|6ce799|                    warnings.append(SecurityWarning(
751|7507a6|                        severity: severity,
752|3efd30|                        category: .resourceExhaustion,
753|2f4699|                        pattern: pattern,
754|3ce613|                        line: line,
755|1ae948|                        message: description,
756|9aeeeb|                        suggestion: "Add termination conditions and resource limits"
757|c89922|                    ))
758|4e2d32|                }
759|a7dc16|            }
760|5f3077|        }
761|d6ed84|        
762|ff5dbb|        return warnings
763|27e597|    }

765|1ff4e7|    private func findPrivacyIssues(code: String, lines: [String]) -> [SecurityWarning] {
766|a1871e|        var warnings: [SecurityWarning] = []
767|d6ed84|        
768|9ff499|        let privacyPatterns = [
769|f17fd7|            ("localStorage", SecurityWarning.Severity.low, "localStorage access"),
770|6e5abd|            ("sessionStorage", SecurityWarning.Severity.low, "sessionStorage access"),
771|434fe7|            ("document\\.cookie", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Cookie access"),
772|971e37|            ("navigator\\.geolocation", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Geolocation access"),
773|bbcd85|            ("Notification\\.requestPermission", SecurityWarning.Severity.low, "Notification permission"),
774|e20bc3|            ("getUserMedia|getDisplayMedia", SecurityWarning.Severity.medium, "Media device access")
775|220505|        ]
776|d6ed84|        
777|921e75|        for (pattern, severity, description) in privacyPatterns {
778|ae688c|            if let regex = try? NSRegularExpression(pattern: pattern, options: []) {
779|d63259|                let range = NSRange(code.startIndex..., in: code)
780|5adc20|                let matches = regex.matches(in: code, options: [], range: range)
781|216278|                
782|7adf33|                for match in matches {
783|ab4bd7|                    let line = findLineNumber(for: match.range, in: lines)
784|6ce799|                    warnings.append(SecurityWarning(
785|7507a6|                        severity: severity,
786|691e82|                        category: .privacy,
787|2f4699|                        pattern: pattern,
788|3ce613|                        line: line,
789|1ae948|                        message: description,
790|e30def|                        suggestion: "Ensure user consent and data protection compliance"
791|c89922|                    ))
792|4e2d32|                }
793|a7dc16|            }
794|5f3077|        }
795|d6ed84|        
796|ff5dbb|        return warnings
797|27e597|    }
798|b4687f|    
799|884041|    // MARK: - Risk Assessment
800|b4687f|    
801|23af99|    private func calculateRisk(
802|2c5955|        warnings: [SecurityWarning],
803|5aceec|        usesNetwork: Bool,
804|cbf9a8|        usesFileSystem: Bool,
805|bcf238|        complexity: ComplexityScore,
806|08e0a0|        imports: [String]
807|e6a896|    ) -> RiskAssessment {
808|268b95|        var score = 0
809|d6ed84|        
810|bdfdb8|        // Critical warnings add 30 points each
811|c51f5b|        let criticalCount = warnings.filter { $0.severity == .critical }.count
812|51ecce|        score += criticalCount * 30
813|d6ed84|        
814|ec34a7|        // High severity warnings add 15 points each
815|d9bf09|        let highCount = warnings.filter { $0.severity == .high }.count
816|a0dc4b|        score += highCount * 15
817|d6ed84|        
818|7b2f68|        // Medium severity warnings add 5 points each
819|bbe96e|        let mediumCount = warnings.filter { $0.severity == .medium }.count
820|58d78f|        score += mediumCount * 5
821|d6ed84|        
822|6ca8c7|        // Low severity warnings add 1 point each
823|501fc3|        let lowCount = warnings.filter { $0.severity == .low }.count
824|7fb3e7|        score += lowCount * 1
825|d6ed84|        
826|c808c1|        // Network access adds 10 points
827|c4508e|        if usesNetwork {
828|a107ef|            score += 10
829|5f3077|        }
830|d6ed84|        
831|7e7891|        // File system access adds 20 points (more dangerous on device)
832|e23b5d|        if usesFileSystem {
833|515844|            score += 20
834|5f3077|        }
835|d6ed84|        
836|64af24|        // High complexity adds up to 15 points
837|425b8b|        score += min(15, complexity.score / 5)
838|d6ed84|        
839|853ea4|        // External imports add 5 points each (max 25)
840|d76d84|        score += min(25, imports.count * 5)
841|d6ed84|        
842|225f55|        let finalScore = min(100, score)
843|d6ed84|        
844|2c95fe|        return RiskAssessment(
845|942b36|            score: finalScore,
846|74c44b|            warnings: warnings,
847|0a8eff|            canRunOnDevice: finalScore < 80,
848|0e1d1b|            requiresSandbox: finalScore >= 40 || usesFileSystem || usesNetwork,
849|a8f7fb|            requiresNetwork: usesNetwork,
850|5542d5|            requiresFileSystem: usesFileSystem
851|3143a4|        )
852|27e597|    }
853|b4687f|    
854|0138e5|    // MARK: - Suggestions
855|b4687f|    
856|d8b1a4|    private func generateSuggestions(
857|562215|        language: Language,
858|2c5955|        warnings: [SecurityWarning],
859|5aceec|        usesNetwork: Bool,
860|cbf9a8|        usesFileSystem: Bool,
861|bcf238|        complexity: ComplexityScore,
862|08e0a0|        imports: [String]
863|0077cf|    ) -> [OptimizationSuggestion] {
864|f893b5|        var suggestions: [OptimizationSuggestion] = []
865|d6ed84|        
866|e39b34|        // Execution location recommendation
867|1979bd|        if usesNetwork && !usesFileSystem && complexity.isSimple {
868|a22d76|            suggestions.append(OptimizationSuggestion(
869|9d5074|                type: .useRemote,
870|238115|                message: "Network-only operations can run remotely for better isolation",
871|0551a6|                alternative: "Consider executing on remote server",
872|1c1996|                estimatedImpact: .medium
873|30ec32|            ))
874|338953|        } else if !usesNetwork && !usesFileSystem && complexity.isSimple {
875|a22d76|            suggestions.append(OptimizationSuggestion(
876|befd4f|                type: .useOnDevice,
877|e562e1|                message: "Simple computation with no I/O - ideal for on-device execution",
878|c2e4dd|                alternative: nil,
879|3c93d7|                estimatedImpact: .high
880|30ec32|            ))
881|5f3077|        }
882|d6ed84|        
883|4257f3|        // Complexity reduction
884|970676|        if complexity.isComplex {
885|a22d76|            suggestions.append(OptimizationSuggestion(
886|0c843d|                type: .reduceComplexity,
887|4c23e0|                message: "Code complexity is high (\\(complexity.score)/100)",
888|76292a|                alternative: "Consider breaking into smaller functions",
889|1c1996|                estimatedImpact: .medium
890|30ec32|            ))
891|5f3077|        }
892|d6ed84|        
893|54a61a|        // Caching for network operations
894|c4508e|        if usesNetwork {
895|a22d76|            suggestions.append(OptimizationSuggestion(
896|2b79a5|                type: .addCaching,
897|011726|                message: "Network operations detected - consider response caching",
898|f85a93|                alternative: "Implement cache layer for API responses",
899|3c93d7|                estimatedImpact: .high
900|30ec32|            ))
901|5f3077|        }
902|d6ed84|        
903|c1e8b0|        // Replace unsafe patterns
904|35a5ec|        for warning in warnings where warning.severity == .critical || warning.severity == .high {
905|a22d76|            suggestions.append(OptimizationSuggestion(
906|ea6761|                type: .replaceFeature,
907|364bdb|                message: "Replace unsafe pattern: \\(warning.pattern)",
908|f68abd|                alternative: warning.suggestion,
909|3c93d7|                estimatedImpact: .high
910|30ec32|            ))
911|5f3077|        }
912|d6ed84|        
913|9da787|        return suggestions
914|27e597|    }
915|b4687f|    
916|409e41|    private func determineExecutionRecommendation(
917|7db5fa|        riskAssessment: RiskAssessment,
918|2c5955|        warnings: [SecurityWarning],
919|5736dc|        complexity: ComplexityScore
920|a16492|    ) -> CodeAnalysisResult.ExecutionRecommendation {
921|1346e8|        let hasCritical = warnings.contains { $0.severity == .critical }
922|7f2424|        let hasHigh = warnings.contains { $0.severity == .high }
923|d6ed84|        
924|04f829|        if hasCritical {
925|e3888e|            return .blocked
926|5f3077|        }
927|d6ed84|        
928|6ff4d7|        if riskAssessment.score >= 80 {
929|29dc62|            return .requiresReview
930|5f3077|        }
931|d6ed84|        
932|a4975e|        if hasHigh || riskAssessment.score >= 60 {
933|23990c|            return .remoteOnly
934|5f3077|        }
935|d6ed84|        
936|f662f4|        if riskAssessment.requiresSandbox || riskAssessment.score >= 40 {
937|eba298|            return .sandboxedOnDevice
938|5f3077|        }
939|d6ed84|        
940|6df31f|        return .safeOnDevice
941|27e597|    }
942|b4687f|    
943|e95269|    // MARK: - Cache Management
944|b4687f|    
945|5d9fd6|    private func hashCode(_ code: String) -> String {
946|35805b|        let data = Data(code.utf8)
947|8002b6|        var hash = data.reduce(0) { $0 &+ Int($1) }
948|d1822f|        hash = hash &+ code.count * 31
949|dbd808|        return String(format: "%08X", hash)
950|27e597|    }
951|b4687f|    
952|3a32d9|    private func getCachedAnalysis(hash: String) -> CodeAnalysisResult? {
953|98f033|        return cacheQueue.sync {
954|d06d28|            guard let cached = cache[hash],
955|69bc4f|                  Date().timeIntervalSince(cached.timestamp) < cacheExpiration else {
956|15034a|                return nil
957|a7dc16|            }
958|91bdc5|            return cached.result
959|5f3077|        }
960|27e597|    }
961|b4687f|    
962|23e37a|    private func cacheAnalysis(hash: String, result: CodeAnalysisResult) {
963|1553f6|        cacheQueue.sync {
964|20af11|            // Evict oldest if at capacity
965|dc3bb6|            if cache.count >= maxCacheSize {
966|f671cd|                let oldest = cache.min { $0.value.timestamp < $1.value.timestamp }
967|eaa2aa|                if let key = oldest?.key {
968|19d907|                    cache.removeValue(forKey: key)
969|4e2d32|                }
970|a7dc16|            }
971|3070d1|            
972|595258|            cache[hash] = CachedAnalysis(
973|bc1be0|                result: result,
974|d313e8|                timestamp: Date(),
975|105fbc|                codeHash: hash
976|43d041|            )
977|5f3077|        }
978|27e597|    }
979|b4687f|    
980|5cbba4|    private func findLineNumber(for range: NSRange, in lines: [String]) -> Int? {
981|3029d6|        var currentIndex = 0
982|035521|        for (index, line) in lines.enumerated() {
983|dc1ec5|            let lineRange = NSRange(location: currentIndex, length: line.count)
984|a8003f|            if range.location >= lineRange.location && 
985|ea6c0f|               range.location < lineRange.location + lineRange.length + 1 {
986|ac600d|                return index + 1 // 1-based line numbers
987|a7dc16|            }
988|a680f6|            currentIndex += line.count + 1 // +1 for newline
989|5f3077|        }
990|c2ae65|        return nil
991|27e597|    }

47|9f79f4|    /// Tests the complete workflow from code input to result retrieval
48|5d7d28|    func testFullWorkflow() throws {
49|b7b8d9|        // Given: User writes code
50|650c2f|        let code = """
51|16eb53|        function calculateSum(a, b) {
52|6b37fa|            return a + b;
53|5f3077|        }
54|ab8eb2|        calculateSum(10, 20);
55|c70080|        """
56|3cf452|        let request = ExecutionRequest(code: code, language: .javascript)
57|d6ed84|        
58|b92085|        // When: RunnerSelector analyzes and selects appropriate runner
59|39749b|        let selectedRunner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
60|29b513|        XCTAssertNotNil(selectedRunner, "Runner should be selected")
61|ff95bc|        XCTAssertTrue(selectedRunner is JSRunner, "Should select JSRunner for JavaScript code")
62|d6ed84|        
63|7c6e82|        // When: Runner executes the code
64|c9934c|        let expectation = self.expectation(description: "Code execution completes")
65|f99387|        var executionResult: ExecutionResult?
66|d6ed84|        
67|fc8c8d|        selectedRunner.execute(request) { result in
68|c309e8|            executionResult = result
69|fe69e2|            expectation.fulfill()
70|5f3077|        }
71|d6ed84|        
72|e3ced6|        wait(for: [expectation], timeout: 5.0)
73|d6ed84|        
74|4d198e|        // Then: Results are returned correctly
75|d145e0|        XCTAssertNotNil(executionResult)
76|adc5ee|        XCTAssertTrue(executionResult?.success ?? false, "Execution should succeed")
77|4d53a9|        XCTAssertEqual(executionResult?.output as? Int, 30, "Should return sum 30")
78|27e597|    }

89|a022a5|            return fibonacci(n - 1) + fibonacci(n - 2);
90|5f3077|        }
91|d6ed84|        
92|da29f3|        console.log('Starting fibonacci calculation...');
93|b6e1a2|        const result = fibonacci(10);
94|46c5af|        console.log('Result:', result);
95|25f5b1|        result;
96|c70080|        """
97|d6ed84|        
98|858458|        let request = ExecutionRequest(code: algorithmCode, language: .javascript)
99|7dd774|        let runner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
100|d6ed84|        
101|b9afcc|        // When: Execute algorithm

103|249c93|        var result: ExecutionResult?

107|fe69e2|            expectation.fulfill()

114|ea03e6|        XCTAssertTrue(result?.success ?? false)

154|b4687f|    
155|48d54d|    /// Tests fallback when on-device execution fails
156|894134|    func testOnDeviceFailureFallback() throws {
157|5a2d32|        // Given: Code that exceeds on-device limits (simulated)
158|88a3d8|        let failingCode = "while(true) {}" // Infinite loop simulation
159|5b58b4|        let request = ExecutionRequest(code: failingCode, language: .javascript)
160|d6ed84|        
161|18dbe9|        // Configure runner with short timeout to simulate failure
162|7dd774|        let runner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
163|16413f|        runner.configuration.timeout = 0.1 // 100ms timeout
164|d6ed84|        
165|96dc65|        let expectation = self.expectation(description: "Fallback suggestion")
166|249c93|        var result: ExecutionResult?
167|d6ed84|        
168|f03e3f|        runner.execute(request) { executionResult in
169|c96777|            result = executionResult
170|fe69e2|            expectation.fulfill()
171|5f3077|        }
172|d6ed84|        
173|eba9a8|        wait(for: [expectation], timeout: 2.0)
174|d6ed84|        
175|e90f7c|        // Then: Execution fails and suggests remote execution
176|bcff99|        XCTAssertNotNil(result)
177|3b8753|        XCTAssertFalse(result?.success ?? true, "Execution should fail")
178|fd7260|        XCTAssertTrue(result?.shouldFallbackToRemote ?? false, "Should suggest remote execution")
179|a84e7c|        XCTAssertEqual(result?.fallbackReason, ExecutionError.timeout)
180|27e597|    }
181|b4687f|    
182|d56764|    /// Tests error message when remote is unavailable
183|5c9ffc|    func testRemoteUnavailableError() throws {
184|fb2e42|        // Given: Request with remote unavailable flag
185|fa4434|        let code = "console.log('test');"
186|e05f69|        var request = ExecutionRequest(code: code, language: .javascript)
187|daafc2|        request.remoteExecutionAvailable = false
188|d6ed84|        
189|1552d8|        // Simulate scenario where code requires remote but remote unavailable
190|4bc8de|        let complexCode = """
191|e992e8|        // Code requiring more resources than available on-device
192|0eda26|        const largeArray = new Array(1000000000);
193|61f7b4|        largeArray.fill(0);
194|c70080|        """
195|275e86|        request = ExecutionRequest(code: complexCode, language: .javascript)
196|daafc2|        request.remoteExecutionAvailable = false
197|d6ed84|        
198|f11213|        let expectation = self.expectation(description: "Remote unavailable error")
199|249c93|        var result: ExecutionResult?
200|d6ed84|        
201|7dd774|        let runner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
202|f03e3f|        runner.execute(request) { executionResult in
203|c96777|            result = executionResult
204|fe69e2|            expectation.fulfill()
205|5f3077|        }
206|d6ed84|        
207|e3ced6|        wait(for: [expectation], timeout: 5.0)
208|d6ed84|        
209|33a961|        // Then: Appropriate error message shown
210|4abc8b|        XCTAssertFalse(result?.success ?? true)
211|8cb78c|        XCTAssertTrue(result?.errorMessage?.contains("Remote execution unavailable") ?? false)
212|53ab89|        XCTAssertTrue(result?.errorMessage?.contains("insufficient resources") ?? false)
213|27e597|    }
214|b4687f|    
215|d1c158|    // MARK: - Test 4: Concurrent Execution
216|b4687f|    
217|0a2976|    /// Tests multiple scripts executing simultaneously with resource isolation
218|2fdbcf|    func testConcurrentExecution() throws {
219|2c0bb0|        // Given: Multiple independent scripts
220|b4dc64|        let scripts = [
221|06b7a9|            ("script1", "function add(a,b){return a+b;} add(5,10);"),
222|c1b39e|            ("script2", "function mul(a,b){return a*b;} mul(6,7);"),
223|2d8014|            ("script3", "function sub(a,b){return a-b;} sub(20,8);"),
224|83ae53|            ("script4", "function div(a,b){return a/b;} div(100,4);"),
225|220505|        ]
226|d6ed84|        
227|5cbf7d|        let expectations = scripts.map { name, _ in
228|7996f3|            self.expectation(description: "Execution of \(name)")
229|5f3077|        }
230|d6ed84|        
231|58e63f|        var results: [String: ExecutionResult] = [:]
232|096941|        let resultsLock = NSLock()
233|d6ed84|        
234|6ef971|        // When: Execute all scripts concurrently
235|963f5b|        for (index, (name, code)) in scripts.enumerated() {
236|b447de|            let request = ExecutionRequest(code: code, language: .javascript)
237|4d5ed2|            let runner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
238|3070d1|            
239|4def44|            DispatchQueue.global().async {
240|61b5b6|                runner.execute(request) { result in
241|6b3ef1|                    resultsLock.lock()
242|2c5825|                    results[name] = result
243|c06f33|                    resultsLock.unlock()
244|0b3451|                    expectations[index].fulfill()
245|4e2d32|                }
246|a7dc16|            }
247|5f3077|        }
248|d6ed84|        
249|f7e50a|        wait(for: expectations, timeout: 15.0)
250|d6ed84|        
251|1c9388|        // Then: All scripts complete with correct isolated results
252|1465b2|        XCTAssertEqual(results.count, 4)
253|cef152|        XCTAssertEqual(results["script1"]?.output as? Int, 15)
254|511339|        XCTAssertEqual(results["script2"]?.output as? Int, 42)
255|dba162|        XCTAssertEqual(results["script3"]?.output as? Int, 12)
256|fef812|        XCTAssertEqual(results["script4"]?.output as? Int, 25)
257|d6ed84|        
258|d2cbd9|        // Then: Resource isolation maintained (no cross-contamination)
259|e8dd4b|        for (_, result) in results {
260|d95bf6|            XCTAssertTrue(result.success)
261|91bd73|            XCTAssertNil(result.errorMessage)
262|5f3077|        }
263|27e597|    }
264|b4687f|    
265|2c248d|    /// Tests resource isolation between concurrent executions
266|048262|    func testResourceIsolation() throws {
267|7c72e0|        // Given: Scripts that try to modify shared state
268|b4dc64|        let scripts = [
269|84d7a9|            ("isolation1", "var globalVar = 'script1'; globalVar;"),
270|9f946f|            ("isolation2", "var globalVar = 'script2'; globalVar;"),
271|220505|        ]
272|d6ed84|        
273|5cbf7d|        let expectations = scripts.map { name, _ in
274|568da5|            self.expectation(description: "Isolation test for \(name)")
275|5f3077|        }
276|d6ed84|        
277|58e63f|        var results: [String: ExecutionResult] = [:]
278|096941|        let resultsLock = NSLock()
279|d6ed84|        
280|bf82b2|        // When: Execute concurrently
281|963f5b|        for (index, (name, code)) in scripts.enumerated() {
282|b447de|            let request = ExecutionRequest(code: code, language: .javascript)
283|4d5ed2|            let runner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
284|3070d1|            
285|4def44|            DispatchQueue.global().async {
286|61b5b6|                runner.execute(request) { result in
287|6b3ef1|                    resultsLock.lock()
288|2c5825|                    results[name] = result
289|c06f33|                    resultsLock.unlock()
290|0b3451|                    expectations[index].fulfill()
291|4e2d32|                }
292|a7dc16|            }
293|5f3077|        }
294|d6ed84|        
295|4efdda|        wait(for: expectations, timeout: 10.0)
296|d6ed84|        
297|f494b8|        // Then: Each script has its own isolated global scope
298|8a1a81|        XCTAssertEqual(results["isolation1"]?.output as? String, "script1")
299|0e41e9|        XCTAssertEqual(results["isolation2"]?.output as? String, "script2")
300|27e597|    }
301|b4687f|    
302|4214a1|    // MARK: - Test 5: Persistence
303|b4687f|    
304|ed65fd|    /// Tests saving execution history
305|ae7072|    func testSaveExecutionHistory() throws {
306|244dfe|        // Given: Multiple executions
307|f9a774|        let executions = [
308|01deec|            ("console.log('test1'); 'result1'", "result1"),
309|184e76|            ("console.log('test2'); 'result2'", "result2"),
310|eb1c43|            ("console.log('test3'); 42", 42),
311|220505|        ]
312|d6ed84|        
313|e2fd8b|        // When: Execute and save each
314|38cb67|        for (code, _) in executions {
315|b447de|            let request = ExecutionRequest(code: code, language: .javascript)
316|4d5ed2|            let runner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
317|3070d1|            
318|f8e206|            let expectation = self.expectation(description: "Execution")
319|d5d718|            var result: ExecutionResult?
320|3070d1|            
321|c99572|            runner.execute(request) { executionResult in
322|3c268e|                result = executionResult
323|19a9cd|                // Save to history
324|63b8a1|                if let executionResult = executionResult {
325|d64f03|                    self.executionHistory.save(executionResult)
326|4e2d32|                }
327|a3c4f7|                expectation.fulfill()
328|a7dc16|            }
329|3070d1|            
330|b5c2c5|            wait(for: [expectation], timeout: 5.0)
331|5f3077|        }
332|d6ed84|        
333|304b97|        // Then: History contains all executions
334|26aacf|        let history = executionHistory.allExecutions()
335|c6f579|        XCTAssertEqual(history.count, 3)
336|d6ed84|        
337|f7afc4|        // Then: History entries are complete
338|eda3af|        for entry in history {
339|a3a0b5|            XCTAssertNotNil(entry.id)
340|993943|            XCTAssertNotNil(entry.timestamp)
341|d7f4fd|            XCTAssertNotNil(entry.code)
342|32968f|            XCTAssertNotNil(entry.output)
343|5f3077|        }
344|27e597|    }
345|b4687f|    
346|80e4fe|    /// Tests restoring results from history
347|ac88db|    func testRestoreResults() throws {
348|90d6ca|        // Given: Executed and saved code
349|d6ba93|        let code = "function greet(name) { return 'Hello, ' + name; } greet('World');"
350|3cf452|        let request = ExecutionRequest(code: code, language: .javascript)
351|7dd774|        let runner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
352|d6ed84|        
353|98e7df|        let expectation = self.expectation(description: "Execution")
354|2a931e|        var savedResult: ExecutionResult?
355|d6ed84|        
356|fcd6d6|        runner.execute(request) { result in
357|7dcf67|            savedResult = result
358|01d36d|            if let result = result {
359|61e175|                self.executionHistory.save(result)
360|a7dc16|            }
361|fe69e2|            expectation.fulfill()
362|5f3077|        }
363|d6ed84|        
364|e3ced6|        wait(for: [expectation], timeout: 5.0)
365|d6ed84|        
366|2c3a43|        // When: Restore from history
367|26aacf|        let history = executionHistory.allExecutions()
368|0721e8|        XCTAssertFalse(history.isEmpty)
369|d6ed84|        
370|60cf11|        let restored = history.first { $0.code == code }
371|b72c6d|        XCTAssertNotNil(restored)
372|d6ed84|        
373|7f228a|        // Then: Restored result matches original
374|e858b4|        XCTAssertEqual(restored?.output as? String, "Hello, World")
375|6455d6|        XCTAssertEqual(restored?.success, savedResult?.success)
376|776f42|        XCTAssertEqual(restored?.consoleOutput, savedResult?.consoleOutput)
377|27e597|    }
378|b4687f|    
379|286922|    /// Tests history persistence across app sessions
380|9a12f7|    func testHistoryPersistenceAcrossSessions() throws {
381|7857ac|        // Given: Saved execution
382|306048|        let code = "'persistent result';"
383|3cf452|        let request = ExecutionRequest(code: code, language: .javascript)
384|7dd774|        let runner = try runnerSelector.selectRunner(for: request)
385|d6ed84|        
386|98e7df|        let expectation = self.expectation(description: "Execution")
387|d6ed84|        
388|fcd6d6|        runner.execute(request) { result in
389|01d36d|            if let result = result {
390|61e175|                self.executionHistory.save(result)
391|a7dc16|            }
392|fe69e2|            expectation.fulfill()
393|5f3077|        }
394|d6ed84|        
395|e3ced6|        wait(for: [expectation], timeout: 5.0)
396|d6ed84|        
397|5c8fd2|        // When: Create new history instance (simulating app restart)
398|809080|        let newHistory = ExecutionHistory()
399|d6ed84|        
400|6061b2|        // Then: History restored from storage
401|cc649d|        let restoredHistory = newHistory.allExecutions()
402|a97f94|        XCTAssertFalse(restoredHistory.isEmpty, "History should persist across sessions")
403|d6ed84|        
404|5b0d51|        let restoredEntry = restoredHistory.first { $0.code == code }
405|48e148|        XCTAssertNotNil(restoredEntry)
406|0fcd49|        XCTAssertEqual(restoredEntry?.output as? String, "persistent result")
407|27e597|    }
